title_en: All People That on Earth Do Dwell

lines.en: Psalm 100
All people that on earth do dwell,
Sing to the Lord with cheerful voice;
Him serve with fear, his praise forthtell,
lines.ko: 그분은 두려움으로 섬기시며 그분을 찬양할 것입니다.

lines.en: Come ye before him and rejoice.
The Lord ye know is God indeed;
Without our aid he did us make;
lines.ko: 우리의 도움 없이 그는 우리를 만들었습니다.

lines.en: We are his folk, he doth us feed,
lines.ko: 우리는 그분의 백성입니다. 그분은 우리에게 먹이를 주시고,

lines.en: And for his sheep he doth us take.
lines.ko: 그리고 그분은 그분의 양을 위해 우리를 취하십니다.

lines.en: O enter then his gates with praise,
Approach with joy his courts unto;
Praise, laud, and bless his name always,
lines.ko: 그 이름을 항상 찬양하고 찬송하며 송축하라

lines.en: For it is seemly so to do.
lines.ko: 왜냐하면 그렇게 하는 것 같기 때문입니다.

lines.en: For why? the Lord our God is good,
His mercy is for ever sure;
His truth at all times firmly stood,
lines.ko: 그분의 진리는 언제나 굳게 서 있었고,

lines.en: And shall from age to age endure.

title_en: O Worship the King

lines.en: O wor-ship the King, all glo-rious a-bove,
lines.id: Wahai sembahlah Raja, yang mulia di atas,

lines.en: And grate-ful-ly sing His won-der-ful love:
lines.id: Dan dengan penuh rasa syukur menyanyikan kasih-Nya yang menakjubkan:

lines.en: Our Shield and De-fend-er, the An-cient of Days,
lines.id: Perisai dan Pembela Kami, Yang Purba Harinya,

lines.en: Pa-vil-ioned in splen-dor, and gird-ed with praise.
lines.id: Dipakai dalam kemegahan, dan disandang dengan pujian.

lines.en: O tell of His might, and sing of His grace,
lines.id: O ceritakan keperkasaan-Nya, dan nyanyikan rahmat-Nya,

lines.ko: 그 옷은 햇빛 그 집은 궁창
lines.en: Whose rove is the light, whose can-o-py space.
lines.id: Yang penjelajahannya adalah cahaya, yang ruang kanopinya.

lines.en: His char-iots of wrath the deep thun-der-clouds form,
lines.id: Kereta amarahnya membentuk awan guntur yang dalam,

lines.en: And dark is His path on the wings of the storm .
lines.id: Dan gelaplah jalan-Nya di atas sayap badai.

lines.en: The earth with its store of won-ders un-told,
lines.id: Bumi dengan segudang keajaiban yang tak terhitung,

lines.ko: 가득한 이 땅 다 주의 조화
lines.en: Al-might-y, Thy pow'r hath found-ed of old
lines.id: Ya ampun, kekuatan-Mu sudah ada sejak lama

lines.en: Hath stab-lish'd it fast by a change-less de-cree,
lines.id: Telah menikamnya dengan cepat dengan keputusan tanpa perubahan,

lines.en: And round it hath cast, like a man-tle, the sea.
lines.id: Dan disekelilingnya terbentang laut bagaikan mantel.

lines.en: Frail chil-dren of dust, and fee-ble as frail,
lines.id: Anak-anak yang lemah dari debu, dan lemah seperti lemah,

lines.en: In Thee do we trust, nor find Thee to fail.
lines.id: Kepada-Mu kami percaya, dan kami tidak mendapati Engkau gagal.

lines.en: Thy mer-cies how ten-der! how firm to the end!
lines.id: Rahmat-Mu sungguh lembut! betapa tegasnya sampai akhir!

lines.ko: 그 자비 영원히 변함 없어라 아멘
lines.en: Our Mak-er, Do-fend-er, Re-deem-er, and Friend!
lines.id: Pembuat, Pelaku, Penebus Ulang, dan Teman kami!

title_id: Wahai Sembahlah Raja Yang Maha Mulia

title_en: Give to Our God Immortal Praise

lines.en: From Psalm 136
Give to our God immortal praise;
Mercy and truth are all his ways,
Wonders of grace to God belong:
Repeat his mercies in your song.
Give to the Lord of lords renown;
The King of kings with glory crown:
lines.ko: 영광의 왕관을 쓴 왕 중의 왕:

lines.en: His mercies ever shall endure,
When lords and kings are known no more.
lines.ko: 군주와 왕이 더 이상 알려지지 않을 때.

lines.en: He built the earth, he spread the sky,
And fixed the starry lights on high:
Wonders of grace to God belong:
Repeat his mercies in your song.
He fills the sun with morning light;
He bids the moon direct the night:
His mercies ever shall endure
When suns and moons shall shine no more.
lines.ko: 해와 달이 더 이상 빛나지 않을 때.

lines.en: He sent his Son with power to save
From guilt, and darkness, and the grave:
Wonders of grace to God belong
Repeat his mercies in your song.
Through this vain world he guides our feet,
lines.ko: 이 헛된 세상을 통하여 그분께서 우리 발을 인도하시며

lines.en: And leads us to his heavenly seat:
lines.ko: 그리고 우리를 그분의 하늘 보좌로 인도하십니다.

lines.en: His mercies ever shall endure,
When this vain world shall be no more.
lines.ko: 이 헛된 세상이 더 이상 존재하지 않을 때.

title_en: All Praise to God, Who Reigns Above
title_ko: 위의 모든 것을 다스리시는 하나님께 찬양을 드립니다 (자체번역)

lines.en: All praise to God, who reigns above,
lines.ko: 위의 모든 것을 다스리시는 하나님께 찬양을 드립니다.

lines.en: The God of all creation,
The God of wonders, pow'r, and love,
The God of our salvation!
With healing balm my soul he fills,
The God who every sorrow stills,
To God all praise and glory!
What God's almighty pow'r hath made
His gracious mercy keepeth;
By morning dawn or evening shade
His watchful eye ne'er sleepeth;
lines.ko: 그분의 주의 깊은 눈은 결코 잠들지 않으십니다.

lines.en: Within the kingdom of his might,
Lo, all is just and all is right,
lines.ko: 보라, 모든 것이 정의롭고 모든 것이 옳다.

lines.en: To God all praise and glory!
I cried to him in time of need:
lines.ko: 나는 필요할 때 그분께 이렇게 외쳤습니다.

lines.en: Lord God, O, hear my calling!
lines.ko: 주 하나님, 오, 나의 부르심을 들어주소서!

lines.en: For death he gave me life indeed
lines.ko: 죽음을 위해 그분은 나에게 참된 생명을 주셨습니다

lines.en: And kept my feet from falling.
lines.ko: 그리고 내 발이 넘어지지 않게 지켜 주셨습니다.

lines.en: For this my thanks shall endless be;
lines.ko: 이에 대한 나의 감사는 끝이 없을 것입니다.

lines.en: O thank him, thank our God, with me,
lines.ko: 오 그에게 감사합니다, 나와 함께 계신 우리 하느님께 감사드립니다.

lines.en: To God all praise and glory!
The Lord forsaketh not his flock,
lines.ko: 여호와께서는 자기 양 떼를 버리지 아니하시고

lines.en: His chosen generation;
He is their refuge and their rock,
Their peace and their salvation.
As with a mother's tender hand
He leads his own, his chosen band,
lines.ko: 그는 자신이 선택한 밴드를 이끌고 있습니다.

lines.en: To God all praise and glory!
Ye who confess Christ's holy name,
To God give praise and glory!
Ye who the Father's power proclaim,
To God give praise and glory!
All idols under foot be trod,
lines.ko: 발 아래 있는 모든 우상은 짓밟히고,

lines.en: The Lord is God! the Lord is God!
To God all praise and glory!
Then come before his presence now
lines.ko: 그렇다면 지금 그의 임재 앞으로 나오라

lines.en: And banish fear and sadness;
To your Redeemer pay your vow
And sing with joy and gladness:
Though great distress my soul befell,
The Lord, my God, did all things well,
lines.ko: 나의 하나님 여호와께서 모든 일을 선하게 행하셨으니

lines.en: To God all praise and glory!

title_en: God, My King, Thy Might Confessing
title_ko: 나의 왕이신 하나님, 당신의 능력을 고백합니다 (자체번역)

lines.en: From Psalm 145
God, my King, thy might confessing,
lines.ko: 나의 왕이신 하나님, 당신의 능력을 고백합니다.

lines.en: Ever will I bless thy name;
lines.ko: 나는 언제까지나 당신의 이름을 송축할 것입니다.

lines.en: Day by day thy throne addressing,
Still will I thy praise proclaim.
Honor great our God befitteth;
lines.ko: 우리 하느님께 합당하게 큰 영광을 돌리십시오.

lines.en: Who his majesty can reach?
Age to age his work transmitteth,
Age to age his power shall teach.
lines.ko: 나이가 들수록 그의 능력은 가르칠 것입니다.

lines.en: They shall talk of all thy glory,
lines.ko: 그들은 당신의 모든 영광에 대해 이야기할 것입니다.

lines.en: On thy might and greatness dwell,
Speak of thy dread acts the story,
And thy deeds of wonder tell.
Nor shall fail from memory's treasure
Works by love and mercy wrought;
Works of love surpassing measure;
Works of mercy passing thought.
Full of kindness and compassion,
Slow to anger, vast in love,
God is good to all creation;
All his works his goodness prove.
lines.ko: 그분의 모든 일은 그분의 선하심을 증명합니다.

lines.en: All thy works, O Lord, shall bless thee;
lines.ko: 여호와여, 당신이 하시는 모든 일이 당신을 축복할 것입니다.

lines.en: Thee shall all thy saints adore:
lines.ko: 당신의 모든 성도들은 당신을 찬양할 것입니다.

lines.en: King supreme shall they confess thee,
lines.ko: 최고의 왕이여, 그들이 당신을 고백할 것입니다.

lines.en: And proclaim thy sovereign power.

title_en: O Come, My Soul, Bless Thou the Lord

lines.en: From Psalm 103
O come, my soul, bless thou the Lord thy maker,
lines.ko: 오라, 내 영혼아, 너를 지으신 여호와를 송축하라.

lines.en: And all within me bless his holy name;
lines.ko: 내 속에 있는 모든 것이 그분의 거룩한 이름을 송축합니다.

lines.en: Bless thou the Lord, forget not all his mercies,
lines.ko: 여호와를 송축하라 그 모든 긍휼을 잊지 말지어다

lines.en: His pardoning grace and saving love proclaim.
lines.ko: 그분의 용서하시는 은혜와 구원하시는 사랑이 선포됩니다.

lines.en: Bless him for ever, wondrous in might,
lines.ko: 그 능력이 놀랍고, 그를 영원히 찬양하라.

lines.en: Bless him, his servants that in his will delight.
lines.ko: 그분의 뜻을 기뻐하는 그분의 종들아, 그분을 축복하여라.

lines.en: Good is the Lord and full of kind compassion,
Most slow to anger, plenteous in love;
Rich is his grace to all that humbly seek him,
lines.ko: 겸손히 그분을 찾는 모든 사람에게 그분의 은혜가 풍성하며

lines.en: Boundless and endless as the heavens above.
His love is like a father's to his children,
lines.ko: 그의 사랑은 자식에 대한 아버지의 사랑 같으니

lines.en: Tender and kind to all who fear his name;
lines.ko: 그의 이름을 경외하는 모든 사람에게 자비와 자비를 베푸시며

lines.en: For well he knows our weakness and our frailty,
lines.ko: 그분께서는 우리의 연약함과 연약함을 잘 아시며,

lines.en: He knows that we are dust, he knows our frame.
lines.ko: 그분은 우리가 흙임을 아시고 우리의 틀도 아십니다.

lines.en: We fade and die like flowers that grow in beauty,
lines.ko: 우리는 아름답게 자라는 꽃처럼 시들고 죽습니다.

lines.en: Like tender grass that soon will disappear;
But evermore the love of God is changeless,
lines.ko: 그러나 언제나 하나님의 사랑은 변치 않으십니다.

lines.en: Still shown to those who look to him in fear.
lines.ko: 여전히 두려움 속에서 그분을 바라보는 사람들에게 보여집니다.

lines.en: High in the heavens his throne is fixed for ever,
lines.ko: 그의 보좌는 하늘에 높음으로 영원히 견고하니라

lines.en: His kingdom rules o'er all from pole to pole;
lines.ko: 그분의 왕국은 극에서 극까지 모든 것을 다스립니다.

lines.en: Bless ye the Lord through all his wide dominion,
lines.ko: 주님의 모든 넓은 통치로 주님을 송축하십시오.

lines.en: Bless his most holy name, O thou my soul.
lines.ko: 오 나의 영혼아, 그의 가장 거룩한 이름을 송축하라.

title_en: From All That Dwell below the Skies

lines.en: From Psalm 117
lines.id: Biarlah bumi dan langit Dan semuanya rendah
Puji Tuhan yang darinya segala berkat mengalir,
Yang Maha Kuasa, Tuhan Allah Semesta Alam,
Ayah dan Anak dan Roh Kudus! Amin.

lines.en: From all that dwell below the skies
Let the Creator's praise arise:
Let the Redeemer's name be sung
Through every land, by every tongue.
Eternal are thy mercies, Lord;
Eternal truth attends thy Word:
Thy praise shall sound from shore to shore
Till suns shall rise and set no more.

alt_titles: From all that dwell below the skies (tune 2)
title_id: Dari Semua Yang Tinggal Di Bawah Langit

title_en: Mighty God, While Angels Bless You
title_ko: 전능하신 하나님, 천사들이 당신을 축복하는 동안 (자체번역)

lines.en: Mighty God, while angels bless thee,
lines.ko: 전능하신 하나님, 천사들이 당신을 축복할 동안,

lines.en: May a mortal sing thy name?
lines.ko: 필멸의 인간이 당신의 이름을 부를 수 있습니까?

lines.en: Lord of men as well as angels,
Thou art every creature's theme.
Alleluia! Alleluia! Alleluia! Amen.
Lord of every land and nation,
Ancient of eternal days,
Sounded through the wide creation
Be thy just and lawful praise.
For the grandeur of thy nature,
Grand beyond the seraph's thought;
For created works of power,
Works with skill and kindness wrought.
But thy rich, thy free redemption,
lines.ko: 그러나 당신의 부자, 당신의 값없는 구원,

lines.en: Dark through brightness all along,
Thought is poor, and poor expression,
Who dare sing that awful song?
lines.ko: 누가 감히 그 끔찍한 노래를 부르나요?

lines.en: Brightness of the Father's glory,
Shall thy praise unuttered lie?
lines.ko: 당신의 찬양이 말로 표현할 수 없이 거짓이겠습니까?

lines.en: Fly, my tongue, such guilty silence,
lines.ko: 날아라, 내 혀여, 그 죄스러운 침묵이여,

lines.en: Sing the Lord who came to die:
From the highest throne in glory,
To the cross of deepest woe,
All to ransom guilty captives,
lines.ko: 모든 죄를 지은 포로들을 대속하기 위해,

lines.en: Flow my praise, for ever flow.

title_en: All You That Fear Jehovah’s Name

lines.en: Psalm 22:23ff.
All ye that fear Jehovah's Name,
His glory tell, his praise proclaim;
lines.ko: 그분의 영광을 선포하고, 그분의 찬미를 선포하십시오.

lines.en: Ye children of his chosen race,
Stand ye in awe before his face,
Stand ye in awe before his face.
The suffering one he has not spurned,
Who unto him for succor turned;
From him he has not hid his face,
But answered his request in grace,
But answered his request in grace.
O Lord, thy goodness makes me raise
lines.ko: 오 여호와여 주의 선하심이 나를 일으키시나이다

lines.en: Amid thy people songs of praise;
lines.ko: 주의 백성 가운데서 찬양의 노래를 부르며

lines.en: Before all them that fear thee, now
lines.ko: 이제 당신을 경외하는 모든 자 앞에서

lines.en: I worship thee and pay my vow,
lines.ko: 나는 당신을 경배하고 나의 서원을 이행합니다.

lines.en: I worship thee and pay my vow.
lines.ko: 나는 당신을 숭배하고 나의 서원을 이행합니다.

lines.en: The Lord's unfailing righteousness
All generations shall confess,
From age to age shall men be taught
What wondrous works the Lord has wrought
What wondrous works the Lord has wrought.

title_en: Hallelujah! Hallelujah!

lines.id: Haleluya Haleluya Mari kita beribadah kepada Tuhan bersama-sama
Haleluya Haleluya Haleluya Haleluya Haleluya

title_en: Now Blessed Be the Lord Our God

lines.en: Now blessed be the Lord our God,
The God of Israel,
For he alone doth wondrous works
In glory that excel.
And blessed be his glorious Name
To all eternity:
The whole earth let his glory fill.
lines.ko: 온 땅이 그의 영광을 가득 채울지어다.

lines.en: Amen, so let it be.

title_en: Exalt the Lord, His Praise Proclaim

lines.en: Exalt the Lord, his praise proclaim;
All ye his servants, praise his name,
lines.ko: 그분의 모든 종들아, 그분의 이름을 찬양하여라.

lines.en: Who in the Lord's house ever stand
And humbly serve at his command.
The Lord is good, his praise proclaim;
Since it is pleasant, praise his name;
lines.ko: 그 이름이 즐겁으니 그 이름을 찬양할지어다

lines.en: His people for his own he takes
lines.ko: 그분은 자신의 백성을 자신의 것으로 삼으시고

lines.en: And his peculiar treasure makes.
I know the Lord is high in state,
Above all gods our Lord is great;
The Lord performs what he decrees,
In heaven and earth, in depths and seas.
He makes the vapors to ascend
In clouds from earth's remotest end;
lines.ko: 지구의 가장 먼 끝에서 구름 속에;

lines.en: The lightnings flash at his command,
He holds the tempest in his hand.
Exalt the Lord, his praise proclaim;
All ye his servants, praise his name,
lines.ko: 그분의 모든 종들아, 그분의 이름을 찬양하여라.

lines.en: Who in the Lord's house ever stand
And humbly serve at his command.
For ever praise and bless his name,
And in the church his praise proclaim;
In Zion is his dwelling place;
Praise ye the Lord, show forth his grace.

title_en: O Come, Let Us Sing to the Lord

lines.en: Psalm 95:1-6
lines.ko: 다 나와 찬송 부르세 한 소리 높여서
lines.id: Ayo, marilah kita bernyanyi untuk Tuhan,
Kepada-Nya suara kita meninggi
Dengan suara riang gembira marilah kita ke Batu Karang
Atas pujian penyelamatan kami.

lines.en: O come, let us sing to the Lord,
lines.ko: 그 보좌 앞에 엎드려 한 없는 감사와
lines.id: Marilah kita sebelum kehadiran-Nya datang

lines.en: To him our voices raise;
lines.id: Dengan pujian, dan suara syukur

lines.en: With joyful noise let us the rock
lines.id: Marilah kita menyanyikan mazmur bagi-Nya dengan penuh rahmat,

lines.en: Of our salvation praise.
lines.id: Dan membuat suara gembira.

lines.en: Let us before his presence come
lines.id: Karena Tuhan adalah Tuhan yang agung, dan Raja yang agung

lines.en: With praise, and thankful voice;
lines.ko: 저 깊은 물과 높은 산 다 다스리시네
lines.id: Di atas semua dewa Dia adalah.

lines.en: Let us sing psalms to him with grace,
lines.id: Kedalaman bumi ada di tangan-Nya

lines.en: And make a joyful noise.
lines.id: Ketinggian bukit kita adalah milik-Nya.

lines.en: For God's a great God, and great king;
lines.ko: 다 나와 찬송 드리세 다 같이 엎드려
lines.id: Oh, marilah kita menyembah Dia

lines.en: Above all gods he is.
lines.ko: 주 앞에 무릎 꿇고서 창조주 기리세 아멘
lines.id: Mari kita sujud, bersama-sama,

lines.en: The depths of earth are in his hand;
lines.id: Dan berlutut di hadapan Tuhan,

lines.en: The heights of hills are his.
lines.id: Tuan kami, biarkan kami terjatuh.

lines.en: To him the spacious sea belongs,
For he the same did make;
The dry land also from his hands
Its form at first did take.
O come, and let us worship him;
Let us bow down withal,
And on our knees before the Lord,
Our Maker, let us fall.

title_id: O Marilah Kita Bernyanyi Bagi Tuhan

title_en: New Songs of Celebration Render

lines.en: [English lyrics not available in the database for this revised hymn]
lines.ko: [이 개정된 찬송가의 데이터베이스에는 영어 가사가 없습니다.]

title_en: Stand Up and Bless the Lord

lines.en: Stand up, and bless the Lord,
Ye people of his choice;
Stand up, and bless the Lord your God
With heart and soul and voice.
Though high above all praise,
Above all blessing high,
Who would not fear his holy name,
lines.ko: 그 거룩한 이름을 두려워하지 아니할 자가 누구이뇨

lines.en: And laud, and magnify?
O for the living flame,
From his own altar brought,
To touch our lips, our minds inspire,
And wing to heav'n our thought!
lines.ko: 그리고 우리 생각을 높이는데 날개를 달아라!

lines.en: God is our strength and song,
And his salvation ours;
Then be his love in Christ proclaimed
lines.ko: 그렇다면 그리스도 안에 있는 그분의 사랑이 선포되게 하십시오

lines.en: With all our ransomed pow'rs.
Stand up and bless the Lord;
The Lord your God adore:
Stand up, and bless his glorious Name
Henceforth for evermore.

title_en: Come, Let Us Sing unto the Lord

lines.en: Psalm 98
Come, let us sing unto the Lord
New songs of praise with sweet accord;
For wonders great by him are done,
His hand and arm the victory won.
The great salvation of our God
Is seen through all the earth abroad;
Before the heaven's wondering sight
He hath revealed his truth and right.
He called to mind his truth and grace
In promise made to Israel's race;
And unto earth's remotest bound
Glad tidings of salvation sound.
All lands, to God lift up your voice;
Sing praise to him, with shouts rejoice,
With voice of joy and loud acclaim
Let all unite and praise his name.
lines.ko: 다 함께 연합하여 그 이름을 찬양할지어다

lines.en: Praise God with harp, with harp sing praise,
With voice of psalms his glory raise;
With trumpets, cornets, gladly sing
And shout before the Lord, the king.
Let earth be glad, let billows roar
And all that dwell from shore to shore;
lines.ko: 이 해안에서 저 해안까지 거주하는 모든 자들,

lines.en: Let floods clap hands with one accord,
Let hills rejoice before the Lord.
For lo, he comes; at his command
All nations shall in judgment stand;
lines.ko: 모든 나라가 심판을 받게 될 것입니다.

lines.en: In justice robed and throned in light,
lines.ko: 정의 안에서 빛의 옷을 입고 보좌를 두셨으니

lines.en: The Lord shall judge, dispensing right.
lines.ko: 주님께서 판단하시고 공의를 베풀어 주실 것입니다.

title_en: Praise the Lord: Ye Heavens Adore Him
title_ko: 여호와를 찬양하라: 너희 하늘이 그를 경배하도다 (자체번역)

lines.en: Praise the Lord: ye heavens adore him;
Praise him, angels, in the height;
Sun and moon, rejoice before him;
Praise him, all ye stars and light.
Praise the Lord, for he hath spoken;
Worlds his mighty voice obeyed:
lines.ko: 전 세계에서 그의 강력한 목소리가 순종했습니다.

lines.en: Laws which never shall be broken
For their guidance hath he made.
Praise the Lord, for he is glorious;
Never shall his promise fail:
lines.ko: 그분의 약속은 결코 실패하지 않을 것입니다.

lines.en: God hath made his saints victorious;
Sin and death shall not prevail.
Praise the God of our salvation;
Hosts on high, his pow'r proclaim;
lines.ko: 높은 곳에 주인이 계시고, 그의 능력이 선포됩니다.

lines.en: Heaven and earth and all creation,
Laud and magnify his name.
Worship, honor, glory, blessing,
Lord, we offer unto thee;
Young and old, thy praise expressing,
In glad homage bend the knee.
All the saints in heaven adore thee;
lines.ko: 하늘에 있는 모든 성인이 당신을 찬양합니다.

lines.en: We would bow before thy throne:
As thine angels serve before thee,
lines.ko: 당신의 천사들이 당신 앞에서 봉사하는 것처럼,

lines.en: So on earth thy will be done.

title_en: You Holy Angels Bright

lines.en: Ye holy angels bright,
Who wait at God's right hand,
Or through the realms of light
Fly at your Lord's command,
Assist our song,
For else the theme
Too high doth seem
For mortal tongue.
Ye blessed souls at rest,
Who ran this earthly race,
And now, from sin released,
Behold the Saviour's face,
God's praises sound,
As in his sight
With sweet delight
Ye do abound.
All nations of the earth,
Extol the world's great King;
With melody and mirth
His glorious praises sing;
For he still reigns,
And will bring low
The proudest foe
That him disdains.
Sing forth Jehovah's praise,
Ye saints, that on him call!
Him magnify always
His holy churches all!
In him rejoice,
And there proclaim
His holy name
With sounding voice.
My soul, bear thou thy part,
Triumph in God above;
With a well-tuned heart
Sing thou the songs of love;
Thou art his own,
Who precious blood
Shed for thy good
His love made known.
Away, distrustful care!
I have thy promise, Lord:
To banish all despair,
I have thine oath and word:
lines.ko: 나는 당신의 맹세와 약속을 가지고 있습니다:

lines.en: And therefore I
Shall see thy face
And there thy grace
Shall magnify.
With thy triumphant flock,
Then I shall numbered be;
Built on th'eternal rock,
His glory we shall see.
lines.ko: 우리는 그분의 영광을 보게 될 것입니다.

lines.en: The heavens so high
With praise shall ring
And all shall sing
In harmony.

title_en: Thee We Adore, Eternal Lord!

lines.en: Thee we adore, eternal Lord!
We praise thy name with one accord.
Thy saints, who here thy goodness see,
lines.ko: 여기에서 당신의 선하심을 보시는 당신의 성도들이여,

lines.en: Through all the world do worship thee.
To thee aloud all angels cry,
lines.ko: 당신께 큰 소리로 모든 천사들이 부르짖습니다.

lines.en: The heavens and all the pow'rs on high:
lines.ko: 하늘과 높은 곳에 있는 모든 힘:

lines.en: Thee, holy, holy, holy king,
Lord God of hosts, they ever sing.
lines.ko: 만군의 여호와 하나님, 그들은 항상 노래합니다.

lines.en: Apostles join the glorious throng,
And prophets swell th'immortal song;
Thy martyrs' noble army raise
Eternal anthems to thy praise.
From day to day, O Lord, do we
Exalt and highly honor thee!
Thy name we worship and adore,
World without end, for evermore.

title_en: Let All the World in Every Corner Sing
title_ko: 모든 구석구석에 있는 온 세상이 노래하게 하라 (자체번역)

lines.en: [English lyrics not available in the database for this revised hymn]
lines.ko: [이 개정된 찬송가의 데이터베이스에는 영어 가사가 없습니다.]

title_en: Sing Praise to the Lord!

lines.en: [English lyrics not available in the database for this revised hymn]
lines.ko: [이 개정된 찬송가의 데이터베이스에는 영어 가사가 없습니다.]

title_en: O That I Had a Thousand Voices
title_ko: 오 나에게 천 개의 목소리가 있다면 (자체번역)

lines.en: O that I had a thousand voices
lines.ko: 오 나에게 천 개의 목소리가 있었다면

lines.en: To praise my God with thousand tongues!
lines.ko: 천개의 방언으로 나의 하나님을 찬양하게 하소서!

lines.en: My heart, which in the Lord rejoices,
Would then proclaim in grateful songs
To all, wherever I might be,
What great things God hath done for me.
lines.ko: 하나님께서 나에게 얼마나 큰 일을 행하셨는가.

lines.en: O all ye pow'rs that he implanted,
Arise, and silence keep no more;
lines.ko: 일어나라. 그러면 침묵이 더 이상 지속되지 않을 것이다.

lines.en: Put forth the strength that he hath granted,
Your noblest work is to adore.
lines.ko: 당신의 가장 고귀한 일은 숭배하는 것입니다.

lines.en: O my soul and body, be ye meet
With heartfelt praise your Lord to greet!
All creatures that have breath and motion,
That throng the earth, the sea, and sky,
Now join me in my heart's devotion,
Help me to raise his praises high.
lines.ko: 그분을 높이 찬양할 수 있도록 도와주소서.

lines.en: My utmost pow'rs can never aright
lines.ko: 내 최선의 힘은 결코 제대로 될 수 없어

lines.en: Declare the wonders of his might.
O father, deign thou, I beseech thee,
To listen to my earthly lays;
A nobler strain in heaven shall reach thee,
lines.ko: 하늘의 더 고귀한 긴장이 당신에게 닿을 것입니다.

lines.en: When I with angels hymn thy praise
lines.ko: 내가 천사들과 함께 당신을 찬양할 때

lines.en: And learn amid their choirs to sing
lines.ko: 그리고 그들의 합창단 속에서 노래하는 법을 배우세요

lines.en: Loud hallelujahs to my King.
lines.ko: 나의 왕께 큰 소리로 할렐루야를 외칩니다.

title_en: God of Gods, We Sound His Praises
title_ko: 신 중의 하나님, 우리는 그분을 찬양합니다 (자체번역)

lines.en: [English lyrics not available in the database for this revised hymn]
lines.ko: [이 개정된 찬송가의 데이터베이스에는 영어 가사가 없습니다.]

title_en: Vast the Immensity, Mirror of Majesty

lines.en: [English lyrics not available in the database for this revised hymn]
lines.ko: [이 개정된 찬송가의 데이터베이스에는 영어 가사가 없습니다.]

title_en: O Light That Knew No Dawn

lines.en: O light that knew no dawn,
That shines to endless day,
All things in earth and heav'n
Are lustred by thy ray;
No eye can to thy throne ascend,
lines.ko: 어떤 눈도 주의 보좌에 오르지 못하며

lines.en: Nor mind thy brightness comprehend.
lines.ko: 당신의 밝기가 이해되는지 신경 쓰지 마십시오.

lines.en: Thy grace, O Father, give,
That I may serve in fear;
Above all boons, I pray,
Grant me thy voice to hear;
lines.ko: 제가 들을 수 있도록 당신의 목소리를 주소서.

lines.en: From sin thy child in mercy free,
lines.ko: 죄로부터 당신의 자녀를 자비로이 해방시켜 주소서.

lines.en: And let me dwell in light with thee:
lines.ko: 그리고 내가 당신과 함께 빛 속에 거하게 하소서.

lines.en: That, cleansed from stain of sin,
I may meet homage give,
And, pure in heart, behold
Thy beauty while I live;
Clean hands in holy worship raise,
lines.ko: 깨끗한 손을 들어 거룩한 예배를 드리며,

lines.en: And thee, O Christ my Saviour, praise.
lines.ko: 그리고 나의 구주 그리스도여, 당신을 찬양합니다.

lines.en: In supplication meek
To thee I bend the knee;
O Christ, when thou shalt come,
In love remember me,
And in thy kingdom, by thy grace,
Grant me a humble servant's place.
Thy grace, O Father, give,
I humbly thee implore;
And let thy mercy bless
Thy servant more and more.
lines.ko: 당신의 종은 점점 더 많아지고 있습니다.

lines.en: All grace and glory be to thee,
From age to age eternally.

title_en: Tell Out, My Soul, the Greatness of the Lord

lines.en: [English lyrics not available in the database for this revised hymn]
lines.ko: [이 개정된 찬송가의 데이터베이스에는 영어 가사가 없습니다.]

title_en: Great God, How Infinite Art Thou!

lines.en: Great God, how infinite art thou!
How poor and weak are we!
Let the whole race of creatures bow,
And pay their praise to thee.
Thy throne eternal ages stood,
Ere seas or stars were made:
Thou art the ever living God,
Were all the nations dead.
Eternity, with all its years,
Stands present in thy view;
To thee there's nothing old appears;
To thee there's nothing new.
Our lives through various scenes are drawn,
lines.ko: 다양한 장면을 통해 우리의 삶이 그려지며,

lines.en: And vexed with trifling cares;
While thine eternal thought moves on
Thine undisturbed affairs.
Great God, how infinite art thou!
How poor and weak are we!
Let the whole race of creatures bow,
And pay their praise to thee.

title_en: O God, the Rock of Ages

lines.en: O God, the Rock of Ages,
lines.ko: 오 만세 반석이신 주 우리 하나님
lines.id: Ya Tuhan, Batu Karang A-ges,

lines.en: Who evermore hast been,
lines.ko: 저 창조 이전부터 또 영원 하도록
lines.id: Siapa lagi yang pernah,

lines.en: What time the tempest rages,
lines.ko: 한없는 영광 중에 그 보좌 있으니
lines.id: Jam berapa hama melanda,

lines.en: Our dwelling place serene:
lines.id: Tempat tinggal kami se-rene:

lines.en: Before thy first creations,
lines.id: Sebelum ciptaan-Mu yang pertama,

lines.en: O Lord, the same as now,
lines.id: Ya Tuhan, sama seperti sekarang,

lines.en: To endless generations
lines.id: Untuk generasi tanpa akhir The

lines.en: The Everlasting Thou!
lines.id: Engkau yang abadi!

lines.en: Our years are like the shadows
lines.ko: 이 인생 사는 것이 뜬 구름 같으며
lines.id: Tahun-tahun kita seperti bayangan

lines.en: On sunny hills that lie,
lines.ko: 저 푸른 동산 안의 꽃송이 같도다
lines.id: Di bukit-bukit cerah yang terhampar,

lines.en: Or grasses in the meadows
lines.ko: 풀 위의 이슬 같고 잠 속의 꿈 같이
lines.id: Atau rumput di padang rumput

lines.en: That blossom but to die;
lines.ko: 이 세상 모든 영광 곧 사라지도다
lines.id: Itu mekar tapi mati

lines.en: A sleep, a dream, a story
lines.id: Tidur, mimpi, cerita,

lines.en: By strangers quickly told,
lines.id: Oleh orang asing dengan cepat diberitahu,

lines.en: And unremaining glory
lines.id: Kemuliaan yang tidak dapat dipertahankan lagi

lines.en: Of things that soon are old.
lines.id: Tentang hal-hal yang segera menjadi tua.

lines.en: O thou who canst not slumber,
lines.ko: 한 없는 사랑으로 늘 깨어 지키사
lines.id: Wahai Engkau yang tidak terpuruk,

lines.en: Whose light grows never pale,
lines.ko: 큰 자비 베푸시고 늘 인도 하시니
lines.id: Yang cahayanya tidak pernah pucat,

lines.en: Teach us aright to number
lines.ko: 내 평생 짧은 세월 빛나게 살도록
lines.id: Ajari kami hak untuk berhitung

lines.en: Our years before they fail;
lines.ko: 참 빛인 성령으로 날 채워주소서 아멘
lines.id: Tahun-tahun kita sebelum mereka gagal

lines.en: On us thy mercy lighten,
lines.id: Pada kami belas kasihan-Mu menerangi,

lines.en: On us thy goodness rest,
lines.id: Kebaikan-Mu bertumpu pada kami,

lines.en: And let thy Spirit brighten
lines.id: Dan biarlah Roh-Mu menerangi hati

lines.en: The hearts thyself hast blessed.
lines.id: Dirimu telah diberkati. Amin.

lines.en: Lord, crown our faith's endeavor
With beauty and with grace,
Till, clothed in light for ever,
We see thee face to face:
A joy no language measures;
A fountain brimming o'er;
An endless flow of pleasures;
An ocean without shore.

title_id: Ya Tuhan, Batu Karang Segala Zaman

title_en: The Lord Has Heard and Answered Prayer

lines.en: The Lord has heard and answered prayer
And saved his people in distress;
This to the coming age declare,
That they his holy name may bless.
lines.ko: 그의 거룩한 이름이 찬송을 받게 하소서.

lines.en: The Lord, exalted on his throne,
Looked down from heaven with pitying eye
To still the lowly captive's moan
And save his people doomed to die.
lines.ko: 그리고 죽을 운명에 처한 그의 백성을 구하십시오.

lines.en: All men in Zion shall declare
His gracious name with one accord,
When kings and nations gather there
To serve and worship God the Lord.
Before my journey is complete
My vigor fails, my years decline;
lines.ko: 내 활력은 쇠퇴하고 내 나이는 쇠퇴합니다.

lines.en: My God, O spare me, I entreat;
The days of life are wholly thine.
The earth and heavens shall pass away,
Like vesture worn and laid aside,
But changeless thou shalt live for aye,
lines.ko: 그러나 변함없이 당신은 영원히 살 것입니다.

lines.en: Thy years for ever shall abide.
Thou, O Jehovah, shalt endure,
Thy throne for ever is the same;
And to all generations sure
Shall be thy great memorial name.
lines.ko: 당신의 위대한 기념 이름이 될 것입니다.

lines.en: Thy servants' children shall remain
For evermore before thy face;
Enduring honor they shall gain,
lines.ko: 그들은 영원한 명예를 얻게 될 것이며,

lines.en: Established ever in thy grace.

title_en: Our God, Our Help in Ages Past
title_ko: 우리 하나님, 지난 시대에 우리의 도움이 되셨습니다. (자체번역)

lines.en: Our God, our help in ages past,
lines.ko: 지난 시대에 우리를 도우신 우리 하나님,

lines.en: Our hope for years to come,
lines.ko: 앞으로 몇 년 동안 우리의 희망은,

lines.en: Our shelter from the stormy blast,
And our eternal home.
Under the shadow of thy throne
Thy saints have dwelt secure;
Sufficient is thine arm alone,
And our defense is sure.
Before the hills in order stood,
Or earth received her frame,
From everlasting thou art God,
To endless years the same.
A thousand ages in thy sight
Are like an evening gone;
Short as the watch that ends the night
Before the rising sun.
The busy tribes of flesh and blood,
With all their lives and cares,
Are carried downward by thy flood,
lines.ko: 주의 홍수로 말미암아 아래로 휩쓸려 내려가매

lines.en: And lost in following years.
Time, like an ever-rolling stream,
Bears all its sons away;
They fly forgotten, as a dream
Dies at the opening day.
Our God, our help in ages past,
lines.ko: 지난 시대에 우리를 도우신 우리 하나님,

lines.en: Our hope for years to come,
lines.ko: 앞으로 몇 년 동안 우리의 희망은,

lines.en: Be thou our guard while troubles last,
lines.ko: 환난이 지속되는 동안 우리의 보호자가 되십시오.

lines.en: And our eternal home.

alt_titles: Our God our Help in ages past (tune 2)

title_en: Have You Not Known, Have You Not Heard

lines.en: [English lyrics not available in the database for this revised hymn]
lines.ko: [이 개정된 찬송가의 데이터베이스에는 영어 가사가 없습니다.]

title_en: Great Is Thy Faithfulness

lines.en: Great is thy faithfulness, O God my father,
lines.ko: 오 신실 하신 주 내 아버지여
lines.id: “Besarlah keimanan-Mu,” ya Allah Bapaku

lines.en: There is no shadow of turning with thee:
lines.id: Tidak ada bayangan untuk berpaling kepada-Mu

lines.en: Thou changest not, thy compassions, they fail not;
lines.id: Thou chang-est not, Thy com-pas-sions, They fail not

lines.en: As thou hast been thou for ever wilt be.
lines.id: Sebagaimana Engkau selama-lamanya, Engkau pun akan demikian.

lines.ko: 오 신실 하신 주 오 신실 하신 주
lines.id: "Great is Thy faith-ful-ness! Great is Thy faith-ful-ness!"
Pagi demi pagi saya melihat belas kasihan baru
Segala yang kubutuhkan telah disediakan oleh tangan-Mu,

lines.ko: 오 신실 하신 주 나의 구주
lines.id: “Besarlah kesetiaan-Mu,” Tuhan, kepadaku!

lines.en: "Great is thy faithfulness! Great is thy faithfulness!"
lines.id: Sum-mer and win-ter, and spring-time and har-vest,

lines.en: Morning by morning new mercies I see:
lines.ko: 해와 달 별들도 다 주의 것
lines.id: Matahari, bulan dan bintang pada lintasannya di atas,

lines.en: All I have needed thy hand hath provided
lines.id: Bergabunglah dengan seluruh alam dalam kesaksian manusia,

lines.en: "Great is thy faithfulness," Lord unto me!
lines.id: Kepada kesetiaan, belas kasihan, dan cinta-Mu yang besar.

lines.ko: 오 신실 하신 주 오 신실 하신 주
lines.id: "Great is Thy faith-ful-ness! Great is Thy faith-ful-ness!"
Pagi demi pagi saya melihat belas kasihan baru
Segala yang kubutuhkan telah disediakan oleh tangan-Mu,

lines.ko: 오 신실 하신 주 나의 구주
lines.id: “Besarlah kesetiaan-Mu,” Tuhan, kepadaku!

lines.en: Summer and winter, and springtime and harvest,
lines.id: Maafkan dosa dan kedamaian yang abadi,

lines.en: Sun, moon and stars in their courses above,
lines.id: Kehadiran-Mu yang terkasih untuk menyemangati dan membimbing

lines.en: Join with all nature in manifold witness
lines.id: Strength for to-day and bright hope for to-morrow,

lines.en: To thy great faithfulness, mercy and love.
lines.id: Segala berkah menjadi milikku, dengan sepuluh ribu pasir di sisinya!

lines.ko: 오 신실 하신 주 오 신실 하신 주
lines.id: "Great is Thy faith-ful-ness! Great is Thy faith-ful-ness!"
Pagi demi pagi saya melihat belas kasihan baru
Segala yang kubutuhkan telah disediakan oleh tangan-Mu,

lines.ko: 오 신실 하신 주 나의 구주
lines.id: “Besarlah kesetiaan-Mu,” Tuhan, kepadaku!

lines.en: Pardon for sin and a peace that endureth,
Thine own dear presence to cheer and to guide;
Strength for today and bright hope for tomorrow,
Blessings all mine, with ten thousand beside.
Thomas O. Chisholm
