title_en: Let Us with a Gladsome Mind

lines.en: From Psalm 136
Let us with a gladsome mind,
Praise the Lord, for he is kind:
For his mercies aye endure,
Ever faithful, ever sure.
Let us blaze his name abroad,
For of gods he is the God:
He with all-commanding might
lines.ko: 그는 모든 것을 지휘하는 힘을 가지고

lines.en: Filled the new-made world with light:
All things living he doth feed;
lines.ko: 그분은 살아 있는 모든 것을 먹이십니다.

lines.en: His full hand supplies their need:
lines.ko: 그분의 온전한 손길이 그들의 필요를 공급하십니다.

lines.en: He his chosen race did bless
In the wasteful wilderness:
He hath with a piteous eye
Looked upon our misery:
Let us therefore warble forth
His high majesty and worth:

title_en: The God of Abraham Praise

lines.en: The God of Abraham praise,
lines.id: Puji Tuhan A-braham,

lines.en: Who reigns enthroned above;
lines.ko: 온 천하 만민 주 앞에 찬송하네
lines.id: Yang bertakhta di atas

lines.en: Ancient of everlasting days,
lines.ko: 이 천지 만물도 주 앞에 엎드려
lines.id: Kuno dari hari-hari yang abadi,

lines.en: And God of love:
lines.id: Dan Tuhan cinta.

lines.en: Jehovah! great I AM!
lines.id: Je-ho-vah, hebatnya AKU,

lines.en: By earth and heav'n confessed;
lines.id: Demi bumi dan surga diakui

lines.en: I bow and bless the sacred name,
lines.id: Aku bersujud dan memberkati Nama sa-cred,

lines.en: For ever blest.
lines.id: Berkah selamanya.

lines.en: The God of Abraham praise,
lines.ko: 주 언약 하신 것 끝까지 지키니
lines.id: Dia sendiri telah bersumpah,

lines.en: At whose supreme command
lines.id: Aku bergantung pada sumpah-Nya

lines.en: From earth I rise, and seek the joys
lines.ko: 주 얼굴 뵈올 때 내 맘이 기쁘고
lines.id: Aku akan, dengan sayap elang yang terangkat ke atas,

lines.en: At his right hand:
lines.id: Ke surga

lines.en: I all on earth forsake,
lines.id: Aku akan memegang wajah-Nya,

lines.en: Its wisdom, fame, and power;
lines.id: Aku akan kuasa-Nya,

lines.en: And him my only portion make,
lines.id: Dan nyanyikan keajaiban rahmat-Nya

lines.en: My Shield and Tower.
lines.id: Selama-lamanya.

lines.en: He by himself hath sworn,
lines.ko: 왕의 왕 되신 주 하늘에 계시니
lines.id: Tuhan yang berkuasa di tempat tinggi

lines.en: I on his oath depend;
lines.ko: 이 세상 죄악 이기신 구주 예수
lines.id: Malaikat agung bernyanyi,

lines.en: I shall, on eagle's wings upborne,
lines.id: Dan seruan "Suci, suci, suci",

lines.en: To heav'n ascend:
lines.ko: 뭇 성도 함께 영원히 늘 섬기네
lines.id: "Raja Yang Maha Perkasa!"

lines.en: I shall behold his face,
lines.id: Siapa yang dulu dan sekarang sama,

lines.en: I shall his power adore,
lines.id: Dan terlebih lagi adalah:

lines.en: And sing the wonders of his grace
lines.id: Je-ho-vah, Ayah, hebatnya AKU,

lines.en: For evermore.
lines.id: Kami menyembah Engkau.

lines.en: The goodly land I see,
lines.id: Seluruh tuan rumah yang menang

lines.en: With peace and plenty blest,
lines.id: Bersyukurlah kepada Tuhan di tempat tinggi

lines.en: A land of sacred liberty
lines.id: "Salam, Ayah, Putra, dan Roh Kudus!"

lines.en: And endless rest;
lines.ko: 주 앞에 나도 엎드려 경배하네 아멘
lines.id: Mereka selalu menangis.

lines.en: There milk and honey flow,
lines.id: Salam, Tuhannya A-braham, dan Tuhanku!

lines.en: And oil and wine abound,
lines.id: Saya bergabung dengan orang-orang surgawi

lines.en: And trees of life for ever grow,
lines.id: Segala keperkasaan dan keagungan adalah milik-Mu,

lines.en: With mercy crowned.
lines.id: Dan pujian yang tiada habisnya.

lines.en: There dwells the Lord our King,
The Lord our righteousness;
Triumphant over the world and sin,
The Prince of Peace
On Zion's sacred height
His kingdom still maintains,
And glorious with his saints in light
For ever reigns.
The whole triumphant host
Give thanks to God on high;
Hail Father, Son, and Holy Ghost,
They ever cry:
Hail Abraham's God and mine!
I join the heavenly lays
All might and majesty are thine,
And endless praise.

title_en: My God, How Wonderful Thou Art
title_ko: 나의 하나님, 당신은 참으로 놀라운 분이십니다 (자체번역)

lines.en: My God, how wonderful thou art,
lines.ko: 나의 하나님, 당신은 얼마나 놀라운 분이십니까?

lines.en: Thy majesty how bright!
How beautiful thy mercy-seat,
In depths of burning light!
How dread are thine eternal years,
O everlasting Lord,
By holy angels, day and night,
Incessantly adored!
O how I fear thee, living God,
lines.ko: 오, 살아계신 하나님, 내가 얼마나 당신을 두려워하는지,

lines.en: With deepest, tenderest fears;
And worship thee with trembling hope,
And penitential tears.
Yet I may love thee too, O Lord,
lines.ko: 그러나 오 주님, 나도 당신을 사랑할 수 있습니다.

lines.en: Almighty as thou art;
For thou hast stooped to ask of me
The love of my poor heart.
No earthly father loves like thee,
lines.ko: 이 땅의 아버지 어느 누구도 너만큼 사랑하지 않으니,

lines.en: No mother half so mild
Bears and forbears, as thou hast done
With me, thy sinful child.
lines.ko: 나와 함께, 당신의 죄 많은 아이.

lines.en: How wonderful, how beautiful,
The sight of thee will be,
Thine endless wisdom, boundless power,
And aweful purity!

title_en: Lord, Thou Hast Searched Me

lines.en: [English lyrics not available in the database for this revised hymn]
lines.ko: [이 개정된 찬송가의 데이터베이스에는 영어 가사가 없습니다.]

title_en: All That I Am I Owe to Thee
title_ko: 내가 가진 모든 것은 당신에게 빚진 것입니다 (자체번역)

lines.en: All that I am I owe to thee,
lines.ko: 내가 가진 모든 것은 당신에게 빚진 것입니다.

lines.en: Thy wisdom, Lord, has fashioned me;
I give my Maker thankful praise,
Whose wondrous works my soul amaze.
lines.ko: 그분의 놀라운 업적에 내 영혼이 놀랐습니다.

lines.en: Ere into being I was brought,
Thine eye did see, and in thy thought
My life in all its perfect plan
Was ordered ere my days began.
Thy thoughts, O God, how manifold,
lines.ko: 오 하나님, 당신의 생각은 얼마나 다양합니까?

lines.en: More precious unto me than gold!
I muse on their infinity,
lines.ko: 나는 그들의 무한함에 대해 곰곰이 생각한다.

lines.en: Awaking I am still with thee.
lines.ko: 깨어났을 때 나는 여전히 당신과 함께 있습니다.

lines.en: The wicked thou wilt surely slay,
From me let sinners turn away;
They speak against the name divine,
I count God's enemies as mine.
lines.ko: 나는 하나님의 원수를 내 것으로 여깁니다.

lines.en: Search me, O God, my heart discern,
lines.ko: 하나님이여 나를 살피사 내 마음이 분별하오니

lines.en: Try me, my inmost thought to learn;
lines.ko: 나를 시험해 보세요. 배우고자 하는 내 마음속 깊은 생각;

lines.en: And lead me, if in sin I stray,
lines.ko: 그리고 나를 인도해 주십시오. 내가 죄 가운데서 방황한다면,

lines.en: To choose the everlasting way.

title_en: Immortal, Invisible, God Only Wise
title_ko: 불멸의, 보이지 않는, 오직 현명한 신 (자체번역)

lines.en: Immortal, invisible, God only wise,
lines.ko: 불멸의 존재, 눈에 보이지 않는 존재, 오직 지혜로우신 하나님,

lines.en: In light inaccessible hid from our eyes,
lines.ko: 우리 눈에 감춰진 접근할 수 없는 빛 속에,

lines.en: Most blessed, most glorious, the Ancient of Days,
lines.ko: 가장 복되시고 가장 영광로우시며 옛적부터 항상 계신 분이시여,

lines.en: Almighty, victorious, thy great Name we praise.
lines.ko: 전능하시고 승리하신 당신의 크신 이름을 찬양합니다.

lines.en: Unresting, unhasting, and silent as light,
Nor wanting, nor wasting, thou rulest in might;
lines.ko: 부족함도 없고 낭비함도 없으시며 권능으로 다스리시나이다

lines.en: Thy justice like mountains high soaring above
lines.ko: 당신의 정의는 높이 솟아오른 산과 같으니

lines.en: Thy clouds which are fountains of goodness and love.
Great Father of Glory, pure Father of Light,
lines.ko: 위대하신 영광의 아버지, 순수하신 빛의 아버지,

lines.en: Thine angels adore thee, all veiling their sight;
lines.ko: 당신의 천사들은 모두 당신의 눈을 가리고 당신을 경배합니다.

lines.en: All praise we would render; O help us to see
lines.ko: 우리는 모든 찬양을 드릴 것입니다. 오 우리가 볼 수 있도록 도와주세요

lines.en: 'Tis only the splendor of light hideth thee!
lines.ko: 오직 빛의 광채만이 당신을 숨기고 있는 것입니다!

title_en: O God, Most Holy Are Your Ways
title_ko: 오 하느님, 당신의 길은 지극히 거룩합니다 (자체번역)

lines.en: O God, most holy are thy ways,
lines.ko: 오 하느님, 당신의 길은 지극히 거룩합니다.

lines.en: And who like thee deserves my praise?
lines.ko: 너처럼 내 칭찬을 받기에 합당한 사람이 누구이겠는가?

lines.en: Thou only doest wondrous things,
The whole wide world thy glory sings;
Thine outstretched arm thy people saved,
lines.ko: 주의 편 팔로 주의 백성을 구원하셨으니

lines.en: Though sore distressed and long enslaved.
lines.ko: 몹시 괴로워하고 오랫동안 노예 생활을 했지만.

lines.en: O God, from thee the waters fled,
The depths were moved with mighty dread,
The swelling clouds their torrents poured,
And o'er the earth the tempest roared;
'Mid lightning's flash and thunder's sound
Great trembling shook the solid ground.
Thy way was in the sea, O God,
Through mighty waters, deep and broad;
None understood but God alone,
lines.ko: 오직 하나님 외에는 아무도 이해하지 못하였으니

lines.en: To man thy footsteps were unknown;
But safe thy people thou didst keep,
lines.ko: 그러나 당신께서는 당신 백성을 안전하게 지키셨으며,

lines.en: Almighty Shepherd of thy sheep.

title_en: God Is Our Refuge and Our Strength

lines.en: Psalm 46
God is our refuge and our strength,
Our ever present aid,
And, therefore, though the earth remove,
We will not be afraid;
Though hills amidst the seas be cast,
Though foaming waters roar,
Yea, though the mighty billows shake
The mountains on the shore.
A river flows whose streams make glad
The city of our God,
The holy place wherein the Lord
Most high has his abode;
lines.ko: 가장 높으신 분이 거처를 갖고 계십니다.

lines.en: Since God is in the midst of her,
Unmoved her walls shall stand,
lines.ko: 그녀의 성벽은 흔들리지 않고 서 있을 것입니다.

lines.en: For God will be her early help,
When trouble is at hand.
The nations raged, the kingdoms moved,
But when his voice was heard
The troubled earth was stilled to peace
Before his mighty word.
The Lord of hosts is on our side,
Our safety to secure,
The God of Jacob is for us
A refuge strong and sure.
O come, behold what wondrous works
lines.ko: 오, 와서 보라, 놀라운 일들이 일어나는구나

lines.en: Jehovah's hand has wrought;
Come, see what desolation great
lines.ko: 와서 그 황폐함이 얼마나 큰지 보라

lines.en: He on the earth has brought.
To utmost ends of all the earth
He causes war to cease;
The weapons of the strong destroyed,
He makes abiding peace.
Be still and know that I am God,
lines.ko: 가만히 있어 내가 하나님 됨을 알지어다

lines.en: O'er all exalted high;
The subject nations of the earth
My name shall magnify.
The Lord of Hosts is on our side,
Our safety to secure,
The God of Jacob is for us
A refuge strong and sure.

title_en: The Praises of Thy Wonders, Lord

lines.en: The praises of thy wonders, Lord,
The heavens shall express;
And in the congregation
Of saints thy faithfulness.
Thou hast an arm that's full of power:
lines.ko: 당신은 권능으로 가득 찬 팔을 갖고 계십니다.

lines.en: Thy hand is great in might;
And thy right hand exceedingly
Exalted is in height.
Justice and judgment of thy throne
Are made the dwelling place;
Mercy, accompanied with truth,
Shall go before thy face.
O greatly blessed the people are
lines.ko: 아 이 백성은 큰 축복을 받았도다

lines.en: The joyful sound that know;
In brightness of thy face, O Lord,
They ever on shall go.
Because the glory of their strength
Doth only stand in thee;
And in thy favor shall our horn
And pow'r exalted be.
For God is our defense; and he
To us doth safety bring:
The Holy One of Israel
Is our almighty King.

title_en: El-Shaddai

lines.en: [English lyrics not available in the database for this revised hymn]
lines.ko: [이 개정된 찬송가의 데이터베이스에는 영어 가사가 없습니다.]

title_en: You Righteous, in the Lord Rejoice

lines.en: Psalm 33:1-12
Ye righteous, in the Lord rejoice;
It well becomes the good man's voice
To sing Jehovah's praise.
With harp and hymn of gladness sing,
Your gift of sweetest music bring,
To him a new song raise.
For upright is Jehovah's word;
And all the doings of the Lord
In faithfulness are wrought.
In justice and in judgment right
The Lord doth ever take delight;
With goodness earth is fraught.
Jehovah's word the heavens hath made,
And all the host of them arrayed
His breath has caused to be.
He rolls the waters heap on heap;
He stores away the mighty deep
In garners of the sea.
Let all the earth Jehovah fear,
Let all that dwell both far and near
lines.ko: 먼 곳과 가까운 곳 모두에 사는 모든 자들을 허락하소서

lines.en: In awe before him stand;
For, lo, he spake and it was done,
And all his sovereign power begun,
Stood fast at his command.
He makes the nations' counsels vain,
The plans the peoples would maintain
Are thwarted by his hand.
Jehovah's counsel stands secure,
His purposes of heart endure,
For evermore they stand.
O truly is the nation blessed
lines.ko: 아 정말 이 나라는 복 받았도다

lines.en: Whose God, before the world confessed,
Jehovah is alone;
And blessed the people is whom he
Has made his heritage to be,
And chosen for his own.

title_en: How Great Thou Art

lines.ko: 주 하나님 지으신 모든 세계 내 마음 속에 그리어 볼 때
lines.en: O, Lord my God! When I in awe-some won-der
lines.id: Ya Tuhan, Tuhanku! Saat aku merasa takjub

lines.ko: 하늘의 별 울려 퍼지는 뇌성 주님의 권능 우주에 찼네
lines.en: con-sid-er all the worlds Thy hands have made,
lines.id: pertimbangkan seluruh dunia yang telah dibuat oleh tangan-Mu,

lines.ko: 후렴 : 주님의 높고 위대하심을 내 영혼이 찬양하네
lines.en: I see the stars, I hear the rall-ing thun-der,
lines.id: Aku melihat bintang-bintang, aku mendengar gemuruh guntur,

lines.ko: 주님의 높고 위대하심을 내 영혼이 찬양하네
lines.en: Thy pow'r through out the un-i-verse dis-played,
lines.id: Kekuatanmu di seluruh jagat raya ditampilkan,

lines.en: Then sings my soul, my Sav-ior God to Thee
lines.id: Lalu bernyanyilah jiwaku, Tuhan Juruselamatku bagiMu

lines.en: How great Thou art, how great Thou art!
lines.id: Betapa hebatnya Engkau, betapa hebatnya Engkau!

lines.en: Then sings my soul, my Sav-ior God to Thee
lines.id: Lalu bernyanyilah jiwaku, Tuhan Juruselamatku bagiMu

lines.en: How great Thou art, how great Thou art!
lines.id: Betapa hebatnya Engkau, betapa hebatnya Engkau!

lines.ko: 숲 속이나 험한 산 골짝에서 지저귀는 저 새소리들과
lines.en: When through the woods and for-est glades I wan-der
lines.id: Saat melewati hutan dan hutan terbuka aku mengembara

lines.ko: 고요하게 흐르는 시냇물은 주님의 솜씨 노래 하도다
lines.en: And hear the birds sing sweet-ly in the trees
lines.id: Dan dengarlah kicauan burung yang merdu di pepohonan

lines.en: When I look down from loft-y moun-tain gran-deur
lines.id: Saat aku melihat ke bawah dari puncak gunung yang megah

lines.en: And hear the brook and feel the gen-tle breeze
lines.id: Dan dengarkan aliran sungai dan rasakan angin sepoi-sepoi

lines.en: Then sings my soul, my Sav-ior God to Thee
lines.id: Lalu bernyanyilah jiwaku, Tuhan Juruselamatku bagiMu

lines.en: How great Thou art, how great Thou art!
lines.id: Betapa hebatnya Engkau, betapa hebatnya Engkau!

lines.en: Then sings my soul, my Sav-ior God to Thee
lines.id: Lalu bernyanyilah jiwaku, Tuhan Juruselamatku bagiMu

lines.en: How great Thou art, how great Thou art!
lines.id: Betapa hebatnya Engkau, betapa hebatnya Engkau!

lines.ko: 주 하나님 독생자 아낌없이 우리를 위해 보내 주셨네
lines.en: And when I think that God, His Son not spar-ing,
lines.id: Dan ketika saya berpikir bahwa Allah, Putra-Nya tidak menyayangkan,

lines.ko: 십자가에 피 흘려 죽으신 주 내 모든 죄를 대속 하셨네
lines.en: Sent Him to die, I scarce can take it in-
lines.id: Mengirim Dia untuk mati, aku hampir tidak dapat menerimanya-

lines.en: That on the cross my bur-den glad-ly bear-ing,
lines.id: Bahwa di kayu salib bebanku dengan senang hati memikulnya,

lines.en: He bled and died to take a-way my sin-
lines.id: Dia berdarah dan mati untuk menghapus dosaku-

lines.en: Then sings my soul, my Sav-ior God to Thee
lines.id: Lalu bernyanyilah jiwaku, Tuhan Juruselamatku bagiMu

lines.en: How great Thou art, how great Thou art!
lines.id: Betapa hebatnya Engkau, betapa hebatnya Engkau!

lines.en: Then sings my soul, my Sav-ior God to Thee
lines.id: Lalu bernyanyilah jiwaku, Tuhan Juruselamatku bagiMu

lines.en: How great Thou art, how great Thou art!
lines.id: Betapa hebatnya Engkau, betapa hebatnya Engkau!

lines.ko: 내 주 예수 세상에 다시 올 때 저 천국으로 날 인도하리
lines.en: When Christ shall come with shout of ac-cla-ma-tion
lines.id: Ketika Kristus akan datang dengan sorak sorai

lines.ko: 나 겸손히 엎드려 경배 하며 영원히 주를 찬양 하리라
lines.en: And take me home, what joy shall fill my heart!
lines.id: Dan bawalah aku pulang, betapa sukacitanya memenuhi hatiku!

lines.en: Then shall bow in hum-ble ad-o-ra-tion
lines.id: Kemudian dia akan membungkuk dengan hormat yang rendah hati

lines.en: And there pro-claim, my God, how great Thou art!
lines.id: Dan di sana nyatakan, Tuhanku, betapa hebatnya Engkau!

lines.en: Then sings my soul, my Sav-ior God to Thee
lines.id: Lalu bernyanyilah jiwaku, Tuhan Juruselamatku bagiMu

lines.en: How great Thou art, how great Thou art!
lines.id: Betapa hebatnya Engkau, betapa hebatnya Engkau!

lines.en: Then sings my soul, my Sav-ior God to Thee
lines.id: Lalu bernyanyilah jiwaku, Tuhan Juruselamatku bagiMu

lines.en: How great Thou art, how great Thou art!
lines.id: Betapa hebatnya Engkau, betapa hebatnya Engkau!

title_id: Ya Tuhan, Tuhanku! Saat aku berada di Keajaiban Luar Biasa

title_en: Now unto Jehovah, Ye Sons of the Mighty
title_ko: 너희 능하신 자들아 이제 여호와께로 돌아가라 (자체번역)

lines.en: Now unto Jehovah, ye sons of the mighty,
lines.ko: 너희 용사들의 아들들아 이제 여호와께로 돌아가라

lines.en: All glory and strength and dominion accord;
Ascribe to him glory, and render him honor,
lines.ko: 그에게 영광을 돌리고 그에게 존귀를 돌려라.

lines.en: In beauty of holiness worship the Lord.
The voice of Jehovah comes down on the waters;
In thunder the God of the glory draws nigh.
lines.ko: 우레 가운데 영광의 하나님이 가까이 오시느니라.

lines.en: Lo, over the waves of the wide-flowing waters
lines.ko: Lo, 넓게 흐르는 물의 파도 너머로

lines.en: Jehovah as King is enthroned on high!
lines.ko: 왕이신 여호와께서는 높은 곳에 좌정해 계십니다!

lines.en: The voice of Jehovah is mighty, is mighty;
The voice of Jehovah in majesty speaks:
lines.ko: 위엄 있는 여호와의 음성은 이렇게 말합니다.

lines.en: The voice of Jehovah the cedars is breaking;
Jehovah the cedars of Lebanon breaks.
Each one, in his temple, his glory proclaimeth.
lines.ko: 각 사람이 그의 성전에서 그의 영광을 선포하느니라.

lines.en: He sat on the flood; he is King on his throne.
lines.ko: 그분은 홍수 위에 앉으셨습니다. 그는 왕좌에 앉은 왕이다.

lines.en: Jehovah all strength to his people imparteth;
lines.ko: 여호와께서는 자기 백성에게 모든 힘을 주시고

lines.en: Jehovah with peace ever blesseth his own.
lines.ko: 여호와께서는 언제나 자신의 백성을 평화롭게 축복하십니다.

title_en: Round the Lord in Glory Seated

lines.en: Round the Lord in glory seated,
lines.ko: 영광 중에 앉아 계신 주님 주위에,

lines.en: Cherubim and seraphim
Filled his temple, and repeated
Each to each the alternate hymn:
"Lord thy glory fills the heaven,
lines.ko: "주님, 당신의 영광이 하늘에 가득 차 있습니다.

lines.en: Earth is with its fulness stored;
Unto thee be glory given,
Holy, holy, holy Lord!"
Heaven is still with glory ringing,
Earth takes up the angels' cry,
"Holy, holy, holy," singing,
"Lord of hosts, the Lord most high."
With his seraph train before him,
With his holy church below,
Thus conspire we to adore him,
Bid we thus our anthem flow:
"Lord, thy glory fills the heaven,
Earth is with its fulness stored;
Unto thee be glory given,
Holy, holy, holy Lord!"
Thus thy glorious Name confessing,
We adopt thine angels' cry,
"Holy, holy, holy," blessing
Thee, the Lord of Hosts most high.

title_en: God the Lord Is King

lines.en: From Psalm 99
God the Lord is King: before him
Earth with all thy nations, wait!
lines.ko: 당신의 모든 나라와 함께 지구여, 기다려라!

lines.en: Where the cherubim adore him,
Sitteth he in royal state:
He is holy; He is holy;
Blessed, only Potentate!
God the Lord is King of glory,
Zion, tell the world his fame;
Ancient Israel, the story
Of his faithfulness proclaim:
He is holy; He is holy;
Holy is his awful name.
Laws divine to them were spoken
From the pillar of the cloud;
Sacred precepts, quickly broken!
Fiercely then his vengeance flowed:
He is holy; He is holy;
To the dust their hearts were bowed.
But their Father God forgave them
lines.ko: 그러나 그들의 아버지 하나님이 그들을 용서하셨으니

lines.en: When they sought his face once more:
lines.ko: 그들이 다시 한 번 그의 얼굴을 찾았을 때:

lines.en: Ever ready was to save them,
Tenderly did he restore:
He is holy; He is holy;
We too will his grace implore.

title_en: O Lord Most High, with All My Heart
title_ko: 오 지극히 높으신 주님, 온 마음을 다해 (자체번역)

lines.en: O Lord most high, with all my heart
lines.ko: 오 지극히 높으신 주님, 내 마음을 다해

lines.en: Thy wondrous works I will proclaim;
I will be glad and give thee thanks
And sing the praises of thy name.
The Lord, the everlasting King,
Is seated on his judgment throne;
The righteous Judge of all the world
Will make his perfect justice known.
Jehovah will a refuge prove,
A refuge strong for all oppressed,
A safe retreat, where weary souls
In troublous times may surely rest.
lines.ko: 어려운 시기에는 반드시 쉴 수 있습니다.

lines.en: All they, O Lord, that know thy Name
lines.ko: 여호와여 주의 이름을 아는 자는 다

lines.en: Their confidence in thee will place,
For thou hast ne'er forsaken them
lines.ko: 당신은 결코 그들을 버리지 않으셨기 때문입니다

lines.en: Who earnestly have sought thy face.
Sing praises to the Lord most high,
To him who doth in Zion dwell;
Declare his mighty deeds abroad,
His deeds among the nations tell.
lines.ko: 민족들 가운데서 그분이 하신 일이 말해줍니다.

title_en: O Lord, Thou Judge of All the Earth

lines.en: O Lord, thou Judge of all the earth,
To whom all vengeance doth belong,
Arise and show thy glory forth,
Requite the proud, condemn the wrong.
How long, O Lord, in boastful pride
Shall wicked men triumphant stand?
How long shall they afflict thy saints
lines.ko: 그들이 주의 성도들을 어느 때까지 괴롭게 하리이까

lines.en: And scorn thy wrath, thy dreadful hand?
lines.ko: 그리고 당신의 무서운 손이여, 당신의 분노를 비웃으시겠습니까?

lines.en: Be wise, ye fools and brutish men;
Shall not he see who formed the eye?
lines.ko: 눈을 지으신 분이 누구인지 보지 못하겠느냐?

lines.en: Shall not he hear who formed the ear,
And judge, who reigneth, God most high?
lines.ko: 심판관이여, 지극히 높으신 하나님이 누구로 다스리시느냐?

lines.en: The Lord will judge in righteousness,
From him all truth and knowledge flow;
The foolish thoughts of wicked men,
How vain they are the Lord doth know.
lines.ko: 그들이 얼마나 헛된 것인지 주님께서는 아십니다.

lines.en: That man is blest whom thou, O Lord,
lines.ko: 여호와여, 당신이 복을 받은 사람은 바로 그 사람입니다.

lines.en: With chastening hand dost teach thy will,
For in the day when sinners fall
That man in peace abideth still.
Unless the Lord had been my help,
My life had quickly passed away;
But when my foot had almost slipped,
lines.ko: 그런데 발이 거의 미끄러질 뻔했을 때,

lines.en: O Lord, thy mercy was my stay.
lines.ko: 오 주님, 당신의 자비가 제가 머물렀던 곳이었습니다.

lines.en: Amid the doubts that fill my mind
lines.ko: 내 마음을 가득 채운 의심들 속에서

lines.en: Thy comforts, Lord, bring joy to me;
lines.ko: 주님, 당신의 위로가 제게 기쁨이 되게 하소서.

lines.en: Can wickedness, though throned in might,
Have fellowship, O Lord, with thee?
The wicked, in their might arrayed,
Against the righteous join their power,
lines.ko: 의로운 자들을 대항하여 그들의 힘이 합세하여

lines.en: But to the Lord I flee for help,
lines.ko: 그러나 나는 여호와께로 도망하여 도움을 구합니다.

lines.en: He is my Refuge and my Tower.

title_en: O Lord, Be Thou My Helper True
title_ko: 오 주님, 당신은 나를 돕는 분이 되어 주십시오. (자체번역)

lines.en: Psalm 12
O Lord, be thou my helper true,
For just and godly men are few;
The faithful who can find?
lines.ko: 충실한 사람을 누가 찾을 수 있습니까?

lines.en: From truth and wisdom men depart,
With flattering lips and double heart
They speak their evil mind.
The lips that speak, the truth to hide,
The tongues of arrogance and pride,
That boastful words employ,
False-speaking tongues that boast their might,
That own no law, that know no right,
Jehovah will destroy.
Because the poor are sore oppressed,
lines.ko: 가난한 사람들이 심한 억압을 받고 있기 때문에

lines.en: Because the needy are distressed,
And bitter are their cries,
The Lord will be their helper strong;
lines.ko: 주님은 그들의 든든한 조력자가 되실 것입니다.

lines.en: To save them from contempt and wrong
Jehovah will arise.
Jehovah's promises are sure,
His words are true, his words are pure
lines.ko: 그의 말은 진실하고 그의 말은 순수하다

lines.en: As silver from the flame.
Though base men walk on every side,
His saints are safe, whate'er betide,
lines.ko: 그의 성도들은 안전합니다. 무슨 일이 있어도

lines.en: Protected by his name.

title_en: O Jehovah, Hear My Words
title_ko: 오 여호와여, 내 말을 들어 주십시오 (자체번역)

lines.en: Psalm 5
O Jehovah, hear my words,
lines.ko: 오 여호와여, 내 말을 들어 주십시오.

lines.en: To my thoughts attentive be;
Hear my cry, my King, my God,
lines.ko: 나의 부르짖음을 들으소서 나의 왕이시요 나의 하나님이시여

lines.en: I will make my prayer to thee.
With the morning light, O Lord,
Thou shalt hear my voice arise,
lines.ko: 너는 내 목소리가 일어나는 것을 듣게 될 것이다.

lines.en: And expectant I will bring
Prayer as morning sacrifice.
Thou, Jehovah, art a God
Who delightest not in sin;
Evil shall not dwell with thee,
Nor the proud thy favor win.
Evil doers thou dost hate,
Lying tongues thou wilt defeat;
God abhors the man who loves
Violence and base deceit.
In the fulness of thy grace
To thy house I will repair;
Bowing toward thy holy place,
In thy fear to worship there.
lines.ko: 두려움 속에서 그곳에서 예배를 드리는 것입니다.

lines.en: Lead me in thy righteousness,
Let my foes assail in vain;
Lest my feet be turned aside,
Make thy way before me plain.
lines.ko: 내 앞에서 네 길을 평탄하게 하라.

lines.en: False and faithless are my foes,
lines.ko: 거짓되고 신실하지 못한 것이 나의 원수들이요

lines.en: In their mouth no truth is found;
lines.ko: 그들의 입에서는 진리를 찾을 수 없습니다.

lines.en: Deadly are the words they speak,
All their thoughts with sin abound.
lines.ko: 그들의 모든 생각은 죄로 가득 차 있습니다.

lines.en: Bring, O God, their plans to naught,
Hold them guilty in thy sight,
For against thee and thy law
They have set themselves to fight.
O let all that trust thy care
lines.ko: 오 모든 사람이 당신의 보살핌을 믿게 해주세요

lines.en: Ever glad and joyful be;
Let them joy who love thy name,
lines.ko: 주의 이름을 사랑하는 자들로 기쁨을 누리게 하소서

lines.en: Safely guarded, Lord, by thee.
For a blessing from thy store
To the righteous thou wilt yield;
Thou wilt compass him about
With thy favor as a shield.

title_en: O Praise the Lord! O Thank the Lord!
title_ko: 오 주님을 찬양합니다! 오 주님께 감사드립니다! (자체번역)

lines.en: [English lyrics not available in the database for this revised hymn]
lines.ko: [이 개정된 찬송가의 데이터베이스에는 영어 가사가 없습니다.]

title_en: Praise to the Lord, the Almighty

lines.en: Praise to the Lord, the Almighty, the King of creation!
lines.ko: 다 찬양 하여라 전능 왕 창조의 주께
lines.id: Segala puji bagi Tuhan, Yang Maha Perkasa, Raja segala ciptaan!

lines.ko: 내 혼아 주 찬양 평강과 구원의 주님
lines.id: Wahai jiwaku, pujilah Dia, karena Dialah kesehatan dan keselamatanmu!
Kalian semua yang mendengar, Sekarang mendekatlah ke Bait Suci-Nya
Bergabunglah dengan saya dalam ad-o-ra-tion yang menyenangkan!

lines.en: O my soul, praise him, for he is thy health and salvation!
lines.id: Puji bagi Tuhan, yang atas segala sesuatunya memerintah dengan begitu menakjubkan,

lines.ko: 포근한 날개 밑 늘 품어 주시는 주님
lines.id: Melindungimu di bawah sayap-Nya, ya, dengan lembut menopangnya!
Apakah kamu tidak melihat bagaimana keinginanmu selama ini
Dikabulkan dalam apa yang Dia perintahkan

lines.en: All ye who hear,
lines.id: Puji Tuhan, hai, biarlah semua yang ada dalam diriku memuja Dia!

lines.ko: 이 세상 만물이 주 앞에 다 나와 찬양
lines.id: Semua yang mempunyai hidup dan nafas, datanglah sekarang dengan puji-pujian di hadapan-Nya!
Biarkan kalimat "A-man!" Suara dari umat-Nya sebuah keuntungan.
Dengan senang hati jika kita memuja Dia.

lines.en: Now to his temple draw near,
Join me in glad adoration.
Praise to the Lord, who o'er all things so wondrously reigneth,
Shelters thee under his wings, yea, so gently sustaineth!
Hast thou not seen
How thy desires e'er have been
Granted in what he ordaineth?
Praise to the Lord, who doth prosper thy work and defend thee!
Surely his goodness and mercy here daily attend thee;
Ponder anew
What the Almighty will do,
If with his love he befriend thee!
Praise thou the Lord, who with marvelous wisdom hath made thee,
Decked thee with health, and with loving hand guided and stayed thee.
How oft in grief
Hath not he brought thee relief,
Spreading his wings to o'ershade thee!
Praise to the Lord! O let all that is in me adore him!
All that hath life and breath, come now with praises before him.
Let the Amen
Sound from his people again;
Gladly for aye we adore him.

title_id: Segala puji bagi Tuhan Yang Maha Esa

title_en: Hallelujah! Raise, O Raise

lines.en: Psalm 113
Hallelujah! Raise, O raise
To our God the song of praise;
All his servants join to sing
lines.ko: 그의 종들이 다 모여 노래를 부르느니라

lines.en: God our Saviour and our King.
Blessed be for evermore
That dread Name which we adore:
Round the world his praise be sung
Through all lands, in every tongue.
O'er all nations God alone,
Higher than the heav'ns his throne;
Who is like to God most high,
lines.ko: 지극히 높으신 하나님과 같은 자가 누구이뇨

lines.en: Infinite in majesty!
Yet to view the heav'ns he bends;
lines.ko: 그러나 heav'ns를 보기 위해 그는 구부린다;

lines.en: Yea, to earth he condescends;
Passing by the rich and great,
For the low and desolate.
He can raise the poor to stand
lines.ko: 그분은 가난한 자를 일으켜 세워 주실 수 있습니다

lines.en: With the princes of the land;
Wealth upon the needy shower:
Set him with the high in power.
He the broken spirit cheers:
Turns to joy the mourner's tears;
Such the wonders of his ways;
Praise his name, for ever praise!

title_en: To God Be the Glory

lines.en: To God be the glory, great things he hath done!
lines.ko: 그 큰 일을 행하신 주께 영광
lines.id: Bagi Tuhanlah segala kemuliaan atas hal-hal besar yang telah Dia lakukan!

lines.en: So loved he the world that he gave us his Son,
lines.id: Begitu Dia mengasihi dunia sehingga Dia memberi kita putra-Nya,

lines.en: Who yielded his life an atonement for sin,
lines.id: Yang menyerahkan nyawa-Nya untuk penebusan dosa

lines.en: And opened the life gate that we may go in.
lines.id: dan membuka gerbang Kehidupan agar semua orang bisa pergi

lines.ko: 우리 주 높이세 귀한 말씀 듣고
lines.id: Muliakan Tuhan kami, dengarkan kata-katanya yang berharga
Tuhan kami maha tinggi, kami semua bersukacita
Kepada Tuhan melalui Tuhan Yesus
Pujilah dia atas pekerjaan luar biasa yang telah dia lakukan.

lines.en: Praise the Lord, praise the Lord,
lines.id: Wahai penebusan yang sempurna, pembelian darah!

lines.en: Let the earth hear his voice!
lines.id: Bagi setiap orang percaya janji Allah;

lines.en: Praise the Lord, praise the Lord,
lines.id: Pelaku paling keji yang benar-benar beriman,

lines.en: Let the people rejoice!
lines.id: Saat itulah pengampunan diterima dari Yesus.

lines.en: O come to the Father through Jesus the Son,
lines.ko: 우리 주 높이세 귀한 말씀 듣고
lines.id: Muliakan Tuhan kami, dengarkan kata-katanya yang berharga

lines.en: And give him the glory, great things he hath done!
lines.id: Tuhan kami maha tinggi, kami semua bersukacita
Kepada Tuhan melalui Tuhan Yesus
Pujilah dia atas pekerjaan luar biasa yang telah dia lakukan.

lines.en: O perfect redemption, the purchase of blood!
lines.id: Hal-hal besar yang telah Dia ajarkan kepada kita, hal-hal besar yang telah Dia lakukan,

lines.en: To ev'ry believer the promise of God;
lines.id: Dan besarnya sukacita kami melalui Yesus Putra;

lines.en: The vilest offender who truly believes,
lines.id: Namun akan lebih murni, lebih tinggi, dan lebih besar

lines.en: That moment from Jesus forgiveness receives.
lines.id: Keheranan kita, transportasi kita, ketika Yesus kita lihat.

lines.en: Great things he hath taught us, great things he hath done,
lines.id: Puji Tuhan! Puji Tuhan

lines.en: And great our rejoicing through Jesus the Son;
lines.id: Biarkan bumi mendengar suara-Nya!

lines.en: But purer, and higher, and greater will be
lines.id: Puji Tuhan! Puji Tuhan

lines.en: Our wonder, our transport, when Jesus we see.
lines.id: Biarkan orang-orang bersukacita!
Oh, datanglah kepada Bapa melalui Yesus Putra;
Dan muliakan Dia - Hal-hal besar yang telah Dia lakukan.
Hal-hal besar yang telah Dia ajarkan kepada kita, hal-hal besar yang telah Dia lakukan,
Dan besarnya sukacita kami melalui Yesus Putra;
Namun akan lebih murni, lebih tinggi, dan lebih besar
Keheranan kita, transportasi kita, ketika Yesus kita lihat.
Puji Tuhan! Puji Tuhan
Biarkan bumi mendengar suara-Nya!
Puji Tuhan! Puji Tuhan
Biarkan orang-orang bersukacita!
Oh, datanglah kepada Bapa melalui Yesus Putra;
Dan muliakan Dia - Hal-hal besar yang telah Dia lakukan.

alt_titles: To God be the glory

title_en: When All Your Mercies, O My God
title_ko: 오 나의 하나님, 당신의 모든 자비가 (자체번역)

lines.en: When all thy mercies, O my God,
My rising soul surveys,
Transported with the view, I'm lost
In wonder, love, and praise.
Unnumbered comforts to my soul
lines.ko: 내 영혼에 셀 수 없는 위로가 되다

lines.en: Thy tender care bestowed,
Before my infant heart conceived
From whom those comforts flowed.
When worn with sickness, oft hast thou
With health renewed my face;
And, when in sins and sorrows sunk,
Revived my soul with grace.
Ten thousand thousand precious gifts
My daily thanks employ;
Nor is the least a cheerful heart
lines.ko: 또한 최소한 마음이 유쾌한 것도 아니다.

lines.en: That tastes those gifts with joy.
Through every period of my life
Thy goodness I'll pursue;
And after death, in distant worlds,
The glorious theme renew.
Through all eternity to thee
A joyful song I'll raise;
For O, eternity's too short
To utter all thy praise.

title_en: Hallelujah, Praise Jehovah, O My Soul

lines.en: Psalm 146
Hallelujah, praise Jehovah,
O my soul, Jehovah praise;
I will sing the glorious praises
Of my God through all my days.
lines.ko: 나의 모든 날 동안 나의 하나님.

lines.en: Put no confidence in princes,
Nor for help on man depend;
lines.ko: 도움을 받기 위해 사람에게 의존하지도 않습니다.

lines.en: He shall die, to dust returning,
And his purposes shall end.
Happy is the man that chooses
Israel's God to be his aid;
lines.ko: 이스라엘의 하나님이 그의 도움이 되실 것입니다.

lines.en: He is blessed whose hope of blessing
On the Lord his God is stayed.
Heaven and earth the Lord created,
Seas and all that they contain;
He delivers from oppression,
Righteousness he will maintain.
Food he daily gives the hungry,
lines.ko: 그분께서는 날마다 배고픈 이들에게 음식을 주시고,

lines.en: Sets the mourning prisoner free,
Raises those bowed down with anguish,
Makes the sightless eyes to see.
lines.ko: 앞이 보이지 않는 눈을 보게 만듭니다.

lines.en: Well Jehovah loves the righteous,
And the stranger he befriends,
lines.ko: 그리고 그는 친구가 된 낯선 사람,

lines.en: Helps the fatherless and widow,
Judgment on the wicked sends.
Hallelujah, praise Jehovah,
O my soul, Jehovah praise;
I will sing the glorious praises
Of my God through all my days.
lines.ko: 나의 모든 날 동안 나의 하나님.

lines.en: Over all God reigns for ever,
lines.ko: 모든 것을 다스리시는 하나님은 영원히 다스리시며

lines.en: Through all ages he is king;
Unto him, thy God, O Zion,
Joyful hallelujahs sing.

title_en: O Splendor of God’s Glory Bright

lines.en: O Splendor of God's glory bright,
lines.ko: 찬란한 주의 영광은 영원히 빛난 광채요
lines.id: Wahai kemegahan kemuliaan Tuhan yang cemerlang,

lines.en: From light eternal bringing light,
lines.ko: 참 빛을 비춘 예수는 생명의 빛이 되신다
lines.id: Dari cahaya abadi yang membawa cahaya

lines.en: Thou light of light, light's living Spring,
lines.id: Wahai Cahaya kehidupan, sumber cahaya yang hidup,

lines.en: True Day, all days illumining:
lines.id: Hari yang sebenarnya, sepanjang hari il-lu-min-ing.

lines.en: Come, very Sun of heaven's love,
lines.ko: 올바른 일을 힘쓰며 이 맘의 탐욕 버리고
lines.id: Konfirmasikan keinginan kita untuk melakukan yang benar,

lines.en: In lasting radiance from above,
lines.ko: 불 같은 믿음 가지고 늘 주를 사랑하리라
lines.id: Dan peliharalah hati kami dari penyakit iri hati

lines.en: And pour the Holy Spirit's ray
lines.id: Biarlah imannya menyala kembali,

lines.en: On all we think or do today.
lines.id: Dan benci yang palsu, dan cinta dan yang benar.

lines.en: And now to thee our prayers ascend,
lines.ko: 온 천지만물 성부께 온 성도 모두 성자께
lines.id: Wahai hari yang menyenangkan

lines.en: O Father, glorious without end;
lines.ko: 보혜사 성령 힘 입어 영원히 찬양 합니다 아멘
lines.id: Dengan pikiran sejernih sinar pagi,

lines.en: We plead with sovereign grace for pow'r
lines.id: Dengan iman bagaikan ombak tengah hari yang bersinar terang,

lines.en: To conquer in temptation's hour.
lines.id: Jiwa kami tidak ternaungi oleh malam.

lines.en: Confirm our will to do the right,
lines.ko: 다 나와 찬송 드리세 다 같이 엎드려
lines.id: Segala puji bagi Allah Bapa,

lines.en: And keep our hearts from envy's blight;
lines.ko: 주 앞에 무릎 꿇고서 창조주 기리세 아멘
lines.id: Segala puji bagiMu, Putra kekal,

lines.en: Let faith her eager fires renew,
lines.id: Siapa, dengan Spir-it, yang kita kagumi

lines.en: And hate the false, and love the true.
lines.id: Selama-lamanya dan selama-lamanya. Amin.

lines.en: O joyful be the passing day
lines.ko: 다 나와 찬송 부르세 한 소리 높여서
lines.id: Mari kita semua keluar dan menyanyikan lagu pujian, meninggikan suara kita

lines.en: With thoughts as pure as morning's ray,
lines.id: Aku memuji Tuhan dengan hati gembira yang meluap-luap.

lines.en: With faith like noontide shining bright,
Our souls unshadowed by the night.
Dawn's glory gilds the earth and skies,
lines.ko: 그 보좌 앞에 엎드려 한 없는 감사와
lines.id: Saya sujud di hadapan takhta dan mengucapkan terima kasih yang tak ada habisnya.

lines.en: Let him, our perfect Morn, arise,
lines.id: Nyanyikan pujian tanpa henti untuk menghormati Juruselamat kita

lines.en: The work in God the Father one,
The Father imaged in the Son.

lines.id: Tuhan yang benar dan tinggi, Raja segala raja

lines.ko: 저 깊은 물과 높은 산 다 다스리시네
lines.id: Dia berkuasa atas perairan dalam dan pegunungan tinggi.

lines.ko: 다 나와 찬송 드리세 다 같이 엎드려
lines.id: Mari kita semua keluar dan menyanyikan lagu pujian. Mari kita semua sujud bersama.

lines.ko: 주 앞에 무릎 꿇고서 창조주 기리세 아멘
lines.id: Berlutut di hadapan Tuhan, Pencipta Kristus, Amin

title_id: Wahai Kemegahan Kemuliaan Tuhan Yang Cerah

title_en: Forever Settled in the Heavens

lines.en: For ever settled in the heavens
Thy Word, O Lord, shall firmly stand;
Thy faithfulness shall never fail;
lines.ko: 당신의 신실함은 결코 실패하지 않을 것입니다.

lines.en: The earth abides at thy command.
Thy word and works unmoved remain,
Thine every purpose to fulfil;
All things are thine and thee obey,
lines.ko: 만물이 다 당신의 것이니 당신은 순종하소서

lines.en: And all as servants wait thy will.
lines.ko: 그리고 모두는 종으로서 당신의 뜻을 기다립니다.

lines.en: I should have perished in my woe
Had not I loved thy law divine;
lines.ko: 내가 주의 법을 신성하게 사랑하지 아니하였더면

lines.en: That law I never can forget;
lines.ko: 나는 그 법을 결코 잊을 수 없습니다.

lines.en: O save me, Lord, for I am thine.
lines.ko: 오 주님, 저를 구원해 주십시오. 나는 당신의 것입니다.

lines.en: The wicked would destroy my soul,
But in thy truth is refuge sure;
Exceeding broad is thy command,
And in perfection shall endure.

title_en: Thy Mercy and Thy Truth, O Lord
title_ko: 오 주님, 당신의 자비와 당신의 진리 (자체번역)

lines.en: Psalm 36:5-10
Thy mercy and thy truth, O Lord,
lines.ko: 오 주님, 당신의 자비와 당신의 진리,

lines.en: Transcend the lofty sky;
Thy judgments are a mighty deep,
And as the mountains high.
Lord, thou preservest man and beast;
Since thou art ever kind,
Beneath the shadow of thy wings
We may a refuge find.
With the abundance of thy house
We shall be satisfied,
From rivers of unfailing joy
Our thirst shall be supplied.
The fountain of eternal life
Is found alone with thee,
And in the brightness of thy light
We clearly light shall see.
lines.ko: 우리는 분명히 빛을 보게 될 것입니다.

lines.en: From those that know thee may thy love
lines.ko: 당신을 아는 사람들로부터 당신의 사랑을 받을 수 있기를 바랍니다

lines.en: And mercy never depart,
And may thy justice still protect
lines.ko: 그리고 당신의 정의가 여전히 보호되기를 바랍니다

lines.en: And bless the upright heart.

title_en: O God, No Longer Hold Thy Peace
title_ko: 오 하나님, 더 이상 잠잠하지 마십시오 (자체번역)

lines.en: From Psalm 83
O God, no longer hold thy peace,
lines.ko: 오 하느님, 더 이상 침묵하지 마시고,

lines.en: No longer silent be;
Thine enemies lift up their head
To fight thy saints and thee.
Against thine own, whom thou dost love,
Their craft thy foes employ;
They think to cut thy people off,
Thy church they would destroy.
Thine ancient foes, conspiring still,
lines.ko: 당신의 고대 적들은 여전히 음모를 꾸미고 있습니다.

lines.en: With one consent agree,
And they who with thy people strive
Make war, O God, with thee.
O God, who in our fathers' time
Didst smite our foes and thine,
So smite thine enemies today
Who in their pride combine.
Make them like dust and stubble blown
Before the whirlwind dire,
In terror driv'n before the storm
lines.ko: 폭풍우가 오기 전에 공포 속에서 운전해

lines.en: Of thy consuming fire.
Confound them in their sin till they
lines.ko: 그들의 죄로 그들을 혼란에 빠지게 하여 마침내

lines.en: To thee for pardon fly,
Till in dismay they, trembling, own
lines.ko: 그들은 당황하여 떨며 자신을 소유할 때까지

lines.en: That thou art God Most High.

title_en: Sing to the Lord, Sing His Praise

lines.en: From Psalm 96
Sing to the Lord, sing his praise, all ye peoples,
lines.ko: 너희 모든 백성들아 여호와께 노래하며 그를 찬송하라

lines.en: New be your song as new honors ye pay;
lines.ko: 너희는 새로운 영예를 얻으며 너희 노래를 새롭게 하라.

lines.en: Sing of his majesty, bless him for ever,
lines.ko: 그의 위엄을 노래하고 영원히 그를 찬송하리로다

lines.en: Show his salvation from day to day.
Tell of his wondrous works, tell of his glory,
lines.ko: 그의 기사를 전하며 그의 영광을 전하라

lines.en: Till through the nations his name is revered;
lines.ko: 그의 이름이 모든 나라에서 존경을 받을 때까지

lines.en: Praise and exalt him, for he is almighty,
God over all let the Lord be feared.
Vain are the heathen gods, idols and helpless;
lines.ko: 이교의 신들과 우상들과 무력한 것들이 헛되다.

lines.en: God made the heavens, and his glory they tell;
lines.ko: 하나님이 하늘을 지으시니 그 영광이 말하도다

lines.en: Honor and majesty shine out before him,
Beauty and strength in his temple dwell.
lines.ko: 그분의 성전에는 아름다움과 힘이 깃들어 있습니다.

lines.en: Give unto God most high glory and honor,
lines.ko: 하나님께 가장 높은 영광과 존귀를 돌립니다.

lines.en: Come with your offerings and humbly draw near;
lines.ko: 예물을 가지고 와서 겸손히 가까이 나아가라.

lines.en: In holy beauty now worship Jehovah,
Tremble before him with godly fear.
Make all the nations know God reigns for ever;
lines.ko: 모든 나라에 하나님이 영원히 통치하신다는 것을 알게 하십시오.

lines.en: Earth is established as he did decree;
Righteous and just is the King of the nations,
Judging the people with equity.
Let heaven and earth be glad; waves of the ocean,
Forest and field, exultation express;
For God is coming, the Judge of the nations,
Coming to judge in his righteousness.

title_en: Jehovah Reigns; Let Earth Be Glad

lines.en: From Psalm 97
Jehovah reigns; let earth be glad,
And all the isles their joy make known;
With clouds and darkness he is clad,
On truth and justice rests his throne.
lines.ko: 진리와 정의 위에 그분의 보좌가 놓여 있습니다.

lines.en: Consuming fire destroys his foes,
Around the world his lightnings blaze;
lines.ko: 전 세계에서 그의 번개가 타오르고 있습니다.

lines.en: The trembling earth his presence knows,
The mountains melt before his gaze.
The heavens his righteousness proclaim,
Through earth his glory shines abroad;
lines.ko: 땅을 통하여 그분의 영광이 널리 빛나고 있습니다.

lines.en: From idol worship turn with shame
And bow before the living God.
Thy church rejoices to behold
Thy judgments in the earth, O Lord;
Thy glory to the world unfold,
Supreme o'er all be thou adored.
All ye that truly love the Lord,
Hate sin, for he is just and pure;
lines.ko: 죄를 미워하십시오. 그는 의롭고 순결하시기 때문입니다.

lines.en: To saints his help he will accord
And keep them in his love secure.
lines.ko: 그리고 그들을 그분의 사랑 안에서 안전하게 지키십시오.

lines.en: For good men light and joy are sown
To bless them in the harvest time;
Ye saints, your joy in God make known
lines.ko: 성도들아 하나님 안에서 너희의 기쁨을 알게 하라

lines.en: And ever praise his name sublime.
lines.ko: 그리고 언제나 그분의 이름을 숭고하게 찬양하십시오.

title_en: God, the Lord, a King Remaineth

lines.en: From Psalm 93
God, the Lord, a king remaineth,
Robed in his own glorious light;
lines.ko: 그 자신의 영광스러운 빛으로 옷을 입으셨습니다.

lines.en: God hath robed him, and he reigneth;
He hath girded him with might.
Alleluia! Alleluia!
God is King in depth and height.
In her everlasting station
Earth is poised, to swerve no more;
lines.ko: 지구는 더 이상 방향을 바꾸지 않을 준비가 되어 있습니다.

lines.en: Thou hast laid thy throne's foundation
From all time where thought can soar
lines.ko: 생각이 솟아오를 수 있는 모든 시간부터

lines.en: Alleluia! Alleluia!
Lord, thou art for evermore.
Lord, the waterfloods have lifted,
Ocean floods have lift their roar;
Now they pause where they have drifted,
lines.ko: 이제 그들은 표류하던 곳에서 멈춰 섰다.

lines.en: Now they burst upon the shore
Alleluia! Alleluia!
For the ocean's sounding store.
With all tones of waters blending,
Glorious is the breaking deep;
Glorious, beauteous without ending,
God who reigns on heaven's high steep.
lines.ko: 하늘의 높은 가파른 곳을 다스리시는 하나님.

lines.en: Alleluia! Alleluia!
Songs of ocean never sleep.
Lord, the words thy lips are telling
Are the perfect verity:
Of thine high eternal dwelling
Holiness shall inmate be.
Alleluia! Alleluia!
Pure is all that lives with thee.
lines.ko: 당신과 함께 사는 모든 것은 순수합니다.

title_en: Before Jehovah’s Awesome Throne

lines.en: [English lyrics not available in the database for this revised hymn]
lines.ko: [이 개정된 찬송가의 데이터베이스에는 영어 가사가 없습니다.]

title_en: God Is Known among His People

lines.en: From Psalm 76
God is known among his people,
Every mouth his praises fill;
lines.ko: 모든 입에 그분의 찬양이 가득 차 있습니다.

lines.en: From of old he has established
His abode on Zion's hill;
There he broke the sword and arrow,
Bade the noise of war be still.
Excellent and glorious art thou,
With thy trophies from the fray;
Thou hast slain the valiant-hearted,
Wrapped in sleep of death are they;
When thine anger once is risen,
lines.ko: 당신의 분노가 한 번 솟아올랐을 때,

lines.en: Who can stand in that dread day?
lines.ko: 그 무서운 날에 누가 설 수 있겠습니까?

lines.en: When from heaven thy sentence sounded,
All the earth in fear was still,
While to save the meek and lowly
God in judgment wrought his will;
lines.ko: 하나님은 심판을 통해 자신의 뜻을 이루셨습니다.

lines.en: E'en the wrath of man shall praise thee,
Thy designs it shall fulfil.
Vow and pay ye to Jehovah,
Him your God for ever own;
All men, bring your gifts before him
lines.ko: 모든 남자들아 너희 예물을 그 앞에 가져오라

lines.en: Worship him, and him alone;
Mighty kings obey and fear him,
Princes bow before his throne.

title_en: Not unto Us, O Lord of Heaven
title_ko: 오 하늘의 주님, 우리에게는 그렇지 않습니다 (자체번역)

lines.en: Not unto us, O Lord of heav'n,
lines.ko: 오 하늘의 주님이시여, 우리에게는 그렇지 않습니다.

lines.en: But unto thee be glory given;
In love and truth thou dost fulfil
The counsels of thy sovereign will;
Though nations fail thy pow'r to own,
lines.ko: 비록 국가들이 당신의 소유 능력을 상실하더라도,

lines.en: Yet thou dost reign, and thou alone.
Let Israel trust in God alone,
The Lord whose grace and power are known;
To him your full allegiance yield,
And he will be your help and shield;
lines.ko: 그러면 그분은 여러분의 도움과 방패가 되실 것입니다.

lines.en: All those who fear him God will bless,
lines.ko: 그를 경외하는 자에게는 하나님이 다 복을 주시리니

lines.en: His saints have proved his faithfulness.
All ye that fear him and adore,
The Lord increase you more and more;
lines.ko: 주님께서 여러분을 점점 더 늘려 가십니다.

lines.en: Both great and small who him confess,
You and your children he will bless.
lines.ko: 그분은 당신과 당신의 자녀를 축복하실 것입니다.

lines.en: Yea, we will ever bless his Name;
lines.ko: 그렇습니다. 우리는 그분의 이름을 영원히 송축할 것입니다.

lines.en: Praise ye the Lord, his praise proclaim.

title_en: The Earth, with All That Dwell Therein
title_ko: 지구, 그 안에 사는 모든 것 (자체번역)

lines.en: From Psalm 24
The earth, with all that dwell therein,
lines.ko: 땅과 그 안에 거하는 모든 것은

lines.en: With all its wealth untold,
lines.ko: 그 모든 부를 이루 말할 수 없이,

lines.en: Belongs to God who founded it
Upon the seas of old.
What man shall stand before the Lord
lines.ko: 어떤 사람이 주님 앞에 설 수 있겠습니까?

lines.en: On Zion's holy hill?
The clean of hand, the pure of heart,
The just who do his will.
Lo, such are they that seek for God,
lines.ko: 보라, 하나님을 찾는 이들이 바로 이 사람들이니라.

lines.en: And blest by him they live;
To them his perfect righteousness
The God of grace will give.
Ye everlasting doors, give way,
Lift up your heads, ye gates!
For now, behold, to enter in
The King of Glory waits.
Who is this glorious King that comes
To claim his sovereign right?
It is the Lord omnipotent,
All conquering in his might.
Ye everlasting doors, give way,
Lift up your heads, ye gates!
For now, behold, to enter in
The King of Glory waits.
Who is this glorious King that comes
To claim his rightful throne?
The Lord of hosts, he is the King
Of Glory, God alone.

title_en: Thy God Reigneth!

lines.en: Trembling soul, beset by fears,
"Thy God reigneth!"
Look above and dry thy tears:
"Thy God reigneth!"
Though thy foes with power assail,
Naught against thee shall prevail;
lines.ko: 당신을 대적하는 어떤 것도 승리하지 못할 것입니다.

lines.en: Trust in him, he'll never fail:
lines.ko: 그를 믿으십시오. 그는 결코 실패하지 않을 것입니다.

lines.en: "Thy God reigneth! Thy God reigneth!"
Sinful soul, thy debt is paid;
lines.ko: 죄 많은 영혼아, 네 빚은 다 갚았느니라.

lines.en: "Thy God reigneth!"
On the Lord thy sins were laid;
"Thy God reigneth!"
On the cross of Calvary,
Jesus shed his blood for thee,
From all sin to set thee free:
"Thy God reigneth! Thy God reigneth!"
Seeking soul, to Jesus turn;
"Thy God reigneth!"
None that seek him will he spurn;
lines.ko: 그를 찾는 사람은 아무도 그를 물리치지 않으실 것이다.

lines.en: "Thy God reigneth!"
Wandering sheep the Shepherd seeks,
And when found he ever keeps,
lines.ko: 그리고 발견되었을 때 그는 계속해서 보관했습니다.

lines.en: For he slumbers not nor sleeps:
"Thy God reigneth! Thy God reigneth!"
Join, ye saints, the truth proclaim,
"Thy God reigneth!"
Shout it forth with glad acclaim,
"Thy God reigneth!"
Zion, wake! the morn is nigh,
See it break from yonder sky;
Loud and clear the watchmen cry:
"Thy God reigneth! Thy God reigneth!"
Church of Christ, awake, awake!
"Thy God reigneth!"
Forward, then, fresh courage take:
"Thy God reigneth!"
Soon, descending from his throne,
He shall claim thee for his own;
lines.ko: 그가 너를 자기 소유로 주장할 것이다.

lines.en: Sin shall then be overthrown:
"Thy God reigneth! Thy God reigneth!"

alt_titles: Trembling soul, beset by fears

title_en: With Glory Clad, with Strength Arrayed

lines.en: From Psalm 93
With glory clad, with strength arrayed,
The Lord, that o'er all nature reigns,
The world's foundations strongly laid,
And the vast fabric still sustains.
How surely stablished is thy throne,
Which shall no change or period see!
lines.ko: 어떤 변화나 기간도 볼 수 없을 것입니다!

lines.en: For thou, O Lord, and thou alone,
Art God from all eternity.
The floods, O Lord, lift up their voice,
And toss the troubled waves on high;
But God above can still their noise,
lines.ko: 그러나 위에 계신 하나님은 그들의 소음을 잠잠케 하실 수 있습니다.

lines.en: And make the angry sea comply.
Thy promise, Lord, is ever sure,
And they that in thy house would dwell,
lines.ko: 그리고 당신 집에 살고자 하는 사람들은,

lines.en: That happy station to secure,
Must still in holiness excel.

title_en: Stand Up, O God, Be Present Now
title_ko: 일어나소서, 오 하나님, 지금 함께 하소서 (자체번역)

lines.en: [English lyrics not available in the database for this revised hymn]

title_en: O Father, You are Sovereign

lines.en: [English lyrics not available in the database for this revised hymn]
lines.ko: [이 개정된 찬송가의 데이터베이스에는 영어 가사가 없습니다.]

title_en: Praise, My Soul, the King of Heaven

lines.en: Praise, my soul, the King of heaven,
lines.ko: 내 영혼아 찬양하라 주님 앞에 엎드려
lines.id: Pujilah jiwaku, Raja surga

lines.en: To his feet thy tribute bring;
lines.ko: 구속하신 넓은 은혜 높이 찬양 하여라
lines.id: Bawa upetimu ke kakinya

lines.en: Ransomed, healed, restored, forgiven,
lines.id: Ran-somed, disembuhkan, disimpan kembali untuk diberikan,

lines.en: Who like me, his praise should sing?
lines.id: Semakin banyak pujian-pujian-Nya dinyanyikan

lines.en: Praise him, praise him,
lines.id: Al-le-lu-ia! Al-le-lu-ia!

lines.en: Praise him, praise him,
lines.id: Pujilah Raja yang kekal.

lines.en: Praise the everlasting King.
Praise him for his grace and favor
lines.id: Pujilah Dia atas rahmat dan nikmat-Nya

lines.en: To our fathers in distress;
lines.id: Kepada ayah kami yang kesusahan

lines.en: Praise him still the same for ever,
lines.id: Puji Dia masih sama seperti dulu,

lines.en: Slow to chide, and swift to bless;
lines.id: Lambat menegur, dan cepat memberkati

lines.en: Praise him, praise him,
lines.id: Al-le-lu-ia! Al-le-lu-ia!

lines.en: Praise him, praise him,
lines.id: Mulia dalam kesetiaan-Nya.

lines.en: Glorious in his faithfulness.
Father-like, he tends and spares us;
lines.ko: 우리 약함 아시는 주 항상 지켜 주시고
lines.id: Seperti Bapa, Dia merawat dan menyelamatkan kita

lines.en: Well our feeble frame he knows;
lines.id: Ya, kerangka lemah kita. Dia tahu

lines.en: In his hands he gently bears us,
lines.id: Di tangan-Nya Dia dengan lemah lembut memikul kita,

lines.en: Rescues us from all our foes;
lines.id: Menyelamatkan kita dari semua musuh kita

lines.en: Praise him, praise him,
lines.id: Al-le-lu-ia! Al-le-lu-ia!

lines.en: Praise him, praise him,
lines.id: Luas namun rahmat-Nya mengalir.

lines.en: Widely as his mercy goes.
Angels, help us to adore him;
lines.ko: 천사들아 우리 함께 주께 찬양 드리세
lines.id: Para bidadari di ketinggian, a-memuja Dia,

lines.en: Ye behold him face to face;
lines.ko: 성도들아 모두 모여 주께 경배 하여라
lines.id: Lihatlah Dia muka dengan muka

lines.en: Sun and moon, bow down before him,
lines.id: Orang Suci menang, bersujud di hadapan-Nya,

lines.en: Dwellers all in time and space.
lines.id: Berkumpul dari setiap ras

lines.en: Praise him, praise him,
lines.id: Al-le-lu-ia! Al-le-lu-ia!

lines.en: Praise him, praise him,
lines.id: Pujilah bersama kami Tuhan yang penuh kasih karunia.

lines.en: Praise with us the God of grace.

lines.id: Ya, kerangka lemah kita. Dia tahu

lines.id: Di tangan-Nya Dia dengan lemah lembut memikul kita,

lines.id: Menyelamatkan kita dari semua musuh kita

lines.id: Luas namun rahmat-Nya mengalir.

Angels, help us to adore him;

lines.id: Para bidadari di ketinggian, a-memuja Dia,

lines.en: Ye behold him face to face;
lines.ko: 성도들아 모두 모여 주께 경배 하여라
lines.id: Lihatlah Dia muka dengan muka

lines.id: Orang Suci menang, bersujud di hadapan-Nya,

lines.en: Dwellers all in time and space.
lines.id: Berkumpul dari setiap ras

lines.en: Praise him, praise him,
lines.id: Al-le-lu-ia! Al-le-lu-ia!

lines.en: Praise him, praise him,
lines.id: Pujilah bersama kami Tuhan yang penuh kasih karunia.

lines.en: Praise with us the God of grace.

title_en: O Bless the Lord, My Soul

lines.en: O bless the Lord, my soul;
Let all within me join,
lines.ko: 내 안의 모든 사람이 동참하게 하소서.

lines.en: And aid my tongue to bless his name,
lines.ko: 내 혀가 그분의 이름을 찬양할 수 있도록 도와주소서.

lines.en: Whose favors are divine.
O bless the Lord, my soul,
Nor let his mercies lie
lines.ko: 또한 그분의 자비가 거짓말을 하지 못하게 하십시오

lines.en: Forgotten in unthankfulness,
And without praises die.
'Tis he forgives thy sins,
'Tis he relieves thy pain,
'Tis he that heals thy sicknesses,
lines.ko: 네 병을 고치시는 이가 곧 이시니라

lines.en: And makes thee young again.
He crowns thy life with love,
lines.ko: 그분은 사랑으로 당신의 삶에 왕관을 씌우시며,

lines.en: When ransomed from the grave;
He that redeemed my soul from hell
Hath sovereign power to save.
He fills the poor with good;
lines.ko: 그분은 가난한 사람들을 좋은 것으로 채워 주십니다.

lines.en: He gives the sufferers rest;
lines.ko: 그분은 고통 받는 자들에게 안식을 주시고

lines.en: The Lord hath judgments for the proud,
And justice for th'oppressed.
His wondrous works and ways
He made by Moses known;
But sent the world his truth and grace
lines.ko: 그러나 그의 진리와 은혜를 세상에 보내셨느니라

lines.en: By his beloved Son.

title_en: My God, My God, O Why Have You Forsaken Me?
title_ko: 나의 하나님, 나의 하나님, 어찌하여 나를 버리셨나이까? (자체번역)

lines.en: [English lyrics not available in the database for this revised hymn]
lines.ko: [이 개정된 찬송가의 데이터베이스에는 영어 가사가 없습니다.]

title_en: Lord, with Glowing Heart I’d Praise Thee

lines.en: Lord, with glowing heart I'd praise thee
For the bliss thy love bestows,
For the pard'ning grace that saves me,
And the peace that from it flows;
Help, O God, my weak endeavor;
lines.ko: 오 하느님, 나의 약한 노력을 도와주소서.

lines.en: This dull soul to rapture raise;
Thou must light the flame, or never
Can my love be warmed to praise.
lines.ko: 내 사랑이 따뜻해져서 찬양받을 수 있을까요?

lines.en: Praise, my soul, the God that sought thee,
lines.ko: 내 영혼아, 너를 찾으신 하느님을 찬양하여라.

lines.en: Wretched wand'rer far astray;
Found thee lost, and kindly brought thee
From the paths of death away;
Praise, with love's devoutest feeling,
Him who saw thy guilt-born fear,
lines.ko: 당신의 죄책감으로 인한 두려움을 보신 분,

lines.en: And, the light of hope revealing,
Bade the blood-stained cross appear.
Praise thy Saviour God that drew thee
To that cross, new life to give,
Held a blood-sealed pardon to thee,
Bade thee look to him and live;
Praise the grace whose threats alarmed thee,
lines.ko: 위협으로 인해 당신을 놀라게 하신 은혜를 찬양합니다.

lines.en: Roused thee from thy fatal ease,
Praise the grace whose promise warmed thee,
lines.ko: 당신을 따뜻하게 해주신 약속의 은혜를 찬양합니다.

lines.en: Praise the grace that whispered peace.
Lord, this bosom's ardent feeling
Vainly would my lips express;
Low before thy footstool kneeling,
lines.ko: 당신의 발판 앞에 낮게 무릎을 꿇고,

lines.en: Deign thy suppliant's prayer to bless:
Let thy love, my soul's chief treasure,
lines.ko: 내 영혼의 가장 큰 보물인 당신의 사랑을

lines.en: Love's pure flame within me raise,
lines.ko: 내 안에 사랑의 순수한 불꽃이 솟아오릅니다.

lines.en: And, since words can never measure,
lines.ko: 그리고 말로는 결코 측정할 수 없기 때문에,

lines.en: Let my life show forth thy praise.

title_en: O Love of God, How Strong and True
title_ko: 오 하나님의 사랑이여, 얼마나 강하고 진실하신지요 (자체번역)

lines.en: O love of God, how strong and true!
lines.ko: 오 하나님의 사랑이여, 얼마나 강하고 진실하신지요!

lines.en: Eternal, and yet ever new;
Uncomprehended and unbought,
Beyond all knowledge and all thought.
O love of God, how deep and great!
lines.ko: 오 하나님의 사랑이여, 얼마나 깊고 위대하신지요!

lines.en: Far deeper than man's deepest hate;
lines.ko: 인간의 가장 깊은 증오보다 훨씬 더 깊습니다.

lines.en: Self-fed, self-kindled like the light,
Changeless, eternal, infinite.
O heavenly love, how precious still,
lines.ko: 오 천상의 사랑이여, 아직도 얼마나 소중한지요,

lines.en: In days of weariness and ill,
In nights of pain and helplessness,
To heal, to comfort, and to bless!
O wide embracing, wondrous love!
We read thee in the sky above,
We read thee in the earth below,
In seas that swell, and streams that flow.
We read thee best in him who came
lines.ko: 우리는 오신 분에게서 당신을 가장 잘 읽습니다.

lines.en: To bear for us the cross of shame;
Sent by the Father from on high,
Our life to live, our death to die.
lines.ko: 살기 위한 우리의 삶, 죽기 위한 우리의 죽음.

lines.en: We read thy power to bless and save,
lines.ko: 우리는 당신의 축복과 구원의 능력을 읽었습니다.

lines.en: Even in the darkness of the grave;
Still more in resurrection light
We read the fulness of thy might.
O love of God, our shield and stay
lines.ko: 오 하느님의 사랑, 우리의 방패이자 머무름

lines.en: Through all the perils of our way!
lines.ko: 우리가 가는 길의 모든 위험을 뚫고!

lines.en: Eternal love, in thee we rest,
lines.ko: 영원한 사랑, 당신 안에서 우리는 쉬고,

lines.en: For ever safe, for ever blest.

title_en: Great God of Wonders!

lines.en: [English lyrics not available in the database for this revised hymn]
lines.ko: [이 개정된 찬송가의 데이터베이스에는 영어 가사가 없습니다.]

title_en: O Praise the Lord, for He is Good

lines.en: Psalm 107:1-9
O praise the Lord, for he is good,
His mercies still endure;
Thus say the ransomed of the Lord,
lines.ko: 여호와의 속량함을 받은 자가 이같이 말하노라

lines.en: From all their foes secure.
He gathered them from out the lands,
From north, south, east and west.
They strayed in desert's pathless way,
lines.ko: 그들은 사막의 길 없는 길에서 방황했고,

lines.en: No city found for rest.
Their weary soul within them faints
lines.ko: 그들의 지친 영혼은 그 속에서 기진맥진해집니다

lines.en: When thirst and hunger press;
In trouble then they cried to God,
lines.ko: 그 때에 그들이 환난 중에 하나님께 부르짖어 이르되

lines.en: He saved them from distress.
He made the way before them straight,
lines.ko: 그가 그들 앞에서 길을 곧게 하시고

lines.en: Himself became their guide,
That they might to a city go
Wherein they might abide.
O that men would Jehovah praise
lines.ko: 오, 사람들이 여호와를 찬양할 수 있다면

lines.en: For all his kindness shown,
And for his works so wonderful
Which he to men makes known!
Because the longing soul by him
With food is satisfied;
The hungry soul that looks to him
With goodness is supplied.

title_en: Under the Care of My God, the Almighty

lines.en: From Psalm 91
Under the care of my God, the Almighty,
Safe in the secret place of the Most High!
lines.ko: 지극히 높으신 분의 은밀한 곳에는 안전합니다!

lines.en: He is my Refuge, the Lord is my Fortress,
lines.ko: 그는 나의 피난처시요 여호와는 나의 요새시니

lines.en: Him I am trusting when trouble is nigh.
lines.ko: 환난이 가까웠을 때 나는 그분을 신뢰합니다.

lines.en: Under his wings, under his wings,
lines.ko: 그의 날개 아래, 그의 날개 아래서,

lines.en: Safe in the refuge hide thee;
Trusting his truth and faithfulness,
No evil can betide thee.
lines.ko: 어떤 악도 당신을 이길 수 없습니다.

lines.en: Be not afraid for the terror of midnight,
Nor for the arrow that hasteth to slay;
Fear not the pestilence walking in darkness,
lines.ko: 흑암 중에 행하는 전염병을 두려워하지 말라

lines.en: Nor the destroyer that wasteth by day.
Seek the Most High for thy sure habitation,
lines.ko: 너의 확실한 처소를 위하여 지극히 높으신 이에게 구하라

lines.en: Unto Jehovah for refuge now fly;
There shall no evil befall thee nor harm thee,
lines.ko: 어떤 재앙도 네게 닥치지 아니하며 해를 끼치지도 아니하리니

lines.en: Unto thy dwelling no plague shall come nigh.
lines.ko: 당신의 거처에는 어떤 재앙도 가까이 오지 않을 것입니다.

lines.en: Love thou the Lord, surely he will deliver;
lines.ko: 너는 여호와를 사랑하라. 그가 반드시 구원하시리라.

lines.en: He will exalt thee and answer thy prayer;
lines.ko: 그분께서 너를 높이시고 네 기도에 응답하실 것이다.

lines.en: He will be with thee to honor and give thee
lines.ko: 그가 너와 함께 있어 네게 존귀함과 은총을 주시리라

lines.en: Life without end, his salvation to share.
lines.ko: 끝이 없는 생명, 그분의 구원을 나누어 주십시오.

alt_titles: Under the care of my God, the Almighty

title_en: The Lord’s My Shepherd, I’ll Not Want
title_ko: 여호와는 나의 목자시니 나는 원치 아니하노라 (자체번역)

lines.en: Psalm 23
The Lord's my Shepherd, I'll not want;
lines.ko: 주님은 나의 목자시니 나는 원하지 않습니다.

lines.en: He makes me down to lie
In pastures green; he leadeth me
The quiet waters by.
My soul he doth restore again;
And me to walk doth make
Within the paths of righteousness,
E'en for his own name's sake.
Yea, though I walk in death's dark vale,
lines.ko: 그래요, 내가 죽음의 어두운 골짜기를 걷는다 할지라도

lines.en: Yet will I fear none ill,
lines.ko: 그러나 나는 아무도 아프지 않을 것을 두려워하지 않을 것입니다.

lines.en: For thou art with me; and thy rod
lines.ko: 당신이 나와 함께 계시기 때문입니다. 그리고 너의 지팡이

lines.en: And staff me comfort still.
My table thou hast furnished
In presence of my foes;
My head thou dost with oil anoint,
And my cup overflows.
Goodness and mercy all my life
Shall surely follow me:
And in God's house for evermore
My dwelling place shall be.

alt_titles: The Lord's my Shepherd, I'll not want (tune 2)
The Lord's my Shepherd, I'll not want (tune 3)
The Lord's my Shepherd, I'll not want (tune 4)
