lines.ko: 그래요, 내가 죽음의 어두운 골짜기를 걷는다 할지라도

lines.en: Yet will I fear none ill,
lines.ko: 그러나 나는 아무도 아프지 않을 것을 두려워하지 않을 것입니다.

lines.en: For thou art with me; and thy rod
lines.ko: 당신이 나와 함께 계시기 때문입니다. 그리고 너의 지팡이

lines.en: And staff me comfort still.
My table thou hast furnished
In presence of my foes;
My head thou dost with oil anoint,
And my cup overflows.
Goodness and mercy all my life
Shall surely follow me:
And in God's house for evermore
My dwelling place shall be.

alt_titles: The Lord's my Shepherd, I'll not want (tune 2)
The Lord's my Shepherd, I'll not want (tune 3)
The Lord's my Shepherd, I'll not want (tune 4)

title_en: With Grateful Heart My Thanks I Bring

lines.en: From Psalm 138
With grateful heart my thanks I bring,
lines.ko: 감사한 마음을 담아 감사 인사를 전합니다.

lines.en: Before the great thy praise I sing:
lines.ko: 당신을 크게 찬양하기 전에 나는 이렇게 노래합니다.

lines.en: I worship in thy holy place
And praise thee for thy truth and grace;
lines.ko: 그리고 당신의 진리와 은혜로 인해 당신을 찬양합니다.

lines.en: For truth and grace together shine
In thy most holy Word divine.
lines.ko: 당신의 가장 거룩한 말씀에 신성이 있습니다.

lines.en: I cried to thee and thou didst save,
lines.ko: 내가 당신께 부르짖었더니 당신께서 구원해 주셨고

lines.en: Thy Word of grace new courage gave;
lines.ko: 당신의 은혜의 말씀이 새 용기를 주셨으니

lines.en: The kings of earth shall thank thee, Lord,
For they have heard thy wondrous word;
Yea, they shall come with songs of praise,
lines.ko: 그렇습니다, 그들은 찬양의 노래를 가지고 올 것입니다.

lines.en: For great and glorious are thy ways.
O Lord, enthroned in glory bright,
lines.ko: 오, 찬란한 영광 속에 좌정하신 주님,

lines.en: Thou reignest in the heavenly height;
The proud in vain thy favor seek,
lines.ko: 교만한 자가 헛되이 주의 은혜를 구하고

lines.en: But thou hast mercy for the meek;
lines.ko: 그러나 당신께서는 온유한 자들에게는 자비를 베푸십니다.

lines.en: Through trouble though my pathway be,
Thou wilt revive and strengthen me.
lines.ko: 당신은 나를 소생시키고 강하게 하실 것입니다.

lines.en: Thou wilt stretch forth thy mighty arm
To save me when my foes alarm;
lines.ko: 내 적들이 놀라고 있을 때 나를 구원하시려고;

lines.en: The work thou hast for me begun
Shall by thy grace be fully done;
For ever mercy dwells with thee;
O Lord, my Maker, think on me.
lines.ko: 오 주님, 나의 창조주여, 나를 생각하소서.

title_en: God Is Our Strength and Refuge

lines.en: [English lyrics not available in the database for this revised hymn]
lines.ko: [이 개정된 찬송가의 데이터베이스에는 영어 가사가 없습니다.]

title_en: The Man Who Once Has Found Abode

lines.en: The man who once has found abode,
Within the secret place of God
Shall with Almighty God abide,
And in his shadow safely hide.
lines.ko: 그리고 그의 그림자 속에 안전하게 숨어 있습니다.

lines.en: I therefore of the Lord will say,
He is my Refuge and my Stay;
lines.ko: 그분은 나의 피난처이시며 나의 머무시는 분이십니다.

lines.en: My Citadel of strength is he
My God in whom my trust shall be.
For he shall with his watchful care
Preserve thee from the fowler's snare;
Yea, he shall be thy sure defense
lines.ko: 그렇습니다, 그는 당신의 확실한 방어자가 될 것입니다

lines.en: Against the deadly pestilence.
His outspread pinions shall thee hide,
lines.ko: 그의 펼쳐진 날개를 너는 숨길 것이며,

lines.en: Beneath his wings shalt thou confide.
lines.ko: 그분의 날개 아래서 당신은 비밀을 털어놓으십시오.

lines.en: His faithfulness shall ever be
A shield and buckler unto thee.
No nightly terrors shall alarm,
No deadly shaft by day shall harm;
lines.ko: 낮에는 어떤 치명적인 화살도 해를 끼치지 않을 것입니다.

lines.en: Nor pestilence that walks by night,
Nor plagues that waste in noonday light.
lines.ko: 한낮의 빛 속에서 낭비되는 재앙도 아닙니다.

lines.en: Because his angels he commands
To bear thee safely in their hands,
To guard thy ways, lest left alone,
lines.ko: 네 길을 지켜 홀로 버려지지 않게 하려 하심이니라

lines.en: Thou dash thy foot against a stone.
Because he set his love on me,
From danger I will set him free.
Because to him my name is known,
lines.ko: 그 사람에게는 내 이름이 알려져 있기 때문이다.

lines.en: On high I'll set him as mine own.
lines.ko: 높은 곳에서는 내가 그를 내 소유로 삼겠다.

title_en: Bow Down Thine Ear, O Lord, and Hear

lines.en: Psalm 86:1-11
Bow down thine ear, O Lord, and hear,
For I am poor and great my need;
Preserve my soul, for thee I fear;
lines.ko: 내 영혼을 지켜주소서. 내가 당신을 경외하기 때문입니다.

lines.en: O God, thy trusting servant heed.
lines.ko: 오 하느님, 당신을 신뢰하는 종은 귀를 기울이십시오.

lines.en: O Lord, be merciful to me,
For all the day to thee I cry;
Rejoice thy servant, for to thee
I lift my soul, O Lord most high.
lines.ko: 오 가장 높으신 주님, 내 영혼을 들어 올립니다.

lines.en: For thou, O Lord, art good and kind,
And ready to forgive thou art;
lines.ko: 그리고 당신은 용서할 준비가 되어 있습니다.

lines.en: Abundant mercy they shall find
Who call on thee with all their heart.
lines.ko: 온 마음을 다해 당신을 부르는 사람들입니다.

lines.en: O Lord, incline thine ear to me,
lines.ko: 오 주님, 나에게 귀를 기울여 주십시오.

lines.en: My voice of supplication heed,
lines.ko: 나의 간구하는 목소리에 귀를 기울여 주십시오.

lines.en: In trouble I will cry to thee,
For thou wilt answer when I plead.
There is no God but thee alone,
Nor works like thine, O Lord most high,
lines.ko: 오 가장 높으신 주님, 당신처럼 일하지도 않으십니다.

lines.en: All nations shall surround thy throne
And their Creator glorify.
In all thy deeds how great thou art!
lines.ko: 당신의 모든 행위에서 당신은 얼마나 위대합니까!

lines.en: Thou one true God, thy way make clear;
lines.ko: 유일하신 참 하나님이시여, 주의 길을 평탄하게 하소서.

lines.en: Teach me with undivided heart
To trust thy truth, thy Name to fear.
lines.ko: 당신의 진리를 신뢰하고, 당신의 이름을 두려워하십시오.

title_en: A Mighty Fortress Is Our God

lines.en: A mighty fortress is our God,
lines.ko: 내 주는 강한 성이요 방패와 병기되시니
lines.id: Benteng yang perkasa adalah Tuhan kita,

lines.en: A bulwark never failing;
lines.id: Sebuah Bul-wark tidak pernah gagal

lines.en: Our helper he amid the flood
lines.ko: 옛 원수 마귀는 이때도 힘을 써
lines.id: Penolong Kami Dia di tengah banjir

lines.en: Of mortal ills prevailing.
lines.ko: 모략과 권세로 무기를 삼으니 천하에 누가 당하랴
lines.id: Dari penyakit fana yang sudah ada sebelumnya.

lines.en: For still our ancient foe
lines.id: Karena musuh lama kita masih berusaha untuk membuat kita celaka

lines.en: Doth seek to work us woe;
lines.id: Keahlian dan kekuatannya luar biasa

lines.en: His craft and power are great;
lines.id: Dan, dipersenjatai dengan kebencian yang kejam,

lines.en: And armed with cruel hate,
lines.id: Di bumi tidak ada yang setara dengan-Nya.

lines.en: On earth is not his equal.
Did we in our own strength confide,
lines.ko: 내 힘만 의지할 때는 패할 수밖에 없도다
lines.id: Apakah kita dengan kekuatan kita sendiri mengaku,

lines.en: Our striving would be losing;
lines.ko: 힘 있는 장수 나와서 날 대신 하여 싸우네
lines.id: Perjuangan kita akan sia-sia

lines.en: Were not the right Man on our side,
lines.ko: 이 장수 누군가 주 예수 그리스도 만군의 주로다
lines.id: Bukankah Manusia yang tepat ada di pihak kita,

lines.en: The Man of God's own choosing.
lines.id: Pilihan Manusia Tuhan sendiri.

lines.en: Dost ask who that may be?
lines.id: Jangan bertanya siapakah itu Kristus Yesus, itu Dia,

lines.en: Christ Jesus, it is he,
lines.id: Tuhan Sab-a-oth Namanya,

lines.en: Lord Sabaoth his name,
lines.id: Dari zaman ke zaman sama saja,

lines.en: From age to age the same,
lines.id: Dan Dia harus memenangkan pertempuran itu.

lines.en: And he must win the battle.
And though this world, with devils filled,
lines.ko: 이 땅에 마귀 들끓어 우리를 삼키려 하나
lines.id: Meskipun dunia ini penuh dengan setan,

lines.en: Should threaten to undo us,
lines.id: Jika mengancam untuk membatalkan tindakan kita,

lines.en: We will not fear, for God hath willed
lines.ko: 친척과 재물과 명예와 생명을 다 빼앗긴대도
lines.id: Kami tidak akan takut, karena Tuhan telah menghendakinya

lines.en: His truth to triumph through us.
lines.ko: 진리는 살아서 그 나라 영원하리라 아멘
lines.id: Kebenarannya akan menang melalui kita

lines.en: The prince of darkness grim,
lines.id: Biarkan barang-barang dan orang-orang baik pergi, begitu pula kehidupan fana ini

lines.en: We tremble not for him;
lines.id: Tubuh yang mungkin mereka bunuh

lines.en: His rage we can endure,
lines.id: Kebenaran Tuhan masih tetap ada

lines.en: For lo! his doom is sure;
lines.id: Kerajaan-Nya adalah untuk selama-lamanya.

lines.en: One little word shall fell him.
That Word above all earthly powers,
No thanks to them, abideth;
The Spirit and the gifts are ours
Through him who with us sideth;
Let goods and kindred go,
This mortal life also;
The body they may kill:
God's truth abideth still;
His kingdom is for ever.

title_id: Benteng yang Perkasa Adalah Tuhan Kita

title_en: The Tender Love a Father Has

lines.en: From Psalm 103:13-18
The tender love a father has
For all his children dear,
Such love the Lord bestows on them
Who worship him in fear.
The Lord remembers we are dust,
And all our frailty knows;
lines.ko: 그리고 우리의 모든 연약함은 알고 있습니다.

lines.en: Man's days are like the tender grass,
And as the flower he grows.
The flower is withered by the wind
That smites with blighting breath;
So man is quickly swept away
Before the blast of death.
Unchanging is the love of God,
From age to age the same,
Displayed to all who do his will
lines.ko: 그의 뜻을 행하는 모든 사람에게 나타나신다

lines.en: And reverence his Name.
Those who his gracious cov'nant keep
The Lord will ever bless;
Their children's children shall rejoice
To see his righteousness.

title_en: How Firm a Foundation

lines.en: [English lyrics not available in the database for this revised hymn]
lines.ko: [이 개정된 찬송가의 데이터베이스에는 영어 가사가 없습니다.]

title_en: Though Troubles Assail Us

lines.en: Though troubles assail us, and dangers affright,
Though friends should all fail us, and foes all unite,
lines.ko: 친구는 모두 우리를 실망시키고 적들은 모두 단결하지만

lines.en: Yet one thing secures us, whatever betide,
lines.ko: 그러나 어떤 일이 닥쳐도 우리를 안전하게 해주는 한 가지는

lines.en: The promise assures us, "The Lord will provide."
lines.ko: 그 약속은 “주께서 예비하실 것이다”라고 우리에게 확신시켜 줍니다.

lines.en: The birds, without garner or storehouse, are fed;
lines.ko: 창고도 없고 창고도 없는 새들이 먹이를 받습니다.

lines.en: From them let us learn to trust God for our bread:
lines.ko: 그들에게서 우리는 빵을 위해 하나님을 신뢰하는 법을 배웁니다.

lines.en: His saints what is fitting shall ne'er be denied
lines.ko: 그의 성도들에게 합당한 것은 결코 거부되지 않을 것입니다

lines.en: So long as 'tis written, "The Lord will provide."
When Satan assails us to stop up our path,
lines.ko: 사탄이 우리의 길을 막으려고 공격할 때,

lines.en: And courage all fails us, we triumph by faith.
lines.ko: 그리고 용기는 모두 우리를 실패하게 만들고, 우리는 믿음으로 승리합니다.

lines.en: He cannot take from us, though oft he has tried,
lines.ko: 비록 그가 여러 번 시도했지만, 그는 우리에게서 빼앗을 수 없습니다.

lines.en: This heart-cheering promise, "The Lord will provide."
lines.ko: 이 마음을 기쁘게 하는 약속은 "여호와께서 마련하실 것이다"입니다.

lines.en: No strength of our own, and no goodness we claim;
lines.ko: 우리 자신의 힘도 없고, 우리가 주장하는 선함도 없습니다.

lines.en: Yet, since we have known of the Saviour's great name,
lines.ko: 그러나 우리는 구주의 크신 이름을 알았으므로

lines.en: In this our strong tower for safety we hide:
lines.ko: 여기에 우리는 안전을 위한 강력한 탑을 숨깁니다.

lines.en: The Lord is our power, "The Lord will provide."

title_en: Unto the Hills

lines.en: [English lyrics not available in the database for this revised hymn]
lines.ko: [이 개정된 찬송가의 데이터베이스에는 영어 가사가 없습니다.]

title_en: We Praise You, O God, Our Redeemer, Creator

lines.en: We praise thee, O God, our Redeemer, Creator,
lines.id: Kami memuji Engkau, ya Tuhan, Penebus kami, Pencipta,

lines.en: In grateful devotion our tribute we bring.
lines.id: Sebagai bentuk pengabdian yang penuh rasa syukur, upeti kami bawa

lines.en: We lay it before thee, we kneel and adore thee,
lines.id: Kami merebahkannya di hadapanMu, kami berlutut dan memujaMu,

lines.en: We bless thy holy name, glad praises we sing.
lines.id: Kami memuji nama suci-Mu, pujian senang kami nyanyikan.

lines.en: We worship thee, God of our fathers, we bless thee;
lines.id: Kami menyembah Engkau, ya Allah nenek moyang kami, kami memberkati Engkau

lines.en: Through life's storm and tempest our guide hast thou been.
lines.id: Melalui badai dan badai kehidupan, Panduan kami telah Anda lalui

lines.en: When perils o'ertake us, escape thou wilt make us,
lines.id: Ketika bahaya menimpa kami, Engkau akan membuat kami melarikan diri,

lines.en: And with thy help, O Lord, our battles we win.
lines.id: Dan dengan bantuan-Mu, ya Tuhan, perjuangan kami kami menangkan.

lines.en: With voices united our praises we offer,
lines.id: Dengan suara yang tidak menyebutkan pujian yang kami berikan,

lines.en: To thee, great Jehovah, glad anthems we raise.
lines.id: BagiMu, Ye-ho-vah yang agung, senang sekali lagu-lagu yang kami angkat.

lines.en: Thy strong arm will guide us, our God is beside us,
lines.id: Lengan kuatmu akan membimbing kami, Tuhan kami ada di samping kami,

lines.en: To thee, our great Redeemer, for ever be praise.
lines.id: BagiMu, Penebus kami yang agung, selalu terpuji.

title_id: Kami Memuji Engkau, ya Tuhan, Penebus kami, Pencipta

title_en: Now Thank We All Our God

lines.en: Now thank we all our God
lines.ko: 다 감사드리세 온 맘을 주께 바쳐
lines.id: Sekarang terima kasih kepada kami semua, Tuhan kami

lines.en: With heart and hands and voices,
lines.ko: 그 섭리 놀라워 온 세상 기뻐하네
lines.id: Dengan hati, tangan, dan suara,

lines.en: Who wondrous things hath done,
lines.ko: 예부터 주신 복 한없는 그 사랑
lines.id: Siapa yang telah melakukan banyak hal,

lines.en: In whom his world rejoices;
lines.id: Kepada siapa dunia-Nya bersukacita

lines.en: Who from our mothers' arms,
lines.id: Siapa, dari pelukan ibu kita,

lines.en: Hath blessed us on our way
lines.id: Telah memberkati kita dalam perjalanan kita

lines.en: With countless gifts of love,
lines.id: Dengan hadiah cinta yang tak terhitung jumlahnya

lines.en: And still is ours today.
lines.id: Dan masih menjadi milik kita saat ini.

lines.en: O may this bounteous God
lines.id: Oh, semoga Tuhan yang pemurah ini

lines.en: Through all our life be near us
lines.id: Sepanjang hidup kita berada di dekat kita,

lines.en: With ever joyful hearts
lines.ko: 몸과 맘 병들 때 은혜로 지키사
lines.id: Dengan hati yang selalu gembira

lines.en: And blessed peace to cheer us;
lines.id: Dan kedamaian yang diberkati untuk menghibur kita

lines.en: And keep us in his grace,
lines.id: Dan peliharalah kami dalam rahmat-Nya,

lines.en: And guide us when perplexed,
lines.id: Dan tuntunlah kami ketika kebingungan,

lines.en: And free us from all ills
lines.id: Dan bebaskan kami dari segala penyakit

lines.en: In this world and the next.
lines.id: Di dunia ini dan di akhirat.

lines.en: All praise and thanks to God,
lines.id: Segala puji dan syukur kepada Tuhan

lines.en: The Father, now be given,
lines.id: Sang Ayah sekarang diberikan,

lines.en: The Son, and him who reigns
lines.id: Putra, dan Dia yang memerintah

lines.en: With them in highest heaven,
lines.id: Bersama mereka di surga tertinggi,

lines.en: The one eternal God
lines.id: Tuhan yang kekal,

lines.en: Whom earth and heav'n adore;
lines.id: Yang dipuja oleh bumi dan surga,

lines.en: For thus it was, is now,
lines.id: Karena dulu, sekarang,

lines.en: And shall be evermore.
lines.id: Dan akan selalu lebih baik lagi.

title_id: Sekarang Terima Kasih Kami Semua Tuhan Kami

title_en: My Song Forever Shall Record

lines.en: My song for ever shall record
The tender mercies of the Lord;
Thy faithfulness will I proclaim,
And every age shall know thy name.
lines.ko: 그리고 모든 시대가 당신의 이름을 알게 될 것입니다.

lines.en: I sing of mercies that endure,
For ever builded firm and sure,
Of faithfulness that never dies,
Established changeless in the skies.
Behold God's truth and grace displayed,
lines.ko: 하나님의 진리와 은혜가 나타난 것을 보십시오.

lines.en: For he has faithful cov'nant made,
And he has sworn that David's Son
Shall ever sit upon his throne.
For him my mercy shall endure,
My cov'nant made with him is sure;
His throne and race I will maintain
For ever, while the heavens remain.
Blessed be the Lord for evermore,
Whose promise stands from days of yore.
His word is faithful now as then;
Blessed be his Name, Amen, Amen.

title_en: Holy, Holy, Holy!

lines.ko: 거룩 거룩 거룩 전능하신 만군의 주
lines.en: Holy, holy, holy, Lord God Almighty!
lines.id: Kudus, suci, suci, Tuhan Allah Yang Mahakuasa!

lines.en: Early in the morning our song shall rise to Thee;
lines.id: Pagi-pagi sekali nyanyian kami akan terdengar bagiMu;

lines.en: Holy, holy, holy, merciful and mighty!
lines.id: Suci, suci, suci, penyayang dan perkasa!

lines.en: God in Three Persons, blessed Trinity!
lines.id: Tuhan dalam Tiga Pribadi, Tritunggal yang terberkati!

lines.en: Holy, holy, holy! all the saints adore Thee,
lines.id: Suci, suci, suci! semua orang suci memujaMu,

lines.en: Casting down their golden crowns around the glassy sea;
lines.id: Melemparkan mahkota emas mereka di sekitar lautan kaca;

lines.en: Cherubim and Seraphim falling down before Thee,
lines.id: Kerubim dan Seraphim tersungkur di hadapanMu,

lines.en: Who wert and art, and ever-more shall be.
lines.id: Siapa yang menulis dan seni, dan akan selalu ada lagi.

lines.en: Holy, holy, holy! Though the darkness hide Thee,
lines.id: Suci, suci, suci! Meski kegelapan menyembunyikan-Mu,

lines.en: Though the eye of sinful man Thy glory may not see,
lines.id: Sekalipun mata manusia berdosa tidak melihat kemuliaan-Mu,

lines.en: Only Thou art holy; there is none beside Thee,
lines.id: Hanya Engkau yang suci; tidak ada seorang pun selain Engkau,

lines.en: Perfect in power, in love and purity.
lines.id: Sempurna dalam kekuatan, dalam cinta dan kemurnian.

lines.en: Holy, holy, holy, Lord God Almighty!
lines.id: Kudus, suci, suci, Tuhan Allah Yang Mahakuasa!

lines.en: All Thy works shall praise Thy name, in earth, and sky, and sea!
lines.id: Segala karya-Mu akan memuji nama-Mu, di bumi, dan langit, dan laut!

lines.en: Holy, holy, holy, merciful and mighty!
lines.id: Suci, suci, suci, penyayang dan perkasa!

lines.en: God in Three Persons, blessed Trinity!
lines.id: Tuhan dalam Tiga Pribadi, Tritunggal yang terberkati!

title_en: Come, Thou Almighty King

lines.en: Come, thou Almighty King,
lines.id: Datanglah, Engkau Raja Yang Maha Perkasa

lines.en: Help us thy name to sing,
lines.id: Bantu kami menyanyikan Nama-Mu. Bantu kami memuji:

lines.en: Help us to praise:
lines.id: Ayah, maha mulia, O'er semua yang menang,

lines.en: Father, all glorious,
lines.id: Datanglah, dan berkuasalah atas kami, Yang Lanjut Usianya.

lines.en: O'er all victorious,
Come, and reign over us,
Ancient of days.
Come, thou Incarnate Word,
lines.id: Datanglah, Engkau Sabda yang Menjelma,

lines.en: Gird on thy mighty sword,
lines.id: Siapkan pedang-Mu yang perkasa, Doa kami panjatkan:

lines.en: Our prayer attend:
lines.id: Datanglah, dan umat-Mu memberkati, Dan sukseskan Firman-Mu

lines.en: Come and thy people bless,
lines.id: Semangat Kekudusan, Pada kami turun.

lines.en: And give thy Word success;
Spirit of holiness,
On us descend.
Come, Holy Comforter,
lines.id: Ayo, Penghibur Suci,

lines.en: Thy sacred witness bear
lines.id: Kesaksianmu yang kredibel di saat-saat yang menyenangkan ini:

lines.en: In this glad hour:
lines.id: Engkau yang maha kuasa, Kini berkuasa di setiap hati,

lines.en: Thou who almighty art,
lines.id: Dan jangan pernah berpisah dari kami, Semangat kekuatan.

lines.en: Now rule in every heart,
And ne'er from us depart,
Spirit of power.
To the great One in Three
lines.id: Kepada Yang Agung dari Tiga

lines.en: Eternal praises be,
lines.id: Pujian abadi, Oleh karena itu, lebih-lebih lagi.

lines.en: Hence evermore.
lines.id: Yang Mulia Yang Mulia Semoga kita dapat melihat dengan mulia,

lines.en: His sovereign majesty
lines.id: Dan untuk selamanya Cinta dan cinta A-men.

lines.en: May we in glory see,
And to eternity
Love and adore.

title_en: All Glory Be to Thee, Most High
title_ko: 모든 영광이 지극히 높으신 당신께 있기를 (자체번역)

lines.en: All glory be to thee, Most High,
lines.ko: 지극히 높으신 분, 모든 영광을 당신께 돌립니다.

lines.en: To thee all adoration;
In grace and truth thou drawest nigh
To offer us salvation;
Thou showest thy good will to men,
And peace shall reign on earth again;
lines.ko: 그리고 평화가 다시 땅을 다스리게 될 것입니다.

lines.en: We praise thy Name for ever.
We praise, we worship thee, we trust,
And give thee thanks for ever,
O Father, for thy rule is just
And wise, and changes never;
Thy hand almighty o'er us reigns,
Thou doest what thy will ordains;
lines.ko: 당신은 당신의 뜻이 정한 대로 행합니다.

lines.en: 'Tis well for us thou rulest.
O Jesus Christ, our God and Lord,
lines.ko: 오, 우리의 하나님이시며 주이신 예수 그리스도시여,

lines.en: Son of the Heavenly Father,
O thou who hast our peace restored,
The straying sheep dost gather,
Thou Lamb of God, to thee on high
lines.ko: 하느님의 어린양이시여, 높은 곳에 계신 당신께

lines.en: Out of the depths we sinners cry:
lines.ko: 깊은 곳에서 우리 죄인들은 이렇게 부르짖습니다.

lines.en: Have mercy on us, Jesus!
O Holy Spirit, precious gift,
Thou Comforter unfailing,
From Satan's snares our souls uplift,
And let thy power, availing,
Avert our woes and calm our dread.
lines.ko: 우리의 불행을 피하고 우리의 두려움을 진정시키십시오.

lines.en: For us the Saviour's blood was shed;
We trust in thee to save us.
lines.ko: 우리는 당신이 우리를 구원하실 것을 믿습니다.

title_en: Holy God, We Praise Your Name

lines.en: Holy God, we praise your name;
lines.ko: 거룩하신 하나님, 우리는 당신의 이름을 찬양합니다.

lines.en: Lord of all, we bow before you!
lines.ko: 모든 것의 주님, 우리는 당신 앞에 절합니다!

lines.en: All on earth your sceptre claim
lines.ko: 지구상의 모든 것이 당신의 홀을 요구합니다

lines.en: All in heaven above adore you.
lines.ko: 하늘 위의 모든 것이 당신을 존경합니다.

lines.en: Infinite your vast domain.
Everlasting is your reign.
Hark, the loud celestial hymn,
Angel choirs above are raising!
Cherubim and Seraphim.
In unceasing chorus praising,
Fill the heavens with sweet accord;
Holy, holy, holy Lord!
Holy Father, Holy Son!
Holy Spirit, three we name you,
While in essence only One,
Undivided God we claim you:
lines.ko: 우리는 당신을 나누지 않은 신이라고 주장합니다:

lines.en: And adoring bend the knee,
While we own the mystery.
Spare your people, Lord, we pray,
By a thousand snares surrounded;
Keep us without sin today;
lines.ko: 오늘 우리를 죄 없이 지켜 주소서.

lines.en: Never let us be confounded.
Lo! I put my trust in thee-
Never Lord, abandon me.

title_en: We Lift Up as Our Shield God’s Name
title_ko: 우리는 우리의 방패로 듭니다. 하느님의 이름 (자체번역)

lines.en: [English lyrics not available in the database for this revised hymn]
lines.ko: [이 개정된 찬송가의 데이터베이스에는 영어 가사가 없습니다.]

title_en: O God, We Praise Thee

lines.en: [English lyrics not available in the database for this revised hymn]
lines.ko: [이 개정된 찬송가의 데이터베이스에는 영어 가사가 없습니다.]

title_en: Father, Father of All Things

lines.en: [English lyrics not available in the database for this revised hymn]
lines.ko: [이 개정된 찬송가의 데이터베이스에는 영어 가사가 없습니다.]

title_en: Praise Ye the Father!

lines.en: [English lyrics not available in the database for this revised hymn]
lines.ko: [이 개정된 찬송가의 데이터베이스에는 영어 가사가 없습니다.]

title_en: Whate’er My God Ordains Is Right
title_ko: 내 하나님이 명하시는 것은 무엇이든지 옳으니이다 (자체번역)

lines.en: Whate'er my God ordains is right:
lines.ko: 나의 하나님이 정하신 것은 다 옳으니이다

lines.en: Holy his will abideth;
I will be still whate'er he doth;
lines.ko: 나는 그가 무엇을 하든 여전히 그럴 것이다.

lines.en: And follow where he guideth:
He is my God: though dark my road,
lines.ko: 그는 나의 하나님이시니 내 길이 어두울지라도

lines.en: He holds me that I shall not fall:
lines.ko: 그분은 내가 넘어지지 않도록 나를 붙드십니다.

lines.en: Wherefore to him I leave it all.
lines.ko: 그러므로 나는 모든 것을 그에게 맡깁니다.

lines.en: Whate'er my God ordains is right:
lines.ko: 나의 하나님이 정하신 것은 다 옳으니이다

lines.en: He never will deceive me;
lines.ko: 그는 결코 나를 속이지 않을 것입니다.

lines.en: He leads me by the proper path;
I know he will not leave me:
lines.ko: 나는 그가 나를 떠나지 않을 것이라는 것을 압니다.

lines.en: I take, content, what he hath sent;
lines.ko: 나는 그가 보낸 것을 만족스럽게 받아들입니다.

lines.en: His hand can turn my griefs away,
lines.ko: 그분의 손이 내 슬픔을 돌이킬 수 있고,

lines.en: And patiently I wait his day.
lines.ko: 그리고 나는 그의 날을 참을성있게 기다립니다.

lines.en: Whate'er my God ordains is right:
lines.ko: 나의 하나님이 정하신 것은 다 옳으니이다

lines.en: Though now this cup, in drinking,
May bitter seem to my faint heart,
lines.ko: 내 희미한 마음에 쓰라린 것처럼 보일 수 있습니다.

lines.en: I take it, all unshrinking:
My God is true; each morn anew
lines.ko: 나의 하나님은 진실하시도다. 매일 아침 새롭게

lines.en: Sweet comfort yet shall fill my heart,
lines.ko: 달콤한 위안이 내 마음을 가득 채울 것입니다.

lines.en: And pain and sorrow shall depart.
Whate'er my God ordains is right:
lines.ko: 나의 하나님이 정하신 것은 다 옳으니이다

lines.en: Here shall my stand be taken;
Though sorrow, need, or death be mine,
lines.ko: 비록 슬픔, 궁핍, 죽음이 나의 것일지라도

lines.en: Yet am I not forsaken;
My Father's care is round me there;
lines.ko: 내 아버지의 보살핌이 내 주위에 있습니다.

lines.en: He holds me that I shall not fall:
lines.ko: 그분은 내가 넘어지지 않도록 나를 붙드십니다.

lines.en: And so to him I leave it all.
lines.ko: 그래서 나는 그에게 모든 것을 맡깁니다.

title_en: Lord, My Weak Thought in Vain Would Climb
title_ko: 주여, 나의 약한 생각이 헛되이 오르리이다 (자체번역)

lines.en: Lord, my weak thought in vain would climb
lines.ko: 주님, 나의 약한 생각이 헛되이 올라갈 것입니다

lines.en: To search the starry vault profound;
In vain would wing her flight sublime
lines.ko: 헛되이 그녀의 비행은 숭고하게 날개를 달았을 것입니다

lines.en: To find creation's utmost bound.
But weaker yet that thought must prove
lines.ko: 하지만 그 생각은 더 약하지만 증명되어야 합니다

lines.en: To search thy great eternal plan,
lines.ko: 당신의 위대하고 영원한 계획을 탐구하기 위해,

lines.en: Thy sovereign counsels, born of love
Long ages ere the world began.
When my dim reason would demand
Why that, or this, thou dost ordain,
By some vast deep I seem to stand,
lines.ko: 어느 광대한 깊은 곳에서 나는 서 있는 것 같다.

lines.en: Whose secrets I must ask in vain.
When doubts disturb my troubled breast,
lines.ko: 의심이 불안한 내 가슴을 어지럽힐 때,

lines.en: And all is dark as night to me,
lines.ko: 그리고 나에게는 모든 것이 밤처럼 어둡습니다.

lines.en: Here, as on solid rock, I rest,
lines.ko: 여기, 단단한 바위 위에 있는 것처럼 나는 쉬고 있다.

lines.en: That so it seemeth good to thee.
Be this my joy, that evermore
Thou rulest all things at thy will;
lines.ko: 당신은 당신의 뜻대로 모든 것을 다스리십니다.

lines.en: Thy sovereign wisdom I adore,
And calmly, sweetly, trust thee still.
lines.ko: 그리고 조용하고 다정하게 당신을 여전히 신뢰하십시오.

title_en: Hallelujah, Praise Jehovah

lines.en: Hallelujah, praise Jehovah,
From the heavens praise his Name;
Praise Jehovah in the highest,
All his angels, praise proclaim.
All his hosts, together praise him,
lines.ko: 그의 모든 집주인이 함께 그를 찬양하고

lines.en: Sun and moon and stars on high;
lines.ko: 높은 곳에는 해와 달과 별들이 있고

lines.en: Praise him, O ye heav'ns of heavens,
lines.ko: 오 너희 하늘의 하늘들아, 그를 찬양하라.

lines.en: And ye floods above the sky.
lines.ko: 그리고 너희는 하늘 위로 홍수가 난다.

lines.en: Let them praises give Jehovah,
For his name alone is high,
And his glory is exalted,
And his glory is exalted,
And his glory is exalted,
Far above the earth and sky.
Let them praises give Jehovah,
They were made at his command;
Them for ever he established,
His decree shall ever stand.
From the earth, O praise Jehovah,
All ye seas, ye monsters all,
Fire and hail and snow and vapors,
Stormy winds that hear his call.
All ye fruitful trees and cedars,
lines.ko: 너희 모든 열매 맺는 나무들과 백향목들아,

lines.en: All ye hills and mountains high;
Creeping things and beasts and cattle,
Birds that in the heavens fly,
Kings of earth, and all ye people,
Princes great, earth's judges all;
Praise his Name, young men and maidens,
Aged men, and children small.

alt_titles: Let them praises give Jehovah

title_en: This Is My Father’s World

lines.en: This is my Father's world,
lines.id: Ya Tuhan, Mahakuasa! Raja, siapa or-dain-est

lines.en: And to my list'ning ears,
lines.ko: 저 솔로몬의 옷보다 더 고운 백합화
lines.id: Guntur penjelasan-Mu, pedang-Mu yang menyambar petir

lines.en: All nature sings, and round me rings
lines.ko: 주 찬송하는 듯 저 맑은 새소리
lines.id: Tunjukkan kasih-Mu di tempat tinggi di mana Engkau berkuasa

lines.en: The music of the spheres.
lines.ko: 내 아버지의 지으신 그 솜씨 깊도다
lines.id: Berilah kami kedamaian di waktu kami, ya Tuhan.

lines.en: This is my Father's world:
I rest me in the thought
Of rocks and trees, of skies and seas;
His hand the wonders wrought.
This is my Father's world,
lines.id: Tuhan Yang Maha Penyayang! Bumi telah for-sak-en

lines.en: The birds their carols raise,
lines.ko: 저 아침해와 저녁 놀 밤 하늘 빛난 별
lines.id: Kelemahlembutan dan belas kasihan, dan meremehkan firman-Mu

lines.en: The morning light, the lily white,
lines.id: Jangan biarkan murka-Mu dalam terornya terbangun

lines.en: Declare their Maker's praise.
lines.ko: 다 주 하나님 영광을 잘 드러내도다
lines.id: Berilah kami kedamaian di waktu kami, ya Tuhan.

lines.en: This is my Father's world:
He shines in all that's fair;
In the rustling grass I hear him pass,
He speaks to me everywhere.
This is my Father's world,
lines.id: Tuhan Yang Maha Benar! Manusia telah menentang Engkau

lines.en: O let me ne'er forget
lines.ko: 저 산에 부는 바람과 잔잔한 시냇물
lines.id: Namun untuk selamanya menepati janji-Mu

lines.en: That though the wrong seems oft so strong,
lines.ko: 그 소리 가운데 주 음성 들리니
lines.id: Kepalsuan dan kekeliruan tidak akan tinggal di sisi-Mu

lines.en: God is the ruler yet.
lines.ko: 주 하나님의 큰 뜻을 나 알 듯 하도다 아멘
lines.id: Berilah kami kedamaian di waktu kami, ya Tuhan.

lines.en: This is my Father's world:
The battle is not done;
Jesus who died shall be satisfied,
And earth and heav'n be one.

lines.id: Demikian pula umat-Mu, dengan pengabdian yang penuh syukur,
Pujilah Dia yang menyelamatkan mereka dari bahaya dan pedang,
Bernyanyi dalam paduan suara dari lautan ke lautan,
Damai sejahtera bagi bangsa-bangsa dan puji bagi Tuhan. Amin.

title_en: Praise Ye, Praise Ye the Lord

lines.en: From Psalm 148
Praise ye, praise ye the Lord
In yonder heav'nly height;
Ye angels, all his hosts,
In joyful praise unite;
O sun and moon, declare his might,
lines.ko: 오 해와 달이여, 그의 권능을 선포하소서.

lines.en: Show forth his praise, ye stars of light.
Praise him, ye highest heav'ns,
Praise him, ye clouds that roll,
Created by his pow'r
And under his control,
Ye heavens that stand eternally,
Established by his firm decree.
Ye creatures in the sea
And creatures on the earth,
Your mighty Maker praise
And tell his matchless worth;
lines.ko: 그리고 그의 비길 데 없는 가치를 말하라.

lines.en: Praise him, ye stormy winds that blow,
Ye fire and hail, ye rain and snow.
lines.ko: 너희는 불과 우박이요, 너희는 비와 눈이니라.

lines.en: Ye hills and mountains, praise,
Each tree and beast and bird;
Ye kings and realms of earth,
Now let your praise be heard;
By high and low, by young and old,
Be all his praise and glory told.
By all let God be praised,
For he alone is great;
Above the earth and heav'n
He reigns in glorious state;
Praise him, ye saints, who know his grace
lines.ko: 그의 은혜를 아는 성도들아 그를 찬양하라

lines.en: And ever dwell before his face.
lines.ko: 그리고 항상 그분의 얼굴 앞에 거하십시오.

title_en: The Heavens Declare Thy Glory

lines.en: From Psalm 19:1-6, 14
The heav'ns declare thy glory,
The firmament thy pow'r;
Day unto day the story
Repeats from hour to hour;
Night unto night replying,
Proclaims in every land,
O Lord, with voice undying,
The wonders of thy hand.
The sun with royal splendor
Goes forth to chant thy praise,
And moonbeams soft and tender
Their gentler anthem raise;
Over every tribe and nation
The music strange is poured,
The song of all creation
To thee, creation's Lord.
All heaven on high rejoices
lines.ko: 높은 곳에 있는 모든 하늘이 기뻐하리라

lines.en: To do its Maker's will,
The stars with solemn voices
Resound thy praises still;
So let my whole behavior,
Thoughts, words, and actions be,
O Lord, my Strength, my Saviour,
lines.ko: 오 주님, 나의 힘, 나의 구원자,

lines.en: One ceaseless song to thee.

title_en: Lord, Our Lord, Thy Glorious Name

lines.en: Psalm 8:1-6, 9
lines.ko: 우리 주님 예수께 기쁜 찬송 드리세
lines.id: Marilah kita memuji Tuhan kita Yesus dengan penuh sukacita

lines.ko: 하늘 높은 곳에도 주의 영광 넘치네
lines.id: Kemuliaan Tuhan berlimpah-limpah bahkan di surga yang tertinggi

lines.en: Lord, our Lord, thy glorious Name
lines.id: Kekuatan besarmu telah mengikat kekuatan kegelapan.

lines.en: All thy wondrous works proclaim;
lines.id: Kalahkan musuhmu dan biarkan keinginanmu terlaksana.

lines.en: In the heav'ns with radiant signs
Evermore thy glory shines.
Infant lips thou dost ordain
Wrath and vengeance to restrain;
Weakest means fulfil thy will,
Mighty enemies to still.
Moon and stars in shining height
lines.ko: 밤 하늘의 별들도 주의 영광 찬양해
lines.id: Bahkan bintang-bintang di langit malam pun memuji kemuliaan Tuhan

lines.en: Nightly tell their Maker's might;
lines.ko: 무엇으로 그 영광 비교할 수 있으랴
lines.id: Apa yang bisa dibandingkan dengan kehebatannya?

lines.en: When thy wondrous heav'ns I scan,
Then I know how weak is man.
What is man that he should be
Loved and visited by thee,
Raised to an exalted height,
Crowned with honor in thy sight?
With dominion crowned he stands
lines.ko: 우리 주님 오시면 사랑 은혜 넘치고
lines.id: Ketika Tuhan kita datang, Dia akan dipenuhi dengan cinta dan rahmat.

lines.en: O'er the creatures of thy hands;
lines.ko: 영광스런 면류관 내게 씌워 주시네 아멘
lines.id: Engkau memahkotai aku dengan mahkota yang mulia, Amin.

lines.en: All to him subjection yield
In the sea and air and field.
Lord, our Lord, thy glorious Name
All thy wondrous works proclaim;
Thine the Name of matchless worth,
Excellent in all the earth.

title_id: Ya Tuhan, Tuhan kami, NamaMu yang Mulia

title_en: All Creatures of Our God and King

lines.ko: 온 천하 만물 우러러 다 주를 찬양하여라
lines.en: All crea-tures of our God and King,
lines.id: Semua makhluk Tuhan dan Raja kita,

lines.ko: 할렐루야 할렐루야 저 금빛 나는 밝은 해
lines.en: Lift up your voice and with us sing
lines.id: Angkat suaramu dan bernyanyilah bersama kami

lines.ko: 저 은빛 나는 밝은 달 하나님을 찬양하라
lines.en: Al-le-lu-ia! Al-le-lu-ia!
lines.id: Al-le-lu-ia! Al-le-lu-ia!

lines.en: Thou burn-ing sun with gold-en beam,

lines.id: Hai awan yang berlayar di surga lama sekali,

lines.en: Ye lights of eve-ning, find a voice!
lines.id: Hai cahaya malam, temukan suara!

lines.ko: 할렐루야 할렐루야 저 조화 많은 밝은 불
lines.en: Make mu-sic for thy Lord to hear,
lines.id: Jadikanlah musik agar Tuhanmu mendengarnya,

lines.en: Thou giv-est man both warmth and light!
lines.id: Engkau memberi manusia kehangatan dan cahaya!

lines.en: Dear moth-er earth,who day by day
lines.id: Ibu bumi yang terkasih, yang hari demi hari

lines.ko: 할렐루야 할렐루야 땅 위의 꽃과 열매들
lines.en: Un-fold-est bless-ings on our way,
lines.id: Berkat tersingkap dalam perjalanan kita,

lines.en: Oh-, praise Him! Al-le-lu-ia!
lines.id: Oh-, pujilah Dia! Al-le-lu-ia!

lines.en: The flowers and fruits that in thee grow,
lines.id: Bunga dan buah yang tumbuh di dalam dirimu,

lines.en: Let them His glo-ry al-so show!
lines.id: Biarlah mereka juga menunjukkan kemuliaan-Nya!

lines.id: Dan kalian semua yang berhati lembut,

lines.en: For-giv-ing oth-ers, take your part.
lines.id: Untuk memberi kepada orang lain, ambillah bagianmu.

lines.id: Puji Tuhan dan serahkan perhatianmu pada-Nya!

lines.id: Biarlah segala sesuatu diberkati oleh Penciptanya,

lines.ko: 할렐루야 할렐루야 성 삼위 일체 주님께
lines.en: And wor-ship Him in hum-ble-ness.
lines.id: Dan sembahlah Dia dengan kerendahan hati.

lines.ko: 존귀와 영광 돌려라 주를 찬양 할렐루야

lines.id: Oh-, pujilah Dia! Al-le-lu-ia!

title_id: Semua Makhluk Tuhan Dan Raja Kita

title_en: For the Beauty of the Earth

lines.en: For the beau-ty of the earth,
lines.id: Demi keindahan bumi,

lines.ko: 많은 사랑 베풀어 우리 길러 주시니
lines.en: For the beau-ty of the skies,
lines.id: Demi keindahan langit,

lines.en: For the love which from our birth
lines.id: Untuk cinta yang sejak lahir kita

lines.en: O-ver and a-round us lies,
lines.id: Di sekeliling kita berbohong,

lines.en: Lord of all, to Thee we raise
lines.id: Tuhan segalanya, hanya kepada-Mu kami angkat

lines.en: This our hymn of grate-ful praise.
lines.id: Inilah himne pujian penuh syukur kami.

lines.en: For the beau-ty of each hour
lines.id: Untuk keindahan setiap jam

lines.en: Of the day and of the night,
lines.id: Pada siang dan malam hari,

lines.en: Hill and vale, and tree and flower,
lines.id: Bukit dan lembah, pohon dan bunga,

lines.en: Sun and moon, and stars of light,
lines.id: Matahari dan bulan, dan bintang cahaya,

lines.en: Lord of all, to Thee we raise
lines.id: Tuhan segalanya, hanya kepada-Mu kami angkat

lines.en: This our hymn of grate-ful praise.
lines.id: Inilah himne pujian penuh syukur kami.

lines.ko: 눈과 귀를 밝히사 맘과 뜻이 합하고
lines.en: For the joy of ear and eye
lines.id: Untuk kesenangan telinga dan mata

lines.en: For the heart and mind's de-light
lines.id: Untuk kesenangan hati dan pikiran

lines.en: For the mys-tic har-mo-ny,
lines.id: Untuk har-mo-ny mistik,

lines.en: Link-ing sense to sound and sight,
lines.id: Menghubungkan indera dengan suara dan penglihatan,

lines.en: Lord of all, to Thee we raise
lines.id: Tuhan segalanya, hanya kepada-Mu kami angkat

lines.en: This our hymn of grate-ful praise.
lines.id: Inilah himne pujian penuh syukur kami.

lines.en: For the joy of hu-man love,
lines.id: Demi kebahagiaan cinta manusia-manusia,

lines.en: Broth-er, sis-ter, par-ent, child,
lines.id: Kakak laki-laki, saudara perempuan, orang tua, anak,

lines.en: Friends on earth, and friends a-bove
lines.id: Teman di bumi, dan teman di atas

lines.en: For all gen-tle tho'ts and mild,
lines.id: Untuk semua hal yang lembut dan ringan,

lines.en: Lord of all, to Thee we raise
lines.id: Tuhan segalanya, hanya kepada-Mu kami angkat

lines.en: This our hymn of grate-ful praise.
lines.id: Inilah himne pujian penuh syukur kami.

lines.en: For Thy church that ev-er-more
lines.id: Bagi gereja-Mu, lebih dari itu

lines.en: Lift-eth ho-ly hands a-bove,
lines.id: Angkat tangan suci ke atas,

lines.en: Of-f'ring up on ev'-ry shore
lines.id: Berangkat di setiap pantai

lines.en: Its pure sac-ri-fice of love,
lines.id: Pengorbanan cintanya yang murni,

lines.en: Lord of all, to Thee we raise
lines.id: Tuhan segalanya, hanya kepada-Mu kami angkat

lines.en: This our hymn of grate-ful praise.
lines.id: Inilah himne pujian penuh syukur kami.

lines.en: For Thy-self, blest Gift Di-vine!
lines.id: Untuk diri-Mu, Hadiah Ilahi yang terberkati!

lines.en: To our race so free-ly giv'n
lines.id: Kepada ras kita yang diberikan dengan bebas

lines.ko: 우리 주님 예수께 감사 찬송합니다 아멘
lines.en: For that great, great love of Thine,
lines.id: Untuk kasih-Mu yang sangat besar itu,

lines.en: Peace on earth, and joy in heav'n.
lines.id: Damai di dunia, dan kebahagiaan di surga.

lines.en: Lord of all, to Thee we raise
lines.id: Tuhan segalanya, hanya kepada-Mu kami angkat

lines.en: This our hymn of grate-ful praise.
lines.id: Inilah himne pujian penuh syukur kami.

title_en: The Spacious Firmament on High

lines.en: The spacious firmament on high,
lines.ko: 저 높고 푸른 하늘과 수 없는 빛난 별들을
lines.id: Cakrawala luas di tempat tinggi,

lines.en: With all the blue ethereal sky,
lines.ko: 지으신 이는 창조주 그 솜씨 크고 크셔라
lines.id: Dengan semua langit biru yang sesungguhnya,

lines.en: And spangled heavens, a shining frame,
lines.ko: 날마다 뜨는 저 태양 하나님 크신 권능을
lines.id: Dan langit yang terbentang, bingkai yang bersinar,

lines.en: Their great
lines.ko: 만 백성 모두 보라고 만방에 두루 비치네
lines.id: Pro-klaim besar mereka:
Matahari yang tak lelah, dari hari ke hari,
Apakah kekuatan Penciptanya terlihat,
Dan mempublikasikannya ke semua negeri
Hasil karya tangan yang maha kuasa.

lines.ko: 해지고 황혼 깃들 때 동편에 달이 떠올라
lines.id: Segera setelah nuansa malam mulai menyelimuti,

lines.ko: 밤마다 귀한 소식을 이 땅에 두루 전하네
lines.id: Bulan mengambil kisah menakjubkan,

lines.ko: 행성과 항성 모든 별 저마다 제 길 돌면서
lines.id: Dan setiap malam ke bumi yang mendengarkan

lines.ko: 창조의 기쁜 소식을 온 세상 널리 전하네
lines.id: Mengulangi kembali kisah kelahirannya:
Sementara semua bintang disekelilingnya terbakar,
Dan semua planet pada gilirannya,
Konfirmasikan beritanya saat bergulir,
Dan sebarkan kebenaran dari satu kutub ke kutub lainnya.

lines.ko: 엄숙한 침묵 속에서 뭇 별이 제 길 따르며
lines.id: Bagaimana jika semuanya diam saja

lines.ko: 지구를 싸고 돌 때에 들리는 소리 없어도
lines.id: Bergerak mengitari bola terestrial yang gelap ini

lines.ko: 내 마음 귀가 열리면 그 말씀 밝히 들리네
lines.id: Meskipun tidak ada suara atau suara yang nyata

lines.ko: 우리를 지어내신 이 대 주재 성부 하나님 아멘
lines.id: Di tengah-tengah bola bercahaya dapat ditemukan
Di telinga nalar mereka semua kembali bergembira,
Dan keluarkan suara yang mulia
Bernyanyi selamanya, saat mereka bersinar,
“Tangan yang menciptakan kita adalah tangan ilahi.” Amin.

title_en: Come, Sound His Praise Abroad

lines.en: From Psalm 95
Come, sound his praise abroad,
And hymns of glory sing:
Jehovah is the sovereign God,
The universal King.
He formed the deeps unknown,
lines.ko: 그분은 알려지지 않은 깊은 곳을 만드셨고,

lines.en: He gave the seas their bound;
The wat'ry worlds are all his own,
lines.ko: 물이 가득한 세상은 모두 그 분의 것입니다.

lines.en: And all the solid ground.
Come, worship at his throne;
Come, bow before the Lord:
We are his works, and not our own;
lines.ko: 우리는 그분의 작품이지 우리 자신의 작품이 아닙니다.

lines.en: He formed us by his word.
Today attend his voice,
Nor dare provoke his rod;
Come, like the people of his choice,
And own your gracious God.

title_en: I Sing the Almighty Power of God

lines.en: I sing th'almighty pow'r of God,
That made the mountains rise,
That spread the flowing seas abroad,
And built the lofty skies.
I sing the goodness of the Lord
That filled the earth with food;
He formed the creatures with his word,
And then pronounced them good.
Lord! how thy wonders are displayed
Where'er I turn mine eye!
If I survey the ground I tread,
lines.ko: 내가 밟고 있는 땅을 조사해 보면,

lines.en: Or gaze upon the sky.
There's not a plant or flower below
But makes thy glories known;
And clouds arise, and tempests blow,
By order from thy throne.
Creatures as numerous as they be
Are subject to thy care;
There's not a place where we can flee,
lines.ko: 우리가 도망칠 수 있는 곳은 없어요.

lines.en: But God is present there.

title_en: All Things Bright and Beautiful

lines.en: Each little flower that opens,
Each little bird that sings,
God made their glowing colors,
He made their tiny wings.
Yes, all things bright and beautiful,
All creatures great and small,
And all things wise and wonderful,
The Lord God made them all.
The purple-headed mountain,
The river running by,
The sunset and the morning
That brightens up the sky.
The cold wind in the winter,
The pleasant summer sun,
The ripe fruits in the garden—
He made them ev'ry one.
The tall trees in the greenwood,
The meadows where we play,
The flowers by the water
We gather ev'ry day.
He gave us eyes to see them,
lines.ko: 그분은 우리에게 그들을 볼 수 있는 눈을 주셨고,

lines.en: And lips that we might tell
How great is God Almighty,
Who doeth all things well.

alt_titles: Yes, all things bright and beautiful
All things bright and beautiful

title_en: My Soul, Bless the Lord!

lines.en: From Psalm 104
My soul, bless the Lord! the Lord is most great,
lines.ko: 내 영혼아, 주님을 찬양하라! 주님은 가장 위대하시며,

lines.en: With glory arrayed, majestic his state;
The light is his garment, the skies are his shade,
lines.ko: 빛은 그의 옷이요, 하늘은 그의 그늘이요,

lines.en: And over the waters his courts he has laid.
lines.ko: 그리고 물 위에 그분의 뜰을 마련하셨습니다.

lines.en: He rides on the clouds, the wings of the storm,
lines.ko: 그는 구름을 타고, 폭풍의 날개를 타고,

lines.en: The lightning and wind his mission perform;
The earth he has founded her station to keep,
lines.ko: 그가 지키기 위해 그녀의 기지를 세운 지구,

lines.en: And wrapped as a vesture about her the deep.
lines.ko: 그리고 그녀의 깊은 곳을 옷으로 감쌌습니다.

lines.en: He waters the hills with rain from the skies,
lines.ko: 그분은 하늘에서 내린 비로 언덕에 물을 주시며,

lines.en: And plentiful grass and herbs he supplies,
lines.ko: 그리고 그가 공급하는 풍부한 풀과 약초,

lines.en: Supplying the cattle, and blessing man's toil
With bread in abundance with wine and with oil.
The trees which the Lord has planted are fed,
lines.ko: 여호와께서 심으신 나무들이 먹을 것을 얻나니

lines.en: And over the earth their branches are spread;
lines.ko: 그리고 그 가지들이 땅 위에 펼쳐져 있습니다.

lines.en: They keep in their shelter the birds of the air,
The life of each creature the Lord makes his care.
Thy Spirit, O Lord, makes life to abound,
lines.ko: 여호와여 주의 영이 생명을 풍성하게 하시며

lines.en: The earth is renewed, and fruitful the ground;
To God ascribe glory and wisdom and might,
Let God in his creatures for ever delight.
lines.ko: 하나님께서 그의 피조물을 영원히 기뻐하시게 하십시오.

lines.en: Rejoicing in God, my thought shall be sweet,
lines.ko: 하나님 안에서 기뻐하면 내 생각이 달콤하리라

lines.en: While sinners depart in ruin complete;
My soul, bless Jehovah, his Name be adored,
lines.ko: 내 영혼아 여호와를 송축하라 그 이름이 흠숭을 받으시며

lines.en: Come, praise him, ye people, and worship the Lord.
lines.ko: 너희 백성들아, 와서 그를 찬양하고 여호와께 경배하여라.

title_en: With Songs and Honors Sounding Loud

lines.en: From Psalm 147:7-8, 15-18
With songs and honors sounding loud
Address the Lord on high;
Over the heav'ns he spreads his cloud,
lines.ko: 하늘 위에 그는 그의 구름을 펴시며

lines.en: And waters veil the sky.
He sends his show'rs of blessing down
To cheer the plains below;
He makes the grass the mountains crown,
And corn in valleys grow.
His steady counsels change the face
Of the declining year;
He bids the sun cut short his race,
lines.ko: 그는 태양이 그의 경주를 중단시키도록 명령합니다.

lines.en: And wintry days appear.
His hoary frost, his fleecy snow,
lines.ko: 그의 흰 서리, 그의 부드러운 눈,

lines.en: Descend and clothe the ground;
The liquid streams forbear to flow,
In icy fetters bound.
He sends his word, and melts the snow;
The fields no longer mourn;
He calls the warmer gales to blow,
lines.ko: 그는 더 따뜻한 강풍을 불러 불어넣고,

lines.en: And bids the spring return.
The changing wind, the flying cloud,
Obey his mighty word;
With songs and honors sounding loud
Praise ye the sovereign Lord.

title_en: God Moves in a Mysterious Way

lines.en: God moves in a mysterious way
His wonders to perform;
He plants his footsteps in the sea,
And rides upon the storm.
Deep in unfathomable mines
lines.ko: 헤아릴 수 없는 광산 깊은 곳

lines.en: Of never-failing skill
He treasures up his bright designs,
lines.ko: 그는 자신의 빛나는 디자인을 소중히 간직하고 있습니다.

lines.en: And works his sovereign will.
Ye fearful saints, fresh courage take;
lines.ko: 너희 두려운 성도들이여, 새로운 용기를 가져라.

lines.en: The clouds ye so much dread
Are big with mercy, and shall break
In blessings on your head.
Judge not the Lord by feeble sense,
But trust him for his grace;
Behind a frowning providence
He hides a smiling face.
His purposes will ripen fast,
Unfolding every hour;
The bud may have a bitter taste,
But sweet will be the flow'r.
Blind unbelief is sure to err,
And scan his work in vain.
God is his own interpreter,
And he will make it plain.
lines.ko: 그리고 그는 그것을 분명히 할 것입니다.

title_en: I Belong to Jesus

lines.en: I belong to Jesus;
I am not my own;
All I have and all I am,
lines.ko: 내가 가진 모든 것과 나의 전부,

lines.en: Shall be his alone.
I belong to Jesus;
He is Lord and King,
Reigning in my inmost heart,
lines.ko: 내 마음 속 깊은 곳을 다스리며,

lines.en: Over ev'rything.
I belong to Jesus;
Blessed, blessed thought!
With his own most precious blood
Has my soul been bought.
I belong to Jesus;
He has died for me;
I am his and he is mine,
lines.ko: 나는 그의 것이고 그는 내 것이다.

lines.en: Through eternity.
I belong to Jesus;
He will keep my soul,
When the deathly waters dark
Round about me roll.
I belong to Jesus;
And ere long I'll stand
lines.ko: 그리고 머지않아 나는 서 있을 것이다

lines.en: With my precious Saviour there
In the glory land.

title_en: Showers of Blessing

lines.en: "There shall be showers of blessing,"
lines.ko: 빈 들에 마른 풀같이 시들은 나의 영혼
lines.id: "Akan ada hujan berkah,"

lines.en: This is the promise of love;
lines.id: Inilah janji cinta

lines.en: There shall be seasons refreshing,
lines.id: Akan ada musim yang menyegarkan,

lines.en: Sent from the Saviour above.
lines.ko: 성령의 단비를 부어 새 생명 주옵소서
lines.id: Dikirim dari Sav-iour a-di atas.
Penampil berkah,
Pemberi berkat yang kita butuhkan:
Tetesan belas kasihan di sekitar kita berjatuhan
Tapi untuk para pembawa acara, kami mohon.

lines.en: Showers of blessing,
lines.ko: 반가운 빗소리 들려 산천이 춤을 추네
lines.id: "Akan ada hujan berkah,"

lines.en: Showers of blessing we need:
lines.id: Perolehan kembali yang berharga

lines.en: Mercy drops round us are falling,
lines.id: Di atas perbukitan dan lembah,

lines.en: But for the showers we plead.
lines.ko: 성령의 단비를 부어 새 생명 주옵소서
lines.id: Suara a-bun-tarian hujan.
Penampil berkah,
Pemberi berkat yang kita butuhkan:
Tetesan belas kasihan di sekitar kita berjatuhan
Tapi untuk para pembawa acara, kami mohon.

lines.en: "There shall be showers of blessing,"
lines.ko: 철 따라 우로를 내려 초목이 무성하니
lines.id: "Akan ada hujan berkah,"

lines.en: Precious reviving again;
lines.ko: 갈급한 내 심령 위에 성령을 부으소서
lines.id: Kirimkan mereka, ya Tuhan

lines.en: Over the hills and the valleys,
lines.id: Berikan kepada kami sekarang penyegaran kembali,

lines.en: Sound of abundance of rain.
lines.ko: 성령의 단비를 부어 새 생명 주옵소서
lines.id: Datanglah, dan sekarang hormati Firman-Mu.
Penampil berkah,
Pemberi berkat yang kita butuhkan:
Tetesan belas kasihan di sekitar kita berjatuhan
Tapi untuk para pembawa acara, kami mohon.

lines.en: "There shall be showers of blessing,"
lines.ko: 참 되신 사랑의 언약 어길 수 있사오랴
lines.id: "Akan ada hujan berkah,"

lines.en: Send them upon us, O Lord;
lines.id: Oh, semoga hari ini mereka terjatuh,

lines.en: Grant to us now a refreshing,
lines.id: Sekarang kepada Tuhan kami mengaku,

lines.en: Come, and now honor thy Word.
lines.ko: 성령의 단비를 부어 새 생명 주옵소서 아멘
lines.id: Sekarang seperti Yesus kita berseru!
Penampil berkah,
Pemberi berkat yang kita butuhkan:
Tetesan belas kasihan di sekitar kita berjatuhan
Tapi untuk para pembawa acara, kami mohon. Amin.

lines.en: "There shall be showers of blessing,"
Oh, that today they might fall,
Now as to God we're confessing,
Now as on Jesus we call!

alt_titles: There shall be showers of blessing

title_en: Children of the Heavenly Father

lines.en: [English lyrics not available in the database for this revised hymn]
lines.ko: [이 개정된 찬송가의 데이터베이스에는 영어 가사가 없습니다.]

title_en: O Rejoice in the Lord

lines.en: [English lyrics not available in the database for this revised hymn]
lines.ko: [이 개정된 찬송가의 데이터베이스에는 영어 가사가 없습니다.]

title_en: God, Who Made the Earth

lines.en: God, who made the earth,
The air, the sky, the sea,
Who gave the light its birth,
Careth for me.
God who made the grass,
The flow'r, the fruit, the tree,
The day and night to pass,
Careth for me.
God who made the sun,
The moon, the stars, is he
Who, when life's clouds come on,
Careth for me.
God who made all things,
On earth, in air, in sea,
Who changing seasons brings,
Careth for me.
God who sent his Son
To die on Calvary,
He, if I lean on him,
lines.ko: 그 사람, 내가 그 사람에게 기대면,

lines.en: Will care for me.
When in heav'n's bright land
I all his loved ones see,
lines.ko: 나는 그의 사랑하는 사람들 모두를 본다.

lines.en: I'll sing with that blest band,
lines.ko: 나는 그 축복받은 밴드와 함께 노래할 것이다.

lines.en: God cared for me.

title_en: God Will Take Care of You

lines.en: Be not dismayed whate'er betide,
lines.ko: 너 근심 걱정 말아라 주 너를 지키리
lines.id: Jangan kecewa apa pun yang terjadi,

lines.ko: 주 날개 밑에 거하라 주 너를 지키리

lines.ko: 주 너를 지키리 아무 때나 어디서나

lines.ko: 주 너를 지키리 늘 지켜 주시리

Tuhan akan menjagamu,
Sepanjang hari, O'er sepanjang jalan
Dia akan menjagamu,
Tuhan akan menjagamu (kamu)

lines.en: God will take care of you;
lines.ko: 어려워 낙심 될 때에 주 너를 지키리
lines.id: Melalui hari-hari kerja keras ketika jantung gagal,

lines.ko: 위험한 일을 당할 때 주 너를 지키리

lines.ko: 주 너를 지키리 아무 때나 어디서나

lines.ko: 주 너를 지키리 늘 지켜 주시리
lines.id: Tuhan akan menjagamu.
Tuhan akan menjagamu,
Sepanjang hari, O'er sepanjang jalan
Dia akan menjagamu,
Tuhan akan menjagamu (kamu)

lines.en: Beneath his wings of love abide,
lines.ko: 너 쓸 것 미리 아시고 주 너를 지키리
lines.id: Segala yang kamu perlukan akan Dia sediakan,

lines.ko: 구하는 것을 주시며 주 너를 지키리
lines.id: Tuhan akan menjagamu

lines.ko: 주 너를 지키리 아무 때나 어디서나
lines.id: Percayalah pada-Nya dan Anda akan merasa puas,

lines.ko: 주 너를 지키리 늘 지켜 주시리
lines.id: Tuhan akan menjagamu.
Tuhan akan menjagamu,
Sepanjang hari, O'er sepanjang jalan
Dia akan menjagamu,
Tuhan akan menjagamu (kamu)

lines.en: God will take care of you;
lines.ko: 어려운 시험 당해도 주 너를 지키리
lines.id: Apapun ujiannya,

lines.ko: 구주의 품에 거하라 주 너를 지키리
lines.id: Tuhan akan menjagamu

lines.ko: 주 너를 지키리 아무 때나 어디서나
lines.id: Bersandar, yang letih, di dada-Nya,

lines.ko: 주 너를 지키리 늘 지켜 주시리 아멘
lines.id: Tuhan akan menjagamu.
Tuhan akan menjagamu,
Sepanjang hari, O'er sepanjang jalan
Dia akan menjagamu,
Tuhan akan menjagamu (darimu) A-men.

lines.en: God will take care of you;
Through ev'ry day, o'er all the way;
He will take care of you,
God will take care of you.
Through days of toil when heart doth fail,
God will take care of you;
When dangers fierce your path assail,
God will take care of you.
All you may need he will provide,
God will take care of you;
Trust him and you will be satisfied,
God will take care of you.
No matter what may be the test,
God will take care of you;
Lean, weary one, upon his breast,
God will take care of you.

alt_titles: Be not dismayed whate'er betide

title_en: God Sees the Little Sparrow Fall
title_ko: 하나님은 작은 참새가 떨어지는 것을 보신다 (자체번역)

lines.en: God sees the little sparrow fall,
lines.ko: 하나님은 작은 참새가 떨어지는 것을 보시고,

lines.en: It meets his tender view;
If God so loves the little birds,
I know he loves me too.
lines.ko: 그 사람도 나를 사랑한다는 걸 알아요.

lines.en: He loves me too, he loves me too,
lines.ko: 그 사람도 나를 사랑해, 그 사람도 나를 사랑해

lines.en: I know loves me too,
Because he loves the little things,
lines.ko: 그 사람은 작은 것을 좋아하기 때문에

lines.en: I know loves me too.
He paints the lily of the field,
Perfumes each lily bell;
If he so loves the little flow'rs,
lines.ko: 만약 그가 그토록 작은 꽃을 사랑한다면,

lines.en: I know he loves me well.
lines.ko: 나는 그가 나를 잘 사랑한다는 것을 압니다.

lines.en: God made the little birds and flowers,
And all things large and small;
He'll not forget his little ones,
lines.ko: 그는 그의 어린아이들을 잊지 않을 것이다.

lines.en: I know he loves them all.
lines.ko: 나는 그가 그들 모두를 사랑한다는 것을 압니다.

alt_titles: He loves me too, he loves me too

title_en: Thy Word Have I Hid in My Heart

lines.en: Thy Word is a lamp to my feet,
A light to my path alway,
To guide and to save me from sin,
And show me the heav'nly way.
Thy Word have I hid in my heart
That I might not sin against thee;
lines.ko: 내가 당신께 죄를 짓지 않으려고 합니다.

lines.en: That I might not sin, that I might not sin,
lines.ko: 내가 죄를 짓지 않으려고, 죄를 짓지 않으려고,

lines.en: Thy word have I hid in my heart.
lines.ko: 당신의 말씀을 내 마음 속에 숨겨 두었나이다.

lines.en: Forever, O Lord, is thy Word
Established and fixed on high;
Thy faithfulness unto all men
Abideth for ever nigh.
At morning, at noon, and at night
I ever will give thee praise;
For thou art my portion, O Lord,
And shall be through all my days!
lines.ko: 그리고 나의 모든 날이 지나갈 것이다!

lines.en: Through him whom thy Word hath foretold,
The Saviour and Morning Star,
Salvation and peace have been brought
To those who have strayed afar.

alt_titles: Thy Word is a lamp to my feet

title_en: Holy Bible, Book Divine

lines.en: Holy Bible, book divine,
Precious treasure, thou art mine;
Mine to tell me whence I came;
lines.ko: 내가 어디서 왔는지 알려주는 것이 내 것입니다.

lines.en: Mine to teach me what I am;
Mine to chide me when I rove;
lines.ko: 내가 돌아다닐 때 나를 꾸짖는 나의 것;

lines.en: Mine to show a Saviour's love;
Mine thou art to guide and guard;
Mine to punish or reward;
Mine to comfort in distress,
lines.ko: 고난 중에 위로를 주는 나의 것,

lines.en: Suffering in this wilderness;
Mine to show by living faith,
lines.ko: 나의 것은 산 믿음으로 보여 주고,

lines.en: Man can triumph over death;
Mine to tell of joys to come,
lines.ko: 앞으로 다가올 기쁨에 대해 이야기하고 싶습니다.

lines.en: And the rebel sinner's doom;
O thou holy book divine,
Precious treasure, thou art mine.

title_en: The Heavens Declare Your Glory, Lord

lines.en: The heav'ns declare thy glory, Lord
In every star thy wisdom shines;
But when our eyes behold thy Word,
lines.ko: 그러나 우리 눈이 주의 말씀을 볼 때에는

lines.en: We read thy Name in fairer lines.
lines.ko: 우리는 당신의 이름을 더 공정한 방식으로 읽습니다.

lines.en: The rolling sun, the changing light,
And nights and days, thy pow'r confess
But the blest volume thou hast writ
lines.ko: 그러나 당신이 쓴 가장 축복받은 책은

lines.en: Reveals thy justice and thy grace
Sun, moon, and stars convey thy praise
lines.ko: 해와 달과 별들이 당신의 찬양을 전합니다

lines.en: Round the whole earth, and never stand;
lines.ko: 온 땅을 돌고 결코 서지 마십시오.

lines.en: So when thy truth began its race,
lines.ko: 그러므로 당신의 진실이 경주를 시작했을 때,

lines.en: It touched and glanced on ev'ry land.
Nor shall thy spreading gospel rest
lines.ko: 당신이 전파하는 복음도 쉬지 않을 것입니다.

lines.en: Till through the world thy Truth has run;
Till Christ has all the nations blessed
That see the light, or feel the sun.
Great Sun of Righteousness, arise;
Bless the dark world with heav'nly light:
Thy gospel makes the simple wise,
lines.ko: 당신의 복음은 단순한 사람을 현명하게 만들고,

lines.en: Thy laws are pure, thy judgments right.
lines.ko: 주의 법은 순수하고 주의 판단은 옳으니이다.

lines.en: Thy noblest wonders here we view
lines.ko: 여기서 우리는 당신의 가장 고귀한 경이로움을 봅니다

lines.en: In souls renewed, and sins forgiv'n:
Lord, cleanse my sins, my soul renew,
lines.ko: 주님, 내 죄를 씻어주시고 내 영혼을 새롭게 하소서

lines.en: And make thy Word my guide to heav'n
lines.ko: 그리고 당신의 말씀을 천국으로의 인도자로 삼으소서

title_en: Your Word Is like a Garden, Lord

lines.en: Thy Word is like a garden, Lord,
With flowers bright and fair;
And ev'ry one who seeks may pluck
lines.ko: 그리고 찾는 사람은 누구나 뽑을 수 있습니다

lines.en: A lovely cluster there.
Thy Word is like a deep, deep mine;
lines.ko: 당신의 말씀은 깊고 깊은 광산과 같습니다.

lines.en: And jewels rich are rare
Are hidden in its mighty depths
lines.ko: 그 거대한 깊이 속에 숨겨져 있어요

lines.en: For ev'ry searcher there.
Thy Word is like a starry host:
lines.ko: 당신의 말씀은 별이 빛나는 호스트와 같습니다.

lines.en: A thousand rays of light
Are seen to guide the traveler,
And make his pathway bright.
Thy Word is like an armory,
Where soldiers may repair,
And find, for life's long battle day,
lines.ko: 그리고 인생의 긴 전투의 날을 위해,

lines.en: All needful weapons there.
O may I love thy precious Word,
lines.ko: 오, 당신의 소중한 말씀을 사랑하게 하소서.

lines.en: May I explore the mine,
May I its fragrant flowers glean,
May light upon me shine.
O may I find my armor there,
lines.ko: 오, 거기서 내 갑옷을 찾을 수 있을까요?

lines.en: Thy Word my trusty sword;
I'll learn to fight with ev'ry foe
lines.ko: 나는 모든 적과 싸우는 법을 배울 것이다

lines.en: The battle of the Lord.

title_en: O Word of God Incarnate

lines.en: O Word of God Incarnate,
lines.ko: 참 사람 되신 말씀 하늘의 지혜요
lines.id: Ya Sabda Tuhan yang Menjelma,

lines.en: O Wisdom from on high,
lines.ko: 변하지 않는 진리 온 세상 빛이라
lines.id: Wahai Kebijaksanaan dari tempat tinggi,

lines.en: O Truth unchanged, unchanging,
lines.id: Wahai Kebenaran yang tidak berubah, tidak berubah,

lines.en: O light of our dark sky;
lines.ko: 내 길에 등불 되니 늘 찬송하리라
lines.id: Wahai Cahaya langit kita yang gelap:

lines.en: We praise thee for the radiance
lines.id: Kami memuji Engkau atas pancaran cahayanya

lines.en: That from the hallowed page,
lines.id: Itu dari halaman hal-lowed,

lines.en: A lantern to our footsteps
lines.id: Sebuah lentera di langkah kaki kita,

lines.en: Shines on from age to age.
lines.id: Bersinar dari zaman ke zaman.

lines.en: The church from her dear Master
lines.ko: 주께서 세운 교회 이 말씀 받아서
lines.id: Gereja dariMu Tuannya,

lines.en: Received the gift divine,
lines.ko: 그 귀한 빛을 비춰 온 세상 밝힌다
lines.id: Menerima kembali hadiah ilahi,

lines.en: And still that light she lifteth
lines.id: Dan tetap saja cahaya itu dia angkat

lines.en: O'er all the earth to shine.
lines.id: O'er seluruh bumi bersinar.

lines.en: It is the golden casket,
lines.id: Itu adalah peti mati sa-cred

lines.en: Where gems of truth are stored;
lines.id: Dimana permata kebenaran disimpan

lines.en: It is the heav'n-drawn picture
lines.id: Itu adalah gambaran surga

lines.en: Of Christ, the living Word.
lines.id: DariMu, Firman yang hidup.

lines.en: It floateth like a banner
lines.id: Itu melayang seperti spanduk

lines.en: Before God's host unfurled;
lines.id: Sebelum pasukan Tuhan terbentang,

lines.en: It shineth like a beacon
lines.ko: 이 고해 같은 세상 나 평생 지낼 때
lines.id: Itu bersinar seperti suar

lines.en: Above the darkling world.
lines.ko: 그 말씀 나의 길에 등불이 되도다
lines.id: Di atas dunia yang gelap.

lines.en: It is the chart and compass
lines.id: Itu adalah Bagan dan Kompas

lines.en: That o'er life's surging sea,
lines.id: Itu adalah lautan kehidupan yang bergelombang,

lines.en: 'Mid mists and rocks and quicksands,
lines.id: 'Di tengah kabut, bebatuan, dan pasir hisap,

lines.en: Still guides, O Christ, to thee.
lines.id: Masih membimbing, ya Kristus, kepada-Mu.

lines.en: O make thy church, dear Saviour,
lines.ko: 주님의 몸 된 교회 빛나는 등 되어
lines.id: O, jadikanlah Gereja-Mu, Juruselamat yang terkasih,

lines.en: A lamp of purest gold,
lines.ko: 이 세상 만민 앞에 비추게 하소서
lines.id: Sebuah lampu dari emas paling murni,

lines.en: To bear before the nations
lines.id: Untuk menanggung dihadapan bangsa-bangsa

lines.en: Thy true light, as of old.
lines.ko: 주 얼굴 볼 때까지 잘 가게 하소서 아멘
lines.id: Cahaya sejatimu seperti dulu.

lines.en: O teach thy wand'ring pilgrims
lines.id: Wahai ajarilah para peziarah wan-d'ring-Mu

lines.en: By this their path to trace,
lines.id: Dengan ini jalan mereka untuk dilacak,

lines.en: Till, clouds and darkness ended,
lines.id: Hingga awan dan kegelapan berakhir,

lines.en: They see thee face to face.
lines.id: Mereka melihat-Mu secara langsung. Amin.

title_en: God, in the Gospel of His Son

lines.en: God, in the gospel of his Son,
Makes his eternal counsels known;
Where love in all its glory shines,
And truth is drawn in fairest lines.
lines.ko: 그리고 진실은 가장 공정한 선으로 그려집니다.

lines.en: Here sinners of a humble frame
May taste his grace, and learn his Name;
lines.ko: 그분의 은혜를 맛보고 그분의 이름을 배우게 하소서.

lines.en: May read, in characters of blood,
The wisdom, pow'r, and grace of God.
The pris'ner here may break his chains;
lines.ko: 여기 있는 죄수는 그의 사슬을 끊을 수도 있습니다.

lines.en: The weary rest from all his pains;
lines.ko: 그의 모든 고통으로부터 지친 안식을 누리게 하시고

lines.en: The captive feel his bondage cease;
lines.ko: 포로들은 자신의 속박이 사라진 것을 느낀다.

lines.en: The mourner find the way of peace.
Here faith reveals to mortal eyes
lines.ko: 여기서 믿음은 죽을 수밖에 없는 사람의 눈에 드러납니다.

lines.en: A brighter world beyond the skies;
Here shines the light which guides our way
lines.ko: 여기에 우리의 길을 인도하는 빛이 빛난다

lines.en: From earth to realms of endless day.
O grant us grace, Almighty Lord,
lines.ko: 오, 전능하신 주님, 우리에게 은혜를 베푸소서.

lines.en: To read and mark thy holy Word;
lines.ko: 당신의 거룩한 말씀을 읽고 표시하게 하소서.

lines.en: Its truths with meekness to receive,
And by its holy precepts live.

title_en: Lord, Thy Word Abideth

lines.en: Lord, thy Word abideth
And our footsteps guideth;
Who its truth believeth
Light and joy receiveth.
When our foes are near us,
lines.ko: 우리의 적이 우리 가까이에 있을 때,

lines.en: Then thy Word doth cheer us;
lines.ko: 그러면 당신의 말씀이 우리에게 용기를 줍니다.

lines.en: Word of consolation,
Message of salvation.
When the storms are o'er us,
And dark clouds before us,
lines.ko: 그리고 우리 앞에 검은 구름이 있고,

lines.en: Then its light directeth
And our way protecteth.
Who can tell the pleasure,
lines.ko: 누가 그 기쁨을 말할 수 있겠습니까?

lines.en: Who recount the treasure,
By thy Word imparted
To the simple-hearted?
Word of mercy, giving
Succor to the living;
Word of life, supplying
Comfort to the dying!
O that we, discerning
Its most holy learning,
Lord, may love and fear thee,
Evermore be near thee.

title_en: How Precious Is the Book Divine

lines.en: How precious is the book divine,
By inspiration given,
Bright as a lamp its doctrines shine,
To guide our souls to heav'n.
It sweetly cheers our drooping hearts,
In this dark vale of tears;
Life, light and joy it still imparts
lines.ko: 생명과 빛과 기쁨은 여전히 전해지고 있습니다

lines.en: And quells our rising fears.
This lamp, through all the tedious night
Of life, shall guide our way,
Till we behold the clearer light
Of an eternal day.

title_en: Father of Mercies, in Your Word
title_ko: 당신의 말씀 속에 있는 자비의 아버지 (자체번역)

lines.en: Father of mercies, in thy Word
What endless glory shines;
Forever be thy Name adored
For these celestial lines.
Here may the wretched sons of want
lines.ko: 여기에 빈곤의 비참한 아들들이 있을 수 있습니다

lines.en: Exhaustless riches find
Riches above what earth can grant
lines.ko: 땅이 줄 수 있는 것 이상의 부를

lines.en: And lasting as the mind.
Here the Redeemer's welcome voice
Spreads heav'nly peace around;
And life and everlasting joys
Attend the blissful sound.
O may these heav'nly pages be
My ever dear delight;
And still new beauties may I see,
lines.ko: 그리고 여전히 새로운 아름다움을 볼 수 있을지도 모릅니다.

lines.en: And still increasing light.
Divine Instructor, gracious Lord,
Be thou for ever near;
Teach me to love thy sacred Word,
lines.ko: 당신의 거룩한 말씀을 사랑하도록 가르쳐 주소서.

lines.en: And view my Saviour there.

title_en: The Spirit Breathes upon the Word

lines.en: The Spirit breathes upon the Word,
And brings the truth to sight;
Precepts and promises afford
A sanctifying light.
A glory gilds the sacred page,
Majestic, like the sun:
It gives a light to ev'ry age;
It gives, but borrows none.
lines.ko: 그것은 주기는 하지만 아무것도 빌리지 않습니다.

lines.en: The Hand that gave it still supplies
lines.ko: 그것을 준 손이 아직도 공급하고 있다

lines.en: The gracious light and heat:
His truths upon the nations rise;
They rise, but never set.
Let everlasting thanks be thine
For such a bright display
As makes a world of darkness shine
With beams of heav'nly day.
My soul rejoices to pursue
The steps of him I love.
Till glory break upon my view
In brighter worlds above.

title_en: Break Thou the Bread of Life

lines.en: Break thou the bread of life,
lines.id: Pecahkanlah roti hidup, ya Tuhan, kepadaku,

lines.en: Dear Lord, to me,
lines.id: Seperti Engkau memecah-mecahkan roti Di tepi laut.

lines.en: As thou didst break the loaves
lines.id: Di luar halaman suci aku mencariMu, Tuhan

lines.en: Beside the sea;
lines.id: Semangatku rindu pada-Mu, hai Firman yang hidup!

lines.en: Throughout the sacred page
I seek thee, Lord,
My spirit pants for thee,
O living Word.
Bless thou the truth, dear Lord,
lines.id: Engkaulah roti hidup, ya Tuhan, bagiku,

lines.en: To me, to me,
lines.id: Firman-Mu yang kudus adalah kebenaran yang menyelamatkan aku.

lines.en: As thou didst bless the bread
lines.id: Beri aku makan dan hidup bersamaMu di atas.

lines.en: By Galilee;
lines.id: Ajari aku untuk mencintai kebenaran-Mu, Karena Engkaulah cinta.

lines.en: Then shall all bondage cease,
All fetters fall;
And I shall find my peace,
My All in all.
Thou art the Bread of Life,
lines.id: Terberkatilah kebenarannya, ya Tuhan, Bagiku, bagiku,

lines.en: O Lord, to me,
lines.id: Seperti Engkau memberkati roti Oleh Gal-i-lee.

lines.en: Thy holy Word the truth
lines.id: Maka semua ikatan akan lenyap, Semua belenggu akan runtuh,

lines.en: That saveth me;
lines.id: Dan aku akan menemukan kedamaianku, Segalanya dalam Segalanya.

lines.en: Give me to eat and live
With thee above;
Teach me to love thy truth,
For thou art love.
O send thy Spirit, Lord,
lines.id: O kirimkan Roh-Mu, Tuhan, Sekarang kepadaku,

lines.en: Now unto me,
lines.id: Agar Dia menyentuh mataku dan membuatku melihat:

lines.en: That he may touch mine eyes,
lines.id: Tunjukkan padaku kebenaran yang tersembunyi di dalam Firman-Mu,

lines.en: And make me see:
lines.id: Dan di dalam Kitab-Mu yang diwahyukan kembali aku melihat Tuhan. Amin.

lines.en: Show me the truth concealed
Within thy Word,
And in thy Book revealed
I see the Lord.

title_en: O God of Light, Your Word, a Lamp Unfailing
title_ko: 오 빛의 하나님, 당신의 말씀, 꺼지지 않는 등불이시여 (자체번역)

lines.en: [English lyrics not available in the database for this revised hymn]
lines.ko: [이 개정된 찬송가의 데이터베이스에는 영어 가사가 없습니다.]

title_en: How Shall the Young Direct Their Way?
title_ko: 젊은이들은 자신의 길을 어떻게 지도해야 합니까? (자체번역)

lines.en: How shall the young direct their way?
lines.ko: 젊은이들은 그들의 길을 어떻게 지도할 것인가?

lines.en: What light shall be their perfect guide?
lines.ko: 어떤 빛이 그들의 완벽한 안내자가 될 것인가?

lines.en: Thy Word, O Lord, will safely lead,
lines.ko: 주님, 당신의 말씀이 안전하게 인도하실 것입니다.

lines.en: If in its wisdom they confide.
Sincerely I have sought thee, Lord,
O let me not from thee depart;
lines.ko: 오 나로 하여금 당신에게서 떠나지 않게 하소서.

lines.en: To know thy will and keep from sin
lines.ko: 주의 뜻을 알고 죄에서 떠나게 하소서

lines.en: Thy Word I cherish in my heart.
lines.ko: 당신의 말씀을 내 마음에 소중히 여기나이다.

lines.en: O blessed Lord, teach me thy law,
lines.ko: 오 복되신 주님, 당신의 법을 나에게 가르쳐 주십시오.

lines.en: Thy righteous judgments I declare;
Thy testimonies make me glad,
For they are wealth beyond compare.
lines.ko: 왜냐하면 그들은 비교할 수 없는 부이기 때문입니다.

lines.en: Upon thy precepts and thy ways
My heart will meditate with awe;
Thy Word shall be my chief delight,
lines.ko: 당신의 말씀은 나의 최고의 기쁨이 될 것입니다.

lines.en: And I will not forget thy law.
lines.ko: 그리고 나는 당신의 법을 잊지 않을 것입니다.

title_en: Teach Me, O Lord, Your Way of Truth
title_ko: 여호와여, 주의 진리의 길을 내게 가르치소서 (자체번역)

lines.en: From Psalm 119:33-40
Teach me, O Lord, thy way of truth,
lines.ko: 여호와여 주의 진리의 길을 내게 가르치소서

lines.en: And from it I will not depart;
lines.ko: 그리고 나는 거기서 떠나지 않을 것이다.

lines.en: That I may steadfastly obey,
Give me an understanding heart.
In thy commandments make me walk,
For in thy law my joy shall be;
Give me a heart that loves thy will,
lines.ko: 당신의 뜻을 사랑하는 마음을 제게 주소서.

lines.en: From discontent and envy free.
Turn thou mine eyes from vanity,
And cause me in thy ways to tread;
O let thy servant prove thy Word
lines.ko: 오 당신의 종으로 당신의 말씀을 증명하게 하소서

lines.en: And thus to godly fear be led.
Turn thou away reproach and fear;
Thy righteous judgments I confess;
To know thy precepts I desire;
Revive me in thy righteousness.

title_en: The Law of God is Good and Wise

lines.en: The law of God is good and wise
And sets his will before our eyes,
Shows us the way of righteousness,
And dooms to death when we transgress.
lines.ko: 그리고 우리가 범법하면 죽음에 이르게 됩니다.

lines.en: Its light of holiness imparts
The knowledge of our sinful hearts
That we may see our lost estate
lines.ko: 우리의 잃어버린 재산을 볼 수 있도록

lines.en: And seek deliv'rance ere too late.
lines.ko: 그리고 너무 늦기 전에 구원을 구하라.

lines.en: To those who help in Christ have found
And would in works of love abound
It shows what deeds are his delight
And should be done as good and right.
lines.ko: 그리고 선하고 옳은 일을 해야 합니다.

lines.en: When men the offered help disdain
And wilfully in sin remain,
Its terror in their ear resounds
And keeps their wickedness in bounds.
The law is good; but since the fall
Its holiness condemns us all;
It dooms us for our sin to die
lines.ko: 우리의 죄가 죽는 것은 우리를 정죄하는 것입니다

lines.en: And has no pow'r to justify.
To Jesus we for refuge flee,
Who from the curse has set us free,
And humbly worship at his throne,
Saved by his grace through faith alone.
lines.ko: 오직 믿음을 통해 그분의 은혜로 구원을 받았습니다.

title_en: Jehovah’s Perfect Law

lines.en: [English lyrics not available in the database for this revised hymn]
lines.ko: [이 개정된 찬송가의 데이터베이스에는 영어 가사가 없습니다.]

title_en: The Law of the Lord is Perfect

lines.en: [English lyrics not available in the database for this revised hymn]
lines.ko: [이 개정된 찬송가의 데이터베이스에는 영어 가사가 없습니다.]

title_en: Most Perfect Is the Law of God

lines.en: From Psalm 19:7-11 and Psalm 119:97
Most perfect is the law of God,
Restoring those that stray;
His testimony is most sure,
Proclaiming wisdom's way.
O how love I thy law! O how love I thy law!
lines.ko: 오 내가 당신의 법을 얼마나 사랑하는지요! 오 내가 당신의 법을 얼마나 사랑하는지요!

lines.en: It is my meditation all the day.
O how love I thy law! O how love I thy law!
lines.ko: 오 내가 당신의 법을 얼마나 사랑하는지요! 오 내가 당신의 법을 얼마나 사랑하는지요!

lines.en: It is my meditation all the day.
The precepts of the Lord are right;
With joy they fill the heart;
The Lord's commandments all are pure,
And clearest light impart.
The fear of God is undefiled
And ever shall endure;
The statutes of the Lord are truth
And righteousness most pure.
They warn from ways of wickedness
Displeasing to the Lord,
And in the keeping of his Word
There is a great reward.

alt_titles: O how love I thy law!

title_en: Thou Art the Way

lines.en: [English lyrics not available in the database for this revised hymn]
lines.ko: [이 개정된 찬송가의 데이터베이스에는 영어 가사가 없습니다.]

title_en: O Love, How Deep, How Broad, How High!
title_ko: 오 사랑이여, 얼마나 깊고, 얼마나 넓고, 얼마나 높습니까! (자체번역)

lines.en: O, love, how deep, how broad, how high,
lines.ko: 오, 사랑이여, 얼마나 깊고, 얼마나 넓고, 얼마나 높습니까?

lines.en: How passing thought and fantasy,
That God, the Son of God, should take
lines.ko: 하나님의 아들이신 하나님이 취하셔야 할 것은

lines.en: Our mortal form for mortals' sake!
For us baptized, for us he bore
lines.ko: 우리를 위해 세례를 받았고, 그분은 우리를 위해 낳으셨습니다.

lines.en: His holy fast, and hungered sore,
For us temptations sharp he knew,
lines.ko: 그분은 우리에게 날카로운 유혹이 있음을 아셨습니다.

lines.en: For us the tempter overthrew.
For us to wicked men betrayed,
Scourged, mocked, in crown of thorns arrayed;
lines.ko: 채찍질을 당하고 조롱을 당하고 가시관을 썼으며

lines.en: For us he bore the cross's death,
For us at length gave up his breath.
For us he rose from death again,
lines.ko: 우리를 위하여 그는 죽음에서 다시 살아나셨고

lines.en: For us he went on high to reign,
lines.ko: 그분은 우리를 위해 높이 올라가 통치하셨습니다.

lines.en: For us he sent his Spirit here
lines.ko: 우리를 위해 그분의 성령을 여기에 보내셨습니다.

lines.en: To guide, to strengthen and to cheer.
All honor, laud, and glory be,
O Jesus, virgin-born, to thee;
Whom with the Father we adore,
lines.ko: 우리가 아버지와 함께 그분을 흠숭하는 분,

lines.en: And Holy Ghost, for evermore.

title_en: O Lord, How Shall I Meet You
title_ko: 오 주님, 제가 당신을 어떻게 만나겠습니까? (자체번역)

lines.en: O Lord, how shall I meet thee,
lines.ko: 오 주님, 내가 어떻게 당신을 만나겠습니까?

lines.en: How welcome thee aright?
Thy people long to greet thee,
lines.ko: 당신의 백성이 당신에게 인사하기를 갈망하고 있습니다.

lines.en: My hope, my heart's delight!
O, kindle, Lord, most holy,
lines.ko: 오, 빛을 발하소서, 주님, 지극히 거룩하신 분이시여,

lines.en: Thy lamp within my breast
To do in spirit lowly
All that may please thee best.
lines.ko: 그 모든 것이 당신을 가장 기쁘게 할 것입니다.

lines.en: Love caused thine incarnation,
Love brought thee down to me;
Thy thirst for my salvation
Procured my liberty.
O love beyond all telling,
That led thee to embrace,
In love all love excelling,
Our lost and fallen race!
Rejoice, then, ye sad-hearted,
Who sit in deepest gloom,
lines.ko: 가장 깊은 어둠 속에 앉아 있는 사람,

lines.en: Who mourn o'er joys departed
And tremble at your doom.
Despair not, he is near you,
lines.ko: 절망하지 마십시오. 그분은 당신 가까이에 계십니다.

lines.en: Yea, standing at the door,
Who best can help and cheer you
lines.ko: 당신을 가장 잘 돕고 응원해줄 수 있는 사람

lines.en: And bids you weep no more.
lines.ko: 그리고 더 이상 울지 말라고 하십니다.

lines.en: Sin's debt, that fearful burden,
Let not your soul distress;
Your guilt the Lord will pardon
And cover by his grace.
He comes, for men procuring
The peace of sin forgiv'n,
For all God's sons securing
Their heritage in heav'n.

title_en: None Other Lamb, None Other Name
title_ko: 없음 다른 양고기, 없음 다른 이름 (자체번역)

lines.en: None other Lamb, none other Name,
lines.ko: 다른 어린양도 없고 다른 이름도 없고

lines.en: None other Hope in heav'n or earth or sea,
lines.ko: 하늘이나 땅이나 바다에는 다른 희망이 없습니다.

lines.en: None other Hiding place from guilt and shame,
lines.ko: 죄책감과 수치심으로부터 숨을 곳은 다른 곳이 없습니다.

lines.en: None beside thee!
My faith burns low, my hope burns low;
lines.ko: 나의 믿음은 타오르고, 나의 희망은 타오르고 있습니다.

lines.en: Only my heart's desire cries out in me
lines.ko: 오직 내 마음의 갈망만이 내 안에서 부르짖는다

lines.en: By the deep thunder of its want and woe,
Cries out to thee.
Lord, thou art Life, though I be dead;
Love's fire thou art, however cold I be:
lines.ko: 당신은 사랑의 불입니다. 내가 아무리 차갑더라도:

lines.en: Nor heav'n have I, nor place to lay my head,
lines.ko: 나에게는 하늘도 없고 머리 둘 곳도 없으니

lines.en: Nor home, but thee.

title_en: None Other Lamb, None Other Name
title_ko: 없음 다른 양고기, 없음 다른 이름 (자체번역)

lines.en: None other Lamb, none other Name,
lines.ko: 다른 어린양도 없고 다른 이름도 없고

lines.en: None other Hope in heav'n or earth or sea,
lines.ko: 하늘이나 땅이나 바다에는 다른 희망이 없습니다.

lines.en: None other Hiding place from guilt and shame,
lines.ko: 죄책감과 수치심으로부터 숨을 곳은 다른 곳이 없습니다.

lines.en: None beside thee!
My faith burns low, my hope burns low;
lines.ko: 나의 믿음은 타오르고, 나의 희망은 타오르고 있습니다.

lines.en: Only my heart's desire cries out in me
lines.ko: 오직 내 마음의 갈망만이 내 안에서 부르짖는다

lines.en: By the deep thunder of its want and woe,
Cries out to thee.
Lord, thou art Life, though I be dead;
Love's fire thou art, however cold I be:
lines.ko: 당신은 사랑의 불입니다. 내가 아무리 차갑더라도:

lines.en: Nor heav'n have I, nor place to lay my head,
lines.ko: 나에게는 하늘도 없고 머리 둘 곳도 없으니

lines.en: Nor home, but thee.

title_en: O Savior, Precious Savior

lines.en: O Saviour, precious Saviour,
Whom yet unseen we love,
lines.ko: 아직 보이지 않는 사람을 우리는 사랑합니다.

lines.en: O Name of might and favor,
All other names above;
We worship thee, we bless thee,
To thee alone we sing;
We praise thee, and confess thee
Our holy Lord and King.
O Bringer of salvation,
Who wondrously hast wrought,
Thyself the revelation
Of love beyond our thought;
We worship thee, we bless thee,
To thee alone we sing;
We praise thee, and confess thee
Our gracious Lord and King.
In thee all fulness dwelleth,
All grace and power divine:
The glory that excelleth,
O Son of God, is thine;
We worship thee, we bless thee,
To thee alone we sing;
We praise thee, and confess thee
Our glorious Lord and King.
O grant the consummation
Of this our song above
In endless adoration,
And everlasting love;
Then shall we praise and bless thee
Where perfect praises ring,
And evermore confess thee
Our Saviour and our King.

title_en: Shepherd of Tender Youth

lines.en: Shepherd of tender youth,
Guiding in love and truth
Through devious ways:
Christ, our triumphant King,
We come thy name to sing;
lines.ko: 우리는 당신의 이름을 노래하기 위해 왔습니다.

lines.en: Hither our children bring,
To shout thy praise.
Thou art our holy Lord,
The all-subduing Word,
Healer of strife:
Thou didst thyself abase,
That from sin's deep disgrace
Thou mightest save our race,
lines.ko: 당신은 우리 종족을 구원하실 수 있습니다.

lines.en: And give us life.
Thou art the Great High Priest,
Thou hast prepared the feast
Of heavenly love:
While in our mortal pain,
None calls on thee in vain:
Help thou dost not disdain,
Help from above.
Ever be thou our Guide,
Our Shepherd and our Pride,
Our Staff and Song:
Jesus, thou Christ of God,
By thy perennial Word,
Lead us where thou hast trod;
lines.ko: 당신이 밟으신 곳으로 우리를 인도해 주소서.

lines.en: Make our faith strong.
So now and till we die,
Sound we thy praises high,
And joyful sing:
Infants, and the glad throng
Who to thy church belong,
Unite to swell the song
To Christ our King.

title_en: O Christ, Our Hope, Our Heart’s Desire
title_ko: 오 그리스도, 우리의 희망이요, 우리 마음의 소망이시요 (자체번역)

lines.en: O Christ, our hope, our heart's desire,
lines.ko: 오 그리스도, 우리의 희망이요, 우리 마음의 소망이시며,

lines.en: Redemption's only spring!
Creator of the world art thou,
Its Saviour and its King.
How vast the mercy and the love
Which laid our sins on thee,
And led thee to a cruel death,
To set thy people free.
But now the bands of death are burst,
The ransom has been paid;
And thou art on thy Father's throne,
lines.ko: 그리고 너는 네 아버지의 보좌에 있으니,

lines.en: In glorious robes arrayed.
O Christ, be thou our lasting joy,
lines.ko: 오 그리스도여, 우리의 영원한 기쁨이 되소서.

lines.en: Our ever great reward!
Our only glory may it be
lines.ko: 우리의 유일한 영광이 될 수 있습니다

lines.en: To glory in the Lord.

title_en: Of the Father’s Love Begotten

lines.en: Of the Father's love begotten
lines.id: Dunia diciptakan oleh firman Tuhan

lines.en: Ere the worlds began to be,
lines.id: Dialah Alfa dan Omega, Yang Awal dan Yang Akhir.

lines.en: He is Alpha and Omega,
lines.ko: 지난 날과 장래 일을 모두 주관 하시네
lines.id: Anda mengendalikan segala sesuatu di masa lalu dan masa depan.

lines.en: He the source, the ending he,
lines.id: selamanya selamanya selamanya

lines.en: Of the things that are, that have been,
And that future years shall see.
This is he whom heav'n-taught singers
lines.id: Seluruh surga memuji, bahkan para malaikat pun memuji.

lines.en: Sang of old with one accord,
lines.ko: 만국 백성 경배하네 우리의 왕 하나님께
lines.id: Orang-orang dari segala bangsa menyembah Tuhan, Raja kita.

lines.en: Whom the Scriptures of the prophets
lines.ko: 모든 입술 열어 찬양 목소리를 합하여
lines.id: Bukalah seluruh bibirmu dan satukan suaramu dalam pujian

lines.en: Promised in their faithful word;
lines.id: selamanya selamanya selamanya

lines.en: Now he shines, the long-expected;
Let creation praise its Lord.
O ye heights of heav'n, adore him;
lines.ko: 성부 성자 성령 주님 삼위 일체 하나님께
lines.id: Kepada Allah Tritunggal, Bapa, Putra dan Roh Kudus

lines.en: Angel hosts, his praises sing;
lines.id: Saya akan menyanyikan pujian terima kasih dan terus-menerus memuji Anda.

lines.en: All dominions, bow before him,
lines.ko: 존귀 영광 주의 권세 영원하신 승리를
lines.id: Kehormatan, kemuliaan, kekuasaan, kemenangan abadi

lines.en: And extol our God and King;
lines.id: Selamanya dan selamanya Amin

lines.en: Let no tongue on earth be silent,
Ev'ry voice in concert ring.
Thee let age and thee let manhood,
Thee let boys in chorus sing;
Matrons, virgins, little maidens,
With glad voices answering;
Let their guileless songs reecho,
And their heart its music bring.
Christ, to thee, with God the Father,
