And, O Holy Ghost, to thee,
Hymn, and chant, and high thanksgiving,
And unwearied praises be,
Honor, glory, and dominion,
And eternal victory.

title_en: At the Name of Jesus

lines.en: [English lyrics not available in the database for this revised hymn]
lines.ko: [이 개정된 찬송가의 데이터베이스에는 영어 가사가 없습니다.]

title_en: O for a Thousand Tongues to Sing

lines.en: O for a thousand tongues to sing
lines.ko: 만 입이 내게 있으면 그 입 다 가지고
lines.id: Oh, ada seribu bahasa yang bisa bernyanyi

lines.ko: 내 구주 주신 은총을 늘 찬송 하겠네
lines.id: Pujian saya yang luar biasa,
Kemuliaan Tuhan dan Rajaku,
Kemenangan kasih karunia-Nya.

lines.en: My great Redeemer's praise,
lines.id: Tuanku yang pemurah dan Tuhanku,

lines.ko: 그 크신 영광 널리 펴 다 알게 하소서
lines.id: Membantu saya untuk menyatakan,
Untuk menyebar ke seluruh bumi secara luas,
Kehormatan Nama-Mu.

lines.en: The glories of my God and King,
lines.ko: 내 주의 귀한 이름이 날 위로 하시고
lines.id: Ya Tuhan! Nama yang memikat ketakutan kita,

lines.ko: 이 귀에 음악 같으니 참 희락 되도다
lines.id: Itu membuat kesedihan kita berhenti
Ini musik di telinga orang berdosa,
Inilah kehidupan, kesehatan, dan kedamaian.

lines.en: The triumphs of his grace.
lines.ko: 내 죄의 권세 깨뜨려 그 결박 푸시고
lines.id: Dia mematahkan kuasa dosa yang dibatalkan,

lines.ko: 이 추한 맘을 피로써 곧 정케 하셨네 아멘
lines.id: Dia membebaskan tahanan itu
Darahnya mampu membuat hal yang paling kotor menjadi bersih
Darahnya tersedia untukku. Amin.

lines.en: My gracious Master and my God,
Assist me to proclaim,
To spread through all the earth abroad,
The honors of thy Name.
Jesus, the Name that charms our fears,
That bids our sorrows cease;
'Tis music in the sinner's ears,
'Tis life, and health, and peace.
He breaks the power of reigning sin,
He sets the pris'ner free;
His blood can make the foulest clean,
His blood availed for me.
He speaks and, listening to his voice,
New life the dead receive;
The mournful, broken hearts rejoice;
The humble poor believe.
Hear him, ye deaf; his praise, ye dumb,
Your loosened tongues employ;
Ye blind, behold your Savior come;
And leap, ye lame, for joy.

title_en: Ye Servants of God, Your Master Proclaim

lines.en: Ye servants of God, your Master proclaim,
lines.id: Hai hamba-hamba Tuhan, Tuanmu menyatakan,

lines.en: And publish abroad his wonderful Name;
lines.id: Dan publikasikan secara luas nama-Nya yang menakjubkan

lines.en: The Name, all victorious, of Jesus extol;
lines.id: Nama semua kemenangan Yesus ex-tol

lines.en: His kingdom is glorious, and rules over all.
lines.id: Kerajaan-Nya mulia, Dia memerintah atas segalanya.

lines.en: God ruleth on high, almighty to save;
lines.id: Tuhan berkuasa di tempat tinggi, mahakuasa untuk menyelamatkan

lines.en: And still he is nighhis presence we have:
lines.id: Dan Dia tetap berada dekat dengan kehadiran-Nya yang kita miliki

lines.en: The great congregation his triumph shall sing,
lines.ko: 그 보좌 앞에서 큰 무리 모여
lines.id: Jemaat besar kemenangannya akan bernyanyi,

lines.en: Ascribing salvation to Jesus, our King.
lines.id: Memberikan keselamatan kepada Yesus, Raja kita.

lines.en: Salvation to God who sits on the throne!
lines.id: "Keselamatan bagi Tuhan yang duduk di atas takhta,"

lines.en: Let all cry aloud and honor the Son:
lines.id: Biarlah semua menangis sekeras-kerasnya, dan hormatilah Putranya

lines.en: The praises of Jesus the angels proclaim,
lines.ko: 저 천군 천사들 그 보좌 앞에
lines.id: Pujian dari Yesus, sang malaikat, menyatakan,

lines.en: Fall down on their faces and worship the Lamb.
lines.id: Tersungkurlah tersungkur, dan sembahlah Anak Domba.

lines.en: Then let us adore, and give him his right,
lines.id: Maka marilah kita memujanya, dan memberikan kepada-Nya hak-Nya,

lines.en: All glory and power, and wisdom and might,
lines.id: Segala kemuliaan dan kekuasaan, segala kebijaksanaan dan keperkasaan

lines.en: All honor and blessing, with angels above,
lines.id: Segala kehormatan dan berkah, dengan sudut di atas,

lines.en: And thanks never ceasing for infinite love.
lines.ko: 그 영원한 사랑 다 감사하세 아멘
lines.id: Dan terima kasih yang tak henti-hentinya, atas cinta yang tak terhingga, A-men.

title_en: Wondrous King, All-Glorious

lines.en: Wondrous King, all glorious,
Sovereign Lord victorious,
O, receive our praise with favor!
From thee welled God's kindness
Though we in our blindness
Strayed from thee, our blessed Saviour.
Strengthen thou,
Help us now;
Let our tongues be singing,
Thee our praises bringing.
Heavens, spread the story
Of our Maker's glory,
All the pomp of earth obscuring.
Sun, thy rays be sending,
Thy bright beams expending,
Light to all the earth assuring.
lines.ko: 온 땅에 빛이 있음을 확신하게 하소서.

lines.en: Moon and star,
Praise afar
Him who glorious made you;
The vast heavens aid you.
O my soul, rejoicing,
Sing, thy praises voicing,
Sing, with hymns of faith adore him!
All who here have being,
Shout, your voices freeing,
Bow down in the dust before him.
lines.ko: 그 앞에 먼지 속에 몸을 굽히십시오.

lines.en: He is God
Sabaoth;
Praise alone the Saviour,
Here and there for ever.
Hallelujahs render
To the Lord most tender,
Ye who know and love the Saviour.
Hallelujahs sing ye,
Ye redeemed, O, bring ye
Hearts that yield him glad behavior.
lines.ko: 그에게 기쁜 행동을 하게 만드는 마음.

lines.en: Blest are ye
Endlessly;
Sinless there for ever,
Ye shall laud him ever.

title_en: When Morning Gilds the Skies

lines.en: When morning gilds the skies,
My heart awaking cries
May Jesus Christ be praised:
Alike at work and prayer
To Jesus I repair;
May Jesus Christ be praised.
When sleep her balm denies,
My silent spirit sighs,
lines.ko: 나의 고요한 영혼이 한숨을 쉬고 있다.

lines.en: May Jesus Christ be praised:
When evil thoughts molest,
With this I shield my breast,
May Jesus Christ be praised.
Does sadness fill my mind?
A solace here I find,
May Jesus Christ be praised:
Or fades my earthly bliss?
My comfort still is this,
May Jesus Christ be praised.
In heav'n's eternal bliss
The loveliest strain is this,
May Jesus Christ be praised:
The powers of darkness fear,
When this sweet chant they hear,
May Jesus Christ be praised.
Let earth's wide circle round
In joyful notes resound,
May Jesus Christ be praised:
Let air and sea and sky,
From depth to height, reply,
May Jesus Christ be praised.
Be this, while life is mine,
lines.ko: 이것이 되십시오, 인생이 나의 것인 동안,

lines.en: My canticle divine,
May Jesus Christ be praised:
Be this th'eternal song,
Through all the ages on,
May Jesus Christ be praised.

title_en: I Greet Thee, Who My Sure Redeemer Art

lines.en: I greet thee, who my sure Redeemer art,
lines.id: Saya bersujud kepada Tuhan yang telah menebus saya

lines.en: My only trust and Saviour of my heart,
lines.id: Saya memuji Anda atas rahmat Anda yang luar biasa

lines.en: Who pain didst undergo for my poor sake;
lines.id: Kasihanilah kelemahanku

lines.en: I pray thee from our hearts all cares to take.
lines.id: Tolong jaga kekhawatiran dan kekhawatiran saya.

lines.en: Thou art the King of mercy and of grace,
lines.id: Tuhan penuh rahmat dan rahmat

lines.en: Reigning omnipotent in every place:
lines.id: Anda memerintah kami dengan kebenaran

lines.en: So come, O King, and our whole being sway;
lines.id: Saat pikiran kita mengembara

lines.en: Shine on us with the light of thy pure day.
lines.id: Tolong bimbing saya dan tunjukkan jalan yang harus saya tempuh.

lines.en: Thou art the life, by which alone we live,
lines.id: Tuhan adalah hidup kita

lines.en: And all our substance and our strength receive;
lines.id: Anda adalah kebenaran dan jalannya.

lines.en: O comfort us in death's approaching hour,
lines.id: Tolong selalu beri aku keyakinan dan harapan

lines.en: Strong-hearted then to face it by thy pow'r.
lines.id: Biarkan saya melayani dan melayani

lines.en: Thou hast the true and perfect gentleness,
lines.id: Kasih Tuhan tidak ada batasnya

lines.en: No harshness hast thou and no bitterness:
lines.ko: 나 같은 죄인 주 안에 살고
lines.id: Hiduplah di dalam Tuhan, orang berdosa seperti saya

lines.en: Make us to taste the sweet grace found in thee
lines.id: Tuhan, kamu selalu ada di dalam diriku

lines.en: And ever stay in thy sweet unity.
lines.id: Dosa tidak dapat menuntutku

lines.en: Our hope is in no other save in thee;
lines.id: sampai kita diselamatkan

lines.en: Our faith is built upon thy promise free;
lines.id: Berdiri teguh dalam iman Anda

lines.en: O grant to us such stronger hope and sure
lines.id: Penuhi aku dengan rahmat dan kebenaran

lines.en: That we can boldly conquer and endure.
lines.id: Tuhan, jadilah kehendak-Mu, Amin

title_id: Aku Menyapa Engkau, Siapa Seni Penebusku yang Pasti

title_en: My Heart Does Overflow

lines.en: [English lyrics not available in the database for this revised hymn]
lines.ko: [이 개정된 찬송가의 데이터베이스에는 영어 가사가 없습니다.]

title_en: Fairest Lord Jesus

lines.ko: 만유의 주재 존귀하신 예수 사람이 되신 하나님
lines.en: Fairest Lord Jesus, Ruler of all nature,
lines.id: Tuhan Yesus yang paling adil, Penguasa seluruh alam,

lines.ko: 나 사모하여 영원히 섬길 내 영광 되신 주로다
lines.en: O Thou of God and man the Son
lines.id: Wahai Engkau Tuhan dan manusia Putra

lines.en: Thee will I honor,
lines.id: Engkau akan kuhormati,

lines.en: Thou, my soul's glory, joy, and crown.
lines.id: Engkaulah kemuliaan, kegembiraan dan mahkota jiwaku.

lines.ko: 화려한 동산 무성한 저 수목 다 아름답고 묘하나
lines.en: Fair are the meadows, Fairer still the wood lands,
lines.id: Padang rumputnya indah, Hutannya masih lebih indah,

lines.ko: 순전한 예수 더 아름다워 봄 같은 기쁨 주시네
lines.en: Robed in the blooming garb of spring
lines.id: Mengenakan pakaian musim semi yang mekar

lines.en: Jesus is fairer, Jesus is purer,
lines.id: Yesus lebih adil, Yesus lebih murni,

lines.en: Who makes the woeful heart to sing.
lines.id: Yang membuat hati sedih bernyanyi.

lines.ko: 광명한 해와 명랑한 저 달빛 수 많은 별들 빛나나
lines.en: Fair is the sunshine, Fairer still the moon light,
lines.id: Cerahnya sinar matahari, Lebih cerah lagi cahaya bulan,

lines.ko: 주 예수 빛은 더 찬란하여 참 비교 할 수 없도다 아멘
lines.en: And all the twinkling, stary host
lines.id: Dan semua tuan rumah yang berkelap-kelip dan menatap

lines.en: Jesus shines brighter, Jesus shines purer,
lines.id: Yesus bersinar lebih terang, Yesus bersinar lebih murni,

lines.en: Than all the angels heaven can boast. A-men.
lines.id: Dari semua malaikat yang bisa dibanggakan surga. Amin.

title_en: Fairest Lord Jesus

lines.ko: 만유의 주재 존귀하신 예수 사람이 되신 하나님
lines.en: Fairest Lord Jesus, Ruler of all nature,
lines.id: Tuhan Yesus yang paling adil, Penguasa seluruh alam,

lines.ko: 나 사모하여 영원히 섬길 내 영광 되신 주로다
lines.en: O Thou of God and man the Son
lines.id: Wahai Engkau Tuhan dan manusia Putra

lines.en: Thee will I honor,
lines.id: Engkau akan kuhormati,

lines.en: Thou, my soul's glory, joy, and crown.
lines.id: Engkaulah kemuliaan, kegembiraan dan mahkota jiwaku.

lines.ko: 화려한 동산 무성한 저 수목 다 아름답고 묘하나
lines.en: Fair are the meadows, Fairer still the wood lands,
lines.id: Padang rumputnya indah, Hutannya masih lebih indah,

lines.ko: 순전한 예수 더 아름다워 봄 같은 기쁨 주시네
lines.en: Robed in the blooming garb of spring
lines.id: Mengenakan pakaian musim semi yang mekar

lines.en: Jesus is fairer, Jesus is purer,
lines.id: Yesus lebih adil, Yesus lebih murni,

lines.en: Who makes the woeful heart to sing.
lines.id: Yang membuat hati sedih bernyanyi.

lines.ko: 광명한 해와 명랑한 저 달빛 수 많은 별들 빛나나
lines.en: Fair is the sunshine, Fairer still the moon light,
lines.id: Cerahnya sinar matahari, Lebih cerah lagi cahaya bulan,

lines.ko: 주 예수 빛은 더 찬란하여 참 비교 할 수 없도다 아멘
lines.en: And all the twinkling, stary host
lines.id: Dan semua tuan rumah yang berkelap-kelip dan menatap

lines.en: Jesus shines brighter, Jesus shines purer,
lines.id: Yesus bersinar lebih terang, Yesus bersinar lebih murni,

lines.en: Than all the angels heaven can boast. A-men.
lines.id: Dari semua malaikat yang bisa dibanggakan surga. Amin.

title_en: Let Us Love and Sing and Wonder

lines.en: Let us love, and sing, and wonder,
Let us praise the Saviour's name!
He has hushed the law's loud thunder,
He has quenched Mount Sinai's flame;
He has washed us with his blood,
He has brought us nigh to God.
Let us love the Lord who bought us,
Pitied us when enemies,
lines.ko: 적들이 있을 때 우리를 불쌍히 여기셨고,

lines.en: Called us by his grace, and taught us,
lines.ko: 그의 은혜로 우리를 부르사 우리를 가르치셨으니

lines.en: Gave us ears and gave us eyes:
He has washed us with his blood,
He presents our souls to God.
Let us sing, though fierce temptation
Threaten hard to bear us down!
For the Lord, our strong salvation,
Holds in view the conqueror's crown,
He who washed us with his blood,
Soon will bring us home to God.
lines.ko: 곧 우리를 하나님의 집으로 데려갈 것입니다.

lines.en: Let us wonder; grace and justice
Join, and point to mercy's store;
When through grace in Christ our trust is,
lines.ko: 그리스도 안에 있는 은혜로 말미암아 우리의 신뢰가

lines.en: Justice smiles, and asks no more:
lines.ko: 정의는 웃으며 더 이상 묻지 않습니다.

lines.en: He who washed us with his blood,
Has secured our way to God.
Let us praise, and join the chorus
Of the saints enthroned on high;
lines.ko: 높은 곳에 보좌에 앉은 성도들에 대하여

lines.en: Here they trusted him before us,
lines.ko: 여기서 그들은 우리보다 먼저 그를 믿었습니다.

lines.en: Now their praises fill the sky:
lines.ko: 이제 그들의 찬양이 하늘을 가득 채웁니다.

lines.en: "Thou hast washed us with thy blood;
Thou art worthy, Lamb of God!"

title_en: Praise Him! Praise Him!

lines.en: Praise Him! praise Him! Je-sus, our bless-ed Re-deem-er!
lines.id: Pujilah Dia! pujilah Dia! Ya Tuhan, Re-deem-er kami yang terberkati!

lines.en: Sing, O Earth, His won-der-ful love pro-claim!
lines.id: Bernyanyilah, hai Bumi, nyatakan kasih-Nya yang luar biasa!

lines.en: Hail Him! hail Him! high-est arch-an-gel sin glo-ry
lines.id: Salam Dia! puji Dia! malaikat agung dosa tertinggi

lines.en: Strength and hon-or give to ho-ly name!
lines.id: Kekuatan dan kehormatan-atau berikan kepada nama suci!

lines.en: Like a shep-herd, Je-sus will guard His chil-dren
lines.id: Seperti seorang penggembala, Yesus akan menjaga anak-anak-Nya

lines.en: In His arms He car-ries them all day long.
lines.id: Dalam pelukan-Nya Dia menggendong mereka sepanjang hari.

lines.en: Praise Him! praise Him! tell of His ex-cel-lent great-ness.
lines.id: Pujilah Dia! pujilah Dia! menceritakan kehebatan-Nya yang luar biasa.

lines.en: Praise Him! praise Him! ev-er in joy-ful song!
lines.id: Pujilah Dia! pujilah Dia! selamanya dalam lagu yang menyenangkan!

lines.en: Praise Him! praise Him! Je-sus, our bless-ed Re-deem-er!
lines.id: Pujilah Dia! pujilah Dia! Ya Tuhan, Re-deem-er kami yang terberkati!

lines.en: For our sins He suff-ered, and bled, and died.
lines.id: Karena dosa-dosa kita, Dia menderita, mengeluarkan darah, dan mati.

lines.en: He, our Rock, our Hope of e-ter-nal sal-va-tion,
lines.id: Dia, Batu Karang kami, Pengharapan kami akan keselamatan kekal,

lines.en: Hail Him! hail Him Je-sus, the Cru-ci-fied!
lines.id: Salam Dia! puji Dia Yesus, Yang Tersalib!

lines.en: Sound His prais-es! Je-sus, who bore our sor-rows!
lines.id: Suarakan pujian-Nya! Yesus, yang menanggung duka kami!

lines.en: Love un-bound-ed, won-der-ful, deep, and strong!
lines.id: Cinta yang tidak terikat, menakjubkan, dalam, dan kuat!

lines.en: Praise Him! praise Him! tell of His ex-cel-lent great-ness.
lines.id: Pujilah Dia! pujilah Dia! menceritakan kehebatan-Nya yang luar biasa.

lines.en: Praise Him! praise Him! ev-er in joy-ful song!
lines.id: Pujilah Dia! pujilah Dia! selamanya dalam lagu yang menyenangkan!

lines.en: Praise Him! praise him! Je-sus, our bless-ed Re-deem-der!
lines.id: Pujilah Dia! pujilah dia! Ya Tuhan, Penebusan Kembali kami yang terberkati!

lines.en: Heav'n-ly por-tals loud with ho-san-nas ring!
lines.id: Portal surgawi nyaring dengan dering ho-san-nas!

lines.en: Je-sus, Sav-iour, reigh-eth for ev-er and ev-er
lines.id: Yesus, Juruselamat, hidup selama-lamanya

lines.en: Crown Him! crown Him! Proph-et, and Priest, and King!
lines.id: Mahkotai Dia! mahkotai Dia! Nabi, dan Imam, dan Raja!

lines.en: Christ is com-ing, o-ver the world vic-to-rious
lines.id: Kristus akan datang, dengan kemenangan atas dunia

lines.en: Pow'r and glo-ry un-to the Lord be-long.
lines.id: Kekuasaan dan kemuliaan hanya bagi Tuhan.

lines.en: Praise Him! praise Him! tell of His ex-cel-lent great-ness.
lines.id: Pujilah Dia! pujilah Dia! menceritakan kehebatan-Nya yang luar biasa.

lines.en: Praise Him! praise Him! ev-er in joy-ful song!
lines.id: Pujilah Dia! pujilah Dia! selamanya dalam lagu yang menyenangkan!

title_en: O Christ, Our King, Creator, Lord
title_ko: 오 그리스도, 우리의 왕, 창조주, 주님 (자체번역)

lines.en: O Christ, our King, Creator, Lord,
lines.ko: 오 그리스도, 우리의 왕, 창조주, 주님,

lines.en: Saviour of all who trust thy Word,
lines.ko: 당신의 말씀을 믿는 모든 사람의 구원자시여,

lines.en: To them who seek thee ever near,
Now to our praises bend thine ear.
lines.ko: 이제 우리의 찬양에 귀를 기울여 주십시오.

lines.en: In thy dear cross a grace is found
It flows from every streaming wound
Whose pow'r our inbred sin controls,
lines.ko: 우리의 타고난 죄가 누구의 힘을 통제하는지,

lines.en: Breaks the firm bond, and frees our souls.
lines.ko: 굳건한 결속을 깨뜨리고 우리의 영혼을 해방시킵니다.

lines.en: Thou didst create the stars of night;
Yet thou hast veiled in flesh thy light,
lines.ko: 그러나 당신은 육체로 당신의 빛을 가리셨습니다.

lines.en: Hast deigned a mortal form to wear,
A mortal's painful lot to bear.
When thou didst hang upon the tree,
The quaking earth acknowledged thee;
When thou didst here yield up thy breath,
The world grew dark as shades of death.
Now in the Father's glory high,
Great Conqueror, nevermore to die,
lines.ko: 위대한 정복자, 더 이상 죽지 않으시는 분,

lines.en: Us by thy mighty pow'r defend,
And reign through ages without end.

title_en: A Wonderful Savior Is Jesus My Lord

lines.en: A wonderful Saviour is Jesus my Lord,
lines.ko: 오 놀라운 구세주 예수 내 주
lines.id: Penyelamat yang luar biasa adalah Yesus, Tuhanku,
Penyelamat yang luar biasa bagiku

lines.ko: 큰 바위 및 안전한 그 곳으로
lines.id: Dia menyembunyikan jiwaku di celah batu,
Di mana sungai-sungai kesenangan kulihat.
Dia menyembunyikan jiwaku di celah batu
Itu menaungi tanah yang kering dan haus

lines.ko: 저 위험한 곳 내가 이를 때면
lines.id: Dia menyembunyikan hidupku di kedalaman kasih-Nya,

lines.ko: 큰 바위에 숨기시고 주 손으로 덮으시네
lines.id: Dan menyelimutiku di sana dengan tangan-Nya,
Dan menyelimutiku di sana dengan tangan-Nya.

lines.en: A wonderful Saviour to me,
lines.ko: 오 놀라운 구세주 예수 내 주
lines.id: Penyelamat yang luar biasa adalah Yesus, Tuhanku,
Dia mengambil bebanku
Dia menopang aku, dan aku tidak goyah,
Dia memberiku kekuatan seperti hariku.
Dia menyembunyikan jiwaku di celah batu
Itu menaungi tanah yang kering dan haus

lines.ko: 저 위험한 곳 내가 이를 때면
lines.id: Dia menyembunyikan hidupku di kedalaman kasih-Nya,

lines.ko: 큰 바위에 숨기시고 주 손으로 덮으시네
lines.id: Dan menyelimutiku di sana dengan tangan-Nya,
Dan menyelimutiku di sana dengan tangan-Nya.

lines.en: He hideth my soul in the cleft of the rock,
lines.id: Dengan berkah yang tak terhitung banyaknya setiap saat, Dia memahkotai,
Dan, dipenuhi dengan kepenuhan ilahi-Nya,
Aku bernyanyi dalam kegembiraanku, oh, kemuliaan bagi Tuhan
Untuk Penebus Ulang seperti milikku!
Dia menyembunyikan jiwaku di celah batu
Itu menaungi tanah yang kering dan haus

lines.ko: 저 위험한 곳 내가 이를 때면
lines.id: Dia menyembunyikan hidupku di kedalaman kasih-Nya,

lines.ko: 큰 바위에 숨기시고 주 손으로 덮으시네
lines.id: Dan menyelimutiku di sana dengan tangan-Nya,
Dan menyelimutiku di sana dengan tangan-Nya.

lines.en: Where rivers of pleasure I see.
lines.id: Saat mengenakan kecerahan-Nya, aku terangkat
Untuk menemui-Nya di awan-awan di langit,
Penyelamatan-Nya yang sempurna, kasih-Nya yang luar biasa,
Saya akan berteriak dengan jutaan orang di tempat tinggi.
Dia menyembunyikan jiwaku di celah batu
Itu menaungi tanah yang kering dan haus

lines.ko: 저 위험한 곳 내가 이를 때면
lines.id: Dia menyembunyikan hidupku di kedalaman kasih-Nya,

lines.ko: 큰 바위에 숨기시고 주 손으로 덮으시네
lines.id: Dan menyelimutiku di sana dengan tangan-Nya,
Dan menyelimutiku di sana dengan tangan-Nya.

lines.en: He hideth my soul in the cleft of the rock
That shadows a dry, thirsty land;
He hideth my life in the depths of his love,
And covers me there with his hand.
A wonderful Saviour is Jesus my Lord,
He taketh my burden away,
He holdeth me up, and I shall not be moved,
He giveth me strength as my day.
With numberless blessings each moment he crowns,
And filled with a fullness divine,
I sing in my rapture, O glory to God
For such a Redeemer as mine!
When clothed in his brightness, transported I rise
To meet him in clouds of the sky,
His perfect salvation, his wonderful love,
I'll shout with the millions on high.

alt_titles: A wonderful Saviour is Jesus my Lord
title_id: Juruselamat yang luar biasa adalah Yesus, Tuhanku

title_en: Hail, Thou Once Despised Jesus

lines.en: Hail, thou once despised Jesus,
Hail, thou Galilean King!
Thou didst suffer to release us:
lines.ko: 당신은 우리를 해방시키기 위해 고통을 당하셨습니다.

lines.en: Thou didst free salvation bring.
Hail, thou agonizing Saviour,
Bearer of our sin and shame!
By thy merits we find favor;
Life is given through thy name.
Paschal Lamb, by God appointed,
All our sins were on thee laid;
By almighty love anointed,
Thou hast full atonement made:
All thy people are forgiven
Through the virtue of thy blood;
Opened is the gate of heaven,
Peace is made 'twixt man and God.
Jesus, hail! enthroned in glory,
There for ever to abide;
All the heav'nly hosts adore thee,
Seated at thy Father's side:
There for sinners thou art pleading;
There thou dost our place prepare;
Ever for us interceding,
Till in glory we appear.
Worship, honor, power, and blessing
Thou art worthy to receive:
Loudest praises without ceasing,
Meet it is for us to give.
Help, ye bright angelic spirits,
Bring your sweetest, noblest lays;
lines.ko: 가장 달콤하고 고귀한 평신도를 가져 오십시오.

lines.en: Help to sing our Saviour's merits,
Help to chant Immanuel's praise.

title_en: O Could I Speak the Matchless Worth
title_ko: 오, 비길 데 없는 가치를 말할 수 있을까요? (자체번역)

lines.en: O could I speak the matchless worth,
lines.ko: 오, 제가 비교할 수 없는 가치를 말할 수 있을까요?

lines.en: O could I sound the glories forth
lines.ko: 오, 내가 영광을 외칠 수 있을까요?

lines.en: Which in my Saviour shine,
lines.ko: 나의 구세주 안에서 빛을 발하는 것,

lines.en: I'd soar, and touch the heavenly strings,
lines.ko: 나는 솟아오를 것이고, 하늘의 줄을 만질 것이고,

lines.en: And vie with Gabriel while he sings
lines.ko: 그리고 노래하는 동안 가브리엘과 경쟁을 해보세요

lines.en: In notes almost divine.
I'd sing the precious blood he spilt,
My ransom from the dreadful guilt
Of sin, and wrath Divine:
I'd sing his glorious righteousness,
In which all perfect, heavenly dress
My soul shall ever shine.
I'd sing the characters he bears,
lines.ko: 나는 그가 갖고 있는 캐릭터를 노래할 것이다.

lines.en: And all the forms of love he wears,
lines.ko: 그리고 그가 입는 모든 형태의 사랑,

lines.en: Exalted on his throne:
In loftiest songs of sweetest praise,
lines.ko: 가장 감미로운 찬양의 가장 고상한 노래 속에서,

lines.en: I would to everlasting days
Make all his glories known.
Well, the delightful day will come
When my dear Lord will bring me home,
lines.ko: 사랑하는 주님께서 나를 집으로 데려가실 때,

lines.en: And I shall see his face;
lines.ko: 그리고 나는 그의 얼굴을 볼 것이다.

lines.en: Then with my Saviour, brother, friend,
lines.ko: 그러면 나의 구세주, 형제, 친구와 함께

lines.en: A blest eternity I'll spend,
Triumphant in his grace.

title_en: There is No Name So Sweet on Earth

lines.en: There is no name so sweet on earth,
lines.ko: 천지에 있는 이름 중 귀하고 높은 이름
lines.id: Tidak ada nama yang begitu manis di bumi,

lines.en: No name so sweet in heaven,
lines.ko: 주 나시기 전 지으신 구주의 이름 예수
lines.id: Tidak ada nama yang begitu manis di surga,

lines.en: The Name before his wondrous birth
lines.ko: 후렴 : 주 앞에 내가 엎드려 그 이름 찬송함은
lines.id: Nama sebelum kelahiran-Nya yang menakjubkan

lines.en: To Christ the Saviour given.
lines.ko: 내 귀에 들린 말씀 중 귀하신 이름 예수 아멘
lines.id: Kepada Kristus Juruselamat yang diberikan.
Kami senang bernyanyi tentang Kristus Raja kami,
Dan pujilah Dia Yesus yang terberkati
Karena tidak ada kata yang pernah didengar telinga
Sangat sayang, sangat manis seperti “Yesus.”

lines.en: We love to sing around our King,
lines.ko: 주 십자가에 달릴 때 명패에 쓰인 대로
lines.id: Dan ketika dia tergantung di pohon,

lines.en: And hail him blessed Jesus;
lines.ko: 저 유대인의 왕이요 곧 우리 왕이시라
lines.id: Mereka menulis Nama ini di atas Dia

lines.en: For there's no word ear ever heard
lines.id: Itu semua mungkin melihat alasan kita

lines.en: So dear, so sweet as Jesus.
lines.id: Selama-lamanya harus lebih mengasihi Dia.
Kami senang bernyanyi tentang Kristus Raja kami,
Dan pujilah Dia Yesus yang terberkati
Karena tidak ada kata yang pernah didengar telinga
Sangat sayang, sangat manis seperti “Yesus.”

lines.en: And, when he hung upon the tree,
lines.ko: 지금도 살아 계셔서 언제나 하시는 일
lines.id: Jadi sekarang, di atas takhta Bapa-Nya,

lines.en: They wrote this Name above him;
lines.ko: 나 같은 죄인 부르사 참 소망 주시도다
lines.id: Al-might-y untuk menyewakan kembali kami

lines.en: That all might see the reason we
lines.id: Dari dosa dan kesakitan, Dia dengan senang hati memerintah,

lines.en: For evermore must love him.
lines.id: Pangeran dan Juruselamat Yesus.
Kami senang bernyanyi tentang Kristus Raja kami,
Dan pujilah Dia Yesus yang terberkati
Karena tidak ada kata yang pernah didengar telinga
Sangat sayang, sangat manis seperti “Yesus.”

lines.en: So now, upon his Father's throne,
lines.id: Ya Yesus, dengan nama yang tak tertandingi itu,

lines.en: Almighty to release us
lines.ko: 그 이름으로 우리게 참 복을 내리신다
lines.id: Kasih karunia-Mu tidak akan pernah mengecewakan kami

lines.en: From sin and pains, he gladly reigns,
lines.id: Hari ini sama seperti hari kemarin,

lines.en: The Prince and Saviour Jesus.
lines.id: Engkau tetap sama selamanya.
Kami senang bernyanyi tentang Kristus Raja kami,
Dan pujilah Dia Yesus yang terberkati
Karena tidak ada kata yang pernah didengar telinga
Sangat sayang, sangat manis seperti “Yesus.”

lines.en: To Jesus ev'ry knee shall bow,
And ev'ry tongue confess him,
And we unite with saints in light,
Our only Lord to bless him.
O Jesus, by that matchless Name,
Thy grace shall fail us never;
Today as yesterday the same,
Thou art the same for ever.

title_id: Tidak Ada Nama yang begitu Manis

title_en: Hallelujah! Thine the Glory

lines.en: We praise thee, O God!
For the days of our youth,
For the bright lamp that shineth
The Word of thy truth.
Hallelujah! thine the glory,
Hallelujah we sing;
Hallelujah! thine the glory,
Our praise now we bring.
We praise thee, O God!
For the Son of thy love,
For Jesus who died
And is now gone above.
We praise thee, O God!
For thy Spirit of light,
Who has shown us our Saviour
And scattered our night.
All glory and praise
To the Lamb that was slain,
Who has borne all our sins and
Has cleansed ev'ry stain!

alt_titles: We praise thee, O God! for the days of our youth

title_en: I Will Sing the Wondrous Story

lines.en: I will sing the wondrous story
Of the Christ who died for me,
How he left the realms of glory
For the cross on Calvary.
Yes, I'll sing the wondrous story
Of the Christ who died for me,
Sing it with the saints in glory,
Gathered by the crystal sea.
I was lost: but Jesus found me,
lines.ko: 나는 길을 잃었으나 예수께서 나를 찾으셨으니

lines.en: Found the sheep that went astray,
Raised me up and gently led me
Back into the narrow way.
Faint was I, and fears possessed me,
Bruised was I from many a fall;
lines.ko: 나는 여러 번 넘어져 상처를 입었습니다.

lines.en: Hope was gone, and shame distressed me:
But his love has pardoned all.
lines.ko: 그러나 그분의 사랑은 모든 것을 용서해 주었습니다.

lines.en: Days of darkness still may meet me,
lines.ko: 어둠의 날들이 여전히 나를 만날지도 모르지만,

lines.en: Sorrow's path I oft may tread;
lines.ko: 나는 종종 슬픔의 길을 밟을 수 있습니다.

lines.en: But his presence still is with me,
lines.ko: 하지만 그의 존재는 여전히 나와 함께 있다.

lines.en: By his guiding hand I'm led.
He will keep me till the river
Rolls its waters at my feet:
Then he'll bear me safely over,
lines.ko: 그러면 그 사람이 나를 안전하게 안고 갈 거예요.

lines.en: Made by grace for glory meet.

alt_titles: Yes, I'll sing the wondrous story

title_en: We Come, O Christ, to You

lines.en: [English lyrics not available in the database for this revised hymn]
lines.ko: [이 개정된 찬송가의 데이터베이스에는 영어 가사가 없습니다.]

title_en: My Song Is Love Unknown
title_ko: 내 노래는 사랑을 알 수 없다 (자체번역)

lines.en: [English lyrics not available in the database for this revised hymn]
lines.ko: [이 개정된 찬송가의 데이터베이스에는 영어 가사가 없습니다.]

title_en: Awake, My Soul, in Joyful Lays

lines.en: Awake, my soul, in joyful lays,
And sing thy great Redeemer's praise:
lines.ko: 그리고 당신의 크신 구원자를 찬양하여 부르십시오.

lines.en: He justly claims a song from me,
His lovingkindness is so free.
Lovingkindness, lovingkindness,
His lovingkindness is so free.
He saw me ruined in the fall,
lines.ko: 그는 내가 가을에 망가져가는 것을 보았고,

lines.en: Yet loved me not withstanding all,
And saved me from my lost estate,
His lovingkindness is so great.
Lovingkindness, lovingkindness,
His lovingkindness is so great.
Through mighty hosts of cruel foes,
Where earth and hell my way oppose,
lines.ko: 땅과 지옥이 내가 가는 곳이 반대되는 곳,

lines.en: He safely leads my soul along,
His lovingkindness is so strong.
Lovingkindness, lovingkindness,
His lovingkindness is so strong.
So when I pass death's gloomy vale,
lines.ko: 그러므로 내가 죽음의 우울한 골짜기를 지날 때,

lines.en: And life and mortal pow'rs shall fail,
lines.ko: 그리고 생명과 필멸의 힘은 쇠퇴할 것이며,

lines.en: O may my last expiring breath
His lovingkindness sing in death.
Lovingkindness, lovingkindness,
His lovingkindness sing in death.
Then shall I mount, and soar away
To the bright world of endless day;
There shall I sing, with sweet surprise,
His lovingkindness in the skies,
Lovingkindness, lovingkindness,
His lovingkindness in the skies.

alt_titles: Awake, my soul, in joyful lays

title_en: The King of Love My Shepherd Is

lines.en: From Psalm 23
The King of Love my Shepherd is,
Whose goodness faileth never;
I nothing lack if I am his
lines.ko: 내가 그의 것이라면 나는 아무것도 부족하지 않다

lines.en: And he is mine for ever.
Where streams of living water flow
My ransomed soul he leadeth,
And, where the verdant pastures grow,
With food celestial feedeth.
Perverse and foolish oft I strayed,
But yet in love he sought me,
And on his shoulder gently laid,
And home, rejoicing, brought me.
In death's dark vale I fear no ill
lines.ko: 죽음의 어두운 계곡에서도 나는 어떤 병도 두렵지 않습니다

lines.en: With thee, dear Lord, beside me;
lines.ko: 사랑하는 주님, 당신과 함께 내 옆에 계십니다.

lines.en: Thy rod and staff my comfort still,
lines.ko: 주의 지팡이와 막대기가 여전히 나의 위로가 되시니

lines.en: Thy cross before to guide me.
Thou spread'st a table in my sight;
lines.ko: 당신은 내 눈앞에 식탁을 펼쳐 놓았습니다.

lines.en: Thine unction grace bestoweth;
And O what transport of delight
lines.ko: 그리고 오, 이 얼마나 큰 기쁨의 전달인가

lines.en: From thy pure chalice floweth.
And so through all the length of days
Thy goodness faileth never;
Good Shepherd, may I sing thy praise
Within thy house for ever.

title_en: Majestic Sweetness Sits Enthroned

lines.en: Majestic sweetness sits enthroned
lines.ko: 빛나고 높은 보좌와 그 위에 앉으신
lines.id: Kemanisan ma-jes-tic duduk di singgasana

lines.en: Upon the Saviour's brow;
lines.ko: 주 예수 얼굴 영광이 해 같이 빛나네 해 같이 빛나네
lines.id: Di atas alis Juruselamat

lines.en: His head with radiant glories crowned,
lines.id: Kepalanya dimahkotai dengan kemuliaan yang cemerlang,

lines.en: His lips with grace over flow.
lines.id: Bibirnya dengan anggun mengalir,
Bibirnya mengalir dengan anggun.

lines.en: No mortal can with him compare,
lines.id: Tidak ada makhluk fana yang dapat menandingi Dia

lines.en: Among the sons of men;
lines.ko: 뭇 천사소리 합하여 늘 찬송 드리네 늘 찬송 드리네
lines.id: Di antara anak-anak manusia

lines.en: Fairer is he than all the fair
lines.id: Lebih adil Dia daripada segala yang adil

lines.en: That fill the heavenly train.
lines.id: Yang mengisi kereta surgawi,
Yang mengisi kereta surgawi.

lines.en: He saw me plunged in deep distress,
lines.ko: 영 죽을 나를 살리려 그 영광 떠나서
lines.id: Dia melihatku terjerumus dalam kesusahan yang mendalam,

lines.en: He flew to my relief;
lines.ko: 그 부끄러운 십자가 날 위해 지셨네 날 위해 지셨네
lines.id: Dan terbang ke kelegaanku

lines.en: For me he bore the shameful cross,
lines.id: Bagiku Dia memikul Salib yang memalukan,

lines.en: And carried all my grief.
lines.id: Dan membawa semua kesedihanku,
Dan membawa semua kesedihanku.

lines.en: To him I owe my life and breath,
lines.ko: 나 이제 생명 있음은 주님의 은혜요
lines.id: Kepada-Nya aku berhutang nyawa dan nafasku,

lines.en: And all the joys I have;
lines.ko: 저 사망 권세 이기니 큰 기쁨 넘치네 큰 기쁨 넘치네
lines.id: Dan semua kebahagiaan yang saya miliki

lines.en: He makes me triumph over death,
lines.id: Dia membuatku menang atas kematian,

lines.en: And saves me from the grave.
lines.id: Dan selamatkan aku dari kubur,
Dan menyelamatkanku dari kubur.

lines.en: To heav'n, the place of his abode,
lines.ko: 주님의 보좌 있는데 천한 몸 이르러
lines.id: Karena dari karunia-Nya aku menerima,

lines.en: He brings my weary feet;
lines.ko: 그 영광 몸 소 뵈올 때 내 기쁨 넘치리 내 기쁨 넘치리 아멘
lines.id: Demikianlah bukti cinta ilahi,

lines.en: Shows me the glories of my God,
lines.id: Seandainya aku memberi seribu hati,

lines.en: And makes my joys complete.
lines.id: Tuhan, semua itu harus menjadi milik-Mu,
Tuhan, semua itu harus menjadi milik-Mu. Amin.

lines.en: Since from his bounty I receive
Such proofs of love divine,
Had I a thousand hearts to give,
Lord, they should all be thine.

title_id: Manisnya Yang Luar Biasa Duduk Bertahta

title_en: One There Is, above All Others

lines.en: One there is, above all others,
Well deserves the name of Friend;
His is love beyond a brother's,
Costly, free, and knows no end:
lines.ko: 비용이 많이 들고 무료이며 끝이 없습니다.

lines.en: They who once his kindness prove
Find it everlasting love.
Which of all our friends, to save us,
lines.ko: 우리 친구 중 누가 우리를 구하려고

lines.en: Could or would have shed his blood?
But our Jesus died to have us
lines.ko: 그러나 우리 예수님은 우리를 갖기 위해 죽으셨습니다.

lines.en: Reconciled in him to God.
This was boundless love indeed;
Jesus is a Friend in need.
When he lived on earth abased,
lines.ko: 그가 이 땅에서 비천한 삶을 살았을 때,

lines.en: "Friend of sinners" was his name,
Now above all glory raised,
He rejoices in the same;
Still he calls them brethren, friends,
lines.ko: 그럼에도 불구하고 그는 그들을 형제, 친구,

lines.en: And to all their wants attends.
lines.ko: 그리고 그들이 원하는 모든 것이 이루어집니다.

lines.en: Could we bear from one another
What he daily bears from us?
Yet this glorious Friend and Brother
Loves us though we treat him thus:
lines.ko: 우리가 그를 이렇게 대하더라도 그는 우리를 사랑합니다.

lines.en: Though for good we render ill,
He accounts us brethren still.
O for grace our hearts to soften!
lines.ko: 오, 우리 마음을 부드럽게 하는 은혜가 필요합니다!

lines.en: Teach us, Lord, at length to love,
lines.ko: 주님, 마침내 우리에게 사랑을 가르쳐 주십시오.

lines.en: We, alas! forget too often
What a Friend we have above.
But when home our souls are brought,
We will love thee as we ought.

title_en: There Were Ninety and Nine

lines.en: There were ninety and nine that safely lay
lines.ko: 양 아흔아홉 마리는 울 안에 있으나
lines.id: Terberkatilah sumber air Bood,

lines.en: In the shelter of the fold,
lines.ko: 한 마리 양은 떨어져 길 잃고 헤매네
lines.id: Ke dunia orang-orang berdosa yang terungkap kembali.

lines.en: But one was out on the hills away,
lines.ko: 산 높고 길은 험한데 목자를 멀리 떠났네
lines.id: Terpujilah Putra Allah yang terkasih

lines.en: Far off from the gates of gold
lines.id: Hanya oleh bilur-bilurNya kita disembuhkan.

lines.en: Away on the mountains wild and bare,
lines.id: Meskipun aku telah mengembara jauh dari kandang-Nya,

lines.en: Away from the tender Shepherd's care.
lines.id: Membawa rasa sakit dan duka ke dalam hatiku,
Basuhlah aku dengan darah Anak Domba,
Dan aku akan menjadi lebih putih dari salju.
Lebih putih dari salju,
Lebih putih dari salju
Basuhlah aku dengan darah Anak Domba,
Dan aku akan menjadi lebih putih dari salju.

lines.en: "Lord, thou hast here thy ninety and nine;
lines.id: Thor-ny adalah mahkota yang Dia kenakan,

lines.en: Are they not enough for thee?"
lines.ko: 저 목자 힘써 하는 말 그 양도 사랑해
lines.id: Dan Salib Tubuh-Nya datang

lines.en: But the Shepherd made answer:
lines.ko: 그 길이 멀고 험해도 그 양을 찾을 것이라
lines.id: Sedihlah penderitaan yang Dia tanggung,

lines.en: "This of mine has wandered away from me,
lines.id: Namun penderitaan yang Dia alami tidaklah sia-sia.

lines.en: And although the road be rough and steep,
lines.id: Bolehkah aku dituntun ke sumber air itu,

lines.en: I go to the desert to find my sheep."
lines.id: Dibuat untuk membersihkan dosa-dosaku di sini
Basuhlah aku dengan darah yang Dia tumpahkan,
Dan aku akan menjadi lebih putih dari salju.
Lebih putih dari salju,
Lebih putih dari salju
Basuhlah aku dengan darah Anak Domba,
Dan aku akan menjadi lebih putih dari salju.

lines.en: But none of the ransomed ever knew
lines.ko: 길 잃은 양을 찾으러 산 넘고 물 건너
lines.id: Ayah, aku telah mengembara dariMu

lines.en: How deep were the waters crossed;
lines.ko: 그 어둔 밤이 새도록 큰 고생 하셨네
lines.id: Seringkali hatiku tersesat.

lines.en: Nor how dark was the night that the Lord passed thro'
lines.ko: 그 양의 울음 소리를 저 목자 들으셨도다
lines.id: Bagi saya, anak kriminal, dosa-dosa saya

lines.en: Ere he found his sheep that was lost.
lines.id: Air tidak bisa mencucinya begitu saja.

lines.en: Out in the desert he heard its cry
lines.id: Yesus, ke sumber mata air-Mu,

lines.en: Sick and helpless, and ready to die.
lines.id: Bersandar pada janji-Mu aku berangkat
Bersihkan aku dengan pencucian ilahi-Mu,
Dan aku akan menjadi lebih putih dari salju.
Lebih putih dari salju,
Lebih putih dari salju
Basuhlah aku dengan darah Anak Domba,
Dan aku akan menjadi lebih putih dari salju, kawan.

lines.en: "Lord, whence are those blood-drops all the way
lines.ko: 산 길에 흘린 피 흔적 그 누가 흘렸나
lines.id: Siapa yang menumpahkan jejak darah di jalan pegunungan?

lines.en: That mark out the mountain's track?"
lines.ko: 길 잃은 양을 찾느라 저 목자 흘렸네
lines.id: Gembala sedang mencari domba yang hilang.

lines.en: "They were shed for one who had gone astray
lines.ko: 손 발은 어찌 상했나 가시에 찔리셨도다
lines.id: Bagaimana cedera tangan dan kaki Anda? Kamu tertusuk duri.

lines.en: Ere the Shepherd could bring him back."
lines.id: Dia tertusuk duri.

lines.en: "Lord, whence are thy hands so rent and torn?
They're pierced tonight by many a thorn."
But all thro' the mountains, thunder riv'n,
lines.ko: 저 목자 기쁨 넘쳐서 큰 소리 외치며
lines.id: Sang penggembala sangat senang hingga dia berteriak dengan keras.

lines.en: And up from the rocky steep,
lines.ko: 내 잃은 양을 찾았다 다 기뻐하여라
lines.id: Bergembiralah semuanya, aku telah menemukan dombaku yang hilang.

lines.en: There arose a glad cry to the gate of heav'n,
lines.ko: 저 천사 화답 하는 말 그 양을 찾으셨도다
lines.id: Malaikat menjawab: Dia telah menemukan dombanya.

lines.en: "Rejoice! I have found my sheep!"
lines.id: Dia menemukan dombanya

lines.en: And the angels echoed around the throne,
"Rejoice, for the Lord brings back his own!"

title_en: Jesus, I Am Resting, Resting
title_ko: 예수님, 나는 쉬고 있어요, 쉬고 있어요 (자체번역)

lines.en: [English lyrics not available in the database for this revised hymn]
lines.ko: [이 개정된 찬송가의 데이터베이스에는 영어 가사가 없습니다.]

title_en: Jesus Loves Me, This I Know

lines.en: Jesus loves me, this I know,
lines.id: Yesus mengasihiku, ini yang aku tahu,

lines.en: For the Bible tells me so;
lines.id: Karena Alkitab memberitahuku demikian

lines.en: Little ones to him belong,
lines.id: Anak-anak kecil bagi-Nya panjang umur,

lines.en: They are weak but he is strong.
lines.id: Mereka lemah tetapi Dia kuat.
Ya, Yesus mengasihiku!
Ya, Yesus mengasihiku!
Ya, Yesus mengasihiku!
Alkitab memberitahuku demikian.

lines.en: Yes, Jesus loves me!
lines.ko: 나를 사랑하시고 나의 죄를 다 씻어
lines.id: Yesus mengasihi aku, Dia yang telah mati

lines.en: The Bible tells me so.
lines.id: Gerbang surga terbuka lebar
Dia akan menghapuskan dosaku,
Biarkan anak kecilnya masuk.
Ya, Yesus mengasihiku!
Ya, Yesus mengasihiku!
Ya, Yesus mengasihiku!
Alkitab memberitahuku demikian.

lines.en: Jesus loves me, he who died
lines.id: Yesus mengasihiku, masih mengasihiku,

lines.en: Heaven's gate to open wide;
lines.ko: 높은 보좌 위에서 낮은 나를 보시네
lines.id: Meskipun aku sangat lemah dan sakit

lines.en: He will wash away my sin,
lines.id: Dari singgasana-Nya yang bersinar di tempat tinggi

lines.en: Let his little child come in.
lines.id: Datang untuk mengawasiku dari mana aku berbohong.
Ya, Yesus mengasihiku!
Ya, Yesus mengasihiku!
Ya, Yesus mengasihiku!
Alkitab memberitahuku demikian.

lines.en: Jesus loves me, loves me still,
lines.ko: 세상 사는 동안에 나와 함께 하시고
lines.id: Yesus mengasihiku, Dia akan tinggal

lines.en: Though I'm very weak and ill;
lines.ko: 세상 떠나 가는 날 천국 가게 하소서
lines.id: Close be-side me all the way

lines.en: From his shining throne on high
lines.id: Aku mencintainya, dan ketika aku mati

lines.en: Comes to watch me where I lie.
lines.id: Dia akan membawaku pulang ke tempat tinggi.
Ya, Yesus mengasihiku!
Ya, Yesus mengasihiku!
Ya, Yesus mengasihiku!
Alkitab memberitahuku demikian.

lines.en: Jesus loves me, he will stay
Close beside me all the way:
If I love him, when I die
He will take me home on high.

alt_titles: Yes, Jesus loves me! Yes, Jesus loves me!
title_id: Yesus Mengasihiku, Ini yang Aku Tahu

title_en: I Think When I Read That Sweet Story of Old
title_ko: 옛날 옛적의 달콤한 이야기를 읽을 때 나는 생각한다 (자체번역)

lines.en: I think when I read that sweet story of old,
lines.ko: 내 생각엔 그 달콤한 옛날 이야기를 읽을 때면,

lines.en: When Jesus was here among men,
lines.ko: 예수께서 여기 사람들 가운데 계실 때,

lines.en: How he called little children as lambs to his fold,
lines.ko: 그분께서 어떻게 어린아이들을 양 떼처럼 부르셨는지,

lines.en: I should like to have been with them then.
lines.ko: 그때 나는 그들과 함께 있었으면 좋았을 텐데.

lines.en: I wish that his hands had been placed on my head,
lines.ko: 그의 손이 내 머리 위에 얹혀졌더라면 좋았을 텐데,

lines.en: That his arm had been thrown around me,
lines.ko: 그의 팔이 내 주위에 던져졌다는 것,

lines.en: And that I might have seen his kind look when he said,
lines.ko: 그리고 그가 말했을 때 나는 그의 친절한 표정을 볼 수 있었을 것입니다.

lines.en: "Let the little ones come unto Me."
Yet still to his footstool in prayer I may go,
lines.ko: 그러나 나는 여전히 기도하며 그분의 발등상에 갈 수 있습니다.

lines.en: And ask for a share in his love;
lines.ko: 그리고 그분의 사랑에 동참해 달라고 청하십시오.

lines.en: And if I now earnestly seek him below,
lines.ko: 그리고 내가 지금 아래에서 간절히 그분을 찾는다면,

lines.en: I shall see him and hear him above.
lines.ko: 나는 그를 보고 위에서 그의 말을 들을 것이다.

lines.en: In that beautiful place he is gone to prepare
lines.ko: 그 아름다운 곳에서 그는 준비하러 갔습니다

lines.en: For all who are washed and forgiv'n;
And many dear children are gathering there,
lines.ko: 그리고 많은 사랑하는 아이들이 그곳에 모여 있습니다.

lines.en: For of such is the kingdom of heav'n.

title_en: I Am So Glad That Our Father in Heaven

lines.en: I am so glad that our Father in heav'n
lines.ko: 하나님 아버지 주신 책은 귀하고 중하신 말씀일세
lines.id: Saya sangat senang bahwa Bapa kita ada di surga

lines.en: Tells of his love in the book he has giv'n:
lines.ko: 기쁘고 반가운 말씀 중에 날 사랑한단 말 참 좋도다
lines.id: Menceritakan cinta-Nya dalam Kitab yang Dia berikan,

lines.en: Wonderful things in the Bible I see;
lines.id: Saya melihat hal-hal menakjubkan dalam Alkitab

lines.en: This is the dearest, that Jesus loves me.
lines.ko: 주께서 나를 사랑하니 나는 참 기쁘다
lines.id: Inilah yang tersayang, bahwa Yesus mengasihiku.
Aku sangat senang Yesus mengasihiku,
Yesus mengasihiku, Yesus mengasihiku,
Aku sangat senang Yesus mengasihiku,
Yesus bahkan mencintaiku.

lines.en: I am so glad that Jesus loves me,
lines.ko: 구속의 은혜를 저버리고 어긋난 딴 길로 가다가도
lines.id: Meskipun aku melupakan Dia dan mengembara,

lines.en: Jesus loves me, Jesus loves me,
lines.ko: 예수의 사랑만 생각하면 곧 다시 예수께 돌아오리
lines.id: Tetap saja Dia tetap mencintaiku di mana pun aku menyimpang

lines.en: I am so glad that Jesus loves me,
lines.id: Kembali ke pelukan kasih-Nya aku akan lari,

lines.en: Jesus loves even me.
lines.ko: 주께서 나를 사랑하니 나는 참 기쁘다
lines.id: Saat aku mengingat kembali bahwa Yesus mengasihiku.
Aku sangat senang Yesus mengasihiku,
Yesus mengasihiku, Yesus mengasihiku,
Aku sangat senang Yesus mengasihiku,
Yesus bahkan mencintaiku.

lines.en: Though I forget him, and wander away,
lines.ko: 구주의 영광을 바라보며 예수의 이름을 찬양하리
lines.id: O, jika hanya ada satu lagu yang bisa aku nyanyikan,

lines.en: Still he doth love me wherever I stray;
lines.ko: 영원히 찬양할 나의 노래 예수의 이름이 귀하도다
lines.id: Ketika dalam keindahan-Nya aku melihat Raja yang agung,

lines.en: Back to his dear loving arms do I flee,
lines.id: Ini akan menjadi laguku selamanya

lines.en: When I remember that Jesus loves me.
lines.ko: 주께서 나를 사랑하니 나는 참 기쁘다
lines.id: "Oh, sungguh menakjubkan bahwa Yesus mengasihiku."
Aku sangat senang Yesus mengasihiku,
Yesus mengasihiku, Yesus mengasihiku,
Aku sangat senang Yesus mengasihiku,
Yesus bahkan mencintaiku.

lines.en: O if there's only one song I can sing,
lines.ko: 주 예수 날 사랑하시오니 나 또한 예수를 사랑하네
lines.id: Yesus mengasihi saya, dan saya tahu saya mengasihi Dia

lines.en: When in his beauty I see the great King,
lines.ko: 날 구원하시려 내려오사 십자가 위에서 죽으셨네
lines.id: Cinta membawa Dia turun ke jiwaku yang malang untuk ditebus kembali

lines.en: This shall my song in eternity be,
lines.id: Ya, cinta itulah yang membuatnya mati di pohon

lines.en: "O what a wonder that Jesus loves me."
lines.ko: 주께서 나를 사랑하니 나는 참 기쁘다
lines.id: Oh, aku yakin Yesus mengasihiku.
Aku sangat senang Yesus mengasihiku,
Yesus mengasihiku, Yesus mengasihiku,
Aku sangat senang Yesus mengasihiku,
Yesus bahkan mencintaiku.

lines.ko: 주 예수 날 사랑하시오니 마귀가 놀라서 물러가네
lines.id: Dalam jaminan ini aku menemukan ketenangan yang paling manis,

lines.ko: 주 나를 이렇게 사랑하니 그 사랑 어떻게 보답할까
lines.id: Percaya pada Yesus, saya tahu saya diberkati
Setan, kecewa, dari jiwaku kini lari,

lines.ko: 주께서 나를 사랑하니 나는 참 기쁘다
lines.id: Ketika saya baru saja mengatakan kepadanya bahwa Yesus mengasihi saya.
Aku sangat senang Yesus mengasihiku,
Yesus mengasihiku, Yesus mengasihiku,
Aku sangat senang Yesus mengasihiku,
Yesus bahkan mencintaiku.

alt_titles: I am so glad that our Father in heaven
title_id: Saya sangat Senang bahwa Bapa Kami di Surga

title_en: I Am Jesus’ Little Lamb

lines.en: I am Jesus' little lamb,
Ever glad at heart I am;
For my Shepherd gently guides me,
Knows my need, and well provides me,
lines.ko: 내 필요를 아시고 나에게 잘 공급해 주십니다.

lines.en: Loves me ev'ry day the same,
Even calls me by my name.
Day by day, at home, away,
Jesus is my staff and stay.
When I hunger, Jesus feeds me,
Into pleasant pastures leads me;
When I thirst, he bids me go
lines.ko: 내가 목마를 때 그는 나에게 가라고 명한다

lines.en: Where the quiet waters flow.
Who so happy as I am,
Even now the Shepherd's lamb?
And when my short life is ended,
By his angel host attended,
He shall fold me to his breast,
lines.ko: 그는 나를 그의 가슴에 접을 것이다.

lines.en: There within his arms to rest.

title_en: Let All Mortal Flesh Keep Silence

lines.ko: 주님 앞에 떨며 서서 세상 생각 버리고
lines.id: Berdirilah dengan gemetar di hadapan Tuhan dan tinggalkan segala pemikiran dunia.

lines.ko: 고요하게 머리 숙여 주의 은총 빌어라
lines.id: Tundukkan kepalamu dengan tenang dan mohon rahmat Tuhan

lines.ko: 하늘 보좌 버리시고 우리 위해 오신 주
lines.id: Tuhan meninggalkan takhta-Nya di surga dan datang untuk kita.

lines.ko: 왕의 왕이 되신 주님 이 세상에 오셔서
lines.id: Tuhan, Raja segala raja, datang ke dunia ini

lines.ko: 사람 몸에 나시어서 우리 주가 되셨네
lines.id: Dia dilahirkan dalam daging manusia dan menjadi Tuhan kita.
Anda memberi kami makanan surgawi yang berlimpah
Para malaikat surgawi berbaris keluar dalam kelompok.
Di kerajaan surga yang mulia, terang sejati menyebar

lines.ko: 마귀 권세 물러가고 밝은 세상 되리라
lines.id: Kekuatan iblis akan hilang dan dunia akan menjadi lebih cerah.
Aku bersujud di hadapan malaikat surgawi Tuhan.

lines.ko: 소리 높여 찬송하며 주의 이름 기리네
lines.id: Aku meninggikan suaraku untuk memuji dan menghormati namamu.
Haleluya Haleluya Puji Tuhan

title_id: Biarkan Semua Daging Fana Tetap Diam

title_en: O Come, O Come, Emmanuel

lines.en: O come, O come, Emmanuel,
lines.ko: 곧 오소서 임마누엘 오 구하소서 이스라엘
lines.id: O, ayo, ayo, Em-man-u-el,

lines.en: And ransom captive Israel,
lines.ko: 그 포로 생활 고달파 메시야 기다립니다
lines.id: Dan tebusan sebagai tawanan

lines.en: That mourns in lonely exile here,
lines.ko: 기뻐하라 이스라엘 곧 오시리 오 임마누엘
lines.id: Is-ra-el, Itu berduka di pengasingan yang sepi di sini

lines.en: Until the Son of God appear.
lines.id: Sampai Anak Allah muncul.
Bersuka cita! Bersuka cita! Em-man-u-el
Akan datang kepadamu, hai Is-ra-el!

lines.en: Rejoice! Rejoice! Emmanuel
lines.ko: 곧 오소서 지혜의 주 온 만물 질서 주시고
lines.id: Wahai datanglah, Engkau Hikmat dari tempat tinggi,

lines.en: Shall come to thee, O Israel.
lines.ko: 참 진리의 길 보이사 갈 길을 인도 하소서
lines.id: Dan pesan semuanya

lines.ko: 기뻐하라 이스라엘 곧 오시리 오 임마누엘
lines.id: jauh dan dekat; Bagi kami jalan pengetahuan menunjukkan tepi,
Dan menyebabkan kita di jalannya untuk pergi.
Bersuka cita! Bersuka cita! Em-man-u-el
Akan datang kepadamu, hai Is-ra-el!

lines.en: O come, O come, thou Lord of might,
lines.ko: 곧 오소서 소망의 주 만백성 한 맘 이루어
lines.id: Hai, datanglah, Keinginan Bangsa-Bangsa; mengikat

lines.en: Who to thy tribes, on Sinai's height,
lines.ko: 시기와 분쟁 없애고 참 평화 채워 주소서
lines.id: Semua orang menjadi satu

lines.en: In ancient times didst give the law
lines.ko: 기뻐하라 이스라엘 곧 오시리 오 임마누엘 아멘
lines.id: hati dan pikiran, tawaran iri hati, perselisihan, dan pertengkaran berhenti

lines.en: In cloud and majesty and awe.
lines.id: Penuhi seluruh dunia dengan kedamaian surga.
Bersuka cita! Bersuka cita! Em-man-u-el
Akan datang kepadamu, hai Is-ra-el!

lines.en: O come, thou Rod of Jesse, free
Thine own from Satan's tyranny;
From depths of hell thy people save,
And give them victory o'er the grave.
O come, thou Dayspring from on high
And cheer us by thy drawing nigh;
Disperse the gloomy clouds of night,
And death's dark shadows put to flight.
O come, thou Key of David, come
And open wide our heav'nly home;
Make safe the way that leads on high,
And close the path to misery.

alt_titles: Rejoice! Rejoice! Emmanuel shall come to thee, O Israel

title_en: Joy to the World! The Lord Is Come

lines.en: Joy to the world! the Lord is come:
lines.ko: 기쁘다 구주 오셨네 만 백성 맞으라
lines.id: Sukacita bagi dunia! Tuhan telah datang

lines.en: Let earth receive her King;
lines.ko: 온 교회여 다 일어나 다 찬양 하여라 다 찬양 하여라
lines.id: Biarkan bumi menerima kembali Rajanya

lines.en: Let every heart prepare him room,
lines.id: Biarlah setiap hati menyediakan ruang untuk-Nya,

lines.en: And heaven and nature sing.
lines.id: Dan surga dan alam bernyanyi,
Dan surga dan alam bernyanyi,
Dan surga, surga, dan alam bernyanyi.

lines.en: Joy to the earth! the Saviour reigns:
lines.ko: 구세주 탄생 했으니 다 찬양 하여라
lines.id: Sukacita bagi bumi! Sang Juruselamat berkuasa

lines.en: Let men their songs employ;
lines.ko: 이 세상의 만물들아 다 화답 하여라 다 화답 하여라
lines.id: Biarkan laki-laki menggunakan lagu mereka

lines.en: While fields and floods, rocks, hills, and plains
lines.id: Sedangkan ladang dan banjir, bebatuan, bukit, dan dataran

lines.en: Repeat the sounding joy.
lines.id: Ulangi kembali kegembiraan yang terdengar,
Ulangi kembali kegembiraan yang terdengar,
Ulangi lagi, ulangi lagi kegembiraan yang terdengar.

lines.en: No more let sins and sorrows grow,
lines.ko: 온 세상 죄를 사하려 주 예수 오셨네
lines.id: Jangan biarkan dosa dan kesedihan bertambah lagi,

lines.en: Nor thorns infest the ground;
lines.ko: 죄와 슬픔 몰아내고 다 구원 하시네 다 구원 하시네
lines.id: Juga tidak ada duri yang memenuhi tanah

lines.en: He comes to make his blessings flow
lines.id: Dia datang untuk mengalirkan berkat-Nya

lines.en: Far as the curse is found.
lines.id: Sejauh kutukan itu ditemukan,
Sejauh kutukan itu ditemukan,
Sejauh mana kutukan itu ditemukan.

lines.en: He rules the world with truth and grace,
lines.ko: 은혜와 진리 되신 주 다 주관 하시니
lines.id: Dia memerintah dunia dengan kebenaran dan kasih karunia,

lines.en: And makes the nations prove
lines.ko: 만국 백성 구주 앞에 다 경배 하여라 다 경배 하여라
lines.id: Dan membuat bangsa-bangsa membuktikannya

lines.en: The glories of his righteousness,
lines.id: Kemuliaan atas kebenaran-Nya

lines.en: And wonders of his love.
lines.id: Dan keajaiban cinta-Nya,
Dan keajaiban cinta-Nya,
Dan keajaiban, keajaiban kasih-Nya.

title_en: Come, Thou Long-Expected Jesus

lines.en: Come, thou long-expected Jesus,
lines.id: Datanglah, Yesus yang telah lama kaunantikan,

lines.en: Born to set thy people free;
lines.ko: 죄에 매인 백성들을 자유 얻게 하시네
lines.id: Lahir untuk membebaskan umat-Mu

lines.en: From our fears and sins release us;
lines.ko: 주는 우리 소망이요 힘과 위로 되시니
lines.id: Bebaskan kami dari ketakutan dan dosa kami

lines.en: Let us find our rest in thee.
lines.ko: 오래 기다리던 백성 많은 복을 받겠네
lines.id: Marilah kita menemukan peristirahatan kita pada-Mu.

lines.en: Israel's strength and consolation,
lines.id: Kekuatan dan Kenyamanan Israel,

lines.en: Hope of all the earth thou art;
lines.id: Harapan seluruh bumi Engkau

lines.en: Dear Desire of ev'ry nation,
lines.id: Yang Terhormat De-Baginda setiap bangsa,

lines.en: Joy of every longing heart.
lines.id: Kegembiraan hati yang selalu rindu.

lines.en: Born thy people to deliver,
lines.id: Lahirlah umat-Mu untuk menyelamatkan hidup,

lines.en: Born a child, and yet a King,
lines.id: Terlahir sebagai seorang anak namun tetap menjadi Raja,

lines.en: Born to reign in us for ever,
lines.ko: 죄로 상한 우리 마음 은혜로써 고치고
lines.id: Lahir untuk memerintah dalam diri kita selamanya,

lines.en: Now thy gracious kingdom bring.
lines.ko: 주의 빛난 보좌 앞에 이르도록 하소서 아멘
lines.id: Sekarang datanglah Kerajaan-Mu yang penuh rahmat.

lines.en: By thine own eternal Spirit
lines.id: Oleh Roh-Mu yang kekal

lines.en: Rule in all our hearts alone;
lines.id: Memerintah dalam segenap hati kita sendirian

lines.en: By thine all-sufficient merit
lines.id: Demi kecukupan-Mu

lines.en: Raise us to thy glorious throne.
lines.id: Angkat kami ke takhta-Mu yang mulia.

title_id: Datanglah, Engkau Yesus yang sudah lama dinantikan

title_en: Comfort, Comfort Ye My People

lines.en: Comfort, comfort ye my people,
Speak ye peace, thus saith our God;
lines.ko: 너희는 평화를 말하라. 우리 하나님이 이같이 말씀하시니라.

lines.en: Comfort those who sit in darkness,
lines.ko: 어둠 속에 앉아 있는 자들을 위로하시고,

lines.en: Mourning 'neath their sorrow's load.
Speak ye to Jerusalem
Of the peace that waits for them;
Tell her that her sins I cover,
lines.ko: 그녀에게 내가 그 사람의 죄를 덮어준다고 말해주세요.

lines.en: And her warfare now is over.
Yea, her sins our God will pardon,
lines.ko: 그렇습니다. 우리 하느님께서 그 사람의 죄를 용서해 주실 것입니다.

lines.en: Blotting out each dark misdeed;
All that well deserved his anger
lines.ko: 그 모든 것은 그의 분노를 불러일으킬 만한 가치가 있었습니다

lines.en: He no more will see or heed.
lines.ko: 그는 더 이상 보거나 주의를 기울이지 않을 것입니다.

lines.en: She hath suffered many a day
Now her griefs have passed away;
God will change her pining sadness
lines.ko: 하나님은 그녀의 지독한 슬픔을 바꾸실 것입니다

lines.en: Into ever-springing gladness.
For the herald's voice is crying
In the desert far and near,
Bidding all men to repentance,
Since the kingdom now is here.
O that warning cry obey!
Now prepare for God a way;
Let the valleys rise to meet him,
lines.ko: 계곡들이 그를 만나기 위해 솟아오르게 하시고,

lines.en: And the hills bow down to greet him.
lines.ko: 그리고 언덕들이 그를 맞이하기 위해 몸을 굽힌다.

lines.en: Make ye straight what long was crooked,
Make the rougher places plain;
Let your hearts be true and humble,
As befits his holy reign.
For the glory of the Lord
Now o'er earth is shed abroad;
And all flesh shall see the token,
lines.ko: 그리고 모든 육체는 그 표징을 보게 될 것입니다.

lines.en: That his word is never broken.
lines.ko: 그의 말은 결코 깨지지 않는다는 것입니다.

title_en: Lift Up Your Heads, Ye Mighty Gates!

lines.en: Lift up your heads, ye mighty gates!
lines.ko: 영원한 문아 열려라 새 임금 들어 가신다
lines.id: Angkatlah kepalamu, hai gerbang perkasa,

lines.en: Behold, the King of glory waits;
lines.id: Lihatlah, Raja Kemuliaan menunggu

lines.en: The King of kings is drawing near,
lines.id: Raja segala raja sudah dekat

lines.en: The Saviour of the world is here.
lines.id: Juruselamat dunia ada di sini!

lines.en: Life and salvation he doth bring,
Wherefore rejoice and gladly sing:
We praise thee, Father, now,
Creator, wise art thou!
A Helper just he comes to thee,
lines.ko: 네 마음 문 곧 열어라 네 사사론 일 그치고
lines.id: Lemparkan lebar-lebar portal hatimu

lines.en: His chariot is humility,
lines.ko: 그 나라 일 이루도록 주 계실 성전 삼으라
lines.id: Jadikan itu kuil, atur bagiannya

lines.en: His kingly crown is holiness,
lines.id: Dari penggunaan duniawi untuk pekerjaan surga,

lines.en: His scepter, pity in distress.
lines.id: Dihiasi dengan doa, cinta, dan kegembiraan.

lines.en: The end of all our woe he brings;
Wherefore the earth is glad and sings:
We praise thee, Saviour, now,
Mighty in deed art thou!
O blest the land, the city blest,
lines.ko: 오 나의 주 내 마음에 곧 드사 함께 계시며
lines.id: Anggap ulang, ayo! Aku membuka lebar-lebar

lines.en: Where Christ the Ruler is confessed!
lines.ko: 그 큰 사랑을 베푸사 늘 동행하여 주소서 아멘
lines.id: Hatiku untukmu di sini, Tuhan, tinggallah.

lines.en: O happy hearts and happy homes
lines.id: Biarkan aku merasakan kehadiran batinmu

lines.en: To whom this King in triumph comes!
lines.id: Rahmat dan kasih-Mu dalam diriku kembali terungkap.

lines.en: The cloudless sun of joy he is,
Who bringeth pure delight and bliss.
We praise thee, Spirit, now,
Our Comforter art thou!.

title_en: See, amid the Winter’s Snow

lines.en: See, amid the winter's snow,
Born for us on earth below,
lines.ko: 저 아래 땅에서 우리를 위해 태어나셨으니

lines.en: See the tender Lamb appears,
Promised from eternal years.
Hail, thou ever blessed morn!
Hail, redemption's happy dawn!
Sing through all Jerusalem,
Christ is born in Bethlehem.
Lo, within a manger lies
He who built the starry skies:
He who, throned in height sublime,
Sits amid the cherubim.
Say, ye holy shepherds, say,
What your joyful news today?
Wherefore have ye left your sheep
On the lonely mountain steep?
"As we watched at dead of night,
Lo! we saw a wondrous light;
Angels singing, peace on earth,
Told us of the Saviour's birth."
lines.ko: 우리에게 구세주의 탄생에 관해 이야기해 주었습니다."

lines.en: Sacred Infant, all divine,
What a tender love was thine,
Thus to come from highest bliss
Down to such a world as this!
Teach, O teach us, holy Child,
lines.ko: 가르쳐주소서, 오 거룩하신 아드님, 우리에게 가르쳐주소서.

lines.en: By thy face so meek and mild,
Teach us to resemble thee,
In thy sweet humility.

alt_titles: See, amid the winter's snow

title_en: It Came upon the Midnight Clear

lines.en: It came upon the midnight clear,
lines.ko: 그 맑고 환한 밤중에 뭇 천사 내려와
lines.id: Itu terjadi pada tengah malam yang cerah,

lines.en: That glorious song of old,
lines.ko: 그 손에 비파 들고서 다 찬송 하기를
lines.id: Lagu kuno yang mulia itu,

lines.en: From angels bending near the earth
lines.ko: 평강의 왕이 오시니 다 평안 하여라
lines.id: Dari para malaikat yang membungkuk di dekat bumi,

lines.en: To touch their harps of gold;
lines.ko: 그 소란하던 세상이 다 고요 하도다
lines.id: Untuk menyentuh kecapi emas mereka

lines.en: "Peace on the earth, good will to men,
lines.id: “Damai di bumi, niat baik terhadap manusia.

lines.en: From heaven's all-gracious King:"
lines.id: Dari Raja surga yang maha pemurah.”

lines.en: The world in solemn stillness lay,
lines.id: Dunia berada dalam keheningan yang khusyuk

lines.en: To hear the angels sing.
lines.id: Mendengar para malaikat bernyanyi.

lines.en: Still through the cloven skies they come,
lines.ko: 뭇 천사 날개 펴고서 이 땅에 내려와
lines.id: Masih melalui langit yang terbelah mereka datang,

lines.en: With peaceful wings unfurled,
lines.ko: 그 때에 부른 노래가 또 다시 들리니
lines.id: Dengan sayap damai yang tak terbentang,

lines.en: And still their heav'nly music floats
lines.ko: 이 슬픔 많은 세상에 큰 위로 넘치고
lines.id: Dan musik surgawi mereka tetap melayang

lines.en: O'er all the weary world:
lines.ko: 온 세상 기뻐 뛰놀며 다 찬송 하도다
lines.id: Wahai seluruh dunia yang lelah

lines.en: Above its sad and lowly plains
lines.id: Di atas, datarannya menyedihkan dan rendah

lines.en: They bend on hov'ring wing,
lines.id: Mereka membungkuk pada sayap yang melayang,

lines.en: And ever o'er its Babel sounds
lines.id: Dan setiap kali terdengar suara Ba-bel

lines.en: The blessed angels sing.
lines.id: Malaikat yang diberkati bernyanyi.

lines.en: And ye, beneath life's crushing load,
lines.ko: 이 괴롬 많은 세상에 짐 지고 가는 자
lines.id: Dan kamu, di bawah beban hidup yang menghancurkan,

lines.en: Whose forms are bending low,
lines.ko: 그 험한 준령 넘느라 온 몸이 곤하나
lines.id: Yang bentuknya membungkuk rendah,

lines.en: Who toil along the climbing way
lines.ko: 이 죄악 세상 살 동안 새 소망 가지고
lines.id: Siapa yang bekerja keras sepanjang perjalanan pendakian,

lines.en: With painful steps and slow,
lines.ko: 저 천사 기쁜 찬송을 들으며 쉬어라
lines.id: Dengan langkah yang menyakitkan dan lambat,

lines.en: Look now! for glad and golden hours
lines.id: Lihatlah sekarang, untuk saat-saat bahagia dan emas

lines.en: Come swiftly on the wing:
lines.id: Ayo cepat di sayap

lines.en: O rest beside the weary road,
lines.id: Wahai istirahat di tepi jalan yang lelah,

lines.en: And hear the angels sing.
lines.id: Dan dengarkan para malaikat bernyanyi.

lines.en: For lo, the days are hastening on,
lines.ko: 옛 선지 예언 응하여 베들레헴 성에
lines.id: Sebab, hari-hari sudah semakin dekat,

lines.en: By prophet bards foretold,
lines.ko: 주 예수 탄생 하시니 온 세상 구주라
lines.id: Oleh para penyair yang dinubuatkan,

lines.en: When with the ever-circling years
lines.ko: 저 천사 기쁜 노래를 또 다시 부르니
lines.id: Ketika, dengan tahun-tahun yang terus berputar,

lines.en: Comes round the age of gold;
lines.ko: 온 세상 사는 사람들 다 화답 하도다
lines.id: Tibalah zaman emas

lines.en: When peace shall over all the earth
lines.id: Ketika perdamaian meliputi seluruh bumi

lines.en: Its ancient splendors fling,
lines.id: Kemegahan kunonya melayang,

lines.en: And the whole world give back the song
lines.id: Dan seluruh dunia mengembalikan lagu tersebut

lines.en: Which now the angels sing.
lines.id: Yang kini dinyanyikan para malaikat.

title_id: Itu terjadi pada tengah malam yang cerah

title_en: O Little Town of Bethlehem

lines.en: O little town of Bethlehem,
lines.ko: 오 베들레헴 작은 골 너 잠들었느냐
lines.id: Wahai kota kecil beth-le-hem,

lines.en: How still we see thee lie;
lines.id: Betapa masih kami melihatmu berbohong

lines.en: Above thy deep and dreamless sleep
lines.ko: 저 놀라운 빛 지금 캄캄한 이 밤에
lines.id: Di atas tidurmu yang nyenyak dan tanpa mimpi

lines.en: The silent stars go by:
lines.ko: 온 하늘 두루 비춘 줄 너 어찌 모르나
lines.id: Bintang-bintang yang diam berlalu:

lines.en: Yet in thy dark streets shineth
lines.id: Namun di jalananmu yang gelap bersinar

lines.en: The everlasting light;
lines.id: Cahaya yang abadi

lines.en: The hopes and fears of all the years
lines.id: Harapan dan ketakutan selama bertahun-tahun

lines.en: Are met in thee tonight.
lines.id: Bertemu denganmu malam ini.

lines.en: For Christ is born of Mary;
lines.ko: 온 세상 모든 사람들 잠자는 동안에
lines.id: Karena Kristus lahir dari Maria

lines.en: And gathered all above,
lines.id: Dan mengumpulkan semuanya,

lines.en: While mortals sleep, the angels keep
lines.ko: 저 새벽별이 홀로 그 일을 아는 듯
lines.id: Saat manusia tidur, para malaikat tetap terjaga

lines.en: Their watch of wondering love.
lines.ko: 밤새껏 귀한 그 일을 말없이 지켰네
lines.id: Jam tangan cinta mereka yang tak terkalahkan.

lines.en: O morning stars together
lines.id: Wahai bintang pagi, bersama-sama

lines.en: Proclaim the holy birth;
lines.id: Proklamasikan kelahiran suci

lines.en: And praises sing to God the King,
lines.id: Dan pujian bernyanyi untuk Tuhan Raja,

lines.en: And peace to men on earth.
lines.id: Dan kedamaian bagi manusia di bumi.

lines.en: How silently, how silently
lines.ko: 오 놀라우신 하나님 큰 선물 주시니
lines.id: Betapa diam-diamnya, betapa diam-diamnya

lines.en: The wondrous gift is given!
lines.ko: 주 믿는 사람 마음에 큰 은혜 받도다
lines.id: Hadiah yang menakjubkan telah diberikan!

lines.en: So God imparts to human hearts
lines.ko: 이 죄악 세상 사람 주 오심 모르나
lines.id: Maka Allah memberi bagian pada hati manusia

lines.en: The blessings of his heav'n.
lines.ko: 주 영접하는 사람들 그 맘에 오시네
lines.id: Berkah dari surga-Nya.

lines.en: No ear may hear his coming,
lines.id: Tidak ada telinga yang dapat mendengar kedatangan-Nya,

lines.en: But in this world of sin,
lines.id: Namun di dunia yang penuh dosa ini,

lines.en: Where meek souls will receive him still,
lines.id: Dimana jiwa-jiwa yang lemah lembut akan tetap menerima Dia,

lines.en: The dear Christ enters in.
lines.id: Kristus yang terkasih masuk.

lines.en: O holy Child of Bethlehem,
lines.ko: 오 베들레헴 예수님 내 맘에 오셔서
lines.id: Wahai Anak Suci Betlehem!

lines.en: Descend to us, we pray;
lines.ko: 내 죄를 모두 사하고 늘 함께 하소서
lines.id: Turunlah kepada kami, kami berdoa

lines.en: Cast out our sin, and enter in,
lines.ko: 저 천사들의 소식 나 기뻐 들으니
lines.id: Buanglah dosa kita, dan masuklah

lines.en: Be born in us today.
lines.ko: 오 임마누엘 예수님 내 맘에 오소서 아멘
lines.id: Lahirlah di dalam diri kami hari ini.

lines.en: We hear the Christmas angels
lines.id: Kita mendengar malaikat Natal

lines.en: The great glad tidings tell;
lines.id: Berita gembira menceritakannya

lines.en: O come to us, abide with us,
lines.id: O datanglah kepada kami, tinggallah bersama kami,

lines.en: Our Lord Emmanuel.
lines.id: Tuhan kami Em-man-u-el.

title_en: O Little Town of Bethlehem

lines.en: O little town of Bethlehem,
lines.ko: 오 베들레헴 작은 골 너 잠들었느냐
lines.id: Wahai kota kecil beth-le-hem,

lines.en: How still we see thee lie;
lines.id: Betapa masih kami melihatmu berbohong

lines.en: Above thy deep and dreamless sleep
lines.ko: 저 놀라운 빛 지금 캄캄한 이 밤에
lines.id: Di atas tidurmu yang nyenyak dan tanpa mimpi

lines.en: The silent stars go by:
lines.ko: 온 하늘 두루 비춘 줄 너 어찌 모르나
lines.id: Bintang-bintang yang diam berlalu:

lines.en: Yet in thy dark streets shineth
lines.id: Namun di jalananmu yang gelap bersinar

lines.en: The everlasting light;
lines.id: Cahaya yang abadi

lines.en: The hopes and fears of all the years
lines.id: Harapan dan ketakutan selama bertahun-tahun

lines.en: Are met in thee tonight.
lines.id: Bertemu denganmu malam ini.

lines.en: For Christ is born of Mary;
lines.ko: 온 세상 모든 사람들 잠자는 동안에
lines.id: Karena Kristus lahir dari Maria

lines.en: And gathered all above,
lines.id: Dan mengumpulkan semuanya,

lines.en: While mortals sleep, the angels keep
lines.ko: 저 새벽별이 홀로 그 일을 아는 듯
lines.id: Saat manusia tidur, para malaikat tetap terjaga

lines.en: Their watch of wondering love.
lines.ko: 밤새껏 귀한 그 일을 말없이 지켰네
lines.id: Jam tangan cinta mereka yang tak terkalahkan.

lines.en: O morning stars together
lines.id: Wahai bintang pagi, bersama-sama

lines.en: Proclaim the holy birth;
lines.id: Proklamasikan kelahiran suci

lines.en: And praises sing to God the King,
lines.id: Dan pujian bernyanyi untuk Tuhan Raja,

lines.en: And peace to men on earth.
lines.id: Dan kedamaian bagi manusia di bumi.

lines.en: How silently, how silently
lines.ko: 오 놀라우신 하나님 큰 선물 주시니
lines.id: Betapa diam-diamnya, betapa diam-diamnya

lines.en: The wondrous gift is given!
lines.ko: 주 믿는 사람 마음에 큰 은혜 받도다
lines.id: Hadiah yang menakjubkan telah diberikan!

lines.en: So God imparts to human hearts
lines.ko: 이 죄악 세상 사람 주 오심 모르나
lines.id: Maka Allah memberi bagian pada hati manusia

lines.en: The blessings of his heav'n.
lines.ko: 주 영접하는 사람들 그 맘에 오시네
lines.id: Berkah dari surga-Nya.

lines.en: No ear may hear his coming,
lines.id: Tidak ada telinga yang dapat mendengar kedatangan-Nya,

lines.en: But in this world of sin,
lines.id: Namun di dunia yang penuh dosa ini,

lines.en: Where meek souls will receive him still,
lines.id: Dimana jiwa-jiwa yang lemah lembut akan tetap menerima Dia,

lines.en: The dear Christ enters in.
lines.id: Kristus yang terkasih masuk.

lines.en: O holy Child of Bethlehem,
lines.ko: 오 베들레헴 예수님 내 맘에 오셔서
lines.id: Wahai Anak Suci Betlehem!

lines.en: Descend to us, we pray;
lines.ko: 내 죄를 모두 사하고 늘 함께 하소서
lines.id: Turunlah kepada kami, kami berdoa

lines.en: Cast out our sin, and enter in,
lines.ko: 저 천사들의 소식 나 기뻐 들으니
lines.id: Buanglah dosa kita, dan masuklah

lines.en: Be born in us today.
lines.ko: 오 임마누엘 예수님 내 맘에 오소서 아멘
lines.id: Lahirlah di dalam diri kami hari ini.

lines.en: We hear the Christmas angels
lines.id: Kita mendengar malaikat Natal

lines.en: The great glad tidings tell;
lines.id: Berita gembira menceritakannya

lines.en: O come to us, abide with us,
lines.id: O datanglah kepada kami, tinggallah bersama kami,

lines.en: Our Lord Emmanuel.
lines.id: Tuhan kami Em-man-u-el.

title_en: Hark! The Herald Angels Sing

lines.en: Hark! the herald angels sing,
lines.id: Mendengar! malaikat-malaikatnya bernyanyi,

lines.en: "Glory to the newborn King:
lines.ko: 영광 돌려 보내세 구주 오늘 나셨네
lines.id: “Kemuliaan bagi Raja yang baru lahir

lines.en: Peace on earth, and mercy mild,
lines.ko: 크고 작은 나라들 기뻐 화답 하여라
lines.id: Damai di bumi, dan belas kasihan yang lembut,

lines.en: God and sinners reconciled!"
lines.ko: 영광 받을 왕의 왕 베들레헴 나신 주
lines.id: Tuhan dan orang-orang berdosa berdamai!”

lines.en: Joyful, all ye nations, rise,
lines.ko: 영광 받을 왕의 왕 베들레헴 나신 주
lines.id: Penuh sukacita, hai bangsa-bangsa, bangkitlah,

lines.en: Join the triumph of the skies;
lines.id: Bergabunglah dengan kemenangan di angkasa

lines.en: With th'angelic host proclaim,
lines.id: Dengan pro-klaim tuan rumah malaikat,

lines.en: "Christ is born in Bethlehem!"
lines.id: "Kristus lahir di Betlehem!"
Mendengar! malaikat-malaikatnya bernyanyi,
"Kemuliaan bagi Raja yang baru lahir"

lines.en: Hark! the herald angels sing,
lines.id: Kristus, yang dipuja oleh surga tertinggi,

lines.en: "Glory to the newborn King."
lines.ko: 처녀 몸에 나셔서 사람 몸을 입었네
lines.id: Kristus, Tuhan yang kekal!
Di kemudian hari, lihatlah Dia datang,

lines.ko: 영광 돌려 보내며 높이 찬양 하여라
lines.id: Keturunan dari rahim Perawan.

lines.ko: 영광 돌려 보내며 높이 찬양 하여라
lines.id: Terselubung dalam daging, kepala Tuhan melihatnya
Salam kepada Dewa yang Menjelma
Senang seperti manusia dengan laki-laki untuk tinggal,
Ya Tuhan, Em-man-u-el kami.
Mendengar! malaikat-malaikatnya bernyanyi,
"Kemuliaan bagi Raja yang baru lahir"

lines.en: Christ, by highest heav'n adored,
lines.id: Salam Pangeran Perdamaian yang dilahirkan di surga!

lines.en: Christ, the everlasting Lord!
lines.ko: 세상 빛이 되시며 우리 생명 되시네
lines.id: Salam Matahari Kebenaran!

lines.en: Late in time behold him come,
lines.id: Terang dan hidup bagi semua yang Dia bawakan,

lines.en: Offspring of the Virgin's womb.
lines.id: Bangkit dengan kesembuhan di sayap-Nya.

lines.en: Veiled in flesh the Godhead see;
lines.ko: 영생하게 하시니 왕께 찬양 하여라 아멘
lines.id: Dengan lembut Dia memberikan kemuliaan-Nya,

lines.en: Hail th'incarnate Deity,
lines.id: Terlahir sebagai orang yang tidak akan mati lagi,

lines.en: Pleased as man with men to dwell,
lines.id: Lahir untuk membesarkan putra-putra bumi,

lines.en: Jesus, our Emmanuel.
lines.id: Lahir untuk memberi mereka kelahiran kedua.
Mendengar! malaikat-malaikatnya bernyanyi,
"Kemuliaan bagi Raja yang baru lahir" A-men.

lines.en: Hail, the heav'n-born Prince of Peace!
Hail, the Sun of Righteousness!
Light and life to all he brings,
Ris'n with healing in his wings.
Mild he lays his glory by,
Born that man no more may die,
Born to raise the sons of earth,
Born to give them second birth.

title_en: Away in a Manger

lines.en: Away in a manger, no crib for a bed,
lines.ko: 그 어린 주 예수 눌 자리 없어
lines.id: Jauh di dalam palungan, Tidak ada tempat tidur bayi untuk tempat tidur,

lines.en: The little Lord Jesus laid down his sweet head;
lines.id: Tuhan Yesus yang kecil Meletakkan kepala-Nya yang manis.

lines.en: The stars in the sky looked down where he lay,
lines.id: Bintang-bintang di langit Melihat ke bawah di mana Dia berbaring,

lines.en: The little Lord Jesus, asleep on the hay.
lines.ko: 그 어린 주 예수 꼴 위에 자네
lines.id: Tuhan Yesus yang kecil, tidurlah di atas jerami.

lines.en: The cattle are lowing, the Baby awakes,
lines.id: Ternak sedang merendah. Ba-by yang malang terbangun,

lines.en: But little Lord Jesus no crying he makes;
lines.id: Taruhan kecil Tuhan Yesus, Dia tidak menangis,

lines.en: I love thee, Lord Jesus! look down from the sky,
lines.id: Aku cinta padaMu, Tuhan Yesus! Lihat ke bawah dari langit,

lines.en: And stay by my cradle, till morning is nigh.
lines.id: Dan tetaplah di buaianku Untuk menonton lul-la-by.

lines.en: Be near me, Lord Jesus, I ask thee to stay
lines.ko: 주 예수 내 곁에 가까이 계셔
lines.id: Beradalah di dekatku, Tuhan Yesus, aku mohon kepada-Mu untuk tinggal

lines.en: Close by me for ever, and love me, I pray;
lines.id: Dekat denganku selamanya, Dan cintai aku, aku berdoa.

lines.en: Bless all the dear children in thy tender care,
lines.ko: 온 세상 아기들 다 품어 주사
lines.id: Memberkati semua anak-anak terkasih Dalam perawatan lembut-Mu,

lines.en: And fit us for heaven, to live with thee there.
lines.ko: 주 품 안에 안겨 살게 하소서 아멘
lines.id: Dan bawalah kami ke surga, Untuk tinggal bersamaMu di sana.
