lines.en: Away in a manger, no crib for a bed,
lines.ko: 그 어린 주 예수 눌 자리 없어
lines.id: Jauh di dalam palungan, Tidak ada tempat tidur bayi untuk tempat tidur,

lines.en: The little Lord Jesus laid down his sweet head;
lines.id: Tuhan Yesus yang kecil Meletakkan kepala-Nya yang manis.

lines.en: The stars in the sky looked down where he lay,
lines.id: Bintang-bintang di langit Melihat ke bawah di mana Dia berbaring,

lines.en: The little Lord Jesus, asleep on the hay.
lines.ko: 그 어린 주 예수 꼴 위에 자네
lines.id: Tuhan Yesus yang kecil, tidurlah di atas jerami.

lines.en: The cattle are lowing, the Baby awakes,
lines.id: Ternak sedang merendah. Ba-by yang malang terbangun,

lines.en: But little Lord Jesus no crying he makes;
lines.id: Taruhan kecil Tuhan Yesus, Dia tidak menangis,

lines.en: I love thee, Lord Jesus! look down from the sky,
lines.id: Aku cinta padaMu, Tuhan Yesus! Lihat ke bawah dari langit,

lines.en: And stay by my cradle, till morning is nigh.
lines.id: Dan tetaplah di buaianku Untuk menonton lul-la-by.

lines.en: Be near me, Lord Jesus, I ask thee to stay
lines.ko: 주 예수 내 곁에 가까이 계셔
lines.id: Beradalah di dekatku, Tuhan Yesus, aku mohon kepada-Mu untuk tinggal

lines.en: Close by me for ever, and love me, I pray;
lines.id: Dekat denganku selamanya, Dan cintai aku, aku berdoa.

lines.en: Bless all the dear children in thy tender care,
lines.ko: 온 세상 아기들 다 품어 주사
lines.id: Memberkati semua anak-anak terkasih Dalam perawatan lembut-Mu,

lines.en: And fit us for heaven, to live with thee there.
lines.ko: 주 품 안에 안겨 살게 하소서 아멘
lines.id: Dan bawalah kami ke surga, Untuk tinggal bersamaMu di sana.

title_en: Brightest and Best of the Sons of the Morning
title_ko: 아침의 아들 중 가장 밝고 최고의 (자체번역)

lines.en: Brightest and best of the sons of the morning,
lines.ko: 아침의 아들들 중 가장 밝고 훌륭하며,

lines.en: Dawn on our darkness, and lend us thine aid;
lines.ko: 우리의 어둠이여, 우리에게 당신의 도움을 빌려주십시오.

lines.en: Star of the East, the horizon adorning,
Guide where our infant Redeemer is laid.
lines.ko: 우리의 아기 구세주가 누워 있는 곳을 안내해 주십시오.

lines.en: Cold on his cradle the dewdrops are shining;
lines.ko: 그의 요람 위에서는 이슬방울이 차갑게 빛나고 있다.

lines.en: Low lies his head with the beasts of the stall;
lines.ko: 그의 머리는 마구간의 짐승들과 함께 낮게 누워 있습니다.

lines.en: Angels adore him in slumber reclining,
lines.ko: 천사들은 기대어 잠들어 있는 그를 경배합니다.

lines.en: Maker and Monarch, and Lord over all.
lines.ko: 창조주이시며 군주이시며 모든 것 위에 계신 주님이십니다.

lines.en: Say, shall we yield him, in costly devotion,
lines.ko: 말하라, 우리가 값비싼 헌신으로 그를 양보할 것인가?

lines.en: Odours of Edom, and offerings divine,
Gems of the mountain and pearls of the ocean,
Myrrh from the forest or gold from the mine?
Vainly we offer each ample oblation,
lines.ko: 헛되이 우리는 각각의 풍성한 헌금을 바칩니다.

lines.en: Vainly with gifts would his favor secure;
lines.ko: 헛되이 선물을 주면 그의 호의를 얻을 수 있을 것이다.

lines.en: Richer by far is the heart's adoration;
Dearer to God are the prayers of the poor.
lines.ko: 하느님께는 가난한 이들의 기도가 더 소중합니다.

lines.en: Brightest and best of the sons of the morning,
lines.ko: 아침의 아들들 중 가장 밝고 훌륭하며,

lines.en: Dawn on our darkness, and lend us thine aid;
lines.ko: 우리의 어둠이여, 우리에게 당신의 도움을 빌려주십시오.

lines.en: Star of the East, the horizon adorning,
Guide where our infant Redeemer is laid.
lines.ko: 우리의 아기 구세주가 누워 있는 곳을 안내해 주십시오.

title_en: Good Christian Men, Rejoice

lines.en: Good Christian men, rejoice,
With heart, and soul, and voice;
Give ye heed to what we say:
Jesus Christ is born today;
Earth and heav'n before him bow,
And he is in the manger now.
Christ is born today!
Good Christian men, rejoice,
With heart, and soul, and voice;
Now ye hear of endless bliss:
lines.ko: 이제 당신은 끝없는 행복에 대해 듣습니다.

lines.en: Jesus Christ was born for this!
He hath op'ed the heavenly door,
And man is blessed evermore.
Christ was born for this!
Good Christian men, rejoice,
With heart, and soul, and voice;
Now ye need not fear the grave:
lines.ko: 이제 너희는 무덤을 두려워할 필요가 없느니라.

lines.en: Jesus Christ was born to save!
Calls you one and calls you all
To gain his everlasting hall.
Christ was born to save!

title_en: O Come, All Ye Faithful

lines.en: O come, all ye faithful,
lines.ko: 참 반가운 성도여 다 이리 와서
lines.id: Hai, datanglah kalian semua yang setia, penuh kegembiraan, dan penuh kemenangan,

lines.en: Joyful and triumphant,
lines.id: Ayolah, ayolah kamu ke Beth-le-hem!

lines.en: O come ye, O come ye to Bethlehem;
lines.id: Datang dan lihatlah Dia, terlahir sebagai Raja para malaikat!

lines.en: Come and behold him
lines.id: O ayo, mari kita memuja Dia, ayo, mari kita memuja Dia,

lines.en: Born the King of angels;
lines.id: Ayolah, marilah kita memuja Dia, Kristus Tuhan!

lines.en: O come, let us adore him,
lines.id: Wahai Bernyanyilah, paduan suara para malaikat, bernyanyilah dalam ex-ul-ta-tion,

lines.en: O come, let us adore him,
lines.id: O bernyanyilah, kalian semua penghuni surga yang cemerlang!

lines.en: O come, let us adore him,
lines.ko: 주 하나님 앞에 늘 영광을 돌려
lines.id: Kemuliaan bagi Tuhan, segala kemuliaan di tempat yang maha tinggi!

lines.en: Christ the Lord.
lines.id: O ayo, mari kita memuja Dia, ayo, mari kita memuja Dia,
Ayolah, marilah kita memuja Dia, Kristus Tuhan!

lines.en: God of God, Light of Light;
lines.id: Demi Tuhan dari Tuhan yang benar, Penebus Ilahi dunia ini,

lines.en: Lo, he abhors not the Virgin's womb:
lines.id: Dalam kasih karunia merendahkan diri menjadi manusia sejati,

lines.en: Very God, Begotten, not created;
lines.id: Tidak akan melepaskan rahim perawan, yang manis dan rendah hati
O ayo, mari kita memuja Dia, ayo, mari kita memuja Dia,
Ayolah, marilah kita memuja Dia, Kristus Tuhan!

lines.en: Sing, choirs of angels;
lines.id: Ya Tuhan, kami menyambut Engkau, lahir pagi yang bahagia ini,

lines.en: Sing in exultation,
lines.id: Ya Yesus, bagi-Mu segala kemuliaan diberikan

lines.en: Sing, all ye citizens of heaven above;
lines.ko: 늘 감사한 찬송을 주 앞에 드려
lines.id: Sabda Bapa, kini menampakkan diri dalam wujud manusia!

lines.en: Glory to God in the highest;
lines.id: O ayo, mari kita memuja Dia, ayo, mari kita memuja Dia,
Ayolah, marilah kita memuja Dia, Kristus Tuhan!

lines.en: Yea, Lord, we greet thee,
Born this happy morning:
Jesus, to thee be glory given;
Word of the Father,
Late in flesh appearing;

title_id: O Ayo, Kalian Semua yang Setia

title_en: Christians, Awake, Salute the Happy Morn
title_ko: 그리스도인들이여, 깨어나서 행복한 아침에 경의를 표하십시오 (자체번역)

lines.en: [English lyrics not available in the database for this revised hymn]
lines.ko: [이 개정된 찬송가의 데이터베이스에는 영어 가사가 없습니다.]

title_en: Silent Night! Holy Night!

lines.en: Silent night! Holy night!
lines.ko: 고요한 밤 거룩한 밤 어둠에 묻힌 밤
lines.id: Malam sunyi, malam suci,

lines.en: All is calm, all is bright
lines.ko: 주의 부모 앉아서 감사기도 드릴 때
lines.id: Semuanya tenang, semuanya cerah

lines.en: Round yon virgin mother and Child.
lines.ko: 아기 잘도 잔다 아기 잘도 잔다
lines.id: Disekelilingmu Ibu dan Anak Perawan,

lines.en: Holy infant, so tender and mild,
lines.id: Ho-ly In-fant begitu lembut dan lembut,

lines.en: Sleep in heavenly peace.
lines.id: Tidurlah dalam kedamaian surgawi,
Tidurlah dalam kedamaian surgawi.

lines.en: Silent night! Holy night!
lines.ko: 고요한 밤 거룩한 밤 영원이 둘린 밤
lines.id: Malam sunyi, malam suci,

lines.en: Shepherds quake at the sight!
lines.ko: 천군 천사 나타나 기뻐 노래 불렀네
lines.id: Kegelapan berlalu, semuanya terang

lines.en: Glories stream from heav'n afar,
lines.id: Para penggembala mendengar para malaikat bernyanyi,

lines.en: Heavenly hosts sing: Alleluia,
lines.id: Al-le-lu-ia! Salam raja!

lines.en: Christ, the Saviour, is born!
lines.id: Kristus Juru Selamat telah lahir,
Kristus Juru Selamat telah lahir!

lines.en: Silent night! Holy night!
lines.ko: 고요한 밤 거룩한 밤 동방의 박사들
lines.id: Malam sunyi, malam suci,

lines.en: Son of God, love's pure light
lines.ko: 별을 보고 찾아와 끊어 경배 드렸네
lines.id: Bintang penuntun, pinjamkan cahayamu

lines.en: Radiant beams from thy holy face,
lines.id: Lihat apa yang dibawa oleh orang bijak dari Timur

lines.en: With the dawn of redeeming grace,
lines.id: Hadiah dan penghormatan kepada raja kita!

lines.en: Jesus, Lord at thy birth.
lines.id: Kristus Juru Selamat telah lahir,
Kristus Juru Selamat telah lahir.

lines.ko: 고요한 밤 거룩한 밤 주 예수 나신 밤
lines.id: Malam sunyi, malam suci,

lines.ko: 그의 얼굴 광채가 세상 빛이 되었네
lines.id: Anak Tuhan, cahaya cinta yang murni,
Sinar-sinar cemerlang dari wajah-Mu yang kudus,
Dengan fajar peninjauan kembali anugerah,
Yesus, Tuhan, pada saat kelahiran-Mu,
Yesus, Tuhan, pada saat kelahiran-Mu. Amin.

title_en: God Rest You Merry, Gentlemen

lines.en: God rest you merry, gentlemen,
lines.id: Tuhan mengistirahatkanmu, tuan-tuan,

lines.en: Let nothing you dismay,
lines.id: Jangan biarkan apa pun yang membuat Anda kecewa,

lines.en: Remember Christ our Saviour
lines.id: Kembalikan Kristus Juruselamat kita

lines.en: Was born on Christmas day,
lines.ko: 오 기쁘다 반가운 소식 주 오셨네
lines.id: Lahir pada Hari Natal

lines.en: To save us all from Satan's power
lines.id: Untuk menyelamatkan kita semua dari kekuatan Setan

lines.en: When we were gone astray;
lines.id: Saat kami tersesat.
Wahai kabar kenyamanan dan kegembiraan, Kenyamanan dan kegembiraan
Wahai kabar kenyamanan dan kegembiraan!

lines.en: O tidings of comfort and joy, comfort and joy,
lines.id: Dari Tuhan, Bapa Surgawi kita

lines.en: O tidings of comfort and joy, comfort and joy.
lines.ko: 그 전한 기쁜 소식은 이 세상 구원할
lines.id: Malaikat yang diberkati datang
Dan kepada para penggembala tertentu

lines.ko: 오 기쁘다 반가운 소식 주 오셨네
lines.id: Membawa kabar yang sama
Bagaimana hal itu lahir di Beth-le-hem
Nama Anak Allah.
Wahai kabar kenyamanan dan kegembiraan, Kenyamanan dan kegembiraan
Wahai kabar kenyamanan dan kegembiraan!

lines.en: From God our heav'nly Father,
lines.ko: 그 천사들이 전한 말 무서워 말아라
lines.id: “Kalau begitu, jangan takut,” kata malaikat itu,

lines.en: A blessed angel came;
lines.id: “Jangan biarkan apa pun membuatmu takut,

lines.en: And unto certain shepherds
lines.ko: 저 하늘에 영광 영광 땅에는 평화라
lines.id: Hari ini lahirlah Juruselamat

lines.en: Brought tidings of the same:
lines.ko: 오 기쁘다 반가운 소식 주 오셨네
lines.id: Dari seorang Perawan murni yang cerah,

lines.en: How that in Bethlehem was born
lines.id: Untuk membebaskan semua orang yang percaya kepada-Nya

lines.en: The son of God by name.
lines.id: Dari kekuatan dan keperkasaan Setan."
Wahai kabar kenyamanan dan kegembiraan, Kenyamanan dan kegembiraan
Wahai kabar kenyamanan dan kegembiraan!

lines.en: 'Fear not then,' said the angel,
'Let nothing you affright,
This day is born a Saviour
Of a pure virgin bright,
To free all those who trust in him
From Satan's power and might.'
The shepherds at those tidings
Rejoiced much in mind,
And left their flocks afeeding,
In tempest, storm, and wind:
And went to Bethlehem straightway,
The Son of God to find.

alt_titles: O tidings of comfort and joy, comfort and joy

lines.id: Kami semua datang kepada Tuhan, Raja kami, dan mengikuti para malaikat
Mari kita semua berkumpul dan menyembah Yesus muda.

lines.ko: 주 예수 탄생하시니 참 기쁜 소식이라
lines.id: Merupakan kabar baik bahwa Tuhan Yesus telah lahir.

lines.ko: 왕 되신 주님께 다 나와 천사 따라서
lines.id: Kami semua datang kepada Tuhan, Raja kami, dan mengikuti para malaikat
Mari kita semua berkumpul dan menyembah Yesus muda.

lines.ko: 저 황금 유향 몰약을 다 주께 드리어서
lines.id: Semua kemenyan emas dan mur itu kupersembahkan kepada Tuhan.

lines.ko: 만왕의 왕 된 구세주 늘 함께 경배하세
lines.id: Mari kita selalu beribadah bersama, Juruselamat yang adalah Raja segala raja

lines.ko: 왕 되신 주님께 다 나와 천사 따라서
lines.id: Kami semua datang kepada Tuhan, Raja kami, dan mengikuti para malaikat
Mari kita semua berkumpul dan menyembah Yesus muda.

title_en: Angels We Have Heard on High

lines.en: An-gels we have heard on high,
lines.id: Malaikat-malaikat yang telah kami dengar di tempat tinggi,

lines.en: Sweet-ly sing-ing o'er the plains,
lines.id: Bernyanyi manis di dataran,

lines.en: And the moun-tains in re-ply
lines.id: Dan pegunungan di baliknya

lines.en: Ech-o back their joy-ous strains.

lines.en: Glo-ri-a in ex-cel-sis De-o

lines.en: Why your joy-ous strains pro-long
lines.id: Mengapa kegembiraanmu berlangsung lama

lines.en: Say what may the ti-dings be,
lines.id: Katakan kabar apa yang mungkin terjadi,

lines.en: Which in-spire your heav'n-ly song.
lines.id: Yang menginspirasi lagu surgawi Anda.

lines.en: Glo-ri-a in ex-cel-sis De-o

lines.en: Glo-ri-a in ex-cel-sis De-o
lines.id: Glo-ri-a di ex-cel-sis De-o

lines.en: Come to Beth-le-hem, and see,
lines.id: Datanglah ke Beth-le-hem dan lihatlah,

lines.en: Him whose birth the an-gels sing
lines.id: Dia yang kelahirannya dinyanyikan oleh para malaikat

lines.en: Come a-dore on bend-ed knee,
lines.id: Ayo dore dengan lutut tertekuk,

lines.en: The Infant Christ, the new-born King.

lines.id: Yesus, Tuhan langit dan bumi!

title_id: Malaikat yang Telah Kami Dengar Di Tempat Tinggi

title_en: While by the Sheep We Watched at Night

lines.en: [English lyrics not available in the database for this revised hymn]
lines.ko: [이 개정된 찬송가의 데이터베이스에는 영어 가사가 없습니다.]

title_en: Infant Holy, Infant Lowly

lines.id: Tuhan kita yang kudus lahir di sebuah kandang

lines.ko: 가축들이 잠든 때에 우리 주님 나셨네
lines.id: Saat ternak tertidur, Tuhan kita lahir

lines.ko: 천사들이 찬양하네 노엘 노엘 기쁜 소식
lines.id: Malaikat memuji Kabar Baik Noel Noel
Yesus Juru Selamat telah lahir
Para penggembala menjaga dombanya yang tertidur sampai pagi.

lines.ko: 영광 중에 탄생하신 기쁜 소식 들었네
lines.id: Saya mendengar kabar baik bahwa Anda dilahirkan dalam kemuliaan.

lines.ko: 목자들이 감격 하여 찬양 찬양 찬송하네
lines.id: Para gembala begitu tergerak sehingga mereka memuji, memuji, memuji.
Yesus Juru Selamat telah lahir

title_en: All My Heart This Night Rejoices
title_ko: 이 밤 내 온 마음이 기뻐하도다 (자체번역)

lines.en: All my heart this night rejoices
lines.ko: 이 밤 내 마음은 모두 기뻐

lines.en: As I hear
Far and near
Sweetest angel voices.
"Christ is born," their choirs are singing
Till the air
Everywhere
Now with joy is ringing.
Forth today the Conqueror goeth,
Who the foe,
Sin and woe,
Death and hell, o'erthroweth.
God is man, man to deliver;
His dear Son
Now is one
With our blood forever.
Shall we still dread God's displeasure,
lines.ko: 우리는 여전히 하나님의 불쾌하심을 두려워해야 합니까?

lines.en: Who, to save,
Freely gave
His most cherished treasure?
To redeem us, he hath given
lines.ko: 우리를 구속하시기 위하여 하나님께서 우리를 구원하셨으니

lines.en: His own Son
From the throne
Of his might in heaven.
He becomes the Lamb that taketh
Sin away
And for aye
Full atonement maketh.
For our life his own he tenders;
lines.ko: 우리의 생명을 위해 그분은 자신의 생명을 돌보십니다.

lines.en: And our race,
By his grace,
Meet for glory renders.
Hark! a voice from yonder manger,
Soft and sweet,
Doth entreat:
"Flee from woe and danger,
Brethren, from all ills that grieve you
lines.ko: 형제들이여, 여러분을 슬프게 하는 모든 질병으로부터

lines.en: You are freed;
All you need
I will surely give you."
Come, then, banish all your sadness,
lines.ko: 자, 그럼 당신의 모든 슬픔을 없애십시오.

lines.en: One and all,
Great and small;
Come with songs of gladness.
Love him who with love is glowing;
Hail the star,
Near and far
Light and joy bestowing.
Dearest Lord, thee will I cherish.
Though my breath
Fail in death,
Yet I shall not perish,
But with thee abide for ever
There on high,
In that joy
Which can vanish never.

title_en: Angels, from the Realms of Glory

lines.en: Angels, from the realms of glory,
lines.ko: 영광 나라 천사들아 땅 끝까지 날면서
lines.id: Para malaikat, dari alam kemuliaan,

lines.en: Wing your flight o'er all the earth;
lines.id: Terbangkan penerbanganmu ke seluruh bumi

lines.en: Ye who sang creation's story,
lines.id: Kamu yang menyanyikan kisah penciptaan,

lines.en: Now proclaim Messiah's birth;
lines.id: Sekarang nyatakan kelahiran Messi-si-ah:
Datang dan beribadah, datang dan beribadah,
Sembahlah Kristus, Raja yang baru lahir.

lines.en: Come and worship, come and worship,
lines.ko: 들에 있던 목자들이 밤에 양떼 지킬 때
lines.id: Para penggembala, di ladang sedang menawar,

lines.en: Worship Christ, the newborn King.
lines.id: Mengawasi kawanan ternakmu di malam hari,
Tuhan bersama manusia kini memihak,
Di sana menyinari Cahaya bayi:
Datang dan beribadah, datang dan beribadah,
Sembahlah Kristus, Raja yang baru lahir.

lines.en: Shepherds in the fields abiding,
lines.id: Sa-ges, tinggalkan kontemplasimu,

lines.en: Watching o'er your flocks by night,
lines.ko: 구주 예수 나신 것을 널리 증거 하였네
lines.id: Penglihatan yang lebih terang terpancar jauh

lines.en: God with man is now residing,
lines.id: Carilah keinginan besar bangsa-bangsa,

lines.en: Yonder shines the infant light:
lines.id: Kamu telah melihat bintang kelahiran-Nya:
Datang dan beribadah, datang dan beribadah,
Sembahlah Kristus, Raja yang baru lahir.

lines.en: Sages, leave your contemplations,
lines.id: Para suci di depan altar yang membungkuk,

lines.en: Brighter visions beam afar;
lines.ko: 영광 중에 나타나신 주의 얼굴 뵈었네
lines.id: Menonton lama dalam harapan dan ketakutan,

lines.en: Seek the great Desire of nations;
lines.id: Tiba-tiba Tuhan turun,

lines.en: Ye have seen his natal star:
lines.id: Di kuil-Nya akan muncul:
Datang dan beribadah, datang dan beribadah,
Sembahlah Kristus, Raja yang baru lahir.

lines.en: Saints before the altar bending,
lines.id: Semua ciptaan, ikut memuji

lines.en: Watching long in hope and fear,
lines.ko: 우리 모두 소리 높여 삼위 일체 찬양해
lines.id: Tuhan, Bapa, Roh, Putra,

lines.en: Suddenly the Lord, descending,
lines.ko: 경배하세 경배하세 나신 왕께 절하세 아멘
lines.id: Semakin meninggikan suara Anda

lines.en: In his temple shall appear;
lines.id: Menuju Tiga dalam Satu yang abadi.
Datang dan beribadah, datang dan beribadah,
Sembahlah Kristus, Raja yang baru lahir.

lines.en: All creation, join in praising
God the Father, Spirit, Son;
Evermore your voices raising
To th'eternal Three in One:

title_en: All Praise to Thee, Eternal Lord
title_ko: 영원하신 주님, 당신께 모든 찬양을 드립니다 (자체번역)

lines.en: All praise to thee, Eternal Lord,
lines.ko: 영원하신 주님, 당신께 모든 찬미를 드립니다.

lines.en: Clothed in a garb of flesh and blood;
Choosing a manger for thy throne,
While worlds on worlds are thine alone.
Once did the skies before thee bow;
lines.ko: 한때 당신이 절하기 전에 하늘이 그랬습니다.

lines.en: A Virgin's arms contain thee now:
lines.ko: 이제 처녀의 팔에 당신이 담겨 있습니다.

lines.en: Angels who did in thee rejoice
Now listen for thine infant voice.
A little Child, thou art our Guest,
That weary ones in thee may rest;
lines.ko: 네 안에 지친 자들이 쉬게 하소서.

lines.en: Forlorn and lowly is thy birth,
That we may rise to heav'n from earth.
lines.ko: 우리는 땅에서 천국으로 올라갈 수 있습니다.

lines.en: Thou comest in the darksome night
To make us children of the light,
To make us, in the realms divine,
Like thine own angels round thee shine.
lines.ko: 당신 주위에 있는 당신의 천사들처럼 빛나십시오.

lines.en: All this for us thy love hath done;
lines.ko: 당신의 사랑이 우리를 위해 이 모든 일을 해 주셨습니다.

lines.en: By this to thee our love is won:
For this we tune our cheerful lays,
lines.ko: 이를 위해 우리는 쾌활한 레이를 조정합니다.

lines.en: And shout our thanks in ceaseless praise.

title_en: From Heaven High I Come to You

lines.en: From heaven high I come to you,
lines.ko: 나는 하늘 높은 곳에서 당신에게 왔습니다.

lines.en: I bring you tidings good and new;
lines.ko: 나는 여러분에게 좋은 소식과 새로운 소식을 전합니다.

lines.en: Glad tidings of great joy I bring,
lines.ko: 내가 큰 기쁨의 기쁜 소식을 가져오노라.

lines.en: Whereof I now will say and sing:
lines.ko: 이제 나는 이에 대해 말하고 노래하겠습니다.

lines.en: To you this night is born a child
Of Mary, chosen virgin mild;
This little child, of lowly birth,
Shall be the joy of all the earth.
This is the Christ, our God and Lord,
Who in all need shall aid afford;
lines.ko: 도움이 필요한 사람은 누구에게 도움을 받을 수 있습니까?

lines.en: He will himself your Saviour be
lines.ko: 그분은 친히 당신의 구주가 되실 것입니다

lines.en: From all your sins to set you free.
lines.ko: 너희 모든 죄에서 너희를 자유케 하려 함이니라

lines.en: These are the tokens ye shall mark:
lines.ko: 너희가 표시해야 할 표는 다음과 같다.

lines.en: The swaddling-clothes and manger dark:
There ye shall find the Infant laid
lines.ko: 거기에 아기가 누워 있는 것을 보게 될 것이다

lines.en: By whom the heav'ns and earth were made.
Now let us all with gladsome cheer
lines.ko: 이제 우리 모두 즐거운 마음으로 응원합시다

lines.en: Go with the shepherds and draw near
To see the precious gift of God,
lines.ko: 하나님께서 주신 귀한 선물을 보기 위해

lines.en: Who hath his own dear Son bestowed.
Welcome to earth, thou noble Guest,
lines.ko: 고귀한 손님이여, 땅에 오신 것을 환영합니다.

lines.en: Through whom the sinful world is blest!
lines.ko: 죄 많은 세상이 그분을 통해 축복을 받습니다!

lines.en: In my distress thou com'st to me;
lines.ko: 내가 고난을 당할 때 당신은 나에게 오셨습니다.

lines.en: What thanks shall I return to thee?
lines.ko: 내가 당신께 어떤 감사를 드려야 합니까?

title_en: Lo, How a Rose E’er Blooming

lines.en: Lo, how a Rose e'er bloom-ing
lines.id: Lihatlah, betapa Bunga Mawar selalu mekar

lines.en: From ten-der stem hath sprung!
lines.id: Dari sepuluh batang telah bermunculan!

lines.ko: 한 추운 겨울 밤 주 탄생하신
lines.en: Of Je-se's lin-eage com-ing
lines.id: Tentang kedatangan garis keturunan Je-se

lines.en: As men of old have sung.
lines.id: Seperti yang dinyanyikan oleh orang-orang zaman dahulu.

lines.en: It came, a flower-et bright, A-mid the cold of win-ter,
lines.id: Datanglah, sekuntum bunga yang cerah, di tengah dinginnya musim dingin,

lines.en: When half spent was the night.
lines.id: Saat separuh dihabiskan adalah malam.

lines.en: I-sai-ah 't was fore-told it, The Rose I have in mind,
lines.id: I-sai-ah sudah diramalkan, Mawar yang ada dalam pikiranku,

lines.en: With Ma-ry we be-hold it, The Vir-gin Moth-er kind.
lines.id: Dengan Ma-ry kita melihatnya, Ibu Perawan yang baik hati.

lines.en: To show God's love a-right, She bore to men a Sav-iour,
lines.id: Untuk menunjukkan kasih Allah yang benar, Dia melahirkan Juruselamat bagi manusia,

lines.en: When half spent was the night.
lines.id: Saat separuh dihabiskan adalah malam.

lines.ko: 그 부드러운 향기 온 하늘 채우고
lines.en: This flower, whose fragrance ten-der
lines.id: Bunga ini, yang wanginya lembut

lines.ko: 그 영광 찬란한 빛 어둠을 쫓았다
lines.en: With sweet-ness fills the air,
lines.id: Dengan manisnya memenuhi udara,

lines.ko: 참 신과 참 사람 우리를 구하셨다
lines.en: Dis-pels with glo-rious splen-dor
lines.id: Menghilangkan dengan kemegahan yang agung

lines.en: The dark-ness eve-ry-where.
lines.id: Kegelapan dimana-mana.

lines.en: True Man, yet ver-y God, From sin and death He saves us
lines.id: Manusia Sejati, namun sungguh Tuhan, Dari dosa dan kematian Dia menyelamatkan kita

lines.en: And light-ens eve-ry load.
lines.id: Dan mencerahkan setiap beban.

title_en: While Shepherds Watched Their Flocks

lines.en: While shepherds watched their flocks by night,
All seated on the ground,
The angel of the Lord came down,
And glory shone around.
"Fear not," said hefor mighty dread
lines.ko: "두려워하지 마세요." 그는 엄청난 두려움에 떨면서 말했습니다.

lines.en: Had seized their troubled mind
"Glad tidings of great joy I bring
To you and all mankind.
"To you in David's town this day,
Is born of David's line,
The Saviour, who is Christ, the Lord,
And this shall be the sign.
"The heav'nly Babe you there shall find
lines.ko: "당신이 거기서 찾을 수 있는 하늘의 아기

lines.en: To human view displayed,
All meanly wrapped in swathing bands,
lines.ko: 모두 천으로 싸인 띠로 싸여 있고,

lines.en: And in a manger laid."
Thus spake the seraph, and forthwith
Appeared a shining throng
Of angels praising God, who thus
Addressed their joyful song:
lines.ko: 그들의 즐거운 노래에 대해 이렇게 말했습니다.

lines.en: "All glory be to God on high,
lines.ko: "모든 영광이 높은 곳에 계신 하나님께 있사옵나이다.

lines.en: And to the earth be peace:
Good will henceforth, from heav'n to men,
Begin and never cease!"

title_en: While Shepherds Watched Their Flocks

lines.en: While shepherds watched their flocks by night,
All seated on the ground,
The angel of the Lord came down,
And glory shone around.
"Fear not," said hefor mighty dread
lines.ko: "두려워하지 마세요." 그는 엄청난 두려움에 떨면서 말했습니다.

lines.en: Had seized their troubled mind
"Glad tidings of great joy I bring
To you and all mankind.
"To you in David's town this day,
Is born of David's line,
The Saviour, who is Christ, the Lord,
And this shall be the sign.
"The heav'nly Babe you there shall find
lines.ko: "당신이 거기서 찾을 수 있는 하늘의 아기

lines.en: To human view displayed,
All meanly wrapped in swathing bands,
lines.ko: 모두 천으로 싸인 띠로 싸여 있고,

lines.en: And in a manger laid."
Thus spake the seraph, and forthwith
Appeared a shining throng
Of angels praising God, who thus
Addressed their joyful song:
lines.ko: 그들의 즐거운 노래에 대해 이렇게 말했습니다.

lines.en: "All glory be to God on high,
lines.ko: "모든 영광이 높은 곳에 계신 하나님께 있사옵나이다.

lines.en: And to the earth be peace:
Good will henceforth, from heav'n to men,
Begin and never cease!"

title_en: Go, Tell It on the Mountain

lines.en: [English lyrics not available in the database for this revised hymn]
lines.ko: [이 개정된 찬송가의 데이터베이스에는 영어 가사가 없습니다.]

title_en: Once in Royal David’s City

lines.en: Once in royal David's city
lines.ko: 옛날 임금 다윗성에 낮은 마구 있더니
lines.id: Suatu ketika di kota kerajaan David-y

lines.en: Stood a lowly cattle shed,
lines.id: Berdiri di kandang ternak yang rendah,

lines.en: Where a mother laid her baby
lines.id: Dimana seorang ibu membaringkan bayinya

lines.en: In a manger for his bed:
lines.id: Di palungan untuk tempat tidur-Nya:

lines.en: Mary was that mother mild,
lines.id: Ma-ry adalah ibu yang lembut,

lines.en: Jesus Christ her little child.
lines.id: Yesus Kristus, anak kecilnya.

lines.en: He came down to earth from heaven
lines.id: Dia turun ke bumi dari surga-en

lines.en: Who is God and Lord of all,
lines.id: Siapakah Tuhan dan Tuhan atas segalanya,

lines.en: And his shelter was a stable,
lines.id: Dan tempat berlindung-Nya adalah sebuah kandang,

lines.en: And his cradle was a stall:
lines.id: Dan tempat lahirnya adalah sebuah kios:

lines.en: With the poor, and mean, and lowly,
lines.id: Dengan orang miskin, dan jahat, dan rendahan

lines.en: Lived on earth our Saviour holy.
lines.id: Tinggal di bumi, Juruselamat kita yang suci.

lines.en: And, through all his wondrous childhood
lines.ko: 착하셔라 어릴 때에 모친 순종 하시고
lines.id: Dan, melalui masa kanak-kanak-Nya yang menakjubkan,

lines.en: He would honor and obey,
lines.ko: 사랑으로 섬기신 것 참된 본이 되셨네
lines.id: Dia akan menghormati dan mematuhi,

lines.en: Love and watch the lowly maiden
lines.id: Cintai dan perhatikan gadis rendahan itu

lines.en: In whose gentle arms he lay:
lines.id: Dalam pelukan lembut siapa Dia berbaring:

lines.en: Christian children all must be
lines.id: Anak-anak Kristen semuanya pasti begitu

lines.en: Mild, obedient, good as he.
lines.id: Lembut, patuh, baik seperti Dia.

lines.en: And our eyes at last shall see him,
lines.ko: 하늘에서 오신 예수 우리 위해 죽으사
lines.id: Dan mata kita pada akhirnya akan melihat Dia,

lines.en: Through his own redeeming love;
lines.id: Melalui cintanya yang dianggap kembali

lines.en: For that Child so dear and gentle
lines.ko: 그가 계신 곳으로 우리 인도 하시리
lines.id: Untuk anak itu begitu sayang dan lembut

lines.en: Is our Lord in heav'n above,
lines.id: Apakah Tuhan kita ada di surga,

lines.en: And he leads his children on
lines.id: Dan Dia memimpin anak-anak-Nya

lines.en: To the place where he is gone.
lines.id: Ke tempat di mana Dia pergi.

lines.en: Not in that poor lowly stable,
With the oxen standing by,
We shall see him, but in heaven,
Set at God's right hand on high;
When like stars his children crowned
All in white shall wait around.

title_en: As with Gladness Men of Old

lines.en: As with gladness men of old
Did the guiding star behold;
As with joy they hailed its light,
Leading onward, beaming bright;
So, most gracious God, may we
Evermore be led to thee.
As with joyful steps they sped
To that lowly cradle bed,
There to bend the knee before
Him whom heaven and earth adore;
So may we with willing feet
lines.ko: 그러니 우리도 기꺼이 발을 딛을 수 있기를 바랍니다

lines.en: Ever seek thy mercy-seat.
As they offered gifts most rare
lines.ko: 그들은 가장 희귀한 선물을 제공했기 때문에

lines.en: At that cradle rude and bare;
So may we with holy joy,
lines.ko: 그리하여 우리가 거룩한 기쁨을 누리게 하소서,

lines.en: Pure, and free from sin's alloy,
All our costliest treasures bring,
lines.ko: 우리의 가장 값비싼 보물은 모두 가져오는데,

lines.en: Christ, to thee, our heav'nly King.
lines.ko: 그리스도, 우리의 하늘에 계신 왕이신 당신께.

lines.en: Holy Jesus, ev'ry day
Keep us in the narrow way;
And, when earthly things are past,
Bring our ransomed souls at last
Where they need no star to guide,
Where no clouds thy glory hide.
lines.ko: 구름 없는 곳에 당신의 영광이 숨어 있습니다.

lines.en: In the heav'nly country bright
Need they no created light;
Thou its Light, its Joy, its Crown,
Thou its Sun which goes not down;
There for ever may we sing
lines.ko: 그곳에서 우리는 영원히 노래할 수 있습니다

lines.en: Alleluias to our King.

title_en: On Christmas Night All Christians Sing

lines.en: [English lyrics not available in the database for this revised hymn]
lines.ko: [이 개정된 찬송가의 데이터베이스에는 영어 가사가 없습니다.]

title_en: Saw You Never, in the Twilight
title_ko: 당신을 본 적이 없어요, 황혼 속에서 (자체번역)

lines.en: [English lyrics not available in the database for this revised hymn]
lines.ko: [이 개정된 찬송가의 데이터베이스에는 영어 가사가 없습니다.]

title_en: Gentle Mary Laid Her Child

lines.en: Gentle Mary laid her child
lines.id: Maria membaringkan bayi itu di dalam palungan

lines.en: Lowly in a manger;
lines.ko: 이 세상에 나신 주 강보 속에 싸여
lines.id: Tuhan yang lahir ke dunia ini terbungkus lampin

lines.en: There he lay, the undefiled,
lines.ko: 천한 곳에 나신 주 우리 구주시라
lines.id: Tuhan, yang lahir di tempat yang sederhana, adalah Juruselamat kita.

lines.en: To the world a stranger.
lines.id: Tuhan yang pengasih telah datang dalam kemuliaan

lines.en: Such a babe in such a place,
Can he be the Saviour?
Ask the saved of all the race
Who have found his favor.
Angels sang about his birth,
lines.id: Orang-orang majus datang menyanyikan himne malaikat

lines.en: Wise men sought and found him;
lines.id: Cahaya bintang berkelap-kelip dan kemuliaan Tuhan bersinar

lines.en: Heaven's star shone brightly forth
lines.id: Para gembala mendengarkan pujian para malaikat

lines.en: Glory all around him.
lines.ko: 어둔 밤은 빛나고 높은 산은 진동해
lines.id: Malam yang gelap bersinar dan gunung-gunung tinggi bergetar

lines.en: Shepherds saw the wondrous sight,
Heard the angels singing;
All the plains were lit that night,
All the hills were ringing.
Gentle Mary laid her child
lines.id: Maria membaringkan bayi itu di dalam palungan

lines.en: Lowly in a manger;
lines.ko: 이 세상에 나신 주 우리 구주시니
lines.id: Tuhan yang lahir ke dunia ini adalah Juruselamat kita

lines.en: He is still the undefiled,
lines.id: Kelahiran bayi Yesus adalah kabar indah

lines.en: But no more a stranger.
lines.ko: 온 세상은 노래로 소리 높여 찬양해
lines.id: Seluruh dunia menyanyikan pujian dengan lantang

lines.en: Son of God of humble birth,
Beautiful the story;
Praise his Name in all the earth,
Hail! the King of Glory!

title_en: Thou Who Wast Rich beyond All Splendor

lines.en: [English lyrics not available in the database for this revised hymn]
lines.ko: [이 개정된 찬송가의 데이터베이스에는 영어 가사가 없습니다.]

title_en: Lovely Child, Holy Child

lines.en: [English lyrics not available in the database for this revised hymn]
lines.ko: [이 개정된 찬송가의 데이터베이스에는 영어 가사가 없습니다.]

title_en: O Jesus Sweet, O Jesus Mild
title_ko: 오 예수는 달콤하고 오 예수는 온유하신 분이시다 (자체번역)

lines.en: [English lyrics not available in the database for this revised hymn]
lines.ko: [이 개정된 찬송가의 데이터베이스에는 영어 가사가 없습니다.]

title_en: To Us a Child of Hope Is Born

lines.en: To us a child of hope is born,
To us a son is giv'n,
Him shall the tribes of earth obey,
Him all the hosts of heaven
His name shall be the Prince of Peace,
lines.ko: 그 이름은 평강의 왕이라 할 것이요

lines.en: For evermore adored,
The Wonderful, the Counsellor,
The great and mighty Lord;
His power, increasing, still shall spread,
lines.ko: 그의 힘은 점점 더 커질 것이며, 여전히 퍼져나갈 것입니다.

lines.en: His reign no end shall know;
Justice shall guard his throne above,
And peace abound below.
To us a Child of hope is born,
To us a Son is giv'n,
The Wonderful, the Counsellor,
The mighty Lord of heaven.

title_en: Tell Me the Story of Jesus

lines.en: Tell me the story of Jesus,
Write on my heart ev'ry word;
Tell me the story most precious,
Sweetest that ever was heard.
lines.ko: 지금까지 들어본 것 중 가장 감미로운 말이에요.

lines.en: Tell how the angels, in chorus,
Sang as they welcomed his birth,
"Glory to God in the highest!
Peace and good tidings to earth."
Tell me the story of Jesus,
Write on my heart ev'ry word;
Tell me the story most precious,
Sweetest that ever was heard.
lines.ko: 지금까지 들어본 것 중 가장 감미로운 말이에요.

lines.en: Fasting alone in the desert,
Tell of the days that are past,
How for our sins he was tempted,
lines.ko: 그가 어찌 우리 죄 때문에 시험을 받으셨는고

lines.en: Yet was triumphant at last.
Tell of the years of his labor,
Tell of the sorrow he bore,
He was despised and afflicted,
Homeless, rejected and poor.
Tell of the cross where they nailed him,
lines.ko: 그분을 못 박은 십자가에 대해 말해주세요.

lines.en: Writhing in anguish and pain;
Tell of the grave where they laid him,
Tell how he liveth again.
Love in that story so tender,
lines.ko: 그 이야기 속의 사랑은 너무 부드러워요

lines.en: Clearer than ever I see:
Stay, let me weep while you whisper,
lines.ko: 머물러라, 당신이 속삭이는 동안 내가 울게 해주세요

lines.en: Love paid the ransom for me.

title_en: All Glory, Laud, and Honor

lines.ko: 왕 되신 우리 주께 다 영광 돌리세
lines.en: All glo-ry, laud and hon-or
lines.id: Semua kemuliaan, pujian dan kehormatan

lines.ko: 그 옛날 많은 무리 호산나 불렀네
lines.en: To Thee, Re-deem-er, King,
lines.id: KepadaMu, pertimbangkan kembali, Raja,

lines.en: To whom the lips of chil-dren
lines.id: Kepada siapa bibir anak-anak

lines.ko: 왕 위에 오른 주께 다 영광 돌리세
lines.en: Made sweet ho-san-nas ring.
lines.id: Membuat cincin ho-san-nas yang manis.

lines.en: Thou art the King of Is-rael,
lines.id: Engkau adalah Raja Israel,

lines.en: Thou Da-vid's roy-al Son,
lines.id: Putra Raja Daud,

lines.en: Who in the Lord's name com-est,
lines.id: Siapa yang datang dalam nama Tuhan,

lines.en: The King and Bless-ed One.
lines.id: Raja dan Yang Terberkahi.

lines.ko: 저 천군 천사들 이 호산나 부르니
lines.en: The com-pa-ny of an-gels
lines.id: Perusahaan para malaikat

lines.ko: 뒤 따라가던 무리 다 화답 하도다
lines.en: Are prais-ing Thee on high,
lines.id: Apakah memuji-Mu di tempat tinggi,

lines.ko: 저 유대 백성 같이 종려가지 들고
lines.en: And mor-tal men and all things
lines.id: Dan manusia fana dan segala sesuatunya

lines.en: Cre-a-ted make re-ply.
lines.id: Dibuat ulang.

lines.en: The peo-ple of the He-brews
lines.id: Orang-orang pembuat bir

lines.en: With palms be-fore Thee went
lines.id: Dengan telapak tangan sebelum Engkau pergi

lines.en: Our praise and prayer and an-thems
lines.id: Pujian, doa, dan lagu kebangsaan kami

lines.en: Be-fore Thee we pre-sent.
lines.id: DihadapanMu kami hadirkan.

lines.ko: 주 고난 받기 전에 수 많은 무리가
lines.en: To Thee, be-fore Thy pas-sion,
lines.id: KepadaMu, sebelum nafsuMu,

lines.ko: 영광의 찬송 불러 주 찬양 하였네
lines.en: They sang their hymns of praise
lines.id: Mereka menyanyikan himne pujian mereka

lines.ko: 이 같이 우리들도 주 환영 하오니
lines.en: To Thee, now high ex-alt-ed,
lines.id: KepadaMu, yang kini menjadi mantan yang tinggi,

lines.ko: 그 넓은 사랑 안에 다 받아주소서 아멘
lines.en: Our mel-o-dy we raise.
lines.id: Mel-o-dy kami, kami angkat.

lines.en: Thou didst ac-cept their prais-es
lines.id: Engkau menerima pujian mereka

lines.en: Ac-cept the praise we bring,
lines.id: Terimalah pujian yang kami bawa,

lines.en: Who in all good de-light-est,
lines.id: Siapa yang paling senang,

lines.en: Thou good and gra-cious King. A-men.
lines.id: Engkau Raja yang baik dan ramah. Amin.

title_en: When His Salvation Bringing

lines.en: When his salvation bringing,
To Zion Jesus came,
The children all stood singing
Hosanna to his name:
Nor did their zeal offend him,
lines.ko: 또한 그들의 열심이 그에게 노여움을 주지도 아니하였으니

lines.en: But as he rode along,
He let them still attend him,
lines.ko: 그는 그들이 여전히 그에게 참석하도록 허용했습니다.

lines.en: And smiled to hear their song.
lines.ko: 그리고 그들의 노래를 들으며 미소를 지었습니다.

lines.en: And since the Lord retaineth
His love for children still,
Though now as King he reigneth
On Zion's heav'nly hill,
We'll flock around his banner
lines.ko: 우리는 그의 깃발 주위로 모여들 것이다

lines.en: Who sits upon his throne,
And cry aloud, "Hosanna
To David's royal Son!"
For should we fail proclaiming
Our great Redeemer's praise,
The stones, our silence shaming,
lines.ko: 돌들, 우리의 침묵을 부끄럽게 하는 것,

lines.en: Would their Hosannas raise.
But shall we only render
The tribute of our words?
No; while our hearts are tender,
They too shall be the Lord's.

title_en: Ride On, Ride On in Majesty!

lines.en: Ride on! ride on in majesty!
Hark! all the tribes Hosanna cry;
O Saviour meek, pursue thy road
lines.ko: 오 온유하신 구세주여, 당신의 길을 따르십시오

lines.en: With palms and scattered garments strowed.
Ride on! ride on in majesty!
In lowly pomp ride on to die:
lines.ko: 비천하게 화려하게 타고 죽기 위해 달려가다:

lines.en: O Christ, thy triumphs now begin
lines.ko: 오 그리스도여, 이제 당신의 승리가 시작되었습니다

lines.en: O'er captive death and conquered sin.
Ride on! ride on in majesty!
The winged squadrons of the sky
Look down with sad and wondering eyes
To see th'approaching sacrifice.
Ride on! ride on in majesty!
Thy last and fiercest strife is nigh;
lines.ko: 당신의 마지막이자 가장 치열한 투쟁이 가까워졌습니다.

lines.en: The Father on his sapphire throne
Expects his own anointed Son.
Ride on! ride on in majesty!
In lowly pomp ride on to die:
lines.ko: 비천하게 화려하게 타고 죽기 위해 달려가다:

lines.en: Bow thy meek head to mortal pain,
lines.ko: 당신의 온유한 머리를 숙여 치명적인 고통을 당하게 하소서.

lines.en: Then take, O God, thy power and reign.
lines.ko: 그렇다면 오 하나님, 당신의 능력과 통치를 취하십시오.

title_en: My Dear Redeemer and My Lord

lines.en: My dear Redeemer and my Lord,
I read my duty in thy Word;
lines.ko: 나는 당신의 말씀에서 나의 의무를 읽었습니다.

lines.en: But in thy life the law appears
Drawn out in living characters.
Such was thy truth, and such thy zeal,
lines.ko: 당신의 진실도 그러했고, 당신의 열심도 그러했습니다.

lines.en: Such def'rence to thy Father's will,
Such love, and meekness so divine,
I would transcribe and make them mine.
lines.ko: 나는 그것들을 복사해서 내 것으로 만들 것이다.

lines.en: Cold mountains and the midnight air
Witnessed the fervor of thy prayer;
The desert thy temptations knew,
Thy conflict and thy vict'ry too.
Be thou my pattern; make me bear
lines.ko: 너는 나의 본이 되어라. 나를 참게 만들어라

lines.en: More of thy gracious image here:
lines.ko: 여기에 당신의 은혜로운 이미지가 더 많이 있습니다:

lines.en: Then God the Judge shall own my name
lines.ko: 그러면 심판주 하나님께서 내 이름을 소유하실 것입니다.

lines.en: Amongst the foll'wers of the Lamb.

title_en: Who Is This, So Weak and Helpless
title_ko: 이토록 약하고 무기력한 이 사람은 누구인가? (자체번역)

lines.en: Who is this so weak and helpless,
lines.ko: 이토록 약하고 무기력한 이 사람은 누구입니까?

lines.en: Child of lowly Hebrew maid,
Rudely in a stable sheltered,
Coldly in a manger laid?
'Tis the Lord of all creation,
Who this wondrous path hath trod;
He is God from everlasting,
And to everlasting God.
Who is this, a Man of Sorrows,
Walking sadly life's hard way,
Homeless, weary, sighing, weeping
lines.ko: 노숙자, 지친 사람, 한숨 쉬는 사람, 울고 있는 사람

lines.en: Over sin and Satan's sway?
'Tis our God, our glorious Saviour,
Who above the starry sky
Now for us a place prepareth,
lines.ko: 이제 우리를 위한 장소가 준비되어 있습니다.

lines.en: Where no tear can dim the eye.
lines.ko: 눈물이 눈을 어둡게 할 수 없는 곳.

lines.en: Who is this? behold him shedding
lines.ko: 이 사람은 누구입니까? 그가 흘리는 것을 보라

lines.en: Drops of blood upon the ground!
Who is this, despised, rejected,
Mocked, insulted, beaten, bound?
'Tis our God, who gifts and graces
On his church now poureth down;
Who shall smite in holy vengeance
All his foes beneath his throne.
lines.ko: 그의 모든 적들은 그의 왕좌 아래에 있습니다.

lines.en: Who is this that hangeth dying
While the rude world scoffs and scorns,
Numbered with the malefactors,
Torn with nails, and crowned with thorns?
'Tis the God who ever liveth
'Mid the shining ones on high,
In the glorious golden city,
Reigning everlastingly.

title_en: The King of Glory Comes

lines.en: [English lyrics not available in the database for this revised hymn]
lines.ko: [이 개정된 찬송가의 데이터베이스에는 영어 가사가 없습니다.]

title_en: Thou Dost Reign on High

lines.en: Thou dost reign on high with a kingly crown,
lines.ko: 당신은 왕의 면류관으로 높은 곳에서 통치하시며,

lines.en: Yet thou camest to earth for me,
lines.ko: 그러나 당신은 나를 위해 이 땅에 오셨습니다.

lines.en: And in Bethlehem's home was there found no room
For thy holy nativity:
O come to my heart, Lord Jesus,
lines.ko: 오, 주 예수여, 내 마음에 오소서.

lines.en: There is room in my heart for thee.
lines.ko: 내 마음에는 당신을 위한 자리가 있습니다.

lines.en: Heaven's arches rang when the angels sang,
lines.ko: 천사들이 노래할 때 천국의 아치가 울렸다.

lines.en: Proclaiming thy royal degree;
But of lowly birth didst thou come to earth,
lines.ko: 그러나 당신은 비천하게 태어나 땅에 오셨고,

lines.en: And in great humility:
O come to my heart, Lord Jesus,
lines.ko: 오, 주 예수여, 내 마음에 오소서.

lines.en: There is room in my heart for thee.
lines.ko: 내 마음에는 당신을 위한 자리가 있습니다.

lines.en: The foxes found rest, and the birds their nest,
lines.ko: 여우는 안식을 찾았고 새는 둥지를 찾았습니다.

lines.en: In the shade of the forest tree;
But thy couch was the sod,
O thou Son of God, in the deserts of Galilee:
O come to my heart, Lord Jesus,
lines.ko: 오, 주 예수여, 내 마음에 오소서.

lines.en: There is room in my heart for thee.
lines.ko: 내 마음에는 당신을 위한 자리가 있습니다.

lines.en: Thou camest, O Lord, with the living word
lines.ko: 여호와여 주는 살아 있는 말씀으로 오셨나이다

lines.en: That should set thy people free;
lines.ko: 그것이 당신의 백성을 자유롭게 할 것입니다.

lines.en: But with mocking scorn, and with crown of thorn,
They bore thee to Calvary:
O come to my heart, Lord Jesus,
lines.ko: 오, 주 예수여, 내 마음에 오소서.

lines.en: Thy cross is my only plea.
When heav'n's arches shall ring,
And her choirs shall sing,
At thy coming to victory,
Let thy voice call me home,
lines.ko: 당신의 목소리가 나를 집으로 부르게 해주세요.

lines.en: Saying, "Yet there is room,
There is room at my side for thee."
lines.ko: 내 옆에 너를 위한 자리가 있다."

lines.en: And my heart shall rejoice, Lord Jesus,
lines.ko: 그리고 내 마음은 기뻐할 것입니다, 주 예수여,

lines.en: When thou comest and callest for me.

alt_titles: Thou dost reign on high

title_en: Not All the Blood of Beasts

lines.en: Not all the blood of beasts
On Jewish altars slain,
Could give the guilty conscience peace,
lines.ko: 죄 있는 양심에게 평안을 줄 수 있으며,

lines.en: Or wash away the stain:
But Christ, the heavenly Lamb
Takes all our sins away,
A sacrifice of nobler name
And richer blood than they.
lines.ko: 그리고 그들보다 더 풍부한 피를 가지고 있습니다.

lines.en: My faith would lay her hand
lines.ko: 내 믿음은 그녀의 손을 얹을 것입니다

lines.en: On that dear head of thine,
While like a penitent I stand,
And there confess my sin.
My soul looks back to see
The burdens thou didst bear,
When hanging on the cursed tree,
And knows her guilt was there.
lines.ko: 그리고 그녀의 죄책감이 거기에 있었다는 것을 알고 있습니다.

lines.en: Believing, we rejoice
To see the curse remove;
We bless the Lamb with cheerful voice,
And sing his bleeding love.
lines.ko: 그리고 그의 피 흘리는 사랑을 노래하십시오.

title_en: Praise the Savior Now and Ever

lines.en: Praise the Saviour now and ever;
Praise him all beneath the skies;
Prostrate lying, suffering, dying
On the cross, a sacrifice.
Victory gaining, life obtaining,
Now in glory he doth rise.
Man's work faileth, Christ's availeth;
lines.ko: 인간의 일은 실패하고 그리스도는 유익을 얻습니다.

lines.en: He is all our righteousness;
He, our Saviour, has for ever
Set us free from dire distress.
Through his merit we inherit
Light and peace and happiness.
Sin's bonds severed; we're delivered;
Christ has bruised the serpent's head;
Death no longer is the stronger;
lines.ko: 죽음은 더 이상 더 강하지 않습니다.

lines.en: Hell itself is captive led.
Christ has risen from death's prison;
O'er the tomb he light has shed.
For his favor, praise for ever
Unto God the Father sing;
Praise the Saviour, praise him ever,
Son of God, our Lord and King.
Praise the Spirit; through Christ's merit,
He doth us salvation bring.

title_en: He Was Wounded for Our Transgressions
title_ko: 그분은 우리의 범법으로 인해 상처를 입으셨습니다 (자체번역)

lines.en: Who hath believed after hearing the message,
To whom is the arm of the Lord revealed?
He shall grow up as a plant new and tender,
And as a root out of a barren field.
He was wounded for our transgressions,
lines.ko: 그가 상처를 입은 것은 우리의 범법 때문이요

lines.en: He was bruised for our iniquities;
The chastisement of our peace was upon him,
lines.ko: 그에게 형벌이 임하여 우리가 평화를 누리고

lines.en: And with his stripes we are healed.
lines.ko: 그리고 그의 채찍으로 우리는 나음을 받았습니다.

lines.en: He was despised and by all men rejected,
lines.ko: 그는 멸시를 받아 모든 사람에게 버린 바 되었으며

lines.en: Weighted with sorrows, acquainted with grief;
Smitten, afflicted, by God was forsaken,
lines.ko: 하나님께 맞으며 고난을 받고 버림을 받았으나

lines.en: He suffered alone; no one could bring relief.
lines.ko: 그는 혼자 고통을 겪었습니다. 아무도 구제를 가져올 수 없습니다.

lines.en: Like as a lamb he was brought to the slaughter,
Speechless as sheep to the shearers was led;
lines.ko: 말 못하는 양들이 털 깎는 자에게 끌려가듯이,

lines.en: He was cut off from the land of the living,
For our transgressions on Calvary bled.
lines.ko: 갈보리에서 우리의 범법으로 인해 피가 흘렀습니다.

alt_titles: Who hath believed

title_en: As Jacob with Travel Was Weary One Day
title_ko: 여행으로 야곱이 어느 날 지쳤던 것처럼 (자체번역)

lines.en: [English lyrics not available in the database for this revised hymn]
lines.ko: [이 개정된 찬송가의 데이터베이스에는 영어 가사가 없습니다.]

title_en: Man of Sorrows! What a Name

lines.en: [English lyrics not available in the database for this revised hymn]
lines.ko: [이 개정된 찬송가의 데이터베이스에는 영어 가사가 없습니다.]

title_en: O Sacred Head, Now Wounded

lines.en: O sacred Head, now wounded,
lines.ko: 오 거룩하신 주님 그 상하신 머리
lines.id: Wahai Kepala yang sa-cred, kini terluka,

lines.en: With grief and shame weighed down;
lines.id: Dengan kesedihan dan rasa malu terbebani,

lines.en: Now scornfully surrounded
lines.id: Sekarang dikepung dengan penuh cemoohan

lines.en: With thorns, thine only crown;
lines.id: Dengan duri, satu-satunya mahkota-Mu:

lines.en: O sacred Head, what glory,
lines.id: Betapa pucatnya Engkau karena kesedihan,

lines.en: What bliss till now was thine!
lines.id: Dengan rasa sakit dan cemoohan!

lines.en: Yet, though despised and gory,
lines.id: Bagaimana wajah itu menjadi lesu

lines.en: I joy to call thee mine.
lines.id: Yang dulunya cerah seperti pagi hari!

lines.en: What thou, my Lord, hast suffered
lines.ko: 주 당하신 그 고난 죄인 위함이라
lines.id: Apa yang Engkau, Tuhanku, derita

lines.en: Was all for sinners' gain:
lines.ko: 내 지은 죄로 인해 주 형벌 받았네
lines.id: Semuanya demi keuntungan orang berdosa:

lines.en: Mine, mine was the transgression,
lines.ko: 내 주여 비옵나니 이 약한 죄인을
lines.id: Milik saya, milik saya adalah pelanggaran,

lines.en: But thine the deadly pain.
lines.id: Tapi milikMulah rasa sakit yang mematikan.

lines.en: Lo, here I fall, my Saviour!
lines.id: Lihatlah, di sinilah aku terjatuh, Juruselamatku!

lines.en: 'Tis I deserve thy place;
lines.id: Inilah aku yang layak mengabdi pada tempat-Mu

lines.en: Look on me with thy favor,
lines.id: Pandanglah aku dengan nikmat-Mu,

lines.en: Vouchsafe to me thy grace.
lines.id: Amankan aku, rahmat-Mu.

lines.en: What language shall I borrow
lines.ko: 나 무슨 말로 주께 다 감사드리랴
lines.id: Bahasa apa yang harus saya pinjam

lines.en: To thank thee, dearest Friend,
lines.ko: 끝 없는 주의 사랑 한 없이 고마워
lines.id: Untuk berterima kasih kepada-Mu, sahabatku yang terkasih,

lines.en: For this thy dying sorrow,
lines.ko: 보잘 것 없는 나를 주의 것 삼으사
lines.id: Untuk baris kesedihan-Mu yang sekarat ini,

lines.en: Thy pity without end?
lines.ko: 주님만 사랑하며 나 살게 하소서 아멘
lines.id: Kasihanmu tanpa akhir

lines.en: O make me thine for ever;
lines.id: O, jadikanlah aku milik-Mu selamanya

lines.en: And should I fainting be,
lines.id: Dan jika aku pingsan,

lines.en: Lord, let me never, never
lines.id: Tuhan, izinkan aku tidak pernah, tidak akan pernah

lines.en: Outlive my love to thee.
lines.id: Hidupkan cintaku pada-Mu. Amin.

lines.en: Be near when I am dying,
O show thy cross to me;
And for my succor flying,
Come, Lord, to set me free:
These eyes, new faith receiving,
From Jesus shall not move;
For he who dies believing,
Dies safely, through thy love.

title_en: Ah, Holy Jesus, How Hast Thou Offended
title_ko: 아, 거룩하신 예수여, 어찌 그리 범죄하셨나이까 (자체번역)

lines.en: Ah, holy Jesus, how hast thou offended,
lines.ko: 아, 거룩하신 예수님, 당신은 얼마나 죄를 지으셨는가?

lines.en: That man to judge thee hath in hate pretended?
lines.ko: 당신을 판단하는 그 사람이 증오로 가장했습니까?

lines.en: By foes derided, by thine own rejected,
lines.ko: 조롱당하는 적들에 의해, 거부당한 당신 자신에 의해,

lines.en: O most afflicted.
Who was the guilty? who brought this upon thee?
lines.ko: 범인은 누구였나요? 누가 너에게 이런 일을 가져왔느냐?

lines.en: Alas, my treason, Jesus, hath undone thee.
lines.ko: 아아, 예수여, 나의 반역이 당신을 파멸시켰나이다.

lines.en: 'Twas I, Lord Jesus, I it was denied thee:
I crucified thee.
Lo, the good Shepherd for the sheep is offered:
The slave hath sinned, and the Son hath suffered:
For man's atonement, while he nothing heedeth,
lines.ko: 인간의 속죄를 위해, 인간은 아무것도 개의치 않는 동안,

lines.en: God intercedeth.
For me, kind Jesus, was thine incarnation,
Thy mortal sorrow, and thy life's oblation:
lines.ko: 당신의 죽음의 슬픔과 당신의 삶의 봉헌:

lines.en: Thy death of anguish and thy bitter passion,
For my salvation.
Therefore, kind Jesus, since I cannot pay thee,
lines.ko: 그러므로 인자하신 예수님, 제가 당신께 돈을 갚을 수 없으니,

lines.en: I do adore thee, and will ever pray thee
lines.ko: 나는 당신을 사랑하고 항상 당신을 위해 기도하겠습니다.

lines.en: Think on thy pity and thy love unswerving,
lines.ko: 당신의 동정심과 흔들리지 않는 사랑을 생각해 보십시오.

lines.en: Not my deserving.

alt_titles: Ah, holy Jesus, how hast thou offended (tune 2)

title_en: Tis Midnight; and on Olive’s Brow

lines.en: 'Tis midnight; and on Olive's brow
The star is dimmed that lately shone:
'Tis midnight; in the garden now
The suffering Saviour prays alone.
'Tis midnight; and, from all removed,
lines.ko: 자정이군요. 그리고 제거된 모든 것 중에서

lines.en: Emmanuel wrestles lone with fears:
E'en the disciple that he loved
Heeds not his master's grief and tears.
lines.ko: 주인의 슬픔과 눈물에 귀를 기울이지 않습니다.

lines.en: 'Tis midnight; and, for others' guilt,
lines.ko: 자정이군요. 그리고 다른 사람의 죄 때문에

lines.en: The Man of Sorrows weeps in blood:
lines.ko: 슬픔의 사람은 피 흘리며 눈물을 흘립니다.

lines.en: Yet he that hath in anguish knelt
lines.ko: 그러나 고통 속에 무릎을 꿇은 사람은

lines.en: Is not forsaken by his God.
'Tis midnight; from the heavenly plains
Is borne the song that angels know:
Unheard by mortals are the strains
That sweetly soothe the Saviour's woe.
lines.ko: 그것은 구주의 비애를 감미롭게 달래주는 것입니다.

title_en: Throned upon the Awful Tree

lines.en: Throned upon the awful tree,
King of grief, I watch with thee.
lines.ko: 슬픔의 왕이시여, 나는 당신과 함께 지켜봅니다.

lines.en: Darkness veils thine anguished face:
lines.ko: 어둠이 당신의 괴로운 얼굴을 가리고 있습니다.

lines.en: None its lines of woe can trace:
lines.ko: 누구도 그 비애의 노선을 추적할 수 없습니다:

lines.en: None can tell what pangs unknown
lines.ko: 누구도 알 수 없는 고통이 무엇인지 말할 수 없습니다.

lines.en: Hold thee silent and alone.
Silent through those three dread hours,
lines.ko: 그 두려운 세 시간 동안 침묵을 지키며,

lines.en: Wrestling with the evil pow'rs,
Left alone with human sin,
Gloom around thee and within,
lines.ko: 당신 주위와 내면에는 어둠이 깔려 있습니다.

lines.en: Till th'appointed time is nigh,
Till the Lamb of God may die.
Hark, that cry that peals aloud
lines.ko: 들어봐, 큰 소리로 울리는 그 외침

lines.en: Upward through the whelming cloud!
Thou, the Father's only Son,
Thou, his own Anointed One,
Thou dost ask himcan it be?
lines.ko: 당신은 그에게 물어보나요? 그럴 수 있나요?

lines.en: "Why hast thou forsaken me?"
Lord, should fear and anguish roll
Darkly o'er my sinful soul,
lines.ko: 어둡게 내 죄 많은 영혼 위에,

lines.en: Thou, who once wast thus bereft
That thine own might never be left,
lines.ko: 당신의 것이 결코 남지 않을지도 모르며,

lines.en: Teach me by that bitter cry
In the gloom to know thee nigh.
lines.ko: 어둠 속에서도 당신을 가까이서 알 수 있습니다.

title_en: Beneath the Cross of Jesus

lines.en: Beneath the cross of Jesus
lines.ko: 십자가 그늘 아래 나 쉬기 원하네
lines.id: Di bawah salib Yesus

lines.en: I fain would take my stand,
lines.ko: 저 햇볕 심히 뜨겁고 또 짐이 무거워
lines.id: Aku ingin mengambil pendirianku,

lines.en: The shadow of a mighty Rock
lines.ko: 이 광야 같은 세상에 늘 방황할 때에
lines.id: Bayangan Batu Karang yang perkasa

lines.en: Within a weary land;
lines.ko: 주 십자가의 그늘에 내 쉴 곳 찾았네
lines.id: Di dalam tanah yang lelah

lines.en: A home within the wilderness,
lines.id: Sebuah rumah di tengah hutan belantara,

lines.en: A rest upon the way,
lines.id: Istirahat dalam perjalanan,

lines.en: From the burning of the noontide heat,
lines.id: Dari terpaan panasnya air pasang di siang hari,

lines.en: And the burden of the day.
lines.id: Dan beban hari ini.

lines.en: Upon the cross of Jesus
lines.ko: 내 눈을 밝히 떠서 십자가 볼 때
lines.id: Di atas salib Yesus

lines.en: Mine eye at times can see
lines.ko: 날 위해 고난 당하신 주 예수 보인다
lines.id: Mataku terkadang bisa melihat

lines.en: The very dying form of One
lines.ko: 그 형상 볼 때 내 맘에 큰 찔림 받아서
lines.id: Bentuk Yang Esa yang sedang sekarat

lines.en: Who suffered there for me:
lines.ko: 그 사랑 감당 못하여 눈물만 흘리네
lines.id: Siapa yang menderita di sana demi aku

lines.en: And from my stricken heart with tears
lines.id: Dan dari hatiku yang dilanda air mata

lines.en: Two wonders I confess,
lines.id: Dua keajaiban yang saya akui,

lines.en: The wonders of redeeming love
lines.id: Keajaiban dari mempertimbangkan kembali cinta

lines.en: And my own worthlessness.
lines.id: Dan ketidakberhargaan saya sendiri.

lines.en: I take, O cross, thy shadow
lines.id: Aku ambil, oh salib, bayanganmu

lines.en: For my abiding-place:
lines.ko: 나 사모하는 광채는 주 얼굴 뿐이라
lines.id: Untuk tempat penawaranku

lines.en: I ask no other sunshine than
lines.ko: 이 세상 나를 버려도 나 두려움 없네
lines.id: Aku tidak meminta sinar matahari lain selain itu

lines.en: The sunshine of his face;
lines.id: Sinar matahari di wajah-Nya

lines.en: Content to let the world go by,
lines.id: Konten untuk membiarkan dunia berlalu begitu saja,

lines.en: To know no gain nor loss;
lines.id: Untuk mengetahui tidak ada untung atau rugi

lines.en: My sinful self my only shame,
lines.id: Diriku yang penuh dosa, satu-satunya rasa maluku,

lines.en: My glory, all the cross.
lines.id: Kemuliaanku, semuanya salib. Amin.

title_en: When I Survey the Wondrous Cross

lines.en: When I survey the wondrous cross
lines.ko: 주 달려 죽은 십자가 우리가 생각할 때에
lines.id: Ada bukit hijau di kejauhan,

lines.en: On which the Prince of glory died,
lines.ko: 세상에 속한 욕심을 헛된 줄 알고 버리네
lines.id: Tanpa tembok kota,

lines.en: My richest gain I count but loss,
lines.id: Dimana Tuhan terkasih disalibkan,

lines.en: And pour contempt on all my pride.
lines.id: Siapa yang mati untuk menyelamatkan kita semua.
Ya ampun, sayang sekali Dia telah mencintai,
Dan kita juga harus mengasihi Dia,
Dan percayalah pada darah-Nya yang telah menebus,
Dan cobalah melakukan pekerjaan-pekerjaan-Nya.

lines.en: Forbid it, Lord, that I should boast,
lines.ko: 죽으신 구주 밖에는 자랑을 말게 하소서
lines.id: Kita mungkin tidak tahu, kita tidak bisa mengatakannya

lines.en: Save in the death of Christ my God:
lines.ko: 보혈의 공로 힘 입어 교만한 맘을 버리네
lines.id: Betapa sakitnya Dia harus menanggungnya

lines.en: All the vain things that charm me most,
lines.id: Tapi kami yakin itu untuk kami

lines.en: I sacrifice them to his blood.
lines.id: Dia digantung dan menderita di sana.
Ya ampun, sayang sekali Dia telah mencintai,
Dan kita juga harus mengasihi Dia,
Dan percayalah pada darah-Nya yang telah menebus,
Dan cobalah melakukan pekerjaan-pekerjaan-Nya.

lines.en: See, from his head, his hands, his feet,
lines.ko: 못 박힌 손 발 보오니 큰 자비 나타 내셨네
lines.id: Tidak ada hal baik lainnya

lines.en: Sorrow and love flow mingled down:
lines.ko: 가시로 만든 면류관 우리를 위해 쓰셨네
lines.id: Untuk menanggung harga dosa

lines.en: Did e'er such love and sorrow meet,
lines.id: Dia hanya bisa membuka kunci gerbangnya

lines.en: Or thorns compose so rich a crown?
lines.id: Dari surga dan biarkan kami masuk.
Ya ampun, sayang sekali Dia telah mencintai,
Dan kita juga harus mengasihi Dia,
Dan percayalah pada darah-Nya yang telah menebus,
Dan cobalah melakukan pekerjaan-pekerjaan-Nya. Amin.

lines.en: Were the whole realm of nature mine,
lines.ko: 온 세상 만물 가져도 주 은혜 못 다 갚겠네
lines.id: Bahkan jika aku memiliki segalanya di dunia ini, aku tidak akan mampu membalas semua anugerah Tuhan.

lines.en: That were a present far too small;
lines.ko: 놀라운 사랑 받은 나 몸으로 제물 삼겠네 아멘
lines.id: Setelah menerima cinta yang begitu luar biasa, aku akan menjadikan tubuhku sebagai korban, Amin.

lines.en: Love so amazing, so divine,
Demands my soul, my life, my all.

title_id: Saat Saya Menyurvei Salib yang Menakjubkan

title_en: There Is a Fountain Filled with Blood

lines.en: There is a fountain filled with blood,
lines.id: Ada sebuah air mancur yang penuh dengan darah

lines.en: Drawn from Immanuel's veins;
lines.id: Diambil dari urat nadi Im-man-uel

lines.en: And sinners, plunged beneath that flood,
lines.id: Dan para pendosa, yang terjerumus ke dalam banjir itu,

lines.en: Lose all their guilty stains.
lines.id: Hilangkan semua noda rasa bersalah mereka:
Hilangkan semua noda rasa bersalah mereka,
Hilangkan semua noda rasa bersalah mereka
Dan para pendosa, yang terjerumus ke dalam banjir itu,
Hilangkan semua noda rasa bersalah mereka.

lines.en: The dying thief rejoiced to see
lines.ko: 저 도적 회개 하고서 보혈에 씻었네
lines.id: Pencuri yang sekarat itu kembali bersukacita melihatnya

lines.en: That fountain in his day;
lines.ko: 저 도적 같은 이 몸도 죄 씻기 원하네
lines.id: Air mancur itu pada zamannya

lines.en: And there have I, as vile as he,
lines.ko: 죄 씻기 원하네 죄 씻기 원하네
lines.id: Dan di sanalah aku, meskipun jahat seperti dia,

lines.en: Washed all my sins away.
lines.ko: 저 도적 같은 이 몸도 죄 씻기 원하네
lines.id: Cucilah semua dosaku:
Cucilah semua dosaku,
Cucilah semua dosaku
Dan di sanalah aku, meskipun jahat seperti dia,
Cucilah semua dosaku.

lines.en: E'er since by faith I saw the stream
lines.ko: 죄 속함 받은 백성은 영생을 얻겠네
lines.id: Anak Domba yang sekarat, darah-Mu yang berharga

lines.en: Thy flowing wounds supply,
lines.ko: 샘솟듯 하는 피 권세 한 없이 크도다
lines.id: Tidak akan pernah kehilangan kekuatannya,

lines.en: Redeeming love has been my theme,
lines.ko: 한 없이 크도다 한 없이 크도다
lines.id: Sampai seluruh Gereja Tuhan ditebus,

lines.en: And shall be till I die.
lines.ko: 샘솟듯 하는 피 권세 한 없이 크도다
lines.id: Selamat, jangan berbuat dosa lagi:
Selamat, jangan berbuat dosa lagi,
Selamat, jangan berbuat dosa lagi
Sampai seluruh Gereja Tuhan ditebus,
Selamat, jangan berbuat dosa lagi:

lines.en: Dear dying Lamb, thy precious blood
lines.ko: 날 정케 하신 피 보니 그 사랑 한없네
lines.id: Sejak saat itu, dengan iman aku melihat sungai itu

lines.en: Shall never lose its power,
lines.ko: 살 동안 받는 사랑을 늘 찬송 하겠네
lines.id: Luka-lukamu mengalir,

lines.en: Till all the ransomed church of God
lines.ko: 늘 찬송 하겠네 늘 찬송 하겠네
lines.id: Menganggap kembali cinta telah menjadi temaku,

lines.en: Be saved, to sin no more.
lines.ko: 살 동안 받는 사랑을 늘 찬송 하겠네
lines.id: Dan akan terus sampai aku mati:
Dan akan terus sampai aku mati,
Dan akan begitu sampai aku mati
Menganggap kembali cinta telah menjadi temaku,
Dan akan terus sampai aku mati:

lines.ko: 이 후에 천국 올라가 더 좋은 노래로
lines.id: Saat lidahnya terbata-bata dan terbata-bata

lines.ko: 날 구속하신 은혜를 늘 찬송 하겠네
lines.id: Kebohongan yang dipinjamkan dosa di dalam kubur,

lines.ko: 늘 찬송 하겠네 늘 찬송 하겠네
lines.id: Kemudian dalam lagu yang lebih mulia dan lebih manis,

lines.ko: 날 구속 하신 은혜를 늘 찬송 하겠네 아멘
lines.id: Aku akan menyanyikan kekuatan-Mu untuk menyelamatkan:
Aku akan menyanyikan kekuatan-Mu untuk menyelamatkan,
Aku akan menyanyikan kekuatan-Mu untuk menyelamatkan
Kemudian dalam lagu yang lebih mulia dan lebih manis,
Aku akan menyanyikan kekuatan-Mu untuk menyelamatkan. Amin.

title_en: Alas! and Did My Savior Bleed

lines.en: Alas! and did my Saviour bleed,
lines.ko: 만왕의 왕 내 주께서 왜 고초 당했나
lines.id: Sayang! dan apakah Juruselamatku berdarah,

lines.en: And did my Sovereign die!
lines.ko: 이 벌레 같은 날 위해 그 보혈 흘렸네
lines.id: Dan apakah pemerintahan Sov-ku mati

lines.en: Would he devote that sacred head
lines.ko: 십자가 십자가 내가 처음 볼 때에
lines.id: Maukah Dia mengabdikan kepala suci itu

lines.en: For such a worm as I!
lines.id: Untuk cacing seperti saya

lines.ko: 오늘 믿고서 내 눈 밝았네 참 내 기쁨 영원하도다
lines.id: Di Salib, di Salib, tempat aku pertama kali melihat terang,
Dan beban hatiku pun bergulir
Di sanalah dengan iman aku dapat melihat kembali,
Dan sekarang aku bahagia sepanjang hari!

lines.en: Was it for crimes that I had done
lines.ko: 주 십자가 못 박힘은 속죄함 아닌가
lines.id: Apakah karena kejahatan yang telah saya lakukan,

lines.en: He groaned upon the tree!
lines.ko: 그 긍휼함과 큰 은혜 말할 수 없도다
lines.id: Dia mengerang di atas pohon

lines.en: Amazing pity! grace unknown!
lines.ko: 십자가 십자가 내가 처음 볼 때에
lines.id: A-maz-ing pit-y, kasih karunia yang tidak diketahui,

lines.en: And love beyond degree!
lines.id: Dan cinta yang luar biasa!

lines.ko: 오늘 믿고서 내 눈 밝았네 참 내 기쁨 영원하도다
lines.id: Di Salib, di Salib, tempat aku pertama kali melihat terang,
Dan beban hatiku pun bergulir
Di sanalah dengan iman aku dapat melihat kembali,
Dan sekarang aku bahagia sepanjang hari!

lines.en: Well might the sun in darkness hide,
lines.ko: 늘 울어도 그 큰 은혜 다 갚을 수 없네
lines.id: Tak ada air mata kesedihan yang bisa terbayar kembali

lines.en: And shut his glories in,
lines.ko: 나 주님께 몸 바쳐서 주의 일 힘쓰리
lines.id: Hutang cinta yang aku miliki.

lines.en: When Christ, the mighty Maker, died
lines.ko: 십자가 십자가 내가 처음 볼 때에
lines.id: Di sini, Tuhan, aku memberikan diriku sendiri

lines.en: For man the creature's sin.
lines.id: Hanya ini yang bisa kulakukan!

lines.ko: 오늘 믿고서 내 눈 밝았네 참 내 기쁨 영원하도다
lines.id: Di Salib, di Salib, tempat aku pertama kali melihat terang,
Dan beban hatiku pun bergulir
Di sanalah dengan iman aku dapat melihat kembali,
Dan sekarang aku bahagia sepanjang hari!

lines.en: Thus might I hide my blushing face
While his dear cross appears;
Dissolve my heart in thankfulness,
And melt mine eyes in tears.
But drops of grief can ne'er repay
The debt of love I owe;
Here, Lord, I give myself away,
'Tis all that I can do.

title_en: O Jesus, We Adore Thee

lines.en: O Jesus, we adore thee,
Upon the cross, our King!
We bow our hearts before thee,
Thy gracious name we sing.
That name hath brought salvation,
That name in life our stay,
Our peace, our consolation,
When life shall fade away.
Yet doth the world disdain thee,
Still passing by the cross;
Lord, may our hearts retain thee;
lines.ko: 주님, 우리 마음이 당신을 붙잡게 해주세요.

lines.en: All else we count but loss.
lines.ko: 우리가 계산하는 다른 모든 것은 손실뿐입니다.

lines.en: Ah, Lord, our sins arraigned thee,
lines.ko: 아, 주님, 우리의 죄가 당신을 괴롭혔습니다.

lines.en: And nailed thee to the tree:
Our pride, our Lord, disdained thee;
lines.ko: 우리의 교만함, 우리 주님이 당신을 경멸하였습니다.

lines.en: Yet deign our hope to be.
O glorious King, we bless thee,
lines.ko: 오 영광스러운 왕이시여, 우리는 당신을 찬양합니다.

lines.en: No longer pass thee by;
O Jesus, we confess thee
The Son enthroned on high.
Lord, grant to us remission;
Life through thy death restore;
Yea, grant us the fruition
Of life for evermore.

title_en: There Is a Green Hill Far Away

lines.en: There is a green hill far away,
lines.ko: 저 멀리 푸른 언덕에 그 십자가 위에
lines.id: Ada bukit hijau di kejauhan,

lines.en: Without a city wall,
lines.ko: 주 예수 나를 위하여 못 박히셨도다
lines.id: Tanpa tembok kota,

lines.en: Where the dear Lord was crucified,
lines.ko: 후렴 : 그 귀한 주의 사랑이 날 구원하시니
lines.id: Dimana Tuhan terkasih disalibkan,

lines.en: Who died to save us all.
lines.ko: 그 사랑 나도 본받아 주 위해 힘쓰리 아멘
lines.id: Siapa yang mati untuk menyelamatkan kita semua.
Ya ampun, sayang sekali Dia telah mencintai,
Dan kita juga harus mengasihi Dia,
Dan percayalah pada darah-Nya yang telah menebus,
Dan cobalah melakukan pekerjaan-pekerjaan-Nya.

lines.en: We may not know, we cannot tell,
lines.ko: 그 흉한 십자가에서 한 없는 고통을
lines.id: Kita mungkin tidak tahu, kita tidak bisa mengatakannya

lines.en: What pains he had to bear;
lines.ko: 이 세상 사람 위하여 당하신 것 일세
lines.id: Betapa sakitnya Dia harus menanggungnya

lines.en: But we believe it was for us
lines.id: Tapi kami yakin itu untuk kami

lines.en: He hung and suffered there.
lines.id: Dia digantung dan menderita di sana.
Ya ampun, sayang sekali Dia telah mencintai,
Dan kita juga harus mengasihi Dia,
Dan percayalah pada darah-Nya yang telah menebus,
Dan cobalah melakukan pekerjaan-pekerjaan-Nya.

lines.en: He died that we might be forgiv'n,
lines.ko: 그 흘린 보배 피로써 날 속량 했으니
lines.id: Tidak ada hal baik lainnya

lines.en: He died to make us good,
lines.id: Untuk menanggung harga dosa

lines.en: That we might go at last to heav'n,
lines.id: Dia hanya bisa membuka kunci gerbangnya

lines.en: Saved by his precious blood.
lines.id: Dari surga dan biarkan kami masuk.
Ya ampun, sayang sekali Dia telah mencintai,
Dan kita juga harus mengasihi Dia,
Dan percayalah pada darah-Nya yang telah menebus,
Dan cobalah melakukan pekerjaan-pekerjaan-Nya. Amin.

lines.en: There was no other good enough
To pay the price of sin;
He only could unlock the gate
Of heav'n, and let us in.
O dearly, dearly has he loved,
And we must love him too,
And trust in his redeeming blood,
And try his works to do.

title_en: Stricken, Smitten, and Afflicted

lines.en: Stricken, smitten, and afflicted,
See him dying on the tree!
lines.ko: 그가 나무 위에서 죽어가는 모습을 보세요!

lines.en: 'Tis the Christ by man rejected;
Yes, my soul, 'tis he, 'tis he.
lines.ko: 그래요, 내 영혼은 바로 그 사람입니다.

lines.en: 'Tis the long-expected Prophet,
lines.ko: 오랫동안 기다려온 선지자가 바로 이 분입니다.

lines.en: David's Son, yet David's Lord;
By his Son God now has spoken:
lines.ko: 하나님은 이제 자기 아들을 통하여 말씀하셨다.

lines.en: 'Tis the true and faithful Word.
Tell me, ye who hear him groaning,
lines.ko: 그의 탄식을 듣는 너희여, 내게 말하라.

lines.en: Was there ever grief like his?
Friends through fear his cause disowning,
lines.ko: 친구들은 두려움으로 인해 자신의 대의명분을 부인하고,

lines.en: Foes insulting his distress;
Many hands were raised to wound him,
lines.ko: 그를 상하게 하려고 많은 손이 들었고

lines.en: None would interpose to save;
lines.ko: 누구도 구원을 위해 개입하지 않을 것입니다.

lines.en: But the deepest stroke that pierced him
lines.ko: 하지만 그를 꿰뚫은 가장 깊은 일격은

lines.en: Was the stroke that Justice gave.
Ye who think of sin but lightly
Nor suppose the evil great
Here may view its nature rightly,
lines.ko: 여기서는 그 본성을 바르게 볼 수 있으며,

lines.en: Here its guilt may estimate.
lines.ko: 여기에서 그의 죄책감이 평가될 수 있습니다.

lines.en: Mark the Sacrifice appointed,
See who bears the awful load;
lines.ko: 누가 그 엄청난 짐을 지고 있는지 보십시오.

lines.en: 'Tis the Word, the Lord's Anointed,
Son of Man and Son of God.
Here we have a firm foundation,
lines.ko: 여기에 우리는 확고한 기초를 가지고 있습니다.

lines.en: Here the refuge of the lost;
Christ's the Rock of our salvation,
His the name of which we boast.
Lamb of God, for sinners wounded,
Sacrifice to cancel guilt!
None shall ever be confounded
Who on him their hope have built.

title_en: Sweet the Moments, Rich in Blessing

lines.en: Sweet the moments, rich in blessing,
Which before the cross I spend,
Life, and health, and peace possessing
From the sinner's dying friend.
Here I rest, in wonder viewing
lines.ko: 여기 나는 경이로움을 바라보며 쉬고 있다

lines.en: All my sins on Jesus laid,
Here I see redemption flowing
lines.ko: 여기서 나는 구원이 흐르는 것을 봅니다

lines.en: From the sacrifice he made.
Here I find the dawn of heaven,
While upon the cross I gaze
See my trespasses forgiven,
And my songs of triumph raise.
O that, near the cross abiding,
I may to the Saviour cleave,
Nought with him my heart dividing,
lines.ko: 그와 함께 내 마음을 나누는 것은 아무것도 아닙니다.

lines.en: All for him content to leave.
lines.ko: 그에게는 모든 것이 떠나는 데 만족합니다.

title_en: Hark! The Voice of Love and Mercy

lines.en: Hark! the voice of love and mercy
Sounds aloud from Calvary;
See, it rends the rocks asunder,
Shakes the earth, and veils the sky:
"It is finished!"
Hear the dying Saviour cry.
"It is finished!" O what pleasure
Do these precious words afford;
lines.ko: 이 귀중한 말을 감당할 수 있습니까?

lines.en: Heavenly blessings, without measure,
Flow to us from Christ the Lord:
"It is finished!"
Saints the dying words record.
Finished all the types and shadows
Of the ceremonial law;
Finished all that God had promised;
Death and hell no more shall awe:
lines.ko: 죽음과 지옥도 더 이상 두려워하지 않을 것입니다.

lines.en: "It is finished!"
Saints, from hence your comfort draw.
lines.ko: 성도 여러분, 이로써 여러분은 위로를 얻습니다.

lines.en: Tune your harps anew, ye seraphs,
Join to sing the glorious theme;
All in earth, and all in heaven,
lines.ko: 땅에 있는 모든 것, 하늘에 있는 모든 것,

lines.en: Join to praise Emmanuel's Name:
Alleluia!
Glory to the bleeding Lamb!

title_en: Were You There?

lines.en: O come and mourn with me a while
lines.id: O datanglah dan berkabunglah bersamaku sebentar

lines.en: O come ye to the Sav-iour's side
lines.id: Hai, datanglah ke sisi Juruselamat

lines.ko: 오 때로 그 일로 나는 떨려 떨려 떨려
lines.en: O come, to-geth-er let us mourn:
lines.id: O ayo, bersama-sama mari kita berkabung:

lines.en: Je-sus, our Lord, is cru-ci-fied!
lines.id: Yesus, Tuhan kami, disalibkan!

lines.en: Have we no tears to shed for Him,
lines.id: Apakah kita tidak punya air mata untuk ditumpahkan bagi-Nya,

lines.ko: 주님 그 나무 위에 달릴 때
lines.en: While sol-diers mock and foes de-ride
lines.id: Sementara tentara mengejek dan musuh menghalau

lines.ko: 오 때로 그 일로 나는 떨려 떨려 떨려
lines.en: Ah! look how pa-tient-ly He hangs:
lines.id: Ah! lihat betapa sabarnya Dia menggantung:

lines.en: Je-sus, our Lord, is cru-ci-fied!
lines.id: Yesus, Tuhan kami, disalibkan!

lines.en: Seven times He spake, seven words of love
lines.id: Tujuh kali Dia berbicara, tujuh kata cinta

lines.ko: 해가 그 밝은 빛을 잃을 때
lines.en: And all three hours His si-lence cried
lines.id: Dan selama tiga jam keheningannya menangis

lines.ko: 오 때로 그 일로 나는 떨려 떨려 떨려
lines.en: For mer-cy on the souls of men:
lines.id: Untuk belas kasihan pada jiwa manusia:

lines.en: Je-sus, our Lord, is cru-ci-fied!
lines.id: Yesus, Tuhan kami, disalibkan!

lines.en: O love of God, O sin of man!
lines.id: Wahai kasih Tuhan, wahai dosa manusia!

lines.ko: 주님 그 무덤 속에 뉘일 때
lines.en: In this dread act your strength is tried,
lines.id: Dalam tindakan yang menakutkan ini kekuatanmu diuji,

lines.ko: 오 때로 그 일로 나는 떨려 떨려 떨려
lines.en: And vic-to-ry re-mains with love:
lines.id: Dan kemenangan tetap ada dengan cinta:

lines.en: Je-sus, our Lord, is cru-ci-fied!
lines.id: Yesus, Tuhan kami, disalibkan!
apakah kamu ada di sana saat itu
Tuhan, ketika kamu keluar dari kubur

lines.ko: 오 그 일로 주께 영광 영광 영광
lines.id: Oh kemuliaan, kemuliaan, kemuliaan bagi Tuhan untuk itu
apakah kamu ada di sana saat itu

title_id: Apakah Anda Ada Saat Anda Menyalibkan Tuhanku?

title_en: What Wondrous Love Is This

lines.en: [English lyrics not available in the database for this revised hymn]
lines.ko: [이 개정된 찬송가의 데이터베이스에는 영어 가사가 없습니다.]

title_en: O Come and Mourn with Me Awhile

lines.en: O come and mourn with me a while
lines.id: O datanglah dan berkabunglah bersamaku sebentar

lines.en: O come ye to the Sav-iour's side
lines.id: Hai, datanglah ke sisi Juruselamat

lines.ko: 오 때로 그 일로 나는 떨려 떨려 떨려
lines.en: O come, to-geth-er let us mourn:
lines.id: O ayo, bersama-sama mari kita berkabung:

lines.en: Je-sus, our Lord, is cru-ci-fied!
lines.id: Yesus, Tuhan kami, disalibkan!

lines.en: Have we no tears to shed for Him,
lines.id: Apakah kita tidak punya air mata untuk ditumpahkan bagi-Nya,

lines.ko: 주님 그 나무 위에 달릴 때
lines.en: While sol-diers mock and foes de-ride
lines.id: Sementara tentara mengejek dan musuh menghalau

lines.ko: 오 때로 그 일로 나는 떨려 떨려 떨려
lines.en: Ah! look how pa-tient-ly He hangs:
lines.id: Ah! lihat betapa sabarnya Dia menggantung:

lines.en: Je-sus, our Lord, is cru-ci-fied!
lines.id: Yesus, Tuhan kami, disalibkan!

lines.en: Seven times He spake, seven words of love
lines.id: Tujuh kali Dia berbicara, tujuh kata cinta

lines.ko: 해가 그 밝은 빛을 잃을 때
lines.en: And all three hours His si-lence cried
lines.id: Dan selama tiga jam keheningannya menangis

lines.ko: 오 때로 그 일로 나는 떨려 떨려 떨려
lines.en: For mer-cy on the souls of men:
lines.id: Untuk belas kasihan pada jiwa manusia:

lines.en: Je-sus, our Lord, is cru-ci-fied!
lines.id: Yesus, Tuhan kami, disalibkan!

lines.en: O love of God, O sin of man!
lines.id: Wahai kasih Tuhan, wahai dosa manusia!

lines.ko: 주님 그 무덤 속에 뉘일 때
lines.en: In this dread act your strength is tried,
lines.id: Dalam tindakan yang menakutkan ini kekuatanmu diuji,

lines.ko: 오 때로 그 일로 나는 떨려 떨려 떨려
lines.en: And vic-to-ry re-mains with love:
lines.id: Dan kemenangan tetap ada dengan cinta:

lines.en: Je-sus, our Lord, is cru-ci-fied!
lines.id: Yesus, Tuhan kami, disalibkan!
apakah kamu ada di sana saat itu
Tuhan, ketika kamu keluar dari kubur

lines.ko: 오 그 일로 주께 영광 영광 영광
lines.id: Oh kemuliaan, kemuliaan, kemuliaan bagi Tuhan untuk itu
apakah kamu ada di sana saat itu

title_id: Apakah Anda Ada Saat Anda Menyalibkan Tuhanku?

title_en: Lift High the Cross

lines.en: [English lyrics not available in the database for this revised hymn]
lines.ko: [이 개정된 찬송가의 데이터베이스에는 영어 가사가 없습니다.]

title_en: Jesus, Keep Me near the Cross

lines.en: Jesus, keep me near the cross;
lines.id: Yesus, dekatkan aku dengan salib

lines.en: There a precious fountain,
lines.id: Di sana ada air mancur yang berharga,

lines.en: Free to alla healing stream
lines.id: Gratis untuk semua aliran penyembuhan

lines.en: Flows from Calvary's mountain.
lines.id: Mengalir dari gunung Cal-vary.
Di salib, di salib,
Jadilah kemuliaan bagi saya selamanya
Sampai jiwaku yang terpesona akan menemukannya
Beristirahatlah di luar sungai.

lines.en: In the cross, in the cross,
lines.id: Di dekat salib, jiwa yang gemetar,

lines.en: Be my glory ever;
lines.id: Cinta dan belas kasihan menemukanku

lines.en: Till my raptured soul shall find
lines.id: Di sanalah Bintang Fajar yang Terang

lines.en: Rest beyond the river.
lines.id: Pancarkan sinarnya ke sekelilingku.
Di salib, di salib,
Jadilah kemuliaan bagi saya selamanya
Sampai jiwaku yang terpesona akan menemukannya
Beristirahatlah di luar sungai.

lines.en: Near the cross, a trembling soul,
lines.id: Dekat salib! Wahai Anak Domba Tuhan,

lines.en: Love and mercy found me;
lines.id: Bawalah pemandangannya ke hadapanku

lines.en: There the bright and morning star
lines.id: Bantu aku berjalan dari hari ke hari

lines.en: Shed its beams around me.
lines.id: Dengan bayangannya di hadapanku.
Di salib, di salib,
Jadilah kemuliaan bagi saya selamanya
Sampai jiwaku yang terpesona akan menemukannya
Beristirahatlah di luar sungai.

lines.en: Near the cross! O Lamb of God,
lines.id: Di dekat salib aku akan melihat dan menunggu,

lines.en: Bring its scenes before me;
lines.id: Berharap, percaya selamanya,

lines.en: Help me walk from day to day
lines.id: Sampai aku mencapai untaian emas

lines.en: With its shadow o'er me.
lines.ko: 요단강을 건넌 후 영원안식 얻네 아멘
lines.id: Hanya berada di seberang sungai.
Di salib, di salib,
Jadilah kemuliaan bagi saya selamanya
Sampai jiwaku yang terpesona akan menemukannya
Beristirahatlah di luar sungai. Amin.

lines.en: Near the cross I'll watch and wait,
Hoping, trusting ever,
Till I reach the golden strand
Just beyond the river.

alt_titles: Jesus, keep me near the cross

title_en: Come, Ye Faithful, Raise the Strain

lines.en: Come, ye faithful, raise the strain
Of triumphant gladness;
God hath brought his Israel
Into joy from sadness;
Loosed from Pharaoh's bitter yoke
Jacob's sons and daughters;
Led them with unmoistened foot
Through the Red Sea waters.
'Tis the spring of souls today;
Christ hath burst his prison,
And from three days' sleep in death
As a sun hath risen;
All the winter of our sins,
Long and dark, is flying
From his light, to whom we give
Laud and praise undying.
Now the queen of seasons, bright
With the day of splendor,
With the royal feast of feasts,
Comes its joy to render;
Comes to glad Jerusalem,
Who with true affection
Welcomes in unwearied strains
Jesus' resurrection.
Neither might the gates of death,
Nor the tomb's dark portal,
Nor the watchers, nor the seal
Hold thee as a mortal:
But today amidst the twelve
Thou didst stand, bestowing
That thy peace, which evermore
Passeth human knowing.

Long and dark, is flying
From his light, to whom we give
Laud and praise undying.
Now the queen of seasons, bright
With the day of splendor,

Neither might the gates of death,

Hold thee as a mortal:
But today amidst the twelve
Thou didst stand, bestowing
That thy peace, which evermore
Passeth human knowing.

title_en: The Day of Resurrection!

lines.en: The day of resurrection!
Earth, tell it out abroad;
The Passover of gladness,
The Passover of God.
From death to life eternal,
From this world to the sky,
Our Christ hath brought us over
With hymns of victory.
Our hearts be pure from evil,
That we may see aright
The Lord in rays eternal
Of resurrection-light;
And, listening to his accents,
May hear, so calm and plain,
His own "All hail!" and hearing,
May raise the victor strain.
Now let the heav'ns be joyful,
Let earth her song begin;
Let the round world keep triumph,
And all that is therein;
lines.ko: 그리고 그 안에 있는 모든 것;

lines.en: Invisible and visible,
Their notes let all things blend,
lines.ko: 그들의 노트는 모든 것을 섞이게 하고,

lines.en: For Christ the Lord hath risen,
Our joy that hath no end.

title_en: Welcome, Happy Morning!

lines.ko: 즐겁도다 이 날 세세에 할 말
lines.en: "Wel-come, hap-py morn-ing!" Age to age shall say
lines.id: "Selamat datang, selamat pagi!" Usia ke usia akan berkata

lines.en: Hell to-day is van-quished! Heav'n is won to-day!
lines.id: Neraka hari ini sudah lenyap! Surga dimenangkan hari ini!

lines.en: Lo! the Dead is liv-ing, God for-ev-er-more,
lines.id: Lihat! orang mati tetap hidup, Tuhan selamanya,

lines.en: Him, their true Cre-a-tor, All His work a-dore
lines.id: Dia, Pencipta sejati mereka, Semua karya-Nya dikagumi

title_en: Good Christian Men, Rejoice and Sing!

lines.en: Good Christian men, rejoice,
With heart, and soul, and voice;
Give ye heed to what we say:
Jesus Christ is born today;
Earth and heav'n before him bow,
And he is in the manger now.
Christ is born today!
Good Christian men, rejoice,
With heart, and soul, and voice;
Now ye hear of endless bliss:
lines.ko: 이제 당신은 끝없는 행복에 대해 듣습니다.

lines.en: Jesus Christ was born for this!
He hath op'ed the heavenly door,
And man is blessed evermore.
Christ was born for this!
Good Christian men, rejoice,
With heart, and soul, and voice;
Now ye need not fear the grave:
lines.ko: 이제 너희는 무덤을 두려워할 필요가 없느니라.

lines.en: Jesus Christ was born to save!
Calls you one and calls you all
To gain his everlasting hall.
Christ was born to save!

title_id: Wahai Putra dan Putri, Marilah Kita Bernyanyi

title_en: Jesus Christ Is Risen Today.

lines.en: Jesus Christ is risen today, Alleluia!
Our triumphant holy day, Alleluia!
Who did once, upon the cross, Alleluia!
lines.ko: 한때 십자가 위에서 알렐루야를 행하신 분!

lines.en: Suffer to redeem our loss. Alleluia!
lines.ko: 우리의 손실을 보상하기 위해 고통을 겪으십시오. 할렐루야!

lines.en: Hymns of praise then let us sing, Alleluia!
Unto Christ our heav'nly King, Alleluia!
lines.ko: 우리의 하늘에 계신 왕이신 그리스도께 알렐루야!

lines.en: Who endured the cross and grave, Alleluia!
Sinners to redeem and save. Alleluia!
But the pains which he endured, Alleluia!
Our salvation have procured; Alleluia!
Now above the sky he's King, Alleluia!
lines.ko: 이제 하늘 위에서 그는 왕이십니다, 알렐루야!

lines.en: Where the angels ever sing. Alleluia!
Sing we to our God above, Alleluia!
lines.ko: 위에 계신 우리 하느님께 노래합시다, 알렐루야!

lines.en: Praise eternal as his love; Alleluia!
Praise him, all ye heavenly host, Alleluia!
lines.ko: 그분을 찬양하라, 하늘의 모든 군대시여, 알렐루야!

lines.en: Father, Son, and Holy Ghost. Alleluia!

lines.id: Kemenangan hidup telah dimenangkan

lines.en: Let shouts of ho-ly joy out-burst.

lines.id: Al-le-lu-ia!

lines.en: He ris-es glo-rious from the dead
lines.id: Dia bangkit dengan gemilang dari kematian

lines.en: All glo-ry to our ris-en Head!
