title_en: Up from the Grave He Arose

lines.en: Low in the grave he lay
lines.ko: 무덤에 머물러 예수 내 구주 새벽 기다렸네 예수 내 주
lines.id: Rendah di dalam kubur Dia meletakkan Yesus Juruselamatku!

lines.en: Jesus, my Saviour,
lines.id: Menunggu hari yang akan datang Yesus, Tuhanku!

lines.en: Waiting the coming day
lines.ko: 어두움을 이기시고 나와서 성도 함께 길이 다스리시네
lines.id: Bangkit dari kubur Dia bangkit,

lines.en: Jesus, my Lord.
lines.id: Dengan kemenangan besar atas musuh-musuhnya:
Dia bangkit sebagai Pemenang dari dunia gelap,
Dan Dia hidup selama-lamanya bersama orang-orang kudus-Nya untuk memerintah,
Dia bangkit! Dia bangkit!
Hal-le-lu-jah! Kristus
a-mawar!

lines.en: Up from the grave he arose
lines.ko: 헛되이 지키네 예수 내 구주 헛되이 봉하네 예수 내 주
lines.id: Sia-sia mereka menjaga tempat tidur-Nya Yesus Juruselamatku!

lines.en: With a mighty triumph o'er his foes.
lines.id: Sia-sia mereka menyegel Yesus yang mati, Tuhanku!

lines.en: He arose a victor from the dark domain,
lines.ko: 어두움을 이기시고 나와서 성도 함께 길이 다스리시네
lines.id: Bangkit dari kubur Dia bangkit,

lines.en: And he lives for ever with his saints to reign.
lines.id: Dengan kemenangan besar atas musuh-musuhnya:

lines.en: He arose! He arose! Hallelujah! Christ arose!
lines.id: Dia bangkit sebagai Pemenang dari dunia gelap,
Dan Dia hidup selama-lamanya bersama orang-orang kudus-Nya untuk memerintah,
Dia bangkit! Dia bangkit!
Hal-le-lu-jah! Kristus
a-mawar!

lines.en: Vainly they watch his bed
lines.ko: 거기 못 가두네 예수 내 구주 우리를 살리네 예수 내 주
lines.id: Kematian tidak dapat menahan mangsanya Yesus Juruselamatku!

lines.en: Jesus, my Saviour;
lines.id: Dia merobek jeruji itu, Ya Tuhanku!

lines.en: Vainly they seal the dead
lines.ko: 어두움을 이기시고 나와서 성도 함께 길이 다스리시네
lines.id: Bangkit dari kubur Dia bangkit,

lines.en: Jesus, my Lord.
lines.id: Dengan kemenangan besar atas musuh-musuhnya:
Dia bangkit sebagai Pemenang dari dunia gelap,
Dan Dia hidup selama-lamanya bersama orang-orang kudus-Nya untuk memerintah,
Dia bangkit! Dia bangkit!
Hal-le-lu-jah! Kristus
a-mawar!

lines.en: Death cannot keep his prey
Jesus, my Saviour;
He tore the bars away
Jesus, my Lord.

alt_titles: Up from the grave he arose
title_id: Rendah di dalam Kubur Dia Berbaring

title_en: Christ the Lord is Risen Today

lines.en: "Christ the Lord is risen today," Alleluia!
lines.id: Tuhan benar-benar telah bangkit

lines.en: Sons of men and angels say; Alleluia!
lines.id: Kuburan telah menjadi mangsa terakhirnya!

lines.en: Raise your joys and triumphs high; Alleluia!
lines.id: Bersama Dia akan muncul benih tebusan,

lines.en: Sing ye heav'ns, and earth, reply: Alleluia!
lines.id: Untuk memerintah di hari tanpa akhir.

lines.en: Vain the stone, the watch, the seal; Alleluia!
lines.id: Tuhan benar-benar telah bangkit!

lines.en: Christ has burst the gates of hell: Alleluia!
lines.id: Saat para malaikat merawat, dengarlah:

lines.en: Death in vain forbids his rise; Alleluia!
lines.id: Sampai ke pelataran surga, dengan cepat,

lines.en: Christ hath opened Paradise. Alleluia!
lines.id: Beruang yang penuh kegembiraan.

lines.en: Lives again our glorious King; Alleluia!
lines.id: Lalu bangunkan kecapi emasmu

lines.en: Where, O death, is now thy sting? Alleluia!
lines.id: Dan mainkan setiap akord yang ceria

lines.en: Once he died, our souls to save; Alleluia!
lines.id: Bergabunglah, semua paduan suara surgawi yang cemerlang,

lines.en: Where thy victory, O grave? Alleluia!
lines.id: Untuk menyanyikan ri-sen Tuhan kami.

lines.en: Soar we now where Christ has led, Alleluia!
lines.id: Tuhan benar-benar telah bangkit!

lines.en: Following our exalted Head; Alleluia!
lines.id: Dia hidup, untuk tidak mati lagi

lines.en: Made like him, like him we rise: Alleluia!
lines.id: Dia hidup, alasan orang berdosa memohon,

lines.en: Ours the cross, the grave, the skies. Alleluia!
lines.id: Kutukan dan rasa malu siapa yang Dia tanggung. Amin.

lines.en: Hail, the Lord of earth and heav'n! Alleluia!
Praise to thee by both be giv'n; Alleluia!
Thee we greet triumphant now; Alleluia!
Hail, the Resurrection Thou! Alleluia!

title_en: That Easter Day with Joy Was Bright

lines.en: [English lyrics not available in the database for this revised hymn]
lines.ko: [이 개정된 찬송가의 데이터베이스에는 영어 가사가 없습니다.]

title_en: Christ Jesus Lay in Death’s Strong Bands
title_ko: 그리스도 예수께서는 죽음의 강한 결박 속에 누워 계셨습니다 (자체번역)

lines.en: Christ Jesus lay in death's strong bands,
lines.ko: 그리스도 예수께서는 죽음의 강한 결박에 매여 계셨습니다.

lines.en: For our offenses given;
But now at God's right hand he stands
lines.ko: 그러나 이제는 그가 하나님 우편에 서 계시느니라

lines.en: And brings us life from heaven;
lines.ko: 그리고 우리에게 하늘에서 생명을 가져다 주십니다.

lines.en: Therefore let us joyful be
And sing to God right thankfully
Loud songs of hallelujah. Hallelujah!
It was a strange and dreadful strife
When life and death contended;
The victory remained with life,
The reign of death was ended;
Holy Scripture plainly saith
That death is swallowed up by death,
His sting is lost for ever. Hallelujah!
Here the true Paschal Lamb we see,
lines.ko: 여기 우리가 보는 참된 유월절 양이 있습니다.

lines.en: Whom God so freely gave us;
lines.ko: 하나님이 우리에게 이 사람을 값없이 주셨으니

lines.en: He died on the accursed tree
So strong his love!to save us.
lines.ko: 우리를 구원하기 위한 그분의 사랑이 너무나 강합니다.

lines.en: See, his blood doth mark our door;
lines.ko: 보십시오, 그의 피는 우리 문에 표시가 되어 있습니다.

lines.en: Faith points to it, death passes o'er,
And Satan cannot harm us. Hallelujah!
lines.ko: 그리고 사탄은 우리에게 해를 끼칠 수 없습니다. 할렐루야!

lines.en: So let us keep the festival
Whereto the Lord invites us;
Christ is himself the Joy of all,
The Sun that warms and lights us.
By his grace he doth impart
Eternal sunshine to the heart;
The night of sin is ended. Hallelujah!
Then let us feast this joyful day
lines.ko: 그럼 우리 이 즐거운 날을 즐기자

lines.en: On Christ, the Bread of heaven;
The Word of grace hath purged away
The old and evil leaven.
Christ alone our souls will feed,
He is our meat and drink indeed;
Faith lives upon no other. Hallelujah!
lines.ko: 믿음은 다른 어떤 것에도 적용되지 않습니다. 할렐루야!

title_en: Christ Is Risen from the Dead

lines.en: [English lyrics not available in the database for this revised hymn]
lines.ko: [이 개정된 찬송가의 데이터베이스에는 영어 가사가 없습니다.]

title_en: I Know That My Redeemer Lives – Glory Hallelujah!

lines.en: I know that my Redeemer lives,
lines.id: Saya tahu bahwa Penebus Ulang saya hidup,

lines.en: And ever prays for me;
lines.ko: 그 큰 사랑 인하여서 나 자유 얻었네
lines.id: Dan selalu berdoa untukku

lines.en: A token of his love he gives,
lines.id: Tanda kasih sayang-Nya yang Dia berikan,

lines.en: A pledge of liberty.
lines.id: Sebuah janji kebebasan.

lines.en: I find him lifting up my head;
lines.ko: 나의 구원되신 주님 내 소망 되신 주
lines.id: Dia menghendaki agar aku menjadi kudus

lines.en: He brings salvation near;
lines.ko: 항상 나와 함께 하셔 곧 다시 오시리
lines.id: Siapa yang dapat menahan kehendak-Nya

lines.en: His presence makes me free indeed
lines.id: Nasihat kasih karunia-Nya ada dalam diriku

lines.en: And he will soon appear.
lines.id: Dia pasti akan memenuhinya.

lines.en: He wills that I should holy be:
lines.ko: 나를 거룩하게 하려 주 나를 부르니
lines.id: Ya Tuhan, aku menutup telepon pada firman-Mu

lines.en: Who can withstand his will?
lines.ko: 주의 은혜 내게 넘쳐 주 뜻을 이루리
lines.id: Saya sangat percaya

lines.en: The counsel of his grace in me
lines.id: Engkau akan kembali dan mengklaim aku, Tuhan,

lines.en: He surely shall fulfil.
lines.id: Dan untuk menerima kembali diri sendiri.

lines.en: Jesus, I hang upon thy Word:
lines.ko: 굳센 믿음 나가지고 주 말씀 따르면
lines.id: Ketika Tuhan adalah milikku, dan aku milik-Nya,

lines.en: I steadfastly believe
lines.ko: 주님 다시 강림할 때 날 영접 하시리 아멘
lines.id: Dari kepemilikan Par-a-dise

lines.en: Thou wilt return and claim me, Lord,
lines.id: Aku merasakan kebahagiaan yang tak terkira,

lines.en: And to thyself receive.
lines.id: Dan istirahat yang abadi.

title_id: Saya Tahu bahwa Penebus Saya Hidup

title_en: Lift Up, Lift Up Your Voices Now

lines.en: Lift up, lift up your voices now;
The whole wide world rejoices now:
The Lord hath triumphed gloriously,
The Lord shall reign victoriously.
In vain with stone the cave they barred;
lines.ko: 그들은 돌로 동굴을 막았으나 헛된 일이었다.

lines.en: In vain the watch kept ward and guard:
Majestic from the spoiled tomb,
In pomp of triumph Christ is come.
He binds in chains the ancient foe;
A countless host he frees from woe,
And heav'n's high portal open flies,
lines.ko: 그리고 heav'n의 높은 포털이 열려 날아갑니다.

lines.en: For Christ has ris'n, and man shall rise.
And all he did, and all he bare,
lines.ko: 그리고 그가 행한 모든 것과 그가 낳은 모든 것,

lines.en: He gives us as our own to share;
lines.ko: 그분은 우리를 공유할 수 있는 것으로 주셨습니다.

lines.en: And hope and joy and peace begin,
For Christ has won, and man shall win.
lines.ko: 그리스도께서 승리하셨고 사람도 승리할 것이기 때문입니다.

lines.en: O Victor, aid us in the fight,
And lead through death to realms of light:
lines.ko: 그리고 죽음을 거쳐 빛의 영역으로 인도합니다.

lines.en: We safely pass where thou hast trod;
lines.ko: 우리는 당신이 밟으신 곳을 안전하게 지나갑니다.

lines.en: In thee we die to rise to God.
lines.ko: 당신 안에서 우리는 죽어 하나님께로 올라갑니다.

lines.en: Thy flock, from sin and death set free,
lines.ko: 당신의 양 떼는 죄와 사망에서 해방되어

lines.en: Glad alleluias raise to thee;
And ever with the heavenly host
Praise Father, Son, and Holy Ghost.

title_en: Alleluia! Alleluia!

lines.en: Al-le-lu-ia! Al-le-lu-ia!
lines.id: Al-le-lu-ia! Al-le-lu-ia!

lines.ko: 싸움은 모두 끝나고 생명의 승리 얻었네
lines.en: Al-le-lu-ia!
lines.id: Al-le-lu-ia!

lines.en: The strife is o'er, the bat-tle done
lines.id: Perselisihan sudah berakhir, pertempuran sudah selesai

lines.en: The vic-to-ry of life is won
lines.id: Kemenangan hidup telah dimenangkan

lines.en: The song of tri-umph has be-gun.
lines.id: Lagu kemenangan telah dimulai.

lines.en: Al-le-lu-ia!
lines.id: Al-le-lu-ia!

lines.en: Al-le-lu-ia! Al-le-lu-ia!
lines.id: Al-le-lu-ia! Al-le-lu-ia!

lines.en: Al-le-lu-ia!
lines.id: Al-le-lu-ia!

lines.en: The powers of death have done their worst,
lines.id: Kuasa maut telah melakukan yang terburuk,

lines.en: But Christ their le-gions hath dispersed
lines.id: Namun, demi Tuhan, pasukan mereka telah bubar

lines.en: Let shouts of ho-ly joy out-burst.
lines.id: Biarlah sorak-sorai sukacita kudus meledak.

lines.en: Al-le-lu-ia!
lines.id: Al-le-lu-ia!

lines.en: Al-le-lu-ia! Al-le-lu-ia!
lines.id: Al-le-lu-ia! Al-le-lu-ia!

lines.en: Al-le-lu-ia!
lines.id: Al-le-lu-ia!

lines.en: The three sad days are quick-ly sped
lines.id: Tiga hari yang menyedihkan berlalu dengan cepat

lines.en: He ris-es glo-rious from the dead
lines.id: Dia bangkit dengan gemilang dari kematian

lines.en: All glo-ry to our ris-en Head!
lines.id: Segala kemuliaan bagi Kepala kita yang telah bangkit!

lines.en: Al-le-lu-ia!
lines.id: Al-le-lu-ia!

lines.en: Al-le-lu-ia! Al-le-lu-ia!
lines.id: Al-le-lu-ia! Al-le-lu-ia!

lines.en: Al-le-lu-ia!
lines.id: Al-le-lu-ia!

lines.en: He closed the yawn-ing gates of hell
lines.id: Dia menutup gerbang neraka yang menganga

lines.ko: 사망의 문을 잠그고 생명의 문을 여셨네
lines.en: The bars from heav'n's high por-tals fell:
lines.id: Jeruji-jeruji dari pintu-pintu surga yang tinggi berjatuhan:

lines.en: Let hymns of praise His tri-umphs tell.
lines.id: Biarlah nyanyian pujian kemenangan-Nya menceritakan.

lines.en: Al-le-lu-ia! A-men.
lines.id: Al-le-lu-ia! Amin.

title_en: This Joyful Eastertide

lines.en: [English lyrics not available in the database for this revised hymn]
lines.ko: [이 개정된 찬송가의 데이터베이스에는 영어 가사가 없습니다.]

title_en: Jesus, Lord, Redeemer

lines.en: Jesus, Lord, Redeemer,
Once for sinners slain,
lines.ko: 한 번 죽임을 당한 죄인들을 위하여,

lines.en: Crucified in weakness,
Raised in pow'r to reign,
Dwelling with the Father,
Endless in thy days,
Unto thee be glory,
Honor, blessing, praise.
Faithful ones, communing,
Toward the close of day,
Desolate and weary,
Met thee in the way.
So, when sun is setting,
Come to us, and show
All the truth, and in us
Make our hearts to glow.
In the upper chamber,
Where the ten, in fear,
Gathered sad and troubled,
There thou didst appear.
So, O Lord, this evening,
Bid our sorrow cease;
Breathing on us, Saviour,
Say, "I give you peace."

title_en: Worship Christ, the Risen King!

lines.en: [English lyrics not available in the database for this revised hymn]
lines.ko: [이 개정된 찬송가의 데이터베이스에는 영어 가사가 없습니다.]

title_en: Morning Sun

lines.en: [English lyrics not available in the database for this revised hymn]
lines.ko: [이 개정된 찬송가의 데이터베이스에는 영어 가사가 없습니다.]

title_en: Jesus Christ Has Triumphed Now

lines.en: [English lyrics not available in the database for this revised hymn]
lines.ko: [이 개정된 찬송가의 데이터베이스에는 영어 가사가 없습니다.]

title_en: A Hymn of Glory Let Us Sing

lines.en: A hymn of glory let us sing;
New songs thro'out the world shall ring:
lines.ko: 전 세계에 새로운 노래가 울릴 것이다:

lines.en: Christ, by a road before untrod,
Ascendeth to the throne of God.
Alleluia!
The holy apostolic band
Upon the Mount of Olives stand;
And with his followers they see
lines.ko: 그리고 그의 추종자들과 함께 그들은 본다

lines.en: Jesus' resplendent majesty.
To whom the angels, drawing nigh,
"Why stand and gaze upon the sky?
This is the Saviour," thus they say;
"This is his noble triumph day."
"Again shall ye behold him so
As ye today have seen him go,
lines.ko: 오늘 너희가 그가 가는 것을 본 것처럼

lines.en: In glorious pomp ascending high,
Up to the portals of the sky."

title_en: Hail the Day That Sees Him Rise

lines.en: [English lyrics not available in the database for this revised hymn]
lines.ko: [이 개정된 찬송가의 데이터베이스에는 영어 가사가 없습니다.]

title_en: See, the Conqueror Mounts in Triumph

lines.en: See, the Conqu'ror mounts in triumph;
See the King in royal state,
Riding on the clouds, his chariot,
To his heav'nly palace gate:
Hark! the choirs of angel voices
Joyful Alleluias sing
And the portals high are lifted
To receive their heav'nly King.
Who is this that comes in glory,
With the trump of jubilee?
Lord of battles, God of armies,
He has gained the victory;
He who on the cross did suffer,
He who from the grave arose,
He has vanquished sin and Satan,
He by death has spoiled his foes.
lines.ko: 그는 죽음으로 그의 적들을 망쳐 놓았습니다.

lines.en: Thou hast raised our human nature
In the clouds to God's right hand;
There we sit in heav'nly places,
lines.ko: 거기 우리는 하늘 높은 곳에 앉아 있습니다.

lines.en: There with thee in glory stand:
lines.ko: 영광 중에 당신과 함께 서 계십니다.

lines.en: Jesus reigns, adored by angels,
Man with God is on the throne;
lines.ko: 하나님과 함께 있는 사람이 보좌 위에 있습니다.

lines.en: Mighty Lord, in thine ascension
We by faith behold our own.
lines.ko: 우리는 믿음으로 우리 자신의 것을 봅니다.

title_en: Who Shall Ascend the Mountain of the Lord

lines.en: [English lyrics not available in the database for this revised hymn]
lines.ko: [이 개정된 찬송가의 데이터베이스에는 영어 가사가 없습니다.]

title_en: Golden Harps Are Sounding

lines.en: Golden harps are sounding, angel voices ring,
lines.ko: 황금 하프가 울려퍼지고, 천사의 목소리가 울리고,

lines.en: Pearly gates are opened, opened for the King:
Christ, the King of glory, Jesus King of love,
lines.ko: 그리스도, 영광의 왕, 사랑의 왕 예수,

lines.en: Is gone up in triumph to his throne above.
lines.ko: 승리하여 위에 있는 그의 보좌에 올라가셨느니라.

lines.en: All his work is ended, joyfully we sing:
lines.ko: 그의 모든 일은 끝났고 우리는 기쁘게 노래합니다.

lines.en: Jesus hath ascended: Glory to our King!
lines.ko: 예수님께서 승천하셨습니다. 우리 왕께 영광을 돌립니다!

lines.en: He who came to save us, he who bled and died,
lines.ko: 우리를 구원하러 오신 분, 피를 흘리시며 돌아가신 분,

lines.en: Now is crowned with glory at his Father's side.
lines.ko: 이제 그의 아버지 곁에서 영광의 관을 쓰셨느니라.

lines.en: Never more to suffer, never more to die,
lines.ko: 더 이상 고통받지 않고, 더 이상 죽지 않을 것입니다.

lines.en: Jesus, King of glory, is gone up on high.
Praying for his children in that blessed place,
lines.ko: 그 축복받은 곳에서 그의 자녀들을 위해 기도하며,

lines.en: Calling them to glory, sending them his grace;
lines.ko: 그들을 영광으로 부르시고 그의 은혜를 보내시며

lines.en: His bright home preparing, faithful ones for you;
lines.ko: 그의 밝은 집이 너희를 위하여 예비하고 신실한 자들을 준비하며

lines.en: Jesus ever liveth, ever loveth too.
lines.ko: 예수님은 언제나 살아 계시고 언제나 사랑하십니다.

alt_titles: Golden harps are sounding

title_en: The Golden Gates Are Lifted up

lines.en: The golden gates are lifted up,
The doors are opened wide;
The King of Glory is gone in
Unto his Father's side.
Thou art gone up before us, Lord,
To make for us a place,
That we may be where now thou art,
lines.ko: 지금 당신이 계신 곳에 우리도 있게 하소서.

lines.en: And look upon God's face.
And ever on our earthly path
A gleam of glory lies,
A light still breaks behind the cloud
lines.ko: 구름 뒤에서 빛이 아직도 부서지고 있다

lines.en: That veiled thee from our eyes.
Lift up our hearts, lift up our minds:
lines.ko: 우리의 마음을 들어 올리십시오. 우리의 생각을 들어 올리십시오.

lines.en: Let thy dear grace be giv'n,
That, while we wander here below,
Our treasure be in heav'n;
That where thou art, at God's right hand,
lines.ko: 네가 있는 곳은 하나님 우편에 있는 곳이니라.

lines.en: Our hope, our love, may be:
lines.ko: 우리의 희망, 우리의 사랑은 다음과 같습니다.

lines.en: Dwell thou in us, that we may dwell
lines.ko: 우리 안에 거하사 우리로 하여금 거하게 하소서

lines.en: For evermore in thee.

title_en: Crown Him with Many Crowns

lines.en: Crown him with many crowns,
lines.id: Mahkotai Dia dengan banyak mahkota,

lines.en: The Lamb upon his throne;
lines.ko: 저 천사 기쁜 노래가 온 땅에 퍼지네
lines.id: Anak Domba di atas takhta-Nya

lines.en: Hark! how the heav'nly anthem drowns
lines.ko: 내 혼아 깨어서 주 찬송 하여라
lines.id: Dengarkan! Bagaimana makhluk surgawi tenggelam

lines.en: All music but its own:
lines.ko: 온 백성 죄를 속하신 만왕의 왕일세
lines.id: Semua musik kecuali musiknya sendiri:

lines.en: Awake, my soul, and sing
lines.id: A-Bangun, jiwaku, dan bernyanyi

lines.en: Of him who died for thee,
lines.id: Tentang Dia yang mati untukmu,

lines.en: And hail him as thy matchless King
lines.id: Dan pujilah Dia sebagai Rajamu yang tiada tandingannya

lines.en: Through all eternity.
lines.id: Melalui semua kekekalan.

lines.en: Crown him the Lord of love;
lines.id: Mahkotakan Dia sebagai Penguasa Cinta

lines.en: Behold his hands and side,
lines.ko: 그 손과 몸의 상처가 영광 중 빛나네
lines.id: Lihatlah tangan dan sisi-Nya,

lines.en: Rich wounds, yet visible above,
lines.id: Luka yang kaya, namun terlihat di atas,

lines.en: In beauty glorified:
lines.ko: 고난의 신비 알고자 늘 흠모 하도다
lines.id: Dalam keindahan yang mulia:

lines.en: No angel in the sky
lines.id: Tidak ada sudut di langit

lines.en: Can fully bear that sight,
lines.id: Dapat sepenuhnya menahan pemandangan itu

lines.en: But downward bends his burning eye
lines.id: Namun matanya yang menyala-nyala membungkuk ke bawah

lines.en: At mysteries so bright.
lines.id: Di misteri begitu cerah.

lines.en: Crown him the Lord of peace;
lines.id: Mahkotai Dia dengan Tuhan perdamaian

lines.en: Whose pow'r a scepter sways
lines.ko: 온 세상 전쟁 그치고 참 평화 오겠네
lines.id: Yang kekuatannya bergoyang

lines.en: From pole to pole, that wars may cease,
lines.ko: 주 보좌 앞에서 온 백성 엎드려
lines.id: Dari kutub ke kutub, agar peperangan dapat berhenti,

lines.en: Absorbed in prayer and praise:
lines.ko: 그 한량 없는 영광을 늘 찬송 합니다 아멘
lines.id: Terserap dalam doa dan pujian:

lines.en: His reign shall know no end;
lines.id: Pemerintahannya tidak akan ada habisnya

lines.en: And round his pierced feet
lines.id: Dan di sekeliling kaki-Nya yang terpotong-potong

lines.en: Fair flowers of Paradise extend
lines.id: Bunga indah dari Par-a-dise ex-tend

lines.en: Their fragrance ever sweet.
lines.id: Keharuman mereka selalu manis, A-men.

lines.en: Crown him the Lord of years,
The Potentate of time;
Creator of the rolling spheres,
Ineffably sublime:
All hail, Redeemer, hail!
For thou hast died for me:
Thy praise shall never, never fail
Throughout eternity.

title_en: All Hail the Power of Jesus’ Name!

lines.en: All hail the power of Jesus' Name!
Let angels prostrate fall;
Bring forth the royal diadem,
And crown him Lord of all.
lines.ko: 그리고 그를 모든 것의 주님으로 삼으십시오.

lines.en: Crown him, ye martyrs of your God
lines.ko: 그에게 왕관을 씌워라, 너희 하느님의 순교자들아

lines.en: Who from his altar call;
Extol the Stem of Jesse's rod,
And crown him Lord of all.
lines.ko: 그리고 그를 모든 것의 주님으로 삼으십시오.

lines.en: Ye seed of Israel's chosen race,
Ye ransomed of the fall,
Hail him who saves you by his grace,
lines.ko: 그의 은혜로 너희를 구원하시는 이를 찬송할지어다

lines.en: And crown him Lord of all.
lines.ko: 그리고 그를 모든 것의 주님으로 삼으십시오.

lines.en: Sinners, whose love can ne'er forget
lines.ko: 사랑을 결코 잊을 수 없는 죄인들

lines.en: The wormwood and the gall,
Go spread your trophies at his feet,
lines.ko: 가서 그의 발 앞에 트로피를 펼쳐놓으세요.

lines.en: And crown him Lord of all.
lines.ko: 그리고 그를 모든 것의 주님으로 삼으십시오.

lines.en: Let ev'ry kindred, ev'ry tribe,
On this terrestrial ball,
To him all majesty ascribe,
And crown him Lord of all.
lines.ko: 그리고 그를 모든 것의 주님으로 삼으십시오.

lines.en: O that with yonder sacred throng
lines.ko: 오 저 신성한 군중과 함께하는 것

lines.en: We at his feet may fall;
lines.ko: 우리는 그분의 발 앞에 넘어질 수도 있습니다.

lines.en: We'll join the everlasting song,
And crown him Lord of all.
lines.ko: 그리고 그를 모든 것의 주님으로 삼으십시오.

alt_titles: All hail the power of Jesus' Name (tune 3)
All hail the power of Jesus' Name (tune 2)

All hail the power of Jesus' Name (tune 2)

title_en: The Head That Once Was Crowned with Thorns

lines.en: The Head that once was crowned with thorns
Is crowned with glory now;
A royal diadem adorns
The mighty Victor's brow.
The highest place that heav'n affords
Is his, is his by right,
lines.ko: 그의 것, 그의 것, 당연히 그의 것,

lines.en: The King of kings and Lord of lords,
And heav'n's eternal Light:
The Joy of all who dwell above,
The Joy of all below
To whom he manifests his love,
And grants his Name to know.
To them the cross, with all its shame,
lines.ko: 그들에게는 그 모든 부끄러움과 함께 십자가가

lines.en: With all its grace, is giv'n;
Their name an everlasting name,
Their joy the joy of heav'n.
They suffer with their Lord below,
lines.ko: 그들은 아래에서 그들의 주님과 함께 고난을 당하고

lines.en: They reign with him above;
Their profit and their joy to know
The myst'ry of his love.
The cross he bore is life and health,
Though shame and death to him;
His people's hope, his people's wealth,
lines.ko: 그의 백성의 희망, 그의 백성의 부,

lines.en: Their everlasting theme.

title_en: Look, Ye Saints, the Sight Is Glorious

lines.en: Look, ye saints, the sight is glorious;
lines.ko: 영광스런 주를 보라 고난 받은 그 모습
lines.id: Lihatlah, wahai orang-orang kudus, pemandangannya sungguh menakjubkan

lines.en: See the Man of Sorrows now;
lines.id: Lihat "Pria yang penuh kesedihan" sekarang,

lines.en: From the fight returned victorious,
lines.ko: 왕의 왕이 되신 주께 면류관을 드리세
lines.id: Dari pertarungan kembali menjadi pemenang

lines.en: Ev'ry knee to him shall bow:
lines.ko: 왕의 왕이 되신 주께 면류관을 드리세
lines.id: Setiap orang yang berlutut kepada-Nya akan bertelut!

lines.en: Crown him! crown him!
lines.id: Mahkotai Dia! mahkotai Dia! Mahkotai Dia! mahkotai Dia!

lines.en: Crowns become the Victor's brow.
lines.id: Raja di atas segala raja, dan Tuan di atas segala tuan,
Mahkotai Dia! mahkotai Dia! Mahkotai Dia! mahkotai Dia!
Raja di atas segala raja, dan Tuan di atas segala tuan.

lines.en: Crown the Saviour, angels, crown him;
lines.ko: 보좌 위에 계신 주께 면류관을 드리세
lines.id: Mahkotai Juruselamat! Malaikat, mahkotai Dia!

lines.en: Rich the trophies Jesus brings;
lines.ko: 천군천사 소리 높여 주를 찬송 하도다
lines.id: Kaya akan piala yang Yesus berikan

lines.en: In the seat of pow'r enthrone him,
lines.ko: 왕의 왕이 되신 주께 면류관을 드리세
lines.id: Di kursi kekuasaan bertahtalah Dia,

lines.en: While the vault of heaven rings:
lines.ko: 왕의 왕이 되신 주께 면류관을 드리세
lines.id: Sementara kubah surga berdering.

lines.en: Crown him! crown him!
lines.id: Mahkotai Dia! mahkotai Dia! Mahkotai Dia! mahkotai Dia!

lines.en: Crown the Saviour King of kings.
lines.id: Raja di atas segala raja, dan Tuan di atas segala tuan,
Mahkotai Dia! mahkotai Dia! Mahkotai Dia! mahkotai Dia!
Raja di atas segala raja, dan Tuan di atas segala tuan.

lines.en: Sinners in derision crowned him
lines.id: Orang-orang berdosa di de-ris-ion memahkotai Dia,

lines.en: Mocking thus the Saviour's claim;
lines.id: Dengan demikian mengejek klaim Juruselamat

lines.en: Saints and angels crowd around him,
lines.ko: 왕의 왕이 되신 주께 면류관을 드리세
lines.id: Para suci dan malaikat berkerumun di sekeliling-Nya,

lines.en: Own his title, praise his Name:
lines.ko: 왕의 왕이 되신 주께 면류관을 드리세
lines.id: Miliki gelar-Nya, pujilah nama-Nya.

lines.en: Crown him! crown him!
lines.id: Mahkotai Dia! mahkotai Dia! Mahkotai Dia! mahkotai Dia!

lines.en: Spread abroad the Victor's fame!
lines.id: Raja di atas segala raja, dan Tuan di atas segala tuan,
Mahkotai Dia! mahkotai Dia! Mahkotai Dia! mahkotai Dia!
Raja di atas segala raja, dan Tuan di atas segala tuan.

lines.en: Hark! those bursts of acclamation!
lines.ko: 만민들의 찬송 소리 하늘 높이 퍼진다
lines.id: Dengar, ledakan seru itu!

lines.en: Hark! those loud triumphant chords!
lines.ko: 하늘 보좌 바라보니 기쁨 한량 없도다
lines.id: Hark, akord kemenangan yang nyaring itu!

lines.en: Jesus takes the highest station;
lines.ko: 왕의 왕이 되신 주께 면류관을 드리세
lines.id: Yesus mengambil posisi tertinggi,

lines.en: O what joy the sight affords!
lines.ko: 왕의 왕이 되신 주께 면류관을 드리세 아멘
lines.id: Oh, betapa menyenangkannya pemandangan itu

lines.en: Crown him! crown him!
lines.id: Mahkotai Dia! mahkotai Dia! Mahkotai Dia! mahkotai Dia!

lines.en: King of kings, and Lord of lords.
lines.id: Raja di atas segala raja, dan Tuan di atas segala tuan,
Mahkotai Dia! mahkotai Dia! Mahkotai Dia! mahkotai Dia!
Raja di atas segala raja, dan Tuan di atas segala tuan.

title_en: Blessing and Honor and Glory and Power

lines.en: Blessing and honor and glory and power,
Wisdom and riches and strength evermore
Give ye to him who our battle hath won,
Whose are the Kingdom, the crown, and the throne.
Soundeth the heav'n of the heav'ns with his Name;
lines.ko: 그의 이름으로 하늘의 하늘을 울려 퍼지게 하십니다.

lines.en: Ringeth the earth with his glory and fame;
Oceans and mountain, stream, forest, and flower
Echo his praises and tell of his power.
Ever ascendeth the song and the joy;
Ever descendeth the love from on high;
Blessing and honor and glory and praise
This is the theme of the hymns that we raise.
Give we the glory and praise to the Lamb;
Take we the robe and the harp and the palm;
Sing we the song of the Lamb that was slain,
lines.ko: 죽임을 당하신 어린 양의 노래를 부르자

lines.en: Dying in weakness, but rising to reign.

title_en: Join All the Glorious Names

lines.en: [English lyrics not available in the database for this revised hymn]
lines.ko: [이 개정된 찬송가의 데이터베이스에는 영어 가사가 없습니다.]

title_en: Come, Christians, Join to Sing

lines.en: Come, Chris-tians, join to sing
lines.id: Mari umat Kristiani, bergabunglah untuk bernyanyi

lines.en: Al-le-lu-ia! A-men.
lines.id: Al-le-lu-ia! Amin.

lines.en: Loud praise to Christ our King
lines.id: Pujian yang nyaring bagi Kristus Raja kita

lines.en: Al-le-lu-ia! A-men.
lines.id: Al-le-lu-ia! Amin.

lines.en: Let all, with heart and voice,
lines.id: Biarkan semua, dengan hati dan suara,

lines.en: Be-fore His throne re-joice
lines.id: Di hadapan takhta-Nya kembali bersukacita

lines.en: Praise is His gra-cious choice
lines.id: Pujian adalah pilihan-Nya yang penuh rahmat

lines.en: Al-le-lu-ia! A-men.
lines.id: Al-le-lu-ia! Amin.

lines.en: Come, lift your hearts on high
lines.id: Ayo, angkat hatimu tinggi-tinggi

lines.en: Al-le-lu-ia! A-men.
lines.id: Al-le-lu-ia! Amin.

lines.en: Let prais-es fill the sky
lines.id: Biarkan pujian memenuhi langit

lines.en: Al-le-lu-ia! A-men.
lines.id: Al-le-lu-ia! Amin.

lines.en: He is our Guide and Friend
lines.id: Dia adalah Pemandu dan Teman kita

lines.en: To us He'll con-de-scend
lines.id: Bagi kita Dia akan merendahkan

lines.en: His love shall nev-er end:
lines.id: Cintanya tidak akan pernah berakhir:

lines.en: Al-le-lu-ia! A-men.
lines.id: Al-le-lu-ia! Amin.

lines.en: Praise yet our Christ a-gain
lines.id: Pujilah Kristus kita yang mendapat keuntungan

lines.en: Al-le-lu-ia! A-men.
lines.id: Al-le-lu-ia! Amin.

lines.en: Life shall not end the strain
lines.id: Hidup tidak akan mengakhiri ketegangan

lines.en: Al-le-lu-ia! A-men.
lines.id: Al-le-lu-ia! Amin.

lines.en: On heav-en's bliss-ful shore
lines.id: Di pantai yang penuh kebahagiaan di surga

lines.en: His good-ness we'll a-dore,
lines.id: Kebaikannya akan kita kagumi,

lines.en: Sing-ing for-ev-er-more,
lines.id: Bernyanyi selamanya,

lines.en: "Al-le-lu-ia! A-men.INSERT
lines.id: "Al-le-lu-ia! A-men.MASUKKAN

title_id: Mari umat Kristiani, Bergabunglah untuk Bernyanyi

title_en: Blessed Jesus, at Your Word

lines.en: Blessed Jesus, at thy word
We are gathered all to hear thee;
lines.ko: 우리는 당신의 말을 듣기 위해 모두 모였습니다.

lines.en: Let our hearts and souls be stirred
Now to seek and love and fear thee,
lines.ko: 이제 당신을 찾고 사랑하고 경외하게 되었으니

lines.en: By thy teachings, sweet and holy,
Drawn from earth to love thee solely.
All our knowledge, sense, and sight
Lie in deepest darkness shrouded
Till thy Spirit breaks our night
lines.ko: 당신의 영이 우리의 밤을 깨뜨릴 때까지

lines.en: With the beams of truth unclouded.
Thou alone to God canst win us;
Thou must work all good within us.
lines.ko: 당신은 우리 안에서 모든 선한 일을 하셔야 합니다.

lines.en: Glorious Lord, thyself impart,
Light of Light, from God proceeding;
Open thou our ears and heart,
Help us by thy Spirit's pleading;
Hear the cry thy people raises,
Hear and bless our prayers and praises.
lines.ko: 우리의 기도와 찬양을 듣고 축복해 주십시오.

lines.en: Father, Son, and Holy Ghost,
Praise to thee and adoration!
Grant that we thy Word may trust
lines.ko: 우리가 당신의 말씀을 신뢰할 수 있게 하소서

lines.en: And obtain true consolation
While we here below must wander,
lines.ko: 우리가 여기 이 땅에서 방황해야 하는 동안,

lines.en: Till we sing thy praises yonder.
lines.ko: 우리가 저 곳에서 당신을 찬양할 때까지.

title_en: I Heard the Voice of Jesus Say

lines.en: I heard the voice of Jesus say,
"Come unto me and rest;
Lay down, thou weary one, lay down
Thy head upon my breast."
lines.ko: 네 머리를 내 가슴 위에 두라."

lines.en: I came to Jesus as I was,
Weary and worn and sad,
I found in him a resting place,
And he has made me glad.
I heard the voice of Jesus say,
"Behold, I freely give
The living water; thirsty one,
Stoop down and drink, and live."
I came to Jesus, and I drank
Of that life-giving stream;
My thirst was quenched, my soul revived,
lines.ko: 내 갈증이 해소되었고 내 영혼이 살아났으며

lines.en: And now I live in him.
lines.ko: 그리고 이제 나는 그 안에 살고 있습니다.

lines.en: I heard the voice of Jesus say,
"I am this dark world's Light;
Look unto me, thy morn shall rise,
lines.ko: 나를 바라보라 네 아침이 뜰 것이요

lines.en: And all thy day be bright."
I looked to Jesus, and I found
In him my Star, my Sun;
lines.ko: 그 안에 나의 별, 나의 태양;

lines.en: And in that light of life I'll walk,
lines.ko: 그리고 그 생명의 빛 속에서 나는 걸을 것입니다.

lines.en: Till trav'ling days are done.

title_en: Arise, My Soul, Arise

lines.en: Arise, my soul, arise,
Shake off thy guilty fears:
The bleeding Sacrifice
In my behalf appears:
Before the Throne my Surety stands,
lines.ko: 왕좌 앞에 나의 보증인이 서 있으니,

lines.en: My name is written on his hands.
lines.ko: 내 이름이 그의 손에 적혀 있습니다.

lines.en: He ever lives above,
For me to intercede,
His all-redeeming love,
His precious blood to plead;
His blood atoned for ev'ry race,
And sprinkles now the throne of grace.
Five bleeding wounds he bears,
lines.ko: 그가 짊어진 다섯 개의 출혈 상처,

lines.en: Received on Calvary;
They pour effectual prayers,
They strongly plead for me;
Forgive him, O forgive, they cry,
lines.ko: 그를 용서하세요, 오 용서하세요, 그들이 울부짖습니다.

lines.en: Nor let that ransomed sinner die!
lines.ko: 또한 대속받은 죄인이 죽게 두지 마십시오!

lines.en: My God is reconciled;
His pard'ning voice I hear;
He owns me for his child,
lines.ko: 그는 그의 아이를 위해 나를 소유하고 있습니다.

lines.en: I can no longer fear;
lines.ko: 나는 더 이상 두려워할 수 없습니다.

lines.en: With confidence I now draw nigh,
lines.ko: 나는 이제 확신을 갖고 가까이 다가갑니다.

lines.en: And "Father, Abba, Father!" cry.

title_en: Jesus, My Great High Priest

lines.en: Jesus, my great High Priest,
Offered his blood and died;
My guilty conscience seeks
No sacrifice beside.
His pow'rful blood did once atone,
lines.ko: 그의 강력한 피가 한 번 속죄했고,

lines.en: And now it pleads before the Throne.
lines.ko: 그리고 이제 그것은 왕좌 앞에서 간청합니다.

lines.en: To this dear Surety's hand
Will I commit my cause;
He answers and fulfills
His Father's broken laws.
Behold my soul at freedom set;
My Surety paid the dreadful debt.
My Advocate appears
For my defense on high;
The Father bows his ears
And lays his thunder by.
Not all that hell or sin can say
lines.ko: 지옥이나 죄가 말할 수 있는 모든 것이 아닙니다

lines.en: Shall turn his heart, his love, away.
lines.ko: 그의 마음과 그의 사랑을 떠나게 하리라.

lines.en: Should all the hosts of death
And pow'rs of hell unknown
lines.ko: 그리고 알 수 없는 지옥의 힘

lines.en: Put their most dreadful forms
Of rage and mischief on,
I shall be safe, for Christ displays
lines.ko: 나는 안전할 것입니다. 그리스도께서 보여주실 것입니다.

lines.en: His conqu'ring pow'r and guardian grace.

title_en: Nothing but the Blood

lines.en: What can wash away my sin?
lines.ko: 나의 죄를 씻기는 예수의 피 밖에 없네
lines.id: Apa yang bisa menghilangkan dosaku

lines.en: Nothing but the blood of Jesus;
lines.ko: 다시 정케 하기도 예수의 피 밖에 없네
lines.id: Tidak lain hanyalah darah Yesus

lines.en: What can make me whole again?
lines.ko: 예수의 흘린 피 날 희게 하오니
lines.id: Apa yang bisa membuatku mendapat keuntungan besar

lines.en: Nothing but the blood of Jesus.
lines.ko: 귀하고 귀하다 예수의 피 밖에 없네
lines.id: Tidak lain hanyalah darah Yesus
O yang berharga adalah alirannya
Itu membuatku seputih salju
Tidak ada sumber lain yang saya tahu,
Tidak lain hanyalah darah Yesus

lines.en: O precious is the flow
lines.ko: 나를 정케 하기는 예수의 피 밖에 없네
lines.id: Untuk pembersihan saya, saya mengerti

lines.en: That makes me white as snow;
lines.ko: 사죄하는 증거도 예수의 피 밖에 없네
lines.id: Tidak lain hanyalah darah Yesus

lines.en: No other fount I know,
lines.ko: 예수의 흘린 피 날 희게 하오니
lines.id: Maafkan saya, ini permintaan saya

lines.en: Nothing but the blood of Jesus.
lines.ko: 귀하고 귀하다 예수의 피 밖에 없네
lines.id: Tidak lain hanyalah darah Yesus
O yang berharga adalah alirannya
Itu membuatku seputih salju
Tidak ada sumber lain yang saya tahu,
Tidak lain hanyalah darah Yesus

lines.en: For my cleansing this I see
lines.ko: 나의 죄 속하기는 예수의 피 밖에 없네
lines.id: Tidak ada yang bisa menghilangkan dosa

lines.en: Nothing but the blood of Jesus;
lines.ko: 나는 공로 없으니 예수의 피 밖에 없네
lines.id: Tidak lain hanyalah darah Yesus

lines.en: For my pardon this my plea
lines.ko: 예수의 흘린 피 날 희게 하오니
lines.id: Tidak ada kebaikan yang telah saya lakukan

lines.en: Nothing but the blood of Jesus.
lines.ko: 귀하고 귀하다 예수의 피 밖에 없네
lines.id: Tidak lain hanyalah darah Yesus
O yang berharga adalah alirannya
Itu membuatku seputih salju
Tidak ada sumber lain yang saya tahu,
Tidak lain hanyalah darah Yesus

lines.en: Nothing can for sin atone
lines.ko: 평안함과 소망은 예수의 피 밖에 없네
lines.id: Ini semua harapan dan kedamaian saya

lines.en: Nothing but the blood of Jesus;
lines.ko: 나의 의는 이것뿐 예수의 피 밖에 없네
lines.id: Tidak lain hanyalah darah Yesus

lines.en: Naught of good that I have done
lines.ko: 예수의 흘린 피 날 희게 하오니
lines.id: Ini semua adalah kebenaran saya

lines.en: Nothing but the blood of Jesus.
lines.ko: 귀하고 귀하다 예수의 피 밖에 없네
lines.id: Tidak lain hanyalah darah Yesus
O yang berharga adalah alirannya
Itu membuatku seputih salju
Tidak ada sumber lain yang saya tahu,
Tidak lain hanyalah darah Yesus

lines.en: This is all my hope and peace
lines.ko: 영원토록 내 할 말 예수의 피 밖에 없네
lines.id: Kemuliaan! Kejayaan! demikianlah aku bernyanyi

lines.en: Nothing but the blood of Jesus;
lines.ko: 나의 찬미 제목은 예수의 피 밖에 없네
lines.id: Tidak lain hanyalah darah Yesus

lines.en: This is all my righteousness
lines.ko: 예수의 흘린 피 날 희게 하오니
lines.id: Semua pujian saya untuk ini saya bawa

lines.en: Nothing but the blood of Jesus.
lines.ko: 귀하고 귀하다 예수의 피 밖에 없네
lines.id: Tidak lain hanyalah darah Yesus
O yang berharga adalah alirannya
Itu membuatku seputih salju
Tidak ada sumber lain yang saya tahu,
Tidak lain hanyalah darah Yesus

lines.en: Now by this I'll overcome
Nothing but the blood of Jesus;
Now by this I'll reach my home
Nothing but the blood of Jesus.

alt_titles: What can wash away my sin
O precious is the flow that makes me white as snow
title_id: Apa yang Dapat Menghapus Dosa Saya

title_en: Jesus Paid It All

lines.en: I hear the Saviour say,
lines.ko: 이 세상 험하고 나 비록 약하나
lines.id: Saya mendengar Juruselamat berkata,

lines.en: "Thy strength indeed is small,
lines.ko: 늘 기도 힘쓰면 큰 권능 얻겠네
lines.id: “Kekuatanmu sesungguhnya kecil,

lines.en: Child of weakness, watch and pray,
lines.id: Anak yang lemah, berjaga-jaga dan berdoa,

lines.en: Find in me thine all in all."
lines.ko: 피와 같이 붉은 죄 눈 같이 희겠네
lines.id: Temukan dalam diriku segala milikmu."
Yesus membayar semuanya,
Semua padanya aku berhutang budi
Dosa telah meninggalkan noda kriminal,
Dia mencucinya seputih salju.

lines.en: Jesus paid it all,
lines.id: Tuhan, kini aku benar-benar menemukannya

lines.en: All to him I owe;
lines.ko: 돌 같은 내 마음 곧 녹여 주소서
lines.id: Kekuatanmu, dan kekuatanmu sendiri,

lines.en: Sin had left a crimson stain,
lines.id: Dapat mengubah flek penderita kusta,

lines.en: He washed it white as snow.
lines.ko: 피와 같이 붉은 죄 눈 같이 희겠네
lines.id: Dan meluluhkan hati batu.
Yesus membayar semuanya,
Semua padanya aku berhutang budi
Dosa telah meninggalkan noda kriminal,
Dia mencucinya seputih salju.

lines.en: Lord, now indeed I find
lines.id: Tidak ada gunanya bagiku

lines.en: Thy power, and thine alone,
lines.ko: 주 예수 힘 주사 굳세게 하소서
lines.id: Dimana-dengan rahmat-Mu untuk menuntut

lines.en: Can change the leper's spots,
lines.id: Aku akan mencuci pakaianku hingga putih

lines.en: And melt the heart of stone.
lines.ko: 피와 같이 붉은 죄 눈 같이 희겠네
lines.id: Dalam darah Anak Domba Cal-v'ry.
Yesus membayar semuanya,
Semua padanya aku berhutang budi
Dosa telah meninggalkan noda kriminal,
Dia mencucinya seputih salju.

lines.en: For nothing good have I
lines.ko: 죄 사함 받은 후 새 사람 되어서
lines.id: Dan ketika, di depan takhta,

lines.en: Whereby thy grace to claim
lines.ko: 주 앞에 서는 날 늘 찬송 하겠네
lines.id: Aku berdiri di dalam Dia sepenuhnya,

lines.en: I will wash my garments white
lines.id: "Yesus mati jiwaku untuk menyelamatkan,"

lines.en: In the blood of Calvary's lamb.
lines.ko: 피와 같이 붉은 죄 눈 같이 희겠네 아멘
lines.id: Bibirku masih akan mengulanginya.
Yesus membayar semuanya,
Semua padanya aku berhutang budi
Dosa telah meninggalkan noda kriminal,
Dia mencucinya seputih salju. Amin.

lines.en: And when, before the throne,
I stand in him complete,
"Jesus died my soul to save,"
My lips shall still repeat.

alt_titles: Jesus paid it all, all to him I owe

title_en: Rejoice, the Lord Is King

lines.en: Rejoice, the Lord is King:
lines.id: Bersukacitalah, Tuhan adalah Raja
Tuan dan Rajamu a-dore!

lines.ko: 네 맘 열어 한 소리로 기뻐 주를 찬양하라
lines.id: Bersukacitalah, mengucap syukur, dan bernyanyi,
Dan menang lagi.
Angkat hatimu, angkat suaramu!
Bergembiralah kembali, saya katakan, Bergembiralah kembali!

lines.en: Your Lord and King adore;
lines.id: Kerajaannya tidak mungkin gagal
Dia memerintah bumi dan surga.

lines.ko: 네 맘 열어 한 소리로 기뻐 주를 찬양하라
lines.id: Kunci kematian dan neraka
Apakah kepada Yesus kita diberikan.
Angkat hatimu, angkat suaramu!
Bergembiralah kembali, saya katakan, Bergembiralah kembali!

lines.en: Rejoice, give thanks and sing,
lines.ko: 죄 짐을 벗은 후 주 앞에 가리니
lines.id: Yesus, Juruselamat, memerintah,
Tuhan kebenaran dan cinta.

lines.ko: 네 맘 열어 한 소리로 기뻐 주를 찬양하라
lines.id: Ketika Dia telah membersihkan noda kita,
Dia mengambil tempat duduk-Nya di atas.
Angkat hatimu, angkat suaramu!
Bergembiralah kembali, saya katakan, Bergembiralah kembali!

lines.en: And triumph evermore:
lines.ko: 참 소망 가지고 그 날을 기리며
lines.id: Bergembiralah kembali dalam pengharapan yang mulia!

lines.ko: 주 다시 오실 때 기쁘게 맞으리
lines.id: Tuhan kami, Hakim akan datang

lines.ko: 네 맘 열어 한 소리로 기뻐 주를 찬양하라 아멘
lines.id: Dan angkatlah hamba-hamba-Nya
Ke rumah abadi mereka.
Angkat hatimu, angkat suaramu!
Bergembiralah kembali, saya katakan, Bergembiralah kembali!

lines.en: Lift up your heart, lift up your voice;
Rejoice, again I say, rejoice.
Jesus, the Saviour reigns,
The God of truth and love;
When he had purged our stains
He took his seat above:
His kingdom cannot fail,
He rules o'er earth and heav'n;
The keys of death and hell
Are to our Jesus giv'n:
He sits at God's right hand
Till all his foes submit,
And bow to his command
And fall beneath his feet:

Tuan dan Rajamu a-dore!

title_en: Hail to the Lord’s Anointed

lines.en: Hail to the Lord's Anointed,
lines.ko: 주님의 기름 부음 받은 자에게 찬송을 보내어,

lines.en: Great David's greater Son!
Hail, in the time appointed,
His reign on earth begun!
He comes to break oppression,
To set the captive free,
To take away transgression,
And rule in equity.
He comes with succor speedy
To those who suffer wrong;
To help the poor and needy,
And bid the weak be strong;
To give them songs for sighing,
lines.ko: 그들에게 한숨을 위한 노래를 주기 위해,

lines.en: Their darkness turn to light,
Whose souls, condemned and dying,
Were precious in his sight,
He shall come down like showers
Upon the fruitful earth;
And love, joy, hope, like flowers,
Spring in his path to birth;
Before him on the mountains
Shall peace, the herald, go;
And righteousness, in fountains,
From hill to valley flow.
O'er ev'ry foe victorious,
He on his throne shall rest,
lines.ko: 그는 그의 보좌에서 안식을 취하실 것이며,

lines.en: From age to age more glorious,
All-blessing and all-blessed;
The tide of time shall never
His covenant remove;
His Name shall stand for ever
That Name to us is Love.

title_en: O God, Your Judgments Give the King
title_ko: 오 하나님, 당신의 심판이 왕에게 임하게 하소서 (자체번역)

lines.en: O God, thy judgments give the King,
lines.ko: 오 하느님, 당신의 판결이 왕에게 주어졌으니,

lines.en: His Son thy righteousness;
With right he shall thy people judge,
Thy poor with uprightness.
And then the mountains shall bring forth
To all the people peace;
The hills because of righteousness
Their blessing shall increase.
The people's poor ones he shall judge,
The needy's children bless;
And he will break in pieces those
lines.ko: 그리고 그는 그것들을 조각조각 부숴버릴 것이다

lines.en: Who would the poor oppress.
The just shall flourish in his days,
And prosper in his reign;
And while the moon endures he shall
Abundant peace maintain.
His large and great dominion shall
From sea to sea extend;
It from the River shall reach forth
To earth's remotest end.
Yea, kings shall all before him bow,
lines.ko: 그렇습니다, 왕들은 모두 그 앞에 절할 것입니다.

lines.en: All nations shall obey;
He'll save the needy when he cries,
lines.ko: 그가 울 때에 궁핍한 자를 구원하며

lines.en: The poor who hath no stay.
Now blessed be the Lord our God,
The God of Israel,
For he alone doth wondrous works
In glory that excel.
And blessed be his glorious Name
To all eternity.
The whole earth let his glory fill;
lines.ko: 온 땅이 그의 영광을 가득 채울지어다.

lines.en: Amen, so let it be.

title_en: Unto My Lord Jehovah Said

lines.en: [English lyrics not available in the database for this revised hymn]
lines.ko: [이 개정된 찬송가의 데이터베이스에는 영어 가사가 없습니다.]

title_en: O Wherefore Do the Nations Rage

lines.en: From Psalm 2
O wherefore do the nations rage,
And kings and rulers strive in vain,
Against the Lord of earth and heav'n
To overthrow Messiah's reign?
Their strength is weakness in the sight
Of him who sits enthroned above;
He speaks, and judgments fall on them
Who tempt his wrath and scorn his love.
lines.ko: 그분의 진노를 시험하고 그분의 사랑을 멸시하는 자입니다.

lines.en: By God's decree his Son receives
lines.ko: 하나님의 뜻에 따라 그의 아들이 받으신다

lines.en: The nations for his heritage;
The conqu'ring Christ supreme shall reign
As King of kings, from age to age.
Be wise, ye rulers of the earth,
And serve the Lord with godly fear;
With rev'rent joy confess the Son
While yet in mercy he is near.
lines.ko: 아직 자비로우신 동안 그분은 가까이 계십니다.

lines.en: Delay not, lest his anger rise,
lines.ko: 지체하지 말라 그의 분노가 솟아오르지 않게 하소서

lines.en: And ye should perish in your way;
lines.ko: 그리고 너희는 너희 길에서 멸망할 것이다.

lines.en: Lo, all that put their trust in him
Are blest indeed, and blest for aye.
lines.ko: 참으로 축복을 받았고, 물론 축복을 받았습니다.

title_en: He Walks among the Golden Lamps

lines.en: [English lyrics not available in the database for this revised hymn]
lines.ko: [이 개정된 찬송가의 데이터베이스에는 영어 가사가 없습니다.]

title_en: The Mighty God, the Lord

lines.en: [English lyrics not available in the database for this revised hymn]
lines.ko: [이 개정된 찬송가의 데이터베이스에는 영어 가사가 없습니다.]

title_en: Wake, Awake, for Night Is Flying

lines.en: "Wake, awake, for night is flying,"
The watchmen on the heights are crying;
"Awake, Jerusalem, at last!"
Midnight hears the welcome voices,
And at the thrilling cry rejoices:
"Come forth, ye virgins, night is past!
The Bridegroom comes; awake,
Your lamps with gladness take; Alleluia!
And for his marriage feast prepare,
For you must go to meet him there."
lines.ko: 당신은 그를 만나러 그곳으로 가야 하기 때문입니다."

lines.en: Zion hears the watchmen singing,
And all her heart with joy is springing;
lines.ko: 그리고 그녀의 온 마음은 기쁨으로 솟아오르고 있습니다.

lines.en: She wakes, she rises from her gloom:
lines.ko: 그녀는 잠에서 깨어나 어둠 속에서 일어납니다.

lines.en: For her Lord comes down all-glorious,
The Strong in grace, in truth Victorious,
lines.ko: 은혜 안에 강하시고 진실로 승리하시는 분,

lines.en: Her Star is ris'n, her Light is come!
lines.ko: 그녀의 별은 ris'n이고, 그녀의 빛이 왔습니다!

lines.en: Ah, come, thou blessed Lord,
O Jesus, Son of God, Alleluia!
We follow till the halls we see
Where thou hast bid us sup with thee.
lines.ko: 당신이 우리에게 당신과 함께 저녁식사를 청한 곳입니다.

lines.en: Now let all the heav'ns adore thee,
lines.ko: 이제 모든 하늘이 당신을 숭배하게 하십시오.

lines.en: And men and angels sing before thee,
lines.ko: 그리고 사람들과 천사들이 당신 앞에서 노래합니다.

lines.en: With harps and cymbal's clearest tone;
Of one pearl each shining portal,
lines.ko: 각각의 빛나는 문에는 하나의 진주가 있고,

lines.en: Where we are with the choir immortal
lines.ko: 우리가 불멸의 합창단과 함께 있는 곳

lines.en: Of angels round thy dazzling throne;
lines.ko: 당신의 눈부신 보좌 주위에는 천사들이 있습니다.

lines.en: Nor eye hath seen, nor ear
lines.ko: 눈으로 본 적도 없고 귀로 본 적도 없다.

lines.en: Hath yet attained to hear what there is ours.
lines.ko: 아직 우리의 것이 무엇인지 들어볼 수 있게 되었습니다.

lines.en: But we rejoice, and sing to thee
Our hymn of joy eternally.

title_en: Lo! He Comes with Clouds Descending

lines.en: Lo! he comes, with clouds descending,
lines.ko: 대속하신 구주께서 구름 타고 오실 때
lines.id: Lihat! Dia datang, dengan awan yang turun,

lines.en: Once for favored sinners slain;
lines.ko: 천만 성도 함께 모여 주의 뒤를 따르네
lines.id: Sekali untuk orang-orang berdosa yang disembelih

lines.en: Thousand thousand saints attending
lines.id: Ribuan orang suci sedang merawat

lines.en: Swell the triumph of his train:
lines.id: Kembangkan kemenangan kereta-Nya.

lines.en: Alleluia! Alleluia!
lines.id: Al-le-lu-jah Al-le-lu-jah

lines.en: God appears on earth to reign.
lines.id: Tuhan muncul di bumi untuk memerintah.

lines.en: Ev'ry eye shall now behold him,
lines.ko: 엄숙하신 주의 위풍 모든 사람 뵈올 때
lines.id: Setiap mata sekarang akan memandang Dia,

lines.en: Robed in dreadful majesty;
lines.ko: 주를 팔고 십자가에 못을 박던 자들이
lines.id: Berjubah dalam keagungan yang mengerikan!

lines.en: Those who set at naught and sold him,
lines.ko: 슬피 울고 가슴 치며 참 메시야 뵙겠네
lines.id: Mereka yang tidak menghasilkan apa-apa dan menjual Dia,

lines.en: Pierced, and nailed him to the tree,
lines.id: Menusuk dan memakukannya pada pohon,

lines.en: Deeply wailing, deeply wailing,
lines.id: Ratapan mendalam, Ratapan mendalam,

lines.en: Shall the true Messiah see.
lines.id: Akankah Mes-si-ah yang sejati melihat.

lines.en: Ev'ry island, sea, and mountain,
lines.ko: 주가 당한 고난 흔적 모든 사람 볼 때에
lines.id: Sekarang penebusan kembali, yang sudah lama dinantikan,

lines.en: Heav'n and earth, shall flee away;
lines.ko: 구원받은 모든 성도 주께 경배 드리네
lines.id: Lihat dalam kemegahan sol-emn ap-pear!

lines.en: All who hate him must, confounded,
lines.id: Semua orang kudusNya, ditolak oleh manusia,

lines.en: Hear the trump proclaim the day;
lines.id: Sekarang kita akan menemui Dia di udara

lines.en: Come to judgment! Come to judgment!
lines.id: Al-le-lu-jah Al-le-lu-jah

lines.en: Come to judgment, come away!
lines.id: Lihatlah hari Tuhan muncul.

lines.en: Now Redemption, long expected,
lines.id: Ya, A-laki-laki biarkan semua memuja-Mu,

lines.en: See in solemn pomp appear!
lines.ko: 왕의 왕이 되신 주를 우리 환영 하겠네
lines.id: Tinggi di singgasana kekal-Mu:

lines.en: All his saints, by man rejected,
lines.ko: 할렐루야 할렐루야 주여 어서 오소서 아멘
lines.id: Selamat, ambillah kekuasaan dan kemuliaan

lines.en: Now shall meet him in the air:
lines.id: Klaim raja-don untuk milik-Mu.

lines.en: Alleluia! Alleluia!
lines.id: O, cepatlah datang, O, cepatlah datang!

lines.en: See the day of God appear!
lines.id: Tuhan yang kekal turun. Amin.

lines.en: Yea, Amen! let all adore thee,
High on thine eternal throne;
Saviour, take the pow'r and glory,
Claim the kingdom for thine own:
O come quickly, O come quickly:
Alleluia! come, Lord, come.

title_id: Lihat! Dia Datang, dengan Awan Turun

title_en: Day of Judgment! Day of Wonders!

lines.en: Day of judgment! day of wonders!
Hark! the trumpet's awful sound,
Louder than a thousand thunders,
Shakes the vast creation round.
How the summons
Will the sinner's heart confound!
See the Judge, our nature wearing,
lines.ko: 판사님을 보세요, 우리의 본성은 옷을 입고 있습니다.

lines.en: Clothed in majesty divine;
You who long for his appearing
Then shall say, This God is mine!
lines.ko: 그러면 말하기를, 이 신은 내 것이다!

lines.en: Gracious Saviour,
Own me in that day as thine.
At his call the dead awaken,
Rise to life from earth and sea;
All the pow'r of nature, shaken
By his looks, prepare to flee.
lines.ko: 그의 외모를 보고 도망갈 준비를 하세요.

lines.en: Careless sinner,
What will then become of thee?
But to those who have confessed,
Loved and served the Lord below,
He will say, Come near, ye blessed,
lines.ko: 그가 이르시되 가까이 오라 복된 자들아

lines.en: See the kingdom I bestow;
You for ever
Shall my love and glory know.

title_en: Rejoice, All Ye Believers

lines.en: Rejoice, all ye believers,
And let your lights appear;
The evening is advancing,
And darker night is near:
The Bridegroom is arising,
And soon he draweth nigh;
Up, pray, and watch, and wrestle:
At midnight comes the cry.
See that your lamps are burning;
Replenish them with oil;
And wait for your salvation,
The end of earthly toil.
The watchers on the mountain
Proclaim the Bridegroom near,
Go meet him as he cometh,
With Alleluias clear.
Ye saints, who here in patience
Your cross and suff'rings bore,
Shall live and reign for ever,
When sorrow is no more:
Around the throne of glory
The Lamb ye shall behold,
In triumph cast before him
Your diadems of gold.
Our Hope and Expectation,
O Jesus, now appear;
Arise, thou Sun so longed for,
O'er this benighted sphere.
With hearts and hands uplifted,
We plead, O Lord to see
lines.ko: 오 주님, 우리가 볼 수 있도록 간구합니다

lines.en: The day of earth's redemption
That brings us unto thee.

title_en: Great God, What Do I See and Hear!
title_ko: 위대하신 하나님, 나는 무엇을 보고 듣습니까! (자체번역)

lines.en: Great God, what do I see and hear!
lines.ko: 위대하신 하나님, 내가 무엇을 보고 듣는가!

lines.en: The end of things created!
The Judge of mankind doth appear
On clouds of glory seated!
The trumpet sounds; the graves restore
The dead which they contained before:
Prepare, my soul, to meet him.
lines.ko: 내 영혼아, 그를 만날 준비를 하여라.

lines.en: The dead in Christ shall first arise,
lines.ko: 그리스도 안에서 죽은 자들이 먼저 일어나고,

lines.en: At the last trumpet's sounding,
Caught up to meet him in the skies,
With joy their Lord surrounding;
No gloomy fears their souls dismay;
lines.ko: 우울한 사람은 영혼의 낙담을 두려워하지 않습니다.

lines.en: His presence sheds eternal day
On those prepared to meet him.
But sinners, filled with guilty fears,
lines.ko: 그러나 죄에 대한 두려움으로 가득 찬 죄인들은

lines.en: Behold his wrath prevailing;
For they shall rise, and find their tears
lines.ko: 그들은 일어나서 그들의 눈물을 발견할 것임이라

lines.en: And sighs are unavailing:
The day of grace is past and gone;
Trembling they stand before the throne,
All unprepared to meet him.
lines.ko: 모두 그를 만날 준비가 되어 있지 않았습니다.

lines.en: Great God, what do I see and hear!
lines.ko: 위대하신 하나님, 내가 무엇을 보고 듣는가!

lines.en: The end of things created!
The Judge of mankind doth appear
On clouds of glory seated!
Beneath his cross I view the day
lines.ko: 그의 십자가 아래서 나는 그날을 봅니다

lines.en: When heav'n and earth shall pass away,
And thus prepare to meet him.

title_en: O Quickly Come, Dread Judge of All
title_ko: 오 속히 오소서, 만물의 무서운 심판관이시여 (자체번역)

lines.en: O quickly come, dread Judge of all;
lines.ko: 오 속히 오소서, 모든 사람의 심판관을 두려워하소서.

lines.en: For, awful though thine advent be,
All shadows from the truth will fall,
And falsehood die, in sight of thee:
O quickly come; for doubt and fear
lines.ko: 오 빨리 오세요; 의심과 두려움 때문에

lines.en: Like clouds dissolve when thou art near.
lines.ko: 당신이 가까이 있으면 구름이 사라지는 것처럼.

lines.en: O quickly come, great King of all;
lines.ko: 오, 모든 것의 위대한 왕이시여, 속히 오소서.

lines.en: Reign all around us, and within;
Let sin no more our souls enthrall,
lines.ko: 더 이상 우리 영혼이 죄에 사로잡히지 않게 하시고,

lines.en: Let pain and sorrow die with sin:
lines.ko: 고통과 슬픔이 죄와 함께 죽게 하십시오.

lines.en: O quickly come; for thou alone
Canst make thy scattered people one.
lines.ko: 흩어진 당신의 백성을 하나로 만들 수 없나이다.

lines.en: O quickly come, true Life of all;
lines.ko: 오 속히 오소서, 모든 사람의 참된 생명이시여;

lines.en: For death is mighty all around;
On ev'ry home his shadows fall,
On ev'ry heart his mark is found:
lines.ko: 모든 사람의 마음에는 그의 흔적이 있습니다:

lines.en: O quickly come; for grief and pain
lines.ko: 오 빨리 오세요; 슬픔과 고통을 위해

lines.en: Can never cloud thy glorious reign.
lines.ko: 당신의 영광스러운 통치를 결코 흐리게 할 수 없습니다.

lines.en: O quickly come, sure Light of all;
lines.ko: 오 속히 오소서, 모든 것의 빛이시여;

lines.en: For gloomy night broods o'er our way;
lines.ko: 우울한 밤의 무리들이 우리 길을 가는 동안;

lines.en: And weakly souls begin to fall
With weary watching for the day:
O quickly come; for round thy throne
lines.ko: 오 빨리 오세요; 당신의 보좌 주위에

lines.en: No eye is blind, no night is known.
lines.ko: 눈이 먼 사람은 없고 밤을 아는 사람은 없습니다.

title_en: Ten Thousand Times Ten Thousand

lines.en: Ten thousand times ten thousand
In sparkling raiment bright,
The armies of the ransomed saints
Throng up the steeps of light:
'Tis finished, all is finished,
Their fight with death and sin:
Fling open wide the golden gates
And let the victors in.
What rush of alleluias
Fill all the earth and sky!
What ringing of a thousand harps
Bespeaks the triumph nigh!
O day, for which creation
And all its tribes were made;
O joy, for all its former woes
lines.ko: 오 기쁨이여, 이전의 모든 불행에 대하여

lines.en: A thousand fold repaid!
O then what raptured greetings
On Canaan's happy shore;
What knitting severed friendships up
Where partings are no more!
Then eyes with joy shall sparkle,
That brimmed with tears of late;
Orphans no longer fatherless,
lines.ko: 고아들은 더 이상 아버지 없는 사람들이 아니며,

lines.en: Nor widows desolate.
Bring near thy great salvation,
Thou Lamb for sinners slain;
lines.ko: 당신은 죽임을 당한 죄인들을 위한 어린양이십니다.

lines.en: Fill up the roll of thine elect,
Then take thy pow'r, and reign:
Appear, Desire of nations,
Thine exiles long for home;
Show in the heav'n thy promised sign;
lines.ko: 당신의 약속된 표징을 하늘에서 보여 주소서.

lines.en: Thou Prince and Saviour, come.

title_en: Christ Is Coming!

lines.en: [English lyrics not available in the database for this revised hymn]
lines.ko: [이 개정된 찬송가의 데이터베이스에는 영어 가사가 없습니다.]

title_en: When He Cometh, When He Cometh

lines.en: When he cometh, when he cometh
lines.ko: 예수께서 오실 때에 그 귀중한 보배
lines.id: Kapan Dia datang, kapan Dia datang

lines.en: To make up his jewels,
lines.id: Untuk melengkapi perhiasan-perhiasan-Nya,

lines.en: All his jewels, precious jewels,
lines.ko: 샛별 같은 그 보배 면류관에 달려
lines.id: Semua permata-Nya, permata-permata yang berharga,

lines.en: His loved and his own.
lines.id: Kekasihnya dan milik-Nya.
Bagaikan bintang di pagi hari,
Mahkotanya yang cemerlang berdengung,
Mereka akan bersinar dalam keindahannya,
Permata cerah untuk mahkota-Nya.

lines.en: Like the stars of the morning,
lines.ko: 정한 보배 빛난 보배 주 예수의 보배
lines.id: Dia akan mengumpulkan, Dia akan mengumpulkan

lines.en: His bright crown adorning,
lines.id: Permata untuk kerajaan-Nya,

lines.en: They shall shine in their beauty,
lines.ko: 샛별 같은 그 보배 면류관에 달려
lines.id: Semua yang murni, semua yang cemerlang,

lines.en: Bright gems for his crown.
lines.id: Kekasihnya dan milik-Nya.
Bagaikan bintang di pagi hari,
Mahkotanya yang cemerlang berdengung,
They shall shine in their beau-ty,
Permata cerah untuk mahkota-Nya.

lines.en: He will gather, he will gather
lines.ko: 주를 사랑하는 아이 이 세상에 살 때
lines.id: Anak kecil, anak kecil

lines.en: The gems for his kingdom,
lines.ko: 주의 말씀 순종 참 하면 보배로다
lines.id: Yang mencintai Re-deem-er mereka,

lines.en: All the pure ones, all the bright ones,
lines.ko: 샛별 같은 그 보배 면류관에 달려
lines.id: Apakah orang-orang Yahudi, orang-orang Yahudi yang berharga,

lines.en: His loved and his own.
lines.id: Kekasihnya dan milik-Nya.
Bagaikan bintang di pagi hari,
Mahkotanya yang cemerlang berdengung,
Mereka akan bersinar dalam keindahannya,
Permata cerah untuk mahkota-Nya.

lines.en: Little children, little children
Who love their Redeemer,
Are the jewels, precious jewels,
His loved and his own.

alt_titles: When he cometh, when he cometh

title_en: Thou Art Coming, O My Savior

lines.en: Thou art coming, O my Saviour,
Thou art coming, O my King,
In thy beauty all resplendent,
lines.ko: 당신의 아름다움 속에서 모든 것이 빛나고,

lines.en: In thy glory all transcendent;
lines.ko: 당신의 영광 속에는 모든 것이 초월적입니다.

lines.en: Well may we rejoice and sing:
lines.ko: 그럼 우리는 기뻐하며 노래할 수 있습니다:

lines.en: Coming! in the opening east
Herald brightness slowly swells:
Coming! O my glorious Priest,
Hear we not thy golden bells?
Thou art coming, thou art coming:
lines.ko: 당신은 오고 계십니다, 당신은 오고 계십니다:

lines.en: We shall meet thee on thy way,
lines.ko: 우리는 당신의 길에서 당신을 만날 것입니다,

lines.en: We shall see thee, we shall know thee,
lines.ko: 우리는 당신을 볼 것입니다, 우리는 당신을 알게 될 것입니다,

lines.en: We shall bless thee, we shall show thee
All our hearts could never say:
lines.ko: 우리 마음은 결코 다음과 같이 말할 수 없습니다.

lines.en: What an anthem that will be,
Ringing out our love to thee,
lines.ko: 당신을 향한 우리의 사랑을 울려 퍼지게 하소서.

lines.en: Pouring out our rapture sweet
At thine own all-glorious feet.
O the joy to see thee reigning,
lines.ko: 오, 당신이 다스리시는 모습을 보니 기쁘고,

lines.en: Thee, my own beloved Lord!
Ev'ry tongue thy Name confessing,
Worship, honor, glory, blessing
Brought to thee with glad accord;
Thee, my Master and my Friend,
Vindicated and enthroned;
Unto earth's remotest end
Glorified, adored, and owned.

title_en: One Day He’s Coming

lines.en: [English lyrics not available in the database for this revised hymn]
lines.ko: [이 개정된 찬송가의 데이터베이스에는 영어 가사가 없습니다.]

title_en: My Lord, What a Mourning

lines.en: [English lyrics not available in the database for this revised hymn]
lines.ko: [이 개정된 찬송가의 데이터베이스에는 영어 가사가 없습니다.]

title_en: Come, O Creator Spirit Blest

lines.en: Come, O Creator Spirit blest,
And in our hearts take up thy rest;
lines.ko: 그리고 우리 마음 속에 당신의 안식을 취하십시오.

lines.en: Spirit of grace, with heav'nly aid
Come to the souls whom thou hast made.
Thou art the Comforter, we cry,
Sent to the earth from God Most High,
lines.ko: 지극히 높으신 하나님께서 이 땅에 보내신

lines.en: Fountain of life and Fire of love,
And our Anointing from above.
Bringing from heav'n our sev'nfold dow'r,
lines.ko: 하늘에서 우리 일곱 배의 지참금을 가져와,

lines.en: Sign of our God's right hand of pow'r,
O blessed Spirit, promised long,
Thy coming wakes the heart to song.
Make our dull minds with rapture glow,
lines.ko: 우리의 둔한 마음을 환희로 빛나게 하시고,

lines.en: Let human hearts with love o'erflow;
lines.ko: 인간의 마음에 사랑이 흘러 넘치도록 하십시오.

lines.en: And, when our feeble flesh would fail,
lines.ko: 그리고 우리의 연약한 육체가 쇠약해질 때,

lines.en: May thine immortal strength prevail.
Far from our souls the foe repel,
lines.ko: 우리 영혼에서 멀리 떨어진 적들이 격퇴하고,

lines.en: Grant us in peace henceforth to dwell;
lines.ko: 이제부터 우리가 평화롭게 살도록 허락해 주십시오.

lines.en: Ill shall not come, nor harm betide,
lines.ko: 나는 오지 않을 것이고, 해를 끼치지도 않을 것이다.

lines.en: If only thou wilt be our Guide.
Show us the Father, Holy One,
Help us to know th'Eternal Son;
lines.ko: 우리가 영원하신 아들을 알 수 있도록 도와주세요.

lines.en: Spirit Divine, for evermore
Thee will we trust and thee adore.

title_en: Holy Ghost, Dispel Our Sadness

lines.en: Holy Ghost, dispel our sadness,
Pierce the clouds of sinful night;
Come, thou source of sweetest gladness,
Breathe thy life, and spread they light.
Loving Spirit, God of peace,
Great distributor of grace,
Rest upon this congregation;
Hear, O hear our supplication.
From that height which knows no measure,
As a gracious show'r descend;
Bringing down the richest treasure
Man can wish, or God can send.
lines.ko: 사람이 원할 수도 있고, 하나님이 보내실 수도 있습니다.

lines.en: O thou Glory, shining down
From the Father and the Son,
Grant us thine illumination;
Rest upon this congregation.
Come, thou best of all donations
lines.ko: 오세요, 당신은 모든 기부 중에서 가장 좋은 것입니다

lines.en: God can give, or we implore;
lines.ko: 하나님은 주실 수도 있고, 우리가 간청할 수도 있습니다.

lines.en: Having thy sweet consolations
We need wish for nothing more.
lines.ko: 우리는 더 이상 바랄 것이 없습니다.

lines.en: Come with unction and with pow'r,
On our souls thy graces show'r;
lines.ko: 우리 영혼에 당신의 은총이 드러나게 하소서.

lines.en: Author of the new creation,
Make our hearts thy habitation.

title_en: Come, O Come, Thou Quickening Spirit

lines.en: [English lyrics not available in the database for this revised hymn]
lines.ko: [이 개정된 찬송가의 데이터베이스에는 영어 가사가 없습니다.]

title_en: Come, Holy Spirit, Heavenly Dove.

lines.en: [English lyrics not available in the database for this revised hymn]
lines.ko: [이 개정된 찬송가의 데이터베이스에는 영어 가사가 없습니다.]

title_en: Gracious Spirit, Dove Divine

lines.en: Gracious Spirit, Dove Divine,
Let thy light within me shine;
All my guilty fears remove,
Fill me full of heav'n and love.
Speak thy pard'ning grace to me,
Set the burdened sinner free;
lines.ko: 무거운 짐을 진 죄인을 자유롭게 하시고

lines.en: Lead me to the Lamb of God,
Wash me in his precious blood.
lines.ko: 그분의 보배로운 피로 나를 씻어 주소서.

lines.en: Life and peace to me impart;
Seal salvation on my heart;
Breathe thyself into my breast,
Earnest of immortal rest.
Let me never from thee stray,
lines.ko: 내가 결코 당신에게서 벗어나지 않게 하소서.

lines.en: Keep me in the narrow way,
Fill my soul with joy divine,
lines.ko: 내 영혼을 신성한 기쁨으로 채워 주소서.

lines.en: Keep me, Lord, for ever thine.
lines.ko: 주님, 저를 영원히 당신의 것으로 지켜 주소서.

title_en: Breathe on Me, Breath of God.

lines.en: Breathe on me, Breath of God,
lines.id: Hiruplah aku, Nafas Tuhan,

lines.ko: 주님의 사랑 본받아 나 살게 하소서
lines.en: Fill me with life a-new.
lines.id: Penuhi aku dengan kehidupan yang baru.

lines.en: That I may love what Thou dost love
lines.id: Agar aku menyukai apa yang Engkau sukai

lines.en: And do what Thou wouldst do.
lines.id: Dan lakukanlah apa yang ingin Engkau lakukan.

lines.en: Breathe on me, Breath of God,
lines.id: Hiruplah aku, Nafas Tuhan,

lines.ko: 정결한 마음 가지고 나 행케 하소서
lines.en: Un-til my heart is pure,
lines.id: Sampai hatiku murni,

lines.en: Un-til with Thee I will on will
lines.id: Hingga bersamaMu aku akan melakukannya

lines.en: To do and to en-dure.
lines.id: Untuk melakukan dan bertahan.

lines.en: Breathe on me, Breath of God,
lines.id: Hiruplah aku, Nafas Tuhan,

lines.ko: 더러운 세상 탐욕을 다 태워 주소서
lines.en: Till I am whol-ly Thine,
lines.id: Sampai aku sepenuhnya menjadi milik-Mu,

lines.en: Till all this earth-ly part of me
lines.id: Sampai seluruh dunia ini menjadi bagian dari diriku

lines.en: Glows with Thy fire di-vine.
lines.id: Bersinar dengan api ilahi-Mu.

lines.en: Breathe on me, Breath of God,
lines.id: Hiruplah aku, Nafas Tuhan,

lines.ko: 영원한 주님 나라에 나 살게 하소서 아멘
lines.en: So shall I nev-er die,
lines.id: Jadi aku tidak akan pernah mati,

lines.en: But live with Thee the per-fect life
lines.id: Tapi jalani bersamaMu kehidupan yang sempurna

lines.en: Of Thine e-ter-ni-ty. A-men.
lines.id: Dari kekekalan-Mu. Amin.

title_en: Gracious Spirit, Dwell with Me

lines.en: [English lyrics not available in the database for this revised hymn]
lines.ko: [이 개정된 찬송가의 데이터베이스에는 영어 가사가 없습니다.]

title_en: Spirit, Strength of All the Weak

lines.en: Spirit, strength of all the week,
Giving courage to the meek,
Teaching faltering tongues to speak;
Hear us, Holy Spirit.
Spirit, aiding all who yearn
More of truth divine to learn,
And with deeper love to burn;
lines.ko: 그리고 더욱 깊은 사랑으로 불타오르게 하소서.

lines.en: Hear us, Holy Spirit.
Spirit, Fount of faith and joy,
Giving peace without alloy,
Hope that nothing can destroy;
lines.ko: 그 무엇도 파괴할 수 없기를 바랍니다.

lines.en: Hear us, Holy Spirit.
Source of love and light Divine,
With that hallowing grace of thine,
More and more upon us shine;
lines.ko: 우리에게 점점 더 많은 빛이 비춰지고 있습니다.

lines.en: Hear us, Holy Spirit.
Holy, loving, as thou art,
Come and live within our heart,
Never from us to depart;
Hear us, Holy Spirit.
May we soon, from sin set free,
Where thy work may perfect be,
Jesus' face with rapture see:
Hear us, Holy Spirit.

title_en: O Spirit of the Living God

lines.en: O Spirit of the living God,
In all thy plenitude of grace,
Where'er the foot of man hath trod,
Descend on our apostate race.
Give tongues of fire and hearts of love
To preach the reconciling word;
Give pow'r and unction from above,
Whene'er the joyful sound is heard.
Be darkness, at thy coming, light;
lines.ko: 당신이 오실 때에는 어둠이 되십시오. 빛이 되십시오.

lines.en: Confusion, order in thy path;
lines.ko: 혼란이여, 당신의 길을 질서 있게 하십시오.

lines.en: Souls without strength inspire with might;
Bid mercy triumph over wrath.
O Spirit of the Lord, prepare
All the round earth her God to meet;
Breathe thou abroad like morning air,
Till hearts of stone begin to beat.
Baptize the nations; far and nigh
The triumphs of the cross record;
The Name of Jesus glorify,
Till every kindred call him Lord.
lines.ko: 모든 족속이 그를 주님이라 부를 때까지.

lines.en: God from eternity hath willed
All flesh shall his salvation see:
So be the Father's love fulfilled,
The Saviour's suff'rings crowned through thee.
lines.ko: 구주의 고난이 당신을 통해 관을 씌웠습니다.

title_en: Spirit of God, Descend upon My Heart

lines.en: [English lyrics not available in the database for this revised hymn]
lines.ko: [이 개정된 찬송가의 데이터베이스에는 영어 가사가 없습니다.]

title_en: For Your Gift of God the Spirit

lines.en: [English lyrics not available in the database for this revised hymn]
lines.ko: [이 개정된 찬송가의 데이터베이스에는 영어 가사가 없습니다.]

title_en: Come, Dearest Lord, Descend and Dwell

lines.en: Come, dearest Lord, descend and dwell
By faith and love in ev'ry breast;
Then shall we know and taste and feel
lines.ko: 그럼 우리가 알고, 맛보고, 느낄 수 있을까요?

lines.en: The joys that cannot be expressed.
Come, fill our hearts with inward strength;
lines.ko: 오셔서 우리 마음을 내적인 힘으로 채워 주십시오.

lines.en: Make our enlarged souls possess
And learn the height, and breadth, and length
Of thine unmeasurable grace.
Now to the God whose pow'r can do
lines.ko: 이제 능력으로 할 수 있는 하나님께

lines.en: More than our thoughts or wishes know,
Be everlasting honors done
By all the church, through Christ his Son.
lines.ko: 온 교회로 말미암아 그의 아들 그리스도로 말미암아

title_en: O Breath of Life, Come Sweeping through Us
title_ko: 오 생명의 숨결이시여, 우리를 휩쓸어 주소서 (자체번역)

lines.en: [English lyrics not available in the database for this revised hymn]
lines.ko: [이 개정된 찬송가의 데이터베이스에는 영어 가사가 없습니다.]

title_en: Christ Is Made the Sure Foundation

lines.en: Christ is made the sure foundation,
Christ the Head and Cornerstone,
Chosen of the Lord and precious,
Binding all the church in one;
Holy Zion's help for ever
And her confidence alone.
All that dedicated city,
Dearly loved of God on high,
lines.ko: 높은 곳에 계신 하나님의 사랑을 받은 자여,

lines.en: In exultant jubilation
Pours perpetual melody;
God the One in Three adoring
In glad hymns eternally.
To this temple, where we call thee,
Come, O Lord of hosts today:
With thy wonted lovingkindness
Hear thy people as they pray;
And thy fullest benediction
Shed within its walls alway.
Here vouchsafe to all thy servants
lines.ko: 여기 당신의 모든 종들에게 보증을 베푸소서

lines.en: What they ask of thee to gain,
What they gain from thee for ever
lines.ko: 그들이 당신에게서 영원히 얻는 것은 무엇입니까?

lines.en: With the blessed to retain,
And hereafter in thy glory
Evermore with thee to reign.
Laud and honor to the Father,
Laud and honor to the Son,
Laud and honor to the Spirit,
Ever Three and ever One,
One in might, and One in glory,
While unending ages run.

title_en: Christ Is Made the Sure Foundation

lines.en: Christ is made the sure foundation,
Christ the Head and Cornerstone,
Chosen of the Lord and precious,
Binding all the church in one;
Holy Zion's help for ever
And her confidence alone.
All that dedicated city,
Dearly loved of God on high,
lines.ko: 높은 곳에 계신 하나님의 사랑을 받은 자여,

lines.en: In exultant jubilation
Pours perpetual melody;
God the One in Three adoring
In glad hymns eternally.
To this temple, where we call thee,
Come, O Lord of hosts today:
With thy wonted lovingkindness
Hear thy people as they pray;
And thy fullest benediction
Shed within its walls alway.
Here vouchsafe to all thy servants
lines.ko: 여기 당신의 모든 종들에게 보증을 베푸소서

lines.en: What they ask of thee to gain,
What they gain from thee for ever
lines.ko: 그들이 당신에게서 영원히 얻는 것은 무엇입니까?

lines.en: With the blessed to retain,
And hereafter in thy glory
Evermore with thee to reign.
Laud and honor to the Father,
Laud and honor to the Son,
Laud and honor to the Spirit,
Ever Three and ever One,
One in might, and One in glory,
While unending ages run.

title_en: O ‘Twas a Joyful Sound to Hear

lines.en: From Psalm 122
O 'twas a joyful sound to hear
Our tribes devoutly say,
Up, Israel! to the temple haste,
And keep your festal day.
At Salem's courts we must appear
With our assembled pow'rs,
In strong and beauteous order ranged,
Like her united tow'rs.
O pray we then for Salem's peace;
lines.ko: 오, 그렇다면 살렘의 평화를 위해 기도해 주십시오.

lines.en: For they shall prosp'rous be,
Thou holy city of our God,
Who bear true love to thee.
May peace within thy sacred walls
lines.ko: 당신의 신성한 성벽 안에 평화가 있기를 빕니다

lines.en: A constant guest be found;
With plenty and prosperity
Thy palaces be crowned.
For my dear brethren's sake, and friends
No less than brethren dear,
I'll pray, May peace in Salem's tow'rs
A constant guest appear.
But most of all I'll seek thy good,
lines.ko: 그러나 무엇보다도 나는 당신의 유익을 구할 것입니다.

lines.en: And ever wish thee well,
For Zion and the temple's sake,
Where God vouchsafes to dwell.

title_en: Glorious Things of Thee Are Spoken

lines.en: Glorious things of thee are spoken,
lines.ko: 시온성과 같은 교회 그의 영광 한없다
lines.id: Hal-hal mulia tentangmu dibicarakan,

lines.en: Zion, city of our God;
lines.ko: 허락하신 말씀 대로 주가 친히 세웠다
lines.id: Zi-on, kota Tuhan kita

lines.en: He whose word cannot be broken
lines.ko: 반석 위에 세운 교회 흔들 자가 누구랴
lines.id: Dia yang perkataannya tidak dapat dilanggar

lines.en: Formed thee for his own abode:
lines.ko: 모든 원수 에워싸도 아무 근심 없도다
lines.id: Membentukmu untuk tempat tinggalnya sendiri

lines.en: On the Rock of Ages founded,
lines.id: Di Batu A-ges ditemukan,

lines.en: What can shake thy sure repose?
lines.id: Apa yang bisa menggoyahkan posisimu yang pasti

lines.en: With salvation's walls surrounded,
lines.id: Dengan dikelilingi tembok keselamatan,

lines.en: Thou may'st smile at all thy foes.
lines.id: Kamu mungkin akan tersenyum pada semua musuhmu.

lines.en: See the streams of living waters,
lines.id: Lihatlah, aliran air yang hidup,

lines.en: Springing from eternal love,
lines.id: Muncul dari cinta abadi,

lines.en: Well supply thy sons and daughters,
lines.ko: 이런 물이 흘러 가니 목마를 자 누구랴
lines.id: Kami akan membekali putra dan putrimu,

lines.en: And all fear of want remove;
lines.ko: 주의 은혜 풍족 하여 넘치고도 넘친다
lines.id: Dan semua ketakutan ingin kembali pindah

lines.en: Who can faint, while such a river
lines.id: Siapa yang bisa pingsan, sementara seperti sungai

lines.en: Ever flows their thirst t'assuage?
lines.id: Ever-er mengalirkan rasa haus mereka

lines.en: Grace which, like the Lord, the giver,
lines.id: Anugerah yang, seperti Tuhan, pemberi,

lines.en: Never fails from age to age.
lines.id: Tidak pernah gagal dari zaman ke zaman.

lines.en: Round each habitation hov'ring,
lines.ko: 주의 은혜 내가 받아 시온 백성 되는 때
lines.id: Selamat, jika dari kota Zi-on

lines.en: See the cloud and fire appear
lines.id: Saya meskipun rahmat seorang anggota,

lines.en: For a glory and a cov'ring,
lines.ko: 세상 헛된 모든 영광 아침 안개 같으나
lines.id: Biarkan dunia meremehkan atau mengasihani,

lines.en: Showing that the Lord is near:
lines.ko: 주의 자녀 받을 복은 영원 무궁하도다 아멘
lines.id: Aku akan bermegah atas nama itu,

lines.en: Thus deriving from their banner
lines.id: Memudar adalah kesenangan dunia,

lines.en: Light by night and shade by day,
lines.id: Semua kemegahan dan pertunjukan kebanggaannya

lines.en: Safe they feed upon the manna
lines.id: Kegembiraan yang utuh dan harta yang abadi

lines.en: Which he gives them when they pray.
lines.id: Hanya anak-anak Zi-on yang tahu. Amin.

lines.en: Saviour, if of Zion's city
I, through grace, a member am,
Let the world deride or pity,
I will glory in thy Name:
Fading is the worldling's pleasure,
All his boasted pomp and show;
Solid joys and lasting treasure
None but Zion's children know.

title_en: Hail to the Brightness of Zion’s Glad Morning!

lines.en: Hail to the brightness of Zion's glad morning!
lines.id: Salam atas cerahnya pagi gembira Zi-on!
Sukacita bagi negeri-negeri yang berada dalam kegelapan!
Diamlah aksen kesedihan dan duka
Zi-on dalam kemenangan memulai pemerintahannya yang ringan.

lines.en: Joy to the lands that in darkness have lain!
lines.id: Salam atas cerahnya pagi gembira Zi-on!
Telah lama dinubuatkan oleh para nabi Israel!
Salam untuk jutaan orang yang kembali lagi!
Bangsa-bangsa lain dan Yahudi adalah penglihatan yang paling diberkati.

lines.en: Hushed be the accents of sorrow and mourning;
lines.id: Lihatlah. di gurun, bunga-bunga subur bermunculan!
Aliran sungai yang melimpah terus mengalir dalam waktu lama

lines.ko: 이 산과 저 산이 마주쳐 울려
lines.id: Gema gema dari puncak gunung terdengar keras,
Sampah meningkat dalam ver-dure, dan min-gle dalam lagu.

lines.en: Zion in triumph begins her mild reign.
lines.id: Lihat, dari seluruh daratan, dari pulau-pulau di lautan,
Pujian bagi Ye-ho-vah yang naik ke tempat tinggi
Kejatuhan adalah mesin perang dan keributan,
Teriakan penyelamatan terdengar di langit. Amin.

lines.en: Hail to the brightness of Zion's glad morning!
Long by the prophets of Israel foretold!
Hail to the millions from bondage returning!
Gentiles and Jews the blest vision behold.
Lo, in the desert rich flowers are springing,
Streams ever copious are gliding along;
Loud from the mountain tops echoes are ringing,
Wastes rise in verdure, and mingle in song.
See, from all lands, from the isles of the ocean,
Praise to Jehovah ascending on high;
Fall'n are the engines of war and commotion,
Shouts of salvation are rending the sky.

title_id: Salam atas Cerahnya Pagi Sion yang Bahagia

title_en: The Church’s One Foundation

lines.en: The church's one Foundation
lines.ko: 교회의 참된 터는 우리 주 예수라
lines.id: Satu-satunya Fondasi Gereja

lines.en: Is Jesus Christ her Lord;
lines.ko: 그 귀한 말씀 위에 이 교회 세웠네
lines.id: Apakah Yesus Kristus, Tuhannya.

lines.en: She is his new creation
lines.ko: 주 예수 강림 하사 피 흘려 샀으니
lines.id: Dia adalah ciptaan-Nya yang baru

lines.en: By water and the Word:
lines.ko: 땅 위의 모든 교회 주님의 신부라
lines.id: Melalui air dan perkataan.

lines.en: From heav'n he came and sought her
lines.id: Dari surga Dia datang dan mencarinya

lines.en: To be his holy bride;
lines.id: Untuk menjadi mempelai wanita-Nya yang kudus

lines.en: With his own blood he bought her,
lines.id: Dengan darah-Nya sendiri Dia membelinya,

lines.en: And for her life he died.
lines.id: Dan untuk hidupnya Dia mati.

lines.en: Elect from ev'ry nation,
lines.ko: 온 세계 모든 교회 한 몸을 이루어
lines.id: Pilihan dari setiap bangsa,

lines.en: Yet one o'er all the earth,
lines.ko: 한 주님 섬기면서 한 믿음 가지네
lines.id: Namun di seluruh bumi

lines.en: Her charter of salvation
lines.ko: 한 이름 찬송 하고 한 성경 읽으며
lines.id: Piagam penyelamatannya

lines.en: One Lord, one faith, one birth;
lines.ko: 다 같은 소망 품고 늘 은혜 받도다
lines.id: Satu Tuhan, satu keyakinan, satu kelahiran

lines.en: One holy Name she blesses,
lines.id: Satu nama suci yang dia berkati

lines.en: Partakes one holy food.
lines.id: Par-mengambil satu makanan suci

lines.en: And to one hope she presses,
lines.id: Dan dengan satu harapan dia menekannya,

lines.en: With ev'ry grace endued.
lines.id: Dengan rahmat yang sudah jatuh tempo.

lines.en: Though with a scornful wonder
lines.ko: 땅 위의 모든 교회 주 안에 있어서
lines.id: Dan dia di bumi memiliki persatuan

lines.en: Men see her sore oppressed,
lines.id: Bersama Tuhan, Tiga dalam Satu,

lines.en: By schisms rent asunder,
lines.ko: 오 주여 복을 주사 저 성도들같이
lines.id: Dan persekutuan manis yang mistis

lines.en: By heresies distressed,
lines.ko: 우리도 주와 함께 늘 살게 하소서 아멘
lines.id: Dengan mereka yang istirahatnya dimenangkan

lines.en: Yet saints their watch are keeping,
lines.id: Oh, yang bahagia dan suci!

lines.en: Their cry goes up, "How long?"
lines.id: Tuhan, berilah kami rahmat agar kami,

lines.en: And soon the night of weeping
lines.id: Seperti mereka, orang yang lemah lembut dan rendah hati,

lines.en: Shall be the morn of song.
lines.id: Di tempat tinggi boleh tinggal bersamaMu. Amin.

lines.en: The church shall never perish!
Her dear Lord to defend,
To guide, sustain and cherish
Is with her to the end;
Though there be those that hate her,
And false sons in her pale,
Against or foe or traitor
She ever shall prevail.
'Mid toil and tribulation,
And tumult of her war,
She waits the consummation
Of peace for evermore;
Till with the vision glorious
Her longing eyes are blest,
And the great church victorious
Shall be the church at rest.
Yet she on earth hath union
With the God the Three in One,
And mystic sweet communion
With those whose rest is won:
O happy ones and holy!
Lord, give us grace that we,
Like them, the meek and lowly,
On high may dwell with thee.

title_en: Jesus, with Thy Church Abide

lines.en: Jesus, with thy church abide,
Be her Saviour, Lord and Guide,
While on earth her faith is tried:
lines.ko: 지상에 있는 동안 그녀의 믿음은 시험을 받았습니다.

lines.en: We beseech thee, hear us.
Keep her life and doctrine pure;
Grant her patience to endure,
lines.ko: 그녀에게 인내할 수 있는 인내심을 주소서.

lines.en: Trusting in thy promise sure:
We beseech thee, hear us.
May she one in doctrine be,
One in truth and charity,
Winning all to faith in thee:
We beseech thee, hear us.
May she guide the poor and blind,
lines.ko: 그녀가 가난하고 눈먼 이들을 인도하게 하소서.

lines.en: Seek the lost until she find,
And the brokenhearted bind:
We beseech thee, hear us.
Save her love from growing cold,
Make her watchmen strong and bold,
Fence her round, thy peaceful fold:
We beseech thee, hear us.
May her lamp of truth be bright,
Bid her bear aloft its light
Through the realms of heathen night:
We beseech thee, hear us.
Arm her soldiers with the cross,
Brave to suffer toil or loss,
Counting earthly gain but dross:
lines.ko: 세상의 이득은 계산하고 찌꺼기는 다음과 같이 생각합니다.

lines.en: We beseech thee, hear us.
May she holy triumphs win,
Overthrow the hosts of sin,
Gather all the nations in:
We beseech thee, hear us.

title_en: O Thou Who the Shepherd of Israel Art

lines.en: O thou who the Shepherd of Israel art,
Give ear to our pray'r and thy favor impart;
lines.ko: 우리의 기도에 귀를 기울이시고 당신의 은혜를 나누어 주소서.

lines.en: Thou leader of Joseph, thou guide of his way,
lines.ko: 당신은 요셉의 지도자시요, 그의 길을 인도하시며

lines.en: 'Mid cherubim dwelling, thy glory display.
lines.ko: '그룹 가운데 거하시는 주여, 주의 영광을 나타내소서.

lines.en: In Ephraim's, Manasseh's and Benjamin's sight,
O come thou and save us; awake in thy might.
lines.ko: 오 오셔서 우리를 구원하소서. 주의 힘으로 깨어나소서.

lines.en: O God, give us favor, restore to thy grace;
lines.ko: 오 하나님, 우리에게 은혜를 베푸시고, 당신의 은혜를 회복시켜 주소서.

lines.en: And then we shall live in the light of thy face.
lines.ko: 그러면 우리는 당신 얼굴의 빛 속에서 살 것입니다.

lines.en: From Egypt's dark border a vine thou didst take;
lines.ko: 이집트의 어두운 국경에서 당신은 포도나무를 취하셨습니다.

lines.en: Destroying the heathen didst room for it make.
Where planted it grew at thy sov'reign command,
lines.ko: 심은 곳에서 당신의 통치 명령으로 자랐습니다.

lines.en: With roots deeply set and boughs filling the land.
lines.ko: 뿌리가 깊게 박혀 있고 가지가 땅을 가득 채우고 있습니다.

lines.en: The axe hews it down; it is burned in the fire;
lines.ko: 도끼가 그것을 쳐부수었다. 그것은 불에 태워졌습니다.

lines.en: They perish, rebuked in thy terrible ire.
lines.ko: 그들은 멸망하고 당신의 무서운 진노로 책망을 받습니다.

lines.en: O lay then thy hand on the Man of thy might,
lines.ko: 오, 그렇다면 주의 능력이 많으신 분에게 주의 손을 얹어 주십시오.

lines.en: The Son of Man made to stand strong in thy sight.
lines.ko: 사람의 아들이 당신 앞에 굳게 서게 되었습니다.

lines.en: No more shall we wander, delighting in shame;
lines.ko: 우리는 더 이상 부끄러움을 즐기며 방황하지 않을 것입니다.
