lines.ko: 우리가 당신 교회의 부르심에 귀를 기울이게 하소서.

lines.en: Gladly in all times and places
Give to thee who givest all.
Thou hast bought us, and no longer
lines.ko: 당신은 우리를 사셨고 더 이상은 아닙니다.

lines.en: Can we claim to be our own;
lines.ko: 우리는 우리 자신이라고 주장할 수 있습니까?

lines.en: Ever free and ever stronger,
We shall serve thee, Lord, alone.
Saviour, thou hast freely given
All the blessings we enjoy,
Earthly store and bread of heaven,
Love and peace without alloy;
Humbly now we bow before thee,
lines.ko: 이제 우리는 당신 앞에 겸손히 머리를 숙입니다.

lines.en: And our all to thee resign;
For the kingdom, pow'r, and glory,
Are, O Lord, for ever thine.

title_en: Lord of All Good, We Bring Our Gifts to You
title_ko: 모든 선의 주님, 우리는 당신께 선물을 드립니다 (자체번역)

lines.en: [English lyrics not available in the database for this revised hymn]
lines.ko: [이 개정된 찬송가의 데이터베이스에는 영어 가사가 없습니다.]

title_en: Zion, Founded on the Mountains

lines.en: From Psalm 87
Zion, founded on the mountains,
God, thy Maker, loves thee well;
lines.ko: 당신을 만드신 하나님은 당신을 매우 사랑하십니다.

lines.en: He has chosen thee, most precious,
He delights in thee to dwell;
God's own city, God's own city, God's own city,
lines.ko: 하나님의 도시, 하나님의 도시, 하나님의 도시,

lines.en: Who can all thy glory tell?
lines.ko: 주의 모든 영광을 누구에게 말할 수 있으리이까?

lines.en: Heathen lands and hostile peoples
Soon shall come the Lord to know;
lines.ko: 곧 주님께서 오셔서 알게 되실 것입니다.

lines.en: Nations born again in Zion
Shall the Lord's salvation show;
God Almighty, God Almighty, God Almighty,
lines.ko: 전능하신 하나님, 전능하신 하나님, 전능하신 하나님,

lines.en: Shall on Zion strength bestow.
When the Lord shall count the nations,
Sons and daughters he shall see,
lines.ko: 그는 아들과 딸을 보게 될 것이다.

lines.en: Born to endless life in Zion,
And their joyful song shall be:
lines.ko: 그리고 그들의 즐거운 노래는 다음과 같을 것이다:

lines.en: "Blessed Zion, Blessed Zion, Blessed Zion,
All our fountains are in thee."
lines.ko: 우리의 모든 샘이 당신 안에 있습니다."

title_en: O God, to Us Show Mercy

lines.en: Psalm 67
O God, to us show mercy
And bless us in thy grace;
Cause thou to shine upon us
The brightness of thy face;
That so thy way most holy
On earth may soon be known,
And unto ev'ry people
Thy saving grace be shown.
O God, let all men praise thee,
lines.ko: 오 하느님, 모든 사람이 당신을 찬양하게 하소서.

lines.en: Let all the nations sing;
In ev'ry land let praises
And songs of gladness ring;
For thou shalt judge the people
In truth and righteousness,
And through the earth the nations
Shall thy just rule confess.
O God, let people praise thee,
lines.ko: 오 하나님, 사람들이 당신을 찬양하게 하시고,

lines.en: Let all the nations sing,
For earth in rich abundance
To us her fruit shall bring.
The Lord our God shall bless us,
lines.ko: 우리 하나님 여호와께서 우리에게 복을 주시리니

lines.en: Our God shall blessing send,
And all the earth shall fear him
To its remotest end.

title_en: All Lands, to God in Joyful Sounds

lines.en: From Psalm 66:1-7
All lands, to God in joyful sounds
Aloft your voices raise;
Sing forth the honor of his Name,
And glorious make his praise.
Say ye to God, how terrible
In all thy works art thou!
To thee thy foes by thy great pow'r
Shall be constrained to bow.
Yea, all the earth shall worship thee,
And unto thee shall sing;
To thy great Name shall songs of joy
lines.ko: 당신의 크신 이름을 위하여 기쁨의 노래를 부르리이다

lines.en: With loud hosannas ring.
O come, behold the works of God,
lines.ko: 오, 와서 하나님께서 하시는 일을 보라.

lines.en: His mighty doings see;
In dealing with the sons of men
Most wonderful is he.
He led in safety through the flood
The people of his choice,
He turned he sea to solid ground;
In him let us rejoice.
He rules for ever by his might,
His eyes the nations try;
Let not the proud, rebellious ones
Exalt themselves on high.

title_en: Christ Shall Have Dominion

lines.en: [English lyrics not available in the database for this revised hymn]
lines.ko: [이 개정된 찬송가의 데이터베이스에는 영어 가사가 없습니다.]

title_en: Ye Christian Heralds, Go Proclaim

lines.en: Ye Christian heralds, go proclaim
Salvation through Emmanuel's Name!
To distant climes the tidings bear,
And plant the Rose of Sharon there.
God shield you with a wall of fire,
With flaming seal your breasts inspire,
lines.ko: 불타는 봉인으로 당신의 가슴에 영감을 주고,

lines.en: Bid raging winds their fury cease,
And hush the tempests into peace.
lines.ko: 그리고 폭풍우를 잠잠하게 하여 평화롭게 만드십시오.

lines.en: And when our labors all are o'er,
Then we shall meet to part no more;
lines.ko: 그러면 우리는 더 이상 만나서 헤어지지 않을 것입니다.

lines.en: Meet with the blood-bought throng to fall,
lines.ko: 피 값으로 사서 넘어질 무리를 만나라

lines.en: And crown our Jesus Lord of all.
lines.ko: 그리고 우리 예수님을 모든 것의 주님으로 삼으십시오.

title_en: Jesus Shall Reign

lines.en: [English lyrics not available in the database for this revised hymn]
lines.ko: [이 개정된 찬송가의 데이터베이스에는 영어 가사가 없습니다.]

title_en: Arise, O God

lines.en: [English lyrics not available in the database for this revised hymn]
lines.ko: [이 개정된 찬송가의 데이터베이스에는 영어 가사가 없습니다.]

title_en: Hark! The Voice of Jesus Crying

lines.en: Hark! the voice of Jesus crying,
"Who will go and work today?
Fields are white, and harvests waiting;
Who will bear the sheaves away?"
Loud and long the Master calleth,
Rich reward he offers free;
Who will answer, gladly saying,
"Here am I; send me, send me."
lines.ko: "내가 여기 있습니다. 나를 보내십시오. 나를 보내십시오."

lines.en: If you cannot cross the ocean,
And the heathen lands explore,
You can find the heathen nearer,
lines.ko: 이방인을 더 가까이에서 찾을 수 있고,

lines.en: You can help them at your door.
lines.ko: 당신은 당신의 문앞에서 그들을 도울 수 있습니다.

lines.en: If you cannot give your thousands,
You can give the widow's mite;
And the least you give for Jesus
lines.ko: 그리고 당신이 예수님을 위해 최소한으로 바치는 것은

lines.en: Will be precious in his sight.
If you cannot be a watchman,
Standing high on Zion's wall,
Pointing out the path to heaven,
Off'ring life and peace to all,
With your prayers and with your bounties
You can do what God demands;
lines.ko: 당신은 하나님이 요구하시는 것을 할 수 있습니다.

lines.en: You can be like faithful Aaron,
lines.ko: 당신도 충실한 아론처럼 될 수 있습니다.

lines.en: Holding up the prophet's hands.
Let none hear you idly saying,
lines.ko: 아무도 당신이 멍하니 말하는 것을 듣지 못하게 하세요.

lines.en: "There is nothing I can do,"
lines.ko: "내가 할 수 있는 일은 아무것도 없어,"

lines.en: While the sons of men are dying,
And the Master calls for you:
Take the task he gives you gladly,
lines.ko: 그가 당신에게 주는 임무를 기꺼이 받아들이십시오.

lines.en: Let his work your pleasure be;
Answer quickly when he calleth,
"Here am I; send me, send me."
lines.ko: "내가 여기 있습니다. 나를 보내십시오. 나를 보내십시오."

title_en: O Zion, Hast, Your Mission High Fulfilling
title_ko: O Zion, Hast, 당신의 사명을 높이십시오 (자체번역)

lines.en: [English lyrics not available in the database for this revised hymn]
lines.ko: [이 개정된 찬송가의 데이터베이스에는 영어 가사가 없습니다.]

title_en: Bring Them In

lines.en: Hark! 'tis the shepherd's voice I hear,
lines.ko: 들어봐! 내가 듣는 것은 목자의 음성이요,

lines.en: Out in the desert dark and drear,
Calling the sheep who've gone astray,
Far from the shepherd's fold away,
Bring them in, bring them in,
Bring them in from the fields of sin;
Bring them in, bring them in,
Bring the wandering ones to Jesus.
Who'll go and help this Shepherd kind,
lines.ko: 누가 가서 이 양치기 종류를 도울 것인가?

lines.en: Help Him the wandering ones to find?
lines.ko: 방황하는 사람들이 찾을 수 있도록 도와 주시겠습니까?

lines.en: Who'll bring the lost ones to the fold,
Where they'll be sheltered from the cold.
Bring them in, bring them in,
Bring them in from the fields of sin;
Bring them in, bring them in,
Bring the wandering ones to Jesus.
Out in the desert hear their cry,
Out on the mountains wild and high,
Hark! 'tis the Master speaks to thee,
Go find my sheep where-e'er they be.
lines.ko: 가서 내 양들이 있는 곳을 찾아보세요.

lines.en: Bring them in, bring them in,
Bring them in from the fields of sin;
Bring them in, bring them in,
Bring the wandering ones to Jesus.

title_en: Fling Out the Banner! Let It Float

lines.en: Fling out the banner! let it float
Skyward and seaward, high and wide;
lines.ko: 하늘을 향해, 바다를 향해, 높고 넓은;

lines.en: The sun that lights its shining folds,
The cross on which the Saviour died.
Fling out the banner! angels bend
In anxious silence o'er the sign,
And vainly seek to comprehend
The wonder of the love Divine,
Fling out the banner! heathen lands
Shall see from far the glorious sight,
lines.ko: 멀리서 영광스러운 광경을 보게 될 것이며,

lines.en: And nations, crowding to be born,
Baptize their spirits in its light.
lines.ko: 그 빛으로 그들의 영혼에 세례를 주십시오.

lines.en: Fling out the banner! sin-sick souls,
That sink and perish in the strife,
Shall touch in faith its radiant hem
And spring immortal into life.
Fling out the banner! let it float
Skyward and seaward, high and wide,
lines.ko: 하늘을 향해, 바다를 향해, 높고 넓은,

lines.en: Our glory, only in the cross;
Our only hope, the Crucified!
lines.ko: 우리의 유일한 희망, 십자가에 못 박히신 분!

lines.en: Fling out the banner! wide and high,
Seaward and skyward, let it shine:
lines.ko: 바다를 향하여, 하늘을 향하여 빛나게 하소서:

lines.en: Nor skill, nor might, nor merit ours;
We conquer only in that sign.

title_en: Christ for the World We Sing

lines.en: Christ for the world we sing;
The world to Christ we bring
With loving zeal;
The poor and them that mourn,
The faint and overborne,
Sin-sick and sorrow-worn,
Whom Christ doth heal.
Christ for the world we sing;
The world to Christ we bring
With fervent pray'r;
The wayward and the lost,
lines.ko: 길을 잃은 자와 길을 잃은 자,

lines.en: By restless passions tossed,
Redeemed at countless cost
lines.ko: 셀 수 없이 많은 비용을 들여 구해낸

lines.en: From dark despair.
Christ for the world we sing;
The world to Christ we bring
With one accord;
With us the work to share,
With us reproach to dare,
With us the cross to bear,
For Christ our Lord.
Christ for the world we sing;
The world to Christ we bring
With joyful song;
The newborn souls whose days,
Reclaimed from error's ways,
Inspired with hope and praise
To Christ belong.

title_en: We Have Heard the Joyful Sound

lines.en: We have heard the joyful sound:
lines.ko: 기쁜 소리 들리니 예수 구원 하신다
lines.id: Selat adalah pintu gerbang menuju penyelamatan,

lines.en: Jesus saves! Jesus saves!
lines.id: Sempitkan jalan menuju ke sana.

lines.en: Spread the tidings all around:
lines.ko: 주님 명령 하시니 산을 넘고 물 건너
lines.id: Rock-y jalan hidup adalah,

lines.en: Jesus saves! Jesus saves!
lines.ko: 온 세상에 전하라 예수 구원 하신다
lines.id: Kasar, dan dibimbing dengan hati-hati.

lines.en: Bear the news to ev'ry land,
lines.id: Namun, meskipun kita semua terjerat.

lines.en: Climb the steeps and cross the waves,
lines.id: Dalam kekotoran dosa,

lines.en: Onward! 'tis our Lord's command;
lines.id: Mari kita tunda setiap pengrusakan,

lines.en: Jesus saves! Jesus saves!
lines.id: Cari gerbang selat dan masuk!
Ayo, masuklah melalui gerbang yang selat,
Jalan dan pintu keselamatan!
Inilah jalannya, berjalanlah kita di dalamnya
Inilah hidup yang lebih baik lagi!

lines.en: Waft it on the rolling tide:
lines.id: Banyak yang lebih suka banyak lengkungan,

lines.en: Jesus saves! Jesus saves!
lines.ko: 모든 죄인 들으라 예수 구원 하신다
lines.id: Jalan yang dilalui luas selama bertahun-tahun.

lines.en: Tell to sinners far and wide:
lines.id: Jalan seperti itu, meski menyenangkan untuk dilalui,

lines.en: Jesus saves! Jesus saves!
lines.id: Berakhir dengan kehancuran dan air mata.

lines.en: Sing, ye islands of the sea;
lines.id: Mari kita tinggalkan harta duniawi,

lines.en: Echo back, ye ocean caves;
lines.id: Kemuliaan dan kawasan loteng

lines.en: Earth shall keep her jubilee:
lines.id: Berjalanlah di jalan Injil,

lines.en: Jesus saves! Jesus saves!
lines.id: Masuklah ke dalam kehidupan melalui gerbang yang sesak.
Ayo, masuklah melalui gerbang yang selat,
Jalan dan pintu keselamatan!
Inilah jalannya, berjalanlah kita di dalamnya
Inilah hidup yang lebih baik lagi!

lines.en: Sing above the battle strife,
lines.ko: 환난 중에 하는 말 예수 구원 하신다
lines.id: Yesus telah membuka keselamatan.

lines.en: Jesus saves! Jesus saves!
lines.id: Berjalanlah dalam kekuatan rahmat-Nya.

lines.en: By his death and endless life,
lines.ko: 지은 죄로 인하여 슬픈 맘이 있어도
lines.id: Keluarlah tanpa ragu-ragu!

lines.en: Jesus saves! Jesus saves!
lines.ko: 숨질 때에 내 할 말 예수 구원 하신다
lines.id: Aktif, untuk tempat tinggal hidup kita!

lines.en: Sing it softly through the gloom,
lines.id: Gerbang kehidupan tidak akan ada selamanya.

lines.en: When the heart for mercy craves;
lines.id: Suatu hari nanti akan tutup dan kemudian

lines.en: Sing in triumph o'er the tomb
lines.id: Semua keinginanmu tidak akan pernah bisa

lines.en: Jesus saves! Jesus saves!
lines.id: Buka penanya untukmu, untung!
Ayo, masuklah melalui gerbang yang selat,
Jalan dan pintu keselamatan!
Inilah jalannya, berjalanlah kita di dalamnya
Inilah hidup yang lebih baik lagi!

lines.en: Give the winds a mighty voice,
lines.id: Berteriaklah kepada angin, Yesus menyelamatkan!

lines.en: Jesus saves! Jesus saves!
lines.id: Bersukacitalah, hai bangsa-bangsa, Yesus menyelamatkan

lines.en: Let the nations now rejoice
lines.id: Beritakan Injil keselamatan ke gunung-gunung dan ladang-ladang

lines.en: Jesus saves! Jesus saves!
lines.id: Yesus, lagu kemenangan kami, selamatkan kami

lines.en: Shout salvation full and free,
Highest hills and deepest caves;
This our song of victory
Jesus saves! Jesus saves!

title_en: We Rest on Thee

lines.en: [English lyrics not available in the database for this revised hymn]
lines.ko: [이 개정된 찬송가의 데이터베이스에는 영어 가사가 없습니다.]

title_en: So Send I You

lines.en: So send I you to labour unrewarded
lines.ko: 그러므로 내가 너희를 보상 없이 일하도록 보내노라

lines.en: To serve unpaid, unloved, unsought, unknown,
lines.ko: 보수도 없고, 사랑받지도 않고, 구하지도 않고, 알려지지 않은,

lines.en: To bear rebuke, to suffer scorn and scoffing
So send I you- to toil for me alone.
lines.ko: 그러니 당신을 보내십시오. 나를 위해 혼자 수고하도록 하십시오.

lines.en: As the Father hath sent me,
So send I you
So send I you-to bind the bruised and broken,
lines.ko: 그러니 내가 너를 보내어 멍들고 부서진 자들을 묶고

lines.en: O'er wand'ring souls to work, to weep, to wake,
lines.ko: 일하고, 울고, 깨우기 위해 방황하는 영혼들아,

lines.en: To bear the burdens of a world a-weary
So send I you to suffer for my sake.
lines.ko: 그러므로 나를 위하여 너희를 보내어 고난을 받게 하라.

lines.en: As the Father hath sent me,
So send I you
So send I you- to loneliness and longing
lines.ko: 그러니 널 보내- 외로움과 그리움 속으로

lines.en: With heart a-hung'ring for the loved and known,
Forsaking home and kindred, friend and dear one
lines.ko: 집과 친척, 친구와 사랑하는 사람을 버리고

lines.en: So send I you-to know My love alone.
lines.ko: 그러니 나는 너를 보내어 나의 사랑만 알도록 하여라.

lines.en: As the Father hath sent me,
So send I you
So send I you- to leave your life's ambition,
lines.ko: 그러니 나는 당신을 보냅니다- 당신의 삶의 야망을 떠나도록

lines.en: To die to dear desire, self-will resign,
lines.ko: 소중한 욕망에 죽고, 자기 자신을 포기하고,

lines.en: To labour long and love where men revile you
lines.ko: 사람들이 너희를 욕하는 곳에서 오래 일하고 사랑하라

lines.en: So send I you-to loose your life in Mine.
lines.ko: 그러므로 나는 너를 보내어 내 안에서 네 생명을 잃게 하라.

lines.en: As the Father hath sent me,
So send I you
So send I you- to hearts made hard by hatred,
lines.ko: 그러니 나는 당신을 증오로 굳어진 마음들에게 보내드립니다.

lines.en: To eyes made blind because they will not see,
To spend, tho' it be blood to spend and spare not
lines.ko: 지출하는 것은 피를 흘리는 일이고 아끼지 않는 일이다

lines.en: So send I you- to taste of Calvary.
lines.ko: 그러므로 나는 당신을 갈보리의 맛으로 보내드립니다.

lines.en: As the Father hath sent me,
So send I you

title_en: The Sending, Lord, Springs

lines.en: [English lyrics not available in the database for this revised hymn]
lines.ko: [이 개정된 찬송가의 데이터베이스에는 영어 가사가 없습니다.]

title_en: Macedonia

lines.en: [English lyrics not available in the database for this revised hymn]
lines.ko: [이 개정된 찬송가의 데이터베이스에는 영어 가사가 없습니다.]

title_en: All Authority and Power

lines.en: [English lyrics not available in the database for this revised hymn]
lines.ko: [이 개정된 찬송가의 데이터베이스에는 영어 가사가 없습니다.]

title_en: Our God Is Mighty, Worthy of All Praising
title_ko: 우리 하느님은 전능하시고 모든 찬양을 받기에 합당하신 분입니다 (자체번역)

lines.en: [English lyrics not available in the database for this revised hymn]
lines.ko: [이 개정된 찬송가의 데이터베이스에는 영어 가사가 없습니다.]

title_en: And Can It Be That I Should Gain
title_ko: 그리고 내가 이득을 얻을 수 있을까? (자체번역)

lines.en: [English lyrics not available in the database for this revised hymn]
lines.ko: [이 개정된 찬송가의 데이터베이스에는 영어 가사가 없습니다.]

title_en: By Grace I’m Saved, Grace Free and Boundless
title_ko: 은혜로 나는 구원받았습니다. 은혜는 자유롭고 무한합니다 (자체번역)

lines.en: [English lyrics not available in the database for this revised hymn]
lines.ko: [이 개정된 찬송가의 데이터베이스에는 영어 가사가 없습니다.]

title_en: Come, Thou Fount of Every Blessing

lines.en: Come, thou Fount of ev'ry blessing,
lines.id: Datanglah, Engkau Sumber berkah,

lines.en: Tune my heart to sing thy grace;
lines.ko: 한량없이 자비하심 측량 할 길 없도다
lines.id: selaraskan hatiku untuk menyanyikan rahmat-Mu

lines.en: Streams of mercy, never ceasing,
lines.id: Aliran belas kasihan yang tidak pernah berhenti,

lines.en: Call for songs of loudest praise,
lines.ko: 구속하신 그 사랑을 항상 찬송 합니다
lines.id: Panggilan untuk lagu pujian yang paling keras.

lines.en: Teach me some melodious sonnet,
lines.id: Ajari aku jaring yang me-lo-dious,

lines.en: Sung by flaming tongues above;
lines.id: Dinyanyikan dengan lidah membara di atas

lines.en: Praise the mount! I'm fixed upon it,
lines.id: Pujilah gunung itu! Aku sudah memutuskannya,

lines.en: Mount of God's unchanging love.
lines.id: Gunung kasih Tuhan yang tak pernah berubah.

lines.en: Here I raise my Ebenezer;
lines.ko: 주의 크신 도움 받아 이 때 까지 왔으니
lines.id: Di sini saya menaikkan Eb-en-e-zer saya

lines.en: Hither by thy help I'm come;
lines.id: Di sini, dengan bantuan-Mu, aku datang

lines.en: And I hope, by thy good pleasure,
lines.ko: 하나님의 품을 떠나 죄에 빠진 우리를
lines.id: Dan aku berharap, demi keridhaan-Mu,

lines.en: Safely to arrive at home.
lines.id: Aman untuk tiba di rumah.

lines.en: Jesus sought me when a stranger,
lines.id: Yesus mencariku ketika orang asing,

lines.en: Wand'ring from the fold of God:
lines.id: Wan-d'ring dari lipatan Tuhan

lines.en: He, to rescue me from danger,
lines.id: Dia, untuk menyelamatkanku dari bahaya,

lines.en: Interposed his precious blood.
lines.id: Menginterposisikan darah-Nya yang berharga.

lines.en: O to grace how great a debtor
lines.ko: 주의 귀한 은혜 받고 일생 빚진 자 되네
lines.id: Oh anugerah betapa besarnya hutang-atau

lines.en: Daily I'm constrained to be;
lines.ko: 주의 은혜 사슬되사 나를 주께 매소서
lines.id: Setiap hari aku dibatasi untuk itu

lines.en: Let that grace now, like a fetter,
lines.ko: 우리 맘은 연약하여 범죄 하기 쉬우니
lines.id: Biarlah rahmat itu sekarang, seperti belenggu,

lines.en: Bind my wand'ring heart to thee.
lines.id: Ikatkan hatiku yang lemah padaMu.

lines.en: Prone to wander, Lord, I feel it,
lines.id: Rawan mengembara, Tuhan, aku merasakannya,

lines.en: Prone to leave the God I love;
lines.id: Cenderung meninggalkan Tuhan yang kucintai

lines.en: Here's my heart, O take and seal it,
lines.id: Ini hatiku, hai ambil dan segellah,

lines.en: Seal it for thy courts above.
lines.id: Segellah itu untuk pelataran-Mu di atas.

title_en: What Tho’ I Cannot Break My Chain
title_ko: 그래도 나는 내 사슬을 끊을 수 없다 (자체번역)

lines.en: [English lyrics not available in the database for this revised hymn]
lines.ko: [이 개정된 찬송가의 데이터베이스에는 영어 가사가 없습니다.]

title_en: I Am Not Skilled to Understand

lines.en: [English lyrics not available in the database for this revised hymn]
lines.ko: [이 개정된 찬송가의 데이터베이스에는 영어 가사가 없습니다.]

title_en: Amazing Grace

lines.en: Amazing gracehow sweet the sound
That saved a wretch like me!
lines.ko: 그게 나 같은 놈을 구한 거야!

lines.en: I once was lost, but now am found
lines.ko: 나는 한때 길을 잃었으나 지금은 찾았습니다.

lines.en: Was blind, but now I see.
lines.ko: 눈이 멀었지만 이제는 알 수 있습니다.

lines.en: 'Twas grace that taught my heart to fear,
lines.ko: 내 마음에 두려움을 가르쳐준 것은 은혜였고,

lines.en: And grace my fears relieved;
lines.ko: 그리고 나의 두려움이 완화되는 은혜를 베푸소서.

lines.en: How precious did that grace appear
The hour I first believed!
Thro' many dangers, toils and snares,
I have already come;
'Tis grace has brought me safe thus far,
lines.ko: '그 은혜가 나를 지금까지 안전하게 지켜 주셨고,

lines.en: And grace will lead me home.
lines.ko: 그리고 은혜가 나를 집으로 인도할 것입니다.

lines.en: And when this flesh and heart shall fail,
And mortal life shall cease,
I shall possess within the veil
A life of joy and peace.
When we've been there ten thousand years,
Bright shining as the sun,
We've no less days to sing God's praise
lines.ko: 우리에게 하나님을 찬양할 날이 얼마 남지 않았습니다

lines.en: Than when we've first begun.

title_en: Not What My Hands Have Done

lines.en: [English lyrics not available in the database for this revised hymn]
lines.ko: [이 개정된 찬송가의 데이터베이스에는 영어 가사가 없습니다.]

title_en: Grace! ‘Tis a Charming Sound

lines.en: Grace! 'tis a charming sound,
Harmonious to mine ear;
Heav'n with the echo shall resound,
And all the earth shall hear.
lines.ko: 그러면 온 땅이 듣게 될 것입니다.

lines.en: Grace first contrived a way
To save rebellious man,
And all the steps that grace display
Which drew the wondrous plan.
Grace taught my wand'ring feet
To tread the heav'nly road
And new supplies each hour I meet
While pressing on to God.
Grace all the work shall crown
Through everlasting days;
It lays in heav'n the topmost stone,
lines.ko: 그것은 가장 높은 돌 위에 놓여 있으며,

lines.en: And well deserves the praise.

title_en: A Debtor to Mercy Alone

lines.en: A debtor to mercy alone,
Of covenant mercy I sing;
Nor fear, with thy righteousness on,
My person and off'ring to bring.
The terrors of law and of God
With me can have nothing to do;
My Saviour's obedience and blood
Hide all my transgressions from view.
lines.ko: 내 모든 범법을 보이지 않게 숨기십시오.

lines.en: The work which his goodness began,
The arm of his strength will complete;
His promise is Yea and Amen,
And never was forfeited yet.
Things future, nor things that are now,
Nor all things below or above,
Can make him his purpose forgo,
lines.ko: 그 사람의 목적을 잊게 만들 수도 있고,

lines.en: Or sever my soul from his love.
lines.ko: 아니면 그의 사랑에서 내 영혼을 끊으십시오.

lines.en: My name from the palms of his hands
Eternity will not erase;
Impressed on his heart it remains,
In marks of indelible grace.
Yes, I to the end shall endure,
As sure as the earnest is given;
More happy, but not more secure,
The glorified spirits in heav'n.

title_en: I Was a Wandering Sheep

lines.en: I was a wand'ring sheep,
lines.id: Aku adalah seekor domba wan-d'ring,

lines.en: I did not love the fold;
lines.ko: 목자의 소리 싫어서 먼 길로 나갔네
lines.id: Saya tidak menyukai lipatannya

lines.en: I did not love my Shepherd's voice,
lines.ko: 방탕한 이 몸은 큰 불효 행하여
lines.id: Aku tidak menyukai suara Gembalaku,

lines.en: I would not be controlled.
lines.ko: 아버지 음성 싫어서 먼 길로 나갔네
lines.id: Saya tidak akan dikendalikan.

lines.en: I was a wayward child,
lines.id: Aku adalah anak yang bandel,

lines.en: I did not love my home;
lines.id: Saya tidak mencintai rumah saya

lines.en: I did not love my Father's voice,
lines.id: Aku tidak mencintai milikku

lines.en: I loved afar to roam.
lines.id: suara ayah,
Aku suka sekali menjelajah.

lines.en: The Shepherd sought his sheep,
lines.ko: 양 잃은 목자는 그 양을 찾으러
lines.id: Penggembala mencari domba-domba-Nya,

lines.en: The Father sought his child;
lines.ko: 산 넘고 강을 건너며 사막을 지났네
lines.id: Sang Ayah mencari anak-Nya

lines.en: They followed me o'er vale and hill,
lines.ko: 갈 길을 모르고 나 지쳐있을 때
lines.id: Mereka mengikutiku ke lembah dan bukit,

lines.en: O'er deserts waste and wild:
lines.ko: 그 목자 마침 나타나 날 구원 하셨네
lines.id: Ada gurun pasir dan liar

lines.en: They found me nigh to death,
lines.id: Mereka menemukanku hampir mati,

lines.en: Famished and faint and lone;
lines.id: Bertani, pingsan, dan sendirian

lines.en: They bound me with the bands of love,
lines.id: Mereka mengikatku dengan ikatan cinta,

lines.en: They saved the wand'ring one.
lines.id: Mereka menyelamatkan yang wan-d'ring.

lines.en: Jesus my Shepherd is;
lines.ko: 내 목자 예수는 날 사랑 하셔서
lines.id: Ya Tuhan, gembalaku adalah,

lines.en: 'Twas he that loved my soul,
lines.ko: 그 피로 나를 씻으사 온전케 하셨네
lines.id: 'Sungguh Dia yang mencintai jiwaku,

lines.en: 'Twas he that washed me in his blood,
lines.ko: 길 잃은 양 찾아 큰 위로 주시고
lines.id: 'Sungguh Dia yang memandikanku dengan darah-Nya,

lines.en: 'Twas he that made me whole;
lines.ko: 그 우리 안에 이끌어 늘 보호 하시네
lines.id: 'Sungguh Dia yang membuatku utuh

lines.en: 'Twas he that sought the lost,
lines.id: 'Sungguh Dia yang mencari yang hilang,

lines.en: That found the wand'ring sheep,
lines.id: Itu menemukan domba wan-d'ring,

lines.en: 'Twas he that brought me to the fold,
lines.id: 'Sungguh Dia yang membawaku ke kandang,

lines.en: 'Tis he that still doth keep.
lines.id: Ini Dia yang masih menyimpan.

lines.en: I was a wand'ring sheep,
lines.id: Tidak ada lagi domba yang lemah,

lines.en: I would not be controlled;
lines.ko: 나 목자 음성 들으며 그 길을 따르리
lines.id: Saya suka dikendalikan

lines.en: But now I love my Shepherd's voice,
lines.id: Saya suka suara gembala saya yang lembut,

lines.en: I love, I love the fold.
lines.ko: 내 아버지의 입에서 영원히 살겠네 아멘
lines.id: Saya suka melipat pra-ful,

lines.en: I was a wayward child,
lines.id: Bukan lagi anak yang bandel,

lines.en: I once preferred to roam;
lines.id: Saya tidak ingin berkeliaran lagi

lines.en: But now I love my Father's voice,
lines.id: Aku menyukai suara Bapa surgawiku,

lines.en: I love, I love his home.
lines.id: Saya cinta, saya cinta rumah-Nya. Amin.

title_en: Marvelous Grace of Our Loving Lord

lines.en: Marvelous grace of our loving Lord,
lines.ko: 놀랍다 주님의 큰 은혜 우리의 죄를 속하시려
lines.id: Rahmat yang luar biasa dari Tuhan yang pengasih,

lines.en: Grace that exceeds our sin and our guilt,
lines.ko: 갈보리 십자가 위에서 어린 양 보혈을 흘렸네
lines.id: Anugerah yang melampaui dosa dan kesalahan kita,

lines.en: Yonder on Calvary's mount outpoured,
lines.ko: 주의 은혜 우리의 죄를 다 씻었네
lines.id: Di sana di gunung Cal-va-ry dicurahkan,

lines.en: There where the blood of the Lamb was spilt.
lines.ko: 주의 은혜 우리의 죄를 다 씻었네
lines.id: Di sanalah darah Anak Domba dibelah.
Anugerah, rahmat, rahmat Tuhan,
Anugerah yang mengampuni dan menyucikan batin
Anugerah, rahmat, rahmat Tuhan,
Anugerah yang lebih besar dari segala dosa kita.

lines.en: Grace, grace, God's grace,
lines.ko: 죄악은 성난 파도 같이 우리 영혼을 위협하나
lines.id: Dosa dan kehancuran bagaikan ombak laut yang dingin,

lines.en: Grace that will pardon and cleanse within;
lines.ko: 헤아릴 수 없는 주 은혜 십자가에서 보이셨네
lines.id: Mengancam jiwa dengan kerugian yang tak terhingga

lines.en: Grace, grace, God's grace,
lines.ko: 주의 은혜 우리의 죄를 다 씻었네
lines.id: Kasih karunia yang lebih besar, ya, kasih karunia yang tak terhitung,

lines.en: Grace that is greater than all my sin.
lines.ko: 주의 은혜 우리의 죄를 다 씻었네
lines.id: Menunjuk pada perlindungan, Salib yang perkasa.
Anugerah, rahmat, rahmat Tuhan,
Anugerah yang mengampuni dan menyucikan batin
Anugerah, rahmat, rahmat Tuhan,
Anugerah yang lebih besar dari segala dosa kita.

lines.en: Sin and despair like the sea waves cold,
lines.ko: 죄악에 물든 영혼들을 주께서 피로 씻으시네
lines.id: Gelap adalah noda yang tidak bisa kita sembunyikan,

lines.en: Threaten the soul with infinite loss;
lines.ko: 지금도 흐르는 그 피에 눈보다 더 희게 씻으라
lines.id: Apa yang bisa digunakan untuk mencucinya

lines.en: Grace that is greater, yes, grace untold,
lines.ko: 주의 은혜 우리의 죄를 다 씻었네
lines.id: Lihat! sedang mengalir gelombang merah

lines.en: Points to the refuge, the mighty cross.
lines.ko: 주의 은혜 우리의 죄를 다 씻었네
lines.id: Anda mungkin hari ini lebih putih dari salju.
Anugerah, rahmat, rahmat Tuhan,
Anugerah yang mengampuni dan menyucikan batin
Anugerah, rahmat, rahmat Tuhan,
Anugerah yang lebih besar dari segala dosa kita.

lines.en: Dark is the stain that we cannot hide,
lines.ko: 비할 수 없는 그 은혜를 믿는 자에게 거저 주네
lines.id: Anugerah yang luar biasa, tak terhingga, tak tertandingi,

lines.en: What can avail to wash it away?
lines.ko: 형제여 주 앞에 나와서 더 지체 말고 곧 받으라
lines.id: Diberikan secara cuma-cuma kepada semua orang yang beriman

lines.en: Look! there is flowing a crimson tide;
lines.ko: 주의 은혜 우리의 죄를 다 씻었네
lines.id: Kamu yang rindu melihat wajah-Nya,

lines.en: Whiter than snow you may be today.
lines.ko: 주의 은혜 우리의 죄를 다 씻었네
lines.id: Maukah kamu menerima kembali rahmat-Nya pada saat ini
Anugerah, rahmat, rahmat Tuhan,
Anugerah yang mengampuni dan menyucikan batin
Anugerah, rahmat, rahmat Tuhan,
Anugerah yang lebih besar dari segala dosa kita.

alt_titles: Marvelous grace of our loving Lord
title_id: Anugerah Luar Biasa Dari Tuhan Kita Yang Penuh Kasih

title_en: I Sought the Lord, and Afterward I Knew

lines.en: I sought the Lord, and afterward I knew
lines.ko: 내가 여호와께 구하고 그 후에 알았노라

lines.en: He moved my soul to seek him, seeking me;
lines.ko: 그분은 내 영혼을 감동시켜 그분을 찾게 하셨습니다.

lines.en: It was not I that found, O Saviour true,
lines.ko: 오 구세주가 참되심을 발견한 것은 내가 아니니라

lines.en: No, I was found of thee.
Thou didst reach forth thy hand and mine enfold;
lines.ko: 당신은 당신의 손을 내밀었고 내 손은 감싸졌습니다.

lines.en: I walked and sank not on the storm-vexed sea,—
lines.ko: 나는 폭풍우가 몰아치는 바다 위를 걸었고 가라앉지 않았습니다.

lines.en: 'Twas not so much that I on thee took hold,
As thou, dear Lord, on me.
I find, I walk, I love, but, O the whole
lines.ko: 나는 찾고, 걷고, 사랑하지만, 오 전체

lines.en: Of love is but my answer, Lord, to thee;
lines.ko: 주님, 당신께 드리는 나의 대답은 사랑뿐입니다.

lines.en: For thou wert long beforehand with my soul,
lines.ko: 당신은 오래 전부터 내 영혼과 함께 계셨고

lines.en: Always thou lovedst me.

alt_titles: I sought the Lord, and afterward I knew (tune 2)

title_en: Wonderful Grace of Jesus

lines.en: Wonderful grace of Jesus,
Greater than all my sin;
How shall my tongue describe it,
Where shall its praise begin?
Taking away my burden,
Setting my spirit free;
For the wonderful grace of Jesus reaches me.
lines.ko: 예수님의 놀라운 은혜가 나에게 임했기 때문입니다.

lines.en: Wonderful the matchless grace of Jesus,
lines.ko: 예수님의 비할 데 없는 은혜가 놀랍습니다.

lines.en: Deeper than the mighty rolling sea;
Higher than the mountain, sparkling like a fountain,
All sufficient grace for even me,
Broader than the scope of my transgressions,
Greater far than all my sin and shame,
lines.ko: 나의 모든 죄와 부끄러움보다 훨씬 더 크시니,

lines.en: O magnify the precious name of Jesus,
Praise his name!
Wonderful grace of Jesus,
Reaching a mighty host,
By it I have been pardoned,
Saved to the uttermost,
Chains have been torn asunder,
Giving me liberty;
For the wonderful grace of Jesus reaches me.
lines.ko: 예수님의 놀라운 은혜가 나에게 임했기 때문입니다.

lines.en: Wonderful grace of Jesus,
Reaching the most defiled,
By its transforming power,
Making him God's dear child,
Purchasing peace and heaven,
For all eternity;
And the wonderful grace of Jesus reaches me.
lines.ko: 그리고 예수님의 놀라운 은혜가 나에게 임했습니다.

alt_titles: Wonderful the matchless grace of Jesus

title_en: My Faith Has Found a Resting Place

lines.en: [English lyrics not available in the database for this revised hymn]
lines.ko: [이 개정된 찬송가의 데이터베이스에는 영어 가사가 없습니다.]

title_en: How Sweet and Awesome Is the Place

lines.en: [English lyrics not available in the database for this revised hymn]
lines.ko: [이 개정된 찬송가의 데이터베이스에는 영어 가사가 없습니다.]

title_en: How Vast the Benefits Divine

lines.en: How vast the benefits divine
Which we in Christ possess!
We are redeemed from guilt and shame
And called to holiness.
But not for works which we have done,
lines.ko: 그러나 우리가 행한 행위로 말미암지 아니하고

lines.en: Or shall hereafter do,
Hath God decreed on sinful men
lines.ko: 하나님께서 죄 많은 사람들에게 명령을 내리셨는가?

lines.en: Salvation to bestow.
The glory, Lord, from first to last,
Is due to thee alone;
Aught to ourselves we dare not take,
lines.ko: 우리가 감히 가져갈 수 없는 것은

lines.en: Or rob thee of thy crown.
Our glorious Surety undertook
To satisfy for man,
And grace was given us in him
lines.ko: 그리고 그 안에서 우리에게 은혜가 주어졌느니라

lines.en: Before the world began.
This is thy will, that in thy love
lines.ko: 이것이 당신의 뜻이니 곧 당신의 사랑 안에서

lines.en: We ever should abide;
That earth and hell should not prevail
lines.ko: 땅과 지옥이 이기지 말아야 한다는 것

lines.en: To turn thy Word aside.
Not one of all the chosen race
lines.ko: 선택된 모든 종족 중 하나가 아님

lines.en: But shall to heav'n attain,
Partake on earth the purposed grace
And then with Jesus reign.

title_en: Tis Not That I Did Choose Thee

lines.en: 'Tis not that I did choose thee,
For, Lord, that could not be;
lines.ko: 주님, 그런 일은 있을 수 없습니다.

lines.en: This heart would still refuse thee,
lines.ko: 이 마음은 여전히 당신을 거부할 것입니다.

lines.en: Hadst thou not chosen me.
Thou from the sin that stained me
Hast cleansed and set me free;
Of old thou hast ordained me,
That I should live to thee.
lines.ko: 내가 당신을 위해 살아야 한다는 것입니다.

lines.en: 'Twas sovereign mercy called me
And taught my op'ning mind;
The world had else enthralled me,
To heavenly glories blind.
My heart owns none before thee,
lines.ko: 내 마음은 당신 앞에 아무것도 소유하지 않습니다.

lines.en: For thy rich grace I thirst;
This knowing, if I love thee,
Thou must have loved me first.

title_en: Come, Ye Sinners, Poor and Wretched

lines.en: Come, ye sinners, poor and wretched,
Weak and wounded, sick and sore;
Jesus ready stands to save you,
lines.ko: 예수님은 당신을 구원하기 위해 준비되어 계십니다.

lines.en: Full of pity joined with pow'r:
He is able,
He is able,
He is able,
He is willing; doubt no more.
lines.ko: 그분은 기꺼이 하십니다. 더 이상 의심하지 마십시오.

lines.en: Come, ye needy, come and welcome,
God's free bounty glorify;
True belief and true repentance,
Ev'ry grace that brings you nigh,
Without money,
Without money,
Without money,
Come to Jesus Christ and buy.
Come, ye weary, heavy laden,
Bruised and broken by the fall;
If you tarry till you're better,
You will never come at all:
Not the righteous,
Not the righteous,
Not the righteous,
Sinners Jesus came to call.
Let not conscience make you linger,
Nor of fitness fondly dream;
All the fitness he requireth
Is to feel your need of him;
lines.ko: 당신에게 그 사람이 필요하다고 느끼는 것입니다.

lines.en: This he gives you,
This he gives you,
This he gives you;
'Tis the Spirit's rising beam.
Lo! th'incarnate God, ascended,
Pleads the merit of his blood;
Venture on him, venture wholly,
Let no other trust intrude:
None but Jesus,
None but Jesus,
None but Jesus
Can do helpless sinners good.
lines.ko: 무력한 죄인에게 선한 일을 할 수 있습니다.

title_en: Jesus Sinners Doth Receive

lines.en: "Jesus sinners doth receive:"
Word of surest consolation;
Word all sorrow to relieve,
Word of pardon, peace, salvation!
Naught like this can comfort give:
lines.ko: 이와 같은 것은 위로를 줄 수 없습니다:

lines.en: "Jesus sinners doth receive."
On God's grace we have no claim,
lines.ko: 하나님의 은혜에 대해서는 우리가 주장할 것이 없습니다.

lines.en: Yet to us his pledge is given;
He hath sworn by his own Name,
Open are the gates of heaven.
Take to heart this word and live:
"Jesus sinners doth receive."
When a helpless lamb doth stray,
After it, the Shepherd, pressing
Thro' each dark and dang'rous way,
Brings it back, his own possessing.
Jesus seeks thee, O believe:
"Jesus sinners doth receive."
O, how blest it is to know:
lines.ko: 오, 이것을 아는 것이 얼마나 큰 축복입니까?

lines.en: Were as scarlet my transgression,
It shall be as white as snow
By thy blood and bitter passion;
For these words I now believe:
lines.ko: 나는 이제 다음과 같은 말을 믿습니다.

lines.en: "Jesus sinners doth receive."
Now my conscience is at peace,
From the Law I stand acquitted;
Christ hath purchased my release
And my ev'ry sin remitted.
Naught remains my soul to grieve
lines.ko: 내 영혼에는 슬퍼할 것이 아무것도 남아 있지 않습니다.

lines.en: "Jesus sinners doth receive."

title_en: Blow Ye the Trumpet, Blow!

lines.en: Blow ye the trumpet, blow!
The gladly solemn sound
Let all the nations know,
To earth's remotest bound;
The year of jubilee is come;
Return, ye ransomed sinners, home;
Return, ye ransomed sinners, home.
Jesus, our great High Priest,
Hath full atonement made;
Ye weary spirits, rest;
Ye mournful souls, be glad:
Extol the Lamb of God;
The sacrificial Lamb;
Redemption through his blood
Throughout the world proclaim:
Ye slaves of sin and hell,
Your liberty receive;
And safe in Jesus dwell,
And blest in Jesus live:
Ye who have sold for nought
Your heritage above,
Receive it back unbought,
The gift of Jesus' love:
The gospel trumpet hear,
The news of heav'nly grace;
And, saved from earth, appear
Before your Saviour's face:

title_en: Come to the Savior Now

lines.en: Come to the Saviour now,
He gently calleth thee;
In true repentance bow,
Before him bend the knee;
He waiteth to bestow
Salvation, peace and love,
True joy on earth below,
A home in heav'n above.
Come to the Saviour now,
Ye who have wandered far;
Renew your solemn vow,
For his by right you are;
Come, like poor wand'ring sheep
lines.ko: 가여워라, 지팡이를 짚고 있는 불쌍한 양들처럼

lines.en: Returning to his fold;
His arm will safely keep,
His love will ne'er grow cold.
lines.ko: 그의 사랑은 결코 식지 않을 것입니다.

lines.en: Come to the Saviour, all,
Whate'er your burdens be;
Hear now his loving call,
"Cast all your care on me."
Come, and for ev'ry grief
In Jesus you will find
A sure and safe relief,
A loving Friend and kind.

title_en: The Light of the World Is Jesus

lines.en: The whole world was lost in the darkness of sin;
lines.ko: 온 세상은 죄의 어둠 속에서 멸망당했습니다.

lines.en: The Light of the world is Jesus;
Like sunshine at noonday his glory shone in,
The Light of the world is Jesus.
Come to the Light, 'tis shining for thee;
lines.ko: 빛으로 오세요. 당신을 위해 빛나고 있습니다.

lines.en: Sweetly the Light has dawned upon me;
Once I was blind, but now I can see;
lines.ko: 한때 나는 눈이 멀었지만 이제는 볼 수 있게 되었습니다.

lines.en: The Light of the world is Jesus.
No darkness have we who in Jesus abide,
lines.ko: 예수 안에 거하는 우리에게는 어둠이 없나니

lines.en: The Light of the world is Jesus;
We walk in the Light when we follow our Guide,
lines.ko: 우리가 인도자를 따를 때 우리는 빛 가운데 걷습니다.

lines.en: The Light of the world is Jesus.
Ye dwellers in darkness with sin-blinded eyes,
lines.ko: 죄로 눈이 먼 너희 어둠 속에 거하는 자들아,

lines.en: The Light of the world is Jesus;
Go, wash at his bidding, and light will arise,
lines.ko: 가서 그분의 명령에 따라 몸을 씻으십시오. 그러면 빛이 일어날 것입니다.

lines.en: The Light of the world is Jesus.
No need of the sunlight in heaven, we're told,
The Light of the world is Jesus;
The Lamb is the Light in the City of Gold,
The Light of the world is Jesus.

alt_titles: The whole world was lost in the darkness of sin
The Light of the world is Jesus

title_en: Are You Weary, Are You Languid

lines.en: [English lyrics not available in the database for this revised hymn]
lines.ko: [이 개정된 찬송가의 데이터베이스에는 영어 가사가 없습니다.]

title_en: I Love to Tell the Story

lines.en: I love to tell the story of unseen things above,
lines.ko: 주 예수 넓은 사랑 그 크신 은혜를
lines.id: Saya suka menceritakan kisahnya

lines.en: Of Jesus and his glory, of Jesus and his love.
lines.ko: 나 힘써 전파함은 참 기쁜 일일세
lines.id: Dari hal-hal yang tidak terlihat di atas,

lines.en: I love to tell the story, because I know 'tis true;
lines.ko: 주 예수 복된 말씀 생명과 진리요
lines.id: Tentang Yesus dan kemuliaan-Nya,

lines.en: It satisfies my longings as nothing else could do.
lines.ko: 내 맘의 갈급함을 다 채워 주시네
lines.id: Tentang Yesus dan kasih-Nya:

lines.ko: 예부터 전한 말씀 주 예수 크신 사랑
lines.id: Saya suka menceritakan kisahnya

lines.ko: 나 항상 전파하기 참 기뻐 하도다
lines.id: Karena aku tahu ini mendatang.
Itu memuaskan kerinduanku
Karena tidak ada hal lain yang bisa dilakukan.
Saya suka menceritakan kisahnya!
Ini akan menjadi temaku dalam kejayaan
Untuk menceritakan kisah lama, lama, dan lama
Tentang Yesus dan kasih-Nya.

lines.en: I love to tell the story, 'twill be my theme in glory
lines.ko: 이 말씀 전할 때에 내 맘이 기쁘고
lines.id: Saya suka menceritakan kisahnya

lines.en: To tell the old, old story of Jesus and his love.
lines.ko: 그 말씀 전할 수록 새 기쁨 넘치네
lines.id: Ini menyenangkan untuk diulangi kembali

lines.ko: 구원의 복된 말씀 못 들은 사람이
lines.id: Tampaknya, setiap kali aku menceritakannya
Lebih manis lagi:

lines.ko: 예부터 전한 말씀 주 예수 크신 사랑
lines.id: Saya suka bercerita,

lines.ko: 나 항상 전파하기 참 기뻐 하도다
lines.id: Bagi sebagian orang belum pernah mendengarnya
Pesan keselamatan
Dari Firman Suci Tuhan sendiri.
Saya suka menceritakan kisahnya!
Ini akan menjadi temaku dalam kejayaan
Untuk menceritakan kisah lama, lama, dan lama
Tentang Yesus dan kasih-Nya.

lines.en: I love to tell the story; more wonderful it seems
lines.ko: 이 말씀 들은 사람 또 듣기 원하고
lines.id: Saya suka menceritakan kisahnya

lines.en: Than all the golden fancies of all our golden dreams.
lines.ko: 목 말라 사모하니 그 말씀 진리라
lines.id: Bagi mereka yang paling mengetahuinya

lines.en: I love to tell the story, it did so much for me;
lines.ko: 그 나라 영광 중에 나 부를 새 노래
lines.id: Tampak lapar dan haus

lines.en: And that is just the reason I tell it now to thee.
lines.id: Untuk mendengarnya, seperti istirahat:

lines.ko: 예부터 전한 말씀 주 예수 크신 사랑
lines.id: Dan ketika dalam adegan kemuliaan

lines.ko: 나 항상 전파하기 참 기뻐 하도다
lines.id: Saya menyanyikan lagu baru dan baru,
'Ini akan menjadi kisah yang lama, yang lama
Yang sudah lama aku cintai.
Saya suka menceritakan kisahnya!
Ini akan menjadi temaku dalam kejayaan
Untuk menceritakan kisah lama, lama, dan lama
Tentang Yesus dan kasih-Nya.

lines.en: I love to tell the story; 'tis pleasant to repeat
What seems, each time I tell it, more wonderfully sweet.
I love to tell the story, for some have never heard
The message of salvation from God's own holy Word.
I love to tell the story; for those who know it best
Seem hungering and thirsting to hear it, like the rest,
And when, in scenes of glory, I sing the new, new song,
'Twill be the old, old story, that I have loved so long.

title_en: Softly and Tenderly Jesus Is Calling

lines.en: Softly and tenderly Jesus is calling,
lines.ko: 예수가 우리를 부르는 소리 그 음성 부드러워
lines.id: Dengan lembut dan lembut Yesus memanggil

lines.en: Calling for you and for me;
lines.ko: 문 앞에 나와서 사면을 보며 우리를 기다리네
lines.id: Memanggilmu dan untukku

lines.en: See, on the portals he's waiting and watching,
lines.ko: 후렴 : 오라 오라 방황치 말고 오라
lines.id: Lihat, di portal Dia menunggu dan mengawasi,

lines.en: Watching for you and for me.
lines.ko: 죄 있는 자들아 이리로 오라 주 예수 앞에 오라
lines.id: Memperhatikanmu dan untukku.
Pulanglah, pulanglah,
Kamu yang lelah, pulanglah (Pulanglah)
Dengan sungguh-sungguh, dengan lembut, Yesus memanggil,
Memanggil, hai orang berdosa, pulanglah!

lines.en: Come home, come home,
lines.ko: 간절히 오라고 부르실 때에 우리는 지체하랴
lines.id: Mengapa kita harus menunda-nunda ketika Yesus sedang memohon,

lines.en: Ye who are weary, come home;
lines.ko: 주님의 은혜를 왜 아니 받고 못 들은 체 하려나
lines.id: Memohon untukmu dan untukku

lines.en: Earnestly, tenderly Jesus is calling,
lines.id: Mengapa kita harus berlama-lama dan tidak mengindahkan rahmat-Nya,

lines.en: Calling, O sinner, come home.
lines.id: Kasihanilah untukmu dan untukku
Pulanglah, pulanglah,
Kamu yang lelah, pulanglah (Pulanglah)
Dengan sungguh-sungguh, dengan lembut, Yesus memanggil,
Memanggil, hai orang berdosa, pulanglah!

lines.en: Why should we tarry when Jesus is pleading,
lines.ko: 세월이 살같이 빠르게 지나 쾌락이 끝이 나고
lines.id: Waktu kini berlalu dengan cepat, momen pun berlalu

lines.en: Pleading for you and for me?
lines.ko: 사망의 그늘이 너와 내 앞에 둘리며 가리우네
lines.id: Melewati darimu dan dariku

lines.en: Why should we linger and heed not his mercies,
lines.id: Tempat-tempat teduh sedang berkumpul, ranjang kematian akan datang,

lines.en: Mercies for you and for me?
lines.id: Datang untukmu dan untukku.
Pulanglah, pulanglah,
Kamu yang lelah, pulanglah (Pulanglah)
Dengan sungguh-sungguh, dengan lembut, Yesus memanggil,
Memanggil, hai orang berdosa, pulanglah!

lines.en: Time is now fleeting, the moments are passing,
lines.ko: 우리를 위하여 예비해 두신 영원한 집이 있어
lines.id: Oh atas cinta luar biasa yang Dia janjikan,

lines.en: Passing from you and from me;
lines.ko: 죄 많은 세상을 떠나게 될 때 영접해 주시겠네
lines.id: Dijanjikan untukmu dan untukku!

lines.en: Shadows are gathering, deathbeds are coming,
lines.id: Meskipun kita telah berdosa, Dia mempunyai belas kasihan dan pengampunan,

lines.en: Coming for you and for me.
lines.id: Maaf untuk Anda dan untuk saya.
Pulanglah, pulanglah,
Kamu yang lelah, pulanglah (Pulanglah)
Dengan sungguh-sungguh, dengan lembut, Yesus memanggil,
Memanggil, hai orang berdosa, pulanglah!

lines.en: Oh! for the wonderful love he has promised
Promised for you and for me;
Though we have sinned, he has mercy and pardon,
Pardon for you and for me.

alt_titles: Softly and tenderly, Jesus is calling
title_id: Dengan Lembut dan Lembut Yesus Memanggil

title_en: Come, for the Feast Is Spread

lines.en: Come, for the feast is spread,
Hark to the call:
Come to the Living Bread
Offered to all.
Come to his house of wine,
Low on his breast recline,
All that he has is thine;
lines.ko: 그가 가진 모든 것은 당신의 것입니다.

lines.en: Come, sinner, come.
Come where the fountain flows,
River of life;
Healing for all thy woes,
Doubting, and strife.
Millions have been supplied,
No one was e'er denied,
Come to the crimson tide;
Come, sinner, come.
Come to the throne of grace,
Boldly draw near;
He who would win the race
Must tarry here.
Whate'er thy want may be,
Here is the grace for thee,
Jesus thine only plea;
Come, Christian, come.

title_en: Turn Your Eyes upon Jesus

lines.en: O soul, are you weary and troubled?
lines.ko: 오 영혼이여, 당신은 지치고 괴로워하고 있습니까?

lines.en: No light in the darkness you see?
There's light for a look at the Saviour,
lines.ko: 구세주를 바라볼 수 있는 빛이 있습니다.

lines.en: And life more abundant and free!
Turn your eyes upon Jesus,
Look full in His wonderful face;
And the things of earth will grow strangely dim
lines.ko: 그리고 땅의 것들은 이상하게 어두워질 것입니다

lines.en: In the light of His glory and grace.
Thro' death into life everlasting
He passed, and we follow Him there;
lines.ko: 그분은 지나가셨고 우리는 그곳에서 그분을 따릅니다.

lines.en: Over us sin no more hath dominion-
lines.ko: 더 이상 죄가 우리를 주관하지 못합니다.

lines.en: For more than conqu'rors we are!
Turn your eyes upon Jesus,
Look full in His wonderful face;
And the things of earth will grow strangely dim
lines.ko: 그리고 땅의 것들은 이상하게 어두워질 것입니다

lines.en: In the light of His glory and grace.
His word shall not fail you- He promised;
lines.ko: 그분의 말씀은 당신을 실망시키지 않을 것입니다. 그분은 약속하셨습니다.

lines.en: Believe Him, and all will be well:
lines.ko: 그분을 믿으면 모든 것이 잘 될 것입니다.

lines.en: Then go to a world that is dying,
His perfect salvation to tell!
Turn your eyes upon Jesus,
Look full in His wonderful face;
And the things of earth will grow strangely dim
lines.ko: 그리고 땅의 것들은 이상하게 어두워질 것입니다

lines.en: In the light of His glory and grace.

title_en: Come unto Me, Ye Weary

lines.en: "Come unto me, ye weary,
And I will give you rest."
O blessed voice of Jesus
Which comes to hearts oppressed!
It tells of benediction,
Of pardon, grace, and peace,
Of joy that hath no ending,
Of love which cannot cease.
"Come unto me, dear children,
And I will give you light."
lines.ko: 그리고 나는 당신에게 빛을 줄 것입니다."

lines.en: O loving voice of Jesus
Which comes to cheer the night!
Our hearts were filled with sadness,
lines.ko: 우리 마음은 슬픔으로 가득 차 있었고,

lines.en: And we had lost our way;
But morning brings us gladness,
lines.ko: 그러나 아침은 우리에게 기쁨을 가져다 주지만,

lines.en: And songs the break of day.
"Come unto me, ye fainting,
And I will give you life."
O peaceful voice of Jesus
Which comes to end our strife!
The foe is stern and eager,
The fight is fierce and long;
But thou hast made us mighty,
And stronger than the strong.
"And whosoever cometh
I will not cast him out."
O patient love of Jesus
Which drives away our doubt;
Which calls us, very sinners,
Unworthy though we be
Of love so free and boundless,
To come, dear Lord, to thee!

title_en: We Sing the Glorious Conquest

lines.en: We sing the glorious conquest
Before Damascus gate,
When Saul, the church's spoiler,
Came breathing threats and hate;
The rav'ning wolf rushed forward
Full early to the prey;
But lo! the Shepherd met him,
And bound him fast today.
O glory most excelling
That smote across his path!
O light that pierced and blinded
The zealot in his wrath!
O voice that spake unto him
The calm, reproving word!
O love that sought and held him
The bondman of his Lord!
O Wisdom ord'ring all things
In order strong and sweet,
What nobler spoil was ever
lines.ko: 이보다 더 고귀한 전리품이 어디 있었겠습니까?

lines.en: Cast at the victor's feet?
What wiser master builder
E'er wrought at thine employ
Than he, til now so furious
Thy building to destroy?
Lord, teach thy church the lesson,
lines.ko: 주님, 당신의 교회에 교훈을 가르쳐 주십시오.

lines.en: Still in her darkest hour
Of weakness and of danger,
To trust thy hidden pow'r:
Thy grace by ways mysterious
The wrath of man can bind,
And in thy boldest foeman
Thy chosen saint can find.
lines.ko: 당신이 선택한 성자는 찾을 수 있습니다.

title_en: I Hear Thy Welcome Voice

lines.en: I hear thy welcome voice
lines.id: Aku mendengar suara sambutan-Mu

lines.en: That calls me, Lord to thee
lines.ko: 내 죄를 정케 하신 주 날 오라 하신다
lines.id: Itu memanggilku, Tuhan, kepada-Mu

lines.en: For cleansing in thy precious blood
lines.id: Untuk pembersihan dalam darah-Mu yang berharga

lines.en: That flowed on Calvary.
lines.id: Itu mengalir di Cal-va-ry.
Saya datang, Tuhan
Datang sekarang kepada-Mu
Cuci aku, bersihkan aku, di dalam darah
Itu mengalir di Cal-va-ry.

lines.en: I am coming, Lord;
lines.id: Meski aku lemah dan keji,

lines.en: Coming now to thee:
lines.ko: 힘 주시고 내 추함을 곧 씻어 주시네
lines.id: Engkau mengerahkan kekuatanku dengan pasti

lines.en: Wash me, cleanse me, in the blood
lines.id: Engkau membersihkan keburukanku sepenuhnya,

lines.en: That flowed on Calvary.
lines.id: Hingga bersih semua dan murni.
Saya datang, Tuhan
Datang sekarang kepada-Mu
Cuci aku, bersihkan aku, di dalam darah
Itu mengalir di Cal-va-ry.

lines.en: Though coming weak and vile,
lines.id: Ini Yesus memanggilku

lines.en: Thou dost my strength assure;
lines.ko: 또 사랑함과 평안함 다 주려 함이라
lines.id: Untuk menyempurnakan iman dan cinta,

lines.en: Thou dost my vileness fully cleanse,
lines.id: Untuk menyempurnakan harapan, kedamaian, dan kepercayaan,

lines.en: Til spotless all and pure.
lines.id: Untuk bumi dan surga di atasnya.
Saya datang, Tuhan
Datang sekarang kepada-Mu
Cuci aku, bersihkan aku, di dalam darah
Itu mengalir di Cal-va-ry.

lines.en: 'Tis Jesus calls me on
lines.ko: 큰 죄인 복 받아 살 길을 얻었네
lines.id: Yesuslah yang menegaskan

lines.en: To perfect faith and love,
lines.ko: 한 없이 넓고 큰 은혜 베풀어 주소서
lines.id: Pekerjaan yang diberkati di dalam,

lines.en: To perfect hope, and peace, and trust,
lines.id: Dengan menambahkan rahmat pada rahmat yang diterima,

lines.en: For earth and heav'n above.
lines.id: Dimana kuasa dosa berkuasa.
Saya datang, Tuhan
Datang sekarang kepada-Mu:
Cuci aku, bersihkan aku, di dalam darah
Itu mengalir di Cal-va-ry.

lines.en: 'Tis Jesus who confirms
lines.ko: 그 피가 맘속에 큰 증거 됩니다
lines.id: Darahnya diberikan oleh saksi

lines.en: The blessed work within,
lines.ko: 내 기도 소리 들으사 다 허락 하소서
lines.id: Di dalam hatiku untukku

lines.en: By adding grace to welcomed grace,
lines.id: Ya, Juruselamat, perhatikanlah doaku setiap kali,

lines.en: Where reigned the pow'r of sin.
lines.id: Kepuasan penuhku jadilah!
Saya datang, Tuhan
Datang sekarang kepada-Mu
Cuci aku, bersihkan aku, di dalam darah
Itu mengalir di Cal-va-ry. Amin.

lines.en: And he the witness gives
To loyal hearts and free,
That ev'ry promise is fulfilled,
If faith but brings the plea.

alt_titles: I hear thy welcome voice

title_en: O Thou That Hear’st When Sinners Cry
title_ko: 오 죄인들이 울부짖을 때 들으시는 주여 (자체번역)

lines.en: From Psalm 51
O thou that hear'st when sinners cry,
lines.ko: 오 죄인들이 부르짖을 때 들으시는 주여,

lines.en: Though all my crimes before thee lie,
lines.ko: 당신 앞에서 나의 모든 범죄가 거짓말일지라도

lines.en: Behold them not with angry look,
But blot their mem'ry from thy book.
lines.ko: 그러나 당신의 책에서 그들의 기억을 지워 주십시오.

lines.en: Create my nature pure within,
And form my soul averse to sin;
Let thy good Spirit ne'er depart,
lines.ko: 당신의 선한 영이 결코 떠나지 않게 하시고,

lines.en: Not hide thy presence from my heart.
lines.ko: 내 마음에서 당신의 임재를 숨기지 마십시오.

lines.en: I cannot live without thy light,
lines.ko: 나는 당신의 빛 없이는 살 수 없습니다.

lines.en: Cast out and banished from thy sight;
Thy holy joys, my God, restore,
lines.ko: 나의 하느님, 당신의 거룩한 기쁨을 회복시켜 주소서.

lines.en: And guard me, that I fall no more.
lines.ko: 그리고 내가 더 이상 넘어지지 않도록 나를 지켜 주십시오.

lines.en: A broken heart, my God, my King,
lines.ko: 상한 마음이여, 나의 하나님, 나의 왕이시여,

lines.en: Is all the sacrifice I bring;
The God of grace will ne'er despise
lines.ko: 은혜의 하나님은 결코 멸시하지 않으실 것이다

lines.en: A broken heart for sacrifice.
My soul lies humbled in the dust,
lines.ko: 내 영혼은 흙 속에 겸손히 누워 있으며,

lines.en: And owns thy dreadful sentence just:
lines.ko: 그리고 당신의 무서운 문장은 다음과 같습니다.

lines.en: Look down, O Lord, with pitying eye,
And save the soul condemned to die.
Then will I teach the world thy ways;
lines.ko: 그러면 내가 세상에 당신의 길을 가르칠 것입니다.

lines.en: Sinners shall learn thy sov'reign grace;
lines.ko: 죄인들은 당신의 주권적인 은혜를 배우게 될 것입니다.

lines.en: I'll lead them to my Saviour's blood,
lines.ko: 나는 그들을 내 구주의 보혈로 인도할 것입니다.

lines.en: And they shall praise a pard'ning God.
lines.ko: 그리고 그들은 용서하시는 하나님을 찬양할 것입니다.

title_en: God, Be Merciful to Me

lines.en: From Psalm 51:1-15
lines.id: Tuhan kasihanilah aku,
Atas karunia-Mu, aku memohon permohonanku

lines.ko: 마음 심히 어두니 밝게 하여 주소서
lines.id: Engkau berlimpah kasih sayang,

lines.ko: 나를 보호 하시고 항상 인도 하소서
lines.id: Hapuskan pelanggaranku sekarang
Basuhlah aku, jadikan aku suci di dalam,
Bersihkan, hai, bersihkan aku dari dosaku,
Basuhlah aku, jadikan aku suci di dalam,
Bersihkan, hai, bersihkan aku dari dosaku.

lines.en: God, be merciful to me,
lines.ko: 죄를 지은 까닭에 나의 맘이 곤하니
lines.id: Saya jahat, lahir dalam dosa

lines.en: On thy grace I rest my plea;
lines.id: Engkau menginginkan kebenaran di dalam.

lines.en: Plenteous in compassion thou,
lines.id: Engkaulah satu-satunya penyelamatku,

lines.en: Blot out my transgressions now;
lines.ko: 예수 공로 힘입어 천국 가게 하소서
lines.id: Ajarkan hikmat-Mu pada hatiku

lines.en: Wash me, make me pure within,
lines.id: Jadikanlah aku murni, rahmat-Mu yang melimpah,

lines.en: Cleanse, O cleanse me from my sin.
lines.id: Basuhlah aku lebih putih dari salju,
Jadikanlah aku murni, rahmat-Mu yang melimpah,
Basuhlah aku lebih putih dari salju.

lines.en: My transgressions I confess,
lines.id: Ya Allah, hatiku kembali segar,

lines.en: Grief and guilt my soul oppress;
lines.id: Jadikanlah semangatku benar dan benar

lines.en: I have sinned against thy grace
lines.id: Jangan jauhkan aku dariMu,

lines.en: And provoked thee to thy face;
lines.ko: 복과 영생 예수니 더 원할 것 없도다
lines.id: Biarkan Roh-Mu tinggal di dalam diriku

lines.en: I confess thy judgment just,
lines.id: Kegembiraan penyelamatanmu turut serta,

lines.en: Speechless, I thy mercy trust.
lines.id: Teguhlah membuat hatiku berkeinginan,
Kegembiraan penyelamatanmu turut serta,
Teguh membuat hatiku berkehendak.

lines.en: I am evil, born in sin;
lines.id: Orang-orang berdosa akan belajar dariku

lines.en: Thou desirest truth within.
lines.ko: 어찌 감사하온지 말로 할 수 없도다
lines.id: Dan kembalilah, ya Allah, kepada-Mu

lines.en: Thou alone my Saviour art,
lines.ko: 주의 귀한 형상을 나도 입게 하시고
lines.id: Selamat, hapus semua kesalahanku,

lines.en: Teach thy wisdom to my heart;
lines.id: Dan lidahku akan menyanyikan cinta-Mu

lines.en: Make me pure, thy grace bestow,
lines.id: Sentuhlah bibirku yang sunyi, ya Tuhan,

lines.en: Wash me whiter than the snow.
lines.id: Dan mulutku akan memuji harmoni,
Sentuhlah bibirku yang sunyi, ya Tuhan,
Dan mulutku akan memuji keselarasan. Amin.

lines.en: Broken, humbled to the dust
By thy wrath and judgment just,
Let my contrite heart rejoice
And in gladness hear thy voice;
From my sins O hide thy face,
Blot them out in boundless grace.
Gracious God, my heart renew,
Make my spirit right and true;
Cast me not away from thee,
Let thy Spirit dwell in me;
Thy salvation's joy impart,
Steadfast make my willing heart.
Sinners then shall learn from me
And return, O God, to thee;
Saviour, all my guilt remove,
And my tongue shall sing thy love;
Touch my silent lips, O Lord,
And my mouth shall praise accord.

title_en: In Thy Wrath and Hot Displeasure

lines.en: From Psalm 38
In thy wrath and hot displeasure,
Chasten not thy servant, Lord;
Let thy mercy, without measure,
Help and peace to me afford.
Heavy is my tribulation,
Sore my punishment has been;
Broken by thine indignation,
I am troubled by my sin.
With my burden of transgression
Heavy laden, overborne,
lines.ko: 무거운 짐을 진, 과중한 짐을 진,

lines.en: Humbled low I make confession,
For my folly now I mourn.
lines.ko: 나의 어리석음 때문에 나는 지금 슬퍼합니다.

lines.en: Weak and wounded, I implore thee;
Lord, to me thy mercy show;
lines.ko: 주님, 나에게 당신의 자비를 보여 주십시오.

lines.en: All my pray'r is now before thee,
lines.ko: 나의 모든 기도가 이제 당신 앞에 있사오니

lines.en: All my trouble thou dost know.
lines.ko: 나의 모든 문제를 당신은 알고 계십니다.

lines.en: Darkness gathers, foes assail me,
But I answer not a word;
lines.ko: 그러나 나는 한 마디도 대답하지 않습니다.

lines.en: All my friends desert and fail me,
lines.ko: 내 친구들은 모두 나를 버리고 실망시킵니다.

lines.en: Only thou my cry hast heard.
Lord, in thee am I confiding;
Thou wilt answer when I call,
Lest my foes, the good deriding,
lines.ko: 내 적들, 좋은 조롱거리가 되지 않도록,

lines.en: Triumph in thy servant's fall.
Lord, my God, do not forsake me,
lines.ko: 주 나의 하나님이여 나를 버리지 마옵소서

lines.en: Let me know that thou art near,
lines.ko: 당신이 가까이 있다는 것을 나에게 알려주세요.

lines.en: Under thy protection take me,
As my Saviour now appear.

title_en: Remember Not, O God

lines.en: [English lyrics not available in the database for this revised hymn]
lines.ko: [이 개정된 찬송가의 데이터베이스에는 영어 가사가 없습니다.]

title_en: Lord, like the Publican I Stand

lines.en: Lord, like the publican I stand,
And lift my heart to thee;
Thy pard'ning grace, O God, command,
lines.ko: 오 하나님, 당신의 용서하시는 은혜, 명령하소서.

lines.en: Be merciful to me.
I smite upon my anxious breast,
O'erwhelmed with agony;
O save my soul by sin oppressed,
lines.ko: 오, 죄에 짓눌린 내 영혼을 구원하소서,

lines.en: Be merciful to me.
My guilt, my shame, I all confess:
lines.ko: 나의 죄책감, 나의 수치심, 나는 모두 고백합니다.

lines.en: I have no hope nor plea
But Jesus' blood and righteousness:
lines.ko: 그러나 예수님의 피와 의는 다음과 같습니다.

lines.en: Be merciful to me.
Here at thy cross I still would wait,
lines.ko: 여기 당신 십자가 앞에서 나는 여전히 기다릴 것입니다.

lines.en: Nor from its shelter flee,
Till thou, O God, in mercy great,
Art merciful to me.

title_en: Out of the Deep I Call

lines.en: [English lyrics not available in the database for this revised hymn]
lines.ko: [이 개정된 찬송가의 데이터베이스에는 영어 가사가 없습니다.]

title_en: Take Me, O My Father, Take Me

lines.en: Take me, O my Father, take me;
lines.id: Bawalah aku, oh, Ayahku, bawalah aku

lines.en: Take me, save me, through thy Son;
lines.id: Bawalah aku, selamatkan aku, melalui Putra-Mu

lines.en: That which thou wouldst have me, make me,
lines.ko: 아버지를 떠나 산지 벌써 오래 되었고
lines.id: Apa yang Engkau kehendaki untukku, jadikanlah aku

lines.en: Let thy will in me be done.
lines.ko: 험한 길에 곤한 몸이 이제 돌아 옵니다
lines.id: Biarlah kehendak-Mu terjadi dalam diriku.

lines.en: Long from thee my footsteps straying,
lines.id: Jauh dariMu langkah kakiku melenceng,

lines.en: Thorny proved the way I trod;
lines.id: Thorn-y membuktikan caraku melangkah.

lines.en: Weary come I now, and praying,
lines.id: Lelah datanglah aku sekarang, dan berdoa.

lines.en: Take me to thy love, my God.
lines.id: T
Mereka mengikatku dengan ikatan cinta,
Mereka menyelamatkan yang wan-d'ring.

lines.en: Fruitless years with grief recalling,
lines.ko: 전에 하던 헛된 일을 애통하게 여기고
lines.id: Ya Tuhan, gembalaku adalah,

lines.en: Humbly I confess my sin;
lines.id: 'Sungguh Dia yang mencintai jiwaku,

lines.en: At thy feet, O Father, falling,
lines.id: 'Sungguh Dia yang memandikanku dengan darah-Nya,

lines.en: To thy household take me in.
lines.id: 'Sungguh Dia yang membuatku utuh

lines.en: Freely now to thee I proffer
lines.id: 'Sungguh Dia yang mencari yang hilang,

lines.en: This relenting heart of mine;
lines.id: Itu menemukan domba wan-d'ring,

lines.en: Freely life and soul I offer,
lines.id: 'Sungguh Dia yang membawaku ke kandang,

lines.en: Gift unworthy love like thine.
lines.id: Ini Dia yang masih menyimpan.

lines.en: Once the world's Redeemer, dying,
lines.id: Ya Tuhan, gembalaku adalah,

lines.en: Bore our sins upon the tree;
lines.ko: 그 공로를 의지하여 주만 의지 합니다
lines.id: 'Sungguh Dia yang mencintai jiwaku,

lines.en: On that sacrifice relying,
lines.id: 'Sungguh Dia yang memandikanku dengan darah-Nya,

lines.en: Now I look in hope to thee:
lines.ko: 주의 사랑 품안에서 길이 살게 하소서 아멘
lines.id: 'Sungguh Dia yang membuatku utuh

lines.en: Father, take me; all forgiving,
lines.id: 'Sungguh Dia yang mencari yang hilang,

lines.en: Fold me to thy loving breast;
lines.id: Itu menemukan domba wan-d'ring,

lines.en: In thy love for ever living
lines.id: 'Sungguh Dia yang membawaku ke kandang,

lines.en: I must be for ever blest.
lines.id: Ini Dia yang masih menyimpan.

title_id: Bawalah Aku, Oh, Ayahku, Bawalah Aku

title_en: O Jesus, Thou Art Standing

lines.en: O Jesus, thou art standing
lines.ko: 주 예수 대문 밖에 기다려 섰으나
lines.id: Ya Yesus, Engkau berdiri

lines.en: Outside the fast-closed door,
lines.id: Di luar pintu yang tertutup rapat,

lines.en: In lowly patience waiting
lines.ko: 나 주를 믿노라고 그 이름 부르나
lines.id: Dalam penantian yang rendah kesabaran

lines.en: To pass the threshold o'er:
lines.ko: 문 밖에 세워 두니 참 나의 수치라
lines.id: Untuk melewati o'er tua:

lines.en: Shame on us, Christian brothers,
lines.id: Sungguh memalukan bagi kami, saudara-saudara Kristiani,

lines.en: His Name and sign who bear,
lines.id: Nama-Nya dan tanda yang menyandangnya,

lines.en: O shame, thrice shame upon us,
lines.id: Wahai malu, tiga kali memalukan bagi kami,

lines.en: To keep him standing there!
lines.id: Untuk menjaga Dia tetap berdiri di sana!

lines.en: O Jesus, thou art knocking;
lines.ko: 문 두드리는 손은 못 박힌 손이요
lines.id: Ya Yesus, Engkau sedang mengetuk

lines.en: And lo, that hand is scarred,
lines.ko: 또 가시 면류관은 그 이마 둘렀네
lines.id: Dan lihatlah! tangan itu penuh bekas luka,

lines.en: And thorns thy brow encircle,
lines.id: Dan singgasana melingkari alismu,

lines.en: And tears thy face have marred:
lines.ko: 문 굳게 닫아 두니 한없는 내 죄라
lines.id: Dan air mata wajah-Mu telah rusak

lines.en: O love that passeth knowledge,
lines.id: Wahai cinta yang melampaui pengetahuan,

lines.en: So patiently to wait!
lines.id: Jadi sabar menunggu!

lines.en: O sin that hath no equal,
lines.id: Wahai dosa yang tidak ada bandingannya,

lines.en: So fast to bar the gate!
lines.id: Begitu cepat untuk menutup gerbangnya!

lines.en: O Jesus, thou art pleading
lines.ko: 주 예수 간곡 하게 원하는 말씀이
lines.id: Ya Yesus, Engkau memohon

lines.en: In accents meek and low,
lines.ko: 네 죄로 죽은 나를 너 박대 할 쏘냐
lines.id: Dalam aksen yang lemah lembut dan rendah,

lines.en: "I died for you, my children,
lines.ko: 나 죄를 회개 하고 곧 문을 엽니다
lines.id: “Aku mati untukmu, anak-anakku,

lines.en: And will ye treat me so?"
lines.ko: 드셔서 좌정 하사 떠나지 마소서 아멘
lines.id: Dan maukah kamu memperlakukan Aku demikian

lines.en: O Lord, with shame and sorrow
lines.id: Ya Tuhan, dengan rasa malu dan duka

lines.en: We open now the door;
lines.id: Kami sekarang membuka pintunya

lines.en: Dear Saviour, enter, enter,
lines.id: Penyelamat yang terhormat, masuk, masuk,

lines.en: And leave us nevermore.
lines.id: Dan jangan pernah tinggalkan kami lagi! A-laki-laki.

title_en: We Have Not Known Thee As We Ought

lines.en: We have not known thee as we ought,
Nor learned thy wisdom, grace and pow'r;
lines.ko: 당신의 지혜와 은혜와 능력도 배우지 못했습니다.

lines.en: The things of earth have filled our thought,
lines.ko: 땅의 것들이 우리 생각을 가득 채웠고,

lines.en: And trifles of the passing hour.
Lord, give us light thy truth to see,
lines.ko: 주님, 우리에게 당신의 진리를 볼 수 있는 빛을 주소서.

lines.en: And make us wise in knowing thee.
lines.ko: 그리고 우리가 당신을 아는 지혜를 얻게 하소서.

lines.en: We have not feared thee as we ought,
Nor bowed beneath thine awful eye,
lines.ko: 당신의 끔찍한 눈 아래에 몸을 굽히지도 않고,

lines.en: Nor guarded deed, and word, and thought,
Remembering that God was nigh.
Lord, give us faith to know thee near,
lines.ko: 주님, 우리에게 주님을 가까이서 알 수 있는 믿음을 주소서.

lines.en: And grant the grace of holy fear.
We have not loved thee as we ought,
Nor cared that we are loved by thee;
lines.ko: 우리가 당신의 사랑을 받는 것도 개의치 아니하오니

lines.en: Thy presence we have coldly sought,
And feebly longed thy face to see.
lines.ko: 그리고 당신의 얼굴을 보고 싶은 마음이 간절했습니다.

lines.en: Lord, give a pure and loving heart
To feel and own the love thou art.
lines.ko: 당신 자신의 사랑을 느끼고 소유하는 것.

lines.en: We have not served thee as we ought;
Alas! the duties left undone,
The work with little fervor wrought,
The battles lost, or scarcely won!
Lord, give the zeal, and give the might,
For thee to toil, for thee to fight.
When shall we know thee as we ought,
And fear, and love, and serve aright!
When shall we, out of trial brought,
Be perfect in the land of light!
Lord, may we day by day prepare
To see thy face, and serve thee there.
lines.ko: 당신의 얼굴을 뵙고 그곳에서 당신을 섬기게 하소서.

title_en: Forgive Our Sins As We Forgive
title_ko: 우리가 용서한 것처럼 우리의 죄를 용서해 주십시오 (자체번역)

lines.en: [English lyrics not available in the database for this revised hymn]
lines.ko: [이 개정된 찬송가의 데이터베이스에는 영어 가사가 없습니다.]

title_en: No, Not Despairingly Come I to Thee
title_ko: 아니, 나는 절망적으로 당신에게로 가지 않습니다 (자체번역)

lines.en: No, not despairingly
Come I to thee;
No, not distrustingly
Bend I the knee:
Sin hath gone over me,
Yet is this still my plea,
Jesus hath died.
Lord, I confess to thee
Sadly my sin;
All am tell I thee,
All I have been:
Purge thou my sin away,
Wash thou my soul this day;
Lord, make my clean.
Faithful and just art thou,
Forgiving all;
Loving and kind art thou
When poor ones call:
Lord, let the cleansing blood,
Blood of the Lamb of God,
Pass o'er my soul.
Then all is peace and light
lines.ko: 그러면 모든 것이 평화와 빛이 될 것입니다

lines.en: This soul within;
Thus shall I walk with thee,
lines.ko: 그리하여 나는 당신과 함께 걸을 것입니다.

lines.en: The loved Unseen;
Leaning on thee, my God,
Guided along the road,
Nothing between.

title_en: Kind and Merciful God, We Have Sinned
title_ko: 친절하고 자비로우신 하나님, 우리가 죄를 지었습니다. (자체번역)

lines.en: [English lyrics not available in the database for this revised hymn]
lines.ko: [이 개정된 찬송가의 데이터베이스에는 영어 가사가 없습니다.]

title_en: I Need Thee, Precious Jesus

lines.en: I need thee, precious Jesus,
For I am full of sin;
My soul is dark and guilty,
My heart is dead within.
I need the cleansing fountain
Where I can always flee,
The blood of Christ most precious,
The sinner's perfect plea.
I need thee, precious Jesus,
For I am very poor;
A stranger and a pilgrim,
I have no earthly store.
I need the love of Jesus
To cheer me on my way,
To guide my doubting footsteps,
To be my strength and stay.
I need thee, precious Jesus,
And hope to see thee soon,
Encircled with the rainbow
And seated on thy throne.
There, with thy blood-bought children,
lines.ko: 그곳에서 당신의 피로 사신 자녀들과 함께

lines.en: My joy shall ever be,
To sing my Jesus' praises,
To gaze, O Lord, on thee.

title_en: Jesus! What a Friend for Sinners!
title_ko: 예수! 죄인들을 위한 참으로 훌륭한 친구입니다! (자체번역)

lines.en: Jesus! what a Friend for sinners!
lines.ko: 예수! 죄인들을 위한 얼마나 좋은 친구입니까!

lines.en: Jesus! Lover of my soul;
Friends may fail me, foes assail me,
lines.ko: 친구들은 나를 실망시킬 수도 있고, 적들이 나를 공격할 수도 있지만,

lines.en: He, my Saviour, makes me whole.
lines.ko: 나의 구주이신 그분은 나를 완전하게 만드십니다.

lines.en: Hallelujah! what a Saviour!
Hallelujah, what a Friend!
Saving, helping, keeping, loving,
He is with me to the end.
Jesus! what a strength in weakness!
Let me hide myself in him;
lines.ko: 나 자신을 그분 안에 숨기도록 하십시오.

lines.en: Tempted, tried, and sometimes failing,
lines.ko: 유혹을 받고, 시도하고, 때로는 실패하기도 하지만,

lines.en: He, my strength, my vict'ry wins.
lines.ko: 그분, 나의 힘, 나의 승리가 승리합니다.

lines.en: Jesus! what a help in sorrow!
While the billows o'er me roll,
Even when my heart is breaking,
He, my comfort, helps my soul.
lines.ko: 나의 위로이신 그분은 내 영혼을 도우십니다.

lines.en: Jesus! what a guide and keeper!
While the tempest still is high,
Storms about me, night o'ertakes me,
lines.ko: 나를 둘러싼 폭풍우, 밤이 나를 데려가네,

lines.en: He, my pilot, hears my cry.
lines.ko: 나의 조종사인 그는 나의 외침을 듣는다.

lines.en: Jesus! I do now receive him,
More than all in him I find,
lines.ko: 나는 그에게서 무엇보다도 더 많은 것을 발견했습니다.

lines.en: He hath granted me forgiveness,
I am his, and he is mine.
lines.ko: 나는 그의 것이고 그는 내 것입니다.

title_en: Rock of Ages, Cleft for Me

lines.en: Rock of Ages, cleft for me
lines.id: Batu A-ges, celah untukku,

lines.ko: 창에 허리 상하여 물과 피를 흘린 것
lines.id: Izinkan aku menyembunyikan diriku di dalam Engkau
Biarkan air dan darah,
Dari sisi luka-Mu yang mengalir,
Jadilah obat ganda bagi dosa,
Bersihkan aku dari rasa bersalah dan kuasanya.

lines.en: Let me hide myself in thee;
lines.ko: 내가 공을 세우나 은혜 갚지 못하네
lines.id: Bukan hasil kerja tanganku

lines.ko: 쉼이 없이 힘쓰고 눈물 근심 많으나
lines.id: Dapat memenuhi tuntutan hukum-Mu

lines.ko: 구속 못할 죄인을 예수 홀로 속하네
lines.id: Bisakah semangatku tidak tahu lagi,
Bisakah air mataku mengalir selamanya,
Semua karena dosa tidak bisa dinadakan,
Engkau harus menyelamatkan, dan Engkau sendirian.

lines.en: Let the water and the blood,
lines.ko: 빈 손 들고 앞에 가 십자가를 붙드네
lines.id: Tidak ada apa pun di tanganku yang kubawa,

lines.ko: 의가 없는 자라도 도와 주심 바라고
lines.id: Cukup pada salib-Mu aku berpegang teguh
Telanjang, datanglah kepadamu untuk berpakaian,
Tak berdaya, mohon rahmat dari-Mu
Busuk, aku ke air mancur terbang
Basuhlah aku, Juruselamat, atau aku mati.

lines.en: From thy riven side which flowed,
lines.ko: 살아 생전 숨 쉬고 죽어 세상 떠나서
lines.id: Selagi aku menarik napas sekilas ini,

lines.ko: 거룩하신 주 앞에 끝날 심판 당할 때
lines.id: Saat mataku terpejam dalam kematian,

lines.ko: 만세반석 열리니 내가 들어 갑니다 아멘
lines.id: Ketika saya terbang ke dunia yang tidak diketahui,
Sampai jumpa di singgasana penghakiman-Mu,
Batu A-ges, celah untukku,
Izinkan aku menyembunyikan diriku di dalam Engkau. Amin.

lines.en: Be of sin the double cure,
Cleanse me from its guilt and pow'r.
Not the labors of my hands
Can fulfil thy law's demands;
Could my zeal no respite know,
Could my tears for ever flow,
All for sin could not atone;
Thou must save, and thou alone.
Nothing in my hand I bring,
Simply to thy cross I cling;
Naked, come to thee for dress,
Helpless, look to thee for grace;
Foul, I to the Fountain fly;
Wash me, Saviour, or I die.
While I draw this fleeting breath,
When mine eyelids close in death,
When I soar to worlds unknown,
See thee on thy judgment throne,
Rock of Ages, cleft for me,
Let me hide myself in thee.

alt_titles: Rock of Ages, cleft for me (tune 2)

title_en: Rock of Ages, Cleft for Me

lines.en: Rock of Ages, cleft for me
lines.id: Batu A-ges, celah untukku,

lines.ko: 창에 허리 상하여 물과 피를 흘린 것
lines.id: Izinkan aku menyembunyikan diriku di dalam Engkau
Biarkan air dan darah,
Dari sisi luka-Mu yang mengalir,
Jadilah obat ganda bagi dosa,
Bersihkan aku dari rasa bersalah dan kuasanya.

lines.en: Let me hide myself in thee;
lines.ko: 내가 공을 세우나 은혜 갚지 못하네
lines.id: Bukan hasil kerja tanganku

lines.ko: 쉼이 없이 힘쓰고 눈물 근심 많으나
lines.id: Dapat memenuhi tuntutan hukum-Mu

lines.ko: 구속 못할 죄인을 예수 홀로 속하네
lines.id: Bisakah semangatku tidak tahu lagi,
Bisakah air mataku mengalir selamanya,
Semua karena dosa tidak bisa dinadakan,
Engkau harus menyelamatkan, dan Engkau sendirian.

Nothing in my hand I bring,

alt_titles: Rock of Ages, cleft for me (tune 2)

title_en: Just As I Am, without One Plea

lines.en: Just as I am, without one plea
lines.ko: 큰 죄에 빠진 날 위해 주 보혈 흘려 주시고
lines.id: Sama seperti saya, tanpa satu permohonan pun,

lines.ko: 또 나를 오라 하시니 주께로 거저 갑니다
lines.id: Namun darah-Mu telah tertumpah untukku,
Dan Engkau yang memintaku datang kepadaMu,
Ya Anak Domba Allah, aku datang, aku datang.

lines.en: But that thy blood was shed for me,
lines.ko: 내 죄를 씻는 능력은 주 보혈밖에 없으니
lines.id: Sama seperti saya, dan tidak menunggu

lines.ko: 정하게 되기 원하여 주께로 거저 갑니다
lines.id: Untuk menghilangkan jiwaku dari satu noda hitam,
KepadaMu yang darahnya dapat membersihkan setiap noda,
Ya Anak Domba Allah, aku datang, aku datang.

lines.en: And that thou bidd'st me come to thee,
lines.ko: 큰 죄악 씻기 원하나 내 힘이 항상 약하니
lines.id: Sama sepertiku, meski terombang-ambing

lines.ko: 보혈의 공로 믿고서 주께로 거저 갑니다
lines.id: Dengan banyak konflik, banyak keraguan,
Perkelahian dan ketakutan di dalam, di luar,
Ya Anak Domba Allah, aku datang, aku datang.

lines.en: O Lamb of God, I come, I come.
lines.ko: 내 죄가 심히 무거워 구하여 줄 이 없으니
lines.id: Sama seperti aku, miskin, malang, buta;

lines.ko: 내 의심 떨쳐 버리고 주께로 거저 갑니다
lines.id: Penglihatan, kekayaan, penyembuhan pikiran,
Ya, semua yang kubutuhkan pada-Mu untuk kutemukan,
Ya Anak Domba Allah, aku datang, aku datang.

lines.en: Just as I am, and waiting not
lines.ko: 죄 용서하여 주시고 내 마음 위로하심을
lines.id: Sama seperti aku, Engkau akan menerima,

lines.ko: 나 항상 믿고 고마워 주께로 거저 갑니다
lines.id: Layu menyambut, memaafkan, membersihkan, meringankan;
Karena janji-Mu aku percaya,
Ya Anak Domba Allah, aku datang, aku datang.

lines.en: To rid my soul of one dark blot,
lines.ko: 주 예수 베푼 사랑이 한 없이 크고 넓으니
lines.id: Sama seperti aku, cintamu tidak diketahui

lines.ko: 내 뜻을 모두 버리고 주께로 거저 갑니다 아멘
lines.id: Telah menghancurkan setiap penghalang;
Sekarang, untuk menjadi milik-Mu, ya, hanya milik-Mu,
Ya Anak Domba Allah, aku datang, aku datang.

lines.en: To thee, whose blood can cleanse each spot,
O Lamb of God, I come, I come.
Just as I am, though tossed about
With many a conflict, many a doubt,
Fightings and fears within, without,
O Lamb of God, I come, I come.
Just as I am, poor, wretched, blind;
Sight, riches, healing of the mind,
Yea, all I need, in thee to find,
O Lamb of God, I come, I come.
Just as I am! thou wilt receive,
Wilt welcome, pardon, cleanse, relieve;
Because thy promise I believe,
O Lamb of God, I come, I come.
Just as I am! thy love unknown
Has broken ev'ry barrier down;
Now, to be thine, yea, thine alone,
O Lamb of God, I come, I come.

alt_titles: Just as I am, without one plea (tune 2)
