title_en: Out of My Bondage, Sorrow, and Night

lines.en: Out of my bond-age, sor-row and night,
lines.id: Keluar dari usia perbudakanku, kesedihan dan malam,

lines.en: Je-sus, I come, Je-sus, I come
lines.id: Yesus, aku datang, Yesus, aku datang

lines.ko: 병든 내 몸이 튼튼하고 빈궁한 삶이 부해지며
lines.en: In-to Thy free-dom, glad-ness and light,
lines.id: Demi kebebasan, kegembiraan dan cahaya-Mu,

lines.en: Je-sus, I come to Thee
lines.id: Ya Tuhan, aku datang kepadaMu

lines.en: Out of my sick-ness in-to Thy health,
lines.id: Dari penyakitku ke dalam kesehatan-Mu,

lines.en: Out of my want and in-to Thy wealth,
lines.id: Dari kekuranganku dan masuk ke dalam kekayaan-Mu,

lines.en: Out of my sin and in-to Thy-self, Je-sus,
lines.id: Keluar dari dosaku dan ke dalam diri-Mu, Yesus,

lines.en: I come to Thee.
lines.id: aku datang kepada-Mu.

lines.ko: 낭패와 실망 당한 뒤에 예수께로 나갑니다
lines.en: Out of my shame-ful fail-ure and loss,
lines.id: Dari kegagalan dan kehilanganku yang memalukan,

lines.en: Je-sus, I come, Je-sus, I come
lines.id: Yesus, aku datang, Yesus, aku datang

lines.ko: 슬프던 마음 위로받고 이생의 풍파 잔잔하며
lines.en: In-to The glo-rious gain of Thy cross, Je-sus,
lines.id: Ke dalam keuntungan mulia salib-Mu, Yesus,

lines.en: I come to Thee
lines.id: aku datang kepada-Mu

lines.en: Out of earth's sor-rows in-to thy balm,
lines.id: Keluar dari kesedihan bumi ke dalam balsemmu,

lines.en: Out of life's storms and in-to Thy calm,
lines.id: Keluar dari badai kehidupan dan masuk ke dalam ketenangan-Mu,

lines.en: Out of dis-tress to ju-bi-lant psalm,
lines.id: Dari kesusahan hingga mazmur gembira,

lines.en: Je-sus, I come to Thee.
lines.id: Ya Tuhan, aku datang kepadaMu.

lines.en: Out of un-rest and ar-ro-gant pride, Je-sus,
lines.id: Karena keresahan dan kesombongan yang berlebihan, Yesus,

lines.en: I come, Je-sus, I come
lines.id: Aku datang, Yesus, aku datang

lines.ko: 실망한 이 몸 힘을 얻고 예수의 크신 사랑 받아
lines.en: In-to Thy bless-ed will to a-bide. Je-sus,
lines.id: Sesuai dengan kehendak-Mu yang diberkati untuk tinggal. Ya Tuhan,

lines.en: I come to Thee
lines.id: aku datang kepada-Mu

lines.en: Out of my-self to dwell in Thy love,
lines.id: Dari diriku untuk berdiam dalam cinta-Mu,

lines.en: Out of de-spair into rap-ture a-bove,
lines.id: Dari keputusasaan menuju kegairahan di atas,

lines.en: Up-ward for aye on wings like a dove, Je-sus,
lines.id: Ke atas untuk melihat sayap seperti merpati, Yesus,

lines.en: I come to Thee.
lines.id: aku datang kepada-Mu.

lines.en: Out of the fear and dread of the tomb,
lines.id: Karena rasa takut dan takut akan kubur,

lines.en: Je-sus, I come, Je-sus, I come
lines.id: Yesus, aku datang, Yesus, aku datang

lines.ko: 멸망의 포구 헤어나와 평화의 나라 다다라서
lines.en: In-to The joy and light of Thy home,
lines.id: Ke dalam kegembiraan dan cahaya rumah-Mu,

lines.en: Je-sus, I come to Thee
lines.id: Ya Tuhan, aku datang kepadaMu

lines.en: Out of the depths of ru-in un-told,
lines.id: Dari kedalaman kehancuran yang tak terhitung,

lines.en: In-to the peace of Thy shel-ter-ing fold,
lines.id: Ke dalam kedamaian di tempat perlindungan-Mu,

lines.en: Ev-er Thy glo-rious face to be-hold,
lines.id: Wajahmu yang mulia selalu terlihat,

lines.en: Je-sus, I come to Thee.
lines.id: Ya Tuhan, aku datang kepadaMu.

title_id: Keluar dari Perbudakan, Kesedihan dan Malamku

title_en: I Am Trusting Thee, Lord Jesus

lines.en: I am trusting thee, Lord Jesus
Trusting only thee:
Trusting thee for full salvation,
Great and free.
I am trusting thee for pardon;
At thy feet I bow,
For thy grace and tender mercy,
Trusting now.
I am trusting thee for cleansing
In the crimson flood;
Trusting thee to make me holy
By thy blood.
I am trusting thee to guide me;
lines.ko: 나는 당신이 나를 인도하실 것을 믿습니다.

lines.en: Thou alone shalt lead,
Ev'ry day and hour supplying
All my need.
I am trusting thee, Lord Jesus;
Never let me fall;
I am trusting thee for ever,
And for all.

title_en: I’m Not Ashamed to Own My Lord
title_ko: 나는 내 주님을 소유하는 것이 부끄럽지 않습니다 (자체번역)

lines.en: I'm not ashamed to own my Lord,
lines.ko: 나는 나의 주님을 소유하는 것을 부끄러워하지 않습니다.

lines.en: Or to defend his cause,
Maintain the honor of his Word,
The glory of his cross.
Jesus, my God! I know his Name,
lines.ko: 예수님, 나의 하나님! 나는 그의 이름을 안다.

lines.en: His Name is all my trust;
Nor will he put my soul to shame,
Nor let my hope be lost.
Firm as his throne his promise stands,
lines.ko: 그의 보좌만큼 굳건하시며 그의 약속은 굳건하며

lines.en: And he can well secure
lines.ko: 그리고 그는 보안을 잘 유지할 수 있습니다

lines.en: What I've committed to his hands
lines.ko: 내가 그 사람 손에 맡긴 것은

lines.en: Till the decisive hour.
Then will he own my worthless name
lines.ko: 그러면 그 사람은 내 쓸모없는 이름을 소유하게 될까요?

lines.en: Before his Father's face,
And in the new Jerusalem
Appoint my soul a place.

title_en: As When the Hebrew Prophet Raised

lines.en: As when the Hebrew prophet raised
The brazen serpent high,
The wounded looked, and straight were cured,
The people ceased to die;
So from the Saviour on the cross
A healing virtue flows;
Who looks to him with lively faith
Is saved from endless woes.
For God gave up his Son to death,
So gen'rous was his love,
That all the faithful might enjoy
lines.ko: 모든 충실한 사람들이 즐길 수 있도록

lines.en: Eternal life above.
Not to condemn the sons of men
The Son of God appeared;
No weapons in his hand are seen,
lines.ko: 손에 들고 있는 무기는 보이지 않고,

lines.en: Nor voice of terror heard:
He came to raise our fallen state,
And our lost hopes restore;
Faith leads us to the mercy seat,
And bids us fear no more.
lines.ko: 그리고 우리에게 더 이상 두려워하지 말라고 명하십니다.

title_en: Approach, My Soul, the Mercy Seat

lines.en: Approach, my soul, the mercy-seat
Where Jesus answers prayer;
There humbly fall before his feet,
lines.ko: 거기 그의 발 앞에 겸손히 엎드리어

lines.en: For none can perish there.
Thy promise is my only plea;
With this I venture nigh:
lines.ko: 이것으로 나는 다음과 같은 모험을 감행합니다.

lines.en: Thou callest burdened souls to thee,
lines.ko: 당신은 무거운 짐을 지고 있는 영혼들을 당신께 부르시나이다.

lines.en: And such, O Lord, am I.
lines.ko: 오 주님, 저도 바로 그러한 사람입니다.

lines.en: Bowed down beneath a load of sin,
By Satan sorely pressed,
By war without, and fears within,
I come to thee for rest.
Be thou my shield and hiding place,
That, sheltered near thy side,
I may my fierce accuser face,
lines.ko: 나는 나의 맹렬한 고소인의 얼굴을 보게 될 것입니다.

lines.en: And tell him, thou hast died.
O wondrous love! to bleed and die,
lines.ko: 오 놀라운 사랑이여! 피를 흘리며 죽고,

lines.en: To bear the cross and shame,
That guilty sinners, such as I,
Might plead thy gracious Name!
lines.ko: 당신의 은혜로운 이름을 간청할 수도 있습니다!

title_en: Jesus, Lover of My Soul

lines.en: Jesus, Lover of my soul,
lines.ko: 비바람이 칠 때와 물결높이 일 때에
lines.id: Yesus, Kekasih jiwaku,

lines.ko: 사랑 많은 우리 주 나를 품어 주소서
lines.id: Biarkan aku terbang ke dada-Mu,
Sementara air di dekatnya mengalir,

lines.ko: 안식 얻는 곳으로 주여 인도 하소서
lines.id: Mumpung suhu hama masih tinggi!
Sembunyikan aku, wahai Juruselamatku, sembunyikan,
Hingga badai kehidupan berlalu.
Aman dalam panduan ha-ven.
Oh, akhirnya terima kembali jiwaku!

lines.en: Let me to thy bosom fly,
lines.ko: 나의 영혼 피할 데 예수 밖에 없으니
lines.id: Saya tidak punya tempat perlindungan lain

lines.ko: 혼자 있게 마시고 위로 하여 주소서
lines.id: Menggantungkan jiwaku yang tak berdaya pada-Mu.
Tinggalkan, ah, jangan tinggalkan aku sendirian

lines.ko: 할 수 없는 죄인을 주여 보호 하소서
lines.id: Masih mendukung dan menghibur saya!
Semua kepercayaanku pada-Mu tetap ada
Semua pertolonganku dariMu kubawa.
Tutupi kepalaku yang tidak punya pertahanan
Dengan naungan sayap-Mu.

lines.en: While the nearer waters roll,
lines.id: Engkau, ya Kristus, adalah semua yang kuinginkan
Lebih dari segalanya Lalu aku temukan.
Angkat yang jatuh, hibur yang pingsan,
Sembuhkanlah orang sakit, dan pimpinlah orang buta.
Adil dan sucilah nama-Mu
Saya semua tidak benar.
Aku palsu dan penuh dosa
Engkau penuh dengan kebenaran dan rahmat.

lines.en: While the tempest still is high:
lines.ko: 나의 죄를 사하는 주의 은혜 크도다
lines.id: Anugerah berlimpah pada-Mu ditemukan,
Kasih karunia untuk menutupi segala dosaku
Biarkan aliran penyembuhan mengalir deras

lines.ko: 샘물처럼 내 맘에 솟아나게 하소서 아멘
lines.id: Jadikan dan peliharalah aku suci di dalam:
Engkaulah kehidupan seni air mancur,
Dengan bebas izinkan aku mengambil milikMu
Musim Semi Engkau di dalam hatiku,
Bangkitlah selamanya. Amin.

lines.en: Hide me, O my Saviour, hide,
Till the storm of life is past;
Safe into the haven guide,
O receive my soul at last!
Other refuge have I none,
Hangs my helpless soul on thee;
Leave, ah! leave me not alone,
Still support and comfort me!
All my trust on thee is stayed,
All my help from thee I bring;
Cover my defenseless head
With the shadow of thy wing.
Thou, O Christ, art all I want;
More than all in thee I find:
Raise the fallen, cheer the faint,
Heal the sick, and lead the blind.
Just and holy is thy Name;
I am all unrighteousness;
False and full of sin I am,
Thou art full of truth and grace.
Plenteous grace with thee is found,
Grace to cover all my sin;
Let the healing streams abound;
Make and keep me pure within:
Thou of life the Fountain art,
Freely let me take of thee;
Spring thou up within my heart,
Rise to all eternity.

alt_titles: Jesus, Lover of my soul (tune 2)
Jesus, Lover of my soul (tune 3)

title_en: Jesus, Lover of My Soul

lines.en: Jesus, Lover of my soul,
lines.ko: 비바람이 칠 때와 물결높이 일 때에
lines.id: Yesus, Kekasih jiwaku,

lines.ko: 사랑 많은 우리 주 나를 품어 주소서
lines.id: Biarkan aku terbang ke dada-Mu,
Sementara air di dekatnya mengalir,

lines.ko: 안식 얻는 곳으로 주여 인도 하소서
lines.id: Mumpung suhu hama masih tinggi!
Sembunyikan aku, wahai Juruselamatku, sembunyikan,
Hingga badai kehidupan berlalu.
Aman dalam panduan ha-ven.
Oh, akhirnya terima kembali jiwaku!

lines.en: Let me to thy bosom fly,
lines.ko: 나의 영혼 피할 데 예수 밖에 없으니
lines.id: Saya tidak punya tempat perlindungan lain

lines.ko: 혼자 있게 마시고 위로 하여 주소서
lines.id: Menggantungkan jiwaku yang tak berdaya pada-Mu.
Tinggalkan, ah, jangan tinggalkan aku sendirian

lines.ko: 할 수 없는 죄인을 주여 보호 하소서
lines.id: Masih mendukung dan menghibur saya!
Semua kepercayaanku pada-Mu tetap ada
Semua pertolonganku dariMu kubawa.
Tutupi kepalaku yang tidak punya pertahanan
Dengan naungan sayap-Mu.

lines.en: While the nearer waters roll,
lines.id: Engkau, ya Kristus, adalah semua yang kuinginkan
Lebih dari segalanya Lalu aku temukan.
Angkat yang jatuh, hibur yang pingsan,
Sembuhkanlah orang sakit, dan pimpinlah orang buta.
Adil dan sucilah nama-Mu
Saya semua tidak benar.
Aku palsu dan penuh dosa
Engkau penuh dengan kebenaran dan rahmat.

lines.en: While the tempest still is high:
lines.ko: 나의 죄를 사하는 주의 은혜 크도다

Kasih karunia untuk menutupi segala dosaku
Biarkan aliran penyembuhan mengalir deras

lines.ko: 샘물처럼 내 맘에 솟아나게 하소서 아멘
lines.id: Jadikan dan peliharalah aku suci di dalam:
Engkaulah kehidupan seni air mancur,
Dengan bebas izinkan aku mengambil milikMu
Musim Semi Engkau di dalam hatiku,
Bangkitlah selamanya. Amin.

lines.en: Hide me, O my Saviour, hide,
Till the storm of life is past;
Safe into the haven guide,
O receive my soul at last!
Other refuge have I none,
Hangs my helpless soul on thee;
Leave, ah! leave me not alone,
Still support and comfort me!
All my trust on thee is stayed,
All my help from thee I bring;
Cover my defenseless head
With the shadow of thy wing.
Thou, O Christ, art all I want;
More than all in thee I find:
Raise the fallen, cheer the faint,
Heal the sick, and lead the blind.
Just and holy is thy Name;
I am all unrighteousness;
False and full of sin I am,
Thou art full of truth and grace.
Plenteous grace with thee is found,
Grace to cover all my sin;
Let the healing streams abound;
Make and keep me pure within:
Thou of life the Fountain art,
Freely let me take of thee;
Spring thou up within my heart,
Rise to all eternity.

alt_titles: Jesus, Lover of my soul (tune 2)
Jesus, Lover of my soul (tune 3)

title_en: Thou Hidden Source of Calm Repose

lines.en: Thou hidden source of calm repose,
Thou all-sufficient love divine,
lines.ko: 당신은 모든 것을 충족시키는 신성한 사랑이시며,

lines.en: My help and refuge from my foes,
lines.ko: 내 원수들에게서 나의 도움과 피난처가 되시니

lines.en: Secure I am, if thou art mine:
And lo! from sin, and grief and shame
I hide me, Jesus, in thy Name.
Thy mighty Name salvation is,
And keeps my happy soul above;
lines.ko: 그리고 내 행복한 영혼을 위에서 지켜주십니다.

lines.en: Comfort it brings, and pow'r, and peace,
And joy, and everlasting love:
To me, with thy dear Name are giv'n
Pardon and holiness and heav'n.
Jesus, my all in all thou art;
My rest in toil, my ease in pain,
lines.ko: 수고 중에 나의 안식을, 고통 중에 나의 안식을,

lines.en: The medicine of my broken heart,
In war my peace, in loss my gain,
lines.ko: 전쟁에서는 나의 평화를, 손실에서는 나의 이득을,

lines.en: My smile beneath the tyrant's frown,
lines.ko: 폭군의 찌푸린 얼굴 아래에 있는 나의 미소,

lines.en: In shame my glory and my crown:
lines.ko: 부끄러움 속에서 나의 영광과 나의 면류관이여:

lines.en: In want my plentiful supply,
In weakness my almighty pow'r,
In bonds my perfect liberty,
My light in Satan's darkest hour,
lines.ko: 사탄의 가장 어두운 시간에 나의 빛이여,

lines.en: My help and stay whene'er I call,
lines.ko: 내가 부를 때마다 나의 도움과 함께 있어주세요

lines.en: My life in death, my heav'n, my all.
lines.ko: 죽음 속의 내 삶, 나의 천국, 나의 전부.

title_en: Jesus, and Shall It Ever Be

lines.en: Jesus, and shall it ever be,
A mortal man ashamed of thee?
Ashamed of thee whom angels praise,
Whose glories shine through endless days!
lines.ko: 끝없는 나날을 통해 누구의 영광이 빛나는가!

lines.en: Ashamed of Jesus! sooner far
Let evening blush to own a star:
lines.ko: 별을 소유하기 위해 저녁을 붉게 만드십시오.

lines.en: He sheds the beams of light Divine
O'er this benighted soul of mine.
Ashamed of Jesus! just as soon
Let midnight be ashamed of noon;
'Tis midnight with my soul till he,
lines.ko: 내 영혼과 함께 자정이 될 때까지,

lines.en: Bright Morning Star, bid darkness flee.
lines.ko: 밝은 새벽 별이시여, 어둠이 물러가도록 명하소서.

lines.en: Ashamed of Jesus, that dear Friend
On whom my hopes of heav'n depend!
lines.ko: 천국에 대한 나의 희망은 누구에게 달려 있습니까!

lines.en: No; when I blush, be this my shame,
lines.ko: 아니요; 내가 얼굴을 붉힐 때, 이것이 나의 부끄러운 일이 되십시오.

lines.en: That I no more revere his Name.
lines.ko: 나는 더 이상 그분의 이름을 존경하지 않습니다.

lines.en: Ashamed of Jesus! yes, I may
lines.ko: 예수님을 부끄럽게 생각합니다! 응, 그럴 수도 있지

lines.en: When I've no guilt to wash away,
No tear to wipe, no good to crave,
lines.ko: 닦아야 할 눈물도 없고, 갈망해도 좋은 것이 없고,

lines.en: No fears to quell, no soul to save.
lines.ko: 진압할 두려움도 없고, 구원할 영혼도 없습니다.

lines.en: Till thennor is my boasting vain
Till then I boast a Saviour slain;
lines.ko: 그때까지 나는 죽임을 당한 구세주를 자랑합니다.

lines.en: And O may this my glory be,
That Christ is not ashamed of me.

title_en: I Lay My Sins on Jesus

lines.en: I lay my sins on Jesus,
lines.ko: 성부의 어린 양이 죄 지고 가시니
lines.id: Aku menyerahkan dosa-dosaku pada Yesus,

lines.en: The spotless Lamb of God;
lines.ko: 내 몸에 당할 형벌 다 대신 하셨네
lines.id: Anak Domba Allah yang tak bernoda

lines.en: He bears them all, and frees us
lines.ko: 내 죄가 추악하나 그 피로 씻으면
lines.id: Dia menanggung semuanya, dan membebaskan kita

lines.en: From the accursed load:
lines.ko: 눈 같이 희게 되어 티 하나 없으리
lines.id: Dari beban terkutuk.

lines.en: I bring my guilt to Jesus,
lines.id: Aku membawa kesalahanku kepada Yesus,

lines.en: To wash my crimson stains
lines.id: Untuk mencuci noda penjahatku

lines.en: White in his blood most precious,
lines.id: Putih dalam darah-Nya yang paling berharga,

lines.en: Till not a spot remains.
lines.id: Sampai tidak ada satu tempat pun yang tersisa.

lines.en: I lay my wants on Jesus;
lines.ko: 내 죄를 회개할 때 용서해 주시고
lines.id: Aku serahkan keinginanku pada Yesus,

lines.en: All fullness dwells in him;
lines.ko: 병든 몸 고쳐 주사 새 생명 주시네
lines.id: Segala kepenuhan tinggal di dalam Dia

lines.en: He heals all my diseases,
lines.ko: 내 속에 쌓인 근심 한없이 크건만
lines.id: Dia menyembuhkan semua penyakitku,

lines.en: He doth my soul redeem:
lines.ko: 주 친히 벗겨 주사 위로해 주시네
lines.id: Dialah yang menilai kembali jiwaku.

lines.en: I lay my griefs on Jesus,
lines.id: Aku menaruh kesedihanku pada Yesus,

lines.en: My burdens and my cares;
lines.id: Bebanku dan kekhawatiranku

lines.en: He from them all releases,
lines.id: Dia melepaskan semuanya dari mereka,

lines.en: He all my sorrows shares.
lines.id: Dia berbagi semua kesedihanku.

lines.en: I rest my soul on Jesus,
lines.ko: 내 주를 의지하니 내 맘이 편하고
lines.id: Aku mengistirahatkan jiwaku pada Yesus,

lines.en: This weary soul of mine;
lines.ko: 주 나를 붙드시니 내 앞길 환하다
lines.id: Jiwaku yang lelah ini

lines.en: His right hand me embraces,
lines.ko: 임마누엘 주 예수 끝없는 그 사랑
lines.id: Tangan kanannya memelukku,

lines.en: I on his breast recline.
lines.ko: 그 향기 바람 타고 온 땅에 퍼지네
lines.id: Aku bersandar di dada-Nya.

lines.en: I love the Name of Jesus,
lines.id: Aku suka nama Yesus,

lines.en: Immanuel, Christ, the Lord;
lines.id: Im-man-uel Kristus, Tuhan

lines.en: Like fragrance on the breezes
lines.id: Bagaikan wewangian ditiup angin,

lines.en: His Name abroad is poured.
lines.id: Namanya dituangkan secara luas.

lines.en: I long to be like Jesus,
lines.ko: 주 예수 본을 받아 온유한 마음과
lines.id: Aku ingin menjadi, seperti Yesus,

lines.en: Meek, loving, lowly, mild;
lines.id: Lemah lembut, penuh kasih, rendah hati, lemah lembut

lines.en: I long to be like Jesus,
lines.ko: 나 주의 뒤를 따라 저 천국 이르러
lines.id: Aku ingin menjadi, seperti Yesus,

lines.en: The Father's holy Child;
lines.id: Anak suci Bapa,

lines.en: I long to be with Jesus
lines.id: Aku rindu untuk bersama Yesus,

lines.en: Amid the heav'nly throng,
lines.id: Di tengah-tengah kerumunan orang surgawi

lines.en: To sing with saints his praises,
lines.id: Untuk bernyanyi bersama orang-orang kudus pujian-Nya,

lines.en: To learn the angels' song.
lines.id: Untuk mempelajari lagu malaikat.

title_en: Blessed Lord, in Thee Is Refuge

lines.en: Blessed Lord, in thee is refuge,
Safety for my trembling soul:
lines.ko: 떨고 있는 내 영혼을 위한 안전:

lines.en: Pow'r to lift my head when drooping
lines.ko: 처진 상태에서 고개를 들어 올려주는 힘

lines.en: 'Midst the angry billow's roll.
I will trust thee,
I will trust thee,
I will trust thee,
All my life thou shalt control.
In the past, too, unbelieving,
'Midst the tempest I have been,
And my heart has slowly trusted
lines.ko: 그리고 내 마음은 천천히 믿음을 갖게 됐어요

lines.en: What my eyes have never seen.
lines.ko: 내 눈이 한 번도 본 적이 없는 것.

lines.en: Blessed Jesus,
Blessed Jesus,
Blessed Jesus,
Teach me on thine arm to lean.
lines.ko: 당신의 팔로 기대는 법을 가르쳐 주소서.

lines.en: O, for trust that brings the triumph
When defeat seems strangely near;
lines.ko: 패배가 이상할 정도로 가까워 보일 때;

lines.en: O, for faith that changes fighting
Into vict'ry's ringing cheer!
Faith triumphant,
Faith triumphant,
Faith triumphant,
Knowing not defeat or fear.

title_en: For God So Loved the World

lines.en: [English lyrics not available in the database for this revised hymn]
lines.ko: [이 개정된 찬송가의 데이터베이스에는 영어 가사가 없습니다.]

title_en: How Lovely Shines the Morning Star!

lines.en: How lovely shines the Morning Star!
The nations see and hail afar
The light in Judah shining.
Thou David's Son of Jacob's race,
My Bridegroom and my King of Grace,
For thee my heart is pining.
lines.ko: 당신을 위해 내 마음은 고정되어 있습니다.

lines.en: Lowly, holy,
Great and glorious,
Thou victorious
Prince of graces,
Filling all the heav'nly places.
Now richly to my waiting heart,
O thou, my God, deign to impart
lines.ko: 오, 나의 하느님, 당신은 나누어 주시기를 정하셨습니다

lines.en: The grace of love undying.
In thy blest body let me be,
lines.ko: 당신의 축복받은 몸으로 저를 있게 하소서.

lines.en: E'en as the branch is in the tree,
Thy life my life supplying.
Sighing, crying,
For the savor
Of thy favor
Resting never
Till I rest in thee for ever.
lines.ko: 내가 영원히 당신 안에 안식할 때까지.

lines.en: Thou, mighty Father, in thy Son
Didst love me ere thou hadst begun
This ancient world's foundation.
Thy Son hath made a friend of me,
And when in spirit him I see,
I joy in tribulation.
What bliss
Is this!
He that liveth
To me giveth
Life forever;
Nothing me from him can sever.
lines.ko: 나는 그에게서 아무것도 끊을 수 없습니다.

title_en: Jesus, I Live to Thee

lines.en: Jesus, I live to thee,
The loveliest and best;
My life in thee, thy life in me,
lines.ko: 당신 안에 있는 내 생명, 내 안에 있는 당신의 생명,

lines.en: In thy blest love I rest.
lines.ko: 당신의 축복받은 사랑 안에서 나는 쉬겠습니다.

lines.en: Jesus, I die to thee,
Whenever death shall come;
To die in thee is life to me
lines.ko: 당신 안에서 죽는 것이 나에게는 생명입니다

lines.en: In my eternal home.
Whether to live or die,
I know not which is best;
lines.ko: 나는 어느 것이 가장 좋은지 모릅니다.

lines.en: To live in thee is bliss to me,
lines.ko: 당신 안에 사는 것이 나에게 복입니다.

lines.en: To die is endless rest.
Living or dying, Lord,
I ask but to be thine;
My life in thee, thy life in me,
lines.ko: 당신 안에 있는 내 생명, 내 안에 있는 당신의 생명,

lines.en: Makes heav'n for ever mine.

title_en: I’ve Found a Friend, O Such a Friend!

lines.en: I've found a Friend, O such a Friend!
lines.ko: 주 예수 내가 아기 전 날 먼저 사랑했네
lines.id: Saya telah menemukan seorang Teman, oh, seorang Teman yang hebat!

lines.en: He loved me ere I knew him;
lines.ko: 그 크신 사랑 나타나 내 영혼 거듭났네
lines.id: Dia mengasihiku sebelum aku mengenal-Nya

lines.en: He drew me with the cords of love,
lines.ko: 주 내 맘에 늘 계시고 나 주의 안에 있어
lines.id: Dia menarikku dengan tali cinta,

lines.en: And thus he bound me to him;
lines.ko: 저 포도 비유 같으니 참 좋은 나의 친구
lines.id: Dan demikianlah Dia mengikatku pada-Nya.

lines.en: And round my heart still closely twine
lines.id: Dan di sekeliling hatiku masih terjalin erat

lines.en: Those ties which nought can sever,
lines.id: Ikatan yang tidak dapat diputuskan oleh siapa pun

lines.en: For I am his, and he is mine,
lines.id: Karena aku adalah Dia, dan Dia milikku,

lines.en: For ever and for ever.
lines.id: Selama-lamanya dan selamanya.

lines.en: I've found a Friend, O such a Friend!
lines.ko: 내 친구 되신 예수님 날 구원 하시려고
lines.id: Saya telah menemukan seorang Teman, oh, seorang Teman yang hebat!

lines.en: He bled, he died to save me;
lines.ko: 그 귀한 몸을 버리사 내 죄를 대속했네
lines.id: Dia mati untuk menyelamatkanku

lines.en: And not alone the gift of life,
lines.ko: 나 주님을 늘 믿으며 그 손을 의지하고
lines.id: Dan bukan satu-satunya anugerah kehidupan,

lines.en: But his own self he gave me!
lines.ko: 내 몸과 맘을 바쳐서 끝까지 충성하리
lines.id: Tapi dirinya sendiri Dia berikan padaku.

lines.en: Nought that I have mine own I'll call,
lines.id: Tidak ada yang saya punya sendiri, saya menelepon

lines.en: I'll hold it for the Giver,
lines.id: Aku menyimpannya untuk Sang Pemberi.

lines.en: My heart, my strength, my life, my all
lines.id: Hatiku, kekuatanku, hidupku, segalanya bagiku

lines.en: Are his, and his for ever.
lines.id: Milik-Nya, dan milik-Nya selama-lamanya.

lines.en: I've found a Friend, O such a Friend!
lines.ko: 내 진실하신 친구여 큰 은혜 내려주사
lines.id: Saya telah menemukan seorang Teman, oh, seorang Teman yang hebat!

lines.en: All pow'r to him is given,
lines.ko: 날 항상 보호 하시고 내 방패 되옵소서
lines.id: Begitu baik, jujur, dan lembut,

lines.en: To guard me on my onward course,
lines.ko: 그 풍성한 참 사랑을 뉘 능히 끊을 쏘냐
lines.id: Begitu bijaknya seorang Penasihat dan Pemandu,

lines.en: And bring me safe to heaven:
lines.ko: 날 구원하신 예수는 참 좋은 나의 친구
lines.id: Jadi, mungkin kamu seorang Pembela!

lines.en: Eternal glory gleams afar,
lines.id: Dari Dia yang sangat mencintaiku sekarang

lines.en: To nerve my faint endeavor:
lines.id: Kekuatan apa yang bisa diputus oleh jiwaku

lines.en: So now to watch, to work, to war;
lines.id: Apakah hidup atau mati, atau bumi atau neraka

lines.en: And then to rest for ever.
lines.id: Tidak! Aku milik-Nya selamanya.

lines.en: I've found a Friend, O such a Friend!
So kind and true and tender,
So wise a Counselor and Guide,
So mighty a Defender!
From him who loves me now so well
What pow'r my soul can sever?
Shall life or death, shall earth or hell?
No! I am his for ever.

title_en: Christ, of All My Hopes the Ground

lines.en: Christ, of all my hopes the ground,
lines.ko: 그리스도여, 나의 모든 소망 가운데 땅이여,

lines.en: Christ, the spring of all my joy,
Still in thee may I be found,
lines.ko: 여전히 당신 안에서 나를 찾을 수 있게 하소서.

lines.en: Still for thee my pow'rs employ.
lines.ko: 아직도 당신을 위해 내 힘이 고용되어 있습니다.

lines.en: Let thy love my heart inflame;
lines.ko: 당신의 사랑으로 내 마음이 불타오르게 해주세요.

lines.en: Keep thy fear before my sight;
Be thy praise my highest aim;
lines.ko: 당신의 찬양이 나의 최고의 목표가 되십시오.

lines.en: Be thy smile my chief delight.
lines.ko: 당신의 미소가 나의 최고의 기쁨이 되어주세요.

lines.en: Fountain of o'erflowing grace,
Freely from thy fullness give;
Till I close my earthly race,
May I prove it "Christ to live."
Firmly trusting in thy blood,
Nothing shall my heart confound;
lines.ko: 아무것도 내 마음에 혼란을 주지 않을 것입니다.

lines.en: Safely I shall pass the flood,
Safely reach Immanuel's ground.
Thus, O thus, an entrance give
To the land of cloudless sky;
Having known it "Christ to live,"
Let me know it "gain to die."

title_en: Fountain of Never-Ceasing Grace

lines.en: Fountain of never-ceasing grace,
Thy saints' exhaustless theme,
Great object of immortal praise,
Essentially supreme;
We bless thee for the glorious fruits
Thine incarnation gives;
The righteousness which grace imputes,
And faith alone receives.
In thee we have a righteousness
By God himself approved;
Our rock, our sure foundation this,
lines.ko: 우리의 반석, 우리의 확실한 기초 이것이니

lines.en: Which never can be moved.
Our ransom by thy death was paid,
For all thy people giv'n,
The law thou perfectly obeyed,
That they might enter heav'n.
lines.ko: 그들이 천국에 들어갈 수도 있다는 것입니다.

lines.en: As all, when Adam sinned alone,
lines.ko: 마찬가지로, 아담이 홀로 죄를 지었을 때,

lines.en: In his transgression died,
So by the righteousness of one
Are sinners justified;
We to thy merit, gracious Lord,
With humblest joy submit,
Again to Paradise restored,
In thee alone complete.

title_en: Jesus, Thy Blood and Righteousness

lines.en: Jesus, thy blood and righteousness
My beauty are, my glorious dress;
'Midst flaming worlds, in these arrayed,
With joy shall I lift up my head.
Bold shall I stand in thy great day;
lines.ko: 주의 큰 날에 내가 담대히 서리라.

lines.en: For who aught to my charge shall lay?
Fully absolved through these I am
From sin and fear, from guilt and shame.
When from the dust of death I rise
To claim my mansion in the skies,
lines.ko: 하늘에 있는 나의 저택을 차지하기 위해,

lines.en: Ev'n then this shall be all my plea,
lines.ko: 그럼에도 불구하고 이것이 나의 모든 간청이 될 것입니다.

lines.en: Jesus hath lived, hath died, for me.
Jesus, be endless praise to thee,
Whose boundless mercy hath for me
For me a full atonement made,
An everlasting ransom paid.
O let the dead now hear thy voice;
lines.ko: 오 이제 죽은 자들이 주의 음성을 듣게 하소서.

lines.en: Now bid thy banished ones rejoice;
lines.ko: 이제 당신의 추방된 자들에게 기뻐하라고 명하십시오.

lines.en: Their beauty this, their glorious dress,
lines.ko: 그들의 아름다움은 이렇고, 그들의 영광스러운 옷은 이렇습니다.

lines.en: Jesus, thy blood and righteousness.

title_en: My Hope Is Built on Nothing Less

lines.ko: 이 몸의 소망 무언가 우리 주 예수 뿐일세
lines.en: My hope is built on noth-ing less Than
lines.id: Harapanku dibangun di atas dasar yang tidak kurang dari itu

lines.ko: 우리 주 예수 밖에는 믿을 이 아주 없도다
lines.en: Je-sus' blood and right-eous-ness
lines.id: Darah dan kebenaran Yesus

lines.en: I dare not trust the sweet-est frame,
lines.id: Saya tidak berani mempercayai bingkai termanis,

lines.ko: 그 위에 내가 서리라 그 위에 내가 서리라
lines.en: But whol-ly lean on Je-sus' name.
lines.id: Namun bersandar sepenuhnya pada nama Yesus.

lines.en: On Christ, the sol-id Rock, I stand
lines.id: Di atas Kristus, Batu Karang yang kokoh, aku berdiri

lines.en: All oth-er ground is sink-ing sand,
lines.id: Semua tanah lainnya adalah pasir yang tenggelam,

lines.en: All oth-er ground is sink-ing sand.
lines.id: Tanah lainnya hanyalah pasir yang tenggelam.

lines.ko: 무섭게 바람 부는 밤 물결이 높이 설렐 때
lines.en: When dark-ness veils His love-ly face,
lines.id: Saat kegelapan menutupi wajah manis-Nya,

lines.ko: 우리 주 크신 은혜에 소망의 닻을 주리라
lines.en: I rest on His un-chang-ing grace
lines.id: Aku bersandar pada kasih karunia-Nya yang tidak berubah

lines.en: In ev-ery high and storm-y gale,
lines.id: Di setiap badai dan badai yang tinggi,

lines.ko: 그 위에 내가 서리라 그 위에 내가 서리라
lines.en: My an-chor holds with-in the veil.
lines.id: Jangkarku tertahan di dalam tabir.

lines.en: On Christ, the sol-id Rock, I stand
lines.id: Di atas Kristus, Batu Karang yang kokoh, aku berdiri

lines.en: All oth-er ground is sink-ing sand,
lines.id: Semua tanah lainnya adalah pasir yang tenggelam,

lines.en: All oth-er ground is sink-ing sand.
lines.id: Tanah lainnya hanyalah pasir yang tenggelam.

lines.ko: 세상에 믿던 모든 것 끊어질 그 날 되어도
lines.en: His otath, His cov-e-nant, His blood,
lines.id: Otath-Nya, perjanjian-Nya, darah-Nya,

lines.ko: 구주의 언약 믿사와 내 소망 더욱 크리라
lines.en: Sup-port me in the whelm-ing flood
lines.id: Dukunglah aku di tengah banjir besar

lines.en: When all a-round my soul gives way
lines.id: Ketika seluruh jiwaku menyerah

lines.ko: 그 위에 내가 서리라 그 위에 내가 서리라
lines.en: He then is all my hope and stay.
lines.id: Dia kemudian menjadi harapan dan tempat tinggalku.

lines.en: On Christ, the sol-id Rock, I stand
lines.id: Di atas Kristus, Batu Karang yang kokoh, aku berdiri

lines.en: All oth-er ground is sink-ing sand,
lines.id: Semua tanah lainnya adalah pasir yang tenggelam,

lines.en: All oth-er ground is sink-ing sand.
lines.id: Tanah lainnya hanyalah pasir yang tenggelam.

lines.ko: 바라던 천국 올라가 하나님 앞에 뵈올 때
lines.en: When He shall come with trumpet sound,
lines.id: Ketika Dia datang dengan bunyi terompet,

lines.ko: 구주의 의를 힘입어 어엿이 바로 서리라
lines.en: Oh, may I then in Him be found,
lines.id: Oh, semoga aku ditemukan di dalam Dia,

lines.en: Dressed in His right-eous-ness a-lone,
lines.id: Mengenakan kebenaran-Nya sendirian,

lines.ko: 그 위에 내가 서리라 그 위에 내가 서리라
lines.en: Fault-less to stand be-fore the throne.
lines.id: Tanpa kesalahan untuk berdiri di depan takhta.

lines.en: On Christ, the sol-id Rock, I stand
lines.id: Di atas Kristus, Batu Karang yang kokoh, aku berdiri

lines.en: All oth-er ground is sink-ing sand,
lines.id: Semua tanah lainnya adalah pasir yang tenggelam,

lines.en: All oth-er ground is sink-ing sand.
lines.id: Tanah lainnya hanyalah pasir yang tenggelam.

title_id: Harapanku Dibangun di Atas Dasar Yang Kurang

title_en: My Hope Is in the Lord

lines.en: [English lyrics not available in the database for this revised hymn]
lines.ko: [이 개정된 찬송가의 데이터베이스에는 영어 가사가 없습니다.]

title_en: Thy Works, Not Mine, O Christ
title_ko: 오 그리스도여, 나의 일은 아니고 당신의 일입니다 (자체번역)

lines.en: Thy works, not mine, O Christ,
lines.ko: 오 그리스도여, 나의 일이 아니라 당신의 일입니다.

lines.en: Speak gladness to this heart;
They tell me all is done;
lines.ko: 그들은 나에게 모든 것이 끝났다고 말합니다.

lines.en: They bid my fear depart.
To whom, save thee,
Who canst alone
For sin atone,
Lord, shall I flee?
Thy pains, not mine, O Christ,
lines.ko: 나의 고통이 아닌 당신의 고통, 오 그리스도여,

lines.en: Upon the shameful tree,
Have paid the law's full price
And purchased peace for me.
Thy cross, not mine, O Christ,
lines.ko: 나의 십자가가 아닌 당신의 십자가, 오 그리스도여,

lines.en: Has borne the awful load
Of sins that none in heav'n
Or earth could bear but God.
lines.ko: 아니면 땅은 하나님 외에는 견딜 수 없습니다.

lines.en: Thy righteousness, O Christ,
Alone can cover me:
No righteousness avails
Save that which is of thee.

title_en: A Child of the King

lines.en: [English lyrics not available in the database for this revised hymn]
lines.ko: [이 개정된 찬송가의 데이터베이스에는 영어 가사가 없습니다.]

title_en: Blessed Are the Sons of God

lines.en: Blessed are the sons of God,
They are bought with Christ's own blood;
lines.ko: 그들은 그리스도 자신의 피로 산 바 되었습니다.

lines.en: They are ransomed from the grave,
Life eternal they shall have:
With them numbered may we be,
Here and in eternity.
They are justified by grace,
They enjoy the Saviour's peace;
All their sins are washed away,
They shall stand in God's great day:
lines.ko: 그들은 하나님의 큰 날에 설 것입니다.

lines.en: They are lights upon the earth,
Children of a heav'nly birth;
One with God, with Jesus one,
Glory is in them begun:

title_en: The Beatitudes

lines.en: [English lyrics not available in the database for this revised hymn]
lines.ko: [이 개정된 찬송가의 데이터베이스에는 영어 가사가 없습니다.]

title_en: My Faith Looks Up to Thee

lines.en: My faith looks up to thee,
lines.ko: 못 박혀 죽으신 하나님 어린양 믿습니다
lines.id: Imanku tertuju pada-Mu,

lines.en: Thou Lamb of Calvary,
lines.ko: 죄 속함 받고서 이 몸과 맘 드려 간절히 빌 때에 들으소서
lines.id: Engkau Anak Domba Cal-va-ry, Juruselamat Ilahi kami:

lines.en: Saviour Divine;
lines.id: Sekarang dengarkan aku saat aku berdoa, Singkirkan semua rasa bersalahku,

lines.en: Now hear me while I pray,
lines.id: O izinkan aku mulai hari ini menjadi milik-Mu seutuhnya.

lines.en: Take all my guilt away,
O let me from this day
Be wholly thine.
May thy rich grace impart
lines.ko: 풍성한 은혜로 약한 맘 도우사 열심주고
lines.id: Semoga rahmat-Mu yang berlimpah turut serta

lines.en: Strength to my fainting heart,
lines.ko: 날 대속 했으니 주 사랑하는 맘 불같이 뜨겁게 하옵소서
lines.id: Kekuatan bagi hatiku yang lemah, Semangatku menginspirasi

lines.en: My zeal inspire;
lines.id: Sebagaimana Engkau telah mati untukku, ya semoga cintaku kepadaMu

lines.en: As thou hast died for me,
lines.id: Murni, hangat, dan tak berubah, Api yang hidup.

lines.en: O may my love to thee
Pure, warm and changeless be,
A living fire.
While life's dark maze I tread,
lines.ko: 이 세상 어두워 길 찾지 못하니 인도하사
lines.id: Sementara labirin gelap kehidupan aku injak,

lines.en: And griefs around me spread,
lines.ko: 내 슬픈 눈물을 다 씻어 주시고 그 밝은 빛으로 이끄소서
lines.id: Dan dukacita menyebar ke sekelilingku, Jadilah Engkau pembimbingku

lines.en: Be thou my guide;
lines.id: Tawarkan kegelapan berganti hari, Hapuslah air mata kesedihan,

lines.en: Bid darkness turn to day,
lines.id: Jangan biarkan aku menyimpang dariMu.

lines.en: Wipe sorrow's tears away,
Nor let me ever stray
From thee aside.
When ends life's transient dream,
lines.ko: 내 생명 꿈같이 이 세상 떠날 때 부르시고
lines.id: Ketika mimpi hidup yang sementara berakhir,

lines.en: When death's cold, sullen stream
lines.ko: 사랑을 베푸사 평안케 하시며 영생을 누리게 하옵소서 아멘
lines.id: Saat kematian mengalir dingin dan suram, Maukah aku berguling

lines.en: Shall o'er me roll,
lines.id: Maka, Juruselamat yang Terberkati, dalam cinta, Ketakutan dan ketidakpercayaan kembali hilang

lines.en: Blest Saviour, then, in love,
lines.id: O, berikan aku Sage a-bobe, Jiwa yang tertebus! Amin.

lines.en: Fear and distrust remove;
O bear me safe above,
A ransomed soul.

title_en: Love Divine, All Loves Excelling

lines.en: Love Divine, all loves excelling,
lines.id: Cinta ilahi, semua cinta ex-cel-ling,

lines.ko: 우리 맘에 항상 계셔 온전하게 하소서
lines.id: Kegembiraan surga, turun ke bumi!

lines.ko: 우리 주는 자비하사 사랑 무한 하시니
lines.id: Perbaiki dalam diri kami tempat tinggal-Mu yang sederhana
Segala kemurahan-Mu yang setia dimahkotai.
Ya Tuhan, Engkau penuh belas kasihan
Kasih-Mu yang murni dan tak terbatas.
Kunjungi kami dengan keselamatan-Mu
Masuki setiap hati yang gemetar.

lines.en: Joy of heav'n, to earth come down:
lines.id: Bernafaslah, oh, hiruplah Roh kasih-Mu

lines.ko: 복과 은혜 사랑 받아 평안하게 하소서
lines.id: Dalam setiap payudara yang bermasalah!

lines.ko: 첨과 끝이 되신 주님 항상 인도 하셔서
lines.id: Marilah kita semua di dalam Engkau di dalam dirinya

lines.ko: 마귀 유혹 받는 것을 속히 끊게 하소서
lines.id: Mari kita temukan istirahat kedua itu.
Hilangkan kecenderungan kita untuk berbuat dosa
Al-pha dan O-me-ga menjadi.
Akhir dari iman, sebagai Permulaannya,
Tetapkan hati kami pada kebebasan.

lines.en: Fix in us thy humble dwelling,
lines.id: Ayo, Yang Maha Kuasa, ke De-liver-er
Biarlah kami menerima kembali seluruh hidup-Mu.

lines.ko: 주께 영광 항상 돌려 천사처럼 섬기며
lines.id: Tiba-tiba kembali, dan tidak pernah,
Bait-Mu tidak akan pernah lagi pergi.
Kepadamu kami akan selalu memberkati,
Layani Engkau sebagai tuan rumah-Mu di atas,
Berdoalah dan pujilah Engkau tanpa henti,
Kemuliaan dalam kasih-Mu yang sempurna.

lines.en: All thy faithful mercies crown:
lines.id: Selesaikanlah ciptaan-Mu yang baru

lines.ko: 주의 크신 구원 받아 온전하게 하소서
lines.id: Biarlah kita menjadi murni dan tanpa noda.
Marilah kami mengarungi keselamatan-Mu yang besar,

lines.ko: 크신 사랑 감격하여 경배하게 하소서 아멘
lines.id: Tersimpan kembali secara sempurna pada-Mu:
Berubah dari kemuliaan ke dalam kemuliaan,
Sampai di surga kita mengambil tempat kita,
Sampai kami melemparkan mahkota kami ke hadapan-Mu,
Tersesat dalam keajaiban, cinta, dan pujian. Amin.

lines.en: Jesus, thou art all compassion,
Pure, unbounded love thou art;
Visit us with thy salvation,
Enter ev'ry trembling heart.
Breathe, O breathe thy loving Spirit
Into ev'ry troubled breast;
Let us all in thee inherit,
Let us find the promised rest:
Take away the love of sinning;
Alpha and Omega be;
End of faith, as its Beginning,
Set our hearts at liberty.
Come, Almighty to deliver,
Let us all thy life receive;
Suddenly return, and never,
Never more thy temples leave.
Thee we would be always blessing,
Serve thee as thy hosts above,
Pray, and praise thee, without ceasing,
Glory in thy perfect love.
Finish, then, thy new creation;
Pure and spotless let us be:
Let us see thy great salvation
Perfectly restored in thee;
Changed from glory into glory,
Till in heav'n we take our place,
Till we cast our crowns before thee,
Lost in wonder, love and praise.

alt_titles: Love Divine, all loves excelling (tune 2)

title_en: Savior, Blessed Savior

lines.en: [English lyrics not available in the database for this revised hymn]
lines.ko: [이 개정된 찬송가의 데이터베이스에는 영어 가사가 없습니다.]

title_en: Teach Me, O Lord, Thy Holy Way
title_ko: 여호와여 주의 거룩한 도를 내게 가르치소서 (자체번역)

lines.en: Teach me, O Lord, thy holy way
lines.ko: 여호와여 주의 거룩한 도를 내게 가르치소서

lines.en: And give me an obedient mind;
That in thy service I may find
lines.ko: 당신을 섬기는 일에서 내가 찾을 수 있는 것은

lines.en: My soul's delight from day to day.
Guide me, O Saviour, with thy hand,
lines.ko: 오 구세주여, 주의 손으로 나를 인도하소서.

lines.en: And so control my thoughts and deeds,
That I may tread the path which leads
lines.ko: 내가 인도하는 길을 밟을 수 있도록

lines.en: Right onward to the blessed land.
lines.ko: 바로 축복받은 땅을 향해 나아가는 것입니다.

lines.en: Help me, O Saviour, here to trace
lines.ko: 오 구세주여, 저를 도와주세요. 여기 추적하러 왔습니다

lines.en: The sacred footsteps thou hast trod;
And, meekly walking with my God,
To grow in goodness, truth, and grace.
Guard me, O Lord, that I may ne'er
Forsake the right, or do the wrong:
lines.ko: 옳은 것을 버리거나, 나쁜 일을 하십시오:

lines.en: Against temptation make me strong,
And round me spread thy shelt'ring care.
lines.ko: 그리고 내 주위에 당신의 피난처를 돌보아 주십시오.

lines.en: Bless me in ev'ry task, O Lord,
lines.ko: 오 주님, 모든 일에 저를 축복해 주십시오.

lines.en: Begun, continued, done for thee:
Fulfil thy perfect work in me;
lines.ko: 내 안에서 당신의 완전한 일을 이루어 주십시오.

lines.en: And thine abounding grace afford.
lines.ko: 그리고 당신의 풍성한 은혜가 감당할 수 있습니다.

title_en: I Am Thine, O Lord, I Have Heard They Voice
title_ko: 오 주님, 나는 당신의 것입니다. 나는 그들의 목소리를 들었습니다. (자체번역)

lines.en: [English lyrics not available in the database for this revised hymn]
lines.ko: [이 개정된 찬송가의 데이터베이스에는 영어 가사가 없습니다.]

title_en: O For a Closer Walk with God
title_ko: O 하나님과 더 가까이 동행하기 위해 (자체번역)

lines.en: [English lyrics not available in the database for this revised hymn]
lines.ko: [이 개정된 찬송가의 데이터베이스에는 영어 가사가 없습니다.]

title_en: O the Deep, Deep Love of Jesus!

lines.en: O the deep, deep love of Jesus!
Vast, unmeasured, boundless, free;
lines.ko: 광대하고 측량할 수 없으며 끝이 없고 자유롭다.

lines.en: Rolling as a mighty ocean
In its fullness over me.
Underneath me, all around me,
lines.ko: 내 아래, 내 주변의 모든 것,

lines.en: Is the current of thy love;
Leading onward, leading homeward,
To thy glorious rest above.
O the deep, deep love of Jesus!
Spread his praise from shore to shore;
lines.ko: 그분을 찬양하는 마음을 이 해안에서 저 해안으로 퍼뜨리십시오.

lines.en: How he loveth, ever loveth,
Changeth never, nevermore;
How he watches o'er his loved ones,
Died to call them all his own;
lines.ko: 그것들을 모두 자기 것이라고 부르기 위해 죽으셨습니다.

lines.en: How for them he intercedeth,
Watcheth o'er them from the throne.
O the deep, deep love of Jesus!
Love of ev'ry love the best:
'Tis an ocean vast of blessing,
'Tis a haven sweet of rest.
O the deep, deep love of Jesus!
'Tis a heav'n of heav'ns to me;
And it lifts me up to glory,
For it lifts me up to thee.

title_en: Searcher of Hearts, from Mine Erase

lines.en: Searcher of hearts, from mine erase,
lines.ko: 마음을 찾는 자, 내 마음을 지우고,

lines.en: All thoughts that should not be,
And in its deep recesses trace
lines.ko: 그리고 그 깊은 오목한 부분에는 흔적이 남아 있습니다.

lines.en: My gratitude to thee.
Hearer of prayer, O guide aright
lines.ko: 기도를 들으시는 분, 오 올바른 인도자이시여

lines.en: Each word and deed of mine;
Life's battle teach me how to fight,
lines.ko: 인생의 전투는 나에게 싸우는 법을 가르쳐 주었고,

lines.en: And be the vict'ry thine.
Giver of allfor ev'ry good
lines.ko: 모든 사람의 선을 위해 모든 것을 주시는 분

lines.en: In the Redeemer came
For raiment, shelter, and for food,
I thank thee in his Name.
Father and Son and Holy Ghost,
Thou glorious Three in One,
Thou knowest best what I need most,
lines.ko: 나에게 가장 필요한 것이 무엇인지 당신이 가장 잘 아십니다.

lines.en: And let thy will be done.

title_en: Take Time to Be Holy

lines.en: Take time to be holy,
lines.id: Luangkan waktu untuk menjadi suci, Sering-seringlah berbicara dengan Tuhan

lines.en: Speak oft with thy Lord;
lines.id: Tinggallah di dalam Dia selalu, Dan makanlah Firman-Nya.

lines.en: Abide in him always,
lines.id: Bertemanlah dengan anak-anak Tuhan. Bantulah mereka yang lemah,

lines.en: And feed on his Word.
lines.id: Tidak melupakan apa pun untuk mencari berkat-Nya.

lines.en: Make friends of God's children;
Help those who are weak;
Forgetting in nothing
His blessing to seek.
Take time to be holy,
lines.ko: 너 성결키 위해 네 머리 숙여
lines.id: Luangkan waktu untuk menjadi suci, Dunia terus berjalan

lines.en: The world rushes on;
lines.ko: 저 은밀히 계신 네 주께 빌라
lines.id: Habiskan banyak waktu secara rahasia Bersama Yesus sendirian.

lines.en: Spend much time in secret
lines.id: Dengan memandang kepada Yesus, kamu akan menjadi seperti Dia

lines.en: With Jesus alone.
lines.ko: 널 보는 이 마다 주 생각하리
lines.id: Teman-temanmu dalam tingkah lakumu akan terlihat kemiripannya.

lines.en: By looking to Jesus,
Like him thou shalt be;
Thy friends in thy conduct
His likeness shall see.
Take time to be holy,
lines.id: Luangkan waktu untuk menjadi suci, Biarkan Dia menjadi Pembimbingmu

lines.en: Let him be thy guide,
lines.id: Dan jangan lari di hadapan-Nya, apa pun yang terjadi.

lines.en: And run not before him,
lines.ko: 참 즐거울 때나 또 슬플 때나
lines.id: Dalam suka maupun duka, Tetaplah mengikuti Tuhanmu

lines.en: Whatever betide;
lines.id: Dan, sambil memandang kepada Yesus, Tetap percaya pada Firman-Nya.

lines.en: In joy or in sorrow,
Still follow thy Lord,
And, looking to Jesus,
Still trust in his Word.
Take time to be holy,
lines.id: Luangkan waktu untuk menjadi suci, Tenanglah jiwamu

lines.en: Be calm in thy soul;
lines.id: Setiap pemikiran dan setiap motif berada di bawah kendali-Nya

lines.en: Each thought and each motive
lines.ko: 너 성령을 받아 주 섬겨 살면
lines.id: Demikianlah dipimpin oleh Roh-Nya Ke sumber air cinta,

lines.en: Beneath his control;
lines.ko: 저 천국에 가서 더 잘 섬기리
lines.id: Anda akan segera cocok untuk layanan di atas.

lines.en: Thus led by his Spirit
To fountains of love,
Thou soon shalt be fitted
For service above.

title_en: More about Jesus Would I Know

lines.en: More about Jesus would I know,
lines.id: Aku akan menjadi lebih mirip Yesus,

lines.en: More of his grace to others show,
lines.id: Biarkan penyelamatku tinggal di dalam diriku

lines.en: More of his saving fullness see,
lines.ko: 대속해 주신 사랑을 간절히 알기 원하네
lines.id: Isi jiwaku dengan kedamaian dan cinta,

lines.en: More of his love who died for me.
lines.ko: 내 평생의 소원 내 평생의 소원
lines.id: Jadikan aku lembut seperti merpati

lines.ko: 대속해 주신 사랑을 간절히 알기 원하네
lines.id: Lebih seperti Yesus, saat aku pergi,
Peziarah di dunia ini rendahan
Miskin dalam semangat-saya akan menjadi,
Biarkan Juruselamatku tinggal di dalam diriku.

lines.en: More, more about Jesus,
lines.id: Jika Dia mendengar tangisan burung gagak.

lines.en: More, more about Jesus,
lines.id: Jika mata-Nya selalu waspada

lines.en: More of his saving fullness see,
lines.ko: 거룩한 뜻을 깨달아 예수를 알게 하소서
lines.id: Menandai burung pipit ketika terjatuh,

lines.en: More of his love who died for me.
lines.ko: 내 평생의 소원 내 평생의 소원
lines.id: Pasti Dia akan mendengar seruanku.

lines.ko: 대속해 주신 사랑을 간절히 알기 원하네
lines.id: Dia akan mengajariku cara hidup,
Maafkan semua pikiranku yang penuh dosa
Murni dalam hati aku akan tetap seperti itu,
Biarkan Juruselamatku tinggal di dalam diriku.

lines.en: More about Jesus let me learn,
lines.id: Lebih mirip Yesus ketika saya berdoa,

lines.en: More of his holy will discern;
lines.id: Lebih seperti Yesus hari demi hari

lines.en: Spirit of God, my teacher be,
lines.ko: 그 말씀 한 절 한 절이 내 맘에 교훈 되도다
lines.id: Bolehkah aku mengistirahatkanku di sisi-Nya,

lines.en: Showing the things of Christ to me.
lines.ko: 내 평생의 소원 내 평생의 소원
lines.id: Dimana air tenang mengalir,

lines.ko: 대속해 주신 사랑을 간절히 알기 원하네
lines.id: Lahir dari Dia, melalui kasih karunia diperbarui,
Oleh kasih-Nya kehendakku ditundukkan,
Aku akan tetap kaya dalam iman,
Biarkan Juruselamatku tinggal di dalam diriku.

lines.en: More about Jesus in his Word,
lines.id: Tahta tempat Yesus duduk

lines.en: Holding communion with my Lord;
lines.id: Dikelilingi oleh kemuliaan

lines.en: Hearing his voice in ev'ry line,
lines.ko: 평화의 왕이 오시니 그 나라 왕성 하도다
lines.id: Pangeran Damai telah datang, dan kerajaannya makmur.

lines.en: Making each faithful saying mine.
lines.ko: 내 평생의 소원 내 평생의 소원
lines.id: Harapan seumur hidupku Keinginan seumur hidupku

lines.ko: 대속해 주신 사랑을 간절히 알기 원하네
lines.id: Saya sangat ingin mengetahui cinta yang menebus saya

lines.en: More about Jesus on his throne,
Riches in glory all his own;
More of his kingdom's sure increase;
More of his coming, Prince of Peace.

alt_titles: More, more about Jesus
title_id: Lebih Banyak Tentang Yesus Yang Akan Saya Ketahui

title_en: Jerusalem the Golden

lines.en: Jerusalem the golden,
With milk and honey blest,
Beneath thy contemplation
Sink heart and voice oppressed.
I know not, O I know not,
What joys await us there;
lines.ko: 그곳에서는 어떤 기쁨이 우리를 기다리고 있습니까?

lines.en: What radiancy of glory,
What bliss beyond compare.
lines.ko: 비교할 수 없을 만큼 큰 행복입니다.

lines.en: They stand, those halls of Zion,
All jubilant with song,
And bright with many an angel,
And all the martyr throng.
The Prince is ever in them,
The daylight is serene;
The pastures of the blessed
Are decked in glorious sheen.
There is the throne of David;
And there, from care released,
The song of them that triumph,
The shout of them that feast;
And they who with their Leader
lines.ko: 그리고 그들의 지도자와 함께 있는 사람들은

lines.en: Have conquered in the fight,
For ever and for ever
Are clad in robes of white.
O sweet and blessed country,
The home of God's elect!
O sweet and blessed country,
That eager hearts expect!
Jesus, in mercy bring us
To that dear land of rest;
Who art, with God the Father
And Spirit, ever blest.

title_en: A Few More Years Shall Roll
title_ko: 앞으로 몇 년이 더 지나야 할 것입니다 (자체번역)

lines.en: A few more years shall roll,
lines.ko: 앞으로 몇 년은 더 굴러갈 것이다.

lines.en: A few more seasons come,
And we shall be with those that rest
lines.ko: 그리고 우리는 쉬는 이들과 함께 있을 것이다

lines.en: Asleep within the tomb:
Then, O my Lord, prepare
My soul for that great day;
lines.ko: 그 위대한 날을 위한 내 영혼;

lines.en: O wash me in thy precious blood,
lines.ko: 오, 당신의 보혈로 나를 씻어 주소서.

lines.en: And take my sins away.
A few more storms shall beat
lines.ko: 폭풍이 몇 번 더 닥칠 것이다

lines.en: On this wild rocky shore,
And we shall be where tempests cease,
lines.ko: 그러면 우리는 폭풍우가 그치는 곳에 있게 될 것입니다.

lines.en: And surges swell no more:
lines.ko: 그리고 파도가 더 이상 커지지 않습니다.

lines.en: Then, O my Lord, prepare
My soul for that calm day;
lines.ko: 그 평온한 날을 위한 내 영혼;

lines.en: A few more sabbaths here
lines.ko: 여기에 안식일이 몇 번 더 있습니다

lines.en: Shall cheer us on our way,
And we shall reach the endless rest,
lines.ko: 그리고 우리는 끝없는 안식에 도달할 것입니다.

lines.en: Th'eternal sabbath day:
Then, O my Lord, prepare
My soul for that sweet day;
lines.ko: 그 달콤한 날을 위한 내 영혼;

lines.en: 'Tis but a little while,
And he shall come again
Who died that we might live, who lives
lines.ko: 우리를 살게 하려고 죽으신 분, 살아 계신 분

lines.en: That we with him may reign:
Then, O my Lord, prepare
My soul for that glad day;
lines.ko: 그 기쁜 날을 위한 내 영혼;

title_en: When the Roll Is Called Up Yonder

lines.en: When the trumpet of the Lord shall sound, and time shall be no more,
lines.id: Apa yang akan dilakukan oleh hewan peliharaan Tuhan
suara dan waktu tidak akan ada lagi,

lines.ko: 천사들을 세계 만국 모든 곳에 보내어
lines.id: Dan istirahat pagi, e-
ter-nal, bawa dan adil

lines.ko: 나팔 불 때 나의 이름 나팔 불 때 나의 이름
lines.id: Saat orang-orang yang diselamatkan di bumi akan berkumpul

lines.ko: 나팔 불 때 나의 이름 부를 때에 잔치 참여 하겠네
lines.id: di seberang pantai seberang,
Dan gulungan itu dipanggil ke sana,
Saya akan berada di sana
Saat gulungan dipanggil ke sana,
Saat gulungan dipanggil ke sana,
Saat gulungan dipanggil ke sana,
Ketika daftar itu dipanggil ke sana, saya akan berada di sana.

lines.en: And the morning breaks, eternal, bright and fair;
lines.ko: 무덤 속에 잠자던 자 그 때 다시 일어나
lines.id: Di pagi yang cerah dan tanpa awan itu
ketika orang-orang mati di dalam Kristus Akan bangkit,

lines.ko: 주가 택한 모든 성도 구름타고 올라가
lines.id: Dan kemuliaan-Nya
bagian res-ur-rec-tion

lines.ko: 나팔 불 때 나의 이름 나팔 불 때 나의 이름
lines.id: Ketika orang-orang pilihan-Nya akan berkumpul

lines.ko: 나팔 불 때 나의 이름 부를 때에 잔치 참여 하겠네
lines.id: ke rumah mereka di luar angkasa,
Dan gulungan itu dipanggil ke sana,
Saya akan berada di sana
Saat gulungan dipanggil ke sana,
Saat gulungan dipanggil ke sana,
Saat gulungan dipanggil ke sana,
Ketika daftar itu dipanggil ke sana, saya akan berada di sana.

lines.en: When the saved of earth shall gather over on the other shore,
lines.ko: 주님 다시 오실 날을 우리 알 수 없으니
lines.id: Mari kita bekerja demi Sang Guru
dari fajar terbenamnya matahari,
Mari kita bicara tentang semua milik-Nya
cinta dan perhatian yang luar biasa

lines.ko: 나팔 불 때 나의 이름 나팔 불 때 나의 이름
lines.id: Lalu ketika seluruh kehidupan telah berakhir,

lines.ko: 나팔 불 때 나의 이름 부를 때에 잔치 참여 하겠네
lines.id: dan pekerjaan kita di bumi telah selesai,
Dan gulungan itu dipanggil ke sana,
Saya akan berada di sana.
Saat gulungan dipanggil ke sana,
Saat gulungan dipanggil ke sana,
Saat gulungan dipanggil ke sana,
Ketika daftar itu dipanggil ke sana, saya akan berada di sana.

lines.en: And the roll is called up yonder, I'll be there.
When the roll is called up yonder,
When the roll is called up yonder,
When the roll is called up yonder,
When the roll is called up yonder, I'll be there.
On that bright and cloudless morning when the dead in Christ shall rise,
And the glory of his resurrection share;
When his chosen ones shall gather to their home beyond the skies,
And the roll is called up yonder, I'll be there.
Let us labor for the Master from the dawn till setting sun,
Let us talk of all his wondrous love and care;
Then when all of life is over, and our work on earth is done,
And the roll is called up yonder, I'll be there.

alt_titles: When the roll is called up yonder

title_en: Who Are These like Stars Appearing

lines.en: Who are these like stars appearing,
These before God's throne who stand?
lines.ko: 하나님의 보좌 앞에 서 있는 이 사람들은 누구입니까?

lines.en: Each a golden crown is wearing;
Who are all this glorious band?
Alleluia! hark, they sing,
Praising loud their heav'nly King.
lines.ko: 큰 소리로 그들의 하늘의 왕을 찬양합니다.

lines.en: Who are these of dazzling brightness,
These in God's own truth arrayed,
lines.ko: 이것들은 하나님 자신의 진리 안에 배열되어 있으며,

lines.en: Clad in robes of purest whiteness,
Robes whose lustre ne'er shall fade,
Ne'er be touched by time's rude hand?
lines.ko: 시간의 무례한 손에 닿을 수 없나요?

lines.en: Whence come all this glorious band?
lines.ko: 이 영광스러운 밴드는 모두 어디서 왔는가?

lines.en: These are they who have contended
For their Saviour's honor long,
Wrestling on till life was ended,
Foll'wing not the sinful throng;
These, who well the fight sustained,
Triumph through the Lamb have gained.
These are they whose hearts were riven,
Sore with woe and anguish tried,
Who in prayer full oft have striven
With the God they glorified;
Now, their painful conflict o'er,
God has bid them weep no more.
lines.ko: 하나님께서는 그들에게 더 이상 울지 말라고 명하셨습니다.

lines.en: These like priests have watched and waited,
Off'ring up to Christ their will;
Soul and body consecrated,
Day and night to serve him still:
Now in God's most holy place
Blest they stand before his face.
lines.ko: 그들이 그의 얼굴 앞에 서기를 축복합니다.

title_en: Around the Throne of God in Heaven

lines.en: Around the throne of God in heav'n
Thousands of children stand,
Children whose sins are all forgiv'n,
A holy, happy band,
Singing, "Glory, glory,
Glory be to God on high."
lines.ko: 높은 곳에 계신 하나님께 영광을 돌립니다."

lines.en: In flowing robes of spotless white
lines.ko: 티끌 하나 없는 하얀 옷을 입고

lines.en: See ev'ry one arrayed;
Dwelling in everlasting light
And joys that never fade,
What brought them to that world above,
lines.ko: 무엇이 그들을 저 위의 세계로 데려왔는지,

lines.en: That heav'n so bright and fair,
Where all is peace, and joy, and love;
lines.ko: 모든 것이 평화와 기쁨과 사랑이 있는 곳;

lines.en: How came those children there,
Because the Saviour shed his blood
To wash away their sin;
Bathed in that pure and precious flood,
Behold them white and clean,
On earth they sought the Saviour's grace,
On earth they loved his Name;
So now they see his blessed face,
lines.ko: 이제 그들은 그의 축복받은 얼굴을 봅니다.

lines.en: And stand before the Lamb,

alt_titles: Singing, Glory, glory, glory be to God on high

title_en: How Bright These Glorious Spirits Shine!
title_ko: 이 영광스러운 영들은 얼마나 밝게 빛나고 있는가! (자체번역)

lines.en: How bright these glorious spirits shine!
lines.ko: 이 영광스러운 영혼들은 얼마나 밝게 빛나고 있습니까!

lines.en: Whence all their white array?
lines.ko: 그 흰색 배열은 모두 어디서 왔습니까?

lines.en: How came they to the blissful seats
Of everlasting day?
Lo! these are they from sufferings great
lines.ko: 봐라! 이들은 큰 고통을 겪고 있는 사람들입니다

lines.en: Who came to realms of light!
And in the blood of Christ have washed
Those robes which shine so bright.
Now, with triumphal palms, they stand
lines.ko: 이제 그들은 승리의 손바닥을 들고 서 있습니다.

lines.en: Before the throne on high,
And serve the God they love, amidst
The glories of the sky.
His presence fills each heart with joy,
lines.ko: 그분의 현존은 각 사람의 마음을 기쁨으로 가득 채우고,

lines.en: Tunes ev'ry mouth to sing:
By day, by night, the sacred courts
With glad hosannas ring.
Hunger and thirst are felt no more,
lines.ko: 더 이상 배고픔과 목마름이 느껴지지 않고,

lines.en: Nor suns with scorching ray;
God is their Sun, whose cheering beams
lines.ko: 신은 그들의 태양이시며, 그의 환호하는 빛은

lines.en: Diffuse eternal day.
The Lamb which dwells amidst the throne
Shall o'er them still preside,
Feed them with nourishment divine,
And all their footsteps guide.
'Mong pastures green he'll lead his flock
lines.ko: 푸른 풀밭에서 그는 양 떼를 이끌 것이다

lines.en: Where living streams appear;
And God the Lord from ev'ry eye
lines.ko: 그리고 모든 사람의 눈으로 본 주 하나님

lines.en: Shall wipe off ev'ry tear.
To him who sits upon the throne,
The God whom we adore,
And to the Lamb that once was slain,
Be glory evermore!

title_en: When This Passing World Is Done

lines.en: When this passing world is done,
When has sunk yon glaring sun,
When we stand with Christ in glory,
lines.ko: 우리가 영광 가운데 그리스도와 함께 설 때,

lines.en: Looking o'er life's finished story,
Then, Lord, shall I fully know,
lines.ko: 그러면 주님, 제가 온전히 알게 될 것입니다.

lines.en: Not till then, how much I owe.
lines.ko: 그때까지는 내가 빚진 금액이 얼마인지는 알 수 없습니다.

lines.en: When I hear the wicked call
On the rocks and hills to fall,
When I see them start and shrink
lines.ko: 내가 그들이 시작하고 줄어드는 것을 볼 때

lines.en: On the fiery deluge brink,
Then, Lord, shall I fully know,
lines.ko: 그러면 주님, 제가 온전히 알게 될 것입니다.

lines.en: Not till then, how much I owe.
lines.ko: 그때까지는 내가 빚진 금액이 얼마인지는 알 수 없습니다.

lines.en: When I stand before the throne,
Dressed in beauty not my own,
lines.ko: 내 것이 아닌 아름다운 옷을 입고,

lines.en: When I see thee as thou art,
lines.ko: 내가 당신을 있는 그대로 볼 때,

lines.en: Love thee with unsinning heart,
Then, Lord, shall I fully know,
lines.ko: 그러면 주님, 제가 온전히 알게 될 것입니다.

lines.en: Not till then, how much I owe.
lines.ko: 그때까지는 내가 빚진 금액이 얼마인지는 알 수 없습니다.

lines.en: When the praise of heav'n I hear,
Loud as thunders to the ear,
Loud as many waters' noise,
Sweet as harp's melodious voice,
Then, Lord, shall I fully know,
lines.ko: 그러면 주님, 제가 온전히 알게 될 것입니다.

lines.en: Not till then, how much I owe.
lines.ko: 그때까지는 내가 빚진 금액이 얼마인지는 알 수 없습니다.

lines.en: Chosen not for good in me,
Wakened up from wrath to flee,
Hidden in the Saviour's side,
By the Spirit sanctified,
Teach me, Lord, on earth to show,
lines.ko: 주님, 이 땅에서 나에게 가르쳐 주십시오.

lines.en: By my love, how much I owe.
lines.ko: 내 사랑으로 인해 내가 빚진 금액은 얼마입니까?

title_en: The Sands of Time are Sinking

lines.en: The sands of time are sinking,
The dawn of heaven breaks,
The summer morn I've sighed for,
The fair sweet morn awakes;
Dark, dark, hath been the midnight,
But dayspring is at hand,
And glory, glory dwelleth
In Emmanuel's land.
The King there in his beauty
Without a veil is seen;
It were a well-spent journey
Though seven deaths lay between:
The Lamb with his fair army
Doth on Mount Zion stand,
And glory, glory dwelleth
In Emmanuel's land.
O Christ, he is the fountain,
The deep sweet well of love!
The streams on earth I've tasted
More deep I'll drink above:
There to an ocean fullness
His mercy doth expand,
And glory, glory dwelleth
In Emmanuel's land.
The bride eyes not her garment,
But her dear bridegroom's face;
I will not gaze at glory,
But on my King of grace;
Not at the crown he gifteth,
But on his pierced hand:
The Lamb is all the glory
Of Emmanuel's land.

title_en: With Harps and with Viols

lines.en: With harps and with viols, there stand a great throng
lines.ko: 수금과 비올을 연주하는 큰 무리가 서 있다

lines.en: In the presence of Jesus, and sing this new song:
lines.ko: 예수님 앞에서 이 새 노래를 부르십시오.

lines.en: Unto him who hath loved us and washed us from sin,
lines.ko: 우리를 사랑하사 우리를 죄에서 씻어 주신 이에게

lines.en: Unto him be the glory for ever. Amen.
lines.ko: 그분께 영원히 영광이 있기를 빕니다. 아멘.

lines.en: All these once were sinners, defiled in his sight,
lines.ko: 이 사람들은 전에는 다 죄인이라 그 앞에 더러워졌더니

lines.en: Now arrayed in pure garments in praise they unite:
lines.ko: 이제 그들은 순결한 옷을 입고 찬양하며 연합합니다.

lines.en: He maketh the rebel a priest and a king,
He hath bought us and taught us this new song to sing:
lines.ko: 그분은 우리를 사셨고 우리에게 이 새 노래를 가르쳐 주셨습니다.

lines.en: How helpless and hopeless we sinners had been,
If he never had loved us till cleansed from our sin:
lines.ko: 만일 하나님께서 우리 죄를 깨끗하게 하실 때까지 우리를 사랑하신 일이 없으셨다면

lines.en: Aloud in his praises our voices shall ring,
lines.ko: 큰 소리로 그분을 찬양할 때 우리의 목소리가 울릴 것입니다.

lines.en: So that others believing, this new song shall sing:
lines.ko: 다른 사람들이 믿는 가운데 이 새 노래는 이렇게 노래할 것입니다.

title_en: No Night There

lines.en: In the land of fadeless day
Lies the city four-square;
It shall never pass away,
And there is no night there.
God shall wipe away all tears;
lines.ko: 하나님께서는 모든 눈물을 닦아 주실 것입니다.

lines.en: There's no death, no pain, nor fears;
And they count not time by years;
lines.ko: 그리고 그들은 시간을 연 단위로 세지 않습니다.

lines.en: For there is no night there.
All the gates of pearl are made
In the city four-square;
All the streets with gold are laid,
And there is no night there.
And the gates shall never close
lines.ko: 그리고 그 문은 결코 닫히지 않을 것이다

lines.en: To the city four-square;
There life's crystal river flows,
And there is no night there.
There they need no sunshine bright,
In that city four-square;
For the Lamb is all the light,
And there is no night there.

alt_titles: In the land of fadeless day
No Night There

title_en: By the Sea of Crystal

lines.en: [English lyrics not available in the database for this revised hymn]
lines.ko: [이 개정된 찬송가의 데이터베이스에는 영어 가사가 없습니다.]

title_en: There Is a Land of Pure Delight

lines.en: There is a land of pure delight,
Where saints immortal reign;
Infinite day excludes the night,
And pleasures banish pain.
There everlasting spring abides,
And never with'ring flowers;
Death, like a narrow sea, divides
This heav'nly land from ours.
Sweet fields beyond the swelling flood
Stand dressed in living green;
So to the Jews old Canaan stood,
lines.ko: 그래서 유대인들에게는 옛 가나안이 서서 말했습니다.

lines.en: While Jordan rolled between.
But tim'rous mortals start and shrink
To cross this narrow sea;
And linger, shivering, on the brink,
And fear to launch away.
O could we make our doubts remove,
lines.ko: 오, 우리의 의심을 없앨 수 있을까요?

lines.en: Those gloomy doubts that rise,
And see the Canaan that we love
With unbeclouded eyes;
Could we but climb where Moses stood,
lines.ko: 모세가 서 있던 곳으로 우리가 올라갈 수 밖에 없습니까?

lines.en: And view the landscape o'er,
Not Jordan's stream, nor death's cold flood,
lines.ko: 요단의 시냇물도 아니고 죽음의 차가운 홍수도 아니고,

lines.en: Should fright us from the shore.

title_en: How Blest Is He Whose Trespass

lines.en: From Psalm 32
How blest is he whose trespass
lines.ko: 불법을 범한 자는 얼마나 복이 있느뇨

lines.en: Has freely been forgiv'n,
Whose sin is wholly covered
Before the sight of heav'n.
Blest he to whom Jehovah
Will not impute his sin.
Who has a guileless spirit,
Whose heart is true within.
While I kept guilty silence
lines.ko: 내가 죄책감을 갖고 침묵을 지킨 동안

lines.en: My strength was spent with grief,
Thy hand was heavy on me,
My soul found no relief;
But when I owned my trespass,
lines.ko: 그러나 내가 불법 침입을 소유했을 때,

lines.en: My sin hid not from thee,
When I confessed transgression,
Then thou forgavest me.
So let the godly seek thee
lines.ko: 그러므로 경건한 자들이 주를 찾게 하소서

lines.en: In times when thou art near;
No whelming floods shall reach them,
lines.ko: 어떤 큰 홍수도 그들에게 이르지 못하며

lines.en: Nor cause their hearts to fear.
In thee, O Lord, I hide me,
lines.ko: 여호와여 내가 나를 당신 안에 숨기니

lines.en: Thou savest me from ill,
And songs of thy salvation
My heart with rapture thrill.
I graciously will teach thee
The way that thou shalt go,
And with mine eye upon thee
lines.ko: 그리고 내 눈이 너를 바라보고 있어

lines.en: My counsel make thee know.
But be ye not unruly,
Or slow to understand,
Be not perverse, but willing
lines.ko: 비뚤어진 마음을 품지 말고 자원하는 마음을 품으십시오

lines.en: To heed my wise command.
The sorrows of the wicked
In number shall abound,
But those that trust Jehovah,
His mercy shall surround.
Then in the Lord be joyful,
In song lift up your voice;
Be glad in God, ye righteous,
Rejoice, ye saints, rejoice.

title_en: From out the Depths I Cry, O Lord, to Thee

lines.en: [English lyrics not available in the database for this revised hymn]
lines.ko: [이 개정된 찬송가의 데이터베이스에는 영어 가사가 없습니다.]

title_en: My Sins, My Sins, My Savior!
title_ko: 나의 죄, 나의 죄, 나의 구원자! (자체번역)

lines.en: My sins, my sins, my Saviour!
lines.ko: 나의 죄, 나의 죄, 나의 구세주!

lines.en: They take such hold on me,
I am not able to look up,
Save only, Christ, on thee;
In thee is all forgiveness,
In thee abundant grace,
My shadow and my sunshine
The brightness of thy face.
My sins, my sins, my Saviour!
lines.ko: 나의 죄, 나의 죄, 나의 구세주!

lines.en: Their guilt I never knew
lines.ko: 나는 결코 알지 못했던 그들의 죄책감

lines.en: Till with thee in the desert
I near thy passion drew;
Till with thee in the garden
I heard thy pleading pray'r,
And saw the sweat-drops bloody
That told thy sorrow there.
Therefore my songs, my Saviour,
E'en in this time of woe,
Shall tell of all thy goodness
To suff'ring man below;
Thy goodness and thy favor,
Whose presence from above
Rejoice those hearts, my Saviour,
lines.ko: 나의 구세주여, 그 마음을 기뻐해 주소서.

lines.en: That live in thee and love.

title_en: From Depths of Woe I Raise to Thee

lines.en: From depths of woe I raise to thee
lines.ko: 비애의 깊은 곳에서 나는 당신께로 올라갑니다

lines.en: The voice of lamentation;
Lord, turn a gracious ear to me
lines.ko: 주님, 나에게 은혜로운 귀를 기울여 주십시오

lines.en: And hear my supplication:
If thou iniquities dost mark,
Our secret sins and misdeeds dark,
O who shall stand before thee?
To wash away the crimson stain,
Grace, grace alone availeth;
Our works, alas! are all in vain;
lines.ko: 아아, 우리 작품이군요! 모두 헛된 일입니다.

lines.en: In much the best life faileth:
No man can glory in thy sight,
lines.ko: 어느 누구도 당신 앞에서 자랑할 수 없습니다.

lines.en: All must alike confess thy might,
lines.ko: 모두가 똑같이 당신의 능력을 고백해야 합니다.

lines.en: And live alone by mercy.
Therefore my trust is in the Lord,
And not in mine own merit;
On him my soul shall rest, his Word
lines.ko: 내 영혼이 그 위에 안식하리로다 그의 말씀이여

lines.en: Upholds my fainting spirit:
His promised mercy is my fort,
My comfort and my sweet support;
I wait for it with patience.
What though I wait the livelong night,
And till the dawn appeareth,
My heart still trusteth in his might;
lines.ko: 내 마음은 아직도 그분의 능력을 신뢰합니다.

lines.en: It doubteth not nor feareth:
Do thus, O ye of Israel's seed,
Ye of the Spirit born indeed;
And wait till God appeareth.
Though great our sins and sore our woes
lines.ko: 비록 우리의 죄가 크고 우리의 불행이 심할지라도

lines.en: His grace much more aboundeth;
His helping love no limit knows,
Our utmost need it soundeth.
Our Shepherd good and true is he,
Who will at last his Israel free
lines.ko: 마침내 누가 그의 이스라엘을 자유롭게 할 것인가?

lines.en: From all their sin and sorrow.

title_en: Lord, I Was Blind: I Could Not See
title_ko: 주님, 저는 눈이 멀었습니다: 볼 수 없었습니다 (자체번역)

lines.en: [English lyrics not available in the database for this revised hymn]
lines.ko: [이 개정된 찬송가의 데이터베이스에는 영어 가사가 없습니다.]

title_en: Though Your Sins Be as Scarlet

lines.en: "Though your sins be as scarlet,
They shall be as white as snow;
Though your sins be as scarlet,
They shall be as white as snow;
Though they be red like crimson,
They shall be as wool.
Though your sins be as scarlet,
They shall be as white as snow."
Hear the voice that entreats you,
O return ye unto God!
Hear the voice that entreats you,
O return ye unto God!
He is great compassion,
And of wondrous love.
Hear the voice that entreats you,
O return ye unto God!
He'll forgive your transgressions,
And remember them no more:
lines.ko: 그리고 더 이상 그것들을 기억하지 말라:

lines.en: He'll forgive your transgressions,
And remember them no more:
lines.ko: 그리고 더 이상 그것들을 기억하지 말라:

lines.en: "Look unto me, ye people,"
Saith the Lord your God.
He'll forgive your transgressions,
And remember them no more.
lines.ko: 그리고 더 이상 그들을 기억하지 마십시오.

title_en: Blest Are the Undefiled

lines.en: [English lyrics not available in the database for this revised hymn]
lines.ko: [이 개정된 찬송가의 데이터베이스에는 영어 가사가 없습니다.]

title_en: That Man Is Blest Who, Fearing God
title_ko: 하나님을 경외하는 이 사람은 복이 있도다 (자체번역)

lines.en: From Psalm 1
That man is blest who, fearing God,
lines.ko: 하나님을 경외하는 이 사람은 복이 있도다

lines.en: From sin restrains his feet,
Who will not stand with wicked men,
Who shuns the scorners' seat.
Yea, blest is he who makes God's law
lines.ko: 참으로 하나님의 법을 만드는 자는 복이 있도다

lines.en: His portion and delight,
And meditates upon that law
With gladness day and night.
That man is nourished like a tree
Set by the rivers' side;
Its leaf is green, its fruit is sure,
lines.ko: 그 잎사귀는 푸르고 그 열매는 확실하며

lines.en: And thus his works abide.
The wicked like the driven chaff
Are swept from off the land;
They shall not gather with the just,
lines.ko: 그들은 의로운 자들과 함께 모이지 않을 것이며,

lines.en: Nor in the judgment stand.
The Lord will guard the righteous well,
Their way to him is known;
The way of sinners, far from God,
Shall surely be o'erthrown.

title_en: Father, I Know That All My Life
title_ko: 아버지, 저는 평생 동안 그것을 알고 있습니다 (자체번역)

lines.en: Father, I know that all my life
lines.ko: 아버지, 저는 평생 동안 그것을 알고 있습니다

lines.en: Is portioned out for me;
The changes that are sure to come,
I do not fear to see:
I ask thee for a present mind,
Intent on pleasing thee.
I would not have the restless will
lines.ko: 나는 불안한 의지를 갖지 않을 것이다

lines.en: That hurries to and fro,
Seeking for some great thing to do,
Or secret thing to know;
I would be treated as a child,
And guided where I go.
I ask thee for the daily strength,
To none that ask denied,
lines.ko: 요청한 사람 중 누구도 거부하지 않았으며,

lines.en: A mind to blend with outward life,
While keeping at thy side,
Content to fill a little space,
If thou be glorified.
In service which thy will appoints
There are no bonds for me;
My secret heart is taught the truth
That makes thy children free;
A life of self-renouncing love
Is one of liberty.

title_en: Lord, Speak to Me That I May Speak

lines.ko: 주 날 불러 이르소서 말씀대로 전하리라
lines.en: Lord, speak to me, that I may speak
lines.id: Tuhan, bicaralah kepadaku, supaya aku boleh berbicara

lines.ko: 나 주님의 뜻을 따라 길 잃은 양 찾으리다
lines.en: In liv-ing ech-oes of Thy tone
lines.id: Dalam gema nada-Mu yang hidup

lines.en: As Thou hast sought, so let me seek
lines.id: Seperti yang Engkau cari, biarlah aku mencarinya

lines.en: Thy err-ing chil-dren lost and lone.
lines.id: Anak-anakmu yang bersalah tersesat dan sendirian.

lines.ko: 주 날 인도하옵소서 나도 남을 인도하리
lines.en: Oh, lead me, Lord, that I may lead
lines.id: Oh, tuntunlah aku, Tuhan, agar aku dapat memimpin

lines.ko: 주 말씀에 주린 양떼 다 먹이게 하옵소서
lines.en: The wan-d'ring and the wa-v'ring feet
lines.id: Kaki wan-d'ring dan wa-v'ring

lines.en: Oh, feed me, Lord, that I may feed
lines.id: Oh, berilah aku makan, Tuhan, agar aku dapat memberi makan

lines.en: Thy hun-g'ring ones with man-na sweet.
lines.id: Yang hun-g'ring-mu dengan man-na manis.

lines.ko: 저 든든한 반석 위에 날 세우사 힘 주소서
lines.en: Oh, strength-en me, that while I stand
lines.id: Oh, kuatkanlah aku, selagi aku berdiri

lines.ko: 네 손을 펴 물에 빠진 저 무리를 건지리다
lines.en: Firm on the rock, and strong in Thee,
lines.id: Teguh pada batu dan kuat di dalam Engkau,

lines.en: I may stretch out a lov-ing hand
lines.id: Saya mungkin mengulurkan tangan penuh kasih

lines.en: To wres-tlers with the trou-bled sea!
lines.id: Untuk para pegulat melawan lautan yang bermasalah!

lines.ko: 내 주 얼굴 뵙기까지 주님 나를 도우소서
lines.en: Oh, use me, Lord, use e-ven me,
lines.id: Oh, gunakan aku, Tuhan, gunakanlah aku,

lines.ko: 이 천한 몸 받으셔서 주 뜻대로 쓰옵소서 아멘
lines.en: Just as Thou wilt, and when, and where
lines.id: Seperti yang Engkau kehendaki, dan kapan, dan di mana

lines.en: Un-til Thy bless-ed face I see,
lines.id: Sampai aku melihat wajah-Mu yang diberkati,

lines.en: Thy rest, Thy joy, Thy glo-ry share. A-men.
lines.id: Istirahatmu, kegembiraanmu, bagian kemuliaanmu. Amin.

lines.ko: 주 날 불러 이르소서 말씀대로 전하리라

lines.id: Dalam gema nada-Mu yang hidup

lines.en: Thy err-ing chil-dren lost and lone.
lines.id: Anak-anakmu yang bersalah tersesat dan sendirian.

lines.id: Oh, tuntunlah aku, Tuhan, agar aku dapat memimpin

lines.en: The wan-d'ring and the wa-v'ring feet
lines.id: Kaki wan-d'ring dan wa-v'ring

lines.en: Oh, feed me, Lord, that I may feed
lines.id: Oh, berilah aku makan, Tuhan, agar aku dapat memberi makan

lines.en: Thy hun-g'ring ones with man-na sweet.
lines.id: Yang hun-g'ring-mu dengan man-na manis.

lines.ko: 저 든든한 반석 위에 날 세우사 힘 주소서
lines.en: Oh, strength-en me, that while I stand
lines.id: Oh, kuatkanlah aku, selagi aku berdiri

lines.ko: 네 손을 펴 물에 빠진 저 무리를 건지리다
