lines.id: Teguh pada batu dan kuat di dalam Engkau,

lines.en: I may stretch out a lov-ing hand
lines.id: Saya mungkin mengulurkan tangan penuh kasih

lines.en: To wres-tlers with the trou-bled sea!
lines.id: Untuk para pegulat melawan lautan yang bermasalah!

lines.ko: 내 주 얼굴 뵙기까지 주님 나를 도우소서
lines.en: Oh, use me, Lord, use e-ven me,
lines.id: Oh, gunakan aku, Tuhan, gunakanlah aku,

lines.ko: 이 천한 몸 받으셔서 주 뜻대로 쓰옵소서 아멘
lines.en: Just as Thou wilt, and when, and where
lines.id: Seperti yang Engkau kehendaki, dan kapan, dan di mana

lines.en: Un-til Thy bless-ed face I see,
lines.id: Sampai aku melihat wajah-Mu yang diberkati,

lines.en: Thy rest, Thy joy, Thy glo-ry share. A-men.
lines.id: Istirahatmu, kegembiraanmu, bagian kemuliaanmu. Amin.

title_en: All to Jesus I Surrender

lines.ko: 내게 있는 모든 것을 아낌없이 드리네
lines.en: All to Je-sus I sur-ren-der,
lines.id: Semua kepada Yesus aku serahkan,

lines.en: All to Him I free-ly give
lines.id: Semua hanya kepada-Nya kuberikan dengan cuma-cuma

lines.en: I will ev-er love and trust Him,
lines.id: Aku akan selalu mencintai dan memercayai-Nya,

lines.en: In His pres-ence dai-ly live.
lines.id: Hiduplah sehari-hari di hadapan-Nya.

lines.en: I sur-ren-der all I sur-ren-der all
lines.id: Aku menyerahkan semua, aku menyerahkan semuanya

lines.en: All to Thee, my bless-ed Sav-iour, I sur-ren-der all.
lines.id: Segalanya bagiMu, Juruselamatku yang terberkati, aku serahkan semuanya.

lines.ko: 내게 있는 모든 것을 겸손하게 드리네
lines.en: All to Je-sus I sur-ren-der,
lines.id: Semua kepada Yesus aku serahkan,

lines.ko: 세상 욕심 멀리하니 나를 받아 주소서
lines.en: Hum-bly at His feet I bow,
lines.id: Dengan rendah hati aku bersujud di kaki-Nya,

lines.en: Word-ly pleas-ure all for-sak-en,
lines.id: Kenikmatan kata-kata semuanya untuk-sak-en,

lines.en: Take me, Je-sus, take me now.
lines.id: Bawa aku, Yesus, bawa aku sekarang.

lines.en: I sur-ren-der all I sur-ren-der all
lines.id: Aku menyerahkan semua, aku menyerahkan semuanya

lines.en: All to Thee, my bless-ed Sav-iour, I sur-ren-der all.
lines.id: Segalanya bagiMu, Juruselamatku yang terberkati, aku serahkan semuanya.

lines.ko: 내게 있는 모든 것을 주를 위해 드리네
lines.en: All to Je-sus I sur-ren-der,
lines.id: Semua kepada Yesus aku serahkan,

lines.ko: 주의 성령 충만하게 내게 내려 주소서
lines.en: Make me, Sav-iour, Whol-ly Thine
lines.id: Jadikanlah aku, Juruselamat, Seutuhnya milik-Mu

lines.en: Let me feel the Ho-ly Spir-it,
lines.id: Biarkan aku merasakan Roh Kudus,

lines.ko: 사랑하는 구주 앞에 모두 드리네 아멘
lines.en: Tru-ly know that Thou art mine.
lines.id: Ketahuilah sesungguhnya bahwa Engkaulah milikku.

lines.en: I sur-ren-der all I sur-ren-der all
lines.id: Aku menyerahkan semua, aku menyerahkan semuanya

lines.en: All to Thee, my bless-ed Sav-iour, I sur-ren-der all.
lines.id: Segalanya bagiMu, Juruselamatku yang terberkati, aku serahkan semuanya.

title_en: What Kind of Man Can Live in the World
title_ko: 세상에는 어떤 사람이 살 수 있을까? (자체번역)

lines.en: [English lyrics not available in the database for this revised hymn]
lines.ko: [이 개정된 찬송가의 데이터베이스에는 영어 가사가 없습니다.]

title_en: Blessed Is the Man

lines.en: [English lyrics not available in the database for this revised hymn]
lines.ko: [이 개정된 찬송가의 데이터베이스에는 영어 가사가 없습니다.]

title_en: All for Jesus!

lines.ko: 내 죄 속해 주신 주께 힘과 정성 다하니
lines.en: All for Je-sus, all for Je-sus! All my be-ing's ran-somed pow'rs
lines.id: Semuanya untuk Yesus, semuanya untuk Yesus! Seluruh kekuatanku melemah

lines.ko: 나의 온갖 언행심사 주를 위한 것일세
lines.en: All my tho'ts and words and do-ings, All my days and all my hours.
lines.id: Semua pemikiranku, kata-kataku dan perbuatanku, sepanjang hari-hariku dan seluruh jam kerjaku.

lines.ko: 내게 있는 모든 것을 주를 위해 바치리
lines.en: All for Je-sus! all for Je-sus! All my days and all my hours
lines.id: Semuanya untuk Yesus! semuanya demi Yesus! Sepanjang hari-hariku dan sepanjang waktuku

lines.ko: 내게 있는 모든 것을 주를 위해 바치리
lines.en: All for Je-sus! all for Je-sus! All my days and all my hours
lines.id: Semuanya untuk Yesus! semuanya demi Yesus! Sepanjang hari-hariku dan sepanjang waktuku

lines.ko: 나의 손과 발을 드려 주의 명령 행하고
lines.en: Let my hands per-form His bid-ding, Let my feet run in His ways
lines.id: Biarkan tanganku melakukan perintah-Nya, Biarkan kakiku berjalan di jalan-Nya

lines.ko: 오직 주만 바라보며 주만 찬양 하겠네
lines.en: Let my eyes see Je-sus on-ly, Let my lips speak forth His praise.
lines.id: Biarlah mataku hanya melihat Yesus, Biarlah bibirku memuji-Nya.

lines.ko: 항상 주를 찬송하며 이 몸 바치오리다
lines.en: All for Je-sus! all for Je-sus! Let my lips speak forth His praise
lines.id: Semuanya untuk Yesus! semuanya demi Yesus! Biarlah bibirku mengucapkan pujian-Nya

lines.ko: 항상 주를 찬송하며 이 몸 바치오리다
lines.en: All for Je-sus! all for Je-sus! Let my lips speak forth His praise
lines.id: Semuanya untuk Yesus! semuanya demi Yesus! Biarlah bibirku mengucapkan pujian-Nya

lines.ko: 내가 주를 바라보니 나의 영혼 밝아져
lines.en: Since my eyes were fixed on Je-sus, I've lost sight of all be-side
lines.id: Karena mataku tertuju pada Yesus, aku kehilangan pandangan terhadap semua yang ada di sampingku

lines.ko: 십자가를 지신 주만 항상 바라 봅니다
lines.en: So en-chained my spir-it's vision, Look-ing at the Cru-ci-fied.
lines.id: Begitu terikatnya visiku, Melihat Yang Tersalib.

lines.en: All for Je-sus! all for Je-sus! Look-ing at the Cru-ci-fied
lines.id: Semuanya untuk Yesus! semuanya demi Yesus! Melihat ke arah Salib

lines.en: All for Je-sus! all for Je-sus! Look-ing at the Cru-ci-fied
lines.id: Semuanya untuk Yesus! semuanya demi Yesus! Melihat ke arah Salib

lines.en: Oh, what won-der! how a-maz-ing! Je-sus, glo-rious King of kings,
lines.id: Oh, sungguh menakjubkan! sungguh menakjubkan! Yesus, Raja segala raja yang mulia,

lines.ko: 나를 친구 삼아주사 편히 쉬게 하시네
lines.en: Deigns to call me His be-lov-ed, Lets me rest be-neath his wings.
lines.id: Berkenan memanggilku kekasihnya, Izinkan aku beristirahat di bawah sayapnya.

lines.ko: 주의 날개 보호 아래 영원 안식 얻겠네
lines.en: All for Je-sus! all for Je-sus! Rest-ing now be-neath His wings
lines.id: Semuanya untuk Yesus! semuanya demi Yesus! Kini beristirahat di bawah sayap-Nya

lines.ko: 주의 날개 보호 아래 영원 안식 얻겠네 아멘
lines.en: All for Je-sus! all for Je-sus! Rest-ing now be-neath His wings.
lines.id: Semuanya untuk Yesus! semuanya demi Yesus! Kini beristirahat di bawah sayap-Nya.

title_en: Fear Not, O Little Flock

lines.en: [English lyrics not available in the database for this revised hymn]
lines.ko: [이 개정된 찬송가의 데이터베이스에는 영어 가사가 없습니다.]

title_en: Rise, My Soul, to Watch and Pray

lines.en: Rise, my soul, to watch and pray,
From thy sleep awaken;
Be not by the evil day
Unawares o'ertaken.
For the foe,
Well we know,
Oft his harvest reapeth
While the Christian sleepeth.
Watch against the devil's snares
Lest asleep he find thee;
lines.ko: 그가 자고 있는 너를 발견하지 않도록 하라.

lines.en: For indeed no pains he spares
To deceive and blind thee.
Satan's prey
Oft are they
Who secure are sleeping
And no watch are keeping.
Watch! Let not the wicked world
lines.ko: 보다! 악한 세상이 되지 않게 하라

lines.en: With its pow'r defeat thee.
Watch lest with her pomp unfurled
She betray and cheat thee.
Watch and see
Lest there be
Faithless friends to charm thee,
Who but seek to harm thee.
Watch against thyself, my soul,
Lest with grace thou trifle;
Let not self thy thoughts control
Nor God's mercy stifle.
Pride and sin
Lurk within
All thy hopes to scatter;
Heed not when they flatter.
But while watching, also pray
To the Lord unceasing.
He will free thee, be thy stay,
lines.ko: 그분은 당신을 자유롭게 하시고, 당신의 체류자가 되실 것입니다.

lines.en: Strength and faith increasing.
O Lord, bless
In distress
And let nothing swerve me
lines.ko: 그리고 아무것도 나를 바꾸지 못하게 해주세요

lines.en: From the will to serve thee.

title_en: In the Hour of Trial

lines.en: In the hour of tri-al, Je-sus, plead for me
lines.id: Di saat pencobaan, Yesus, mohonlah padaku

lines.en: Lest by base de-ni-al I de-part from Thee
lines.id: Jangan sampai dengan dasar de-ni-al aku berangkat dariMu

lines.ko: 떨며 주저 할 때 나를 붙드사
lines.en: When Thou seest me wa-ver, With a look re-call,
lines.id: Ketika Engkau melihatku bimbang, Dengan melihat kembali,

lines.en: Nor for fear or fa-vor Suf-fer me to fall.
lines.id: Juga bukan karena rasa takut atau bantuan, biarkan aku terjatuh.

lines.en: With its witch-ing pleas-ures Would this vain world charm,
lines.id: Dengan kesenangannya yang mempesona Apakah dunia yang sia-sia ini akan memesona,

lines.en: Or its sor-did treas-ures Spread to work me harm,
lines.id: Atau harta karunnya yang kotor Menyebar untuk menyakitiku,

lines.en: Bring to my re-mem-brance Sad Geth-sem-a-ne,
lines.id: Bawalah ke ingatanku Sedih Geth-sem-a-ne,

lines.en: Or, in dark-er sem-blance, Cross-crowned Cal-va-ry.
lines.id: Atau, dalam bentuk yang lebih gelap, Cal-va-ry yang bermahkota silang.

lines.en: If with sore af-flic-tion Thou in love chas-tise,
lines.id: Jika dengan penderitaan yang berat Engkau menghukum dengan cinta,

lines.ko: 근심 걱정 고통 내가 당할 때
lines.en: Pour Thy ben-e-dic-tion On the sac-ri-fice
lines.id: Tuangkan berkat-Mu pada kurban

lines.en: Then, up-on Thine al-tar Free-ly of-fered up,
lines.id: Kemudian, di atas altar-Mu dipersembahkan dengan bebas,

lines.en: Though the flesh may fal-ter, Faith shall drink the cup.
lines.id: Meskipun daging mungkin goyah, Iman akan meminum cawan itu.

lines.en: When my last hour com-eth, Fraught with strife and pain,
lines.id: Saat saat terakhirku tiba, Penuh dengan perselisihan dan kesakitan,

lines.en: When my dust re-turn-eth To the dust a-gain
lines.id: Saat debuku kembali menjadi debu kembali

lines.en: On Thy truth re-ly-ing, Through that mor-tal strife,
lines.id: Atas kebenaran-Mu yang berbohong, Melalui perselisihan fana itu,

lines.ko: 영생 하는 곳에 인도 하소서 아멘
lines.en: Je-sus, take me, dy-ing, To e-ter-nal life. A-men.
lines.id: Yesus, bawalah aku, sekarat, menuju kehidupan kekal. Amin.

title_en: Jesus, Lord of Life and Glory

lines.en: Jesus, Lord of life and glory,
Bend from heav'n thy gracious ear;
While our waiting souls adore thee,
lines.ko: 우리의 기다리는 영혼이 당신을 사랑하는 동안,

lines.en: Friend of helpless sinners, hear:
By thy mercy, O deliver us, good Lord.
lines.ko: 당신의 자비로 우리를 구원하소서, 선하신 주님.

lines.en: From the depth of nature's blindness,
From the hard'ning pow'r of sin,
From all malice and unkindness,
From the pride that lurks within,
When temptation sorely presses,
In the day of Satan's pow'r,
In our times of deep distresses,
In each dark and trying hour,
When the world around is smiling,
In the time of wealth and ease,
Earthly joys our hearts beguiling,
In the day of health and peace,
In our weary hours of sickness,
In our times of grief and pain,
When we feel our mortal weakness,
When the creature's help is vain,
In the solemn hour of dying,
In the awful judgment day,
May our souls, on thee relying,
Find thee still our Rock and Stay:
lines.ko: 여전히 우리의 Rock and Stay를 찾아보세요:

title_en: Faith of Our Fathers!

lines.ko: 환난과 핍박 중에도 성도는 신앙 지켰네
lines.en: Faith of our fathers, living still, In spite of dungeon, fire and sword;
lines.id: Keyakinan nenek moyang kita, yang masih hidup, Meskipun ada penjara bawah tanah, api dan pedang;

lines.ko: 이 신앙 생각 할 때에 기쁨이 충만하도다
lines.en: O how our hearts beat high with joy Whenever we hear that glorious Word!
lines.id: Oh, betapa hati kami berdebar kencang dengan sukacita Setiap kali kami mendengar Firman yang mulia itu!

lines.ko: 성도의 신앙 따라서 죽도록 충성 하겠네
lines.en: Faith of our fathers, holy faith!
lines.id: Iman nenek moyang kita, iman yang suci!

lines.en: We will be true to thee till death.
lines.id: Kami akan setia padamu sampai mati.

lines.ko: 옥중에 매인 성도나 양심은 자유 얻었네
lines.en: Our fathers chain'd in prisons dark where still in heart and
lines.id: Ayah kami dirantai di penjara yang gelap dimana masih dalam hati dan

lines.ko: 우리도 고난 받으면 죽어도 영광 되도다
lines.en: conscience free And blest would be their children's fate If they like them should die for thee
lines.id: bebas hati nurani Dan terberkatilah nasib anak-anak mereka Jika mereka menyukainya, mereka harus mati untukmu

lines.ko: 성도의 신앙 따라서 죽도록 충성 하겠네
lines.en: Faith of our fathers, holy faith!
lines.id: Iman nenek moyang kita, iman yang suci!

lines.en: We will be true to thee till death.
lines.id: Kami akan setia padamu sampai mati.

lines.ko: 성도의 신앙 본받아 원수도 사랑 하겠네
lines.en: Faith of our fathers, we will love Both friend and foe in all our strife;
lines.id: Iman nenek moyang kami, kami akan mencintai baik kawan maupun lawan dalam segala perselisihan kami;

lines.ko: 인자한 언어 행실로 이 신앙 전파하리라
lines.en: And preach Thee, too, as love knows how
lines.id: Dan beritakanlah Engkau juga, sebagaimana cinta mengetahui caranya

lines.ko: 성도의 신앙 따라서 죽도록 충성 하겠네 아멘
lines.en: By kindly words and virtuous life.
lines.id: Dengan kata-kata yang baik dan kehidupan yang berbudi luhur.

lines.en: Faith of our fathers, holy faith!
lines.id: Iman nenek moyang kita, iman yang suci!

lines.en: We will be true to thee till death.
lines.id: Kami akan setia padamu sampai mati.

title_en: Stand Up, Stand Up for Jesus

lines.en: Stand up, stand up for Jesus,
lines.id: Berdiri, Bela Yesus,

lines.en: Ye soldiers of the cross;
lines.id: Hai para prajurit salib

lines.en: Lift high his royal banner,
lines.id: Angkat tinggi-tinggi panji kerajaan-Nya,

lines.en: It must not suffer loss:
lines.id: Ia tidak boleh mengalami kerugian:

lines.en: From vict'ry unto vict'ry
lines.id: Dari kemenangan ke kemenangan

lines.en: His army he shall lead,
lines.id: Ar-my Dia akan memimpin,

lines.en: Till ev'ry foe is vanquished
lines.id: Sampai semua musuh dikalahkan,

lines.en: And Christ is Lord indeed.
lines.id: Dan Kristus sesungguhnya adalah Tuhan.

lines.en: Stand up, stand up for Jesus,
lines.id: Berdiri, membela Yesus,

lines.en: The trumpet call obey;
lines.ko: 그 나팔 소리 듣고 곧 나가 싸우라
lines.id: Panggilan trum-pet o-bey

lines.en: Forth to the mighty conflict
lines.ko: 수 없는 원수 앞에 주 따라 갈 때에
lines.id: Maju ke konflik yang dahsyat

lines.en: In this his glorious day:
lines.ko: 주 예수 힘을 주사 강하게 하시네
lines.id: Di hari-Nya yang mulia ini:

lines.en: Ye that are men now serve him
lines.id: Kamu yang manusia sekarang melayani Dia

lines.en: Against unnumbered foes;
lines.id: A-melawan musuh yang tidak terhitung jumlahnya

lines.en: Let courage rise with danger,
lines.id: Biarlah keberanian meningkat seiring bahaya,

lines.en: And strength to strength oppose.
lines.id: Dan kekuatan demi kekuatan berlawanan.

lines.en: Stand up, stand up for Jesus,
lines.id: Berdiri, membela Yesus,

lines.en: Stand in his strength alone;
lines.ko: 네 힘이 부족하니 주 권능 믿으라
lines.id: Berdirilah dalam kekuatan-Nya sendirian

lines.en: The arm of flesh will fail you,
lines.id: Lengan daging akan mengecewakanmu,

lines.en: Ye dare not trust your own:
lines.id: Kamu tidak berani mempercayai milikmu sendiri:

lines.en: Put on the gospel armor,
lines.id: Kenakan baju besi injil,

lines.en: Each piece put on with pray'r;
lines.id: Masing-masing bagian dikenakan dengan doa

lines.en: Where duty calls, or danger,
lines.id: Saat tugas memanggil, atau bahaya,

lines.en: Be never wanting there.
lines.id: Jangan pernah ingin berada di sana.
Hari ini kebisingan pertempuran,
Lagu pemenang berikutnya:
Kepada Dia yang memenangkan pertempuran
Akan ada mahkota kehidupan
Dia bersama Raja Kemuliaan
Akan memerintah selamanya. Amin.

lines.en: Stand up, stand up for Jesus,
lines.id: Para prajurit salib, bangkitlah bagi Tuhan

lines.en: The strife will not be long;
lines.id: Mari kita bertarung pada hari ini dan anjing akan segera memanggil.

lines.en: This day the noise of battle,
lines.id: Prajurit yang menang menerima hidup kekal.

lines.en: The next the victor's song:
lines.ko: 영광의 주와 함께 왕 노릇 하리라
lines.id: Aku akan memerintah bersama Tuhan yang mulia.

lines.en: To him that overcometh
A crown of life shall be;
He with the King of Glory
Shall reign eternally.

title_en: Onward, Christian Soldiers

lines.en: On-ward, Chris-tian sol-diers,
lines.id: Selanjutnya, tentara Kristen,

lines.en: March-ing as to war,
lines.id: Berbaris seperti berperang,

lines.en: With the cross of Je-sus
lines.id: Dengan salib Yesus

lines.ko: 접전 하는 곳에 가신 것 보라
lines.en: Go-ing on be-fore:
lines.id: Terjadi sebelum:

lines.en: Christ the roy-al Mas-ter
lines.id: Kristus sang Penguasa Kerajaan

lines.en: Leads a-gainst the foe
lines.id: Memimpin melawan musuh

lines.en: For-ward in-to bat-tle,
lines.id: Maju ke dalam pertempuran,

lines.en: See His ban-ners go.
lines.id: Lihat spanduk-spanduk-Nya dikibarkan.

lines.en: On-ward, Chris-tian sol-diers,
lines.id: Selanjutnya, tentara Kristen,

lines.en: March-ing as to war,
lines.id: Berbaris seperti berperang,

lines.en: With the cross of Je-sus

lines.en: Go-ing on be-fore.
lines.id: Terjadi sebelumnya.

lines.en: At the sound of tri-umph
lines.id: Saat suara kemenangan

lines.en: Sa-tan's host doth flee
lines.id: Tuan rumah Setan pun melarikan diri

lines.en: On then, Chris-tian sol-diers,
lines.id: Pada saat itu, tentara Kristen,

lines.en: On to vic-to-ry:
lines.id: Menuju kemenangan:

lines.en: Hell's foun-da-tions quiv-er
lines.id: Yayasan Neraka bergetar

lines.en: At the shout of praise
lines.id: Saat teriakan pujian

lines.en: Broth-ers, lift your voic-es,
lines.id: Saudara-saudara, angkat suaramu,

lines.en: Loud your an-thems raise.
lines.id: Keraskan lagu kebangsaan Anda.

lines.en: On-ward, Chris-tian sol-diers,
lines.id: Selanjutnya, tentara Kristen,

lines.en: March-ing as to war,
lines.id: Berbaris seperti berperang,

lines.en: With the cross of Je-sus
lines.id: Dengan salib Yesus

lines.en: Go-ing on be-fore.
lines.id: Terjadi sebelumnya.

lines.en: Crowns and thrones may per-ish,
lines.id: Mahkota dan takhta mungkin musnah,

lines.en: King-doms wax and wane,
lines.id: Kerajaan bertambah dan berkurang,

lines.en: But the Church of Je-sus
lines.id: Tapi Gereja Yesus

lines.en: Con-stant will re-main
lines.id: Konstanta akan tetap ada

lines.en: Gates of hell can nev-er
lines.id: Gerbang neraka tidak akan pernah bisa

lines.en: 'Gainst that Church pre-vail
lines.id: 'Dapatkan keuntungan Gereja itu

lines.en: We have Christ's own pro-mise,
lines.id: Kita mempunyai janji Kristus sendiri,

lines.en: And that can-not fail.
lines.id: Dan itu tidak mungkin gagal.

lines.en: On-ward, Chris-tian sol-diers,
lines.id: Selanjutnya, tentara Kristen,

lines.en: March-ing as to war,
lines.id: Berbaris seperti berperang,

lines.en: With the cross of Je-sus
lines.id: Dengan salib Yesus

lines.en: Go-ing on be-fore.
lines.id: Terjadi sebelumnya.

lines.en: On-ward, then, ye peo-ple,
lines.id: Kalau begitu, seterusnya, kalian sekalian,

lines.en: Join our hap-py throng,
lines.id: Bergabunglah dengan kelompok kami yang bahagia,

lines.en: Blend with ours your voi-ces
lines.id: Padukan dengan suara kami

lines.en: In the tri-umph song
lines.id: Dalam lagu kemenangan

lines.en: Glo-ry, laud, and hon-or
lines.id: Kemuliaan, pujian, dan kehormatan

lines.en: Un-to Christ our King
lines.id: Kepada Kristus Raja kita

lines.en: This thro' count-less a-ges
lines.id: Ini telah melewati usia yang tak terhitung jumlahnya

lines.en: Men and an-gels sing
lines.id: Manusia dan malaikat bernyanyi

lines.en: On-ward, Chris-tian sol-diers,
lines.id: Selanjutnya, tentara Kristen,

lines.en: March-ing as to war,
lines.id: Berbaris seperti berperang,

lines.en: With the cross of Je-sus
lines.id: Dengan salib Yesus

lines.en: Go-ing on be-fore. A-men.
lines.id: Terjadi sebelumnya. Amin.

title_en: Am I a Soldier of the Cross

lines.en: Am I a soldier of the cross,
lines.ko: 십자가 군병 되어서 예수를 따를 때
lines.id: Apakah aku seorang prajurit salib,

lines.en: A foll'wer of the Lamb,
lines.id: Pengikut Anak Domba

lines.en: And shall I fear to own his cause,
lines.ko: 나의 주 그리스도 나를 속량 했으니
lines.id: Dan aku akan takut untuk mengakui tujuan-Nya,

lines.en: Or blush to speak his Name?
lines.ko: 그 십자가를 벗은 후 저 면류관 쓰리
lines.id: Atau malu untuk menyebut nama-Nya
Dalam nama Kristus Raja,
yang telah membelikan nyawanya untukku
Melalui kasih karunia aku akan memakai mahkota pesta prom,
apa pun salibku!

lines.en: Must I be carried to the skies
lines.ko: 뭇 성도 피를 흘리며 큰 싸움 하는데
lines.id: Haruskah saya dibawa ke langit.

lines.en: On flow'ry beds of ease,
lines.ko: 나 어찌 편히 누워서 상 받기 바랄까
lines.id: Di tempat tidur yang nyaman dan mengalir,

lines.en: While others fought to win the prize,
lines.ko: 나의 주 그리스도 나를 속량 했으니
lines.id: Sementara yang lain berjuang untuk memenangkan hadiah,

lines.en: And sailed through bloody seas?
lines.ko: 그 십자가를 벗은 후 저 면류관 쓰리
lines.id: Dan berlayar melintasi lautan berdarah
Dalam nama Kristus Raja,
yang telah membelikan nyawanya untukku
Melalui kasih karunia aku akan memakai mahkota pesta prom,
apa pun salibku!

lines.en: Are there no foes for me to face?
lines.ko: 이 죄악 많은 세상에 수많은 원수들
lines.id: Apakah tidak ada musuh yang harus aku hadapi

lines.en: Must I not stem the flood?
lines.ko: 날 유혹하고 해치나 내 주만 따르리
lines.id: Apakah aku tidak boleh membendung banjir itu

lines.en: Is this vile world a friend to grace,
lines.ko: 나의 주 그리스도 나를 속량 했으니
lines.id: Apakah dunia yang keji ini merupakan teman rahmat,

lines.en: To help me on to God?
lines.ko: 그 십자가를 벗은 후 저 면류관 쓰리
lines.id: Untuk membantuku menuju Tuhan
Dalam nama Kristus Raja,
yang telah membelikan nyawanya untukku
Melalui kasih karunia aku akan memakai mahkota pesta prom,
apa pun salibku!

lines.en: Sure I must fight if I would reign:
lines.ko: 나 면류관을 쓰려고 몸 바쳐 싸울 때
lines.id: Tentu saja saya harus bertarung jika saya ingin memerintah.

lines.en: Increase my courage, Lord;
lines.ko: 주 내게 용기 주시사 이기게 하시네
lines.id: Tingkatkan keberanianku, Tuhan.

lines.en: I'll bear the toil, endure the pain,
lines.ko: 나의 주 그리스도 나를 속량 했으니
lines.id: Aku akan menanggung jerih payah, menahan rasa sakit,

lines.en: Supported by thy Word.
lines.ko: 그 십자가를 벗은 후 저 면류관 쓰리
lines.id: Didukung oleh firman-Mu.
Dalam nama Kristus Raja,
yang telah membelikan nyawanya untukku
Melalui kasih karunia aku akan memakai mahkota pesta prom,
apa pun salibku!

lines.en: Thy saints, in all this glorious war,
lines.id: Ketika hari yang mulia itu tiba,

lines.en: Shall conquer, though they die;
lines.id: Dan semua pasukan-Mu bersinar

lines.en: They view the triumph from afar,
lines.ko: 나의 주 그리스도 나를 속량 했으니
lines.id: Dalam jubah kemenangan melintasi langit,

lines.en: And seize it with their eye.
lines.ko: 그 십자가를 벗은 후 저 면류관 쓰리
lines.id: Kemuliaan akan menjadi milik-Mu.
Dalam nama Kristus Raja,
yang telah membelikan nyawanya untukku
Melalui kasih karunia aku akan memakai mahkota pesta prom,
apa pun salibku!

lines.en: When that illustrious day shall rise,
And all thine armies shine
In robes of vict'ry through the skies,
The glory shall be thine.

title_en: Christian, Dost Thou See Them

lines.en: Christian, dost thou see them
On the holy ground,
How the pow'rs of darkness
Rage thy steps around?
Christian, up and smite them,
Counting gain but loss,
In the strength that cometh
By the holy cross.
Christian, dost thou feel them,
How they work within,
Striving, tempting, luring,
Goading into sin?
Christian, never tremble;
Never be downcast;
Gird thee for the battle,
Watch and pray and fast.
Christian, dost thou hear them,
How they speak thee fair?
lines.ko: 그들이 당신을 공정하게 말하는 방법은 무엇입니까?

lines.en: "Always fast and vigil?
Always watch and prayer?"
Christian, answer boldly,
"While I breathe I pray!"
Peace shall follow battle,
Night shall end in day.
Hear the words of Jesus:
"O my servant true:
Thou art very weary,
I was weary too;
But that toil shall make thee
lines.ko: 하지만 그 수고가 너를 만들 것이다

lines.en: Some day all mine own,
lines.ko: 언젠가는 모두 내 소유가 될 거야

lines.en: And the end of sorrow
Shall be near my throne."

title_en: Soldiers of Christ, Arise

lines.en: Soldiers of Christ, arise,
And put your armor on,
Strong in the strength which God supplies
Through his Eternal Son.
Strong in the Lord of hosts,
And in his mighty pow'r,
Who in the strength of Jesus trusts
Is more than conqueror.
Stand then in his great might,
With all his strength endued;
But take, to arm you for the fight,
lines.ko: 하지만 싸움을 위해 당신을 무장시키기 위해,

lines.en: The panoply of God.
Leave no unguarded place,
No weakness of the soul;
Take ev'ry virtue, ev'ry grace,
And fortify the whole.
To keep your armor bright,
Attend with constant care;
Still walking in your Captain's sight,
lines.ko: 여전히 당신의 선장의 시야에서 걷고 있습니다.

lines.en: And watching unto prayer.
From strength to strength go on;
Wrestle and fight and pray;
Tread all the pow'rs of darkness down,
And win the well-fought day.

title_en: Awake, My Soul, Stretch Every Nerve
title_ko: 깨어라, 내 영혼아, 모든 신경을 펴라 (자체번역)

lines.en: Awake, my soul, stretch ev'ry nerve,
lines.ko: 깨어나라, 내 영혼아, 모든 신경을 펴라,

lines.en: And press with vigor on;
A heav'nly race demands thy zeal,
And an immortal crown.
A cloud of witnesses around
Hold thee in full survey;
Forget the steps already trod,
And onward urge thy way.
'Tis God's all-animating voice
lines.ko: 이것이 바로 하나님의 생기 넘치는 음성입니다

lines.en: That calls thee from on high;
lines.ko: 그것이 높은 곳에서 당신을 부르는 것입니다.

lines.en: 'Tis his own hand presents the prize
To thine aspiring eye.
That prize with peerless glories bright,
lines.ko: 비길 데 없는 영광을 지닌 그 상은 밝게 빛나고,

lines.en: Which shall new lustre boast,
When victors' wreaths and monarch's gems
lines.ko: 승자의 화환과 군주의 보석이 있을 때

lines.en: Shall blend in common dust.
Blest Saviour, introduced by thee,
Have I my race begun;
And, crowned with vict'ry, at thy feet
lines.ko: 그리고 승리의 관을 쓰고 당신의 발 앞에

lines.en: I'll lay my honors down.

title_en: Stand Up, My Soul; Shake Off Your Fears

lines.en: [English lyrics not available in the database for this revised hymn]
lines.ko: [이 개정된 찬송가의 데이터베이스에는 영어 가사가 없습니다.]

title_en: The Son of God Goes Forth to War

lines.en: The Son of God goes forth to war,
lines.ko: 주 예수 우리 구하려 큰 싸움 하시니
lines.id: Berdiri di atas janji Kristus, Rajaku!

lines.en: A kingly crown to gain;
lines.ko: 주 십자가를 따라서 나갈 자 누구랴
lines.id: Selama berabad-abad biarlah puji-pujian-Nya terngiang-ngiang.

lines.en: His blood-red banner streams afar:
lines.ko: 큰 환난 핍박 당하고 또 고통 많으나
lines.id: “Kemuliaan yang tertinggi!” Aku akan berteriak dan bernyanyi,

lines.en: Who follows in His train?
lines.ko: 제 십자가를 지고서 늘 참는 이로다
lines.id: Berdiri di atas janji Tuhan.

lines.en: Who best can drink his cup of woe,
lines.id: Berdiri, berdiri,

lines.en: Triumphant over pain,
lines.id: Berdiri di atas janji Tuhan, penyelamatku

lines.en: Who patient bears his cross below,
lines.id: Berdiri, berdiri,

lines.en: He follows in His train.
lines.id: Aku berdiri di atas janji Tuhan

lines.en: The martyr first, whose eagle eye
lines.ko: 주 예수 고난 당할 때 저 원수 위하여
lines.id: Berdiri di atas prom-is-es yang tidak mungkin gagal!

lines.en: Could pierce beyond the grave,
lines.ko: 죄 용서 함을 빎같이 또 빌자 누구랴
lines.id: Ketika badai keraguan dan ketakutan melanda,

lines.en: Who saw his Master in the sky,
lines.ko: 저 순교자가 죽을 때 그 원수 사하고
lines.id: Oleh Firman Tuhan yang hidup aku akan menang,

lines.en: And called on Him to save;
lines.ko: 제 영혼 부탁 했으니 주 따른 이로다
lines.id: Berdiri di atas janji Tuhan.

lines.en: Like Him, with pardon on his tongue
lines.id: Berdiri, berdiri,

lines.en: In midst of mortal pain,
lines.id: Berdiri di atas janji Tuhan, penyelamatku

lines.en: He prayed for them that did the wrong:
lines.id: Berdiri, berdiri,

lines.en: Who follows in his train?
lines.id: Aku berdiri di atas janji Tuhan

lines.en: A glorious band, the chosen few
lines.ko: 저 택함 받은 사도들 주 성령 받은 후
lines.id: Berdiri di atas janji Kristus, Tuhan,

lines.en: On whom the Spirit came,
lines.ko: 큰 환난 고통 당할 때 다 참고 이겼네
lines.id: Terikat pada-Nya selamanya oleh tali cinta yang kuat,

lines.en: Twelve valiant saints, their hope they knew,
lines.ko: 그 험한 고난 넘어서 저 천성 갔으니
lines.id: Datang setiap hari dengan pedang Roh itu,

lines.en: And mocked the cross and flame:
lines.ko: 주 예수 믿는 우리도 본받게 하소서 아멘
lines.id: Berdiri di atas janji Tuhan.

lines.en: They met the tyrant's brandished steel,
lines.id: Berdiri, berdiri,

lines.en: The lion's gory mane;
lines.id: Berdiri di atas janji Tuhan, penyelamatku

lines.en: They bowed their necks the death to feel:
lines.id: Berdiri, berdiri,

lines.en: Who follows in their train?
lines.id: Aku berdiri di atas janji Tuhan

lines.en: A noble army, men and boys,
lines.id: Berdiri di pesta prom-is-es aku tidak bisa jatuh,

lines.en: The matron and the maid,
lines.id: Mendaftar setiap saat pada panggilan Roh,

lines.en: Around the Saviour's throne rejoice,
lines.id: Beristirahat pada Juruselamatku sebagai segalanya,

lines.en: In robes of light arrayed:
lines.id: Berdiri di atas janji Tuhan.

lines.en: They climbed the steep ascent of heav'n
lines.id: Berdiri, berdiri,

lines.en: Through peril, toil and pain:
lines.id: Berdiri di atas janji Tuhan, penyelamatku

lines.en: O God, to us may grace be giv'n
lines.id: Berdiri, berdiri,

lines.en: To follow in their train.
lines.id: Aku berdiri di atas janji Tuhan

title_en: Dare to Be a Daniel!

lines.en: Standing by a purpose true,
Heeding God's command,
Honour them, the faithful few!
All hail to Daniel's Band!
Dare to be a Daniel!
Dare to stand alone!
Dare to make a purpose firm!
Dare to make it known!
Many mighty men are lost,
Daring not to stand,
Who for God had been a host,
By joining Daniel's Band!
Dare to be a Daniel!
Dare to stand alone!
Dare to make a purpose firm!
Dare to make it known!
Many giants, great and tall,
Stalking through the land,
Headlong to the earth would fall,
If met by Daniel's Band!
Dare to be a Daniel!
Dare to stand alone!
Dare to make a purpose firm!
Dare to make it known!
Hold the gospel banner high!
On to victory grand!
Satan and his host defy,
And shout for Daniel's Band
Dare to be a Daniel!
Dare to stand alone!
Dare to make a purpose firm!
Dare to make it known!

title_en: Lead On, O King Eternal

lines.en: Lead on, O King eternal,
The day of march has come;
Henceforth in fields of conquest
Thy tents shall be our home:
lines.ko: 당신의 천막이 우리의 집이 될 것입니다.

lines.en: Through days of preparation
Thy grace has made us strong,
And now, O King eternal,
We lift our battle song.
Lead on, O King eternal,
Till sin's fierce war shall cease,
And Holiness shall whisper
The sweet amen of peace;
For not with swords loud clashing,
lines.ko: 칼을 휘두르며 시끄럽게 부딪치는 것이 아니라,

lines.en: Nor roll of stirring drums,
But deeds of love and mercy,
The heav'nly kingdom comes.
Lead on, O King eternal,
We follow, not with fears;
For gladness breaks like morning
Where'er thy face appears;
Thy cross is lifted o'er us;
We journey in its light:
The crown awaits the conquest;
Lead on, O God of might.

title_en: Fight the Good Fight

lines.en: [English lyrics not available in the database for this revised hymn]
lines.ko: [이 개정된 찬송가의 데이터베이스에는 영어 가사가 없습니다.]

title_en: Yield Not to Temptation

lines.en: Yield not to temptation,
lines.id: Jangan menyerah pada godaan, karena menyerah adalah dosa;

lines.en: For yielding is sin;
lines.id: Setiap kemenangan akan membantu Anda meraih kemenangan lainnya;

lines.en: Each victory will help you
lines.ko: 너 시험을 이겨 새 힘을 얻고
lines.id: Bertarunglah dengan gagah berani, kalahkan nafsu gelap,

lines.en: Some other to win;
lines.id: Pandanglah selalu Yesus, Dia akan membantu Anda melewatinya.

lines.en: Fight manfully onward;
lines.ko: 우리 구주의 힘과 그의 위로를 빌라
lines.id: Mintalah Juruselamat untuk membantu Anda,

lines.en: Dark passions subdue;
lines.ko: 주님 네 편에 서서 항상 도우시리
lines.id: Menghibur, menguatkan dan menjagamu;

lines.en: Look ever to Jesus,
lines.id: Dia bersedia membantu Anda,

lines.en: He will carry you through.
lines.id: Dia akan membawamu melewatinya.

lines.en: Ask the Saviour to help you,
lines.id: Hindari teman yang jahat, hina bahasa yang buruk,

lines.en: Comfort, strengthen, and keep you;
lines.id: Nama Tuhan dijunjung tinggi dan jangan disia-siakan;

lines.en: He is willing to aid you,
lines.id: Jadilah bijaksana dan sungguh-sungguh, baik hati dan jujur,

lines.en: He will carry you through.
lines.id: Pandanglah selalu Yesus, Dia akan membantu Anda melewatinya.

lines.ko: 우리 구주의 힘과 그의 위로를 빌라
lines.id: Mintalah Juruselamat untuk membantu Anda,

lines.ko: 주님 네 편에 서서 항상 도우시리
lines.id: Menghibur, menguatkan dan menjagamu;
Dia bersedia membantu Anda,
Dia akan membawamu melewatinya.

lines.en: Shun evil companions;
lines.id: Kepada dia yang datang, Tuhan memberikan sebuah mahkota;

lines.en: Bad language disdain;
lines.id: Melalui iman kita akan menang, meski sering kali terjatuh;

lines.en: God's name hold in reverence,
lines.id: Dia yang adalah Juruselamat kita, kekuatan kita akan diperbarui;

lines.en: Nor take it in vain;
lines.id: Pandanglah selalu Yesus, Dia akan membantu Anda melewatinya.

lines.en: Be thoughtful and earnest,
lines.ko: 우리 구주의 힘과 그의 위로를 빌라
lines.id: Mintalah Juruselamat untuk membantu Anda,

lines.en: Kindhearted and true;
lines.ko: 주님 네 편에 서서 항상 도우시리
lines.id: Menghibur, menguatkan dan menjagamu;

lines.en: Look ever to Jesus,
lines.id: Dia bersedia membantu Anda,

lines.en: He will carry you through.
lines.id: Dia akan membawamu melewatinya.

lines.en: To him that o'ercometh
God giveth a crown;
Through faith we shall conquer,
Though often cast down;
He who is the Saviour
Our strength will renew;
Look ever to Jesus,
He will carry you through.

alt_titles: Yield not to temptation

title_en: Fountain of Good, to Own Thy Love
title_ko: 당신의 사랑을 소유하기 위한 선의 샘 (자체번역)

lines.en: Fountain of good, to own thy love
lines.ko: 선의 샘, 당신의 사랑을 소유하기 위해

lines.en: Our thankful hearts incline;
What can we render, Lord to thee,
lines.ko: 주님, 당신께 우리가 무엇을 드릴 수 있겠습니까?

lines.en: When all the worlds are thine?
lines.ko: 언제 모든 세상이 당신의 것이 됩니까?

lines.en: But thou hast needy brethren here,
lines.ko: 그러나 여기 네게 궁핍한 형제들이 있으니

lines.en: Partakers of thy grace,
Whose names thou wilt thyself confess
Before the Father's face.
And in their accents of distress
Thy pleading voice is heard;
In them thou may'st be clothed and fed
lines.ko: 그 안에서 당신은 옷을 입고 먹을 수 있습니다

lines.en: And visited and cheered.
Thy face with rev'rence and with love
lines.ko: 당신의 얼굴은 경외심과 사랑으로 가득 차 있습니다

lines.en: We in thy poor would see;
lines.ko: 우리는 당신의 가난한 사람들 가운데서 볼 것입니다.

lines.en: O may we minister to them,
And in them, Lord, to thee.

title_en: Go, Labor On

lines.en: [English lyrics not available in the database for this revised hymn]
lines.ko: [이 개정된 찬송가의 데이터베이스에는 영어 가사가 없습니다.]

title_en: Take My Life, and Let It Be

lines.ko: 나의 생명 드리니 주여 받아 주셔서
lines.en: Take my life, and let it be
lines.id: Ambil hidupku, dan biarkan saja

lines.en: Con-se-crat-ed, Lord, to Thee.
lines.id: Dikuduskan, Tuhan, kepada-Mu.

lines.en: Take my mo-ments and my days
lines.id: Ambillah momen dan hari-hariku

lines.en: Let them flow in cease-less praise.
lines.id: Biarlah mereka mengalir dalam pujian yang tak henti-hentinya.

lines.ko: 손과 발을 드리니 주여 받아 주셔서
lines.en: Take my hands, and let them move
lines.id: Pegang tanganku, dan biarkan bergerak

lines.ko: 주의 일을 위하여 민첩 하게 하소서
lines.en: At the im-pulse of Thy love.
lines.id: Atas dorongan cinta-Mu.

lines.en: Take my feet, and let them be
lines.id: Ambil kakiku, dan biarkan saja

lines.en: Swift and beau-ti-ful for Thee.
lines.id: Cepat dan indah bagi-Mu.

lines.ko: 나의 음성 드리니 주여 받아 주셔서
lines.en: Take my voice, and let me sing,
lines.id: Ambil suaraku, dan biarkan aku bernyanyi,

lines.ko: 주의 진리 말씀만 전파 하게 하소서
lines.en: Al-ways, on-ly, for my King.
lines.id: Selalu, hanya saja, untuk Rajaku.

lines.en: Take my lips, and let them be
lines.id: Ambil bibirku, dan biarkan saja

lines.en: Filled with mes-sa-ges from Thee.
lines.id: Penuh dengan pesan-pesan dari-Mu.

lines.ko: 나의 보화 드리니 주여 받아 주셔서
lines.en: Take my sil-ver and my gold
lines.id: Ambil perak dan emasku

lines.en: Not a mite would I with-hold.
lines.id: Tidak ada satupun uang yang akan saya tahan.

lines.en: Take my in-ter-lect, and use
lines.id: Ambillah sudut pandang saya, dan gunakanlah

lines.en: Ev-ery pow'r as Thou shalt choose.
lines.id: Segala kekuatan sesuai pilihanmu.

lines.ko: 나의 시간 드리니 주여 받아 주셔서
lines.en: Take my mo-ments and my days.
lines.id: Ambillah momen dan hari-hariku.

lines.ko: 평생토록 주 위해 봉사 하게 하소서 아멘
lines.en: Let them flow in end-less praise.
lines.id: Biarkan mereka mengalir dalam pujian yang tiada habisnya.

lines.en: Take my-self, and I will be
lines.id: Ambillah diriku sendiri, dan aku akan menjadi diriku sendiri

lines.en: Ev-er, on-ly, all for Thee. A-men.
lines.id: Selamanya, hanya saja, semuanya untukMu. Amin.

title_id: Ambil Hidupku, dan Biarkan Itu Terjadi

title_en: Who Is on the Lord’s Side?

lines.en: Who is on the Lord's side?
lines.id: Who is on the Lord's side Who will serve the King

lines.en: Who will serve the King?
lines.id: Siapa yang akan menjadi penolong-Nya, akan membawa kehidupan bagi orang lain

lines.en: Who will be his helpers,
lines.id: Who will leave the world's side Who will face the foe

lines.en: Other lives to bring?
lines.id: Siapa yang berada di pihak Tuhan Siapa yang akan pergi demi Dia

lines.en: Who will leave the world's side?
lines.id: Atas seruan belas kasihan-Mu, Atas rahmat Ilahi-Mu,

lines.en: Who will face the foe?
lines.id: We are on the Lord's side, Sav-iour, we are Thine.

lines.en: Who is on the Lord's side?
Who for him will go?
By thy call of mercy,
By thy grace Divine,
We are on the Lord's side,
lines.id: Not for weight of glo-ry, Not for crown and palm,

lines.en: Saviour, we are thine.
lines.id: Masuklah kami pasukanku, Angkatlah mazmur prajurit
But for Love that claim-eth Lives for whom He died
Dia yang diberi nama Yesus Harus berada di pihak-Nya.
By Thy love con-strain-ing, By Thy grace Di-vine,
We are on the Lord's side, Sav-iour, we are Thine.

lines.en: Not for weight of glory,
lines.id: Fierce may be the con-flict Strong may be the foe,

lines.en: Not for crown and palm,
lines.id: But the King's own ar-my None can o-ver-throw

lines.en: Enter we the army,
lines.id: Di sekeliling Stand-ard-nya, Kemenangan terjamin

lines.en: Raise the warrior psalm;
lines.id: For His truth un-chang-ing, Makes the tri-umph sure.

lines.en: But for Love that claimeth
lines.id: Mendaftar dengan gembira Dengan rahmat Ilahi-Mu,

lines.en: Lives for whom he died:
lines.id: We are on the Lord's side, Sav-iour, we are Thine.

lines.en: He whom Jesus nameth
Must be on his side.
By thy love constraining,
By thy grace Divine,
Jesus, thou has bought us,
Not with gold or gem,
But with thine own lifeblood
For thy diadem:
With thy blessing filling
Each who comes to thee,
Thou hast made us willing,
Thou has made us free.
By thy grand redemption,
By thy grace Divine,
Fierce may be the conflict,
Strong may be the foe,
But the King's own army
None can overthrow:
Round his standard ranging,
Vict'ry is secure;
For his truth unchanging
Makes the triumph sure.
Joyfully enlisting
By thy grace Divine,

title_id: Siapa yang berada di pihak Tuhan

title_en: Fill Thou My Life, O Lord My God
title_ko: 나의 하나님 여호와여 내 생명을 채우소서 (자체번역)

lines.en: Fill thou my life, O Lord my God,
lines.ko: 나의 하나님 여호와여 내 생명을 채우소서

lines.en: In ev'ry part with praise,
That my whole being may proclaim
lines.ko: 내 온 존재가 선포할 수 있도록

lines.en: Thy being and thy ways.
Not for the lip of praise alone,
Nor e'en the praising heart,
I ask, but for a life made up
Of praise in ev'ry part;
Praise in the common things of life,
Its goings out and in,
Praise in each duty and each deed,
However small and mean.
Fill ev'ry part of me with praise;
lines.ko: 나의 모든 부분을 찬양으로 채워 주소서.

lines.en: Let all my being speak
Of thee and of they love, O Lord,
Poor though I be, and weak.
So shalt thou, Lord, from me, e'en me,
Receive the glory due,
And so shall I begin on earth
The song for ever new.
So shall no part of day or night
lines.ko: 그러므로 낮이나 밤의 일부가 되지 않을 것이다

lines.en: From sacredness be free:
But all my life, in ev'ry step,
Be fellowship with thee.

title_en: Jesus, Master, Whose I Am

lines.en: Jesus, Master, whose I am,
Purchased thine alone to be
By thy blood, O spotless Lamb,
lines.ko: 오 흠 없는 어린 양이여, 주의 피를 의지하여

lines.en: Shed so willingly for me,
Let my heart be all thine own,
lines.ko: 내 마음이 온전히 당신의 것이 되게 하소서.

lines.en: Let me live to thee alone.
Jesus, Master, I am thine:
Keep me faithful, keep me near;
lines.ko: 나를 충실하게 지켜주시고, 가까이 있게 해주세요.

lines.en: Let thy presence in me shine
lines.ko: 내 안에 당신의 존재를 빛나게 하소서

lines.en: All my homeward way to cheer.
Jesus, at thy feet I fall,
lines.ko: 예수여, 내가 당신 발 앞에 엎드러지나이다

lines.en: O be thou my all in all.
Jesus, Master, whom I serve,
Though so feebly and so ill,
Strengthen hand and heart and nerve
All thy bidding to fulfil.
Open thou mine eyes to see
All the work thou hast for me.
lines.ko: 당신이 나를 위해 모든 일을 하셨습니다.

lines.en: Lord, thou needest not, I know,
lines.ko: 주님, 그럴 필요가 없다는 것을 압니다.

lines.en: Service such as I can bring;
Yet I long to prove and show
Full allegiance to my King.
Thou an honor art to me:
Let me be a praise to thee.

title_en: Jesus Calls Us

lines.en: [English lyrics not available in the database for this revised hymn]
lines.ko: [이 개정된 찬송가의 데이터베이스에는 영어 가사가 없습니다.]

title_en: Jesus Bids Us Shine

lines.en: Jesus bids us shine
With a pure, clear light,
Like a little candle
Burning in the night.
In this world of darkness
So let us shine
You in your small corner,
And I in mine.
Jesus bids us shine,
First of all for him;
Well he sees and knows it,
lines.ko: 글쎄요, 그 사람은 그것을 보고 알고 있어요.

lines.en: If our light grows dim.
He looks down from heaven
To see us shine
You in your small corner,
And I in mine.
Jesus bids us shine,
Then, for all around;
Many kinds of darkness
In the world are found
Sin and want and sorrow;
So we must shine
You in your small corner,
And I in mine.

title_en: Take Thou Our Minds, Dear Lord

lines.en: [English lyrics not available in the database for this revised hymn]
lines.ko: [이 개정된 찬송가의 데이터베이스에는 영어 가사가 없습니다.]

title_en: You Came to Us, Dear Jesus

title_en: Though I May Speak with Bravest Fire
title_ko: 비록 내가 가장 용감한 불에 대해 이야기할지라도 (자체번역)

lines.en: [English lyrics not available in the database for this revised hymn]
lines.ko: [이 개정된 찬송가의 데이터베이스에는 영어 가사가 없습니다.]

title_en: Guide Me, O Thou Great Jehovah

lines.en: Guide me, O thou great Jehovah,
lines.id: Bimbinglah aku, ya Je-ho-vah yang agung,

lines.en: Pilgrim through this barren land;
lines.id: Peziarah melalui tanah bra-ren ini

lines.en: I am weak, but thou art mighty;
lines.ko: 하늘 양식 하늘 양식 먹여 주시옵소서
lines.id: Aku lemah, tapi Engkau perkasa

lines.en: Hold me with thy pow'rful hand;
lines.id: Pegang aku dengan tangan-Mu yang penuh kuasa

lines.en: Bread of heaven, Bread of heaven,
lines.id: Roti surga, Roti surga,

lines.en: Feed me till I want no more.
lines.id: Beri aku makan sampai aku tidak menginginkannya lagi,
Beri aku makan sampai aku tidak menginginkannya lagi.

lines.en: Open now the crystal fountain,
lines.id: Buka sekarang air mancur kristal,

lines.en: Whence the healing stream doth flow;
lines.ko: 불과 구름 기둥으로 나를 인도 하소서
lines.id: Dari sanalah aliran penyembuhan mengalir

lines.en: Let the fire and cloudy pillar
lines.ko: 나의 주여 나의 주여 힘과 방패 되소서
lines.id: Biarkan api dan awan menjadi pilar

lines.en: Lead me all my journey through;
lines.id: Pimpin aku sepanjang perjalananku

lines.en: Strong Deliverer, strong Deliverer,
lines.id: Penghantar yang kuat, Penghantar yang kuat,

lines.en: Be thou still my Strength and Shield.
lines.id: Tetaplah Engkau Kekuatan dan Perisaiku,
Jadilah Engkau tetap menjadi Kekuatan dan Perisaiku.

lines.en: When I tread the verge of Jordan,
lines.ko: 요단강을 건널 때에 겁이 없게 하시고
lines.id: Saat aku menginjak tepi Jor-dan,

lines.en: Bid my anxious fears subside;
lines.ko: 저기 뵈는 가나안땅 편히 닿게 하소서
lines.id: Hilangkan kecemasanku dan ketakutan kita

lines.en: Death of death, and hell's Destruction,
lines.id: Kematian kematian, dan kehancuran neraka,

lines.en: Land me safe on Canaan's side;
lines.id: Bawa aku aman di sisi Ca-naan

lines.en: Songs of praises, songs of praises
lines.id: Lagu pujian, lagu pujian

lines.en: I will ever give to thee.
lines.id: Aku akan selalu memberikannya kepada-Mu.
Aku akan selalu memberikannya kepada-Mu. Amin.

title_id: Bimbinglah Aku, ya Yehova yang Agung

title_en: Savior, like a Shepherd Lead Us

lines.en: Saviour, like a Shepherd lead us,
lines.ko: 선한 목자 되신 우리 주 항상 인도 하시고
lines.id: Selamatkan kami, seperti kawanan domba yang menuntun kami

lines.en: Much we need thy tend'rest care;
lines.ko: 푸른 풀밭 좋은 곳에서 우리 먹여 주소서
lines.id: Kami sangat membutuhkan perhatian lembut-Mu.

lines.en: In thy pleasant pastures feed us,
lines.ko: 선한 목자 구세주여 항상 인도 하소서
lines.id: Di padang rumput-Mu yang menyenangkan, beri kami makan

lines.en: For our use thy folds prepare:
lines.ko: 선한 목자 구세주여 항상 인도 하소서
lines.id: Untuk kami gunakan lipatan-Mu yang sudah disiapkan sebelumnya.

lines.en: Blessed Jesus, blessed Jesus,
lines.id: Yesus yang terberkati, Yesus yang terberkati!

lines.en: Thou hast bought us, thine we are.
lines.id: Engkau telah membeli kami milik-Mu.
Yesus yang terberkati, Yesus yang terberkati!
Engkau telah membeli kami milik-Mu.

lines.en: We are thine; do thou befriend us,
lines.ko: 양의 문이 되신 예수여 우리 영접 하시고
lines.id: Kami adalah milik-Mu, jadilah teman kami

lines.en: Be the Guardian of our way;
lines.ko: 길을 잃은 양의 무리를 항상 인도 하소서
lines.id: Jadilah Penjaga jalan kami.

lines.en: Keep thy flock, from sin defend us,
lines.ko: 선한 목자 구세주여 기도 들어 주소서
lines.id: Jagalah kawanan-Mu dari dosa, lindungi kami

lines.en: Seek us when we go astray:
lines.ko: 선한 목자 구세주여 기도 들어 주소서
lines.id: Carilah kami saat kami tersesat.

lines.en: Blessed Jesus, blessed Jesus,
lines.id: Yesus yang terberkati, Yesus yang terberkati!

lines.en: Hear the children when they pray.
lines.id: Dengarlah, hai, dengarkanlah kami ketika kami berdoa.
Yesus yang terberkati, Yesus yang terberkati!
Dengarlah, hai, dengarkanlah kami ketika kami berdoa.

lines.en: Thou hast promised to receive us,
lines.ko: 흠이 많고 약한 우리를 용납 하여 주시고
lines.id: Engkau telah berjanji untuk menerima kami kembali

lines.en: Poor and sinful though we be;
lines.ko: 주의 넓고 크신 은혜로 자유 얻게 하셨네
lines.id: Kita memang miskin dan penuh dosa

lines.en: Thou hast mercy to relieve us,
lines.id: Engkau berbelas kasihan untuk membebaskan kami kembali,

lines.en: Grace to cleanse, and pow'r to free:
lines.id: Anugerah untuk menyucikan, dan kuasa untuk memerdekakan.

lines.en: Blessed Jesus, blessed Jesus,
lines.id: Yesus yang terberkati, Yesus yang terberkati!

lines.en: Let us early turn to thee.
lines.id: Kami akan segera berpaling kepada-Mu.
Yesus yang terberkati, Yesus yang terberkati!
Kami akan segera berpaling kepada-Mu.

lines.en: Early let us seek thy favor;
lines.ko: 일찍 주의 뜻을 따라서 살아가게 하시고
lines.id: Marilah kami memohon kemurahan-Mu sejak dini,

lines.en: Early let us do thy will;
lines.ko: 주의 크신 사랑 베푸사 따라 가게 하소서
lines.id: Marilah kami segera melakukan kehendak-Mu

lines.en: Blessed Lord and only Saviour,
lines.ko: 선한 목자 구세주여 항상 인도 하소서
lines.id: Tuhan Yang Terberkati dan satu-satunya Juruselamat,

lines.en: With thy love our bosoms fill
lines.ko: 선한 목자 구세주여 항상 인도 하소서 아멘
lines.id: Dengan cinta-Mu isi dada kami.

lines.en: Blessed Jesus, blessed Jesus,
lines.id: Yesus yang terberkati, Yesus yang terberkati!

lines.id: Engkau telah mencintai kami, tetap mencintai kami

Engkau telah mencintai kami, masih mencintai kami. Amin.

title_en: He Leadeth Me: O Blessed Thought!

lines.en: He lead-eth me: O bless-ed thought!
lines.id: Dia menuntunku: Wahai pemikiran yang diberkati!

lines.ko: 주야에 자고 깨는 것 예수가 거느리시네
lines.en: O words with heav'n-ly com-fort fraught
lines.id: Oh, kata-kata yang penuh dengan kenyamanan surgawi

lines.ko: 주 날 항상 돌보시고 날 친히 거느리시네

lines.id: Apa pun yang saya lakukan, di mana pun saya berada,

lines.ko: 때때로 괴롬 당하면 때때로 기쁨 누리네

lines.id: Di tepi air yang tenang, di tengah laut yang bermasalah,

lines.en: Still 'tis His hand that lead-eth me.

lines.id: Dia memimpinku, Dia memimpinku

lines.en: By His own hand He lead-eth me.
lines.id: Dengan tangan-Nya sendiri Dia memimpin aku.

lines.en: His faith-ful fol-l'wer I would be,

lines.en: Con-tent, what-ev-er lot I see,
lines.id: Konten, apa pun yang saya lihat,

lines.ko: 주 날 항상 돌보시고 날 친히 거느리시네
lines.en: Since 'tis my God that lead-eth me.

lines.en: He lead-eth me, He lead-eth me
lines.id: Dia memimpinku, Dia memimpinku

lines.id: Dengan tangan-Nya sendiri Dia memimpin aku.

lines.en: His faith-ful fol-l'wer I would be,
lines.id: Saya akan menjadi pengikut setianya,

lines.en: For by His hand He lead-eth me.
lines.id: Sebab dengan tangan-Nya Dia memimpin aku.

lines.ko: 이 세상 이별 할 때에 마귀의 권세 이기네

lines.id: Dan ketika tugasku di bumi selesai,

lines.en: Since God through Jor-dan lead-eth me.

lines.id: Dia memimpinku, Dia memimpinku

lines.id: Dengan tangan-Nya sendiri Dia memimpin aku.

title_id: Dia Memimpin Aku: Wahai Pemikiran yang Terberkati

title_en: Jesus, Savior, Pilot Me

lines.en: Jesus, Saviour, pilot me
lines.ko: 나는 갈길 모르니 주여 인도 하소서

lines.id: Pimpin aku, Tuhan, agar aku tahu

lines.en: Jesus, Saviour, pilot me.

lines.en: As a mother stills her child,
lines.id: Yesus, Juruselamat, dengarkan seruanku

lines.en: Thou canst hush the ocean wild;

lines.id: Ajari aku, Tuhan, untuk belajar dari-Mu

lines.en: When thou sayest to them, "Be still."
lines.id: Apa yang Anda ingin saya lakukan.

lines.en: Wondrous Sovereign of the sea,
lines.id: Ajari aku, Tuhan, untuk belajar dari-Mu

lines.en: Jesus, Saviour, pilot me.
lines.id: Apa yang Anda ingin saya lakukan.

lines.ko: 아이 같이 어리니 나를 도와 주소서
lines.id: Selamat, bantu aku! Juga tidak dilupakan

lines.id: Aku masih seperti bayi.

lines.en: 'Twixt me and the peaceful rest,
lines.ko: 힘도 없고 약하니 나를 도와 주소서

lines.en: Then, while leaning on thy breast,
lines.id: Tolong aku, Tuhan, penuhi kebutuhanku.

lines.id: Lemah dan tak berdaya, inilah aku memohon,

lines.en: "Fear not, I will pilot thee."
lines.id: Tolong aku, Tuhan, penuhi kebutuhanku.

lines.id: Tenanglah, Tuhan, hatiku berduka

lines.ko: 의지 없이 다니니 나를 위로 하소서

Hiburlah aku dan jadilah tempat tinggalku.

title_en: O God, My Faithful God

lines.en: [English lyrics not available in the database for this revised hymn]

title_en: He Who Would Valiant Be

lines.en: [English lyrics not available in the database for this revised hymn]
lines.ko: [이 개정된 찬송가의 데이터베이스에는 영어 가사가 없습니다.]

title_en: Rejoice, Ye Pure in Heart

lines.en: Rejoice, ye pure in heart,
Rejoice, give thanks, and sing:
Your festal banner wave on high,
The cross of Christ your King.
Rejoice, rejoice,
Rejoice, give thanks and sing.
Bright youth and snow-crowned age,
Strong men and maidens meek,
Raise high your free, exulting song,
lines.ko: 당신의 자유롭고 환희에 찬 노래를 높이 올려라.

lines.en: God's wondrous praises speak.
With all the angel choirs,
With all the saints on earth,
Pour out the strains of joy and bliss,
True rapture, noblest mirth!
Yes, on through life's long path,
Still chanting as ye go;
lines.ko: 당신이 가면서 여전히 노래를 부르고 있습니다.

lines.en: From youth to age, by night and day,
In gladness and in woe.
At last the march shall end,
The wearied ones shall rest,
The pilgrims find their Father's house,
Jerusalem the blest.
Then on, ye pure in heart,
Rejoice, give thanks, and sing;
Your glorious banner wave on high,
The cross of Christ your King.

alt_titles: Rejoice, ye pure in heart

title_en: All the Way My Savior Leads Me

lines.en: All the way my Saviour leads me
lines.ko: 나의 갈 길 다 가도록 예수 인도 하시니
lines.id: Sepanjang jalan Juruselamatku menuntunku

lines.ko: 내 주안에 있는 긍휼 어찌 의심 하리요
lines.id: Apa yang harus saya tanyakan selain itu?

lines.en: Can I doubt his tender mercy
lines.ko: 믿음으로 사는 자는 하늘 위로 받겠네
lines.id: Bolehkah aku memuji belas kasihan-Nya yang lembut,

lines.en: Who through life has been my Guide?
lines.ko: 무슨 일을 만나든지 만사 형통 하리라
lines.id: Siapa dalam hidup yang menjadi pembimbingku?

lines.en: Heav'nly peace, divinest comfort,
lines.ko: 무슨 일을 만나든지 만사 형통 하리라
lines.id: Kedamaian surgawi, kenyamanan surgawi,

lines.id: Di sini dengan iman kepada-Nya untuk berdiam

lines.id: Karena aku tahu apa yang akan terjadi padaku,

lines.en: Jesus doeth all things well.
lines.id: Yesus melakukan segala sesuatu dengan baik
Karena aku tahu apa yang akan terjadi padaku,
Yesus melakukan segala sesuatu dengan baik.

lines.en: All the way my Saviour leads me,

lines.id: Sepanjang jalan Juruselamatku menuntunku

lines.id: Menyemangati setiap jalan berliku yang kulalui

lines.id: Memberiku rahmat dalam setiap cobaan,

lines.id: Memberiku makan dengan roti hidup

lines.en: And my soul athirst may be,

lines.en: Gushing from the rock before me,
lines.id: Memancar dari Batu di hadapanku,

Memancar dari Batu di hadapanku,
Lihatlah, aku melihat sumber kegembiraan.

lines.en: All the way my Saviour leads me

lines.id: Sepanjang jalan Juruselamatku menuntunku

lines.id: Saat rohku berpakaian, abadi,
