lines.id: Tuhan menghilangkan rasa takut kita

lines.en: Ev'ry heart be quaking,
lines.id: Dosa dan neraka dalam konflik pun jatuh

lines.en: Jesus calms my fear.
lines.id: Dengan badai terberat yang menghadang kita:

lines.en: Lightnings flash and thunders crash;
lines.id: Yesus tidak akan mengecewakan kita.

lines.en: Yet, though sin and hell assail me,
Jesus will not fail me.
Satan, I defy thee;
lines.ko: 기쁨의 주 예수 우리 함께하니 슬픔 없어라
lines.id: Oleh karena itu, semua pikiran tentang kesedihan! Demi Tuhan yang penuh kegembiraan,

lines.en: Death, I now decry thee;
lines.id: Ya Tuhan, masuklah

lines.en: Fear, I bid thee cease.
lines.ko: 무슨 일을 만나도 주 안에는 기쁨 있네
lines.id: Mereka yang mengasihi Bapa, Meski badai menerpa,

lines.en: World, thou shalt not harm me
lines.id: Masih memiliki kedamaian di dalam.

lines.en: Nor thy threats alarm me
lines.id: Ya, apa pun yang harus kita tanggung di sini,

lines.en: While I sing of peace.
lines.id: Masih pada-Mu terletak kesenangan paling murni,

lines.en: God's great pow'r guards ev'ry hour;
lines.id: Ya Tuhan, Harta yang tak ternilai harganya! Amin.

lines.en: Earth and all its depths adore him,
Silent bow before him.
Hence with earthly treasure!
Thou art all my pleasure,
Jesus, all my choice.
Hence, thou empty glory!
Naught to me thy story,
Told with tempting voice.
Pain or loss or shame or cross
Shall not from my Saviour move me,
Since he deigns to love me.
Hence, all fear and sadness!
For the Lord of gladness,
Jesus, enters in.
Those who love the Father,
Though the storms may gather,
Still have peace within.
Yea, whate'er I here must bear,
Thou art still my purest pleasure,
Jesus, priceless treasure.

title_id: Yesus, Harta yang Tak Ternilai harganya

title_en: In Sweet Communion, Lord, with Thee
title_ko: 주님, 당신과 함께하는 감미로운 교제 가운데 (자체번역)

lines.en: From Psalm 73:23-28
In sweet communion, Lord, with thee
lines.ko: 주님, 당신과 함께 감미로운 교제를 나누십시오

lines.en: I constantly abide;
My hand thou holdest in thine own
To keep me near thy side.
lines.ko: 나를 당신 곁에 머물게 하기 위해.

lines.en: Thy counsel through my earthly way
lines.ko: 나의 세상적인 길을 통한 당신의 조언

lines.en: Shall guide me and control,
And then to glory afterward
Thou wilt receive my soul.
Whom have I, Lord, in heav'n but thee,
lines.ko: 주님, 하늘에서 당신 외에 나에게 누가 있겠습니까?

lines.en: To whom my thoughts aspire?
And, having thee, on earth is nought
lines.ko: 그리고 당신을 갖는 것은 지구상에서 아무것도 아닙니다

lines.en: That I can yet desire.
lines.ko: 나는 아직 그것을 원할 수 있습니다.

lines.en: Though flesh and heart should faint and fail,
The Lord will ever be
The strength and portion of my heart,
My God eternally.
To live apart from God is death,
'Tis good his face to seek;
lines.ko: 그의 얼굴을 찾는 것은 좋은 일입니다.

lines.en: My refuge is the living God,
His praise I long to speak.

title_en: Jesus, My Lord, My God, My All
title_ko: 예수 나의 주 나의 하나님 나의 전부 (자체번역)

lines.en: [English lyrics not available in the database for this revised hymn]
lines.ko: [이 개정된 찬송가의 데이터베이스에는 영어 가사가 없습니다.]

title_en: Let Us Praise God Together

lines.en: [English lyrics not available in the database for this revised hymn]
lines.ko: [이 개정된 찬송가의 데이터베이스에는 영어 가사가 없습니다.]

title_en: O God beyond All Praising

lines.en: [English lyrics not available in the database for this revised hymn]
lines.ko: [이 개정된 찬송가의 데이터베이스에는 영어 가사가 없습니다.]

title_en: As Pants the Hart for Cooling Streams

lines.en: From Psalm 42
As pants the hart for cooling streams
When heated in the chase,
So longs my soul, O God, for thee,
lines.ko: 오 하나님, 내 영혼이 당신을 갈망합니다.

lines.en: And thy refreshing grace.
For thee, my God, the living God,
My thirsty soul doth pine;
lines.ko: 나의 목마른 영혼이 소나무를 삼키고 있습니다.

lines.en: O when shall I behold thy face,
lines.ko: 오 내가 언제 주의 얼굴을 뵈오리이까

lines.en: Thou Majesty Divine!
Why restless, why cast down, my soul?
lines.ko: 내 영혼이여, 왜 불안하고, 왜 낙담합니까?

lines.en: Trust God; and he'll employ
lines.ko: 하나님을 신뢰하십시오. 그리고 그 사람은 고용할 거야

lines.en: His aid for thee, and change these sighs
lines.ko: 당신을 위한 그분의 도움, 그리고 이 한숨을 바꾸십시오

lines.en: To thankful hymns of joy.
Why restless, why cast down, my soul?
lines.ko: 내 영혼이여, 왜 불안하고, 왜 낙담합니까?

lines.en: Hope still; and thou shalt sing
lines.ko: 아직도 희망이 있습니다. 그리고 너는 노래할지니라

lines.en: The praise of him who is thy God,
Thy health's eternal spring.

title_en: As the Hart Longs for Flowing Streams

lines.en: [English lyrics not available in the database for this revised hymn]
lines.ko: [이 개정된 찬송가의 데이터베이스에는 영어 가사가 없습니다.]

title_en: O God Eternal, You Are My God!
title_ko: 오 영원하신 하나님, 당신은 나의 하나님이십니다! (자체번역)

lines.en: [English lyrics not available in the database for this revised hymn]
lines.ko: [이 개정된 찬송가의 데이터베이스에는 영어 가사가 없습니다.]

title_en: Call Jehovah Your Salvation

lines.en: From Psalm 91
Call Jehovah thy Salvation,
Rest beneath th'Almighty's shade,
lines.ko: 전능하신 하나님의 그늘 아래서 편히 쉬소서

lines.en: In his secret habitation
Dwell, and never be dismayed:
There no tumult shall alarm thee,
lines.ko: 어떤 소란도 당신을 놀라게 하지 못할 것입니다.

lines.en: Thou shalt dread no hidden snare:
lines.ko: 너는 숨겨진 올무를 두려워하지 않을 것이다.

lines.en: Guile nor violence can harm thee,
lines.ko: 교활함이나 폭력도 당신에게 해를 끼칠 수 없습니다.

lines.en: In eternal safeguard there.
From the sword at noonday wasting,
From the noisome pestilence,
In the depth of midnight blasting,
God shall be thy sure Defence:
He shall charge his angel legions
lines.ko: 그는 그의 천사 군단을 지휘할 것이다

lines.en: Watch and ward o'er thee to keep;
Though thou walk through hostile regions,
Though in desert wilds thou sleep.
lines.ko: 비록 사막의 황야에서 당신은 잠을 자고 있습니다.

lines.en: Since, with pure and firm affection
Thou on God hast set thy love,
With the wings of his protection
He will shield thee from above:
lines.ko: 그분께서 너를 위에서 보호해 주실 것이다.

lines.en: Thou shalt call on him in trouble,
He will hearken, he will save;
Here for grief reward thee double,
lines.ko: 여기서 슬픔에 대한 보상으로 두 배로 보상받으십시오.

lines.en: Crown with life beyond the grave.

title_en: What Time I Am Afraid

lines.en: From Psalm 56:3-4, 11-13
What time I am afraid
I put my trust in thee;
In God I rest, and praise
His Word, so rich and free.
In God I put my trust,
I neither doubt nor fear,
For man can never harm
lines.ko: 사람은 결코 해를 끼칠 수 없기 때문이다

lines.en: With God, my Helper, near.
In God, the Lord, I rest,
His Word of grace I praise,
His promise stands secure,
Nor fear nor foe dismays.
Upon me are thy vows,
O God, in whom I live;
lines.ko: 오 하나님, 내가 그 안에 살고 있습니다.

lines.en: The sacrifice of praise
To thee I now will give.
For thou hast saved from death,
From falling kept me free,
That in the light of life
My walk may be with thee.
lines.ko: 나의 산책은 당신과 함께 할 수 있습니다.

title_en: In Silence My Soul Is Waiting
title_ko: 침묵 속에서 내 영혼은 기다리고 있다 (자체번역)

lines.en: [English lyrics not available in the database for this revised hymn]
lines.ko: [이 개정된 찬송가의 데이터베이스에는 영어 가사가 없습니다.]

title_en: God Is My Strong Salvation

lines.en: From Psalm 27
God is my strong Salvation;
What foe have I to fear?
In darkness and temptation
My Light, my Help is near.
lines.ko: 나의 빛, 나의 도움이 가까이 왔느니라.

lines.en: Though hosts encamp around me,
lines.ko: 호스트들이 내 주위에 진을 치고 있지만,

lines.en: Firm to the fight I stand;
What terror can confound me,
lines.ko: 어떤 공포가 나를 혼란스럽게 할 수 있는가?

lines.en: With God at my right hand?
Place on the Lord reliance,
My soul, with courage wait;
His truth be thine affiance,
lines.ko: 그의 진실이 당신의 서약이 되게 하소서.

lines.en: When faint and desolate.
His might thy heart shall strengthen,
His love thy joy increase;
Mercy thy days shall lengthen;
lines.ko: 자비를 베풀어 당신의 날이 길어질 것입니다.

lines.en: The Lord will give thee peace.

title_en: Who Trusts in God, a Strong Abode

lines.en: Who trusts in God, a strong abode
In heav'n and earth possesses;
Who looks in love to Christ above,
lines.ko: 위에 계신 그리스도를 사랑으로 바라보는 자는

lines.en: No fear his heart oppresses.
lines.ko: 그의 마음이 억압되는 것을 두려워하지 마십시오.

lines.en: In thee alone, dear Lord, we own
lines.ko: 사랑하는 주님, 오직 당신 안에만 우리가 있습니다

lines.en: Sweet hope and consolation;
Our shield from foes, our balm for woes,
lines.ko: 적으로부터의 우리의 방패, 비애에 대한 우리의 향유,

lines.en: Our great and sure salvation.
Though Satan's wrath beset our path,
And worldly scorn assail us,
While thou art near we will not fear,
lines.ko: 당신이 가까이 계시는 동안 우리는 두려워하지 않을 것입니다.

lines.en: Thy strength shall never fail us:
lines.ko: 당신의 힘은 결코 우리를 실망시키지 않을 것입니다.

lines.en: Thy rod and staff shall keep us safe,
lines.ko: 주의 지팡이와 지팡이가 우리를 안전하게 지키시리이다

lines.en: And guide our steps for ever;
Nor shades of death, nor hell beneath,
lines.ko: 죽음의 그늘도 없고 그 아래 지옥도 없고

lines.en: Our souls from thee shall sever.
In all the strife of mortal life
Our feet shall stand securely;
Temptation's hour shall lose its power,
lines.ko: 유혹의 시간은 그 힘을 잃을 것이다.

lines.en: For thou shalt guard us surely.
O God, renew, with heav'nly dew,
lines.ko: 오 하나님, 하늘의 이슬로 새롭게 하소서.

lines.en: Our body, soul, and spirit,
Until we stand at thy right hand,
Through Jesus' saving merit.

title_en: Commit Now All Your Griefs

lines.en: [English lyrics not available in the database for this revised hymn]
lines.ko: [이 개정된 찬송가의 데이터베이스에는 영어 가사가 없습니다.]

title_en: If Thou But Suffer God to Guide Thee

lines.en: If thou but suffer God to guide thee,
lines.ko: 너 하나님께 이끌리어 일평생 주만 바라면
lines.id: Jika kamu membiarkan Tuhan membimbingmu

lines.en: And hope in him through all thy ways,
lines.ko: 너 어려울 때 힘 주시고 언제나 지켜주시리
lines.id: Dan berharaplah kepada-Nya melalui segala jalanmu,

lines.en: He'll give thee strength, whatever betide thee,
lines.ko: 주 크신 사랑 믿는 자 그 반석 위에 서리라
lines.id: Dia akan memberimu kekuatan, apa pun yang ada di sampingmu,

lines.en: And bear thee through the evil days:
lines.id: Dan membawamu melewati hari-hari yang jahat.

lines.en: Who trusts in God's unchanging love
lines.id: Siapa yang percaya pada kasih Tuhan yang tidak berubah

lines.en: Builds on the rock that naught can move.
lines.id: Dibangun di atas batu yang tidak dapat digerakkan oleh apa pun.

lines.en: What can these anxious cares avail thee,
lines.ko: 너 설레는 맘 가다듬고 희망 중 기다리면서
lines.id: Taatilah hatimu yang gelisah, tenanglah

lines.en: These never-ceasing moans and sighs?
lines.ko: 그 은혜로신 주의 뜻과 사랑에 만족 하여라
lines.id: dan menunggu dengan penuh harapan ceria Untuk mengambil apa pun

lines.en: What can it help, if thou bewail thee
lines.ko: 우리를 불러 주신 주 마음의 소원 아신다
lines.id: Kehendak-Nya yang penuh rahmat

lines.en: O'er each dark moment as it flies?
lines.id: Kasih-Nya yang penuh pengertian tidak mengirimkan keraguan

lines.en: Our cross and trials do but press
lines.id: keinginan kita yang paling banyak diketahui

lines.en: The heavier for our bitterness.
lines.id: Kepada dia yang memilih kita untuk dirinya sendiri

lines.en: Only be still, and wait his leisure
lines.ko: 주 찬양하고 기도하며 네 본분 힘써 다하라
lines.id: Bernyanyi, berdoa,

lines.en: In cheerful hope, with heart content
lines.ko: 주 약속하신 모든 은혜 네게서 이뤄지리라
lines.id: dan jangan menyimpang dari jalan-Nya,

lines.en: To take whate'er thy Father's pleasure
lines.ko: 참되고 의지 하는 자 주께서 기억하시리 아멘
lines.id: Tetapi lakukanlah bagianmu dengan setia Percayalah pada janji kasih karunia-Nya yang melimpah,

lines.en: And all deserving love hath sent;
lines.id: Demikianlah hal-hal itu akan tergenapi di dalam kamu

lines.en: Nor doubt our inmost wants are known
lines.id: Tuhan belum pernah mengambil jiwa-jiwa yang membutuhkan

lines.en: To him who chose us for his own.
lines.id: yang benar-benar mempercayai-Nya.

lines.en: All are alike before the highest;
'Tis easy to our God, we know,
To raise thee up though low thou liest,
To make the rich man poor and low;
True wonders still by him are wrought
Who setteth up and brings to naught.
Sing, pray, and keep his ways unswerving,
So do thine own part faithfully,
And trust his word, though undeserving,
Thou yet shalt find it true for thee;
God never yet forsook at need
The soul that trusted him indeed.

title_id: Jika Aku Menderita Tuhan untuk Membimbingmu

title_en: Forever Trusting in the Lord

lines.en: From Psalm 37:3-7
Forever trusting in the Lord,
Take heed to do his will;
So shalt thou dwell within the land,
And he thy needs shall fill.
lines.ko: 그러면 그분께서 당신의 필요를 채워 주실 것입니다.

lines.en: Delight thee in the Lord, and he
Will grant thy heart's request;
To him commit thy way in faith,
And thus thou shalt be blessed.
And he shall make thy righteousness
Shine brightly as the light,
And as the burning noonday sun
Thy judgment shall be bright.
Rest in the Lord with quiet trust,
lines.ko: 조용한 신뢰로 주님 안에서 안식을 누리십시오.

lines.en: Wait patiently for him;
Though wickedness triumphant seem,
Let not thy faith grow dim.

title_en: Trust and Obey

lines.en: When we walk with the Lord
In the light of His word,
What a glory He sheds on our way!
lines.ko: 그분은 우리가 가는 길에 얼마나 큰 영광을 베푸셨는가!

lines.en: While we do His good will,
lines.ko: 우리가 그분의 선한 뜻을 행하는 동안,

lines.en: He abides with us still,
And with all who will trust and obey.
lines.ko: 그리고 신뢰하고 순종할 모든 사람과 함께.

lines.en: Trust and obey,
For there's no other way
To be happy in Jesus
But to trust and obey.
Not a shadow can rise,
Not a cloud in the skies,
But His smile quickly drives it away!
lines.ko: 그러나 그분의 미소는 재빨리 그것을 몰아냅니다!

lines.en: Not a doubt nor a fear,
Not a sigh nor a tear,
Can abide while we trust and obey.
lines.ko: 우리가 신뢰하고 순종하는 동안 지속될 수 있습니다.

lines.en: Trust and obey,
For there's no other way
To be happy in Jesus
But to trust and obey.
Not a burden we bear,
Not a sorrow we share,
But our toil He doth richly repay;
lines.ko: 그러나 그분은 우리의 수고를 풍성하게 갚아 주십니다.

lines.en: Not a grief nor a loss,
Not a frown nor a cross,
lines.ko: 눈살을 찌푸리는 것도 아니고 십자가도 아니고,

lines.en: But is blest if we trust and obey.
lines.ko: 그러나 우리가 믿고 순종하면 복이 있습니다.

lines.en: Trust and obey,
For there's no other way
To be happy in Jesus
But to trust and obey.
But we never can prove
lines.ko: 하지만 우리는 결코 증명할 수 없습니다

lines.en: The delights of His love,
Until all on the altar we lay;
lines.ko: 우리가 모두 제단 위에 누울 때까지;

lines.en: For the favour He shows,
And the joy He bestows,
Are for them who will trust and obey.
Trust and obey,
For there's no other way
To be happy in Jesus
But to trust and obey.
Then in fellowship sweet
We will sit at His feet,
lines.ko: 우리는 그분의 발 앞에 앉을 것입니다.

lines.en: Or we'll walk by His side in the way;
lines.ko: 아니면 우리는 그분과 함께 길을 걸을 것입니다.

lines.en: What He says we will do,
lines.ko: 그분이 말씀하신 대로 우리는 행할 것입니다.

lines.en: Where He sends we will go,
lines.ko: 그분이 보내시는 곳으로 우리는 갈 것입니다.

lines.en: Never fear, only trust and obey.
lines.ko: 결코 두려워하지 말고 오직 믿고 순종하십시오.

lines.en: Trust and obey,
For there's no other way
To be happy in Jesus
But to trust and obey.

title_en: Cast Your Burden on the Lord

lines.en: Father, we thank thee for the night,
And for the pleasant morning light;
lines.ko: 그리고 기분 좋은 아침 햇살을 위해;

lines.en: For rest and food and loving care,
And all that makes the day so fair.
lines.ko: 그리고 그 모든 것이 그날을 매우 공평하게 만듭니다.

lines.en: Help us to do the things we should,
lines.ko: 우리가 해야 할 일을 할 수 있도록 도와주세요.

lines.en: To be to others kind and good;
In all we do, in work, or play,
lines.ko: 우리가 하는 모든 일에서, 일할 때나 놀 때,

lines.en: To grow more loving ev'ry day.

alt_titles: Father, we thank thee for the night

title_en: I Need Thee Every Hour

lines.en: I need thee ev'ry hour,
lines.ko: 주 음성 외에는 참 기쁨 없도다
lines.id: Aku membutuhkan Engkau setiap saat,

lines.en: Most gracious Lord;
lines.id: Tuhan Yang Maha Pemurah

lines.en: No tender voice like thine
lines.id: Tidak ada suara lembut seperti itu

lines.en: Can peace afford.
lines.id: Kedamaian-Mu mampu tercapai
BersamaMu betapa senangnya aku menangkapnya!
Setiap jam penuh kegembiraan!
Oh berkatilah aku sekarang, Juruselamatku,
aku datang kepada-Mu.

lines.en: I need thee, O I need thee,
lines.id: Aku membutuhkan Engkau setiap saat,

lines.en: Ev'ry hour I need thee,
lines.ko: 주 함께 계시면 큰 시험 이기네
lines.id: Tetaplah berada di dekatmu

lines.en: O bless me now, my Saviour,
lines.id: Godaan kehilangan kekuatannya

lines.en: I come to thee.
lines.id: Saat Engkau sudah dekat.
BersamaMu betapa senangnya aku menangkapnya!
Setiap jam penuh kegembiraan!
Oh berkatilah aku sekarang, Juruselamatku,
aku datang kepada-Mu.

lines.en: I need thee ev'ry hour,
lines.id: Aku membutuhkan Engkau setiap saat,

lines.en: Stay thou near by;
lines.id: Dalam suka atau duka

lines.en: Temptations lose their pow'r
lines.id: Datanglah dengan cepat dan tunggulah,

lines.en: When thou art nigh.
lines.id: Atau hidup ini sia-sia.
BersamaMu betapa senangnya aku menangkapnya!
Setiap jam penuh kegembiraan!
Oh berkatilah aku sekarang, Juruselamatku,
aku datang kepada-Mu.

lines.en: I need thee ev'ry hour,
lines.id: Aku membutuhkan Engkau setiap saat,

lines.en: In joy or pain;
lines.ko: 주 명령 따를 때 늘 계시옵소서
lines.id: Ajari aku kehendak-Mu

lines.en: Come quickly, and abide,
lines.id: Dan pesta-pesta-Mu yang kaya

lines.en: Or life is vain.
lines.ko: 나 주께 왔사오니 복 주옵소서 아멘
lines.id: Dalam diriku terisi penuh.
BersamaMu betapa senangnya aku menangkapnya!
Setiap jam penuh kegembiraan!
Oh berkatilah aku sekarang, Juruselamatku,
aku datang kepada-Mu.

lines.en: I need thee ev'ry hour,
Teach me thy will,
And thy rich promises
In me fulfil.
I need thee ev'ry hour,
Most Holy One;
O make me thine indeed,
Thou blessed Son.

alt_titles: I need thee, O I need thee

title_en: Only Trust Him

lines.en: Come, ev'ry soul by sin oppressed,
lines.ko: 죄 짐에 눌린 사람은 다 주께 나오라
lines.id: Marilah, setiap jiwa yang tertindas oleh dosa,

lines.en: There's mercy with the Lord,
lines.ko: 주 말씀 의지 할 때에 곧 평안 얻으리
lines.id: Ada belas kasihan pada Tuhan,

lines.en: And he will surely give you rest,
lines.id: Dan Dia pasti akan memberi ketenangan kepadamu,

lines.en: By trusting in his Word.
lines.id: Dengan percaya pada firman-Nya.
Hanya percaya pada-Nya, hanya percaya pada-Nya,
Percayalah hanya pada-Nya sekarang
Dia akan menyelamatkanmu, Dia akan menyelamatkanmu,
Dia akan menyelamatkanmu sekarang.

lines.en: Only trust him, only trust him,
lines.ko: 참 구원 주신 주께서 보혈을 흘렸네
lines.id: Karena Yesus menumpahkan darah-Nya yang berharga

lines.en: Only trust him now;
lines.ko: 눈 같이 희게 할 피에 온몸을 잠그세
lines.id: Berkah berlimpah yang harus disimpan

lines.en: He will save you, he will save you,
lines.id: Hanya percaya pada-Nya, hanya percaya pada-Nya,

lines.en: He will save you now.
lines.id: Percayalah hanya pada-Nya sekarang
Dia akan menyelamatkanmu, Dia akan menyelamatkanmu,
Dia akan menyelamatkanmu sekarang.
Terjun sekarang ke dalam banjir kriminal
Airnya seputih salju.

lines.en: For Jesus shed his precious blood
lines.ko: 길 되신 우리 구세주 늘 인도 하시네
lines.id: Ya, Yesus adalah Kebenaran, Jalan,

lines.en: Rich blessings to bestow;
lines.ko: 너 지체 말고 믿으면 참 복을 받겠네
lines.id: Itu membawa Anda untuk beristirahat

lines.en: Plunge now into the crimson flood
lines.id: Percayalah kepada-Nya tanpa penundaan,

lines.en: That washes white as snow.
lines.id: Dan Anda sepenuhnya diberkati.
Hanya percaya pada-Nya, hanya percaya pada-Nya,
Percayalah hanya pada-Nya sekarang
Dia akan menyelamatkanmu, Dia akan menyelamatkanmu,
Dia akan menyelamatkanmu sekarang.

lines.en: Yes, Jesus is the Truth, the Way,
lines.ko: 온 성도 하나 되어서 영광 길 걸으면
lines.id: Marilah, bergabunglah dengan band suci ini,

lines.en: That leads you into rest;
lines.id: Dan seterusnya,

lines.en: Believe in him without delay,
lines.id: Untuk tinggal di tanah surgawi itu,

lines.en: And you are fully blessed.
lines.id: Dimana kegembiraan abadi mengalir.
Hanya percaya pada-Nya, hanya percaya pada-Nya,
Percayalah hanya pada-Nya sekarang
Dia akan menyelamatkanmu, Dia akan menyelamatkanmu
Dia akan menyelamatkanmu sekarang.

lines.en: Come then, and join this holy band,
And on to glory go,
To dwell in that celestial land,
Where joys immortal flow.

alt_titles: Only trust him, only trust him, only trust him now

title_en: Day by Day and with Each Passing Moment

lines.en: [English lyrics not available in the database for this revised hymn]
lines.ko: [이 개정된 찬송가의 데이터베이스에는 영어 가사가 없습니다.]

title_en: Praise the Savior, Ye Who Know Him!

lines.en: Praise the Sav-iour, ye who know Him!
lines.id: Pujilah Juruselamat, hai kamu yang mengenal Dia!

lines.ko: 맘과 뜻과 힘 다하여 경배 드리세
lines.en: Who can tell how much we owe Him?
lines.id: Siapa yang tahu seberapa besar utang kita kepada-Nya?

lines.en: Glad-ly let us ren-der to Him
lines.id: Dengan senang hati mari kita serahkan kepada-Nya

lines.en: All we are and have.
lines.id: Semua yang kita miliki dan miliki.

lines.ko: 주를 알지 못한 이들 주가 친히 인도하사
lines.en: Keep us, Lord, O keep us cleav-ing
lines.id: Jagalah kami, Tuhan, ya jagalah kami tetap bersatu

lines.en: To Thy-self and still be-liev-ing,
lines.id: Kepada diri-Mu dan masih percaya,

lines.en: Till the hour of our re-ceiv-ing
lines.id: Sampai jam penerimaan kami

lines.en: Prom-is'd joys with Thee.
lines.id: Prom-adalah kegembiraan bersamaMu.

lines.ko: 약한 사람 도움 받아 시험 중에 참게 되니
lines.en: Je-sus is the name that charms us
lines.id: Yesus adalah nama yang memikat kita

lines.en: He for con-flict fits and arms us
lines.id: Dia menyerang dan mempersenjatai kita untuk konflik

lines.en: Noth-ing moves and noth-ing harms us
lines.id: Tidak ada yang bergerak dan tidak ada yang merugikan kita

lines.en: While we trust in Him.
lines.id: Selagi kita percaya kepada-Nya.

lines.ko: 진리 되신 우리 주는 영원토록 변함 없네
lines.en: Trust in Him, ye saints for-ev-er
lines.id: Percayalah kepada-Nya, hai orang-orang kudus selamanya

lines.en: He is faith-ful, chang-ing nev-er
lines.id: Dia setia, tidak pernah berubah

lines.en: Nei-ther force nor guile can sev-er
lines.id: Baik kekuatan maupun tipu muslihat tidak dapat memisahkan

lines.en: Those He loves from Him.
lines.id: Mereka yang Dia cintai dari-Nya.

title_id: Pujilah Juruselamat, Kamu yang Mengenal Dia

title_en: Trusting Jesus

lines.en: Simply trusting ev'ry day,
lines.ko: 어려운 일 당할 때 나의 믿음 적으나
lines.id: Cukup percaya setiap hari,

lines.en: Trusting through a stormy way;
lines.ko: 의지하는 내 주를 더욱 의지 합니다
lines.id: Percaya melalui badai-y

lines.en: Even when my faith is small,
lines.ko: 세월 지나 갈수록 의지 할 것 뿐일세
lines.id: Bahkan ketika imanku masih kecil,

lines.en: Trusting Jesus, that is all.
lines.ko: 무슨 일을 당해도 예수 의지 합니다
lines.id: Percaya pada Yesus, itu saja.
Percaya saat momen berlalu,
Percaya seiring berjalannya waktu
Mempercayai Dia apa pun yang terjadi,
Percaya pada Yesus, itu saja.

lines.en: Trusting as the moments fly,
lines.ko: 성령께서 내 마음 밝히 비춰 주시니
lines.id: Terang-terang Roh-Nya bersinar

lines.en: Trusting as the days go by;
lines.id: Ke dalam hatiku yang malang ini

lines.en: Trusting him whate'er befall,
lines.ko: 세월 지나 갈수록 의지 할 것 뿐일세
lines.id: Sementara Dia memimpin saya tidak bisa jatuh

lines.en: Trusting Jesus, that is all.
lines.ko: 무슨 일을 당해도 예수 의지 합니다
lines.id: Percaya pada Yesus, itu saja.
Percaya saat momen berlalu,
Percaya seiring berjalannya waktu
Mempercayai Dia apa pun yang terjadi,
Percaya pada Yesus, itu saja.

lines.en: Brightly doth his Spirit shine
lines.ko: 밝을 때에 노래와 어둘 때에 기도로
lines.id: Bernyanyi jika jalanku jelas

lines.en: Into this poor heart of mine;
lines.ko: 위태할 때 도움을 주께 간구 합니다
lines.id: Berdoalah jika jalannya suram

lines.en: While he leads I cannot fall;
lines.ko: 세월 지나 갈수록 의지 할 것 뿐일세
lines.id: Jika dalam bahaya, panggillah Dia

lines.en: Trusting Jesus, that is all.
lines.ko: 무슨 일을 당해도 예수 의지 합니다
lines.id: Percaya pada Yesus, itu saja.
Percaya sebagai yang paling penting
Percaya seiring berjalannya waktu
Mempercayai Dia apa pun yang terjadi,
Percaya pada Yesus, itu saja.

lines.en: Singing if my way is clear;
lines.ko: 생명 있을 동안에 예수 의지 합니다
lines.id: Mempercayai-Nya selagi hidup masih ada,

lines.en: Praying if the path be drear;
lines.ko: 천국 올라 가도록 의지할 것 뿐일세
lines.id: Mempercayai Dia sampai bumi berlalu

lines.en: If in danger, for him call;
lines.ko: 세월 지나 갈수록 의지 할 것 뿐일세
lines.id: Sampai di dalam dinding jas-per

lines.en: Trusting Jesus, that is all.
lines.ko: 무슨 일을 당해도 예수 의지 합니다
lines.id: Percaya pada Yesus, itu saja.
Percaya saat momen berlalu,
Percaya seiring berjalannya waktu
Mempercayai Dia apa pun yang terjadi,
Percaya pada Yesus, itu saja.

lines.en: Trusting him while life shall last,
Trusting him till earth be past;
Till within the jasper wall;
Trusting Jesus, that is all.

alt_titles: Trusting as the moments fly, trusting as the days go by
Trusting Jesus

title_en: Tis So Sweet to Trust in Jesus

lines.en: 'Tis so sweet to trust in Jesus,
lines.ko: 구주 예수 의지함이 심히 기쁜 일일세
lines.id: Sungguh manis mempercayai Yesus,

lines.en: Just to take him at his word;
lines.ko: 영생 허락 받았으니 의심 아주 없도다
lines.id: Hanya untuk menerima Firman-Nya

lines.en: Just to rest upon his promise;
lines.ko: 예수 예수 믿는 것은 받은 증거 많도다
lines.id: Sekadar untuk menepati janji-Nya

lines.en: Just to know, thus saith the Lord.
lines.ko: 예수 예수 귀한 예수 믿음 더욱 주소서
lines.id: Sekadar mengetahui, "Demikianlah firman Tuhan"
Yesus, Yesus, betapa aku percaya kepada-Nya!
Betapa aku telah membuktikan Dia berkali-kali!
Yesus, Yesus, Yesus yang berharga!
Oh rahmat untuk lebih mempercayai-Nya!

lines.en: Jesus, Jesus, how I trust him!
lines.ko: 구주 예수 의지함이 심히 기쁜 일일세
lines.id: Oh betapa manisnya mempercayai Yesus,

lines.en: How I've proved him o'er and o'er!
lines.ko: 주를 믿는 나의 마음 그의 피에 적시네
lines.id: Hanya untuk mempercayai darah pembersih-Nya

lines.en: Jesus, Jesus, precious Jesus!
lines.ko: 예수 예수 믿는 것은 받은 증거 많도다
lines.id: Hanya dalam iman sederhana yang menjerumuskanku

lines.en: O for grace to trust him more.
lines.ko: 예수 예수 귀한 예수 믿음 더욱 주소서
lines.id: 'Di bawah banjir yang menyembuhkan dan membersihkan!
Yesus, Yesus, betapa aku percaya kepada-Nya!
Betapa aku telah membuktikan Dia berkali-kali!
Yesus, Yesus, Yesus yang berharga!
Oh rahmat untuk lebih mempercayai-Nya!

lines.en: O how sweet to trust in Jesus,
lines.ko: 구주 예수 의지하여 죄악 벗어 버리네
lines.id: Ya, manis sekali mempercayai Yesus,

lines.en: Just to trust his cleansing blood;
lines.ko: 안위 받고 영생함을 주께 모두 얻었네
lines.id: Hanya dari dosa dan diri sendiri yang lenyap

lines.en: Just in simple faith to plunge me
lines.ko: 예수 예수 믿는 것은 받은 증거 많도다
lines.id: Hanya dari Yesus yang menerima secara sederhana

lines.en: 'Neath the healing, cleansing flood!
lines.ko: 예수 예수 귀한 예수 믿음 더욱 주소서
lines.id: Angkat dan istirahat dan kegembiraan dan kedamaian.
Yesus, Yesus, betapa aku percaya kepada-Nya!
Betapa aku telah membuktikan Dia berkali-kali!
Yesus, Yesus, Yesus yang berharga!
Oh rahmat untuk lebih mempercayai-Nya!

lines.en: Yes, 'tis sweet to trust in Jesus,
lines.id: Aku senang sekali aku belajar memercayai-Mu,

lines.en: Just from sin and self to cease;
lines.id: Yesus yang Berharga, Sahabat Juruselamat kita

lines.en: Just from Jesus simply taking
lines.ko: 예수 예수 믿는 것은 받은 증거 많도다
lines.id: Dan aku tahu bahwa Engkau bersamaku,

lines.en: Life and rest, and joy and peace.
lines.ko: 예수 예수 귀한 예수 믿음 더욱 주소서 아멘
lines.id: Akan bersamaku sampai akhir.
Yesus, Yesus, betapa aku percaya kepada-Nya!
Betapa aku telah membuktikan Dia berkali-kali!
Yesus, Yesus, Yesus yang berharga!
Oh rahmat untuk lebih mempercayai-Nya! Amin.

lines.en: I'm so glad I learned to trust thee,
Precious Jesus, Saviour, Friend;
And I know that thou art with me,
Wilt be with me to the end.

alt_titles: 'Tis so sweet to trust in Jesus

title_en: Consider the Lilies

lines.en: [English lyrics not available in the database for this revised hymn]
lines.ko: [이 개정된 찬송가의 데이터베이스에는 영어 가사가 없습니다.]

title_en: How Gentle God’s Commands

lines.en: How gentle God's commands,
How kind his precepts are!
Come, cast your burdens on the Lord,
And trust his constant care.
While providence supports,
Let saints securely dwell;
That hand, which bears all nature up,
Shall guide his children well.
Why should this anxious load
lines.ko: 왜 이 불안한 짐을 져야 하는가?

lines.en: Press down your weary mind?
Haste to your heav'nly Father's throne,
lines.ko: 하늘에 계신 아버지의 보좌로 서둘러 가십시오.

lines.en: And sweet communion find.
His goodness stands approved,
Down to the present day;
I'll drop my burden at his feet,
lines.ko: 내 짐을 그 발 앞에 내려 놓으리라

lines.en: And bear a song away.

title_en: In Thee, O Lord, I Put My Trust

lines.en: [English lyrics not available in the database for this revised hymn]
lines.ko: [이 개정된 찬송가의 데이터베이스에는 영어 가사가 없습니다.]

title_en: Not Haughty Is My Heart

lines.en: From Psalm 131
Not haughty is my heart,
Not lofty is my pride;
I do not seek to know the things
God's wisdom hath denied.
With childlike trust, O Lord,
In thee I calmly rest,
lines.ko: 나는 당신 안에서 조용히 쉬고 있습니다.

lines.en: Contented as a little child
Upon its mother's breast.
Ye people of the Lord,
In him alone confide;
From this time forth and evermore
His wisdom be your guide.
lines.ko: 그분의 지혜가 당신의 인도자가 되어 주십시오.

title_en: My Times Are in Thy Hand

lines.en: My times are in thy hand;
My God, I wish them there;
My life, my friends, my soul, I leave
lines.ko: 내 삶, 내 친구, 내 영혼, 난 떠나요

lines.en: Entirely to thy care.
My times are in thy hand;
Whatever they may be;
Pleasing or painful, dark or bright,
As best may seem to thee.
My times are in thy hand;
Why should I doubt or fear?
My Father's hand will never cause
His child a needless tear.
My times are in thy hand;
Jesus the Crucified;
Those hands my cruel sins had pierced
lines.ko: 내 잔혹한 죄가 꿰뚫었던 그 손

lines.en: Are now my guard and guide.

title_en: My Jesus, As Thou Wilt!

lines.en: My Jesus, as thou wilt!
lines.id: Yesusku, sesuai keinginanmu!

lines.en: O may thy will be mine;
lines.ko: 온 몸과 영혼을 다 주께 드리니
lines.id: Oh semoga kehendak-Mu menjadi milikku

lines.en: Into thy hand of love
lines.ko: 이 세상 고락간 주 인도 하시고
lines.id: Ke dalam tangan cinta-Mu

lines.en: I would my all resign.
lines.id: Saya akan menandatangani ulang semuanya.

lines.en: Through sorrow, or through joy,
lines.id: Melalui kesedihan, atau melalui kegembiraan,

lines.en: Conduct me as thine own;
lines.id: Perlakukan aku seperti milik-Mu

lines.en: And help me still to say,
lines.id: Dan bantulah aku untuk tetap berkata, Ya Tuhanku,

lines.en: My Lord, thy will be done.
lines.id: Kehendak-Mu jadi.

lines.en: My Jesus, as thou wilt!
lines.id: Yesusku, sesuai keinginanmu!

lines.en: If needy here and poor,
lines.id: Meskipun terlihat melalui banyak air mata,

lines.en: Give me thy people's bread,
lines.id: Janganlah bintang harapanku

lines.en: Their portion rich and sure.
lines.id: Menjadi redup atau menghilang.

lines.en: The manna of thy Word
lines.id: Sejak Engkau di bumi menangis,

lines.en: Let my soul feed upon;
lines.id: Dan kesedihan sering mendayung sendirian,

lines.en: And if all else should fail,
lines.id: Jika aku harus menangis bersamaMu,

lines.en: My Lord, thy will be done.
lines.id: Ya Tuhanku, kehendak-Mu terlaksana.

lines.en: My Jesus, as thou wilt!
lines.id: Yesusku, sesuai keinginanmu!

lines.en: Though seen through many a tear,
lines.ko: 내 모든 일들을 다 주께 맡기고
lines.id: Semuanya akan baik-baik saja bagiku

lines.en: Let not my star of hope
lines.id: Setiap adegan masa depan yang berubah

lines.en: Grow dim or disappear.
lines.id: Aku dengan senang hati percaya pada-Mu.

lines.en: Since thou on earth hast wept,
lines.id: Langsung ke rumah saya di atas

lines.en: And sorrowed oft alone,
lines.id: Saya melakukan perjalanan dengan tenang

lines.en: If I must weep with thee,
lines.id: Dan bernyanyi, dalam hidup atau mati,

lines.en: My Lord, thy will be done.
lines.id: Ya Tuhanku, kehendak-Mu terlaksana. Amin.

lines.en: My Jesus, as thou wilt!
All shall be well for me;
Each changing future scene
I gladly trust with thee.
Straight to my home above
I travel calmly on,
And sing, in life or death,
"My Lord, thy will be done."

title_en: Thy Way, Not Mine, O Lord
title_ko: 주님, 당신의 길은 내 길이 아닙니다 (자체번역)

lines.en: Thy way, not mine, O Lord,
lines.ko: 주님, 나의 길은 아니고 당신의 길입니다.

lines.en: How ever dark it be!
Lead me by thine own hand,
Choose out the path for me;
Smooth let it be or rough,
It will be still the best;
Winding or straight, it leads
Right onward to thy rest.
The kingdom that I seek
Is thine; so let the way
That leads to it be thine,
Else I must surely stray.
lines.ko: 그렇지 않으면 나는 틀림없이 길을 잃었을 것이다.

lines.en: I dare not choose my lot;
lines.ko: 나는 감히 내 운명을 선택할 수 없습니다.

lines.en: I would not if I might:
lines.ko: 다음과 같은 경우에는 그렇게 하지 않을 것입니다.

lines.en: Choose thou for me, my God,
So shall I walk aright.
Take thou my cup, and it
With joy or sorrow fill
As best to thee may seem;
lines.ko: 당신에게 가장 좋은 것처럼 보일 수 있습니다.

lines.en: Choose thou my good and ill.
lines.ko: 당신은 나의 좋은 것과 나쁜 것을 선택하십시오.

lines.en: Not mine, not mine the choice
lines.ko: 내 선택은 아니야, 내 선택은 아니야

lines.en: In things or great or small;
Be thou my Guide, my Strength,
lines.ko: 나의 인도자가 되시며 나의 힘이 되소서

lines.en: My Wisdom, and my All.

title_en: Make Me a Captive, Lord

lines.en: [English lyrics not available in the database for this revised hymn]
lines.ko: [이 개정된 찬송가의 데이터베이스에는 영어 가사가 없습니다.]

title_en: Have Thine Own Way, Lord!

lines.en: Have thine own way, Lord! Have thine own way!
lines.ko: 주님의 뜻을 이루소서 고요한 중에 기다리니
lines.id: Milikilah jalan-Mu sendiri, Tuhan! Milikilah jalan-Mu sendiri!

lines.en: Thou art the Potter; I am the clay.
lines.ko: 진흙과 같은 날 빚으사 주님의 형상 만드소서
lines.id: Engkau adalah pembuat tembikar, aku adalah tanah liat.

lines.en: Mold me and make me after thy will
lines.id: Bentuklah aku dan jadikanlah aku menurut kehendak-Mu,

lines.en: While I am waiting, yielded and still.
lines.id: Sementara aku menunggu, menyerah dan diam.

lines.en: Have thine own way, Lord! Have thine own way!
lines.ko: 주님의 뜻을 이루소서 주님 발 앞에 엎드리니
lines.id: Milikilah jalan-Mu sendiri, Tuhan! Milikilah jalan-Mu sendiri!

lines.en: Search me and try me, Master, today!
lines.ko: 나의 맘속을 살피시사 눈보다 희게 하옵소서
lines.id: Cari saya dan coba saya, Guru, hari ini!

lines.en: Whiter than snow, Lord, wash me just now,
lines.id: Lebih putih dari salju, Tuhan, basuhlah aku sekarang,

lines.en: As in thy presence humbly I bow.
lines.id: Seperti di hadapanMu dengan rendah hati aku bersujud.

lines.en: Have thine own way, Lord! Have thine own way!
lines.ko: 주님의 뜻을 이루소서 병들어 몸이 피곤할 때
lines.id: Milikilah jalan-Mu sendiri, Tuhan! Milikilah jalan-Mu sendiri!

lines.en: Wounded and weary, help me, I pray!
lines.ko: 권능의 손을 내게 펴사 강건케 하여 주옵소서
lines.id: Terluka dan letih, tolonglah aku, aku berdoa!

lines.en: Powerall powersurely is thine!
lines.id: Kekuatan-er-segala kekuatan-er-pastinya adalah milik-Mu!

lines.en: Touch me and heal me, Saviour divine!
lines.id: Sentuh aku dan sembuhkan aku, Juruselamat ilahi kita!

lines.en: Have thine own way, Lord! Have thine own way!
lines.ko: 주님의 뜻을 이루소서 온전히 나를 주장하사
lines.id: Milikilah jalan-Mu sendiri, Tuhan! Milikilah jalan-Mu sendiri!

lines.en: Hold o'er my being absolute sway!
lines.ko: 주님과 함께 동행함을 만민이 알게 하옵소서 아멘
lines.id: Tahanlah posisiku yang mutlak!

lines.en: Fill with thy Spirit till all shall see
lines.id: Penuhi dengan Roh-Mu Sampai semua orang melihat

lines.en: Christ only, always, living in me!
lines.id: Hanya Kristus, selalu, Hidup di dalam aku!

title_en: Be Still, My Soul

lines.en: [English lyrics not available in the database for this revised hymn]
lines.ko: [이 개정된 찬송가의 데이터베이스에는 영어 가사가 없습니다.]

title_en: I Know That My Redeemer Lives

lines.en: I know that my Redeemer lives,
lines.id: Saya tahu bahwa Penebus Ulang saya hidup,

lines.en: And ever prays for me;
lines.ko: 그 큰 사랑 인하여서 나 자유 얻었네
lines.id: Dan selalu berdoa untukku

lines.en: A token of his love he gives,
lines.id: Tanda kasih sayang-Nya yang Dia berikan,

lines.en: A pledge of liberty.
lines.id: Sebuah janji kebebasan.

lines.en: I find him lifting up my head;
lines.ko: 나의 구원되신 주님 내 소망 되신 주
lines.id: Dia menghendaki agar aku menjadi kudus

lines.en: He brings salvation near;
lines.ko: 항상 나와 함께 하셔 곧 다시 오시리
lines.id: Siapa yang dapat menahan kehendak-Nya

lines.en: His presence makes me free indeed
lines.id: Nasihat kasih karunia-Nya ada dalam diriku

lines.en: And he will soon appear.
lines.id: Dia pasti akan memenuhinya.

lines.en: He wills that I should holy be:
lines.ko: 나를 거룩하게 하려 주 나를 부르니
lines.id: Ya Tuhan, aku menutup telepon pada firman-Mu

lines.en: Who can withstand his will?
lines.ko: 주의 은혜 내게 넘쳐 주 뜻을 이루리
lines.id: Saya sangat percaya

lines.en: The counsel of his grace in me
lines.id: Engkau akan kembali dan mengklaim aku, Tuhan,

lines.en: He surely shall fulfil.
lines.id: Dan untuk menerima kembali diri sendiri.

lines.en: Jesus, I hang upon thy Word:
lines.ko: 굳센 믿음 나가지고 주 말씀 따르면
lines.id: Ketika Tuhan adalah milikku, dan aku milik-Nya,

lines.en: I steadfastly believe
lines.ko: 주님 다시 강림할 때 날 영접 하시리 아멘
lines.id: Dari kepemilikan Par-a-dise

lines.en: Thou wilt return and claim me, Lord,
lines.id: Aku merasakan kebahagiaan yang tak terkira,

lines.en: And to thyself receive.
lines.id: Dan istirahat yang abadi.

title_id: Saya Tahu bahwa Penebus Saya Hidup

title_en: It Is Well with My Soul

lines.en: When peace, like a river, attendeth my way,
lines.id: Ketika kedamaian, seperti sungai, mengikuti jalanku,

lines.en: When sorrows like sea billows roll;
lines.id: ketika baris-baris kesedihan seperti gelombang laut bergulung

lines.en: Whatever my lot, thou hast taught me to say,
lines.id: apa pun nasibku, Engkau telah mengajariku untuk berkata,

lines.en: It is well, it is well with my soul.
lines.id: "Baiklah, baiklah jiwaku"
Jiwaku baik-baik saja
Baiklah, baiklah dengan jiwaku.

lines.en: It is well with my soul;
lines.id: Setan yang tangguh harus dihajar, meskipun cobaan harus datang,

lines.en: It is well, it is well with my soul.
lines.id: Biarkan ini memberkati kendali jaminan,
Bahwa Kristus telah menghargai keadaanku yang tak berdaya,
Dan telah menumpahkan darah-Nya sendiri demi jiwaku.
Jiwaku baik-baik saja
Baiklah, baiklah dengan jiwaku.

lines.en: Though Satan should buffet, though trials should come,
lines.id: Dosaku, oh berkah dari pemikiran mulia ini!

lines.en: Let this blest assurance control,
lines.id: Dosaku, bukan sebagian, tapi seluruhnya,

lines.en: That Christ has regarded my helpless estate,
lines.id: Dipakukan di kayu salib dan saya tidak menanggungnya lagi

lines.en: And has shed his own blood for my soul.
lines.id: Puji Tuhan, puji Tuhan, hai jiwaku!
Jiwaku baik-baik saja
Baiklah, baiklah dengan jiwaku.

lines.en: My sinO the bliss of this glorious thought!
lines.id: Dan ya Tuhan, bersegeralah hari dimana iman akan terlihat,

lines.en: My sin, not in part, but the whole,
lines.id: Awan digulung kembali seperti gulungan,

lines.en: Is nailed to the cross and I bear it no more;
lines.id: Terompet akan berbunyi kembali dan Tuhan akan turun,

lines.en: Praise the Lord, praise the Lord, O my soul!
lines.id: "Meski begitu" itu baik-baik saja dengan jiwaku.
Jiwaku baik-baik saja
Baiklah, baiklah dengan jiwaku.

lines.en: O Lord, haste the day when the faith shall be sight,
The clouds be rolled back as a scroll,
The trump shall resound and the Lord shall descend;
"Even so"it is well with my soul.

alt_titles: When peace, like a river
title_id: Saat Kedamaian, Bagaikan Sungai, Menghadiri Jalanku

title_en: To You, O Lord, I Fly

lines.en: From Psalm 16:1-2, 5-8, 11
To thee, O Lord, I fly
And on thy help depend;
Thou art my Lord and King Most High;
lines.ko: 당신은 나의 주님이시며 지극히 높으신 왕이십니다.

lines.en: Do thou my soul defend.
A heritage for me Jehovah will remain;
lines.ko: 나에게 유산은 여호와께서 남아 있을 것입니다.

lines.en: My portion rich and full is he,
My right he will maintain.
The lot to me that fell
Is beautiful and fair;
The heritage in which I dwell
Is good beyond compare.
I praise the Lord above
Whose counsel guides aright;
My heart instructs me in his love
lines.ko: 내 마음이 그의 사랑으로 나를 교훈하시느니라

lines.en: In seasons of the night.
I keep before me still
The Lord whom I have proved;
At my right hand he guards from ill,
lines.ko: 그가 내 우편에서 질병을 지켜 주시며

lines.en: And I shall not be moved.
Life's pathway thou wilt show,
To thy right hand wilt guide,
Where streams of pleasure ever flow,
And boundless joys abide.

title_en: Blessed Assurance

lines.en: Blessed assurance, Jesus is mine!
O what a foretaste of glory divine!
lines.ko: 오, 얼마나 신성한 영광을 미리 맛보셨는지요!

lines.en: Heir of salvation, purchase of God,
lines.ko: 구원의 상속자시요, 하나님의 기업으로 사신 자시요,

lines.en: Born of His Spirit, washed in His blood.
lines.ko: 그분의 영으로 태어나 그분의 피로 씻겨졌습니다.

lines.en: This is my story, this is my song,
lines.ko: 이건 내 이야기고, 이건 내 노래야.

lines.en: Praising my Saviour all the day long;
This is my story, this is my song,
lines.ko: 이건 내 이야기고, 이건 내 노래야.

lines.en: Praising my Saviour all the day long.
Perfect submission, perfect delight,
Visions of rapture now burst on my sight;
lines.ko: 이제 환희의 환영이 내 시야에 터져 나왔습니다.

lines.en: Angels descending, bring from above
Echoes of mercy, whispers of love.
This is my story, this is my song,
lines.ko: 이건 내 이야기고, 이건 내 노래야.

lines.en: Praising my Saviour all the day long;
This is my story, this is my song,
lines.ko: 이건 내 이야기고, 이건 내 노래야.

lines.en: Praising my Saviour all the day long.
Perfect submission, all is at rest;
I in my Saviour am happy and blest;
lines.ko: 나는 나의 구주 안에서 행복하고 행복합니다.

lines.en: Watching and waiting, looking above,
Filled with His goodness, lost in His love.
lines.ko: 그분의 선하심으로 가득 차고 그분의 사랑에 빠져 있습니다.

lines.en: This is my story, this is my song,
lines.ko: 이건 내 이야기고, 이건 내 노래야.

lines.en: Praising my Saviour all the day long;
This is my story, this is my song,
lines.ko: 이건 내 이야기고, 이건 내 노래야.

lines.en: Praising my Saviour all the day long.

title_en: Lord, I Lift My Soul to Thee

lines.en: Lord, I lift my soul to thee,
O my God, I trust thy might;
lines.ko: 오 나의 하나님, 나는 당신의 능력을 신뢰합니다.

lines.en: Let not foes exult o'er me,
Shame me not before their sight.
lines.ko: 그들이 보는 앞에서 나를 부끄럽게 하지 마십시오.

lines.en: Yea, may none be put to shame,
lines.ko: 그래요, 누구도 부끄러움을 당하지 않을 것입니다.

lines.en: None who wait for thee to bless;
lines.ko: 당신의 축복을 기다리는 사람은 아무도 없습니다.

lines.en: But dishonored be their name
Who without a cause transgress.
Lord, to me thy ways make known,
lines.ko: 여호와여 주의 도를 내게 알게 하소서

lines.en: Guide in truth and teach thou me;
Thou my Saviour art alone,
All the day I wait for thee.
Lord, remember in thy love
All thy mercies manifold,
Tender mercies from above,
Changeless from the days of old.
Sins of youth remember not,
Nor my trespasses record;
Let not mercy be forgot,
For thy goodness' sake, O Lord.
Grace and truth shall mark the way
Where the Lord his own will lead,
If his word they still obey
lines.ko: 만일 그들이 그의 말씀을 여전히 순종하면

lines.en: And his testimonies heed.

title_en: By Grace I Am an Heir of Heaven

lines.en: By grace I am an heir of heaven:
Why doubt this, O my trembling heart?
lines.ko: 오, 나의 떨리는 마음이여, 왜 이것을 의심합니까?

lines.en: If what the Scriptures promise clearly
Is true and firm in ev'ry part,
This also must be truth divine:
By grace a crown of life is mine.
lines.ko: 은혜로 생명의 면류관이 나의 것이 되었느니라.

lines.en: By grace alone shall I inherit
That blissful home beyond the skies.
Works count for naught, the Lord incarnate
Hath won for me the heav'nly prize.
Salvation by his death he wrought,
His grace alone my pardon bought.
By grace! These precious words remember
When sorely by thy sins oppressed,
lines.ko: 네 죄로 말미암아 심히 압박을 받을 때에

lines.en: When Satan comes to vex thy spirit,
lines.ko: 사탄이 와서 네 영을 괴롭게 하면

lines.en: When troubled conscience sighs for rest;
What reason cannot comprehend,
God doth to thee by grace extend.
By grace! Be this in death my comfort;
lines.ko: 은혜로! 이것이 나의 죽음의 위로가 되소서.

lines.en: Despite my fears, 'tis well with me.
I know my sin in all its greatness,
lines.ko: 나는 내 죄가 얼마나 큰지 알고 있습니다.

lines.en: But also him who sets me free.
lines.ko: 그러나 나를 자유롭게 하시는 분도 계십니다.

lines.en: My heart to naught but joy gives place
lines.ko: 내 마음은 아무것도 아니지만 기쁨이 자리를 잡습니다

lines.en: Since I am saved by grace, by grace.
lines.ko: 나는 은혜로, 은혜로 구원을 받았기 때문입니다.

title_en: I’ve Found the Pearl of Greatest Price!

lines.en: I've found the pearl of greatest price!
My heart doth sing for joy;
And sing I must, for Christ is mine!
lines.ko: 그리고 나는 노래해야 합니다. 왜냐하면 그리스도는 나의 것이기 때문입니다!

lines.en: Christ shall my song employ.
I've found the pearl of greatest price!
My heart doth sing for joy;
And sing I must, for Christ is mine!
lines.ko: 그리고 나는 노래해야 합니다. 왜냐하면 그리스도는 나의 것이기 때문입니다!

lines.en: Christ shall my song employ.
Christ is my Prophet, Priest, and King;
My Prophet full of light,
My great High Priest before the throne,
lines.ko: 보좌 앞에 계신 나의 큰 대제사장이시여,

lines.en: My King of heav'nly might.
For he indeed is Lord of lords,
And he the King of kings;
He is the Sun of Righteousness,
With healing in his wings.
Christ is my peace; he died for me,
lines.ko: 그리스도는 나의 평화이십니다. 그는 나를 위해 죽었습니다.

lines.en: For me he shed his blood;
And as my wondrous Sacrifice,
Offered himself to God.
Christ Jesus is my all in all,
My comfort and my love;
My life below, and he shall be
lines.ko: 내 인생은 아래에 있고 그는 그럴 것이다

lines.en: My joy and crown above.

title_en: Wonderful Words of Life

lines.en: Sing them over again to me,
lines.ko: 달고 오묘한 그 말씀 생명의 말씀은
lines.id: Nyanyikan lagu-lagu itu untukku,

lines.ko: 귀한 그 말씀 진실로 생명의 말씀이
lines.id: Kata-kata Kehidupan yang indah
Biarkan aku melihat lebih banyak keindahan mereka,
Kata-kata Kehidupan yang indah.
Kata-kata kehidupan dan keindahan,
Ajari aku iman dan kewajiban
Kata-kata yang indah, Kata-kata yang indah,
Kata-kata Kehidupan yang indah.
Kata-kata yang indah, Kata-kata yang indah,
Kata-kata Kehidupan yang indah.

lines.en: Wonderful words of life;
lines.ko: 귀한 주님의 말씀은 내 노래 되도다
lines.id: Kristus, Yang Terberkati, memberi kepada semua orang,
Kata-kata Kehidupan yang indah

lines.ko: 값도 없이 받아 생명 길을 가니
lines.id: Pendosa, daftarkan panggilan penuh kasih,
Kata-kata Kehidupan yang indah.
Semua diberikan secara cuma-cuma,
Membujuk kita ke Surga:
Kata-kata yang indah, Kata-kata yang indah,
Kata-kata Kehidupan yang indah.
Kata-kata yang indah, Kata-kata yang indah,
Kata-kata Kehidupan yang indah.

lines.en: Let me more of their beauty see,
lines.id: Dengan manis menggemakan seruan Injil,
Kata-kata Kehidupan yang indah

lines.ko: 다만 예수 말씀 듣고 복을 받네
lines.id: Tawarkan pengampunan dan kedamaian kepada semua orang,
Kata-kata Kehidupan yang indah.

lines.ko: 아름답고 귀한 말씀 생명샘 이로다 아멘
lines.id: Yesus, satu-satunya Juruselamat,
Sanc-ti-fy selamanya:
Kata-kata yang indah, Kata-kata yang indah,
Kata-kata Kehidupan yang indah.
Kata-kata yang indah, Kata-kata yang indah,
Kata-kata Kehidupan yang indah. Amin.

lines.en: Wonderful words of life;
Words of life and beauty,
Teach me faith and duty:
Beautiful words, wonderful words,
Wonderful words of life.
Beautiful words, wonderful words,
Wonderful words of life.
Christ, the blessed One, gives to all,
Wonderful words of life;
Sinner, list to the loving call,
Wonderful words of life.
All so freely given,
Wooing us to heaven:
Sweetly echo the gospel call,
Wonderful words of life,
Offer pardon and peace to all,
Wonderful words of life.
Jesus, only Saviour,
Sanctify for ever:

alt_titles: Beautiful words, wonderful words, wonderful words of life
Wonderful words of life

title_en: O Happy Day, That Fixed My Choice

lines.en: O happy day, that fixed my choice
lines.ko: 주의 말씀 받은 그 날 참 기쁘고 복 되도다
lines.id: Semuanya berubah sejak dosaku diampuni,

lines.en: On thee, my Saviour and my God!
lines.ko: 이 기쁜 맘 못 이겨서 온 세상에 전하노라
lines.id: Semuanya berubah sejak saya mengenal Tuhan

lines.en: Well may this glowing heart rejoice,
lines.ko: 기쁜 날 기쁜 날 주 나의 죄 다 씻은 날
lines.id: Kini kakiku sedang menapaki jalan menuju surga

lines.en: And tell its raptures all abroad.
lines.ko: 늘 깨어서 기도하고 늘 기쁘게 살아가리
lines.id: Semua rasa bersalah di masa lalu sekarang ada di bawah darah.

lines.ko: 기쁜 날 기쁜 날 주 나의 죄 다 씻은 날
lines.id: Semuanya berubah, puji Tuhan!
Sekarang aku dianggap kembali melalui darah
Bebas dari kutukan, Tuhan adalah Penyelamatku,
Semuanya berubah, puji Tuhan!

lines.en: O happy bond, that seals my vows
lines.ko: 이 좋은 날 내 천한 몸 새 사람이 되었으니
lines.id: Semuanya berubah, bagi nama Tuhan yang mulia!

lines.en: To him who merits all my love!
lines.ko: 이 몸과 맘 다 바쳐서 영광의 주 늘 섬기리
lines.id: Cahaya, bukannya kegelapan, memenuhi jiwaku

lines.en: Let cheerful anthems fill his house,
lines.ko: 기쁜 날 기쁜 날 주 나의 죄 다 씻은 날
lines.id: Semuanya berubah, inilah cerita lama yang diberkati,

lines.en: While to that sacred shrine I move.
lines.ko: 늘 깨어서 기도하고 늘 기쁘게 살아가리
lines.id: Percaya pada Kristus, sekarang aku sudah sembuh sedikit pun.

lines.ko: 기쁜 날 기쁜 날 주 나의 죄 다 씻은 날
lines.id: Semuanya berubah, puji Tuhan!
Sekarang aku dianggap kembali melalui darah
Bebas dari kutukan, Tuhan adalah Penyelamatku,
Semuanya berubah, puji Tuhan!

lines.en: 'Tis done! The great transaction's done!
lines.ko: 새 사람 된 그 날부터 평안한 맘 늘 있어서
lines.id: Semuanya berubah sejak Roh merasukiku,

lines.en: I am my Lord's, and he is mine;
lines.ko: 이 복된 말 전하는 일 나의 본분 삼았도다
lines.id: Karena Dia memenuhi hatiku dengan kasih Juruselamat,

lines.en: He drew me, and I followed on,
lines.ko: 기쁜 날 기쁜 날 주 나의 죄 다 씻은 날
lines.id: Karena Dia menghilangkan semua ketakutan yang menyusahkanku,

lines.en: Charmed to confess the voice Divine.
lines.ko: 늘 깨어서 기도하고 늘 기쁘게 살아가리
lines.id: Membantu saya menetapkan hati pada hal-hal di atas.

lines.ko: 기쁜 날 기쁜 날 주 나의 죄 다 씻은 날 아멘
lines.id: Semuanya berubah, puji Tuhan!
Sekarang aku dianggap kembali melalui darah
Bebas dari kutukan, Tuhan adalah Penyelamatku,
Semuanya berubah, puji Tuhan!

lines.en: Now rest, my long-divided heart;
Fixed on this blissful center, rest;
With ashes who would grudge to part,
When called on angels' bread to feast?
High heav'n, that heard the solemn vow,
That vow renewed shall daily hear,
Till in life's latest hour I bow,
And bless in death a bond so dear.

title_id: Wahai Hari Bahagia, Itu Memperbaiki Pilihanku

title_en: Like a River Glorious

lines.en: Like a river glorious
Is God's perfect peace,
Over all victorious
In its bright increase;
Perfect, yet it floweth
Fuller ev'ry day,
Perfect, yet it groweth
Deeper all the way.
Stayed upon Jehovah,
Hearts are fully blest,
Finding, as he promised,
Perfect peace and rest.
Hidden in the hollow
Of his blessed hand,
Never foe can follow,
Never traitor stand;
Not a surge of worry,
Not a shade of care,
Not a blast of hurry
Touch the spirit there.
Ev'ry joy or trial
Falleth from above,
Traced upon our dial
By the Sun of Love.
We may trust him fully
lines.ko: 우리는 그분을 온전히 신뢰할 수 있습니다

lines.en: All for us to do;
They who trust him wholly
Find him wholly true.
lines.ko: 그 사람이 전적으로 사실이라는 것을 알아내십시오.

alt_titles: Stayed upon Jehovah, hearts are fully blest

title_en: Come, We that Love the Lord
title_ko: 주 사랑하는 자 다 찬송할 때에

lines.en: Come, we that love the Lord,
lines.ko: 주 사랑하는 자 다 찬송할 때에
lines.id: Aku mencintai Kerajaan-Mu, Tuhan,

lines.en: And let our joys be known;
lines.ko: 그 보좌 앞에 둘러서 그 보좌 앞에 둘러서
lines.id: Rumah tempat tinggal-Mu,

lines.en: Join in a song with sweet accord,
lines.ko: 큰 영광 돌리세 큰 영광 돌리세
lines.id: Gereja yang telah diselamatkan oleh Penebus kita yang terberkati

lines.en: And thus surround the throne.
lines.ko: 저 밝고도 묘한 시온성 향하여 가세
lines.id: Dengan darah-Nya yang berharga.

lines.ko: 내 주의 찬란한 성에 찬송하며 올라가세
lines.id: Biarkan aku naik dengan pujian ke kota Tuhanku yang indah.

lines.en: Let those refuse to sing
lines.ko: 주 믿지 않는 자 다 찬송 못하나
lines.id: Aku mencintai Gereja-Mu, ya Tuhan

lines.en: That never knew our God;
lines.ko: 하나님 자녀 된 자들 하나님 자녀 된 자들
lines.id: Dindingnya di hadapan-Mu berdiri,

lines.en: But children of the heav'nly King
lines.ko: 그 기쁨 전하세 그 기쁨 전하세
lines.id: Sayang bagaikan biji mata-Mu,

lines.en: May speak their joys abroad.
lines.ko: 저 밝고도 묘한 시온성 향하여 가세
lines.id: Dan grav-en di tangan-Mu.

lines.ko: 내 주의 찬란한 성에 찬송하며 올라가세
lines.id: Biarkan aku naik dengan pujian ke kota Tuhanku yang indah.

lines.en: The men of grace have found
lines.ko: 저 하늘 황금 길 나 올라갈 때에
lines.id: Baginya air mataku akan jatuh,

lines.en: Glory begun below;
lines.ko: 시온성 언덕 위에서 시온성 언덕 위에서
lines.id: Untuknya doaku naik

lines.en: Celestial fruits on earthly ground
lines.id: Kepadanya kepedulian dan jerih payahku diberikan,

lines.en: From faith and hope may grow.
lines.ko: 저 밝고도 묘한 시온성 향하여 가세
lines.id: Sampai kerja keras dan kekhawatiran berakhir.

lines.ko: 내 주의 찬란한 성에 찬송하며 올라가세
lines.id: Biarkan aku naik dengan pujian ke kota Tuhanku yang indah.

lines.en: The hill of Zion yields
lines.ko: 내 눈물 다 씻고 늘 찬송부르리
lines.id: Melampaui kebahagiaanku yang tertinggi

lines.en: A thousand sacred sweets,
lines.ko: 저 임마누엘 주 앞에 저 임마누엘 주 앞에
lines.id: Aku menghargai cara-cara surgawinya,

lines.en: Before we reach the heav'nly fields,
lines.ko: 나 영광 누리리 나 영광 누리리
lines.id: Komuni manisnya, sumpah khusyuknya,

lines.en: Or walk the golden streets.
lines.ko: 저 밝고도 묘한 시온성 향하여 가세
lines.id: Nyanyian cinta dan pujiannya.

lines.ko: 내 주의 찬란한 성에 찬송하며 올라가세
lines.id: Biarkan aku naik dengan pujian ke kota Tuhanku yang indah.

lines.en: Then let our songs abound,
lines.id: Tentu saja kebenaran-Mu akan bertahan lama,

lines.en: And ev'ry tear be dry;
lines.id: Kepada Zi-on akan diberikan

lines.en: We're marching through Immanuel's ground
lines.id: Kemuliaan paling terang yang bisa dihasilkan bumi,

lines.en: To fairer worlds on high.
lines.id: Dan kebahagiaan surga yang lebih cerah. Amin.

title_en: Redeemed, How I Love to Proclaim It!

lines.en: [English lyrics not available in the database for this revised hymn]
lines.ko: [이 개정된 찬송가의 데이터베이스에는 영어 가사가 없습니다.]

title_en: Peace, Perfect Peace

lines.en: Peace, perfect peace, in this dark world of sin?
lines.ko: 이 어두운 죄의 세상에 평화, 완전한 평화가 있습니까?

lines.en: The blood of Jesus whispers peace within.
Peace, perfect peace, by thronging duties pressed?
lines.ko: 평화, 완전한 평화, 수많은 의무로 인해 압박을 받습니까?

lines.en: To do the will of Jesus, this is rest.
Peace, perfect peace, with sorrows surging round?
On Jesus' bosom naught but calm is found.
lines.ko: 예수님의 품에는 평온함 외에는 아무것도 없습니다.

lines.en: Peace, perfect peace, with loved ones far away?
lines.ko: 평화, 완벽한 평화, 사랑하는 사람들과 멀리 떨어져 계시나요?

lines.en: In Jesus' keeping we are safe and they.
lines.ko: 예수님의 보호하심 안에서 우리와 그들도 안전합니다.

lines.en: Peace, perfect peace, our future all unknown?
lines.ko: 평화, 완전한 평화, 우리의 미래를 모두 알 수 없나요?

lines.en: Jesus we know, and he is on the throne.
lines.ko: 우리가 아는 예수님은 보좌에 앉아 계십니다.

lines.en: Peace, perfect peace, death shad'wing us and ours?
lines.ko: 평화, 완전한 평화, 죽음이 우리와 우리를 뒤덮고 있습니까?

lines.en: Jesus has vanquished death and all its powers.
lines.ko: 예수님은 죽음과 그 모든 권세를 이기셨습니다.

lines.en: It is enough: earth's struggles soon shall cease,
lines.ko: 그것으로 충분합니다. 지구의 투쟁은 곧 그칠 것입니다.

lines.en: And Jesus call us to heav'n's perfect peace.
lines.ko: 그리고 예수님은 천국의 완전한 평화로 우리를 부르십니다.

title_en: Loved with Everlasting Love

lines.en: [English lyrics not available in the database for this revised hymn]
lines.ko: [이 개정된 찬송가의 데이터베이스에는 영어 가사가 없습니다.]

title_en: Thou Wilt Keep Him in Perfect Peace

lines.en: [English lyrics not available in the database for this revised hymn]
lines.ko: [이 개정된 찬송가의 데이터베이스에는 영어 가사가 없습니다.]

title_en: I Know Whom I Have Believed

lines.en: I know not why God's wondrous grace
lines.ko: 아 하나님의 은혜로 이 쓸데 없는 자
lines.id: Saya tidak tahu mengapa – anugerah Tuhan – yang menakjubkan

lines.ko: 왜 구속하여 주는지 난 알 수 없도다
lines.id: Bagiku Dia telah membuat- Dikenal,

lines.ko: 내가 믿고 또 의지함은 내 모든 형편 아시는 주님
lines.id: Juga mengapa, tanpa kemenanganmu,- Kristus dalam cinta

lines.ko: 늘 보호해 주실 것을 나는 확실히 아네
lines.id: Anggap kembali aku sebagai miliknya.
Namun “Saya tahu kepada siapa saya percaya,
dan saya yakin bahwa Dia mampu
Untuk menjaga apa yang telah saya berkomitmen
Bagi-Nya keuntungan pada hari itu.”

lines.en: To me he hath made known,
lines.ko: 왜 내게 굳센 믿음과 또 복음 주셔서
lines.id: Saya tidak tahu bagaimana iman yang menyelamatkan ini

lines.ko: 내 맘이 항상 편한지 난 알 수 없도다
lines.id: Bagiku Dia memang- aku--berpisah,

lines.ko: 내가 믿고 또 의지함은 내 모든 형편 아시는 주님
lines.id: Atau bagaimana percaya pada Firman-Nya

lines.ko: 늘 보호해 주실 것을 나는 확실히 아네
lines.id: Menciptakan kedamaian di dalam hatiku.
Namun “Saya tahu kepada siapa saya percaya,
dan saya yakin bahwa Dia mampu
Untuk menjaga apa yang telah saya berkomitmen
Bagi-Nya keuntungan pada hari itu.”

lines.en: Nor why, unworthy, Christ in love
lines.ko: 왜 내게 성령 주셔서 내 마음 감동해
lines.id: Aku tidak tahu bagaimana- Roh-itu bergerak,

lines.ko: 주 예수 믿게 하는지 난 알 수 없도다
lines.id: Menyakinkan orang yang berbuat dosa,

lines.ko: 내가 믿고 또 의지함은 내 모든 형편 아시는 주님
lines.id: Menyingkapkan kembali Yesus melalui Firman,

lines.ko: 늘 보호해 주실 것을 나는 확실히 아네
lines.id: Menciptakan iman kepada-Nya.
Namun “Saya tahu kepada siapa saya percaya,
dan saya yakin bahwa Dia mampu
Untuk menjaga apa yang telah saya berkomitmen
Bagi-Nya keuntungan pada hari itu.”

lines.en: Redeemed me for his own.
lines.ko: 주 언제 강림 하실지 혹 밤에 혹 낮에
lines.id: Aku tidak tahu apa yang baik atau buruk

lines.ko: 또 주님 만날 그 곳도 난 알 수 없도다
lines.id: Boleh disajikan kembali untuk saya,

lines.ko: 내가 믿고 또 의지함은 내 모든 형편 아시는 주님
lines.id: Tentang hari-hari yang melelahkan-atau-emas,

lines.ko: 늘 보호해 주실 것을 나는 확실히 아네
lines.id: Di-depan wajah-Nya- Aku- mengerti.
Namun “Saya tahu kepada siapa saya percaya,
dan saya yakin bahwa Dia mampu
Untuk menjaga apa yang telah saya berkomitmen
Bagi-Nya keuntungan pada hari itu.”

lines.en: But "I know whom I have believed,
And am persuaded that he is able
To keep that which I've committed
Unto him against that day."
I know not how this saving faith
To me he did impart,
Nor how believing in his Word
Wrought peace within my heart.
I know not how the Spirit moves,
Convincing men of sin,
Revealing Jesus through the Word,
Creating faith in him.
I know not what of good or ill
May be reserved for me,
Of weary ways or golden days,
Before his face I see.
I know not when my Lord may come,
At night or noonday fair,
Nor if I'll walk the vale with him,
Or "meet him in the air."

alt_titles: I know whom I have believed
But I know whom I have believed
title_id: Aku Tak Tahu Mengapa Anugerah Tuhan Yang Menakjubkan

title_en: Jesus Lives, and So Shall I

lines.en: Jesus lives, and so shall I.
lines.ko: 예수님은 살아 계시고 나도 그러할 것입니다.

lines.en: Death! thy sting is gone forever!
lines.ko: 죽음! 네 쏘는 것이 영원히 사라졌느니라!

lines.en: He who deigned for me to die,
Lives, the bands of death to sever.
He shall raise me from the dust:
Jesus is my Hope and Trust.
Jesus lives, and reigns supreme,
And, his kingdom still remaining,
I shall also be with him,
Ever living, ever reigning.
God has promised: be it must:
Jesus is my Hope and Trust.
Jesus lives, and by his grace,
Vict'ry o'er my passions giving,
I will cleanse my heart and ways,
Ever to his glory living.
Me he raises from the dust.
Jesus is my Hope and Trust.
Jesus lives, I know full well
lines.ko: 예수님은 살아 계십니다. 나는 잘 압니다.

lines.en: Nought from him my heart can sever,
lines.ko: 내 마음은 그에게서 어떤 것도 떼어낼 수 없습니다.

lines.en: Life nor death nor powers of hell,
Joy nor grief, hence forth forever.
None of all his saints is lost;
lines.ko: 그의 모든 성도들 중 어느 누구도 잃어버린 바 되지 않았습니다.

lines.en: Jesus is my Hope and Trust.
Jesus lives, and death is now
But my entrance into glory.
Courage, then, my soul, for thou
Hast a crown of life before thee;
Thou shalt find thy hopes were just;
lines.ko: 당신은 당신의 희망이 정당했다는 것을 알게 될 것입니다.

lines.en: Jesus is the Christian's Trust.

title_en: Jesus, I My Cross Have Taken

lines.en: Jesus, I my cross have taken,
lines.ko: 십자가를 내가 지고 주를 따라 갑니다
lines.id: Yesus, aku telah mengambil salibku,

lines.en: All to leave, and follow thee;
lines.id: Semua harus pergi, dan melayang rendah pada-Mu

lines.en: Destitute, despised, forsaken,
lines.id: Des-ti-tute, dibenci,untuk-sak-en,

lines.en: Thou from hence my all shalt be:
lines.ko: 주의 평안 내가 받고 영생복을 받겠네
lines.id: Engkau, mulai saat ini, segalanya akan menjadi milikku.

lines.en: Perish ev'ry fond ambition,
lines.id: Per-ish setiap ambisi yang menyenangkan,

lines.en: All I've sought, or hoped, or known;
lines.id: Semua yang saya cari, dan harapkan, atau ketahui

lines.en: Yet how rich is my condition,
lines.id: Namun betapa kayanya kondisiku,

lines.en: God and heav'n are still my own.
lines.id: Tuhan dan surga masih milikku.

lines.en: Man may trouble and distress me,
lines.ko: 주도 곤욕 당했으니 나도 곤욕 당하리
lines.id: Biarkan dunia yang membenci pasir meninggalkanku,

lines.en: 'Twill but drive me to thy breast;
lines.id: Selamat juga

lines.en: Life with trials hard may press me,
lines.ko: 예수 나를 사랑하사 빛난 얼굴 보이면
lines.id: Hati manusia dan lihatlah menipuku,

lines.en: Heav'n will bring me sweeter rest:
lines.id: Anda tidak, seperti manusia, tidak benar

lines.en: O 'tis not in grief to harm me
lines.id: Dan sementara Engkau tersenyum kepadaku,

lines.en: While thy love is left to me;
lines.id: Dewa kebijaksanaan, cinta, dan kekuatan,

lines.en: O 'twere not in joy to charm me,
lines.id: Musuh mungkin membenci, dan teman mungkin menjauhi saya:

lines.en: Were that joy unmixed with thee.
lines.id: Tunjukkan wajah-Mu, dan semuanya cerah.

lines.en: Take, my soul, thy full salvation,
lines.ko: 내가 핍박 당할 때에 주의 품에 안기고
lines.id: Manusia mungkin menyusahkan dan membenciku,

lines.en: Rise o'er sin and fear and care;
lines.ko: 세상 고초 당할수록 많은 위로 받겠네
lines.id: 'Twill tapi antarkan aku ke dada-Mu

lines.en: Joy to find in ev'ry station
lines.ko: 주가 주신 기쁨 외에 기뻐할 것 무어냐
lines.id: Hidup dengan cobaan yang berat mungkin akan menekanku,

lines.en: Something still to do or bear;
lines.ko: 주가 나를 사랑하니 기뻐할 것 뿐일세 아멘
lines.id: Surga akan memberiku istirahat yang lebih manis

lines.en: Think what spirit dwells within thee,
lines.id: O 'tidak dalam kesedihan untuk menyakitiku

lines.en: What a Father's smile is thine,
lines.id: Sementara cinta-Mu serahkan padaku

lines.en: What a Saviour died to win thee:
lines.id: Oh, aku tidak senang memikatku:

lines.en: Child of heav'n, shouldst thou repine?
lines.id: Dimana kegembiraan itu tak tercampur denganMu. Amin.

lines.en: Haste then on from grace to glory,
Armed by faith, and winged by prayer;
Heav'n's eternal day's before thee,
God's own hand shall guide thee there.
Soon shall close thy earthly mission;
Swift shall pass thy pilgrim days;
Hope soon change to glad fruition,
Faith to sight, and prayer to praise.

title_en: O Love That Wilt Not Let Me Go

lines.en: O Love that wilt not let me go,
I rest my weary soul in thee;
lines.ko: 내 지친 영혼을 당신 안에서 쉬게 하소서.

lines.en: I give thee back the life I owe,
That in thine ocean depths its flow
May richer, fuller be.
lines.ko: 더 풍부하고 더 충만해질 수 있습니다.

lines.en: O Light that followest all my way,
I yield my flickering torch to thee;
My heart restores its borrowed ray,
That in thy sunshine's blaze its day
May brighter, fairer be.
O Joy that seekest me through pain
lines.ko: 오 고통 중에 나를 찾는 기쁨이여

lines.en: I cannot close my heart to thee;
lines.ko: 나는 당신에게 내 마음을 닫을 수 없습니다.

lines.en: I trace the rainbow through the rain,
And feel the promise is not vain
lines.ko: 그리고 그 약속이 헛되지 않았음을 느껴보세요

lines.en: That morn shall tearless be.
O Cross that liftest up my head,
lines.ko: 오 내 머리를 높이 드는 십자가여,

lines.en: I dare not ask to fly from thee;
lines.ko: 나는 감히 당신에게서 날아가달라고 요청할 수 없습니다.

lines.en: I lay in dust life's glory dead,
lines.ko: 나는 죽은 삶의 영광을 먼지 속에 누웠고,

lines.en: And from the ground there blossoms red
Life that shall endless be.

title_en: Now I Belong to Jesus

lines.en: I belong to Jesus;
I am not my own;
All I have and all I am,
lines.ko: 내가 가진 모든 것과 나의 전부,

lines.en: Shall be his alone.
I belong to Jesus;
He is Lord and King,
Reigning in my inmost heart,
lines.ko: 내 마음 속 깊은 곳을 다스리며,

lines.en: Over ev'rything.
I belong to Jesus;
Blessed, blessed thought!
With his own most precious blood
Has my soul been bought.
I belong to Jesus;
He has died for me;
I am his and he is mine,
lines.ko: 나는 그의 것이고 그는 내 것이다.

lines.en: Through eternity.
I belong to Jesus;
He will keep my soul,
When the deathly waters dark
Round about me roll.
I belong to Jesus;
And ere long I'll stand
lines.ko: 그리고 머지않아 나는 서 있을 것이다

lines.en: With my precious Saviour there
In the glory land.

title_en: God of Our Fathers

lines.en: [English lyrics not available in the database for this revised hymn]
lines.ko: [이 개정된 찬송가의 데이터베이스에는 영어 가사가 없습니다.]

title_en: God the All-Terrible!

lines.en: [English lyrics not available in the database for this revised hymn]
lines.ko: [이 개정된 찬송가의 데이터베이스에는 영어 가사가 없습니다.]

title_en: O God of Love, O King of Peace
title_ko: 오 사랑의 하나님, 오 평화의 왕이시여 (자체번역)

lines.en: O God of love, O King of peace,
lines.ko: 오 사랑의 하느님, 오 평화의 왕이시여,

lines.en: Make wars throughout the world to cease;
The wrath of sinful man restrain;
Give peace, O God, give peace again.
lines.ko: 오 하나님, 평화를 주소서, 다시 평화를 주소서.

lines.en: Remember, Lord, thy works of old,
The wonders that our fathers told;
Remember not our sin's dark stain;
lines.ko: 우리 죄의 어두운 얼룩을 기억하지 마십시오.

lines.en: Give peace, O God, give peace again.
lines.ko: 오 하나님, 평화를 주소서, 다시 평화를 주소서.

lines.en: Whom shall we trust but thee, O Lord?
lines.ko: 여호와여, 우리가 당신 외에 누구를 의뢰하리이까?

lines.en: Where rest but on thy faithful Word?
lines.ko: 당신의 신실한 말씀 외에 어디에 쉴 곳이 있겠습니까?

lines.en: None ever called on thee in vain;
Give peace, O God, give peace again.
lines.ko: 오 하나님, 평화를 주소서, 다시 평화를 주소서.

lines.en: Where saints and angels dwell above
All hearts are knit in holy love;
lines.ko: 모든 마음은 거룩한 사랑으로 엮여 있습니다.

lines.en: O bind us in that heav'nly chain;
lines.ko: 오, 저 하늘의 사슬에 우리를 묶으소서;

lines.en: Give peace, O God, give peace again.
lines.ko: 오 하나님, 평화를 주소서, 다시 평화를 주소서.

title_en: Great King of Nations, Hear Our Prayer
title_ko: 만국의 위대한 왕이시여, 우리의 기도를 들어주소서 (자체번역)

lines.en: Great King of nations, hear our prayer,
lines.ko: 만국의 위대한 왕이시여, 우리의 기도를 들어주소서.

lines.en: While at thy feet we fall,
lines.ko: 당신 발 밑에 우리가 넘어지는 동안,

lines.en: And humbly, with united cry,
To thee for mercy call.
The guilt is ours, but grace is thine,
lines.ko: 죄는 우리의 것이요 은혜는 당신의 것이니

lines.en: O turn us not away;
But hear us from thy lofty throne,
lines.ko: 그러나 당신의 높은 보좌에서 우리의 말을 들으소서.

lines.en: And help us when we pray.
Our fathers' sins were manifold,
And ours no less we own,
lines.ko: 그리고 우리의 것 역시 우리가 소유하고 있는 것입니다.

lines.en: Yet wondrously from age to age
Thy goodness hath been shown.
When dangers, like a stormy sea,
lines.ko: 폭풍우가 치는 바다와 같은 위험이 닥칠 때,

lines.en: Beset our country round,
To thee we looked, to thee we cried,
lines.ko: 우리는 당신을 바라보고 당신을 바라보며 울었습니다.

lines.en: And help in thee was found.
With one consent we meekly bow
Beneath thy chastening hand,
And, pouring forth confession meet,
Mourn with our mourning land.
With pitying eye behold our need,
As thus we lift our prayer;
Correct us with thy judgments, Lord,
lines.ko: 주님, 당신의 판단으로 우리를 바로잡아 주십시오.

lines.en: Then let thy mercy spare.

title_en: We Plow the Fields

lines.en: [English lyrics not available in the database for this revised hymn]
lines.ko: [이 개정된 찬송가의 데이터베이스에는 영어 가사가 없습니다.]

title_en: Come, Ye Thankful People, Come

lines.en: Come, ye thankful people, come,
lines.id: Lihatlah burung-burung yang terbang di angkasa,

lines.en: Raise the song of harvest home:
lines.ko: 추운 겨울 오기 전 염려 없게 거뒀네
lines.id: Bagaimana mereka tidak membajak tanah.

lines.en: All is safely gathered in,
lines.id: Juga belum berkumpul untuk gudang

lines.en: Ere the winter storms begin;
lines.ko: 주의 전에 모여서 추수 찬송 부르세
lines.id: Buah apa pun yang dihasilkan tanah.

lines.en: God, our Maker, doth provide
lines.id: Namun Bapa Surgawi Anda memberi mereka makan

lines.en: For our wants to be supplied:
lines.id: Lalu masa depan apa yang bisa Anda takuti?

lines.en: Come to God's own temple, come,
lines.id: Bagi-Nya, kamu jauh lebih berharga,

lines.en: Raise the song of harvest home.
lines.id: Tidakkah kamu ingin mereka diberi makan?

lines.en: All the world is God's own field,
lines.ko: 이 세상은 밭이요 주는 씨를 뿌리네
lines.id: Lihatlah bunga lili di padang rumput,

lines.en: Fruit unto his praise to yield;
lines.ko: 좋은 곡식 싹 날 때 가라지도 나도다
lines.id: Bagaimana mereka tidak bekerja keras dan tidak memintal.

lines.en: Wheat and tares together sown,
lines.ko: 싹과 잎이 자라서 열매 맺게 되나니
lines.id: Namun pakaian mereka membuat kemegahan

lines.en: Unto joy or sorrow grown:
lines.id: Raja Sol-o-mon tampak redup.

lines.en: First the blade, and then the ear,
lines.id: Maka Tuhan tidak akan mendandani anak-anak-Nya,

lines.en: Then the full corn shall appear:
lines.id: Siapa yang Dia cintai, yang Dia sayangi,

lines.en: Lord of harvest, grant that we
lines.id: Jika Dia memang menghiasi rumput

lines.en: Wholesome grain and pure may be.
lines.id: Yang mana yang ditebang dan dibakar oleh petani?

lines.en: For the Lord our God shall come,
lines.id: Jangan cemas akan masa depan,

lines.en: And shall take his harvest home;
lines.ko: 밭에 있는 나쁜 것 모두 소멸 하실 때
lines.id: Apa yang harus dimakan atau diminum atau dipakai,

lines.en: From his field shall in that day
lines.id: Untuk ketakutan dan kekhawatiran yang bodoh

lines.en: All offences purge away;
lines.id: Apakah mereka peduli pada orang-orang non-Yahudi.

lines.en: Give his angels charge at last
lines.id: Namun karunia Bapa Surgawi Anda

lines.en: In the fire the tares to cast,
lines.id: Membawamu ke sayap elang,

lines.en: But the fruitful ears to store
lines.id: Dan sebelum Anda bertanya, Ayah Anda

lines.en: In his garner evermore.
lines.id: Tahu Anda membutuhkan semua hal ini.

lines.en: Even so, Lord, quickly come
lines.id: Carilah dahulu Kerajaan Ayahmu,

lines.en: To thy final harvest home;
lines.ko: 죄와 슬픔 중에서 우리 건져 주소서
lines.id: Dan kebenaran-Nya, dan lakukan

lines.en: Gather thou thy people in,
lines.id: Bukan kehendak Anda, melainkan kehendak-Nya, dan pastinya

lines.en: Free from sorrow, free from sin;
lines.ko: 천군천사 어울려 추수 찬송 부르리 아멘
lines.id: Hal-hal ini juga harus ditambahkan.

lines.en: There for ever purified,
lines.id: Jangan cemas untuk hari esok,

lines.en: In thy presence to abide:
lines.id: Tidak memikul beban sehari dua kali.

lines.en: Come, with all thine angels, come,
lines.id: Tuhan telah merencanakan kesulitan setiap hari

lines.en: Raise the glorious harvest home.
lines.id: Karena hari mereka sendiri sudah cukup.

title_id: Ayo, Hai Orang-orang yang Bersyukur, Ayo

title_en: Sing to the Lord of Harvest

lines.en: Sing to the Lord of har-vest,
lines.id: Bernyanyilah bagi Tuhan yang menuai,

lines.en: Sing songs of love and praise.
lines.id: Nyanyikan lagu cinta dan pujian.

lines.en: with joy-ful hearts and voic-es
lines.id: dengan hati dan suara gembira

lines.ko: 참 고마우신 주를 다 찬양 하여라
lines.en: Your al-le-lu-ias raise.
lines.id: Kenaikan gaji al-le-lu-ias Anda.

lines.en: By Him the roll-ing sea-sons
lines.id: Demi Dialah musim yang bergulung-gulung

lines.en: In fruit-ful or-der move
lines.id: Dalam urutan yang membuahkan hasil

lines.en: Sing to the Lord of har-vest
lines.id: Bernyanyilah untuk Tuhan yang menuai

lines.en: A joy-ous song of love.
lines.id: Lagu cinta yang menggembirakan.

lines.en: By Him the clouds drop fat-ness,
lines.id: Demi Dia awan menjatuhkan kegemukan,

lines.en: The des-erts bloom and spring,
lines.id: Gurun bermekaran dan musim semi,

lines.en: The hills leap up in glad-ness,
lines.id: Bukit-bukit melonjak kegirangan,

lines.en: The val-leys laugh and sing.
lines.id: Lembah tertawa dan bernyanyi.

lines.en: He bless-es from His full-ness
lines.id: Dia memberkati dari kepenuhan-Nya

lines.en: All things with large in-crease,
lines.id: Semua hal dengan peningkatan besar,

lines.en: He crowns the year with good-ness,
lines.id: Dia memahkotai tahun ini dengan kebaikan,

lines.en: With plen-ty and with peace.
lines.id: Dengan berlimpah dan damai.

lines.ko: 은혜로 거둔 곡식 주 앞에 바치고
lines.en: Bring to His sa-cred al-tar
lines.id: Bawalah ke altar suci-Nya

lines.ko: 구원을 받은 이 몸 주님께 바치세
lines.en: The gifts His good-ness gave,
lines.id: Karunia yang diberikan oleh kebaikan-Nya,

lines.en: The gold-en sheaves of har-vest,
lines.id: Berkas panen berwarna emas,

lines.ko: 생명을 주신 주 다 경배 드리세
lines.en: The souls He died to save.
lines.id: Jiwa-jiwa yang Dia mati untuk selamatkan.

lines.en: Your hearts lay down be-fore Him
lines.id: Hatimu terbentang di hadapan-Nya

lines.en: When at His feet you fall,
lines.id: Ketika di kaki-Nya kamu terjatuh,

lines.en: And with your lives a-dore Him,
lines.id: Dan dengan hidupmu memuja Dia,

lines.en: Who gave His life for all.
lines.id: Yang memberikan hidup-Nya untuk semua orang.

title_en: Blest the Man That Fears Jehovah

lines.en: From Psalm 128
Blest the man that fears Jehovah,
Walking ever in his ways,
By thy toil thou shalt be prospered
And be happy all thy days.
In thy wife thou shalt have gladness,
lines.ko: 네 아내로 말미암아 네가 즐거움을 얻을 것이요

lines.en: She shall fill thy home with good,
lines.ko: 그가 네 집을 좋은 것으로 채우리라.

lines.en: Happy in her loving service
And the joys of motherhood.
Joyful children, sons and daughters,
Shall about thy table meet,
lines.ko: 네 식탁 주위에서 만날 수 있겠느냐?

lines.en: Olive plants, in strength and beauty,
Full of hope and promise sweet.
Lo, on him that fears Jehovah
Shall this blessedness attend,
For Jehovah out of Zion
Shall to thee his blessing send.
Thou shalt see God's kingdom prosper
lines.ko: 너는 하나님의 나라가 번영하는 것을 보게 될 것이다

lines.en: All thy days, till life shall cease,
lines.ko: 너의 모든 날, 생명이 다할 때까지,

lines.en: Thou shalt see thy children's children;
lines.ko: 너는 네 자녀의 자녀를 보게 될 것이다.

lines.en: On thy people, Lord, be peace.
lines.ko: 주님, 당신의 백성에게 평화가 있기를 빕니다.

title_en: O Happy Home, Where Thou Art Loved
title_ko: 오 행복한 집, 당신이 사랑하신 곳 (자체번역)

lines.en: [English lyrics not available in the database for this revised hymn]
lines.ko: [이 개정된 찬송가의 데이터베이스에는 영어 가사가 없습니다.]

title_en: A Christian Home

lines.en: [English lyrics not available in the database for this revised hymn]
lines.ko: [이 개정된 찬송가의 데이터베이스에는 영어 가사가 없습니다.]

title_en: Happy the Home When God Is There

lines.en: Happy the home when God is there,
And love fills ev'ry breast:
When one their wish, and one their prayer,
And one their heav'nly rest.
Happy the home where Jesus' name
Is sweet to ev'ry ear;
Where children early lisp his fame,
lines.ko: 아이들이 일찍부터 그의 명성을 헛소리하는 곳,

lines.en: And parents hold him dear.
Happy the home where prayer is heard,
And praise is wont to rise,
Where parents love the sacred Word,
That makes us truly wise.
Lord, let us in our homes agree,
This blessed peace to gain;
Unite our hearts in love to thee,
lines.ko: 당신을 향한 사랑으로 우리 마음을 하나로 묶어 주소서.

lines.en: And love to all will reign.
lines.ko: 그리고 모든 사람에 대한 사랑이 다스리게 될 것입니다.

title_en: O Father, All-Creating

lines.en: O Father all creating,
Whose wisdom, love, and power
First bound two lives together
lines.ko: 먼저 두 사람의 삶을 하나로 묶었습니다.

lines.en: In Eden's primal hour,
Today to these thy children
Thine earliest gifts renew,
A home by thee made happy,
A love by thee kept true.
O Saviour, guest most bounteous
Of old in Galilee,
Vouchsafe today thy presence
With these who call on thee;
Their store of earthly gladness
Transform to heav'nly wine,
And teach them in the tasting
To know the gift is thine.
lines.ko: 그 선물이 당신의 것이라는 것을 아는 것입니다.

lines.en: O Spirit of the Father,
Breathe on them from above,
So mighty in thy pureness
So tender in thy love,
That, guarded by thy presence,
From sin and strife kept free,
Their lives may own thy guidance,
lines.ko: 그들의 삶은 당신의 인도를 소유할 수 있으며,

lines.en: Their hearts be ruled by thee.
Except thou build it, Father,
The house is built in vain;
Except thou, Saviour, bless it,
The joy will turn to pain;
But nought can break the union
lines.ko: 하지만 그 어떤 것도 노조를 깨뜨릴 수는 없어요

lines.en: Of hearts in thee made one;
lines.ko: 당신 안에 있는 마음들이 하나가 되었습니다.

lines.en: And love thy Spirit hallows
Is endless love begun.

title_en: O Perfect Love

lines.en: O perfect Love, all human thought transcending,
lines.id: Wahai Cinta yang sempurna, semua pemikiran manusia melampaui,

lines.en: Lowly we kneel in prayer before thy throne,
lines.id: Dengan rendah hati kami berlutut berdoa di hadapan takhta-Mu,

lines.en: That theirs may be the love which knows no ending,
lines.ko: 둘 한 몸 되어 보람 있게 살라
lines.id: Semoga cinta mereka tiada akhir,

lines.en: Whom thou for evermore dost join in one.
lines.id: Yang Engkau selamanya bergabung menjadi satu.

lines.en: O perfect Life, be thou their full assurance
lines.id: Wahai Kehidupan yang Sempurna, Jadilah Engkau yang memberikan jaminan penuh bagi mereka

lines.en: Of tender charity and steadfast faith,
lines.id: Dari amal yang lembut dan keimanan yang teguh,

lines.en: Of patient hope, and quiet, brave endurance,
lines.id: Harapan yang sabar, dan daya tahan yang tenang dan berani,

lines.en: With childlike trust that fears nor pain nor death.
lines.id: Dengan kepercayaan seperti anak kecil yang tidak takut akan rasa sakit atau kematian.

lines.en: Grant them the joy which brightens earthly sorrow;
lines.id: Berilah mereka kegembiraan yang mencerahkan kesedihan duniawi

lines.en: Grant them the peace which calms all earthly strife,
lines.id: Berilah mereka kedamaian yang menenangkan segala perselisihan di dunia,

lines.en: And to life's day the glorious unknown morrow
lines.id: Dan pada hari-hari kehidupan, hari esok yang mulia dan tidak diketahui

lines.en: That dawns upon eternal love and life.
lines.id: Hal itulah yang memunculkan cinta dan kehidupan abadi. Amin.

lines.en: Hear us, O Father, gracious and forgiving,
Through Jesus Christ thy co-eternal Word,
Who, with the Holy Ghost, by all things living
Now and to endless ages art adored.

title_id: Wahai Cinta Sempurna, Seluruh Pikiran Manusia Melampaui

title_en: Come Away to the Skies

lines.en: [English lyrics not available in the database for this revised hymn]
lines.ko: [이 개정된 찬송가의 데이터베이스에는 영어 가사가 없습니다.]

title_en: The Ten Commandments

lines.en: [English lyrics not available in the database for this revised hymn]
lines.ko: [이 개정된 찬송가의 데이터베이스에는 영어 가사가 없습니다.]

title_en: The Lord’s Prayer

lines.en: [English lyrics not available in the database for this revised hymn]
lines.ko: [이 개정된 찬송가의 데이터베이스에는 영어 가사가 없습니다.]

title_en: Spirit of the Living God

lines.en: O Spirit of the living God,
In all thy plenitude of grace,
Where'er the foot of man hath trod,
Descend on our apostate race.
Give tongues of fire and hearts of love
To preach the reconciling word;
Give pow'r and unction from above,
Whene'er the joyful sound is heard.
Be darkness, at thy coming, light;
lines.ko: 당신이 오실 때에는 어둠이 되십시오. 빛이 되십시오.

lines.en: Confusion, order in thy path;
lines.ko: 혼란이여, 당신의 길을 질서 있게 하십시오.

lines.en: Souls without strength inspire with might;
Bid mercy triumph over wrath.
O Spirit of the Lord, prepare
All the round earth her God to meet;
Breathe thou abroad like morning air,
Till hearts of stone begin to beat.
Baptize the nations; far and nigh
The triumphs of the cross record;
The Name of Jesus glorify,
Till every kindred call him Lord.
lines.ko: 모든 족속이 그를 주님이라 부를 때까지.

lines.en: God from eternity hath willed
All flesh shall his salvation see:
So be the Father's love fulfilled,
The Saviour's suff'rings crowned through thee.
lines.ko: 구주의 고난이 당신을 통해 관을 씌웠습니다.

title_en: Lead Me, Lord, Lead Me in Thy Righteousness
title_ko: 나를 인도하소서, 주님, 당신의 의로 나를 인도하소서 (자체번역)

lines.en: [English lyrics not available in the database for this revised hymn]
lines.ko: [이 개정된 찬송가의 데이터베이스에는 영어 가사가 없습니다.]

title_en: Hear Our Prayer, O Lord

lines.en: Spir-it of truth, of life, of power,
lines.id: Semangat kebenaran, kehidupan, kekuasaan,

lines.en: I sac-ri-fice My-self to Thee.
lines.id: Aku mengorbankan diriku padaMu.

lines.en: Oh, our Lord, make our minds in one,
lines.id: Ya Tuhan kami, jadikanlah pikiran kami satu,

lines.en: with-our Faith and hope and love. A-men.
lines.id: dengan Iman, harapan, dan cinta kita. Amin.

title_en: All Things Are Thine

lines.en: [English lyrics not available in the database for this revised hymn]
lines.ko: [이 개정된 찬송가의 데이터베이스에는 영어 가사가 없습니다.]

title_en: Benediction

lines.en: [English lyrics not available in the database for this revised hymn]
lines.ko: [이 개정된 찬송가의 데이터베이스에는 영어 가사가 없습니다.]

title_en: Doxology

lines.en: Praise God, from whom all blessings flow;
Praise Him, all creatures here below;
Alleluia, alleluia!
Praise Him above, ye heav’nly host;
Praise Father, Son, and Holy Ghost.
Alleluia, alleluia, alleluia, alleluia, alleluia!

alt_titles: Praise God from whom all blessings flow

title_en: Gloria Patri

lines.en: Glory be to God the Father,
And to Christ his only Son;
Praise we too the Holy Spirit,
Binding all the church as one;
As it was in the beginning,
Is for now and evermore!
Amen, amen! Amen, amen!

alt_titles: Glory be to God the Father

title_en: Gloria Patri

And to Christ his only Son;

Binding all the church as one;

Amen, amen! Amen, amen!

title_en: Christ, We Do All Adore Thee

lines.en: Christ, we do all adore Thee, and we do praise Thee forever;
lines.ko: 그리스도여, 우리는 모두 당신을 경배하며 영원히 당신을 찬양합니다.

lines.en: Christ, we do all adore Thee, and we do praise Thee forever;
lines.ko: 그리스도여, 우리는 모두 당신을 경배하며 영원히 당신을 찬양합니다.

lines.en: For on the holy cross hast Thou the world from sin redeemed.
lines.ko: 당신은 거룩한 십자가에서 세상을 죄에서 구원하셨나이다.

lines.en: Christ, we do all adore Thee, and we do praise Thee forever.
lines.ko: 그리스도여, 우리는 모두 당신을 경배하며 영원히 당신을 찬양합니다.

lines.en: Christ, we do all adore Thee.

alt_titles: Adoramus Te, Christe

title_en: Twofold Amen

lines.en: Amen, amen.

alt_titles: Double Amen

title_en: Twofold Amen

lines.en: Amen, amen.

alt_titles: Double Amen

title_en: Threefold Amen

lines.en: Amen, amen, amen.

alt_titles: Triple Amen

title_en: The Apostles’ Creed

lines.en: I believe in God the Father, Maker of all heav'n and earth;
lines.ko: 나는 하늘과 땅의 모든 창조주이신 하나님 아버지를 믿습니다.

lines.en: And in Jesus Christ, our Savior, God's own Son, of matchless worth;
lines.ko: 그리고 우리 구주이시며 하나님의 독생자이신 예수 그리스도 안에는 비할 데 없는 가치가 있습니다.

lines.en: By the Spirit was conceived, of the virgin Mary born,
He in whom I have believed: God Almighty, Three in One.
lines.ko: 내가 믿는 이는 삼위일체이신 전능하신 하나님이니라.

lines.en: Suffered under Pontius Pilate, crucified, for me he died;
lines.ko: 본디오 빌라도 치하에서 고난을 받으사 십자가에 못 박혀 나를 위하여 죽으셨느니라

lines.en: Laid within the grave so silent, gates of hell he opened wide;
lines.ko: 너무나 고요했던 무덤 속에 누워서 그는 지옥의 문을 활짝 열었습니다.

lines.en: For the stone-sealed tomb was empty; on the third day he arose;
lines.ko: 돌로 막은 무덤은 비어 있었습니다. 셋째 날에 그는 일어났습니다.

lines.en: Into heaven made his entry, mighty conqu'ror of his foes.
lines.ko: 그의 적들을 정복하는 강력한 정복자가 되어 천국에 들어가셨습니다.

lines.en: At God's right hand he is seated till his coming, as he said;
lines.ko: 그는 말씀하신 대로 그가 오실 때까지 하나님 우편에 앉아 계시느니라.

lines.en: Final judgment will be meted to the living and the dead;
lines.ko: 최후의 심판은 산 자와 죽은 자에게 내려질 것입니다.

lines.en: I confess the Holy Spirit who was sent through Christ the Son
lines.ko: 성자 그리스도를 통하여 보내신 성령을 고백합니다

lines.en: To apply salvation's merit - God, the Spirit, Three in One.
lines.ko: 구원의 공로를 적용하는 것 - 하나님, 성령, 삼위일체.

lines.en: I believe the church of Jesus, universal, e'er remains;
lines.ko: 나는 예수의 교회가 보편적이고 영원히 남아 있음을 믿습니다.

lines.en: We are one through all the ages, in communion of the saints.
lines.ko: 우리는 성도들의 교통 안에서 모든 시대에 걸쳐 하나입니다.

lines.en: I believe sins are forgiven, that our bodies will be raised
lines.ko: 죄사함을 받았고 우리 몸이 다시 살아날 것을 믿습니다

lines.en: To eternal life in heaven: ever let his name be praised.
lines.ko: 천국에서 영생을 얻으려면 그의 이름이 항상 찬양을 받으십시오.
